Name: Women of Influence+
Description:
For 30 years, Women of Influence+ has been a catalyst for advancing women’s leadership, workplace equity, and systemic change. Through high-impact events, research-driven insights, and a global network of over one million business leaders and professionals, Women of Influence+ helps shape policy, influence corporate strategy, and drive economic inclusion.

At Women of Influence+, impact is defined by the decisions shaped and opportunities created. Here, leadership isn’t just about who holds power—it’s about how that power is used to build a more inclusive and equitable future.

For companies and organizations committed to long-term growth and innovation, partnering with Women of Influence+ means aligning with the next era of leadership.

Name: Conseil supérieur du notariat - Notaires de France
Description:
Les notaires de France sont des juristes investis d’une mission d’autorité publique qui préparent des contrats sous la forme authentique pour le compte de ses clients. Ils exercent leurs fonctions dans un cadre libéral et assument leur mission de service public sur l'ensemble du territoire. Ils contribuent à la vie économique du pays.

Seul organe de la profession habilité à s'exprimer au nom de tous les notaires de France, le Conseil supérieur du notariat est un établissement d'utilité publique. Il repose sur un schéma défini par l'Ordonnance du 2 novembre 1945 et le décret du 19 décembre 1945.

Il représente la profession auprès des pouvoirs publics, Il détermine sa politique générale, Il contribue à l'évolution du notariat, Il fournit des services collectifs aux notaires.

Dans ses relations avec les pouvoirs publics, le Conseil supérieur du notariat contribue à la réflexion sur les évolutions du droit, donne son avis sur les projets de loi ou les textes réglementaires en préparation.

Name: The Chief of Staff Association
Description:
Chiefs of staff act as trusted advisors who guide and support the world’s most influential leaders.

The Chief of Staff Association (CSA) is the professional home for chiefs of staff across major corporations, government, nonprofits and the military. With offices in London, New York and Melbourne, we provide education, networking and professional development that strengthen strategy, leadership and decision-making. Our programmes include executive education at Oxford’s Saïd Business School and Harvard Business School.

The CSA is the only professional association authorised to award the Certified Chief of Staff credential.

Name: Canadian Nurses Association
Description:
CNA is the national and global professional voice of Canadian nursing. Our mission is to advance the nursing profession to improve health outcomes in Canada’s publicly funded, not-for-profit health system. CNA is the only national association that speaks for all nurses in all sectors and practice settings across all 13 provinces and territories. We represent nurses that are unionized and non-unionized, retired nurses, nursing students, and all categories of nurses (licensed and registered practical nurses, nurse practitioners, registered nurses, and registered psychiatric nurses).

Why Join? 
https://www.cna-aiic.ca/en/membership/why-join-cna

L’Association des infirmières et infirmiers du Canada (AIIC) représente la profession infirmière du Canada à l’échelle nationale et mondiale. Elle fait progresser la profession infirmière afin d’améliorer les résultats sur la santé dans le système de santé sans but lucratif financé par le secteur public. L’AIIC est la seule association nationale porte-parole de tous les types d’infirmières et infirmiers dans l’ensemble des treize provinces et territoires. Elle représente les infirmières et infirmiers syndiqués et non syndiqués ainsi que retraités, les étudiants en sciences infirmières et le personnel infirmier de toutes les catégories (autorisés, auxiliaires autorisés, praticiens, et psychiatriques autorisés).

Pourquoi adhérer à l’AIIC?
L'AIIC est heureuse d'accueillir tous les infirmières et infirmiers réglementés suivants : les infirmières et infirmiers praticiens, les infirmières et infirmiers autorisés, les infirmières et infirmiers auxiliaires autorisés ainsi que les infirmières et infirmiers psychiatriques autorisés. Nous accueillons aussi les étudiants en sciences infirmières, ainsi que les infirmières et infirmiers retraités dans toutes les catégories.

Name: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria
Description:
The Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (ICAN) was established by Act of Parliament No. 15 of 1965 and is a founding member of International Federation of Accountants (IFAC), Pan African Federation of Accountants (PAFA) and the Association of Accountancy Bodies in West Africa (ABWA).

ICAN is empowered to set standards of knowledge and skills to be attained by persons seeking to become members of the accountancy profession in Nigeria. The Institute has more than 39,000 members and 120,000 students on its registers and conducts professional examinations twice in a year. Its vision is to be a leading global professional body while its mission is to produce world-class Chartered Accountants, regulate and continuously enhance their ethical standards and technical competence in the public interest.

The Institute is engaged in broadening the frontiers of the profession in Africa by mentoring sister professional accountancy bodies for international recognition.

Name: France Digitale
Description:
Fondée en 2012, France Digitale est la plus grande association de startups en Europe, avec plus de 2000 membres startups et investisseurs français du numérique.

Nos missions ?
- Faire émerger des champions du numérique en Europe.
- Porter la voix et fédérer celles et ceux qui innovent pour changer la face du monde.
- Créer des ponts et des opportunités de business entre tous les acteurs de l’innovation qu’ils soient grands groupes, décideurs publics, investisseurs, entrepreneurs ou salariés des startups et scale-ups.

Comment ?
1. En connectant les acteurs de l’écosystème lors de rencontres de qualité, de rendez-vous d’affaires ou même d’auditions institutionnelles.
2. En faisant gagner du temps aux entrepreneurs grâce au partage d’expériences, de bonnes pratiques et des meilleurs outils
3. En lançant des campagnes de sensibilisation auprès des politiques et du grand public (pour que même notre famille comprenne ce qu’on fait !)

Chaque année, France Digitale c’est :
- 50+ événements : des FDTour pour lever des fonds partout en France, des C-level days pour fédérer les professionnels des startups, scale-ups et VCs ou encore le FDDay, grande réunion annuelle pour tout l’écosystème.
- 1,000+ rencontres entre des startups et des investisseurs et 450+ rencontres avec des grands groupes et des décideurs publics.
- 20+ mappings et décryptages des sujets de fond et réglementaires, et même une newsletter avec le meilleur de l’actu tech pour toujours garder un temps d’avance.

Notre objectif pour les années à venir : accompagner la croissance de l’écosystème au service de l’Homme et de la planète pour faire de l’Europe le leader de l’innovation responsable.

France Digitale est co-présidée par Frédéric Mazzella, fondateur de BlablaCar, et Benoist Grossmann, CEO d’Eurazeo.

Name: ĐÚNG NGƯỜI ĐÚNG VIỆC Community
Description:
Chào mừng bạn đến với ĐÚNG NGƯỜI ĐÚNG VIỆC Community, Kênh chọn lọc Việc làm tốt - Ứng viên xịn.

Xuất phát từ một dự án cộng đồng giúp kết nối ứng viên và nhà tuyển dụng hoàn toàn miễn phí, được khởi xướng bởi Ms Carol Võ (Founder) với 16+ năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực tuyển dụng, ĐNĐV liên tục cập nhật job chọn lọc, chia sẻ hồ sơ ứng viên chất lượng, cùng các tips đi làm, góc nhìn tuyển dụng và các kiến thức luật lao động dễ áp dụng. 
Từ đó, ĐNĐV trở thành một kênh thông tin về tuyển dụng và tìm việc đáng tin cậy cho thị trường lao động tại Việt Nam.

Sau 2+ năm hoạt động, ĐNĐV tự hào đạt được các cột mốc tăng trưởng ấn tượng:
* 10.000+ doanh nghiệp đăng ký tuyển dụng
* 500.000+ ứng viên đăng ký tìm việc
* TOP 1 tăng trưởng follower trên LinkedIn tại Việt Nam 2025 (theo LinkedIn Page Analytics)

Tiếp tục hành trình đó, bước sang 2026, ĐNĐV quyết định đồng hành cùng JoFi.ai - Nền tảng AI sourcing cho Recruiters, cung cấp công cụ tìm nguồn hiệu quả, và vẫn giữ nguyên sứ mệnh của nhà sáng lập: giúp Doanh nghiệp tìm ĐÚNG NGƯỜI, giúp Ứng viên tìm ĐÚNG VIỆC.

Liên hệ với chúng tôi:
 Email: hotro@dungnguoidungviec.com
 Hotline: 0828177880
Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@dungnguoidungviec
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/dungnguoidungvieccommunity
Tiktok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dungnguoidungviecc

Name: Women We Admire
Description: Women We Admire is a professional community celebrating and connecting top women leaders across industries. With thousands of accomplished members, we recognize excellence, share insights, and spotlight the achievements of executives, entrepreneurs, and innovators who are shaping the future of leadership. Our members represent a powerful network of professionals who value connection, visibility, and impact. Through exclusive features, events, and thought leadership, Women We Admire provides a space for women at the top of their fields to exchange ideas, inspire progress, and elevate one another.

Name: American College of Clinical Pharmacy (ACCP)
Description:
The American College of Clinical Pharmacy (ACCP) is a professional and scientific society that provides leadership, education, advocacy, and resources enabling clinical pharmacists to achieve excellence in practice, research, and education.

ACCP's membership is composed of practitioners, scientists, educators, administrators, students, residents, fellows, and others committed to excellence in clinical pharmacy and patient pharmacotherapy.

Name: Royal Class
Description: The Royal Class Group Established in 2014 and have proven to satisfy all clients’ needs by providing excellent service and quality products in all lines of businesses that we cover. Whether it is Business Centre, Business Consultancy and Real Estate services, We got you covered!

Name: SEDIMA
Description:
Syndicat National des Entreprises de Service et Distribution du Machinisme Agricole, d'Espaces Verts, et des Métiers spécialisés (élevage, irrigation, viticole-vinicole...)

- Plus de 800 adhérents
- 1 600 points de vente dans toute la France
 
Avec 46,80% d'entreprises et 51,18% de salariés représentés, le SEDIMA est l'organisation majoritaire de la branche SDLM. (arrêté du 29 novembre 2017 - JO du 21/12/17)

Le SEDIMA a une double mission :

1. Assurer une représentation responsable des acteurs de la profession
2. Offrir à ses adhérents une large plateforme de services

Name: Partnership Leaders
Description:
Partnership Leaders elevates partnership careers with expert insights that cut through the noise.

More than 2,200+ of the world’s top partner professionals grow with us through community, events, and resources.

Apply for membership at www.partnershipleaders.com

Name: Selective Touch Consultancy
Description: Selective Touch is a distinguished consultancy agency based in Saudi Arabia, dedicated to enhancing the talent acquisition process for both employers and job seekers. With a deep understanding of the local market and a comprehensive approach to staffing, we specialize in sourcing top-tier talent across various industries, helping to build successful organizations and propel careers forward. Connect with us for unparalleled consultancy solutions and to explore how we can contribute to your professional journey.

Name: IWFM | Institute of Workplace and Facilities Management
Description:
The Institute of Workplace and Facilities Management (IWFM) is the body for workplace and facilities professionals.  

We exist because workplace and facilities management transforms organisations and enhances experience. We empower and enable workplace and facilities professionals to expand their potential and have rewarding, impactful careers. We are a business enabler. Together, we optimise the profession’s impact. Our vision: where every workplace delivers.

The IWFM was established in 2018. It builds on the proud heritage of 25 years of the British Institute of Facilities Management.

Name: Creative Careers Club
Description: We're a social enterprise that supports graduates and early career professionals to secure jobs and build thriving careers in creative workplaces.

Name: To-Let Globe
Description:
To- Let Globe is a trusted rental management platform. It works 24/7 in online mode to find your dream rental space in just a click. It’s a zero brokerage platform.

Follow To let Globe on Instagram, Facebook and LinkedIn for more information and updates on amazing affordable rental properties.

We follow the client centric approach driven by customer satisfaction.

Engaging tenants by clarifying, tailoring based on individual needs and property owner by satisfying their demands. 

We help you in all the processes from finding your affordable dream rental properties to solving post rental problems.

We have various teams such as Marketing, Content Writers, Tech Research, Content Designers, Social Media Handlers , Data Analysts, Frontend Developers, Business Analysts, Public Relations, Market Research Analysts , UI /UX Designers and Backend Developer 
to concentrate on each and every aspect of the process.

To Let Globe focuses on clarity by introducing the rental places through pictures and videos . The company emphasize on conversations with landlords and tenants by keeping informed, regular follow up. We ensure clear communication. 

Services based on apartments, villas , fully furnished office spaces , budget ranging from low to medium. Students who look to move in for their education, paid guests (PG) and separate rooms are also available. 

We operate in the main branch Lucknow and other three branches in Ayodhya , Kota and Vellore .

Name: Chief of Staff Network
Description:
The Chief of Staff Network is the leading professional organization for top Chiefs of Staff from leading startups, enterprises, non-profits, and higher education. 

Our program combines comprehensive development tracks, curated resources and guides, and a value-driven community to accelerate our members’ teams and careers.

Name: Syrian Professional Network
Description: Syrpronet is an exclusive community of elite professionals collaborating across diverse industries to drive innovation and create forward-thinking opportunities. By connecting visionary leaders and experts, we shape the future with realistic solutions and strategic collaborations.

Name: Contract Nerds
Description:
Contract Nerds is a blog, resource, and community for lawyers and contracts professionals around the world!  Our mission is to educate, connect, and improve the way we work with contracts. Join thousands of fellow #contractnerds by following us, attending our events, and subscribing to our newsletter.

We have been ranked the #1 blog for in-house counsel 3 years in a row by Sterling Miller of The Ten Things You Need to Know As In-House Counsel.

"I’ll admit it.  I am a nerd.  And I love contracts.  I am the perfect audience for this fantastic blog by Nada Alnajafi." — Sterling Miller

Topics we cover:

- AI Contracts
- SaaS Agreements
- Contract Drafting
- Contract Negotiation
- Data Privacy
- Technology Agreements
- Contract Management
- CLM and Legal Tech
- Careers in Contracts
- Contract Design
- ESG Contracts
- Contract Redlining

Ways to join us:
1. Follow us on LinkedIn and engage with our posts.
2. Subscribe to our weekly newsletter for expert-led content straight to your inbox.
3. Join our free monthly webinars for an opportunity to win prizes, get CLE credit, and learn!

What people are saying about us:

"Contract Nerds is making a positive difference for the next generation of attorneys." —Jessica Yee, Contract Manager

"Thank you for making contracts seem more interesting when I historically haven’t been excited about them despite them being a heavy part of my job." — Noura Barakat, Corporate Counsel at Agora

"As General Counsel, I have found Contract Nerds to be informative and helpful is an excellent on contracts that and more! I love how you refer to us as contracts professionals — it’s very inclusive and covers attorneys, contracts managers / admins, paralegals, legal assistants, etc. who all do meaningful work with contracts.” —Megan Lutes, General Counsel

"I love your Contract Nerds project and will definitely be subscribing to it!" Erin Glynn, Real Estate Attorney

"Absolutely fantastic and timely pieces." Amanda Wick, Chief of Legal Affairs

Name: Consejo Colombiano de Construcción Sostenible (CCCS)
Description:
El Consejo Colombiano de Construcción Sostenible (CCCS) - Colombia Green Building Council es una organización privada sin ánimo de lucro fundada en febrero de 2008, cuya misión es inspirar e impulsar a las personas a crear un mundo sostenible. El CCCS aspira a liderar la transformación de la conciencia colectiva hacia un entorno construido sosteniblemente.

El CCCS se compone de una Red de Miembros (empresas, colegios, universidades, organizaciones no gubernamentales y gremios), y cuenta con un importante reconocimiento internacional por su aporte a la promoción de mejores prácticas en la construcción, tanto por su condición de representante en Colombia del World Green Building Council (www.worldgbc.org) como por el liderazgo de su Directora Ejecutiva en su condición de Presidente de la Red de las Américas de consejos de construcción sostenible y Miembro de la junta directiva del WorldGBC. 

Las acciones del CCCS se concentran en fortalecer el conocimiento sobre construcción y urbanismo sostenible, fomentar la utilización de sistemas de certificación y normalización de mercados verdes en la construcción, colaborar con el gobierno nacional y los gobiernos locales para gestionar y apoyar la formulación de políticas de producción y consumo responsable para el sector.

Name: FER Genève
Description:
La Fédération des Entreprises Romandes Genève, forte de ses 26'000 entreprises membres et ses 80 associations professionnelles, a quatre missions:

- la défense de l'économie privée,
- la fourniture de services à ses membres,
- la conduite d'une réflexion sur l'évolution de la société,
- la mise en relation de ses membres et ses partenaires.

La FER Genève promeut une économie libérale, basée sur l'initiative et la responsabilité individuelles, ainsi que sur le respect des partenaires. Elle défend et conseille les employeurs dans les relations du travail et la politique sociale. Elle intervient auprès des autorités et a ses représentants dans les commissions officielles.

La FER Genève fournit des services à ses membres dans les domaines du secrétariat d'associations professionnelles, du droit du travail, de la négociation collective, de la formation professionnelle, de la santé et sécurité au travail, des salaires et de la sécurité sociale.

Enfin, elle est un centre de référence pour les employeurs sur tous les grands sujets touchant à l'économie. Elle participe aux procédures de consultation et aux débats dans les médias et fait connaître ses positions par ses publications.

Name: The Institute of the Motor Industry (IMI)
Description: The IMI is the professional body for individuals working in motor industry and the authoritative voice of the sector. The IMI are also the governing body for the IMI Professional Register, IMI Qualifications and Accreditations and the best source of automotive careers information and standards.

Name: Fédération Nationale des Transports Routiers (FNTR)
Description:
La Fédération Nationale des Transports Routiers (FNTR) est l’organisation professionnelle leader du transport routier de marchandises. Elle représente des entreprises de toutes tailles (groupes, ETI, PME, TPE) et de toutes spécialités. Elle rassemble plus des deux tiers des entreprises adhérentes d’une organisation professionnelle du transport routier en France.
Née avec le transport routier en 1933, la FNTR poursuit aujourd’hui un double objectif : répondre aux attentes à court terme des entreprises du secteur et anticiper les évolutions de la Profession.
Une mission rendue possible par une éthique forte et de nombreux atouts : un maillage unique d’unions départementales et régionales, un solide ancrage européen, une représentativité nationale et multisectorielle, des expertises techniques, économiques, juridiques, sociales et environnementales et une forte crédibilité auprès des pouvoirs politiques et instances européennes.

Name: ISHRAE
Description: The Indian Society of Heating, Refrigerating and Air Conditioning Engineers (ISHRAE), was founded in 1981 at New Delhi by a group of eminent HVAC&R professionals. ISHRAE today has more than 12,000 HVAC&R professionals as members and additionally there are 7,500 Student-members. ISHRAE operates from 61 Chapters and sub-chapters spread all over India and 6 international locations, with HQ in Delhi.

Name: BCCI
Description:
Established in 1928, the Board of Control for Cricket in India (BCCI) is the umbrella organisation of its members, currently 34 associations across various states. It is the richest sporting board of cricket in the world.

BCCI controls all tournaments inside and outside India. It manages four squads that represent India in international cricket; the men's national cricket team, the women's national cricket team, the men's national under-19 cricket team and women's national under-19 cricket team. It also governs developmental India A, India B and India A women's teams.

As India’s national governing body, we are responsible to ensure professionalism in the game of Cricket and its governance and administration; inculcate principles of transparency and ethical standards in players, team officials, umpires and administrators; and to ban doping, age fraud, sexual harassment and all other forms of inequity and discrimination.

"Play with passion, win with pride." 

For more information visit the website.

Name: NDT Corner
Description:
NDT Corner is a resource, and media platform dedicated to Non-Destructive Testing (NDT), inspection, and engineering professionals in the oil & gas, energy, and industrial sectors.

Featuring quarterly magazine, website, e-shop, e-newsletters, and other tools and resources.

NDT & Inspection HUB for users, manufacturers, vendors, job seekers, training and services providers, and the NDT community to gear, communicate, interact, and check out with experts of equipment manufacturers & suppliers, service providers, plant operators, and distributors in the Arabian, Middle East, and Africa, and global market.

We Publish a quarterly inspection magazine “NDT SCOOP” in electronic & printed copies to all NDT-related industries.

We organize a Regional Expo (NDT-X) Asset Integrity, NDT, Welding, and Mechanical Integrity Exhibition & Conference.
expo.ndtcorner.com

Brand exposure globally and specifically to the region's end users.

NDT CORNER    |    NDT SCOOP     |     NDT-X
Platform                  Magazine                Exhibition

A Limitless Inspection Community To Go!
Remote Visual Inspection (RVI), Phased Array (PAUT), Magnetic Flux Leakage (MFL), Acoustic Emission (AE), Long Range Guided Wave (LRUT), Ultrasonic Testing (UT), Digital Radiography, Computed RT, Drones, Inspection, Welding Inspection, Corrosion Inspection, Automatic UT, Alloy Analyzer (PMI), Positive Material Identification, UT Shear wave, Tube Inspection, Eddy Current and Advanced NDT Solutions.

Name: Australian Property Institute
Description:
The Australian Property Institute (API) represents over 7,000 property professionals throughout Australia, advocating for our Members in government and in media.  

Our role is to set, educate and adhere to the highest professional standards of practice, ethics and conduct.    

Through our member services we offer certification, education, awards, support, recognition, risk insurance and networking opportunities.  Our API certification, Certified Practicing Valuer, offers trusted, sought-after and leading members of the property valuation community. 

Join us today and make API your home of employability.

Name: EDTech France
Description:
The initiative of French entrepreneurs who decided to make technology useful for education and training.

The association gathers the best French EDTechs in K12,higher education or corporate training.

A professional hub to accelerate business, presence and consideration of Edtech in public debates, and reputation of the French Edtech in the world.

Name: WISE — Women in Sports and Events
Description:
WISE is the foremost career and leadership development organization for women in the business of sports. Over the past 30 years, WISE has built a first-of-its-kind collection of resources for women to help them succeed as they navigate the unique personal and professional challenges in the sports industry. With more than 5,000 members and 25 chapters in the US and Canada, WISE is a community of women who are driven to lead. Learn more at www.wiseworks.org.

Our Mission
The WISE mission is to create and support programs that enhance the success and growth of women in the business of sports. The organization strives to be the definitive source for business women seeking information about issues, challenges and opportunities impacting all stages of their career — from entry level to senior management and those in transition.

National Leadership
Governed by a board of directors, WISE National sets organizational strategy and provides members with a variety of resources — including member-exclusive online tools at WISEworks.org — to aid in their professional development.

Local Chapters
WISE has local chapters in 25 cities in the US and Canada, offering members programming, events and regular face-to-face networking opportunities in their region. Chapters also work with WISE National to deliver organization-wide initiatives such as Speed Mentoring Roundtables.

Name: GPM (Green Project Management)
Description:
Welcome to Green Project Management, or as we're commonly known, GPM. We are the global leader in sustainable project, program, and portfolio management. While many people know us for our GPM-b certification and PSM3 Sustainability assessments, that's just the tip of the iceberg!

Are you an experienced project manager? Or just beginning your journey in this field? Perhaps you have projects that you need to manage more sustainably or need to meet ESG goals? Regardless of your position, here's a fact: Since our inception in 2009, we've been committed to providing top-tier knowledge, resources, and networking opportunities for anyone involved in project delivery.
Here at GPM, you'll discover internationally recognized certifications, practical courses, effective tools, and most importantly, a vibrant community that powers it all. We're not just about managing projects - we're about doing so sustainably, in line with global efforts towards environmental, social, and economic regeneration.
We are the epicenter of successful sustainable project management, and we're always ready to welcome you. Here at GPM, sustainability meets project management. Welcome aboard!

Name: The Society of Thoracic Surgeons
Description: Founded in 1964, STS is a 501(c)(6) not-for-profit organization representing more than 8,000 cardiothoracic surgeons, researchers, and allied health care professionals worldwide who are dedicated to ensuring the best surgical care for patients with diseases of the heart, lungs, and other organs in the chest. STS is the premier professional society for these individuals. The Society’s mission is to enhance the ability of cardiothoracic surgeons to provide the highest quality patient care through education, research, and advocacy. STS is known especially for its national outcomes database (STS National Database), its peer-reviewed journal, The Annals of Thoracic Surgery, and an annual educational meeting that draws more than 2,100 health care professionals from around the world.

Name: Ladies Who Lead
Description:
Ladies Who Lead is India’s premier leadership platform for women seeking excellence.

We offer curated mentorship, learning, and community experiences for CXOs, founders, and professionals across industries and geographies.

Name: Women's Cannabis Chamber of Commerce
Description:
Founded in 2011 in Denver, Colorado, the Cannabis Chamber of Commerce evolved into the Women’s Cannabis Chamber of Commerce on January 01, 2016.

Focus for 2024-2025: How to Succeed in the Cannabis Industry.

The goal is to connect companies and entrepreneurs in the cannabis marketplace with their consumer base to build a strong and stable cannabis industry and cannabis community.

The mission is to move entrepreneurs beyond empowerment into powerful result driven career strategies, CEO positions and business ownership; to provide education, resources, and networking opportunities.

Visit womenscannabischamberofcommerce.com for a list of upcoming Mini Wednesday Webinars, Cliff Notes for Cannabis Businesses. Available on LinkedIn.

Invest in Your Success! Become a member! https://womenscannabischamberofcommerce.com/membership/

Name: B2Mamy
Description:
.A B2Mamy é a maior comunidade de mães do Brasil. Tem como missão tornar mães líderes e livres economicamente por meio de educação, networking e saúde e bem-estar.
No modelo B2B2C entrega pesquisa, educação corporativa e ferramentas de employee experience para grandes empresas e no B2C um plano de assinatura one stop shop de benefícios para a jornada da maternidade. para mães e mulheres se conectarem. Desde 2016, mais de 100 mil mulheres já foram impactadas e 27 milhões de reais foram gerados.

Name: Association of Legal Administrators (ALA)
Description: ALA is the premier professional association connecting leaders and managers within the legal industry. We provide extensive professional development, collaborative peer communities, strategic operational solutions and business partner connections, empowering our members to lead the business of law.

Name: Regional Council of Chemistry - IV Region
Description: The Regional Council of Chemistry - IV Region is a federal autarchy created by Law 2,800, published in 1956. Operating in the State of São Paulo, its main objective is to prevent society from being harmed by the manufacture of products and by the execution of services in the Chemistry area by clandestine companies or by people with a lack of technical and scientific knowledge.

Name: Smart Cities Council
Description:
Smart Cities Council is The Leading Global Network for Smart Cities Technology and Strategies, championing the use of science, data, technology, and engineering to enable a safer, more activated, beautiful, sustainable world now for the future, for everyone.
 
For 10 years, the Smart Cities Council has been a trusted, neutral, global advisor for people, places and projects. 
 
Join us as we work locally and globally to outline opportunities to take action and drive impact, because smart isn’t just for cities, it’s for everyone.

Name: CEO Clubs Network
Description:
CEO Clubs Network is an award-winning, globally recognized organization specializing in community building, event marketing, communications, entity formation, trade and investment promotion. Our purpose is to nurture relationships, share knowledge, and create opportunities for C-level executives across the private and government sectors. With a strong presence in USA, UAE, and China, we distinguish ourselves by providing tailored advice, fostering strategic collaborations, and empowering businesses to thrive within an influential global network.

The CEO Clubs Membership entices elites from private sectors such as SMEs & Corporates, and public sectors such as Trade & Investment, Entities, and Embassies & Consulates. Our valued members are connected through our Exclusive Members’ Networking Events, Mobile App, and a dedicated Member Support Manager. Name: The Nonprofit Hive
Description:
We’re a free global community built for changemakers in the nonprofit sector — where nonprofit professionals, consultants, and social-impact leaders find connection, support, and real conversations.

Our Mission
To connect changemakers through meaningful conversations, shared experiences, and peer support. We believe no one in social impact work should ever feel isolated.

Our Vision
A world where nonprofit professionals never go it alone: where connection sparks collaboration, shared knowledge fuels innovation, and the social impact sector not only survives—but truly thrives.

Why We’re Different

One-on-one Hive Chats — Real peer-to-peer conversations, not just webinars or forums.

Values-driven & relational — We put connection over competition: trust, vulnerability, equity, access.

Support in the messy middle — Whether you're growing, pivoting, or struggling, we meet you where you are.

Global & diverse perspectives — Eye-opening insights from nonprofit pros in 70-plus countries.

Free to join — always — No fees, no credit cards required. Just people helping people.

If you’re looking for a place to share, learn, recharge & grow—The Nonprofit Hive is waiting.

 Visit our website to join the Hive, explore free chats & resources, and be part of a movement that makes doing good feel shared, sustainable, and hopeful.

Name: Colégio Notarial do Brasil - Seção São Paulo
Description:
O Colégio Notarial do Brasil – Seção São Paulo (CNB/SP) desempenha um papel crucial na promoção da segurança jurídica e na valorização dos serviços notariais, atuando como uma ponte entre notários, sociedade, Poder Público e entidades privadas. Desde sua fundação em 1951, a instituição tem se dedicado a integrar mais de 700 tabeliães de notas, promovendo não apenas a troca de conhecimento, mas também o acesso a informações técnicas atualizadas que facilitam o trabalho diário dos tabelionatos. 

Com uma missão clara de apoiar e aperfeiçoar a atuação notarial, o CNB/SP se estabelece como uma referência no fortalecimento da cidadania, da atividade econômica e da democracia. Valorizamos princípios fundamentais como ética, responsabilidade e eficiência, que norteiam nossas ações e garantem um atendimento de qualidade, essencial para o fortalecimento da confiança pública nas instituições.

Acreditamos que um notariado forte e bem integrado é vital para construir uma sociedade mais justa e coesa. Ao investir na qualificação técnica de nossos membros e promover a autorregulação da classe, o CNB/SP se posiciona como um verdadeiro agente de mudança, contribuindo para um futuro em que a justiça e a equidade sejam acessíveis a todos.

Name: The Women's Network
Description:
The Women's Network ("TWN") is revolutionizing networking as we know it for early-career women. Our community champions and nurtures ambition, providing critical resources and connections to help women achieve professional success.

TWN is the largest collegiate women’s networking organization in North America. Our mission is to connect early-career women and non-binary people to industry leaders, professional development resources, career opportunities, and mentorship, cultivating ambition to prepare the next generation of leaders.

At present, TWN boasts 120 college chapters in the United States, Canada, and Ireland, and has more than 60,000 active members in our community. TWN hosts a variety of experiences: speaker meetings, alumni receptions, networking events, workshops, leadership seminars, social gatherings, and more. TWN also hosts a podcast - "Redefining Ambition" - to highlight the personal and professional journeys of ambitious leaders and to introduce women to a wide array of career choices.

Founded at Syracuse University in 2017 by Jamie Vinick, TWN has impacted tens of thousands of young women at one of the most transformative times of their lives. Because of TWN’s influence, members have changed their college majors, pursued different fields of interest, developed more confidence, negotiated their salaries, invested money, found mentors/mentees, cultivated meaningful personal and professional relationships (many TWN members have made life-long friends), and strengthened their leadership skills. Companies and brands also work with TWN to strengthen their recruiting efforts and build a robust pipeline of early-career talent, boost brand awareness, and advertise products or services.

Name: Abrappe - Associação Brasileira de Prevenção de Perdas

Seu propósito é fomentar a cultura de prevenção de perdas, por meio da capacitação profissional, geração de estudos, troca de experiências e promoção de networking, entre várias outras atividades e práticas.

Name: BlueCity (010)
Description:
BlueCity: Surfing the new Economy

BlueCity is a pool of possibilities. In this playground for circular entrepreneurs brains, guts, vision and fun go together. We serve our coffee with a dose of radical disruption while we head towards an economy in which waste does not exist. 
BlueCity serves as a breeding ground for innovative companies linking their waste-streams. Inside our ecosystem of social entrepreneurs and radical disruptors waste streams are valuable building blocks; the output of one is the input for the other. This way we create a much needed and inspiring example for the circular economy. 

BlueCity: Vision
The linear economy has had its day. At the beginning of the chain we are running out of resources while at the end of the chain we are having serious problems with the piling up of waste. Our system of producing, consuming and discarding goods is no longer sustainable. If the 10 billion of us want to keep living together pleasantly we will have to look for new solutions to our problems. These new solutions lie in the closing of the loops. 

Start-ups and small initiatives show us how it's done, but circular entrepreneuring does not go by itself. In BlueCity we offer (starting) circular entrepreneurs the space, guidance, support, and a dynamic network they need to make sure that their achievable and scalable plans will get the chance to scale up into businesses that create impact. Together with entrepreneurs, researchers, neighbours, the government and education we create a circular economy, close the loops and build the city of the future

Name: Makeup Artist
Description:
The ALLIANCE of INTERNATIONAL MAKEUP  ARTISTS known as A•I•M•A is collaborating with cosmetics firms and fashion stylists.

We provide internationally recognized qualifications for proficiency in professional make-up application techniques. 

What makes our qualifications special? 
Our qualifications are aimed specifically at make-up application for make-up artists – they are not vague ‘beauty’ qualifications for therapists or beauticians. We have a modern approach with realistic and contemporary criteria that are relevant to today’s make-up industry. 

Who do we serve? 
We provide an industry benchmark for make-up artists and those who want to employ make-up artists. To hold a qualification, you must first have achieved a high level of skill in your field, thereby a potential employer or agent can be assured of your talent and credentials. For the qualified make-up artist, we offer a referral resource – simply agree to have an email link from our site and potential employers can reach you and you can follow up jobs that are posted on the Jobs board.

Who uses our qualifications? 
Most fashion make-up house who employ counter staff would require a recognized independent qualification to show that the employee has the basic level of understanding in hygiene, application and client care. 
Any professional who wishes to receive insurance for public liability or against loss or damage to equipment such as your make-up kit through AiMA you must hold a recognized qualification through an independent awarding body.

Name: ASCENT
Description:
ASCENT is India’s leading peer-learning community for entrepreneurs, empowering over 1,200 growth-ready business leaders across 45+ cities to scale their enterprises and themselves.

Founded by Harsh Mariwala (Chairman, Marico Ltd.), ASCENT is built on his vision to identify and enable high-potential entrepreneurs through the power of the collective - fostering learning, collaboration, and trust.

At its core lies the unique Trust Group model - small, curated peer groups of entrepreneurs who meet regularly in a confidential, non-transactional space to share experiences, exchange insights and find solutions together.

Over the past 13 years, ASCENT has evolved into a vibrant ecosystem representing 65+ industries, with a 43:57 split between Manufacturing and Services, and 44% from family businesses. Collectively, ASCENT entrepreneurs contribute to India’s growth story, representing an aggregate annual turnover of over ₹1,30,000 crore.

Through its curated programs, events, and learning initiatives, ASCENT continues to nurture leaders who make leaders, creating a lasting impact on India’s entrepreneurial landscape.

Name: Fractionals United
Description:
Fractional leadership (https://www.fractionaldefined.com/) is growing rapidly, but it comes with unique challenges that consultants and other part-time workers don't face. 

As a Fractional COO, Karina Mikhli realized fractionals needed a place to connect, collaborate, and learn from each other—plus a trusted resource for businesses seeking fractional talent.

That's what Fractionals United is.

If you're a current or aspiring fractional leader looking for true community—a place to connect, collaborate, and learn from peers—we'd love to have you.

Important to know: We're not a lead generation service or job board. While members do find opportunities through relationships they build here, the value comes from genuine engagement, shared insights, and the supportive network you'll develop with fellow fractional leaders.

Ready to join? Apply at https://bit.ly/frunapp for our engaged Slack community. Membership is $10/month or $100/year.

Need to hire a fractional leader? Post your opportunity here (https://coda.io/form/Fractionals-United-Job-Submission_dj1AZ0lhlZI) to connect with our vetted community of experienced professionals.

***We define fractionals as part-time senior leadership roles. Unlike regular consulting, they're embedded within the team; unlike other part-time work, they hold leadership authority. Read more about the differences in this post (https://www.fractionalsunitedblog.com/2023/02/fractional-vs-consultant.html) from our founder.

Name: Think Policy Indonesia
Description:
Think Policy is your one-stop partner in pushing policy reform through an ecosystem approach.

We focus on addressing critical intergenerational issues, including climate, digital transformation, and social inclusion. By bridging silos, generations, and sectors, we empower reform-minded actors to co-create impactful and enduring solutions.

Our work is grounded in the belief that lasting reform requires more than technical solutions; it needs an enabling ecosystem. Through our BEND framework, we unlock the policy window through:

 Bridge – Connecting reformists across institutions and generations
 Expertise – Delivering actionable, evidence-based policy advisory
 Narrative – Turning complex policy issues into accessible narratives that enable informed action
 Development – Equipping individuals and institutions with the skills to lead and sustain policy reform

We bring this to life through our core services:
 Advisory — Strategic support to navigate complex policy challenges
 Forum — Multi-stakeholder facilitation to surface bold, evidence-based ideas
 Academy — Capacity building for future-facing, empathetic public leaders
 Insights — Accessible policy analysis for informed public dialogue

 Learn more at www.thinkpolicy.id or reach out to us at partnership@thinkpolicy.id to explore how we can work together.

Name: FEVAD
Description:
La Fédération du e-commerce et de la vente à distance (Fevad) est un syndicat professionnel français créé en 1957 regroupant plus de 800 entreprises, dont la vocation principale est la représentation des professionnels du commerce en ligne auprès des pouvoirs publics, en tant qu’acteur engagé sur les scènes politique, économique et juridique.

Une force de représentation 
La Fevad promeut et représente l’activité du e-commerce en France pour toutes les entreprises du secteur auprès de l’ensemble des acteurs de la société civile. Elle œuvre à la reconnaissance des avantages du e-commerce et à la défense de ses intérêts. Elle est ainsi une vraie force représentative de défense des intérêts réglementaires des entreprises auprès des pouvoirs publics, notamment grâce à un travail permanent de veille au service de ses adhérents. 

Une source d’informations privilégiée
La Fevad est une vaste source d’informations pour ses adhérents grâce à la production d’études et d’enquêtes, à l’organisation de conférences et en relayant les informations pertinentes concernant le marché du e-commerce, ses savoir-faire, ses techniques et métiers. Elle met ainsi toute son expertise au service des acteurs du e-commerce afin de les accompagner au mieux dans leur développement. La Fevad permet aussi l’échange et le partage d’expériences entre l’ensemble des acteurs de la chaîne de valeur.

Un porte-parole dédié
La Fevad se fait le représentant du e-commerce auprès des consommateurs en développant la médiation au service des entreprises et des consommateurs. Tout en renforçant la confiance dans l’achat en ligne à travers la promotion des valeurs de transparence et de respect des clients. La Fevad est un acteur impliqué dans le débat public et y apporte ainsi sa contribution à chaque fois que les intérêts du secteur sont en jeu.

Name: Professional Institute of Quantity Surveyors (PIQS)
Description:
PIQS (formerly known as QSAP) is a professional forum dedicated to motivating its members to further develop their skills in the quantity surveying and construction fields. Our goal is to support members in adhering to industry best practices for their own betterment and for the benefit of society.
On 17 February 2023, QSAP and RICS signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) in Dubai. This agreement aims to foster close collaboration, encouraging the exchange of professional knowledge, competence, and further development within the built environment sector.
Our Mission is to:
•	Accumulate and disseminate professional knowledge.
•	Provide avenues for constructive interaction and networking among members.
•	Promote a transparent and equal opportunity voice that aligns with our vision.
•	Reach out to those who seek professional growth and development.
