Name: International Poultry Council
Description:
IPC represents 90% of the global poultry meat trade and more than 75% of the World poultry meat production through its members.

IPC aims to take the contributions that define our sector and share in them in global forums, advocating for poultry’s role in our wider food system.

Poultry is in a unique position to demonstrate leadership within our global food system. In our ability to produce safe, affordable, and nutritious food at scale, we offer real solutions to pressing challenges.

Name: Irish Pharmacy Union
EPIC People
Description:
EPIC is a nonprofit organization, global community, and annual conference of innovators, researchers, strategists, and leaders using interpretive sciences to help organizations innovate responsibly, manage risk, and generate value.

Throughout the year at events, trainings, and meetups, we come together to:

* Develop frameworks and methods for building systems and technologies grounded in lived experiences and contextual understanding

* Evaluate how technology and organizational forces are reshaping work, identity, and society

*Connect across contexts, linking collaborators and peers to strengthen both individual practice and collective impact

Become an EPIC Member now to access events and discounts!

Name: Federation of Clinical Pharmacists in India (FCPI)
Description: The Federation of Clinical Pharmacists in India (FCPI) is a non-profitable, professional pharmacy organization composed of a bunch of passionate pharmacy graduates from India involved in diverse clinical pharmacy responsibilities in India and across the globe. We have come together voluntarily with the undeterred goal of enhancing the clinical pharmacy profession, empowering the clinical pharmacists and thereby delivering high quality patient care. Our practitioner-led supportive system provides clinical pharmacists the opportunity to network, collaborate, share the best practices and stimulate skills. The members of this federation are handpicked and work in different areas of specialization with varied years of experience. Our aim is to offer a supportive learning environment focused on key areas of clinical practice thereby translating theoretical knowledge to empower clinical pharmacists to best serve our patients and the society. The federation offers a variety of activities that fosters clinical pharmacy excellence in education, patient care and research

Name: Women in Tech & Entrepreneurship
Description:
Unapologetically ambitious, we rise by lifting others.  

Women in Tech & Entrepreneurship is a community of high-performing, non-conforming women working in technology, start-ups, venture capital, entrepreneurship, economic development, & business support organizations.

Our mission is to resource women in tech and entrepreneurship with near-peer mentorship, educational opportunities, and a support network.  

Connect with us for inclusive, dues-free monthly events.

Questions about Women in Tech & Entrepreneurship? Contact our Founder & CEO, Raechel Canipe.

Name: WONE GLOBAL
Description:
WONE Global is a new kind of professional order - connecting leading law, tax, accounting, and advisory firms across the world through ethics, intelligence, and collaboration.

We’re not a traditional network.
We’re a global framework - designed for the next generation of professional excellence.

In a world where clients move faster than jurisdictions and AI is reshaping how knowledge travels, WONE Global is building the infrastructure for connected trust.
One city, one firm, one shared standard at a time.

Our member firms - called Exclusive Regional Partners - represent their regions under a unified WONE brand of verified integrity and global readiness. Each partner remains fully independent yet operates within a common architecture of governance, visibility, and growth - powered by the WONE OS, our proprietary framework for alignment, ethics, and collaboration.

WONE Global enables firms to:

Serve international clients seamlessly through cross-border cooperation.

Enhance brand presence through global identity and communication design.

Participate in regional and global practice groups, summits, and thought platforms.

Access a unified digital ecosystem for referrals, co-advisory, and shared intelligence.

But beyond systems, WONE is a movement - a quiet rethinking of how professional excellence, conscience, and innovation can coexist.

We believe:

Ethics is strategy.

Trust is infrastructure.

Collaboration is intelligence.

Excellence must be verifiable, not claimed.

From our founding summit in Singapore to our expanding presence across continents, WONE Global stands for one simple idea -
that the future of professional work will not be owned by the biggest, but by the most aligned.

WONE Global - Built on Ethics. Bound by Excellence.

Name: Inspire Leadership Network
Description:
Inspire Leadership Network is the preeminent peer leadership network of C-suite executives. With nearly 2,000 members across more than 40 local chapters, Inspire members serve public and private businesses, government, education, healthcare, and non-profit institutions. Inspire exists to help leaders thrive in today’s most challenging executive roles.

See the list of Inspire Leadership Network chapters: https://inspireleadershipnetwork.com/#

Recognizing Outstanding Leadership For Over 25 Years

The ORBIE Awards is North America’s premier recognition program for C-suite executives. Since it’s inception in 1998, over 800 winners have received the prestigious ORBIE Award, for outstanding leadership excellence and driving business value. Finalists and winners are selected by an independent peer review process led by prior ORBIE recipients.

See the list of past winners and finalists or nominate an executive: https://orbie.org/

Specialties
CIO, CISO, CMO, Professional Membership, Awards, ORBIE, Peer Leadership Network, and Network

See full list of Inspire Leadership Network chapters: https://inspireleadershipnetwork.com

Name: Fédération Nationale du Bois
Description:
La Fédération Nationale du Bois est l’organisation professionnelle des acteurs de la mobilisation et de la transformation du bois en France. 
Elle agit pour le compte d’entreprises et intervient dans les débouchés aussi variés que : l'exploitation forestière, la première et la seconde transformation du bois, le négoce de bois et pour des applications nombreuses comme l'énergie, la palette et les caisses palettes, les produits de la construction ou encore l'export.

La Fédération Nationale du Bois a pour missions principales :
- Être, pour le compte de ses adhérents, un interlocuteur privilégié et reconnu des pouvoirs publics, au niveau national et européen, ainsi que des représentants de l’amont forestier et des marchés.
- Développer la compétitivité des entreprises des secteurs de la mobilisation du bois, de la 1ere transformation, de la 2e transformation, du négoce de matériau bois, de la palette et de l’énergie.

Name: Family Office Association Hong Kong
Description: Family Office Association Hong Kong (“FOAHK”) is an independent family office trade association established in November 2020. We are a consultative industry body established to lead and drive dialogue between the family office industry, government and regulatory bodies in Hong Kong. We advocate for legislative and regulatory matters favourable to the development of family office businesses in Hong Kong, with the common goal for the city to become the region’s leading family office hub in Asia-Pacific. We are committed to providing best practice guidance to uphold the profession’s highest industry standards and compliance, as well as facilitate community collaboration among members, governments and other professional parties in Hong Kong and overseas.

Name: Society of Working Moms
Description:
The Society of Working Moms is a community of support for and by women who love their careers and their families, but who might not feel fully supported in either.

We are 100 moms strong and counting, and membership includes a vibrant Slack community, monthly programming, regular networking opportunities, a "no-stakes book club," and weekly group coaching!

Name: Operators Guild
Description:
At Operators Guild, we understand that early-stage, high-growth company building is a profession suited for the “Special Forces” of the business world. It requires the most sophisticated operators to tackle high-growth, high-risk challenges with minimal resources. Specialists at being generalists, we’re the driving force behind the world’s most innovative companies.

Operators Guild is the premier community for the most elite builders, problem-solvers, and cross-functional leaders. Our members don’t think in silos—they think business-first, blending expertise across finance, operations, strategy, technology, and people. 

With 1,000+ leaders in our Q&A “brainhive” OG Live forum, in-person gatherings, virtual events, and our flagship OG Summit, we’ve built the ultimate ecosystem for operators to thrive.

We’re the generalists who make the impossible happen. Together, we shape and scale the future’s most groundbreaking companies.

Name: World Leaders in Data and AI [WLDA]
Description: WLDA.Tech is an exclusive network of Women and World leaders in data and AI. We are focused on providing a community to share best practices, peer-to-peer learning, and support each other in professional and personal growth. The group comprises senior leaders from Fortune 1000 companies with similar interests and issues.

Name: Synapse Florida
Description:
Florida has all the right elements for a thriving innovation ecosystem and a growing community of “ecosystem builders” – tech hubs, incubators, accelerators, higher-education-based programs, and nonprofits – developing initiatives to support the growth of new businesses across the state. However, there is limited connectivity between and among these organizations.

Too many innovators rely on serendipity to find ecosystem builders they need or to even share what they have. But serendipity doesn’t scale; that’s why we created Synapse. 

MISSION: Our mission at Synapse is to connect and catalyze Florida’s vibrant and diverse innovation ecosystem to drive economic growth and social impact.

A 501c(3) nonprofit founded in 2018 with the launch of our flagship event, Synapse has become synonymous with Florida’s staggering growth and innovation across industries and technologies by bringing together enterprise innovation leaders, startup entrepreneurs, investors, and resources to accelerate the growth of innovation in Florida.

Synapse knows that true collaboration breeds stronger communities that benefit the entire ecosystem. Synapse brings it all together - fostering innovation and making a profound impact through programs that:

- Creates spaces that connect the ecosystem in a way that maximizes opportunities for growth. 
- Provides greater visibility and access to essentials that facilitate innovation: Resources, Talent, Investors, and Corporations.
- Expands the definition of innovation as more than tech.
- Integrates traditional siloes of industry, persona, and geography.

Name: Union Française de l'Électricité (UFE)
Description:
L’Union Française de l’Électricité est l’association professionnelle du secteur de l’électricité. Elle représente les entreprises de l’ensemble de la chaîne de valeur du secteur électrique français : producteurs de toutes technologies, gestionnaires de réseaux, fournisseurs d’électricité et de services d’efficacité énergétique, en passant par les opérateurs de stockage et du pilotage des consommations. Elle regroupe plus de 500 entreprises, avec plus de 300 000 emplois directs et indirects sur tout le territoire français.
 
En France et en Europe, l’UFE agit pour asseoir l’électricité comme la solution sociétale, créatrice de valeur et d’emplois, au service du renforcement de la souveraineté énergétique, de la compétitivité industrielle et du pouvoir d’achat ainsi que de la lutte contre le changement climatique. Actrice de l’intérêt général, elle s’engage pour une électrification efficiente des usages et pour lever les freins à son déploiement, en s’appuyant sur l’expertise et la collégialité.
 
L’UFE est membre d’Eurelectric, du MEDEF et de France Industrie, de la Plateforme pour l’électromobilité ainsi que du Bureau mensuel du Plan Bâtiment Durable.
 
Elle représente aussi les employeurs du secteur électrique au sein de la branche des industries électriques et gazières.

Name: Academy of Marketing Science
Description: The Academy of Marketing Science (AMS) is an international, scholarly, professional organization. It is dedicated to promoting high standards and excellence in the creation and dissemination of marketing knowledge, and the furtherance of marketing practice through a role of leadership within the discipline of marketing around the world. The Academy is committed to the highest of ethical standards in the pursuit of this mission.

Name: Persatuan Insinyur Indonesia (Official)
Description:
Professional organizations which are a forum for the gathering of Indonesian Engineers, to jointly increase its benefits for the nation and state, as well as mastery, development and empowerment of science and technology and competencies, for added value to the welfare of humanity in general, especially the Indonesian people with the main tasks:
 1. Increase the professional roles and responsibilities of the Indonesian Engineer profession in
 2. Regional, national, regional and international development.
 3. Increasing professional competence Indonesian engineers are internationally competitive who are able to answer challenges in the local, national, regional and international arena.
 4. Carrying out engineering and professional education advocacy activities.
 5. Fostering and developing activities that can encourage the creation of a climate for the growth and development of the Indonesian engineering profession.
 6. Building a vehicle for developing and fostering the Indonesian Engineering Professional Competence which is internationally recognized by organizing the Professional Engineer Competency Development Program consistently and continuously.

Name: Resorts Brasil
Description:
A Resorts Brasil is a non-profit association, founded in 2001 with the purpose of representing and promoting Brazilian resorts. We firmly believe that resorts play a fundamental role in socio-economic development, transforming lives and boosting national tourism.

With 70 associated enterprises, totaling more than 20,000 apartments, we are present in 14 states and all regions of Brasil. Our goal is to contribute to the strengthening and development of tourism, both nationally and in the communities where the resorts are located.

Join us at Resorts Brasil and be part of this journey of transformation and growth of national tourism. We are committed to building a prosperous future for our members and for Brazil as a whole. Be part of our history and contribute to the strengthening of the resort sector in the country.

Name: The Menopause Society
Description:
Dedicated to empowering healthcare professionals and providing them with tools and resources they need to improve the health of women during the menopause transition and beyond. 

About us

Founded in 1989, The Menopause Society is the leading nonprofit organization dedicated to empowering healthcare professionals and providing them with tools and resources they need to improve the health of women during the menopause transition and beyond. Its multidisciplinary membership of 3,000 leaders in the field – including clinical and basic science experts from medicine, nursing, sociology, psychology, nutrition, anthropology, epidemiology, pharmacy, and education – allows the Society to be uniquely qualified to provide information that is both accurate and unbiased, not for or against any point of view. The Menopause Society publishes the scientific, peer-reviewed journal Menopause. We are pleased to be recognized as the preeminent resource on all aspects of menopause to both healthcare professionals and the public. The Menopause Society is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.

Name: Premium Clube
Description:
Somos referência em proteção veicular, com o foco no atendimento personalizado e atuação em todo o território nacional. Acreditamos em um trabalho realizado de forma ágil e econômica, por isso desenvolvemos e aplicamos procedimentos simples e sem burocracias.
Com ampla capacidade de atendimento e experiência no setor, a Premium é hoje a melhor opção em assistência, sendo capaz de atender ao cliente com uma pronta resposta para qualquer demanda.

Name: SFC - Société Française de Cosmétologie
Description:
Fondée en 1951, la SFC est une société savante qui rassemble tous les acteurs passionnés par les sciences de la beauté, soit près de 1.000 membres, 400 sociétés et universités. 

La SFC, qui a initié la création de l'IFSCC, a pour missions :
-	Promouvoir et diffuser les connaissances scientifiques relatives à la Biologie, la Chimie et toutes les disciplines liées à la Cosmétologie.
-	Rassembler tous les membres qui ont contribué à l'essor de la Cosmétologie depuis la seconde moitié du XXe siècle.

La SFC reconnait et encourage ceux qui font avancer la Cosmétologie :
-	Le Prix de la SFC est décerné tous les deux ans à une personnalité pour sa contribution à la Cosmétologie française.
-	Le Prix Pierre Vélon est décerné tous les deux ans à la meilleure conférence.
-	Le prix IJCS récompense chaque année le meilleur article publié.
- 	Le Prix Jeune Doctorant est décerné chaque année aux Journées JP Marty.

Name: PTTOW!
Description:
PTTOW! is an invite-only community for today’s most creative and inspiring CEOs, CMOs, and Icons from all 70 major industries which are shaping our culture. Members include His Holiness the 14th Dalai Lama, Shaun White, Kerri Walsh Jennings, David Blaine, Quincy Jones, will.i.am, Kelly Slater, Tony Hawk and David Guetta as well as top executives from VICE, GM, Apple, Red Bull, GoPro, Google [x], Coke, YouTube, the U.S. State Dept., Facebook, Instagram, Warner Bros and many more.

http://www.pttow.com
https://www.instagram.com/PTTOW
https://www.facebook.com/PTTOW

Name: Confédération Nationale de la Boulangerie-Pâtisserie Française (CNBPF)
Description: La Confédération Nationale de la Boulangerie-Pâtisserie Française, présidée par Dominique Anract, est l'organisation professionnelle chargée de représenter et défendre les intérêts généraux, matériels et moraux des artisans boulangers-pâtissiers de France. A travers ses actions, elle a vocation à promouvoir le savoir-faire artisanal, tisser des liens entre les boulangers adhérents et structurer le secteur de la boulangerie-pâtisserie française. La CNBPF fédère 94 groupements professionnels départementaux et 13 groupements professionnels régionaux.

Name: ARCS Australia
Description:
Your partner in professional growth for the medtech and pharmaceutical sector. 

We provide the education, connections, advocacy and recognition you need to excel in your career and contribute to better health outcomes. 

Join our community and experience the ARCS advantage.

Name: Black Sports Professionals (BSP)
Description: The National Society of Black Sports Professionals (BSP) connects, empowers and works to advance its members within the business operations of sports to positions of leadership and influence within the industry. Our goals are to provide professional development opportunities, facilitate an ongoing exchange of industry information, cultivate and foster long-term business relationships that combined support the advancement of Black Sports Professionals within sports and sports-related fields.

Name: Collège des médecins du Québec
Description:
To fulfil its mission, the Collège des médecins du Québec:

- Monitors and assesses medical practice in Quebec
- Makes recommendations in order to improve medical practice in Quebec
- Receives and responds to complaints from the public
- Ensures and promotes the maintenance of physician competence
- Verifies the competence of future physicians and their fitness to practice medicine
- Issues permits and authorizations to practice
- Monitors the illegal practice of medicine
- Collaborates with other professional orders in order to maximize the deployment of health and social services provided to Quebecers
- Develops practice guides and guidelines
- Takes a position, including in the media, on various health topics

To perform its functions, the Collège relies on a Board of Directors and a Requests Committee, and has standing committees and six divisions: the Practice Enhancement Division, the Inquiries Division, the Medical Education Division, the Legal Services Division, the Finances and Information Technology Division and the Executive Office. The Executive Office coordinates the activities of all the divisions and implements the decisions and orientations of the Board of Directors and the Requests Committee.

Name: HumanX
Description:
HumanX is the #1 conference for AI and business leaders, designed to connect the most influential executives, innovators, investors, and decision-makers in the AI industry. 

HumanX is rewriting the conference experience by focusing on actionable insights and real-world applications of AI solutions. Our premier industry event features a comprehensive agenda, over 300 expert speakers, and numerous opportunities for meaningful connections. Unlike other conferences that cater to a broad audience, HumanX is meticulously curated for those who are shaping the future of AI, ensuring that every interaction is relevant and impactful.

Name: Data Governance Pros Kenya
Description: A community of data protection, privacy and governance professionals in Kenya.

Name: CTO Craft
Description:
A learning and mentoring community to provide unwavering support and an unparalleled learning experience to first-time technology leaders, seasoned CTOs, and dedicated tech team leads. 

At CTO Craft, we work with CTOs and other senior technology leaders, technology teams and entire businesses to build professional and leadership skills. We offer organised and bespoke coaching, mentoring, and personal development opportunities, including our CTO Craft Community, conferences, workshops, training, and our learning platform, Campus.

Our journey began with a simple vision in 2017 when founder Andy Skipper (ex-CTO at Made.com, Comic Relief and many other technology organisations) wanted to improve the quality of technology leadership in organisations by:

• Providing key support to leaders throughout their careers
• Improving their relationships with others and the work itself
• Reducing the chance of burnout and imbalanced energy demands

Name: FENALCO Valle del Cauca
Description: Trabajamos por un comercio que #evoluciona, #conecta y #transforma.

Name: Minalogic
Description: Minalogic, founded in 2005, is the digital technology cluster for France’s Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes region. With offices in Grenoble, Lyon, and Saint-Etienne, Minalogic drives an ecosystem of 500 members that includes nearly 430 innovative companies from across the region that cover the entire digital technology value chain. Minalogic’s members also include universities, research organizations, local government, banks and investors to sustain a unique network dedicated to innovation in digital technologies. Minalogic helps all of its stakeholders make business connections through targeted, qualified introductions and create opportunities to innovate and grow at the national, European, and international levels.

Name: World Leaders in Data and AI [WLDA]
Description: WLDA.Tech is an exclusive network of Women and World leaders in data and AI. We are focused on providing a community to share best practices, peer-to-peer learning, and support each other in professional and personal growth. The group comprises senior leaders from Fortune 1000 companies with similar interests and issues.

Name: World Youth Council
Description: Connecting Nations through Peaceful Dialogue, Innovation, Cooperation, and Diplomacy.

Name: Associação Brasileira de Gestão Corporativa
Description:
A Associação Corporativa – Associação Brasileira de Gestão Corporativa é uma organização sem fins lucrativos, que conecta profissionais, especialistas e gestores comprometidos com o fortalecimento da gestão no Brasil. Reunimos talentos dos setores público, privado, cooperativas e do terceiro setor com o propósito de promover práticas corporativas mais éticas, inovadoras, sustentáveis e eficazes.

Acreditamos que a excelência em gestão é um dos pilares do desenvolvimento econômico e social. Por isso, incentivamos a troca de conhecimento, a formação contínua e o fortalecimento de uma cultura organizacional responsável, colaborativa e preparada para os desafios do futuro.

Entre nossas iniciativas, destacamos a realização do Congresso Corporativo – Congresso Nacional de Gestão Corporativa, principal evento brasileiro sobre gestão corporativa, voltado ao debate de tendências, inovação e boas práticas em liderança, estratégia, ESG, tecnologia e transformação organizacional. O objetivo do Congresso é inspirar lideranças, fomentar conexões estratégicas e impulsionar a evolução da gestão no país.

Name: SNJV - Syndicat National du Jeu Vidéo
Description:
Le Syndicat National du Jeu Vidéo, fondé en 2008, représente les entreprises et les professionnels du jeu vidéo en France. Fort de son réseau de plus de 200 adhérents, le SNJV œuvre pour la promotion, la croissance et la compétitivité de l’industrie du Jeu Vidéo en France et pour l’attractivité du territoire. 
L’objectif du SNJV est de permettre aux entreprises de production de jeux vidéo établies en France d’accélérer leur développement et de renforcer leur compétitivité dans un contexte de marché international. Il réunit aussi au sein du réseau des formations aux métiers du jeu vidéo les organismes d’enseignement aux métiers de notre industrie.

*****

Founded in 2008, the Syndicat National du Jeu Vidéo is the French video game trade association. It gathers more than 200 companies and video game professionals. The association works for its members to bring a stronger and competitive ecosystem in France to help companies to grow faster and better. SNJV also help companies to go abroad and make business all around the world. SNJV works with all local associations and clusters, and is one of the EGDF founder which gather 1 500 video game companies based in Europe.

Name: Sociedad Española de Químicos Cosméticos (SEQC)
Description:
Fundada en 1958, la Sociedad Española de Químicos Cosméticos (SEQC) es una asociación profesional sin ánimo de lucro que agrupa a más de mil personas con una formación principalmenre científica y que desarrollan su actividad en el sector de la cosmética, perfumería y afines.

Cuenta con dos delegaciones territoriales: Delegación Zona Centro y Delegación Zona Levante.

Desde 2016, la SEQC organiza COSMETORIUM, el primer foro completo sobre formulación, fabricación y distribución de productos cosméticos que se celebra en nuestro país: www.cosmetorium.es

Name: Mixing Board, powered by Axios
Description:
Mixing Board is a community of top professionals who share insights, support each other, and seek to elevate the industry at large.

Our 900+ members have led comms at places like Peloton and Instagram, marketing at orgs including LinkedIn and Google Ventures, creative at Oatly, strategy at SXSW, and innovation at Nike. They’ve led internal comms, crisis comms, consumer comms, policy comms — really, every kind of comms — at the world’s most recognizable brands.

Name: Pro Salud Chile
Description:
PRO SALUD CHILE AG es una asociación gremial multisectorial, conformada por actores diversos y complementarios de la cadena de valor de la salud, que han unido capacidades para  impulsar un Polo de Innovación de clase mundial en Chile. 

Somos empresas y emprendimientos nacionales e internacionales, proveedoras de bienes y servicios, centros de investigación y desarrollo científico,
laboratorios, empresas tecnológicas-, motivadas por acercar la salud a las personas, promoviendo soluciones innovadoras, creativas, eficientes y probadas para los problemas de salud del país, a través de un trabajo colaborativo e integrador de talentos.

PRO SALUD CHILE AG quiere ser un socio estratégico con el Estado para
desarrollar nuevas estrategias más eficaces para responder a los desafíos de salud, impulsar la transformación digital, estimular el emprendimiento innovador, reducir las barreras a la innovación y mejorar la transparencia, los estándares de calidad y de Buenas Prácticas en la industria, que permitan a Chile proyectarse internacionalmente como un polo innovador en salud.

Name: Sansanos
Description:
Iniciativa colaborativa, ad honorem, para preservar el espíritu de cuerpo entre los exalumnos.

Con su matricula nace un Sansanito dispuesto a someterse a un proceso de formación extremadamente exigente, y a privarse de muchas experiencias juveniles. Son años duros, pero la investidura recibida en la titulación lo convierte de por vida en un verdadero Sansano de orígen.

Sin experiencia, pero muy bien armado de conocimientos, sale a la caza de sus primeros logros, conoce el éxito, pero nunca olvida que desde donde vino también vienen otros, que vendrán muchos más, y que los Sansanitos que aún están en proceso de formación superarán las mismas duras pruebas que tú superaste para llegar hasta donde estás.

Los Sansanitos de hoy, cuando ya sean Sansanos, serán tan buenos como lo eres tú: Ambos tienen los conocimientos, tu tienes más experiencia, pero el nuevo Sansano viene turbo potenciado, trae mayor capacidad de innovación.

Cuando contrates personal, recuerda cuando buscaste empleo por primera vez, tu también tratabas de mostrar tu superioridad intelectual para dejar claro que tu debías ser el postulante seleccionado.

Los Sansanos tenemos superpoderes para resolver problemas, los enfrentamos por partes, innovando con creatividad para replantear el verdadero problema, investigando para decidir con conocimiento, construyendo prototipos de prueba, desarrollando pilotos para comprobar con la experiencia, enseñando lo aprendido a las nuevas generaciones para que hereden esta mentalidad que nos hace verdaderamente únicos: 

EL PROBLEMA, SI LO SOLUCIONÓ UN SANSANO, NO SE VOLVERÁ A REPETIR.

Para preservar el espíritu testamentario de nuestro benefactor, don Federico Santa María Carrera, todo Sansano tiene el deber moral de ayudar a otro Sansano, especialmente al desvalido meritorio. La mano generosa de un exalumno que contribuyó para la beca que tu recibiste es ahora tu propia mano, y de tu contribución depende la beca que permitirá a otro Sansanito alcanzar su meta.

Name: Black Health Connect
Description: Black Health Connect is an intergenerational, multidisciplinary community and platform that uses the intersection of community and network as a catalyst for optimizing diversity equity and inclusion in healthcare.

Name: ABOOH - Associação Brasileira de Out of Home
Description:
A ABOOH  é a Associação Brasileira de Out of Home com mais de 10 anos de história.
Nossa missão é entender o que está acontecendo e avaliar o que vai acontecer com a comunicação nas ruas, nos shoppings, aeroportos, elevadores, academias, metrôs, trens, ônibus, táxis e muito mais. 
Reunimos as 20 mais importantes, criativas e inovadoras empresas do mercado e continuamos a crescer.

Name: ANFA
Description:
L’ANFA est l’organisme paritaire collecteur agréé (OPCA) et organisme collecteur de la taxe d’apprentissage (OCTA) des métiers des services de l’automobile.

Représentant plus de 40 métiers issus de 13 secteurs d’activité, la branche des services de l’automobile regroupe l’ensemble des activités liées à la vie du véhicule (auto, camion, moto et cycle), de leur sortie d’usine à leur déconstruction et son recyclage. Elle rassemble 131 700 entreprises, 402 700 salariés et 43 millions de véhicules entretenus. 

Grâce à ses mandats et ressources, les équipes de l’ANFA se mobilisent autour de 5 axes :
- L’information et la formation des jeunes,
- La formation des salariés, notamment ceux des TPE (très petites entreprises, moins de 20 salariés),
- Le déploiement de diagnostics GPEC et l’accompagnement de projets d’entreprises,
- La mise à jour du Répertoire national des qualifications des services de l’automobile (RNQSA) et du Répertoire national des certifications des services de l’automobile (RNCSA),
- Le développement des certificats de qualification professionnelle élaborés paritairement, en lien avec les centres de formation.

Name: مجتمع مؤثري لينكدإن | LinkedIn Influencers Community
Description: Saudi Leaders Community

Name: WSJ Leadership Institute
Description: The WSJ Leadership Institute aims to redefine executive leadership development and peer networking by leveraging the unparalleled trust and insights of Dow Jones and The Wall Street Journal to create exclusive, transformative experiences for industry leaders that help them navigate the ever-changing landscape.

Name: IBEF Rio de Janeiro
Description:
É uma entidade sem fins lucrativos, considerada de utilidade pública federal, estadual e municipal, apartidária e que reúne os principais executivos e empresários do país.

O IBEF Rio de Janeiro destaca-se por suas atividades nas áreas de treinamento, pesquisa, eventos, estudos e projetos em diversos segmentos de nossa economia, com discussão dos importantes temas nacionais e regionais através da realização de inúmeros congressos e seminários organizados com a participação de autoridades.

Com a missão de servir a sociedade, o IBEF-Rio disponibiliza em seus treinamentos e seminários cerca de 450 vagas mensais gratuitas para pessoas de baixa renda, funcionários e servidores públicos das três esferas de governo, com o objetivo de auxiliar no aperfeiçoamento profissional destes brasileiros. O IBEF apóia a Fundação Junior Achievement e o Banco da Providência procurando fomentar seus projetos junto a seus associados e a sociedade carioca.

Name: VICHY Économie
Description:
Et si on parlait de votre projet sur l'agglomération de Vichy ?

Vichy Économie est l'Agence d'attractivité et de développement économique de la Communauté d'agglomération Vichy Communauté. Elle vous accompagne et conseille dans votre projet de création, reprise ou développement d'entreprise (recherche de solution immobilière ou foncière, aide au montage du projet, mise en réseau, communication sur votre entreprise, intégration au territoire avec son réseau actif...).

Elle assure également la promotion du territoire économique : Édition annuelle de l'annuaire de l'agglomération de Vichy, animation des sites internet www.vichy-economie.com et www.bioparc.com.

L'Agence de développement vous accompagne à chaque étape de votre projet, depuis votre accueil jusqu'à l'intégration dans le tissu économique local.

Tél : 04 70 30 41 70 / contact@vichy-economie.com

Name: Business Women Australia
Description:
Welcome to Australia’s most dynamic collective of business women.  We invite you to level up and invest in a membership - whether you are a Connector or Leader. 
Together we foster your success and personal growth through genuine connection and collaboration. 
We bring together women from all sectors, industries, and states, to help you achieve your goals and aspirations.
We join forces to create and execute activities and events that showcase our members skills, knowledge, and businesses. 
We build communities where ideas are welcome so that we adapt and grow. 
Our unique approach enables us to truly co-create your success.
Got a question?  Email us at hello@businesswomenaustralia.com.au.

Name: ABCIS - Associação Brasileira CIO e Gestores em TI na Saúde Privada e Pública
Description:
A Associação Brasileira de CIO na Saúde - ABCIS é uma ORG sem FINS LUCRATIVOS fundada em 2012.  

Foi criada para suprir a necessidade de uma entidade que fosse capaz de promover debates acerca dos desafios comuns vivenciados pelos gestores de TI em um setor com as particularidades e complexidades encontradas no setor de saúde.
Há 13 anos a Associação contribui de forma efetiva na evolução da TI na Saúde disseminando lições aprendidas e melhores práticas, disponibilizando conteúdos exclusivos, imersões nacionais e internacionais e promovendo a aproximação e a colaboração entre os atores do sistema de saúde, visando a concepção conjunta de soluções para os desafios comuns do setor de forma imparcial e agnóstica.

É a principal facilitadora do diálogo do setor com a indústria fomentando o alinhamento de expectativas entre quem vende e quem compra tecnologia voltado para o setor de Saúde no Brasil. 

Estamos abertos a parcerias e projetos que visem apoiar o setor no processo de transformação digital.

Promovemos de forma imparcial e agnóstica  a aproximação e a colaboração dos líderes de TI do setor de Saúde com a Indústria de Tecnologia interessada em conhecer os desafios específicos do segmento e disposta a colaborar na resolução dos problemas e desafios inerentes a evolução tecnológica e a jornada de transformação digital da Saúde. 

Fortalecemos o papel ESTRATÉGICO  da Tecnologia da Informação na Saúde  através de discussões em alto nível entre pares, provedores e indústria de TI, demais profissionais de Saúde e atores do ecossistema motivados pelos benefícios trazidos pela transformação digital.

Você Líder de TI que atua no setor de Saúde, associe gratuitamente.

Empresas fornecedoras são bem vindas para contribuir nessa jornada.

Name: Grupo Faro Verde
Description:
Impulsamos empresas comprometidas con el desarrollo y crecimiento de la sociedad, de manera integrada, respetando y promoviendo el cuidado ambiental. Dirigido y conformado por profesionales con enfoques multidisciplinarios, realizamos nuestro trabajo con la firme convicción de alcanzar el máximo rendimiento, en armonía con el entorno, pensando siempre en el progreso de las generaciones futuras.
Con la visión de ser reconocidos como referentes y protagonistas del desarrollo local, gestionamos compañías líderes en tres sectores estratégicos: agro, turismo y real estate.
Nuestro motor es la búsqueda permanente de nuevos desafíos, organizarlos, y perfeccionarlos en un marco innovativo que agregue valor.

Name: AFM Holding Limited
Description:
AFM Holding is a diversified group of companies with a unified vision: to drive innovation, deliver excellence, and build sustainable value across industries.
 
Headquartered in the UAE, AFM Holding operates in a range of sectors including Real Estate, Digital Marketing, E-commerce, Trading and Apparel , with each vertical aligned under a shared commitment to quality, integrity, and growth.

With a focus on talent, technology, and trust, AFM Holding continues to expand its portfolio while fostering a culture of creativity, collaboration, and customer-centricity. We believe in creating opportunities, nurturing partnerships, and shaping a better future—one bold idea at a time.

One Vision. One Team. One AFM.

Welcome to AFM Holding Limited!

Name: Consejo COLEF
Description:
Bienvenido/a a la página del Consejo COLEF.

Somos el Consejo General que integra a los 17 COLEF/COPLEF autonómicos. 

Ahora estamos trabajando intensamente para que nuestra profesión -que se ejerce con titulación universitaria en Ciencias de la Actividad Física y del Deporte-, por fin tenga reserva de actividad, es decir, que se regule a las educadoras y educadores físico deportivos en una ley estatal que detalle sus actos propios: dirección técnica deportiva, preparación física, readaptación físico deportiva, e intervención físico-deportiva sociosanitaria y social.

Nuestra misión principal es representar a la profesión en España, y velamos porque en los servicios propios de estos profesionales la ciudadanía esté protegida.

Name: MKTG WMN
Description:
MKTG WMN is a new-age networking group built for accessibility, inclusivity, and community-led growth of every woman marketer who joins. 

Join our community by visiting: www.mktgwmn.com to participate in our Slack, LinkedIn, and Instagram communities, receive communications, and register for our discussion-based events!

Name: Operations Nation
Description:
Operations Nation (ON) is a community-powered knowledge hub for operations leaders. 

Our mission is to co-create and curate a knowledge base filled with ops-specific content, tools, resources, and workshops to help operations professionals not only survive but thrive, at every stage of their operations career. 

Our vision is a world where operational best practices are just as readily accessible as any other business information, where operations is just as respected a discipline as strategy, and where young people are as likely to aspire to become COOs and operational leaders as CEOs.

We are creating a digital ecosystem designed to showcase the people, systems, and processes that power our businesses and make the world go round. We’re here for:

- Existing startup/scaleup operations managers who are seeking more resources to be the best ops leaders they can be

- Those who are aspiring to be operations managers/leaders, but aren't sure how  

- Experienced operations leaders who are happy to share their expertise and knowledge  

- Everyone else who doesn't yet know they would make great operations professionals

Name: Alliance for European Flax-Linen & Hemp
Description:
Alliance for European Flax-Linen & Hemp est l’unique organisation européenne agro-industrielle référente à échelle mondiale qui fédère tous les acteurs de la chaîne de valeur du Lin et du Chanvre européens. 

Lieu de réflexion et d’analyse conjoncturelle, de concertation et d’orientation stratégique, l’Alliance du Lin et du Chanvre européens anime une filière d’excellence dans un contexte mondialisé. Elle encourage le dialogue avec les pouvoirs publics nationaux et européens.

L’Alliance du Lin et du Chanvre européens crée un environnement favorable à la compétitivité des entreprises industrielles à travers une triple mission : informer les membres, les marques et les consommateurs, soutenir l’écosystème et les savoir-faire européens, et promouvoir le Lin et le Chanvre européens, comme fibres premium durables préférées à travers le monde.
Elle réunit plus de 10 000 entreprises à travers 16 pays d’Europe, et articule ses actions autour des valeurs du collectif, de l’innovation, de la validation scientifique et du respect des Hommes et de la planète. 
Elle favorise, initie et organise les réflexions stratégiques et la recherche sur ses fibres, pour mettre des données économiques avérées, des informations environnementales et des preuves scientifiques fiables au service de l’ensemble de ses interlocuteurs.

L’Alliance du Lin et du Chanvre européens œuvre à la visibilité internationale de ses fibres dont les qualités techniques et environnementales inspirent la création mondiale et offrent de nouvelles perspectives à l’innovation industrielle. Elle garantit la traçabilité de la fibre de Lin à travers les certifications EUROPEAN FLAX et MASTERS OF LINEN.

Name: Bombay Founders' Club
Description:
Bombay Founders' Club is a members-only community for Bombay-based founders, hosting meetups every two weeks to network, share experiences, and support each other in a relaxed setting. 

Founders interested in joining our club are welcome to reach out or fill out the form below!

Name: Royal Australian Chemical Institute
Description:

As the national professional body, our mission is to build and empower the chemical science community by delivering essential resources, education, and support to our members. We are the leading advocates for chemistry, dedicated to shaping public understanding and promoting its critical role and positive impact across education, industry, and government.

Modern Counsel is the trusted source for perspective, ideas, and insights from the legal industry’s best and brightest leaders.

Name: COIICV - Colegio Oficial de Ingenieros Industriales CV
Description:
El Colegio Oficial de Ingenieros Industriales de la Comunitat Valenciana es una corporación de derecho público, amparada por la Ley y reconocida por el Estado, con personalidad jurídica propia y plena capacidad para el cumplimiento de sus fines. 

El Colegio Oficial de Ingenieros Industriales de la Comunitat Valenciana se constituyó el 10 de noviembre de 1950. Actualmente está conformado por tres delegaciones: Alicante, Castellón y Valencia.

MISIÓN: 
- Velar por los derechos y deberes de la profesión. 
- Impedir el intrusismo y la competencia desleal. 
- Recoger y encauzar las aspiraciones de la profesión para perfeccionar y regular los servicios que pueden prestar los Ingenieros Industriales. 
- Impulsar el desarrollo de labores científicas, técnicas, económicas, sociales y culturales relacionadas con la profesión. 
- Informar de las modificaciones de la legislación vigente relacionadas con la Ingeniería Industrial. 
- Impulsar la formación, principalmente técnica, de sus colegiados. 
- Cooperar con la Administración de Justicia y demás organismos oficiales o particulares en la designación de Ingenieros Industriales para la realización de la actividad profesional. 
- Mantener un servicio de información sobre plazas y trabajos a desarrollar por Ingenieros Industriales.

Name: Startup Syndicate
Description:
Startup Syndicate is an Operator-led startup enablement platform - by founders, for founders!

The platform is dedicated to accelerating early-stage startups by providing tailored mentorship, networking opportunities, investment readiness, and access to strategic corporate partnerships. 

Founded by experienced operators, it fosters a vibrant local ecosystem through curated events, funding support, and growth resources tailored to market needs. 

The platform uniquely combines community-driven engagement with practical startup tools and corporate innovation programs, positioning itself as a vital bridge between Pakistan’s emerging startups and global markets, while empowering founders to scale sustainably and effectively.

Name: ABHH Oficial
Description:
A ABHH é uma associação médica resultado da fusão da SBHH, fundada em 26 de maio de 1950 e do Colégio Brasileiro de Hematologia, fundado em 30 de agosto de 1965. Esta fusão ocorreu em 29/10/2008.

Uma associação de direito privado para fins não econômicos, de caráter cientifico, social e cultural, congregando médicos e outros profissionais interessados na prática hematológica, hemoterápica e de terapia celular.

Name: ICAI ABU DHABI CHAPTER
Description:
Operating Framework
The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India, Abu Dhabi Chapter ("the chapter") was established in October 1984 and operates as a Company Limited by Guarantee registered in Abu Dhabi Global Market

Objectives
The main objective of the Chapter is to provide continual professional enhancement to its members and towards this end we organize seminars and events that are addressed by leading subject matter experts.

Activities
The key event in our professional activities calendar is the Annual International Seminar, which has been a regular feature on the program calendar since the first such event in October 1988. In addition to the annual seminars, evening talks and workshops are organized by the Chapter throughout the year

Organization
The Chapter's activities are organized by an elected body of members. The Executive Committee is responsible for identifying areas of interest to the members and organizing the events.

At present, the Chapter has over 700 members. The Chapter is supported the local business community in meeting its objectives of providing continual professional enhancement and a networking platform to its members. The accounts of the Chapter, which follows the calendar year are subject to audit. These audited accounts are presented, discussed and adopted at our general meeting.

Name: AMA Houston – American Marketing Association

For marketing professionals, AMA Houston is THE Marketing Connection for leading educational information, career-building resources, and valuable networking opportunities.

Name: American Distilling Institute
Description:
THE HEART OF DISTILLING

The American Distilling Institute (ADI) is the oldest and largest organization of small-batch, independently-owned distillers in the United States. Founded in 2003 by Bill Owens, the organization has grown from a few dozen distillers to more than 1,000 paid members. In 2015, more than 1,500 people attended ADI’s 13th Annual Distilling Conference and Vendor Expo, in San Diego, CA.

OUR MISSION
To promote and defend the art and enterprise of craft distilling. Through our programs of economic development, academic research and education, ADI generates greater public awareness and appreciation for the quality and variety of artisan spirits and brings greater benefits to the larger society in which we live.

Name: المنظمة المهنية لإدارة المخاطر | PARM
Description:
The Professional Association of Risk Management (PARM) formerly Risk Management Society, is a non-profit organisation advancing the future of risk leadership across the Middle East. We convene professionals, students, and institutions to elevate risk culture across sectors.

We deliver practical impact through free mentorship, public knowledge initiatives, and collaborative events that bridge academia, industry, and government. Our platform helps people lead with clarity in uncertainty by localising global best practices to regional realities.

Through thought-leadership publications, expert panels, and cross-sector working groups, PARM shapes how risk is understood, managed, and applied in real decision-making. We don’t just talk about risk, we enable action, build capability, and move the profession forward.

Licensed by the National Center for Non-Profit Sector (Saudi Arabia), Licence No. 1100525500.

Name: APhA Foundation
Description:
The American Pharmacists Association (APhA) Foundation is a trusted source of research demonstrating how pharmacists can improve health care.  We look to create a new medication use system where patients, pharmacists, physicians and other health care professionals collaborate to dramatically improve the cost effectiveness and quality of patient health outcomes.  For over 60 years, we have consistently proven that patient health outcomes are positively impacted by pharmacists. 

The APhA Foundation is affiliated with the American Pharmacists Association (APhA), the oldest and largest national professional society of pharmacists in the United States.

Name: مجتمع إدارة المخاطر | Risk Management Society
Description:
The Risk Management Society (RMS), officially registered as the Professional Association of Risk Management, is a non-profit organization driving the future of risk leadership in the Middle East. We exist to build a resilient, forward-thinking community of professionals, students, and institutions committed to elevating risk culture across sectors.

RMS delivers practical impact through free mentorship programs, public knowledge initiatives, and collaborative events that bridge academia, industry, and government. Our platform empowers individuals to lead with clarity in uncertain environments, by translating global best practices into regional relevance.

Whether through our thought-leadership publications, expert panels, or cross-sector working groups, RMS is shaping how risk is understood, managed, and applied in real-world decision-making. We don’t just talk about risk—we enable action, build capability, and move the profession forward.

Name: East Mediterranean Gas Forum - EMGF
Description:
Throughout history, the East Mediterranean Region has played a prominent role helping shape our modern world today. Located at the crossroads of three continents -Africa, Asia and Europe– has made it essential for trade and key to culture for millennia.

Over the last decade, many significant gas discoveries have been made in the Eastern Mediterranean.

Recognizing the vast resource prospects, opportunities and challenges, it was clear that the full potential of the Eastern Mediterranean gas basin can only be unlocked if suppliers, buyers and transit countries in the East Med region cooperate on developing an infrastructure for gas trade within the region and with external markets. 

This outline was the base underpinning the establishment of the East Mediterranean Gas Forum “EMGF” as a platform for Gas producer, consumer and transit countries.

In 2018, Egypt introduced an Initiative to establish the East Mediterranean Gas Forum as a platform for structured policy dialogue on natural gas, leading to the development of a sustainable regional gas market that could unlock the full gas resource potential in the East Mediterranean region.

During the tripartite summit held in October 2018 in Crete, Leaders of Egypt, Cyprus and Greece declared their intentions to establish the Forum, accordingly, further coordination with regional parties and international organizations took place.

The Egyptian initiative was welcomed and sincerely adopted by the rest of the Founding Members; Cyprus, Greece, Israel, Italy, Jordan and Palestine (together with Egypt) as an initiative that sets the base for a structured policy dialogue leading to the development of a regional gas market to unlock the full gas resource potential and to set the stage for multilateral and full hub trade.

In 2021, France joined the EMGF as a Member Country, the United States of America, the European Union and the World Bank joined the Forum as observers.

Name: Sirk Norge
Description:
Sirk Norge (Norwegian Recycling and Circular Economy Organisation) leverages 30 years of industry-specific knowledge to promote and develop socially responsible waste management policies in Norway and Europe.

Sirk Norge organizes the Norwegian waste and recycling industry and its stakeholders. We represent more than 200 different public and private companies working with waste management, recycling and recycled materials either directly or as consultants, advisors or suppliers. We work to create an understanding for the need to increase the circularity of all materials and products, and to strengthen the recycling industry’s position as a key player in a sustainable and circular economy.

Name: PMI - San Francisco Bay Area Chapter

Our members and volunteers come from all professional backgrounds and walks of life - join us!

Name: Connect Nashville Business Networking
Description:

Description:
MYStartup is a national initiative by the Ministry of Science, Technology, and Innovation (MOSTI) and powered by Cradle Fund Sdn Bhd. (Cradle). It consists of several programmes that aim to strengthen Malaysia's startup ecosystem and community. 

The programmes aim to support startups' long-term sustainable development and expansion through content that focuses on capacity building and human capital. It will ensure startups are thoroughly guided starting from the ideation stage, trained, supported, and opportunity to highlight their company profile to attract foreign investors.  

The MYStartup Programme is part of the Malaysian Startup Ecosystem Roadmap (SUPER). Cradle is the focal point agency for the startup ecosystem, which has been mandated to ensure that this strategy benefits the startup ecosystem as a whole.

Name: Fédération du BTP Drôme Ardèche
Description:
