Nous rassemblons plus de 650 entreprises adhérentes de toutes tailles (artisans, PME, grandes entreprises) qui emploient plus de 10 000 salariés au sein d’un réseau de proximité.

Nos missions : informer, conseiller, accompagner et défendre les artisans et entreprises du BTP.

Name: AFCA-CIAL
Description:
Acteur majeur du secteur de la nutrition animale depuis plus de 80 ans, l’AFCA-CIAL représente les entreprises spécialisées dans la complémentation de la nutrition des animaux, qui a pour objectif d’équilibrer et d’améliorer les rations des animaux d’élevage pour une nutrition saine. Avec plus de 130 entreprises adhérentes : fournisseurs d’additifs et ingrédients fonctionnels, fabricants de prémélanges, fabricants d’aliments complémentaires et membres associés, l’AFCA-CIAL représente la quasi-totalité de la profession en France. 

L’AFCA-CIAL accompagne ses adhérents et soutient le développement d’un secteur dynamique et innovant, apporteur de solutions pour répondre aux préoccupations sociétales actuelles :
-	Maîtriser la sécurité sanitaire des aliments pour animaux. L’AFCA-CIAL est partie prenante d’OQUALIM.
–	Promouvoir le rôle de la nutrition-santé.
–	Être acteur de la durabilité des filières de production animale. L’AFCA-CIAL est impliquée dans DURALIM.

Dans un contexte règlementaire exigeant en matière de sécurité et d’information de la filière et du consommateur, l’AFCA-CIAL est actrice des évolutions règlementaires, grâce au dialogue instauré avec les autorités et aux relations solides tissées avec les autres syndicats du secteur de la nutrition animale, au niveau français et européen.

L’AFCA-CIAL est membre d’EUROFAC, la représentation au niveau européen de la nutrition animale française au côté du SNIA et de la Coopération Agricole Nutrition Animale, autres syndicats du secteur de la nutrition animale en France. EUROFAC est adhérente de la FEFAC, fédération européenne des fabricants d’aliments composés. L’AFCA-CIAL est également impliquée à la FEFANA, association européenne pour le secteur des additifs et prémélanges, et à la EMFEMA qui représente les fournisseurs et utilisateurs de minéraux.

Name: Forum for Yngre Almen Medicinere (FYAM) - Fremtidens praktiserende læger
Description:
Vil du vide, hvad 1600 af fremtidens praktiserende læger mener om højaktuelle sundhedsemner?

FYAM er interesseorganisation og fagligt fællesskab for læger i almen medicinsk videreuddannelse. Vi er organiseret under DSAM (Dansk Selskab for Almen Medicin). 

Vi arbejder med at fremme rekruttering til specialet, højne kvaliteten i uddannelsen og initiere et netværk blandt kommende og nuværende speciallæger i almen medicin både regionalt, nationalt og internationalt.

Vi ser den praktiserende læge som kernen i almen praksis og almen praksis som kernen i et velfungerende og effektivt sundhedsvæsen. Vi deltager i den politiske debat om fremtidens sundhedsvæsen med en almen medicinsk vinkel. 

Vi udarbejder løbende initiativer og indsatser, der skal styrke vejen til almen medicin og lægelivet i fremtidens almen praksis.

Tak fordi du følger med.

Har du kommentarer, inputs eller spørgsmål, så send os endelig en besked.

Presse? Kontakt os på fyam-kommuniaktion@dsam.dk eller kommunikationsrådgiver i DSAM Mogens Folkmann Andersen på mfa@dsam.dk.

Name: Youth Ambassador Suli
Description: Youth Ambassadors - Sulaimani which is a part of the Supreme Council for Youth led by Iraqi Prime Minister Mohammed Shia' Al Sudani

Name: Pharmaceutical Society of South Africa
Description: The PSSA's Vision is to be the undisputed leader and guardian of the pharmacy profession. Our mission is to support and promote the profession of pharmacy in improving medication use and advancing patient care.

Name: Make More Hustle Less Club
Description:
The Make More Hustle Less Club is an exclusive community of elite sales pros focused on developing their personal operating system in order to create sustainable success and satisfaction. 

Join today to get a behind-the-scenes look at how Brandon Fluharty developed a unique approach to close $27M+ ARR, earn $3.5M+ in income, all while averaging 7 hours per night of sleep in three years.

With your membership you get:

→ The Personal Operating System Blueprint 
→ Perpetual access to the latest version of the Thrive Space tracker
→ Private hub page with resources and assets to level up your performance
→ Private community where we come together once a month (2nd Monday of every month) to implement one concept of the personal operating system

Name: EIT Community Hub Albania
Description:
The European Institute of Innovation and Technology (EIT) Community Hub acts as a one-stop shop that gathers all EIT Knowledge and Innovation Communities (KICs) in Albania and supports and identifies synergies between the EIT Community and local actors. The hub reinforces local entrepreneurship and builds bridges between local and EU innovation networks.
The EIT strengthens Europe’s ability to innovate by powering solutions to pressing global challenges and by nurturing entrepreneurial talent to create sustainable growth and skilled jobs in Europe. The EIT is an EU body and an integral part of Horizon Europe, the EU Framework Programme for Research and Innovation.
The EIT Community Hub is funded by the EIT, a body of the European Union.

Name: Ingenieurkammer Sachsen
Description: Die Ingenieurkammer Sachsen arbeitet als Körperschaft des öffentlichen Rechts und ist die einzige gesetzlich legitimierte Interessenvertretung sächsischer Ingenieurinnen und Ingenieure aller Fachrichtungen. Dabei ist sie Partner für Wirtschaft, Wissenschaft, Verwaltung und Politik, Plattform für das Engagement ihrer Mitglieder sowie Dienstleister für ihre Mitglieder.

Name: Society for Inherited Metabolic Disorders (SIMD)
Description:
Established in 1978, SIMD aims to increase knowledge of and promote research in inborn errors of metabolism in humans and to stimulate interactions between clinicians and investigators in inborn errors of metabolism. The Society seeks to foster training and maintenance of a core of qualified investigators and practitioners in the field and to promote public understanding of inborn errors of metabolism. These objectives are achieved by facilitating communication and interaction among experienced clinicians and investigators and by advocating for patients and research through public policy forums.
The rarity, uniqueness, and variability of metabolic disorders, as well as the need for an individual approach to treatment of each disorder, make treatment of inborn errors of metabolism very complicated. Moreover, clincial training of medical geneticists to care for patients with these disorders has lagged behind the entry of affected patients into the health care system.

In order to address the urgent need for educational collaboration, the Society for Inherited Metabolic Disorders (SIMD) has established the North American Metabolic Academy (NAMA). NAMA will provide a forum for providing medical genetic and biochemical genetic trainees to develop a base of knowledge of inborn errors of metabolism and exposure to the diagnosis and management of metabolic disease. Taught by an internationally renowned faculty in an informal setting that emphasizes interaction with other trainees, participants will learn an approach for understanding and managing metabolic emergencies and long-term treatment of biochemical disease. Ongoing access to an interactive web site will make NAMA a long-term opportunity for learning for participants.
An early history of SIMD was written in 2006 from the personal perspective of the late Dr. Louis ‘Skip’ Elsas, founding SIMD President, posted here: 
https://simd.org/SIMD/History%20of%20SIMD.Elsas.2006.pdf

Name: SEDDRe
Description:
Le SEDDRe représente un éco-système d’entreprises de toutes tailles qui œuvrent en France à la seconde vie des ouvrages du bâtiment et des travaux publics, permettant aux maîtres d’ouvrage de porter de nouveaux projets d’aménagement du territoire et du cadre de vie.

Les expertises des adhérents du SEDDRe sont multiples et complémentaires : dépollution des bâtiments (amiante, plomb et autres substances dangereuses), dépose sélective des produits et matériaux de construction, déconstruction des ouvrages, réemploi des matériaux de seconde vie, valorisation et recyclage des déchets.

Si l’économie circulaire constitue un enjeu majeur de préservation et de gestion des ressources naturelles pour les territoires, la santé et la protection des travailleurs demeurent la priorité des travaux portés par le syndicat professionnel aux plans national et européen.

Name: ABACUS Worldwide
Description: Abacus Worldwide is an international association of independent accounting, consulting and legal firms focused on connecting like-minded quality firms for the sole purpose of providing you, as a member firm, with the knowledge and resources you need to grow in today’s multifaceted business environment. Abacus Worldwide aims to offer a cost effective and convenient resource to growing firms. Our goal is to assist you as a member firm in meeting client needs locally and internationally by connecting you with the right firm in the right locations.

Name: Shadow Her
Description:
Your business is your dream, your passion and we understand why you want to take it to the next level!

The Shadow Her organization was created for determined entrepreneurial women dedicated to achieving unprecedented success in their businesses.. Yes, you can do this! That is where we can help.

Shadow Her is a six-month program designed to help you better understand the foundational and operational aspects of your business. Each month we provide educational programming, resources, and encouragement to help you believe in the most important part of your business – YOU!

Name: Holo Global
Description:
Holo is a speaker partner to organisations that operate under real pressure.

From FTSE 100 leadership teams and global brands to challenger founders and elite sport organisations, we work with those who intentionally build high-performance environments; where credibility matters and reputation is hard won.

We specialise in placing speakers with lived experience of leadership under pressure. People who have earned trust when it mattered, made decisions with consequence, and know how to hold senior rooms without performing for them.

Every voice we place is matched with care, intent, and strategic relevance. We work closely with both clients and speakers to ensure alignment, depth, and delivery that stands up to scrutiny.

What We Offer

Keynote Experiences — Story-led talks that move people into action.

Offsite & Leadership Retreat Placements — Deep, context-driven sessions for high-trust environments.

Private Firesides & Q&As — Intimate, unfiltered conversations with those who’ve lived it.

Closed-Door Panels & Briefings — Voices that cut through the noise. 

Trusted, among others, by:

Coca-Cola
Spirax-Sarco
The Blend Group
Harper Adams University
BAE Systems
RWE Renewables
The Museum of the Royal Navy
Northampton Saints Business Club
The Merode Club, Brussels
Breda University of Applied Sciences


Founded by Tracey Duke and international rugby referee Christophe Ridley, Holo is a speaker partner to high-performing organisations; working behind the scenes to place the right voice in the room, with precision and intent.

www.hologlobal.agency

christophe@hologlobal.agency | tracey@hologlobal.agency

Name: Engineers Australia Victoria Division
Description:
Victoria is the largest member state with over 30,000 members in the Division. We are the representatives of our engineering profession in the Victoria Division Committee. 

Not all leaders are engineers, but we believe all engineers are leaders. 

Our collective mission is to advance society through great engineering and we do this through leadership of the profession, supporting pathways into engineering, advocacy for engineering led solutions of the challenges facing the Victoria Division, an effective volunteer network, and supporting a strong professional framework. 

This page/group is office bearer/volunteer built and run by local engineers. 

This is not the official page of Engineers Australia and is not moderated or managed by Engineers Australia employees.

Name: CentralOhioCIO
Description:
CentralOhioCIO is the preeminent executive peer leadership development organization of Central Ohio chief information officers. Our membership is comprised exclusively of CIOs (or equivalent executive roles) from public and private companies, government, education, healthcare and nonprofit organizations.

Our mission is to build a strong, professional community among Central Ohio's information technology leaders, by providing a forum to share ideas, best practices and experiences relevant to CIOs.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Central Ohio CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. Since its inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: IALD Middle East Chapter
Description:
IALD Middle East is the regional chapter of the International Association of Lighting Designers. 

Founded in 1969 and based in Chicago, IL, USA, the International Association of Lighting Designers (IALD) is an internationally recognized non-profit organization dedicated to supporting a network of 1,500 independent lighting design professionals who satisfy its rigorous qualification process.

The IALD strives to set the global standard for lighting design excellence by promoting the advancement and recognition of professional lighting designers.

Name: the electric MISSION
Description:
As we envision a world with sustainable and equitable mobility and energy systems, we aim to realise this through a network of partners and specialise on impact project delivery, innovation support and market development.

Let's co-create the transition - info@e-mission.org

Name: SoCalCIO
Description:
SoCalCIO is one of 30 chapters in the Inspire Leadership Network, a national membership organization comprised exclusively of CIOs
from public and private businesses, government, education, healthcare, and nonprofit institutions.

SoCalCIO exists to help CIOs thrive in today’s most
challenging C-suite executive role. The chapter regularly
convenes leading CIOs and fosters meaningful relationships
by hosting non-commercial, member-led programs—helping
CIOs gain leadership advantage.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Southern California-based CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. Since inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: Institut de la Statistique de Djibouti
AFRO GLOBAL CONNECT
Description: Founded by Thione NIANG, we are a global platform working to transform relationships and create innovative business opportunities globally with an Incredible mix of preeminent Afro descendant leaders, passionate change-makers and rising stars of all ages.

Name: Boulangers du Grand Paris
Description:
Fondé en 1801, le Syndicat Patronal des Boulangers-Pâtissiers du Grand Paris regroupe les artisans-boulangers des départements 75, 92, 93 et 94. 
Ses missions principales sont de défendre les intérêts de la profession, de la représenter auprès des institutions et de la promouvoir.

Name: I Take the Lead Inc Networking Referral Groups
Description:
“Most people would rather do business by referral rather than cold calling.”

I Take The Lead  helps motivated entrepreneurs grow their business by referral, while creating community one member at at time, one city at a time.

Several of the benefits we offer our members include the following:

* Special Guest Speaker meetings - We have a variety of Special Guest Speakers who speak on subjects that add value for  other professionals/businesses and are of interest to the general business public. Subjects include marketing, social media, networking. communication, etc. All members are welcome to attend all Special Guest Speaker meetings, for no additional fees. 
 
* New Member Orientation is free and optional for all members, new or seasoned. 
 
* Free Business Workshops to help members with their business needs and networking needs
 
* Free Webinars and Teleminars cover a variety of business subjects
 
* Periodic FREE Mixers - i Take The Lead members periodically host Free Mixers. Usually there are 50 or 60 people in attendance, with several guests. Always a great way to network, see old friends, and invite your customers, etc. 
 
* Lead With Heart - The non-profit branch of i Take The Lead. Get involved and network with lots of others, while giving back to the local community. 
 
* FREE Membership Fees - All members can get FREE membership, while helping to build the membership in their groups.

Name: Irish Nutrition & Dietetic Institute INDI
Description: The INDI is the professional body for registered dietitians in the Republic of Ireland.

Name: CSFC Occitanie
Description:
Depuis 1981, la CSFC est un syndicat professionnel qui défend les intérêts des formateurs indépendants et consultants. Engagé dans une démarche d’amélioration continue des pratiques pédagogiques et technologiques, la Chambre Syndicale des Formateurs Consultants propose 3 types de services : 
Veille pédagogique, technologique et réglementaire des actions de formation
Événements en présentiel par les CSFC régionales et visio par la Fédération
Journées de formations, transversales où propre à l’activité de formateur. 

Pour promouvoir ses membres auprès des organismes de formation, la CSFC met à disposition de ses adhérents un annuaire des talents. Son objectif est de référencer tous nos adhérents pour qu’ils soient visibles des organismes de formations, écoles et entreprises.

Name: Utica-Rome Professionals Under 40
Description:
We are a networking group for young professionals in Utica-Rome Area. We host monthly networking events to connect young professionals. Please like and attend one of our monthly events if interested!

Mission statement:
"Empower and connect young professionals through dynamic networking opportunities, professional development resources, and community engagement. Our mission is to cultivate a supportive network that fosters career growth, leadership skills, and lasting relationships, driving innovation and success in diverse industries.

Name: HealthyLink
Description:
Acteurs majeurs du développement bien être, sport et santé dans le monde du travail. 
Le premier réseau pluridisciplinaire au service de votre entreprise, basé sur un système de crédit, pour prendre en charge chaque salarié individuellement.

Name: Black Business Network
Description:
Black Business Network is the home of Black business owners and start-up entrepreneurs. Our membership platform is designed to strengthen business connections, financing and knowledge in our community.
 
Through our platform you can learn and find support throughout the lifespan of your entrepreneurial journey. We pride ourselves in engaging with the right corporate partners who are passionate about diversity & inclusion and collaborating with other Black organisations. To help bring about a collective spirit of change for our entrepreneurs, we provide access to business support resources, services, educational and networking events; while staying updated on the latest news and engagement in our business community.
 
Join us as we shape and build the black business community while showcasing your talent, professionalism and business!

Name: Associação Brasileira de Sommeliers - RS (ABS-RS)
Description:
Somos a Associação Brasileira de Sommeliers do Rio Grande do Sul (ABS-RS). Nossa sede está localizada em Bento Gonçalves, mas as nossas atividades acontecem em lindas paisagens vitivinícolas.


Entre os nossos principais objetivos estão as formações de profissionais para as áreas de vinhos e gastronomia. Também promovemos conhecimento, arte, ciência e reunimos amigos do vinho a partir de nossas atividades.
Location: Bento Gonçalves, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Steuerberaterverband Düsseldorf e.V.
Description: Steuerberaterverband Düsseldorf e.V. is a company based out of 98 Grafenberger Allee, Düsseldorf, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

Name: Fredrikstad Næringsråd
Description: Fredrikstad Næringsråd er pådrivere for næringsutvikling i Fredrikstad og Nedre Glomma – gjennom tett samhandling med bedrifter og offentlige myndigheter.

Name: Chicago RIMS
Description:
Advancing our industry through education, community and strategic partnership.  We are the Chicago Chapter of RIMS and your resource for risk and insurance thought leadership.

As the preeminent organization dedicated to advancing the practice of risk management, the Risk and Insurance Management Society, Inc. (RIMS) is a global not-for-profit organization representing more than 3,500 industrial, service, nonprofit, charitable and government entities throughout the world.

Founded in 1950, RIMS brings networking, professional development and education opportunities to its membership of more than 10,000 risk management professionals who operate in more than 120 countries.

Name: WFM Labs
Description:
WFM Labs is a group of current and former Call Center and Workforce Management leaders determined to dramatically and rapidly improve the customer service experience for customers and employees by developing and sharing disruptive customer service solutions.  

The delivery of customer service today is broken because it relies on outdated technologies and management practices that have failed to keep pace with the seismic changes that have taken place in the ordering, delivery, and support of products and services over the past two decades.  WFM Labs will rewrite the playbook for delivering customer service using powerful AI and Automation technologies to enable people to deliver customer service experiences that will immediately benefit customers, customer service workers, and shareholders.  

Membership in the WFM Labs team is free to qualified customer service leaders; for more information or to join the community, visit WFMLabs.org

Name: ACM FAccT
Description: ACM FAccT brings together a diverse community of scholars from computer science, law, social sciences, and humanities to investigate and tackle issues in this emerging area. Research challenges are not limited to technological solutions regarding potential bias, but include the question of whether decisions should be outsourced to data- and code-driven computing systems. We particularly seek to evaluate technical solutions with respect to existing problems, reflecting upon their benefits and risks; to address pivotal questions about economic incentive structures, perverse implications, distribution of power, and redistribution of welfare; and to ground research on fairness, accountability, and transparency in existing legal requirements.

Name: Chemical Society of Ethiopia (CSE)
Description: The Chemical Society of Ethiopia traces its origin to November 1982 when some 40 chemists from various schools, regional educational office, the Addis Ababa University, the Central Laboratory and research institutes and the Ethiopian Science and Technology Commission attended a UNESCO-sponsored workshop organized by the Ministry of Education on the theme: "Modernization of Chemistry Education in Ethiopia".   The CSE was officially founded in 1983 and is presently run by an Executive Committee (EC) that is elected by members during the Annual Congress of the Society.   The EC consists of a president, vice president, secretary, treasurer, editor-in-chief, auditor and two additional members and secretariat.

Name: European Compliance Professionals Association | ECPA
Description:
We connect compliance professionals, fostering a strong and supportive community. From networking events and online forums to mentorship programs, we help you build meaningful connections and stay ahead of the curve.

We're passionate about elevating the compliance profession. We develop industry standards, offer top-notch training and certifications, and recognize excellence in the field.

We believe compliance is good for business. We work to create a favorable legal and business environment, promoting compliance as a valuable asset. We also bridge the gap between businesses and state institutions, fostering dialogue and collaboration.

Your professional development is our priority. We offer training and conferences to help you stay sharp and advance your career.

We're all about knowledge sharing. Our online forums, networking events, and mentorship programs connect you with peers and industry experts, empowering you to learn and grow.

Finally, we're champions of best practices. We develop resources, conduct research, and host events to promote effective compliance strategies.

Name: CEPIS
Description:
The Council of European Professional Informatics Societies (CEPIS) is a non-profit organisation seeking to improve and promote a high standard among informatics professionals in recognition of the impact that Informatics has on employment, business and society. CEPIS represents 31 Member Societies in 30 countries across greater Europe.

Our mission is to work towards ensuring a mature, recognised IT profession, to grow the pool of future IT professionals, to promote digital competence for the workforce, and to advocate for a socially responsible, secure, ethical, inclusive and environmentally friendly application of IT in Europe.

Name: Baseball and Business
Description: Created by players, for players...We bring together current & former pro and college baseball players to more rapidly advance their accomplishments in baseball and business through accountability, building relationships with others on the same journey and sharing ideas so that we can grow our income, network and mindset in order to win for our families.

Name: SOCHITAL (Sociedad Chilena de Tecnología de Alimentos)
Description:
La Sociedad Chilena de Tecnología en Alimentos (SOCHITAL) fue creada en el año 1962. Está  conformada por profesionales ingenieros en alimentos, ingenieros agrónomos, químicos, biólogos, médicos veterinarios, ingenieros comerciales, bioquímicos, nutricionistas  y profesiones afines al ámbito alimentario-nutricional. 

Los objetivos de SOCHITAL son:
•	Promover el acercamiento y la cooperación entre académicos,  profesionales y técnico cuyas actividades se desarrollen en  alguna de las ramas de la Ciencia y Tecnología de los Alimentos.
•	 Estudiar y estimular la Investigación de los problemas tecnológicos para impulsar el desarrollo de la industria de alimentos en Chile hasta un nivel acorde con sus verdaderas potencialidades.
•	 Plantear, discutir y publicar los resultados de las investigaciones realizadas.
•	 Promover la especialización y capacitación profesional en Ciencia y Tecnología  de  Alimentos  de  acuerdo  con los avances científicos y técnicos.
•	 Promover el reconocimiento del importante rol de la ciencia en lo que respecta a los alimentos y al  papel  básico de  los  tecnólogos  en el desarrollo industrial y en el mejoramiento del estándar alimentario de la población.
•	 Orientar a los poderes públicos y a la  industria de alimentos acerca de la política adecuada para la elaboración racional de los alimentos.

Name: ASEAN Chapter of ICAP Members (ACIM) | CA Pakistan
Description:
Purpose: "ASEAN Chapter of ICAP Members" is platform to engage professionals and drive institutional collaboration initiatives between Professional Bodies (ICAP) in Pakistan and ASEAN region. ASEAN Chapters works in collaboration with the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Pakistan (ICAP), Pakistan's ambassadors in ASEAN region and ASEAN Secretariate in Jakarta, Malaysia Pakistan Business Council (MPBC) in Kuala Lumpur. 

Aims and objectives: We believe that this platform is going to be perfect enabler to accelerate economic growth with and within ASEAN Economic Community; it will also enable to promote ASEAN External Relations with Pakistan in mutual areas of interest. 

Management Committee of "ASEAN Chapter of ICAP Members" maintains this page.  

1. Mr. Humayun Habib | Co-founder and Chairperson 
2. Mr. Syed Munir Hasan | Co-founder and Vice Chairperson
3. Ms. Tahmeen Ahmad | Co-founder and Management Committee Member
4. Adeel Maqbool Management Committee Member
5. Ms. Nik Nurulwahadiah Binti  Tuan Saifuzie | Co-founder and Secretary (Beverly Hills International Consultants Sdn Bhd) 
6. Ms. Tayyba Shoaib | Co-founder and Asst. Secretary (Beverly Hills International Consulta
7.  Ms. Amna Baloch | Co-founder and Honorary member | Foreign Secretary of Government of Pakistan
8.  Dato' Sri Mohamed Nazir Meraslam | Co-founder and Management Committee (honorary) member

About ICAP: ICAP was established on 1 July 1961 with the prime objective of regulating the profession of accounting in Pakistan.

Vision
The profession of Chartered Accountants in Pakistan should be the benchmark of professional excellence upholding the principles of integrity, transparency, and accountability’.

Mission
Our mission is to achieve excellence in professional competence, add value to businesses and the economy, safeguard public interest; ensure ethical practices, and good corporate governance while recognizing the needs of globalization.
Location: Kuala Lumpur , Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur

Name: Pólo de Sines - Ordem dos Engenheiros
Description:
A Ordem dos Engenheiros - Região Sul (OERS) é uma das cinco regiões da Ordem dos Engenheiros (OE), associação pública profissional, sem fins lucrativos, representativa daqueles que exercem a profissão de engenheiro.

A atividade da Região Sul tem por objetivo contribuir para a missão da OE, que passa por promover o progresso da engenharia, estimular os esforços dos seus Membros nos domínios científico, profissional e social e defender o cumprimento das regras de ética profissional.

A OERS conta com cerca de 30 mil membros, mais de metade do total nacional, e engloba o território dos distritos de Beja, Évora, Faro, Lisboa, Portalegre, Santarém e Setúbal. Tem sede na capital portuguesa, dispõe de cinco delegações distritais: Évora, Faro, Portalegre, Santarém e Beja bem como um Pólo em Sines.

A estrutura da OERS compreende, entre outros, o Conselho Diretivo, o qual é constituído pelo Presidente, o Vice-Presidente, o Tesoureiro, o Secretário e três Vogais.

Entre outros benefícios, os Membros usufruem de condições vantajosas para participação nas atividades técnico-profissionais, ações de formação, conferências, seminários, eventos culturais e outras iniciativas da OERS, organizadas pela Área de Formação, Comunicação e Cultura.

A OERS disponibiliza ainda aos seus Membros serviços tais como Secretaria, Quotização, Tesouraria, Biblioteca e Jurídico, bem como o Restaurante Panorâmico e o Auditório, no edifício da avenida António Augusto de Aguiar.

Name: NARST
Description: NARST is a global organization of professionals committed to the improvement of science teaching and learning through research. Since its inception in 1928, NARST has promoted research in science education and the communication of knowledge generated by the research. The ultimate goal of NARST is to help all learners achieve science literacy. NARST promotes this goal by: 1) encouraging and supporting the application of diverse research methods and theoretical perspectives from multiple disciplines to the investigation of teaching and learning in science; 2) communicating science education research findings to researchers, practitioners, and policy makers; and 3) cooperating with other educational and scientific societies to influence educational policies.

Name: AEC Women's Golf Club
Description:
The mission of the AEC Women’s Golf Club is to connect and empower women within the architecture, engineering, construction, and commercial real estate industries to expand their business network through playing golf.  

Whether you’re new to golf or have been playing for years, attending our events will create a unique experience for you to bond with more female leaders in our industry, make business deals on the golf course, and help you prep for all the business golf tournaments throughout the year. 

We have multiple events between March-October, which include monthly 9-Hole Meet Ups, Tee of Practice with a Pro at TopGolf, Golf Etiquette Classes, and Group Golf Lessons.  

This is currently a causal group, so no fees to join!  Please connect with the club founder, Katelyn Jeffcoat on LinkedIn for more information and to join the group!

Name: IT in the D
Description:
Metro Detroit's largest and longest running information technology monthly meetup and weekly podcast. 

Originally founded by Bob Waltenspiel in 2001 as a networking group, IT in the D has evolved into job fairs, blogs, speaking engagements, and a weekly podcast series. The group is managed today by Bob and Randy Walker. 

We meet the 3rd Thursday of every month at 5PM in and around Metro Detroit. Our events will never have a cover, speakers, or will sell you anything. Our intent is to only foster relationships within the information technology community. 

Check out http://www.meetup.com/itinthed to see where we are at.

You can find our podcast anywhere you listen to podcasts [tip: search for 'IT in the D' or itinthed].

Name: Israel Vehicle Importers Association
Description:
The Israel Vehicle Importers Association is a registered association, whose members are direct importers of passenger cars, light commercial vehicles, trucks and buses.

Association's targets:
• Preserving and promoting the interest of the Association's members and 
   representing them before the authorities in Israel; 
• Acting to expand the professional knowledge of the Association's members and 
   their employees;
• Promoting the automotive industry in Israel, service and vehicle maintenance.

It should be noted that Israel Vehicle Importers Association also acts to the benefit of the public by seeking to improve transport quality and driving safety, promoting environmental protection in the area and reducing air pollution and also acts for the community in various frameworks. 

The Association's activities include, among others: 
• Collecting, processing, producing and publishing statistics of vehicle 
   registrations in Israel; 
• Handling and representing Association's members on common issues before the 
   authorities in Israel (such as Ministry of Transportation, Ministry of Finance and 
   more);
• Representing Association's members before various committees of the Israeli 
   Parliament (the Knesset) in the process of legislating bills and regulations in the 
   automotive and transport sectors including in general public issues such as road 
   safety, car theft, taxation and more; 
• Representing Association's members before the local as well as the foreign 
   media and press; 
• Cooperation with parallel organizations in Europe, extracting relevant 
   information regarding the automotive and regulatory field in Western Europe, 
   in order to advance the field in Israel;
• Investing efforts into promoting road safety and advanced car technologies in 
   Israel.  


For a list of Association's members, their brands and more information, please visit www.car-importers.org.il.

Description: The mission of the YPG is to promote the goals of PSSA by encouraging the young members of PSSA to participate in PSSA projects and activities. Name: Movi Collective
Description:
The Movi Collective brings together exceptional professionals across generations, industries, and experiences who share a commitment to collective growth. 

Founded by veterans of traditional finance who saw the transformative power of combining diverse perspectives, Movi operates on a simple principle: we see more together than we ever could alone.

Our community includes founders building the next generation of companies, executives navigating complex challenges, and operators with deep expertise across disciplines. What unites them isn't similarity—it's values: reciprocity, curiosity, generosity, and an insatiable desire to learn.

Through intimate Nucleus Groups, Jeffersonian-style Salon Dinners, expert-led discussions, and member-driven guilds, we create structured spaces for depth, vulnerability, and genuine collaboration. This isn't just networking—it's a carefully curated ecosystem where professional growth and personal development happen simultaneously.

Name: UNICEM Hauts-de-France
Description:
L’UNICEM Hauts-de-France représente la filière des
industries extractives et productrice de matériaux :
 170 sites extractifs ;
 104 unités de production de béton prêt à l’emploi ;
 68 plateformes de recyclage.

𝐃𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐚𝐠𝐞́𝐞𝐬 𝐩𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐥'𝐞𝐧𝐯𝐢𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐞𝐭 𝐥𝐚 𝐑𝐒𝐄
84 sites adhérents sont engagés dans une démarche environnementale et/ou RSE animée par l’association UNICEM entreprises engagées.

𝐃𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐨𝐢𝐬 𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐮𝐱 𝐞𝐭 𝐧𝐨𝐧 𝐝𝐞́𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞𝐬
Les sites des entreprises de la filière, installés au coeur des territoires, sont principalement investis dans la production de granulats naturels et issus du recyclage, de béton prêt à l’emploi, de minéraux pour l’industrie, de pierres de construction et de roches ornementales. 2 300 salariés travaillent au sein de ces sites qui répondent aux besoins du BTP, lequel emploie 80 000  salariés.

Name: CPME81
Description:
La CPME (Confédération des Petites et Moyennes Entreprises) est la seule organisation patronale interprofessionnelle qui assure la représentation et la défense des TPE-PME, industries, BTP, artisans, commerçants, Start-up, prestataires de services.

Elle est présidée au niveau national par François Asselin et dans le département du Tarn par Philippe Barthès. La CPME est l’organisation patronale des petites et moyennes entreprises, tous secteurs confondus : industrie, services, commerce, artisanat et professions libérales.

Partenaire social, la Confédération les représente tant dans les négociations paritaires qu’auprès des pouvoirs publics dans le département du Tarn, la région Occitanie ainsi qu'en France et à l’international.

Dotée d’un bureau à Bruxelles, la CPME se mobilise pour se faire entendre de l’Union européenne. Au niveau international, elle coordonne une démarche d’export pour les entreprises.

Parce qu’une PME n’est pas une grande entreprise en modèle réduit, la CPME porte haut et fort les valeurs et les singularités de ces entreprises à taille humaine :

- Engagement de l’entrepreneur qui prend un risque considérable en investissant son propre patrimoine,
- Proximité de PME ancrées dans leur territoire,
- Solidarité d’entreprises où dirigeant et salariés sont en contact direct,
- Dynamisme d’entreprises de terrain, réactives et tournées vers l’avenir,
- Responsabilité d’entrepreneurs qui créent de l’emploi et du lien social.

Name: AITP Lone Star
Description:
AITP Lone Star is the premier technology networking and education hub in North Texas, uniting IT professionals, students, and industry leaders who are shaping the future of digital innovation. Based in the Dallas–Fort Worth area, we provide opportunities to learn, lead, and connect through engaging events, certifications, and community partnerships.

Our mission is to advance technology professionals by bridging the gap between education and real-world application. Members gain access to exclusive resources, mentorship, and senior-level networking that accelerate career growth and strengthen the regional tech ecosystem.

Whether you’re an established executive, an aspiring student, or a company looking to invest in the next generation of talent, AITP Lone Star is where your technology journey evolves.

AITP Lone Star – Mission:

Name: SEDAP - Sociedad Española de Directivos de Atención Primaria
Description:
Sociedad Española de Directivos de la Atención Primaria - SEDAP

La SEDAP es una sociedad científica que entre sus objetivos figura la promoción de la Atención Primaria de Salud como elemento nuclear de los sistemas sanitarios, para fortalecer el sistema sanitario y favorecer la salud de la ciudadanía.

En este sentido, la SEDAP quiere afianzar su compromiso expreso con los profesionales sanitarios, sus iniciativas y aquellas propuestas que, desde la innovación, contribuyen a fortalecer el sistema sanitario, la propia Atención Primaria y, en definitiva, la salud de la población.

En la Junta Directiva nos proponemos hacer nuestras aportaciones, para el desarrollo del sistema sanitario, con entusiasmo y con energía. Vamos a trabajar para que los directivos del sistema sanitario puedan participar más en su Sociedad, donde puedan compartir conocimientos y experiencias, donde tengan las mejores opciones de formación o donde se sientan representados en los distintos foros en los que participemos.

Nuestro objetivo es que SEDAP sea una Sociedad más activa cada día, ampliando las actividades y consolidado nuestro Congreso como foro central de encuentro. También nos proponemos seguir aprovechando las nuevas tecnologías para llegar mejor y favorecer la participación.

Our chapter currently consists of over 1,500 members who are passionate about health information management and the technologies that drive health information technology innovation. HIMSS NCA has a diverse membership primarily in Maryland, Washington DC, Virginia, with other members from across the country. Our members represent hospitals, managed care organizations, vendors, integrated delivery systems, academia, non-profit healthcare organizations, as well as government agencies such as the Military Health System, Department of Veterans Affairs, Department of Health & Human Services, and other federal agencies with a healthcare focus.

For more information about our Chapter, please email nca.info@himsschapter.org.

Marketing AI Pulse is where forward thinking marketers learn to turn AI into real impact, connect with marketing innovators, and grow intellectually and professionally.

It's where the "𝗔𝗜-𝗺𝗮𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗲𝗿𝘀" gather—marketers who refuse to accept the status quo, eager to adapt and innovate as AI reshapes the world of marketing.

Name: St.LouisCIO
Description:
St.LouisCIO is one of 40+ chapters in the Inspire Leadership Network, a national membership organization comprised exclusively of CIOs
from public and private businesses, government, education, healthcare, and nonprofit institutions.

St.LouisCIO exists to help CIOs thrive in today’s most
challenging C-suite executive role. The chapter regularly
convenes leading CIOs and fosters meaningful relationships
by hosting non-commercial, member-led programs—helping
CIOs gain leadership advantage.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Greater St. Louis-based CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. Since its inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

The GTM Leader Society curates a series of invitation-only events. These events range from large Signature Events (150+ attendees) to smaller, more targeted Executive Dinners (15-25 attendees).

This initiative, co-developed by AJ Gandhi - CGO of Marlin Equity Partners, Rajiv Parkih - CEO of Position², and Elay Cohen - CEO of SalesHood, aims to foster experience-sharing and collaboration among a group of truly awesome people in GTM.

Name: AITX Community

AITX Community is a community for AI Engineers, Entrepreneurs, and Explorers across Texas. At AITX Community, we're passionate about fostering a diverse and thriving AI community where like-minded individuals can connect with each other, share ideas, and inspire innovation.

Each month, we bring together a dynamic mix of people to explore the latest advancements in AI technology, real-world applications, and the future of this rapidly growing field. Whether you're an AI veteran or a curious newcomer, AITX offers something for everyone.

Our Meetup is hosted in Capital Factory's ACL room on the 16th floor. Elevator doors will unlock 15 minutes before the beginning of the meetup each month. When you arrive on 16 and exit the elevator room, turn immediately to your right and you'll see us inside the ACL room.

Name: ACAV
Description:
Com a aquisição da Chrysler do Brasil pela Volkswagen Werk AG alemã em janeiro de 1979 e o nascimento da Divisão Volkswagen Caminhões Ltda., a ligação associativa entre a Associação Brasileira de Revendedores Autorizados Chrysler, Assobrac, criada em 1974, e a sua rede de distribuidores, começou a enfraquecer naturalmente.

O lançamento dos primeiros caminhões com o logotipo Volkswagen no mercado brasileiro, em 1981, e a subsequente substituição dos antigos modelos fabricados pela Chrysler aumentou ainda mais a necessidade de se criar uma nova Associação que representasse a marca com identidade própria.

Recém-nascida, a nova companhia apresentou naquele mesmo ano os modelos VW 11.130 e VW 13.130 para múltiplas aplicações, nos mais diversos segmentos do mercado de transporte de cargas. Já naquele tempo os objetivos da Volkswagen Caminhões evidenciavam sua ousadia: alcançar, até 1985, participação de 25% do mercado total de veículos comerciais. O objetivo 'crescer proporcionalmente ao desenvolvimento do mercado de caminhões' se revelava estreito para visão tão mais ampla.

Nesse ritmo, apenas sete meses após o lançamento dos primeiros Volkswagen, as mudanças na linha de produtos começavam a chegar também ao relacionamento dentre concedente e distribuidores da rede. Era necessária uma entidade mais moderna e alinhada com a nova realidade que se delineava no mercado. Foi então que, seguindo esta premissa, a Assobrac deu lugar à Associação Brasileira dos Concessionários Truck & Bus, ACAV, estabelecida em 11 de junho de 1981 por um grupo precursor constituído por quarenta distribuidores remanescentes da antiga Associação de bandeira Chrysler.

A2PEPS offre également à ses adhérents une représentativité et un lien privilégié auprès des acteurs institutionnels, des collectivités publiques et des structures économiques locales.

Adhérer au réseau A2PEPS, c'est bénéficier d'un appui logistique, commercial, économique et institutionnel dynamique au sein du Premier Bassin d'Emploi des Pyrénées Orientales !

Sa vocation est de favoriser l’exercice de la profession des auteurs d’animation française, de défendre leurs droits et de les représenter auprès des instances publiques.

Name: The Traffic Club of Philadelphia
Description:
Purpose: 

To quote from the Club's Constitution "The purpose of the Club shall be to promote the interests of the transportation industry; to conduct under its auspices educational programs in the field of transportation; and to promote the transportation industry for the benefit of the national welfare."

Membership: 

The Club membership reflects the richness and diversity of the transportation and logistics fields. Membership is comprised of representatives from manufacturing, railroads, motor carriers, freight forwarders, steamship lines, warehouses, airlines, governmental agencies, and others.

Benefits: 

The Traffic Club of Philadelphia helps its members connect locally and globally. Club activities, communications, and privileges are designed to afford members excellent opportunities for professional and personal development.
•Educational Programs: The Club conducts highly informative programs during the course of the year that are highlighted by the participation of outstanding guest speakers.
•Academic Scholarships: The Club administers a number of academic scholarships that are available on a competitive basis to Club members, their dependents, and those pursuing a career in transportation.
•Placement Service: The Club seeks to maintain an active placement service, advising qualified applicants of job opportunities available in the transportation field.
•Community Service: In support of the local community, the Club participates in various public service events and fund-raisers.
•Social Outings: Golf, sporting events, and other social outings are organized for Club members throughout the year.
•Networking: Club members can connect with other members through the LinkedIn group and the new members-only online roster.

Governance: 
The affairs of the Club are guided by a Constitution, Bylaws, and a Board of Governors elected by the membership. Efforts are made to ensure that this governing body has diverse representation from all facets of the local freight

Description:
Créé en 1951, le seila, seule organisation professionnelle déclarée représentative de l'emballage industriel/caisserie et de la logistique associée, compte en 2024, près de 130 entreprises adhérentes de toutes tailles basées en France, Belgique, Italie, Luxembourg, aux Pays Bas, et représente plus de 7000 emplois.

Ces 3 catégories d'adhérents "emballeurs agréés", "caissiers affiliés" et "correspondants" sont complémentaires et forment une chaîne solidaire et responsable. Ils offrent à leurs clients un large éventail de solutions d'emballages sur mesure, avec le matériau bois notamment, de logistique et de services associés.

Le seila s'emploie à qualifier et à promouvoir leur savoir-faire. Il veille par ailleurs, à leurs intérêts en les représentant auprès d'organismes et institutions nationales et internationales.

Le seila est représenté dans plusieurs organismes : France Bois Forêt (FBF), Fédération Nationale du Bois (FNB), Fédération Européenne des Fabricants de Palettes et Emballages Bois (FEFPEB), commission professionnelle palettes et emballages bois de l'Institut technologique du FCBA. Il fait également partie de l'Emballage Bois, pour porter des actions de communication, constitué des 2 organisations professionnelles du secteur de l'emballage bois en France : seila et commission Palettes FNB/SYPAL et commission Emballage Léger FNB/SIEL.

Name: Health and Wellness Community
Description:
Launched by the Association of Retail and Consumer Professionals, headquartered in Chicago, IL, the ARC Health & Wellness Community (formerly the RDBA) focuses on educating, connecting, and elevating health and wellness professionals to maximize their influence and interactions with the consumer. Community members include retail and registered dietitians, nutritionists, health coaches, and more whose knowledge of retail food and consumable products help consumers live healthier lives.

With both corporate and individual membership options, participating in a way that suits your needs has never been easier.

Learn more about membership opportunities: https://retailhealth.global/

Health and wellness professionals are experts when it comes to guiding consumers, answering their questions, and advising on products and solutions. But how do those products get to retail shelves? Understanding how a retailer operates and basic business acumen are crucial the work of dietitians, nutritionists, health coaches, and more. The Health & Wellness Community training can help fill in those gaps. Learn more about training: https://retailhealth.global/training/



The ARC Health & Wellness Community is honored to partner with a variety of incredible sponsors who believe in empowering and educating professionals across various disciplines with the tools needed to make an impact on the health and well-being of individuals and communities. This section of our website acts as a centralized hub for industry professionals: https://retailhealth.global/resources-from-sponsors/

Name: Association of Data Protection Officers, Ireland
Description:
The Association is a membership organisation for those who are actively working as Data Protection Officers in their respective organisations.

The Association offers Data Protection Officers an opportunity to share ideas, voice concerns, seek clarity on new legislation, and offer their own insights on the demands and challenges of the job. Membership is open to anyone who fills a data management role within their organisation, whether formally or informally. The objective of the Association is to provide clarity on issues, raise awareness of the legislation and to offer its members a forum where these topics can be discussed.

At a time when we are seeing more and more data-related issues arising in the media, this Association is both topical and relevant. It addresses the requirements of anyone who is striving to define a data management strategy, establishing practical processes and structures for their organisation to achieve and maintain compliance with the Irish DP legislation.

In parallel, we are facing into a period of considerable change in this area – new Regulations are being proposed which will mean significant challenges for any organisation which manages personal data as part of its sales, marketing or deployment strategy.

Senior Data Protection Officers from a broad range of Irish public-sector and commercial organisations have kindly agreed to form the inaugural Steering Committee of the Association, and they will be introduced to the press and to attendees at this year's Data Protection Conference.

Name: The Hong Kong Institute of Architects
Description:
Objects of The Institute
The two main objects of the Institute are
i) to promote the general advancement of architecture and to promote and facilitate the acquisition of the knowledge of the various arts and sciences connected therewith;
ii) to raise the standard of architecture in Hong Kong and the standard of professional architectural services offered by members of the Institute.

Professional Qualification
In Hong Kong, registration of architects are governed by the Architects Registration Board (ARB) under the Architects Registration Ordinance (Chapter 408). Every year, graduates with recognized architectural education qualification and appropriate practical experience, aspiring to become a Registered Architect, can sit the Professional Assessment jointly held by the Institute and ARB. Successful candidates will be admitted as a Member of the Institute which, in accordance with the Architects Registration Ordinance, will be readily accepted as a Registered Architect by ARB. Alternatively for overseas professional architects with adequate relevant local experience, they can apply for HKIA membership and hence register as a Registered Architect in Hong Kong, through a Professional Induction Workshop followed with an interview held jointly by the Institute and ARB.

Accreditation of Architectural Education
The Institute works closely with the ARB to accredit the architectural courses offered by local universities and tertiary institutions and offers advice on the aspects of professional practice and practical experience in architecture.

Apart from recognition in Hong Kong, architectural programmes accredited by HKIA/ARB are also recognised by Mainland as well as a number of overseas countries such as, Australia and New Zealand under Mutual Recognition agreement with respective accrediting authority.

Name: FNEDT - Fédération Nationale Entrepreneurs des Territoires
Description:
La Fédération Nationale Entrepreneurs Des Territoires (FNEDT) est l'organisation représentative des entreprises des travaux agricoles, ruraux et forestiers. Créée en 1922, la Fédération rassemble un réseau de 62 syndicats départementaux et interdépartementaux, et 12 unions régionales. Elle est présidée par Philippe Largeau, entrepreneur de travaux agricoles dans la Vienne.
Acteurs clés dans les territoires, les 22 500 entreprises de travaux emploient 160 000 actifs (+60 % en 10 ans)  permanents et occasionnels pour un chiffre d’affaires de 7 milliards d’euros.
Prestataires de services, les entrepreneurs de travaux réalisent des chantiers pour le compte des agriculteurs (70 %), éleveurs (85 %), propriétaires et exploitants forestiers (70 % des travaux de sylviculture-reboisement, 80 % des travaux d’exploitation), industriels de la première transformation (90 % de la récolte betteravière), collectivités locales et établissements publics gestionnaires d’espaces naturels ou de réseaux.

Name: ELGI European Lubricating Grease Institute
Description:
Welcome to ELGI
The ELGI was established in May 1989 and is an independent, self-governing institute, financed solely by members. It is one of a group of scientific and technical institutes active in the field of tribology dealing with lubricating greases and associated products. The institute is involved in all aspects of this product group, particularly those concerning the technical, economic, ecological and legislative positions in Europe. A number of working groups have been created to deal with important issues in the European grease market.

Current topics include Railway Lubricants, Bio-based Greases, Fundamental Research, Food Industry Lubrication, Test Methods, Aerospace Greases, Education & Training and Grease & the Environment, Grease Shelf Life, REACH, Grease Particle Evaluation. Other groups are encouraged and the ELGI facilities are available for such activities.

Name: Global Trade Integration: Connecting Poor Communities
Description:
Global Trade Integration: Connecting Poor Communities is a socailly-driven research and policy center. We are dedicated to empowering marginalized communities through global trade. We are committed to bridging the gap between disadvantaged populations and the world market, fostering economic growth, and creating sustainable livelihoods.

Our mission is to disseminate knowledge, conduct research, recommend policies, develop strategies, and implement programs that enable poor communities to actively participate in international trade. We work closely with mission-aligned stakeholders such as governments, international organizations, universities, NGOs, media, and socially responsible businesses to build capacity, improve market access, enhance external competitiveness, sustain economic growth, create decent jobs, and alleviate poverty.

Our approach is grounded in the belief that inclusive global trade can be a powerful tool for poverty alleviation, bridging the digital divide, and building peace. By leveraging our expertise and resources, we strive to create a more equitable and interconnected world where everyone has the opportunity to live a decent life.

Join our Journey!

Name: Coalition of Oregon School Administrators
Description:
About COSA
Mission: We develop and support educational leaders to ensure student success.

The Coalition of Oregon School Administrators (COSA) serves and represents more than 2,400 school administrators, managers and executives. COSA was founded in 1974 to give Oregon's education leaders a united voice in helping to shape public policy, advocate for schools and speak on behalf of students. COSA's perspective has earned the respect of educators, the Legislature, the Department of Education and other statewide agencies. COSA consistently puts the interests of schools and students ahead of self-interest.

In addition to advocacy, COSA supports and develops educational leaders with unmatched professional development opportunities—including statewide conferences, regional seminars and workshops, and much more -- and a variety of exclusive member services. Areas of focus include school finance and legislative services.

Name: IT in the D
Description:
Metro Detroit's largest and longest running information technology monthly meetup and weekly podcast. 

Originally founded by Bob Waltenspiel in 2001 as a networking group, IT in the D has evolved into job fairs, blogs, speaking engagements, and a weekly podcast series. The group is managed today by Bob and Randy Walker. 

We meet the 3rd Thursday of every month at 5PM in and around Metro Detroit. Our events will never have a cover, speakers, or will sell you anything. Our intent is to only foster relationships within the information technology community. 

Check out http://www.meetup.com/itinthed to see where we are at.

You can find our podcast anywhere you listen to podcasts [tip: search for 'IT in the D' or itinthed].

Name: Federación Empresarial Española de Seguridad
Description:
La Federación Empresarial Española de Seguridad fue constituida en abril de 1.991 por diversas asociaciones provinciales y regionales, cuando la primera Ley de Seguridad Privada empezaba a poner en orden un sector complementario y subordinado a la seguridad pública, necesitado de protección y seguridad jurídica.

Tras su fundación la vocación y razón de ser de FES se ha centrado en representar y defender a las Empresas de Seguridad, fomentar su desarrollo y adecuación a las necesidades de los clientes, perseguir el intrusismo y lo fundamental, prestar a sus asociados soluciones a sus realidades empresariales.

A lo largo de estos treinta y dos años que han transcurrido desde su creación, FES ha ido aumentando su representación con participación en todas las actividades de seguridad privada y presencia en todas las Comunidades Autónomas.

FES, consciente de la importancia de la comunicación en la nueva sociedad digital, sigue apostando por trasladar a sus asociados aquella información que pueda servir de fuente de conocimiento y utilidad en el desarrollo de las actividades empresariales, a través de sus redes propias y ajenas.

En estos momentos, la nueva directiva de FES quiere dar un paso importante, modernizando su estructura de funcionamiento, actualizando los procedimientos de comunicación y aumentando los servicios que presta a nivel interno.

FES quiere seguir liderando el sector creciendo contigo.

Name: Society for Social Medicine & Population Health
Description:
The Society for Social Medicine and Population Health is devoted to the study of health in its widest sense. It recognises the broad determinants of health – income and poverty, education, environmental factors such as housing and transport – as well as health care and genetic influences. The Society aims to promote the development of scientific knowledge in social medicine. This covers a range of subjects, including epidemiology, the medical and health needs of society, the provision and organisation of health services and the prevention of disease.

The nature of social medicine requires a multi-disciplinary approach to the development of scientific knowledge. The disciplines involved include medicine, epidemiology, statistics, economics, social science and many others. Membership of the Society is open to anyone whose work is consistent with the Society’s objective.

To achieve its objective, the Society holds an annual scientific meeting and one or two other scientific meetings each year which focus on particular themes. The formats of the meetings allow for presentations by researchers and leading experts in their fields, reports of new research findings, and opportunities for developing and maintaining networks and friendships. The Society also maintains a website and a blog, distributes a newsletter and other relevant material to its members, and responds to consultation documents. The Society is affiliated with the European Public Health Association and is a member of the International Epidemiological Association’s European Epidemiology Federation.

The Society was founded in 1956.

Name: Africa Nutrition Society
Description:
Established in 2008, the African Nutrition Society (ANS) is a registered scientific professional body, a learned society formed by nutritional scientists, food scientists and other health professionals working in, and with an interest in the nutrition agenda for Africa. ANS was established as an umbrella organization among others, to develop and promote the nutrition profession in Africa and to oversee the Africa nutritional Epidemiology conferences (ANEC) which have been running since 2002.

As a professional learned society, ANS seeks first and foremost to promote the ideals of food and nutritional sciences as a subject allied to medicine and central to sound health policies and the attainment of optimum population health. The interests of individual members in playing their roles in promoting the nutritional well being of the communities they serve are therefore paramount. The standards of scientific training, attainment, research capability and sound professional practice are essential ingredients of any professional body of repute and ANS seeks to promote and ensure that its members meet the highest standards of professional practice. Although established in Africa, membership of ANS is worldwide and open to nutritionists and other professionals with a genuine interest in nutrition and how it impacts on human and economic development in Africa.

Name: The Virginia Bar Association
Description:
The Virginia Bar Association is the independent voice of the Virginia lawyer, advancing the highest ideals of the profession through advocacy and volunteer service. The VBA is a voluntary membership organization created and supported by Virginia attorneys.

Key Approaches
•	Advocacy: Improve the law by promoting legislative changes
•	Professionalism: Expand attorney proficiency through continuing education
•	Service: Make our communities better and stronger through member contributions and through increasing access to justice
•	Collegiality: Provide opportunities for attorneys to engage with like-minded lawyers through our Sections and Divisions and events

Sections and Divisions
The VBA encourages members to get involved in our sections and divisions that inform their practice, help them better serve their clients and fulfill their personal and professional needs.
•	19 sections
•	Joint ADR Committee of the VBA and VSB
•	Young Lawyers Division
•	Law Practice Management Division

Conferences and Meetings
VBA events bring together colleagues across Virginia for learning and socializing. Our members also build upon their professional networks through attendance at meetings and conferences, such as:

•	Section-specific educational conferences
•	Legislative update seminars

Name: Fédération Nationale des Éditeurs de Films
Description:
La Fédération Nationale des Editeurs de Films (FNEF) est l’unique syndicat professionnel reconnu représentatif du secteur de l’édition-distribution de film en France. Composée d’entreprises de toutes tailles, diffusant tous types de cinématographies sur notre territoire (française, étrangère, découverte, art et essai, patrimoine, animation, etc.. ), elle défend et promeut l’intérêt général de la profession. 

Elle est l’interlocuteur privilégié des pouvoirs publics concernant l’ensemble des dossiers relatifs à l’édition-distribution des films de cinéma, et constitue le partenaire de référence pour les acteurs du marché (chaînes de télévision, opérateurs VàD, représentants des salles de cinéma, de la production cinématographique, des industries techniques, etc.) et les acteurs institutionnels (Centre National du Cinéma et de l’Image Animée, ministères, ARCOM, etc.). Elle assure également le dialogue social avec les représentants des salariés de la branche de la distribution et, à ce titre, négocie l’ensemble des accords sociaux.

Elle représente les éditeurs-distributeurs de films dans le cadre de différents festivals et évènements professionnels. Elle organise notamment chaque année à Deauville la Journée des Editeurs de Films, en collaboration avec la Fédération Nationale des Cinémas Français. Evénement professionnel incontournable, cette journée permet aux distributeurs de venir présenter aux professionnels du cinéma les premières images des films de l’année à venir, souvent en présence des équipes de films concernées.

La FNEF assure enfin le secrétariat général du Bureau de Liaison des Industries Cinématographiques (BLIC) qui unit plusieurs organisations professionnelles représentant la production, l’édition de films, les salles de cinéma, l’édition video, l’édition numérique et les industries techniques. A ce titre, la FNEF se situe à l’intersection des enjeux de la filière cinématographique.

Description:

Créé en 1990 sur la zone industrielle sud du Mans, le club accueille également les entreprises de la zone de la Cartoucherie, Polygone, Arnage, Allonnes et Spay.

Notre vocation :
Créer du lien social à travers nos rencontres, informer les dirigeant.es dans le but de favoriser le développement des entreprises sur plusieurs axes - notamment la RSE - et être le relai de communication avec les institutions locales.

Nous organisons mensuellement des soirées visites d'entreprise, thématiques et convivialité pour favoriser les bonnes relations et le dialogue entre nos adhérents.

L'Interclub est composé de 8 autres clubs territoriaux : Hunaudières, Le Mans Ouest Entreprises, Central'Mans, Lucie (Saint-Pavace et Coulaines), Champagné, Sargé, B.R.E.F. et Club Business Sarthe.

At a time when 95% of the hydrogen produced worldwide comes from steam methane reforming, earth2 aims to create a common forum, operating at a European level, to drive forward the natural hydrogen and underground hydrogen storage to the development of a future hydrogen economy and showcasing how geological knowledge can facilitate this revolutionary new low-carbon energy vector.

Join us!

Name: Asociación de Mujeres en los Asuntos Públicos de México (AMAAPP)
Description:
La AMAAPP surge de la iniciativa Mujeres en los Asuntos Públicos de México, esfuerzo iniciado en 2022 y que ha venido congregando hasta el momento a más de 200 destacadas ejecutivas dedicadas a los Asuntos Públicos de las compañías e industrias más relevantes de México. 

La AMAAPP entiende a los Asuntos Públicos como la función responsable de tender puentes entre las organizaciones y el gobierno. Es una actividad transparente, ética y de alto valor que permite acercar a las autoridades y reguladores información oportuna, contrastar puntos de vista y compartir mejores prácticas para que la toma de decisiones en el ámbito público-privado considere todos los intereses que nos permitan alcanzar el bienestar de los mayores sectores de la sociedad.

Finalmente, la AMAAPP es fundada en 2024, como una organización sin fines de lucro que tiene entre sus objetivos principales, seguir profesionalizando la disciplina de los Asuntos Públicos en el país, generar conocimiento sobre la función y robustecer la interlocución con actores clave y contribuir a la reducción de la brecha de género que persiste en la actividad.

Name: BRIA - Brazil Ireland Association
Description:
We are excited to introduce an initiative aimed at providing support and assistance to Brazilian professionals living and working in Ireland. Our goal is to build a strong, united community by offering a support network, resources, and opportunities for professional development.

At BRIA, we understand the challenges Brazilian professionals face in job searching, career progression, and integration into the Irish job market. That’s why we offer a variety of services and programs tailored to the specific needs of our community:

 Professional guidance and support: We provide personalized guidance, workshops, and seminars to help Brazilian professionals enhance their skills, prepare their résumés, and stand out in interviews.

 Networking and job opportunities: We organize networking events and partnerships with Irish companies and organizations, creating opportunities for professionals to establish contacts and explore career possibilities.

 Training programs: We develop specific programs focused on the critical skills demanded by the Irish job market, offering courses and workshops to help Brazilian professionals excel in their fields.

 Legal and immigration support: We offer legal guidance and support in employment-related matters, labor rights, and immigration, ensuring that our members understand the legal processes involved.

 Advocacy and representation: We act as representatives of Brazilian professionals, working towards improvements in immigration, employment, and integration policies, while amplifying the voice of our community.

BRIA is an inclusive and welcoming community, dedicated to promoting the success and fulfillment of Brazilian professionals in Ireland.

Name: Projet Pôles Intégrés de Croissance - PIC Madagascar
Description:
Le Projet de Transformation Economique pour une Croissance Inclusive ou PIC 3 est une des actions du Gouvernement Malagasy pour mettre en œuvre le Programme Général de l’Etat et le « Plan Emergence Madagascar » (PEM), pluri-bailleur, financé principalement par la Banque Mondiale, mais gérant également le financement des Fonds OPEP pour le développement international (OFID), durant ces deux phases du projet.  

Il a pour objectif de soutenir la croissance économique et la dynamisation de zones à fort potentiel de croissance, en levant les contraintes aux investissements, stimulant le secteur privé et en développant des secteurs économiques porteurs tels que l'Agribusiness, le Tourisme et le Digital.

Name: The Institution of Engineers (India) [IEI]
Description: The Institution of Engineers (India) [IEI] is the largest multi-disciplinary professional body of engineers, established in 1920 with its Headquarters located in Kolkata and incorporated under Royal Charter on 9th September, 1935 by the then His Majesty of King George V. The Royal Charter endowed the Institution with the responsibility to promote the general advancement of engineering amongst its members and persons attached to the Institution. After Independence, the Institution is a “Body Corporate” protected under Article 372 of the Constitution of India. The Institution of Engineers (India) is administered by a National Council with the President as its Head. Recognized as a Scientific and Industrial Research Organization by Ministry of Science and Technology Govt. of India

Name: Houston Business Women
Description:
Houston Business Women is a vibrant community built for women to connect, collaborate, and grow their businesses while inspiring the next generation of leaders.

We reach thousands of women across the city and beyond. We’re here to inspire women to dream bigger, build stronger, and succeed together. Your network is your net worth—and at HBW, you’ll find both. Step into a community where women lift each other higher. 

In 2026 we are hosting flagship events open to the public each designed to inspire growth build community and create meaningful connections. These events are thoughtfully curated to bring together ambitious women throughout the year.

• Galentine’s Girls Night Out (February)

Grab your girls and get ready for a fantastic night! We’re bringing the fun, the laughter, and the perfect vibe for a Galentine’s celebration you won’t want to miss. Enjoy floating hors d’oeuvres, drinks, and all-around good vibes as we gather to celebrate friendship and fun. 

• The Summit (September)

Our premiere event of the year this evening summit, brings together inspiring speakers, amazing woman owned, and operated vendors, a fashion show, and a chance for Houston’s power women to connect and grow. 

Plus: Member-only Pop Ups

These include casual, meet ups, networking mixers, and community driven experience is designed to help. Keep the connections and the inspiration going all year around. Name: CapitalCIO
Description:
CapitalCIO is one of 30 chapters in the Inspire Leadership Network, a national membership organization comprised exclusively of CIOs
from public and private businesses, government, education, healthcare, and nonprofit institutions.

CapitalCIO exists to help CIOs thrive in today’s most
challenging C-suite executive role. The chapter regularly
convenes leading CIOs and fosters meaningful relationships
by hosting non-commercial, member-led programs—helping
CIOs gain leadership advantage.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Capital Area-based CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. Since inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

4 - Des relations commerciales équitables

Ons team kijkt ieder vanuit een eigen expertise naar jouw uitdaging. Zo creëren we altijd een oplossing die past bij jouw situatie. We denken graag met je mee en zoeken samen naar wat werkt voor jouw organisatie. Al 25 jaar ondersteunen wij universiteiten, hogescholen, mbo's, veiligheidsregio’s, gemeenten en de rijksoverheid bij hun veranderingsopgaven. Onze werkwijze is integer, wij staan voor kwaliteit en leveren maatwerk.
