Name: Ilustre Colegio de Abogados de Lima
Description:
El Ilustre Colegio de Abogados de Lima, alienta una tradición de más de doscientos diecinueve años. Nacido en las postrimerías de la época colonial, se ha mantenido durante todo el periodo republicano incrementando su prestigio y su influencia.

El Colegio desde su fundación tuvo como fines la vigilancia del ejercicio profesional de acuerdo a las normas éticas; la enseñanza práctica a los estudiantes y a los examinados por la Real Audiencia durante dos años, a cargo del director de Conferencias, "uno de los matriculados mas expertos en legislación"; además, a la organización de disertaciones y la publicación de escritos sobre cuestiones jurídicas y la ayuda a sus miembros y a los factores de éstos en caso de necesidad, sufragando los gastos de sepelio o socorriendo a viudas y huérfanos con erogaciones de los congregados.

El Sello del Colegio, como lo anota uno de sus historiadores, Don Anibal Galvez, existió desde antes de 1818 con la inscripción "ORABUNT CAUSAS MELIUS", que significa "Defenderan la Causa Mejor" y que es el lema de la Institución. La insignia -una estrella de siete ángulos con una corona cívica en el centro, que lleva igual leyenda- fue aprobado por Decreto Supremo del Presidente Don José Luis de Orbegozo y refrendado por su Ministro Doctor José María Galdeano en 1834.

Name: Women Investing for a Sustainable Economy (WISE)
Description:
Please visit www.wisecommunity.org to learn more. 

About Us:

WISE was founded in 2012 in New York City by Eva Zlotnicka, Lily Trager, and Lori Choi. Early on, all meetings were hosted in members’ living rooms and relationships were cultivated over a mutual interest in the growing field of sustainable and impact investing, laughs and deep conversation. Members are asked to bring their whole selves to the community – not solely their professional organization or affiliation – and to connect with other members beyond the regular meetings.  

Today, WISE has 9 chapters globally – Boston, Los Angeles, New York City, Philadelphia, San Francisco, Washington DC, London, Toronto, and a Virtual chapter.

Each chapter is run by committed Chapter Leaders with community members helping to host and organize regular gatherings in apartments, homes, offices and public spaces. Events are frequently planned around specific interests and themes or to feature external speakers, such as mentors and industry leaders.

Name: AMBPE
Description:
L’Association Marocaine de Producteurs de Beton Prêt à l’Emploi (AMBPE)  est une association professionnelle régie par les dispositions du Dahir n° 1-58-376 du 3 Joumada I 1378 (15 novembre 1958), tel que modifié et complété et le Règlement intérieur de l’Association et réunissant les producteurs du BPE au Maroc.

L’Association a pour objet, entre autres de : 
1. Rassembler les producteurs de BPE et coordonner leurs efforts pour la réalisation des objectifs et actions dans l’intérêt général du secteur et de l’économie nationale
2. Favoriser les études de toute question professionnelle intéressant l’industrie du BPE
3. Accorder l’aide et l’assistance aux laboratoires, aux centres techniques, aux universités et grandes écoles, ainsi qu’à toutes autres institutions dont les activités concourent au développement du secteur du B.P.E, par une avancée dans les domaines de la recherche scientifique, de l’innovation, de la qualité, de la sécurité, de la protection de l’environnement et du développement durable
4. Aider à la création et au développement de toutes œuvres sociales permettant la valorisation des actions citoyennes
5. Procéder à toute recherche et étude utiles en vue d’accroitre l’efficacité du secteur et d’améliorer les conditions d’exercice de la profession
6. Et en général, étudier et proposer toutes mesures ou projets de réformes susceptibles de favoriser les activités du secteur.

Name: Sustainability By Sweden
Description:
Sustainability, green transition, and innovation are the three major pillars of collaboration between India and Sweden. Both countries have been co-operating in the areas of energy, environment, and urban development under existing MoUs for promotion of research and development and introduction of sustainable technologies. 

Team Sweden (Embassy of Sweden, Consulate General of Sweden, and Business Sweden) along with Swedish Energy Agency and Confederation of Indian Industry (CII) has established the Sustainability by Sweden ecosystem in India to promote joint research, innovation, co-creation and expertise exchange. 

India-Sweden Innovations Accelerator (ISIA) is one of the important engines of collaboration actively working for past 10 years towards promoting green collaborations between the two countries. To showcase innovative Swedish cleantech companies in an Indian smart city context, a dedicated showroom has been set-up at Business Sweden’s office in New Delhi. 

Adding another feather to the cap, Team Sweden has conceptualized the platform – India Sweden Green Transition Partnership (ISGTP). This partnership will be a commitment towards joint efforts and responsibilities for building a climate-neutral future.

To replicate Sweden’s Triple Helix Model, leading Indian conglomerates - Mahindra, Aditya Birla, BYPL, Tata Power DDL are onboarded as industry partner along with India’s top technology institutes – IIT- Delhi, IIT-Bombay, and IIT-Madras as academic and research partners.

Name: RealFM e.V.
Description: Wir sind der Berufsverband für Facility und Real Estate Manager. Im Mittelpunkt unserer Aktivitäten stehen die Verknüpfung der Aufgaben von Real Estate und Facility Management sowie die Gestaltung der Schnittstellen zwischen allen an diesen Prozessen Beteiligten. Als europäisch ausgerichtete Vereinigung sind wir globales und regionales Netzwerk sowie Impulsgeber für eine bildungspolitische und berufsständische Entwicklung. Dies wiederum eröffnet uns zahlreiche Möglichkeiten, die Wahrnehmung eines, wie wir finden, sehr vielschichtigen Berufsbildes in der Öffentlichkeit zu verstärken. Berufsverband – RealFM e.V. ist der einzige Berufsverband für Facility und Real Estate Manager. Hier sind unsere individuellen, berufsständischen Interessen wirksam präsentiert und vertreten. Netzwerk – RealFM e.V ist das größte regionale und europäische Netzwerk für Facility und Real Estate Manager. Mitgestaltung - RealFM e.V. bietet seinen Mitgliedern in Arbeitskreisen, Regionalkreisen und Branchenzirkeln Möglichkeiten zur aktiven Mitgestaltung der Branche und zur persönlichen Entwicklung. Produkte – RealFM e.V. entwickelt und veröffentlicht richtungsweisende Produkte und Werkzeuge zur Unterstützung der Mitglieder und der Branche. Weiterbildung - RealFM e.V. ist führend in der akademischen und berufspraktischen Ausbildung, der praxisorientierten Weiterbildung und der qualitätsorientierten Zertifizierung. Öffentlichkeitsarbeit - RealFM e.V. informiert Mitglieder, Interessenten und Medien mit Newslettern und Brancheninformationen.

Name: Club Africain des Entrepreneurs
Description:
Le Club Africain des Entrepreneurs est une organisation panafricaine rassemblant des femmes et des hommes investis dans l’aventure entrepreneuriale et fédérés par un engagement commun en faveur d’un développement durable et responsable en Afrique. Impulsé par la famille de fonds d’impact Investisseurs & Partenaires (I&P), sa mission consiste à mener des actions de plaidoyer en vue de soutenir la cause entrepreneuriale et de développer les opportunités économiques à l’intérieur mais également à l’extérieur de son réseau de membres. 

Crée en 2016, Le Club Africain des Entrepreneurs est une association basée en Côte d’Ivoire et est constitué de plus de 150 PME présentes dans vingt-et-un pays africain (Bénin, Madagascar, Burkina-Faso, Mali, Cameroun, Mauritanie, Comores, Niger, Côte d’Ivoire, Nigeria, Gabon, Sénégal, Ghana, Ouganda, Kenya, Afrique du Sud, Guinée, Namibie, RDC, Tchad, Togo). L’association a été créée afin de contribuer à l’émergence d’une classe entrepreneuriale panafricaine de qualité.

Name: CxO Security Forum
Description:
The CxO Security Forum Community exists to rebalance the executive event dynamic, shifting control from Solution Providers to practitioners. Practitioner executives from end-user organizations own and drive the conversation and interaction. 

CxO Security Forum builds community among c-level executives via highly interactive and engaging gatherings and an online portal. Our goal is to fuel education, mentoring and networking for senior executives with responsibility for cybersecurity, risk management, compliance and the AI that supports those functions. 

Fo·rum /ˈfôrəm/  (n).a place, meeting, or medium where ideas and views on a particular issue can be exchanged.

Premise: The current way in which enterprise solutions (especially cybersecurity) are marketed/sold and the way in which they are evaluated/bought is materially broken. 

A New Way Forward: Bring together a community of executives across fraud mitigation, risk management and cyber for networking, mentorship and education. Fit Solution Providers in regional gatherings, highly engaging and tightly moderated discussions where everyone is both a teacher and a student.

Name: Diverse Coat Society
Description:
The Diverse Coat Society (DCS) was founded July 2, 2022, in Greenville, MS the Heart of the Mississippi Delta.

Mission
The DCS is a society of diverse educators (e.g., primary, middle, secondary, and higher education) and healthcare professionals (e.g., physicians, nurse practitioners, nurses, respiratory therapists, medical laboratory technicians, social workers, and other allied healthcare professionals) coming together to provide conversations, activities, and support for interprofessional goals leading to educational equity, health equity, and general public safety. 

Vision
Everyone will have access to equitable education and healthcare services with improved outcomes.  
See the DCS Model and Factions. 

Purpose
Intersectionality and Black Coat Conversations (BCC) are at the core of the group’s purpose. The goal of the society is to spread our purpose through visibility and professional association. The logo is symbolic of our interprofessional roles as we wear different coats in society that will intersect to reach educational equity and health equity. 

In this professional association, you have the option to wear whatever color coat you want.  Historically, the color is white. The foundational color of this group is black. However, we focus on all shades of the skin which is a representation of all.  

Join the Diverse Coat Society today by visiting our website. https://diversecoatsociety.com.  See the available paraphernalia for purchase to support our mission, vision, and goals. 

#diversecoatsociety #DCS #blackcoatconversations #BCC #educationalequity #healthequity

Realiseer jouw doelen en krijg het leven dat jij wilt. Realiseer jouw doelen en krijg het leven dat jij wilt.

Name: The Just Society
Description:
The JUST Society consists of like-minded Black men in biotech leadership who aspire to foster a spirit of innovation, collaboration and excellence in the life science industry. We build on the legacy of Ernest Everett Just, one of the most renowned Black scientists in history, who broke through countless barriers faced by Black men in science in the early 1900s. According to a recent study by Bio, Black people represent only 6% of the workforce and only 3% of leadership in biotech and pharma. We want to ensure Black men are no longer an anomaly on biopharma executive teams, corporate boards, private equity, venture capital teams and service providers.
THE JUST Society aims to ensure that access to capital is readily available to fund or invest in Black biotech enterprises comprising of critical therapies, technologies and services.

Name: FIAT-IFTA – The World Organization of Funeral Operatives
Description:
FIAT- IFTA is a non-profit Federation of national and international associations, companies and individuals representing funeral, thanatopraxy, crematory and/or cemetery services, funeral home businesses, funeral service companies, funeral directors and embalmers.

FIAT- IFTA provides advocacy, education, information, products, programs and services to help Members to enhance the quality of service to bereaved families in all countries. The Federation is orientated on a non-discriminating, scientiﬁc and social basis.

Then there was an inaugural meeting in Monaco on April 24, 1970, where Mr Andre Chatillon was appointed as President, Mr R. Levin as 1st Vice President, Mr J. Com as 2nd Vice President, Mr J. Mallet as head of the secretariat, and Mr E. Obert as supervisor. The initial purpose of the founding was to begin research into the preservation of bodies from the point of view of death and life studies and embalming. In 1988 it had a new start, evolving into a prestigious global networking platform for funeral directors, funeral service providers, repatriation companies and high quality funeral suppliers. 

Today FIAT-IFTA is the only such organization in the world, the only NGO accredited with the United Nations ECOSOC and UNESCO representing the funeral branch in social and economic issues and in the ﬁeld of funeral heritage.

FIAT-IFTA’s vision of the funeral industry’s future is that of its members, their needs and aspirations for providing excellence in service. 

Apply for FIAT-IFTA Membership and expand your network to enhance global exposure of your services.

Description:
At Impact Beacon, we help nonprofits scale smarter.

We’re a strategic operations partner for mission-driven teams, combining systems thinking with sector expertise to build the foundations nonprofits need to thrive. Whether it's donor engagement, internal operations, people systems, or financial governance, our solutions are designed to reduce overwhelm and increase impact.

We don’t just consult, we embed. Acting as an extension of your team, we bring clarity, structure, and support where it’s needed most, so you can focus on what matters: delivering change.

Our modular, human-first approach adapts to your pace ; whether you're growing fast or stabilizing for the long haul.

Let’s build systems that work for your mission, not against it.

Name: The Next Chapter
Description:
𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐍𝐞𝐱𝐭 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐩𝐭𝐞𝐫
For HR leaders in transition—and those who walk alongside them.

For 18 years, The Best Lunch Ever created a trusted space for HR leaders to gather, connect, and learn together.

The Next Chapter is the natural evolution of that work—created for a different, quieter season many HR leaders eventually face.

It’s the moment when the meetings stop, the calendar clears, and the title disappears.
When the questions are no longer about strategy or scale, but about identity, clarity, and what comes next.

The Next Chapter is a thoughtful, facilitated conversation designed specifically for:
• HR leaders navigating transition
• HR leaders who want to show up well as peers and allies

This is not a job search event.
Not recruiting.
Not résumés, tactics, or hustle.

Instead, it’s a grounded, human space to slow down and speak honestly—without pressure to perform, advise, or rush forward.

Each gathering brings together HR leaders currently in transition and those who have walked through it, creating room for perspective rather than answers, and presence rather than fixes.

What we believe:
• Leadership doesn’t end when the title does
• Transition is not failure—it’s formation
• Clarity matters more than speed
• People need space before they need advice

Built on trust.
Shaped in community.
Powered by Purpose Fueled.

Because sometimes the most important leadership work begins when a role ends.

Welcome to "Opportunities Unlock" where we are dedicated to shaping a brighter future for the continent's young minds. Our organization passionately champions Sustainable Development Goals 4 and 5, focusing on Quality Education and Gender Equality, alongside mentorship and leadership for youth empowerment.

At our core, we believe in unlocking the untapped potential within every African youth. Through strategic initiatives, educational programs, and mentorship opportunities, we strive to create an environment where young individuals can thrive, learn, and lead.

Name: PhillyCIO
Description:
PhillyCIO is one of 30 chapters in the Inspire Leadership Network, a national membership organization comprised exclusively of CIOs
from public and private businesses, government, education, healthcare, and nonprofit institutions.

PhillyCIO exists to help CIOs thrive in today’s most
challenging C-suite executive role. The chapter regularly
convenes leading CIOs and fosters meaningful relationships
by hosting non-commercial, member-led programs—helping
CIOs gain leadership advantage.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Philadelphia-based CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. Since inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: PMI KC Mid America Chapter
Description:
Since its founding in 1969, Project Management Institute (PMI) has grown to be the organization of choice for project management professionalism. With 240,000 members in 160 countries, PMI is the leading nonprofit professional association in the area of Project Management. PMI establishes project management standards, provides seminars, educational programs and professional certification that more and more organizations desire for their project leaders. Sharing project experiences, effective project management techniques and tools, and valuable lessons learned are among the many benefits of being a member of the Project Management Institute.

The PMI Kansas City Mid America Chapter was chartered in 1993 and today has more than 1,800 members. Membership provides the opportunity to network with other Project Management professionals and practitioners in a diverse range of industries throughout the Kansas City metropolitan area, eastern Kansas and western Missouri.

Name: WePOWER - Women in Energy & Power Sector Network South Asia
Description:
WePOWER - Women in Energy and Power Sector Network South Asia is a professional network in South Asia. We support women’s participation in energy projects and institutions and promote normative change regarding women in Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics (STEM) education – in South Asia and beyond.

WePOWER is in its fifth year. Thanks in part to the diligent commitment of our Partners, we are proud to report that WePOWER continues to be a leading champion of promoting gender diversity and women’s empowerment in the energy sector in South Asia. Since its launch, our Partners have completed over 1,400 gender activities that benefitted over 28,000 women and girls.

Read more here: https://www.wepowernetwork.org/

La FDMC gère la convention collective du négoce des matériaux de construction en lien avec les partenaires sociaux.
Pour plus d'informations, n'hésitez pas à consulter notre site internet https://fdmc.org/
* Chiffres 2025

Description:
The Women’s Collective was founded by Julie Waters and Kelly MacLeod. Born from the evolution of the Women to Women community, where they served on the senior leadership team, they carry forward an aligned mission with a fresh vision while thoughtfully evolving The Women’s Collective to better meet the needs of today’s women in business.

Julie brings deep operational expertise shaped by her background in sales, operations, and her role as COO of Women to Women Network. Kelly brings a strategic, relationship-driven approach informed by her experience as Chief Membership Officer and a background in real estate, property management, and accounting. Together, they lead The Women’s Collective with clarity, intention, and integrity.

Through member feedback and collaboration, The Women’s Collective was designed to be a space that grows alongside its members, inclusive, intentional, and anchored by real relationships. This is a community for women across all stages: entrepreneurs, corporate professionals, and those just beginning their careers, who value substance, trust, and long-term support.

At The Women’s Collective, we believe community outweighs competition. That authentic relationships matter more than purely transactional introductions. And that women, whether building businesses or growing careers in corporate spaces, deserve support that is both genuine and sustaining. 

Through monthly in-person and virtual gatherings, connection fuels growth. These moments support personal development, stronger communication, and intentional professional development throughout the year.

Name: FEI Twin Cities
Description:
Welcome to FEI Twin Cities!

FEI Twin Cities is one of the largest chapters of Financial Executives International and is comprised of over 320+ financial leaders throughout the Twin Cities area.  Our mission is to advance the success of financial leaders, their organizations and the profession as a whole.  

FEI can help members:
   * Connect with peers and industry leaders
   * Build lasting relationships
   * Advance their career through professional and career development sessions
   * Keep ahead of emerging trends through FEI’s programming, research and advocacy content.

Our programming includes 9 monthly meetings, 4 professional development sessions and 2 career management sessions.  In addition, we have new member meetings, women’s programming and more.

Our speakers are high-quality and entertaining and include some of the leading CEOs and leaders from across the country.  Recent speakers have included Neel Kashkari, Minneapolis Federal Reserve CEO and Linda Zukauckas, EVP and Deputy CFO of American Express. Almost all of our programming qualifies for continuing professional education (CPE) credits. 

FEI membership also allows you to connect with 8,000 of your peers nationally and you will gain access to 
   * An online member directory with access to local and national senior finance executives
   * A daily news digest with content curated just for busy senior finance executives
   * Professional development webinars on best practices and emerging trends
   * An on-demand learning curriculum
   * Current and unbiased financial research publications and 
   * Leading-edge conferences around the country including the annual FEI Summit.  

Consider joining FEI today.  Qualifications can be found on our website.

Please consider joining us as a guest at one of our upcoming meetings. For more information contact FEI Twin Cities at rbump@feitwincities.com.

Name: Gymnasielærerne
Description:
GL er fagforeningen for gymnasielærere ved alle de gymnasiale uddannelser. Vi arbejder for at styrke de gymnasiale uddannelser og dine arbejdsforhold som gymnasielærer på eux, hf, hhx, htx og stx. 

Vi sætter fokus på det, der er vigtigt for, at gymnasielærerne kan skabe den bedst mulige undervisning for elever og kursister – både uddannelsespolitisk og ift. løn, ansættelsesvilkår, arbejdsmiljø, kompetenceudvikling.

Vi uddanner vores tillidsrepræsentanter, så du på alle gymnasiale arbejdspladser har en til at støtte dig i dit arbejdsliv. Tillidsrepræsentanten er GL’s lokale repræsentant, men vælges af dig som medlem, og varetager derfor dine interesser. Du er også altid velkommen til at kontakte GL’s sekretariat, som er klar til at tage en samtale med dig, hvis du oplever nogle udfordringer på din arbejdsplads. I dialog med dig hjælper vi med rådgivning og vejledning.

Læs mere på vores hjemmeside, hvor du også kan melde dig ind i GL eller kontakte os.

Name: Instituto Brasileiro dos Profissionais de Saúde
Description:
Acreditamos que a união dos profissionais da saúde no Brasil é essencial para o desenvolvimento e fortalecimento de nossas práticas. Através da troca de experiências e do abandono de nossas rotinas cotidianas nas instituições de trabalho, conseguimos nos revitalizar e manter-nos atualizados, preparados para enfrentar os desafios constantes de nossa área.

Entendemos que a humanização da assistência, os avanços tecnológicos, novas legislações e a crescente demanda por cuidados de saúde mais seguros requerem uma atualização contínua e dedicada.

Nossa missão é promover o desenvolvimento científico e a melhoria dos processos assistenciais, com foco em proporcionar cuidados de saúde de alta qualidade. Estamos comprometidos em fornecer recursos educacionais, incentivar a inovação e fortalecer a colaboração entre todos os profissionais da saúde para garantir um atendimento eficaz e humanizado à população.

Name: Rada Polskich Przedsiębiorców Globalnych
Description:
Rada Polskich Przedsiębiorców Globalnych jest związkiem pracodawców powołanym do życia 1 czerwca 2023 r. przez grupę polskich przedsiębiorców z doświadczeniem oraz sukcesami w zakresie ekspansji zagranicznej.

Celem Rady jest wzrost konkurencyjności naszej gospodarki i zwiększenie liczby krajowych firm globalnych oraz budowanie dobrego wizerunku Polski i polskiej gospodarki na świecie.

Name: WISE Seattle
Sudanese Professionals Forum
Description: An initiative by the Baselines team that aims to enhance opportunities to benefit from the cadres of Sudanese professionals who are abroad to contribute effectively to the process of professional development in the diaspora countries on a personal and institutional level, to enhance employment opportunities and early preparation for the process of rebuilding Sudan after the war.

Name: Mazowiecka Okręgowa Izba Inżynierów Budownictwa
Description: Mazowiecka Okręgowa Izba Inżynierów Budownictwa is a company based out of 1 Sierpnia 36, Warszawa, Woj Mazowieckie, Poland.

Name: USPA - Union Syndicale de la Production Audiovisuelle
Description:
Le syndicat rassemble près de 200 sociétés de production de documentaire de création, de fiction et de captation ou de recréation de spectacles vivants. Elles offrent une large proposition d’œuvres de qualité, innovantes, originales et ambitieuses, véritables ambassadrices de la culture française sur les écrans du monde entier.
Interlocuteur historique des pouvoirs publics, partenaire permanent du dialogue social et acteur majeur de la concertation interprofessionnelle, l’USPA assure également à l’ensemble de ses membres un accompagnement juridique et social, ainsi que des occasions régulières d’informations et d’échanges par la tenue de commissions mensuelles ainsi que d’évènements à l’occasion des grandes manifestations du secteur.

Name: American Society of Biomechanics
Description: The American Society of Biomechanics (ASB) was founded in October 1977 by a group of 53 scientists and clinicians. The mission of the ASB is to foster the advancement, communication, and application of biomechanics to benefit society.

Name: Unep Méditerranée - Les Entreprises du Paysage
Description: La Délégation Méditerranée de l'Unep, l'Union Nationale des Entreprises du Paysage, rassemble et représente les entreprises du paysage de la région Sud Provence Alpes Côte d'Azur et de Corse.

Name: MichiganCIO
Description:
MichiganCIO is one of 30 chapters in the Inspire Leadership Network, a national membership organization comprised exclusively of CIOs
from public and private businesses, government, education, healthcare, and nonprofit institutions.

MichiganCIO exists to help CIOs thrive in today’s most
challenging C-suite executive role. The chapter regularly
convenes leading CIOs and fosters meaningful relationships
by hosting non-commercial, member-led programs—helping
CIOs gain leadership advantage.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Michigan-based CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. Since inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: Women to Women Network
Description:
Welcome to Women to Women Network! We are a community of women in business dedicated to building strong connections, referral partners and friendships. Through a variety of events and social media, WtoWN provides a forum for collaboration, mentoring and sharing of ideas, resources, and inspiration.

If you are a woman in business — whether you work for a company or you’re doing your own thing — we invite you to join us.

Women to Women Network began as an informal monthly gathering for women in business to come together over a cup of coffee for conversation, meaningful connections, and inspiration for handling the challenges we each face in our businesses and careers. Founded in 2018, this diverse group of women has continued to grow with members representing all stages of business from young entrepreneur and start-up, to seasoned owner, manager or executive, and women in their second (or third!) careers. The common bond is a desire to grow, learn from each other, build a strong network of resources and referral partners, and support one another as we strive to achieve our goals.

Name: The Global Talent Network
Description:
Join 400,000+ professionals building careers without borders
The Global Talent Co. connects exceptional remote professionals from Latin America and South Africa with world-class companies across the globe. We're not a staffing agency—we're your gateway to international opportunities that combine competitive compensation, stability, and career growth.

Why Top Talent Chooses The Global Talent Co..:
 Earn What You're Worth
We pay competitive rates that exceed local market standards—because exceptional work deserves exceptional compensation. Our professionals earn significantly more than traditional local roles while enjoying the stability of long-term contracts.
 Work Remotely, Stay Connected
Enjoy true location flexibility while remaining part of a vibrant community. Work from anywhere, but never feel alone as we organize events in our main hubs.
 Real Benefits, Not Just Gig Work
Unlike typical freelance or contractor arrangements, you get the benefits you deserve: paid holidays, sick days, mentoring suppor. We believe in treating professionals like professionals and great humans.
 Build Your Career with Global Brands
Work on projects that matter with some of the world's most exciting Tech companies and consumer brands. Gain experience that accelerates your career and opens doors internationally.
 Invest in Your Growth
Access continuous learning and development opportunities to stay ahead of the curve. From technical skills to leadership training, we're committed to helping you level up throughout your career.
 Stay on the Cutting Edge
We don't just encourage innovation—we expect it. Work with the latest technologies, tools, and AI capabilities. Our community stays at the forefront of product development, emerging tech, and industry best practices.

Browse open jobs: https://globaltalent.co/jobs

Name: Women of Color in Community Development
Description: WCCD is a membership organization and professional network of women of color in the community and economic development industry.

Name: IICMP - Irish Institute of Clinical Measurement Physiology
Description:
We are Health Professionals who are part of a group of professions known as Health and Social Care Professionals.  Our professional body represents the five disciplines of Clinical Measurement Physiology in Ireland including: Respiratory, Neurophysiology, Cardiac, Vascular and GI Physiology. Each discipline holds it's own executive with a Chair and Vice-Chair member.  

The executive board consists of volunteers currently working in each discipline to maintain the interests of the profession. 

We work to uphold the following aims:

-Educate and Train: Promote the highest standard of practice education and training withing the profession

-Dedicated Forum: Establish a dedicated forum for professional communication. 
 
-Member Representation: Represent our members interests in professional employment and education. 

-Inform members: Provide the most up to date accurate information within the profession in order to protect professional standards. 

-Recognition of Qualifications: Provide a pathway for professionals qualifies outside of our current guidelines to practice in Ireland. 

-Continuous Professional Development: Offer professional opportunities for Physiologists to develop and maintain their CPD.

Name: GDG Cochin
Description:
Google Developers Group (GDG) Cochin is a community of developers, designers, and technology enthusiasts located in the city of Kochi, Kerala, India. The group is officially recognized by Google and is part of the Global Google Developers community. The primary goal of the GDG Cochin community is to promote the use of Google technologies and platforms, as well as to foster a collaborative and supportive environment for its members to learn, share, and network.

GDG Cochin regularly organizes meetups, workshops, conferences, and other events that cover a wide range of topics related to Google technologies, such as Android, Flutter, Google Cloud Platform, Firebase, and many others. These events feature talks by industry experts, hands-on workshops, code labs, and networking opportunities that bring together like-minded individuals who are passionate about technology and innovation.

GDG Cochin also runs various community initiatives, including mentorship programs, hackathons, and code sprints, aimed at fostering collaboration, skill-sharing, and innovation among its members. Additionally, the group maintains an active online presence, with a website, social media pages, and discussion forums where members can connect and share knowledge and ideas.

Overall, GDG Cochin is a thriving community of developers and technology enthusiasts who are passionate about Google technologies and who come together to learn, share, and grow.

Name: Bundesverband der Bilanzbuchhalter und Controller (BVBC)
Description:
Der BVBC ist weit mehr als eine Interessenvertretung – er ist eine starke Gemeinschaft von Bilanzbuchhalter*innen und Controller*innen. Mit knapp 5.000 Mitgliedern bieten wir praxisnahe Unterstützung bei fachlichen und rechtlichen Fragen und sind Ihr zuverlässiger Partner für hochwertige Weiterbildung. Unser umfangreiches Seminarangebot, spannende Events wie die ReWeCo und ein lebendiges Netzwerk machen uns zur ersten Adresse für alle, die im Rechnungswesen und Controlling beruflich wachsen wollen.

Wir halten unsere Mitglieder stets auf dem Laufenden – mit den aktuellsten Informationen, die für Ihren Berufsalltag entscheidend sind. Als starke Stimme in Politik und Wirtschaft setzen wir uns zudem für Ihre Interessen ein und gestalten die Zukunft des Berufsbildes aktiv mit. Mehr Infos unter www.bvbc.de.

Name: ProVision Eyecare
Description:
ProVision was established 30 years ago by Optometry Australia to ensure that independent optometry would remain an important and thriving part of Australia’s optometry landscape. Why? So that you and every other Australian would have valuable choice when selecting who would care for your eyes and vision.

Our 450+ member optometrists are located in every Australian State and Territory, and are spread throughout every major city including Melbourne, Sydney, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide and Canberra as well as many regional centres.

Name: Fysioterapeuternes Fagforening
Description:
Fysioterapeuternes Fagforenings formål er at forbedre løn- og arbejdsvilkår i privat- og praksissektoren for ansatte og indlejere. Dette skal gøres igennem overenskomster efter den Danske model.

Vi kan derudover tilbyde sagsbehandling på eksistererende kontrakter, og juridisk hjælp ved tvister.

Name: Union régionale Île-de-France du SNDGCT
Description:
Le Syndicat National des Directeurs Généraux des Collectivités Territoriales (SNDGCT) créé en 1948, est une organisation professionnelle qui regroupe les dirigeants territoriaux de collectivités (DGS, DGA, secrétaires généraux, secrétaires de mairie et d'EPCI, et agents retraités des catégories précitées).

Le syndicat compte aujourd’hui 4000 adhérents, dont plus de 3000 en activité. Il se compose d’Unions régionales, elles-mêmes divisées en Sections départementales. 

Le syndicat a pour objet la défense des intérêts de la profession auprès du Gouvernement et du Parlement, l'organisation de rencontres thématiques régulières entre collègues, et l'appui aux collègues en difficulté. 

L'Union régionale Île-de-France comprend les 300 adhérents des 8 départements franciliens. 

Rejoignez-nous !

Name: Fédération des Travaux Publics Lorraine
Description:
La Fédération des Travaux Publics (#FTP) de Lorraine représente 380 entreprises et agences exerçant une activité de travaux publics, employant 12500 salariés.
Elle suscite les conditions du développement du marché des Travaux Publics et informe les entreprises sur les conditions d'exercice de leur activité.
 
La FTP Lorraine est membre du réseau FNTP (Fédération Nationale des Travaux Publics) et entretient des liens privilégiés avec la FFB Lorraine (Fédération Française du Bâtiment) et les Fédérations départementales du BTP (Meurthe-et-Moselle, Meuse, Moselle et Vosges).

Name: AE  – Deutsche Gesellschaft für  Endoprothetik e. V.
Description:
Die AE - Deutsche Gesellschaft für Endoprothetik (AE) wurde 1996 in Regensburg als gemeinnütziger Verein gegründet. Mitglieder sind führende Orthopäden und Unfallchirurgen sowie Wissenschaftler, die sich mit Fragen der Endoprothetik und alternativen gelenkerhaltenden Behandlungsverfahren beschäftigen.

Wir sind eine Sektion der Deutschen Gesellschaft für Orthopädie und Unfallchirurgie (DGOU) und somit zuständig für alle Fragen, die die Endoprothetik betreffen.

Impressum: www.ae-germany.com/impressum

Name: Texas Municipal Human Resources Association
Description:
The purpose of this Association shall be to promote excellence in personnel and human resource administration in Texas municipalities. Organized in 1950 to promote, encourage, and advance the professional development of public personnel practitioners throughout the state of Texas.

Today TMHRA continues to offer its members a unique forum where the interests, concerns, and problems affecting civil service and personnel professionals can be shared and discussed.

Name: Supreme Global Solutions Consulting
Description:
With over a decade of experience in Non-Governmental Organizations Consultancy, Leadership and Social Entrepreneurship, having assisted NGOs raise millions of pula from diverse national and International funding sources including grants, corporate partnerships, fundraising events, social enterprising, sub granting and through RM Trainings, I am an NGO consultant, advisor, coach, mentor, trainer, teacher and key note speaker in the field of Resource Mobilization/ Business Development/Fundraising.

Name: Conformity Assessment Society (CAS)
Description: The Conformity Assessment Society (CAS) is a global, non-profit community of professionals, organizations, and experts dedicated to advancing conformity assessment, certification, inspection, testing, standardization and accreditation. CAS promotes knowledge sharing, professional development, and global collaboration to strengthen trust in quality, competence, and international standards.

Name: UNICEM Auvergne Rhône-Alpes
Description:
L’UNICEM Auvergne Rhône-Alpes est la fédération qui regroupe les industries extractives de minéraux et les fabricants de matériaux de construction par transformation. 

Les sites en Auvergne Rhône-Alpes :
 Près de 600 sites d'extraction (carrières de granulats, de minéraux industriels, de roches ornementales)
 200 sites participent au tri, au recyclage et à la valorisation des matériaux inertes issus de la déconstruction
 300 unités de production de béton prêt à l’emploi ; 

Les matériaux issus de ces sites contribuent notamment à la réalisation des 56 000 logements individuels mis en chantier en 2019 ou encore à la construction et l'entretien des 155 000 km des réseaux routier et ferroviaire régionaux

𝐃𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐨𝐢𝐬 𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐮𝐱 𝐞𝐭 𝐧𝐨𝐧 𝐝𝐞́𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞𝐬 
Près de 10 000 salariés travaillent au sein des entreprises de la filière, installées au cœur des territoires, qui répondent aux besoins du BTP, qui emploient 222 000 salariés. 

𝐃𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐚𝐠é́𝐞𝐬 𝐩𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐥'𝐞𝐧𝐯𝐢𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐞𝐭 𝐥𝐚 𝐑𝐒𝐄.
243 sites adhérents sont engagés dans une démarche environnementale et/ou RSE animée par l’association UNICEM Entreprises Engagées.

𝐍𝐨𝐬 𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐫𝐞𝐬 
 𝐄𝐧𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐫 𝐞𝐭 𝐚𝐜𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐚𝐠𝐧𝐞𝐫 𝐧𝐨𝐬 𝐚𝐝𝐡𝐞́𝐫𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬 aux enjeux de demain:  
Les démarches volontaires (RSE, Engagement Santé Sécurité...) ; le partage de bonnes pratiques environnementales et en matière de santé sécurité 
 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐦𝐮𝐧𝐢𝐪𝐮𝐞𝐫 𝐬𝐮𝐫 𝐥𝐚 𝐟𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐞̀𝐫𝐞 𝐞𝐭 𝐬𝐞𝐬 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐢𝐭𝐬 auprès de nos interlocuteurs (écoles, grand public, élus…), notamment à l’aide d’outils développés tels que le site lavieenpierre.com et le label «Production 100 % locale» 
 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗯𝘂𝗲𝗿 𝗲𝘁 𝗽𝗿𝐞́𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐥𝐞𝐬 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐞́𝐫𝐞̂𝐭𝐬 de nos entreprises lors de l’élaboration et le suivi des documents de planification (SCOT, SAGE, SRC…)

Name: SEMS: Society for Energy, Materials & Sustainability
Description:
The Society for Energy, Materials & Sustainability (SEMS) is an international, non-profit professional society dedicated to advancing research, innovation, and knowledge exchange at the intersection of energy systems, advanced materials, sustainability, and environmental technologies.

SEMS was established to serve as a global platform for researchers, engineers, academics, industry professionals, and early-career scientists working on solutions to the most pressing scientific and technological challenges of our time (energy transition, clean water, sustainable materials, climate resilience, and circular economy).

Our Vision
To become a globally recognized scientific society that fosters impactful research, interdisciplinary collaboration, and responsible innovation for a sustainable future.

Our Mission
SEMS aims to:

Promote high-quality, ethical, and impactful research in energy, materials science, sustainability, and related engineering disciplines

Facilitate international collaboration among academia, research institutions, and industry

Support early-career researchers and students through mentorship, visibility, and academic opportunities

Encourage the translation of research into real-world sustainable solutions aligned with global and regional priorities

Uphold the highest standards of scientific integrity, transparency, and inclusivity

Core Focus Areas
SEMS actively supports research and professional activities across (but not limited to):

Energy Systems & Technologies
Materials Science & Engineering
Water, Environment & Sustainability
Sustainable Engineering & Industrial Processes

Name: The Social Club
Description: The Social Club is a highly vetted, exclusive, community of high-net-worth, highly growth focused, entrepreneurs, investors, and executives.

Name: VAIS Verband für Anlagentechnik und IndustrieService e.V.
Description:
Willkommen beim VAIS! 
Wir vertreten die Interessen von Unternehmen aus Anlagenbau und Industrieservice in der Energie- und Abfallwirtschaft und den Prozessindustrien. Als zentrale Plattform und Netzwerk für unsere Mitglieder setzen wir uns für eine erfolgreiche Zukunft der Branche ein.

Mit Leidenschaft und Engagement gestalten wir gemeinsam die Zukunft unserer Branche und tragen dazu bei, die Herausforderungen der Dekarbonisierung, Digitalisierung und Demografie zu meistern.
Eine erfolgreiche und nachhaltige Energie-und Abfallwirtschaft und Prozessindustrie kann nur durch motivierte Menschen, innovative Anlagenbau-Lösungen und effizienten Industrieservice gestaltet werden.

Als Verband setzen wir uns für folgende strategische Ziele ein:
•	Interessenvertretung auf politischer Ebene
•	Stärkung des Netzwerkes und Austauschs unter Mitgliedern
•	Förderung von Innovation und Forschung
•	Bildung und Fortbildung für unsere Mitglieder
•	Gestaltung der Zukunft der Branche und Sicherung der Industriestandorte

Gemeinsam arbeiten wir an einem leistungsstarken Leitbild, das die Interessen unserer Mitglieder optimal vertritt und fördert. Seien Sie Teil unserer Community und gestalten Sie die Zukunft der Industriestandorte mit uns in einem starken Netzwerk.

Name: Walking Houston
Description:
Walking Houston connects real estate developers with architects, engineering companies, consultants, contractors and the communities in which they build through interviews, tours, and networking happy hours.

Email info@walkinghouston.com to attend our next event or click the website  link to become a member.

Name: Future DiverCities
Description:
The Future DiverCities project is implemented by 13 European partners led by La Friche La Belle de Mai (Marseille) and experimented simultaneously in 8 cities: Berlin, Zagreb, Split, Kuopio, Marseille, Florence, Athens as well as two European Capital of Culture in 2023 and 2027, respectively: Timişoara and  Liepaja.

The project is the continuation of a first Creative Europe project (2016-2020) implemented successfully by 10 partners in Europe and Canada which has explored new ways to work in challenging urban areas through participatory methodologies and co-designed digital tools. The cultural regeneration route has often led to the establishment of new built spaces, development of infrastructure and creation of landscape fixtures. With major changes in the way we inhabit our cities, it is becoming urgent to address urban cultural regeneration in a more ecological way, as the approach taken to date will not suffice to address the major challenge of building environmentally resilient cities. 

The partners involved are La Friche, coordinator (lafriche.org) and Seconde Nature (snzn.org) in Marseille (France), ANTI Festival (antifestival.com) in Kuopio (Finland), KONTEJNER (kontejner.org) in Zagreb and Split (Croatia), LAMA Impresa Sociale (agenzialama.eu) in Florence (Italy), Public Art Lab (publicartlab-berlin.de) in Berlin (Germany), BIOS (bios.gr) and European Creative Hubs Network-ECHN (creativehubs.net) in Athens (Elefsina, Greece), the City Council “Culture Department” (liepaja.lv) in Liepaja (Latvia) and PLAI (plai.ro) in Timişoara (Romania).
The project also benefits from the expertise of INNOCAMP PL in Poland (Ashoka network) (innocamp.pl), LAMA Impresa Sociale in Italy (agenzialama.eu), Savonia University in Finland (savonia.fi) and Trajna in Slovenia (Krater project) (trajna.com; krater.si).

Name: IEEE Open Access Journal of Power and Energy
Gymnasieskolernes Lærerforening
Description:
GL er fagforeningen for gymnasielærere ved alle de gymnasiale uddannelser. Vi arbejder for at styrke de gymnasiale uddannelser og dine arbejdsforhold som gymnasielærer på eux, hf, hhx, htx og stx. 

Vi sætter fokus på det, der er vigtigt for, at gymnasielærerne kan skabe den bedst mulige undervisning for elever og kursister – både uddannelsespolitisk og ift. løn, ansættelsesvilkår, arbejdsmiljø, kompetenceudvikling.

Vi uddanner vores tillidsrepræsentanter, så du på alle gymnasiale arbejdspladser har en til at støtte dig i dit arbejdsliv. Tillidsrepræsentanten er GL’s lokale repræsentant, men vælges af dig som medlem, og varetager derfor dine interesser. Du er også altid velkommen til at kontakte GL’s sekretariat, som er klar til at tage en samtale med dig, hvis du oplever nogle udfordringer på din arbejdsplads. I dialog med dig hjælper vi med rådgivning og vejledning.

Læs mere på vores hjemmeside, hvor du også kan melde dig ind i GL eller kontakte os.

Description:
In August 2008, PAM Council endorsed and approved the formation of the new Sustainability Committee who was tasked primarily to develop and set-up the Green Building Index and the accompanying Panel for certification and accreditation of Green-rated buildings. In addition, Greenbuildingindex Sdn Bhd was incorporated in February 2009, a wholly-owned subsidiary of PAM and the Association of Consulting Engineers Malaysia (ACEM), to administrate GBI accreditation and training of GBI Facilitators and Certifiers. Achieving points in these targeted areas will mean that the building will likely be more environment-friendly than those that do not address the issues. Under the GBI assessment framework, points will also be awarded for achieving and incorporating environment-friendly features which are above current industry practice. 
ENERGY EFFICIENCY (EE)
INDOOR ENVIRONMENT QUALITY (EQ)
MATERIALS & RESOURCES (MR)
SUSTAINABLE SITE PLANNING & MANAGEMENT (SM)

Name: MindSign
Description:
MindSign staat bedrijven en organisaties bij in het realiseren van een goede mentale gezondheid van hun medewerkers. De dienstverlening van MindSign is zowel preventief als curatief.

Onze preventieve benadering geven we vorm door workshops, advies voor managers en leidinggevenden en de ontwikkeling van vitaliteitsprogramma’s op mentaal gebied. Onderdeel van het vitaliteitsprogramma is bijvoorbeeld de regelmatige implementatie van de MindSign Check.

Wanneer er toch mentale problemen op de werkvloer geconstateerd worden, kan MindSign ingeschakeld worden om de medewerker te begeleiden naar herstel.

De dienstverlening van MindSign richt zich specifiek op de behoeften van werkgevers. Medewerkers met mentale problemen leveren voor veel bedrijven aanzienlijke problemen op, wat vaak gepaard gaat met administratieve rompslomp en een hoog kostenplaatje. De hulpverlening van MindSign is erop gericht om vanuit een scherpe analyse te werken aan een zo spoedig mogelijk herstel.

In onze aanpak werken we vanuit een benadering waarin terugkeer op de werkvloer deel uitmaakt van het herstelproces.

MindSign helpt bedrijven en organisaties in het realiseren van een goed mentale conditie bij hun medewerkers om zo…

… ziekteverzuim terug te dringen
… productiviteit te verhogen
… werkplezier te verhogen.

Mentale klachten zijn een van de grootste veroorzakers van ziekteverzuim. Een derde van het langdurig ziekteverzuim (meer dan zes weken) valt uit door psychische klachten.

Er wordt onvoldoende aan preventie gedaan op het vlak van mentale gezondheid. In het kader van vitaliteitsprogramma’s wordt er aandacht besteed van de fysieke gezondheid, maar vaak is er te weinig aandacht voor de mentale gezondheid.

Name: Safety Health and Environment National Authority (SHENA)
Description:
The Safety, Health and Environment National Authority (SHENA) was established following the enactment of the Safety, Health and Environment National Authority Act, Chapter 227 which was signed by His Majesty the Sultan and Yang Di-Pertuan on the 6 October 2018.
 
SHENA is the national Authority responsible for regulating the workplace safety and health, environment and radiation matters. The Orders that are under the purview of SHENA include the Workplace Safety and Health Order, 2009 (WSHO, 2009) and the Radiation Protection Act, Chapter 228. SHENA continues to support other relevant agencies in the enforcement of legislation under their jurisdiction and purview.

SHENA is headed by a Chief Executive Officer (CEO) who is ultimately accountable for all activities undertaken by the Authority. CEO reports directly to the Authority who then reports to the Minister of Energy as the Minister in Charge.

SHENA's Inspectors have specific legal powers to enforce and regulate workplace safety and health, environment and radiation laws on behalf of SHENA.

Name: ESG Antirracista
Description:
O Movimento ESG Antirracista tem como propósito construir diálogos positivos e ampliação de espaços para se questionar e refletir a falta de representatividade plural nas pautas de ESG e transformar esta realidade de forma inclusiva e diversa em todo o Brasil.

Nosso objetivo é fomentar espaços para a participação de profissionais plurais, negros e indígenas, em pautas sobre ESG e sua sustentabilidade diante das temáticas de responsabilidade social e mudanças climáticas no mercado corporativo e terceiro setor.

Através de ações que conscientizam, sensibilizam e constroem pontes para responsabilização e reparação dessa realidade, também divulgamos e conectamos profissionais às oportunidades, potencializando vozes desses profissionais plurais em sua área de atuação.

Nosso propósito é incentivar e sustentar espaços de diálogo em interface com o ESG nas organizações que se comprometeram com diversidade, inclusão e equidade através da propagação de metodologias técnicas e teóricas criadas em rede, e, que se atentam aos interesses e a realidade das mais diversas regiões do nosso país.


contato: movimentoesgantirracista@outlook.com

The Tampa Bay Chapter of SMPS is proud of its purpose and accomplishments. We are an aggressive and progressive marketing organization focusing on the needs of today's business owners, business developers, and marketing professionals.

First, it is a vehicle in which to market our firms, learn about the A/E/C (architectural, engineering and construction) industry through our educational and informative monthly meetings, and to establish relationships with owners, different municipalities and companies within our community.

The second part of our Chapter deals with reaching out and helping others. Through volunteering, our Lyle Trease Scholarship Program and charitable contributions, we have made a difference in the lives of those less fortunate while allowing us the opportunity to be able to give back to our community.

Name: Motif.
Description:
Motif, turizm, etkinlik ve kreatif çözümler alanlarında faaliyet
gösteren, markaların ihtiyaçlarına bütüncül yaklaşan bir ajanstır.
Her projede markaya özgü ve etkileyici deneyimler sunmayı
hedefleriz. Hikâyenizi anlatmak için doğru zamanı, doğru dili ve
doğru mecraları birlikte seçiyoruz. 2024 yılında faaliyet alanımıza
turizmi de dahil ettik 20 yıldır Türkiye’de faaliyet gösteren global bir
seyahat firmasının organizasyon ekibinin bünyemize katılmasıyla
birlikte Motif olarak turizm alanında da hizmet vermeye başladık.
Motif olarak etkinlik alanında kurumsal toplantılardan özel
davetlere, deneyim odaklı organizasyonlardan uluslararası
seyahatlere kadar uzanan etkinlik yelpazemizle, markaların hedef
kitlesine dokunan güçlü anlar tasarlıyoruz.
Motif, iletişimden prodüksiyona, tasarımdan kurumsal kimlik
oluşturmaya kadar uzanan geniş bir alanda markalara uçtan uca
kreatif çözümler sunar.
Markaların değerlerini en etkili biçimde yansıtan yaratıcı fikirler
geliştiriyor; bu fikirleri güçlü görsel dünyalarla birleştirerek özgün
ve stratejik tasarımlara dönüştürüyoruz.
Motif, markaların tüm ihtiyaçlarını tek bir çatı altında toplar.
Etkinlikten dijitale, kreatiften kullanıcı deneyimine kadar her
adımda yanınızdayız.

Name: American Association of University Administrators
Description:
The American Association of University Administrators (AAUA) is a non-profit professional organization for higher education leaders and administrative personnel. It is the only professional association for individuals who are interested in the entire range of higher education management (from department chair/unit director through president) in the entire diverse set of American colleges and universities (two- and four-year; public, private non-profit, private for-profit; comprehensive, research-focused, special mission).

Membership in AAUA helps support the association’s mission. In addition, membership provides—for those members who have an interest—opportunities for professional networking and leadership. In addition to enrolling and serving a significant complement of administrators at the most senior levels, the association is also interested in assisting early-career practitioner administrators build/enhance their leadership portfolios by providing leadership opportunities through service on association committees, boards, and taskforces. Opportunities to collaborate on offering professional development services are available as well.

Description:

Elle s’est donné pour mission de défendre les intérêts collectifs des professionnels de la filière, d’assister et informer ses entreprises adhérentes et de définir et mettre en œuvre les politiques syndicales. C’est dans cette perspective que l’UNICEM Nouvelle-Aquitaine structure ses actions autour de 4 collèges :
• granulats,
• béton prêt à l’emploi,
• pompage béton,
• collège multi-activités (minéraux industriels et roches ornementales et de construction).
Elle compte aujourd’hui 204 entreprises adhérentes sur 12 départements

Name: HerClub
Description:
HerClub was launched to solve a major problem in corporate America: women are missing out on critical networking opportunities, specifically the ones happening on the golf course. 

After a ton research, and let’s face it, office gossip, we realized women don’t have the knowledge and sometimes interest in golf which can lead to a lack of confidence on the green and sometimes even in business. HerClub was designed to change all of that. 

HerClub helps motivated women find an edge by building their skills and confidence related to the game of golf, off the green, so they can stop missing out on opportunities on the green. Not only is HerClub a step towards owning your career, it’s also a community to keep you energized. 

We are no longer waiting for an invitation to play. We are here and ready to make moves, now.

Name: Galgotias Tech Council
Description:
Welcome to Galgotias Tech Council (GTC)! 

Our Purpose
Established in 2024, the Galgotias Tech Council (GTC) is committed to nurturing a vibrant ecosystem of innovation, collaboration, and technical proficiency within Galgotias University. Our core purpose is to equip students with the essential resources, opportunities, and mentorship needed to thrive in the rapidly changing technology landscape. 

Our Aspiration
At GTC, we envision a thriving community where every technology enthusiast can develop, explore, and innovate. We strive to bridge the divide between theoretical learning and practical application by organizing workshops, hackathons, guest lectures, networking events, and technical competitions. Our ultimate aspiration is to nurture a generation of tech leaders prepared to spearhead advancements and make a meaningful impact on society. 

Our Initiatives
GTC provides a diverse array of initiatives tailored to enhance technical skills and inspire innovation among students:

✓ Workshops: Interactive sessions that delve into a wide range of technology topics, fostering hands-on skills.
✓ Hackathons: Collaborative coding marathons designed to tackle real-world challenges with creative solutions.
✓ Guest Lectures: Valuable insights and expertise from industry leaders and visionaries.
✓ Tech Talks: Engaging conversations centered on the latest trends and breakthroughs in technology.
✓ Technical Events: Competitive and collaborative activities that challenge participants to solve complex problems, showcasing their skills and creativity.

Become a Part of Us
Whether you are an accomplished programmer, an aspiring developer, or simply someone passionate about technology, GTC invites you to join our community! Embrace the opportunity to connect with like-minded individuals, share your passion for tech, and support one another in reaching new milestones. 

#GalgotiasUniversity #GalgotiasTechCouncil #Innovation #TechnicalExcellence

Name: Fédération Française des Ports de Plaisance - officiel
Description:
Créée en 1979, la Fédération Française des Ports de Plaisance (FFPP) est l’organisation professionnelle reconnue par les pouvoirs publics pour représenter les gestionnaires de ports de plaisance maritimes, fluviaux et lacustres au niveau national. Au travers de ses 9 unions régionales constitutives, la FFPP fédère environ 500 ports de France hexagonale et ultramarine.

En 2024, l’Union des Ports de Plaisance de PACA a créé la première norme ISO de gestion environnementale portuaire : la Norme ISO 18725 « Ports propres ». Une norme mondiale soutenue par la Fédération française des ports de plaisance.

Name: International Association of Algorithmic Auditors (IAAA)
Description:
The IAAA is a community of practice that advances and organises the algorithmic auditing profession, promotes AI auditing standards, certifies best practices, and contributes to the emergence of Responsible AI. Founded at a critical juncture in regulatory oversight, the association unites leading voices from around the world to co-create a comprehensive understanding of AI impacts and drive systemic change. 

Our community is dedicated to establishing rigorous methodologies for assessing AI systems, ensuring they operate transparently and equitably. Through workshops, conferences, and collaborative projects, the IAAA provides a platform for sharing innovative solutions and advancing knowledge in the field of algorithmic auditing. 

Members of the IAAA gain access to a rich repository of resources, including the latest research findings, policy updates, and case studies, all aimed at enhancing professional capabilities and promoting ethical standards. By joining the IAAA, professionals commit to upholding integrity in AI development and implementation, shaping a future where technology serves the greater good of all humanity.

Name: The Society of Entrepreneurs
Description:
The Society of Entrepreneurs was founded in 1991 to foster the development of the entrepreneurial spirit, and to recognize the myriad contributions of area entrepreneurs. 

The Society of Entrepreneurs’ membership comprises Mid-South business owners, presidents and other key executives. Members are chosen annually by their peers, and must be mature (not emerging) entrepreneurs who have exhibited personal business achievement, creativity, determination, integrity, leadership, self-direction and the ability to transform a vision into a dynamic business accomplishment.

The organization’s purpose is to promote the general welfare of the community, contribute to the public good, and foster education. The Society of Entrepreneurs supports the creation, development, and implementation of programs that encourage the efforts of entrepreneurs in businesses, and in local, national and international communities.

Name: CNP-PPP
Description: The PPP is a contractual mode that makes it possible to acquire public goods and to provide public services. PPP contracts can include those to build and manage new infrastructure, those to make major upgrades to existing infrastructure (known as infrastructure PPP's) and those where a private partner manages existing infrastructure or is limited to provide or implement public services (called service PPPs or public service delegation).

Name: SouthFloridaCIO
Description:
SouthFloridaCIO is one of 30 chapters in the Inspire Leadership Network, a national membership organization comprised exclusively of CIOs
from public and private businesses, government, education, healthcare, and nonprofit institutions.

SouthFloridaCIO exists to help CIOs thrive in today’s most
challenging C-suite executive role. The chapter regularly
convenes leading CIOs and fosters meaningful relationships
by hosting non-commercial, member-led programs—helping
CIOs gain leadership advantage.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. Since inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: Alliance for Data Science & AI (ADSA)
Description:
The Alliance for Data Science and AI (ADSA) is a professional association for academic data science and AI practitioners, educators, leaders, and academic-adjacent colleagues who thoughtfully integrate data science best practices in higher education. Our members connect and share their data-intensive approaches and responsible applications in teaching and research. By sharing lessons learned and collaborating on research and training, our members help each other find the right path for their unique university or college environment.

ADSA also supports and advocates for translational activities and partnerships across academia, other community organizations, foundations, and private and public sectors. ADSA emphasizes the value that all fields have to contribute to the development and evolution of data-driven research practices. By connecting data science communities across different domains, ADSA hopes to accelerate the advancement and uptake of data science and AI innovation and best practices.

Description: He is a visionary entrepreneur and the driving force behind, a diversified global conglomerate. With a proven track record of building industry-leading companies from the ground up, he is renowned for his strategic acumen and ability to foresee market trends.

Name: ATECH Fuarı

Name: African Accounting and Finance Association (AAFA)
Description:
The African Accounting and Finance Association (AAFA) provides a platform for academics and practitioners to debate the role of accounting, finance, auditing, corporate governance, and related fields in Africa. Given the well-established links between accounting and sustainable development, AAFA is at the forefront of efforts in bringing resources and opportunities for the capacity building of African academics and students in the areas of research and education. In so doing, AAFA’s overall aim is to contribute to SDG actualisation in Africa (specifically SDG 9.5) on enhancing scientific research capabilities and the number of active researchers and hence fostering innovation in developing countries. The association is a voluntary non-profit group bringing together academics, graduate students and practitioners from Africa interested in accounting and finance education and research.

AAFA has been able to develop academic and collaboration links with various organisations and associations contributing to knowledge sharing and capacity building in the fields of accounting, finance, auditing, corporate governance, and related fields in Africa.

To further promote African-based research and publication, AAFA has published the African Accounting and Finance Journal since 2017.
The association draws its membership and representatives, and hosts its conferences, across both Anglo- and Franco-phone African countries. The last five conferences (Senegal, Tanzania, Virtual 2021, Egypt and Ghana) included French-speaking sessions and plenary sessions, as well as translations facilities to support interactions between Francophone and Anglophone academics.

Contact AAFA Secretariat: info@aafassociation.com

Name: UNICEM Pays de la Loire
Compliance Woman International
Description:
Red global de mujeres  profesionales de todos los países , especializadas en cumplimiento normativo y gestión de riesgos, para que puedan conectarse, apoyarse y liderar juntas un cambio significativo en sus industrias y comunidades. 

A través de nuestra comunidad y nuestros servicios, creamos un ecosistema donde la formación, la mentoría y la consultoría convergen para construir un futuro más íntegro y sostenible en el ámbito del cumplimiento normativo.

Name: Hasti
Description:
I have come up with a new creative initiative to create peace in the world.
I am looking for people who have the same interests and goals as me so that we can achieve this important need with each other's cooperation and make peace around the world.
To achieve this vision, I have developed three fundamental principles named JAC Tech that form the foundation of Hasti's mission:
J stands for Justice
A stands for Awareness
C stands for Collaboration
1JusticeTech: My mission is to establish an efficient and decentralized power guided by cutting-edge technologies & managed by Hasti. Through Mobile App, a Website, and a Satellite Channel, we enable fair communication, collaboration, and transparency worldwide. Together, we break barriers and build a global network toward a more just society. Let's transform the world.
2AwarenessTech: my mission is to foster a modern culture & cultivate heightened consciousness in today's society. I aim to help individuals achieve inner peace & contribute to global harmony. I'm currently writing a book that explores my theories and insights on peace-building, with the intention of inspiring individuals to challenge established beliefs & create positive change within our communities. Join us in embracing awareness, spreading the message, & shaping a more peaceful world together.
3CollaborationTech: At the core of my mission is the empowerment of society to embrace & value diverse perspectives. I am dedicated to fostering a culture of acceptance, respect, & understanding of differing opinions. By facilitating open & participatory spaces, I aim to bring together individuals from various backgrounds, engaging in constructive dialogue & exchanging ideas across religious, political, & individual viewpoints. Through these efforts, I believe we can bridge divides, foster unity, & achieve consensus & harmony. Together, let us build a society that celebrates diversity & cultivates a sense of shared understanding & collaboration.

Name: Astita Innovation
Description:
Astita Innovation LLP is a leading vermicompost manufacturing farm based in Ara, Bihar, providing premium organic fertilizer solutions across India. We specialize in producing 100% organic worm castings and nutrient-rich soil additives for gardening and farming, offering both liquid and powdered forms to enhance soil health and productivity. As the first certified Master Trainer-led company in organic and natural farming by the National Centre, Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India, we uphold the highest standards in sustainable agriculture. Within our tightly controlled facilities, we harness the power of earthworms to transform organic waste into high-quality compost, reinforcing the chemical, physical, and biological integrity of soil around plant root zones. Our proprietary processes extract a unique liquid blend containing beneficial microorganisms and essential nutrients, fortifying soil health and contributing to climate resilience. At Astita Innovation, our mission is to revitalize degraded soils, combat climate change, and cultivate a healthier, sustainable future. 

contact- astita.innovation.llp@gmail.com

Name: Southern Association of Colleges and Employers (SoACE)
Description: The Southern Association of Colleges and Employers is a 1,600+ member organization of human resources, college relations, and career services professionals representing employers and universities throughout the southeast.

Name: BIG - Building Intelligence Group
Description:
For anyone curious about how to make buildings more intelligent, more modern, and more efficient, we are a networking and educational nonprofit dedicated to advancing intelligent buildings. We are BIG: Building Intelligence Group.

With events happening every month and hosted by local chapters across the globe, we bring together professionals, ideas, and innovation to move the industry forward. 

To get involved, visit our website for a list of events and connect with your local BIG chapter leaders. Membership is open to anyone; simply bring an open mind and a maybe few business cards.
Location: Greater Minneapolis St. Paul Area, MN

Name: NHAA.est1920
Description:
Incorporated in 1920, the NHAA is the oldest complementary medicine association in Australia. Our roots go back even further than 1920, as we were created by the joining of active associations of the time. We were originally incorporated as the National Herbalists Association of NSW, with the merger of the New South Wales Union of Herbalists and the Medico-Botanic Eclectic Association NSW. In 1952 we became the National Herbalists Association of Australia including all states and territories and simultaneously merging with 2 more active contemporary associations, the Queensland Association of Herbalists and the South Australian Herbal Association.

In 2016 we changed our name to the Naturopaths and Herbalists Association of Australia to reflect and better represent our growing membership base of naturopaths, while protecting our rich history and core practice of Western herbal medicine. It also facilitated better recognition at a national and international level. 

We have a long history in the Complementary Medicine (CM) field and have always set standards and been active at both the political level and at the coal face of clinical practice and education.

Name: MBBI
Description:
Midwest Business Brokers and Intermediaries (MBBI) offers educational meetings, conferences and networking events to assist members in achieving and maintaining the highest levels of professional standards and qualifications. MBBI members are business brokers, M&A intermediaries, investment bankers, attorneys, accountants, SBA lenders, valuation service providers, individual buyers, private equity groups, wealth managers and corporate buyers who collaborate to create the most valuable experience for their respective clients. The united effort ensures the highest standards, ethics and efficiency when buying, funding, and selling small and medium-sized businesses.

MBBI provides DealMart, a valuable database platform that helps to enhance the sale process and expedite business transactions. DealMart provides instant access to available opportunities that members have listed, it enables collaboration on deals and allows members to post information on open deals and opportunities. DealMart contains information regarding the deal specifics, participants and processes involved in the sale and acquisition of businesses. By enhancing the networking value and fostering deal teams, MBBI plays a contributing role in helping to get deals done and improving the quality of the overall process and experience.

Name: OEC
Description:
OEC serves the infrastructure, energy, gas and electricity distribution, and telecommunications sectors. With over 3,000 employees, insightful and reliable energy and infrastructure solutions are provided to clients coast-to-coast.

From concept and design to engineering, comprehensive field and construction services, our integrated solutions deliver excellence on time and on budget, safely and with quality.

Through an unwavering focus on health, safety and the environment, OEC continuously works to ensure the safety of employees, the public we serve and the environment we live in. 

The group of companies include: Trans Power, Primary Engineering & Construction, Planview Utility Services Limited, QSP Geographics, EMB Management, UTS Consultants, Teraflex, El-Con Construction, PVS Contractors, GTel, Oakville Hydro, OEC Renewables, and Golden Horseshoe Metering Systems.

Name: Kompetenzzentrum Berufsbildung

Sie ist Basis für ein lebenslanges Lernen und eröffnet dem Nachwuchs an Fachkräften eine Vielzahl von Berufsperspektiven.
