Name: MyyntiKollektiivi
Description:
Tervetuloa MyyntiKollektiiviin!

MyyntiKollektiivi perustettiin keväällä 2023 muutaman myynnin kehittämisestä innostuneen myyjän toimesta, jotka kyllästyivät siihen, että myyjille ei ole tarjolla riittävästi kiinnostavia tapahtumia ja itsensä kehittämisen mahdollisuuksia.

MyyntiKollektiivi muovautuu yhteisönsä näköiseksi ja haluamme sinut mukaan yhteisön rakentamiseen!

Tarkoituksena on rakentaa myyjänä kehittymisestä ja verkostoitumisesta kiinnostuneiden myyjien yhteisö, joka järjestää tapahtumia ja koulutuksia sekä julkaisee ajankohtaisia sisältöjä. Yhteisön jäsenyys ei maksa mitään ja uutiskirjeen tilaamalla tiedät aina ensimmäisenä uusista tapahtumista, koulutuksista, avoimista työpaikoista sekä myynnin maailman uusista käänteistä.

Name: Britech Plus+ Consulting
Description:
Britech Plus+ Enterprises is a leading business and ISO management systems consulting firm in Nigeria that offers auditing, business advisory services, lean six-sigma deployment, marketing research, project management, recruitment, and training services. Britech Plus+ Enterprises has signed partnership agreements with several international organizations that provide professional ISO standards trainings and certifications. These organizations are:

- PECB: PECB is a certification body that provides education and certification under ISO/IEC 17024 for individuals on a wide range of disciplines, such as information security, privacy and data protection, business continuity, quality and service management, risk management, health and safety, and sustainability. Britech Plus+ Enterprises is a PECB authorized partner that can provide PECB certified training courses, auditing, and certification services in Nigeria¹.
- Cognicert: Cognicert is a certification body that provides education and certification for individuals and organizations on various management systems, such as quality management system based on ISO 9001, environmental management system based on ISO 14001, occupational health and safety management system based on ISO 45001, information security management system based on ISO/IEC 27001, and business continuity management system based on ISO 22301. Britech Plus+ Enterprises is a Cognicert partner that can provide Cognicert certified training courses, auditing, and certification services in Nigeria².
- TRECCERT: TRECCERT is a certification body that provides education and certification for individuals and organizations on various management systems, such as information security management system based on ISO/IEC 27001, general data protection regulation based on (EU)2016/679, business continuity management system based on ISO 22301, IT service management system based on ISO/IEC 20000-1, and social responsibility management system based on ISO 26000.

Name: AMA San Diego
Description:
MISSION

The San Diego chapter of the American Marketing Association (AMA San Diego) is a professional organization that is committed to supporting powerhouse marketers within the San Diego business community. 

VISION

Create and support a knowledgeable and connected community of Marketers in San Diego through expert content and strategic planning. 

POSITIONING

For high-performing marketers who are serious about furthering their careers, AMA San Diego is the only education and networking-focused organization that provides information, resources, an international presence, and valuable connections in a fun, approachable environment where they can achieve their personal development goals.

WHO WE SERVE

AMA San Diego is a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization comprised of mid to senior-level marketers that comprise our diverse, organization. While our content and benefits are aligned to provide empowered integrated brand marketers with career-advancing opportunities, limitless access, and marketing resources, all are welcome to our inclusive, professional organization.

Join us! Learn more: sdama.org

Name: International Mentoring Center
Description: International Mentoring Center (IMC) is the leading global mentoring authority committed to advancing the mentoring profession and education. Description:
The European Association of Science Editors (EASE) is an international community of editors from diverse backgrounds, linguistic traditions and professional experience who share a passion of science and scholarly communication, editing and publishing. Our mission is to improve the global standard and quality of science editing, by promoting the value of science editors and supporting professional development, research, and collaboration. Our many activities centre around these themes.

Name: Asociación Diplomática y Consular de Colombia
Description: Established in 1981, the Diplomatic and Consular Association of Colombia is a professional and non-profit organization, comprised of experts in various areas of knowledge, especially in the fields of Law, Political Science and International Relations. Since its creation, the Diplomatic and Consular Association has maintained a permanent commitment with the strengthening of the Diplomatic and Consular Career and with the protection of the interests and rights of its members in accordance with the Constitution and the Law. The Association brings together more than 200 professionals of the Diplomatic and Consular Career; highly skilled and qualified officials, who represent Colombia in the world, with a strong spirit of service and commitment to the defense of national interests.

Name: Engineering Group of the Geological Society (EGGS)
Description:
"Engineering Geology is the science devoted to the investigation, study and solution of the engineering and environmental problems which may arise as the result of the interaction between geology and the works and activities of man as well as to the prediction and of the development of measures for prevention or remediation of geological hazards." (IAEG statutes, 1992). 

The Engineering Group of the Geological Society (EGGS) is the largest of the Geological Society's Specialist Groups. Since its formation in 1964 EGGS has been the main focus for engineering geology in the UK. EGGS is the UK National Group of the International Association of Engineering Geology and the Environment (IAEG). In the UK EGGS maintains links with learned societies, professional bodies and the Geological Society's Regional and other Specialist Groups.

EGGS represents the Geological Society on The Ground Forum, the umbrella organisation for professional bodies and trade associations in ground engineering. 

EGGS actively supports training and professional development for engineering geologists, both pre- and post- chartership. EGGS organises a full programme of technical meetings and sets up working parties which have lead to a range of Special Publications and technical handbooks.

The Geological Society does not monitor, verify or endorse information submitted for posting on this website and does not guarantee the accuracy, reliability, completeness or usefulness of any information provided. Any information submitted for posting on this website expresses the views of its author and shall not be deemed to express the views of The Geological Society.

Joining this Linkedin group does not infer membership of the Geological Society of London or the Engineering Group of the Geological Society at any level.

Level Up Social Club is a premier professional networking community with over 2,000 members dedicated to building authentic, mutually beneficial business connections. For more than 35 years, The Forum on Workplace Inclusion has brought together cross-sector leaders to learn, connect, and lead change. 

Grounded in listening, shaped by practitioners, and designed to meet the demands of this moment, the forum is now being reimagined as a national platform where inclusion is recognized as essential to business success, innovation, and long-term growth.

Our goal is clear: to have a future-facing platform that connects inclusion to talent strategy, cultural belonging, community impact, and economic opportunity.

Follow us to stay connected as we rebuild and prepare to relaunch in Spring 2026, when we return with a refreshed vision, year-round programming, and a flagship conference.

Name: The Bar Association of Metropolitan St. Louis
Description: The Bar Association of Metropolitan St. Louis (BAMSL), founded in 1874, is a Missouri not-for-profit corporation, the members of which are attorneys principally practicing in the St. Louis metropolitan area. Our mission is to maintain the highest professional standards among attorneys, to enhance the professional competence of attorneys, to improve the administration of justice, to serve the needs of members, and to provide law-related service and education to the public.

Name: Association of Professional Financial Managers of Azerbaijan-APFM
Description:
Association of Professional Financial Managers (APFM) -Professional Accountancy Organization
APFM was established in 2007 and currently is the leading organization of the country with international accreditations and a wide range of experience. Association is a professional accountancy organization, the members of which are professional accountants and financial managers, accredited as "Professional Accountancy Organization" according to the Decision of the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Azerbaijan. APFM is a member of the European Federation of Accountants and Auditors (EFAA) and International Federation of Accountants (IFAC). APFM has an improved organizational structure and a base of experienced professionals (8 Regulatory Committees, International Certification Center, training and methodological staff and Expert Group). APFM experts are also members of the EFAA Accounting EG expert group.
APFM is the official coordinator of Eurasia Forum of Accountants and Auditors in Azerbaijan, which is already become traditional and has achieved the status of event of republic importance. APFM has been the organizer of 7 forums since 2007.
Since 2014, APFM is offering professional membership programs based on international experience. As our main mission is development of accounting profession, through implementation of international standards, we also maintain CPD system and membership processes. 
APFM is an Official Representative of the British Institute of Certified Financial Managers -ICFM in Azerbaijan, APFM organizes trainings and exams on international qualifications.
Beginning from 2013, APFM issue the magazine "FINANSIST" which provides information about the most important financial and economic developments in the world.
The need for accountants to obtain a certificate of professional accountant and membership in a professional organization emphasizes the importance of awareness-raising activities of APFM as a professional accountancy organization.
Location: Baku, Y.V. Chamanzaminli str 1996, Afen plaza, 3rd floor

Name: Big 4 Alumni Perú

Name: de'ge'pol | German Association of Political Consultants
Description:
A rapidly changing society and an ever increasing internationalisation are placing new demands on the profession of political consulting. An increased professionalism and a new sense of the self-understanding of political consulting are required.

Against this background, the de’ge’pol - German Association of Political Consultants - was founded in Berlin on May 25th, 2002. The de’ge’pol is the first association of professional German-speaking political consultants. Members of the association are active in the fields of Public Affairs, campaign consulting and policy consulting in various European countries. They are engaged in agencies, businesses, organisations, parties or independently.

Since its formation, the de’ge’pol gradually advanced to an important contact within its line of business and became the leading association for political consultants in Germany. This is shown by our leading role in the development of criteria for quality management for political consultants as well as an increasing presence in the discussion on transparency within the area of political consulting. Furthermore the de’ge’pol is the partner of the most important associations for political consultants on the European and international level, with whom an active intercommunication takes place.

The de’ge’pol is independent, non-partisan, and is exclusively sustained by honorary work. The members’ convention elects the executive committee for a period of three years. An advisory council with high-ranking members supports the executive committee with the yearly planning and long-term strategic orientation.

Name: Programme Social du Gouvernement de Côte d'ivoire-PSGouv2
Description:
Dans le cadre de sa vision « Côte d’Ivoire 2030 », le Président de la République s’est engagé à placer l’Homme au cœur de l’action de l’Etat. A ce titre, la vision 2030 traduite dans le projet de société «Une Côte d’Ivoire solidaire » est fondée sur des d’objectifs majeurs de développement humain.

Le contrat social qui découle de cet engagement porte sur l’amélioration substantielle des conditions de vie des populations, à travers la réalisation de projets concrets. le Programme Social du Gouvernement (PSGouv 2) s’inscrit dans ce cadre avec pour but de consolider les acquis du PSGouv (2019-2020) et accélérer le rythme de réduction de la pauvreté et des inégalités.

Adopté en Conseil des Ministres le 22 décembre 2021 pour un montant de 3 182,4 milliards de FCFA, le PSGouv2 entend donc être ce véhicule par lequel le Gouvernement renforcera son efficacité dans le domaine social et consolidera les acquis enregistrés, grâce à sa capacité à concevoir, à gérer et à rendre compte de projets ciblés avec des résultats qui affectent positivement la vie des populations, notamment les plus défavorisées.

Ainsi, cette seconde phase s’inscrit dans la continuité de la première, en maintenant le principe de dire ce qui doit être fait, faire ce qui est dit et diffuser ce qui est fait.  Ce triptyque, caractéristique de la gouvernance moderne et de la transparence, constitue au-delà d’un leitmotiv, des éléments fondamentaux qui vont guider l’action du Gouvernement au cours des années à venir durant lesquels le PSGouv2 sera exécuté. 

A travers le PSGouv2, l’objectif du Gouvernement sous la houlette de Son Excellence Monsieur Patrick ACHI, Premier Ministre, Chef du Gouvernement, est de faire en sorte que la programmation, l’exécution, le résultat et la redevabilité vis-à-vis des populations soient renforcés.

Follow us as we prepare for this global event that is taking place in our unique and beautiful country.

Dobrodošli na zvaničnu LinkedIn stranicu EXPO 2027 Belgrade!
Beograd će 2027. godine biti ponosni domaćin specijalizovane EXPO izložbe koja predstavlja Srbiju kao globalni centar za obrazovanje, kulturu, sport, umetnost, muziku i inovacije. Održaće se od 15. maja do 15. avgusta 2027. godine, pod temom „Igraj za čovečanstvo: sport i muzika za sve“, EXPO 2027. obećava da će ujediniti nacije u slavljenju univerzalnih jezika sporta i muzike, naglašavajući njihovu transformativnu moć na globalnom nivou. Name: Deutsches Energieberater-Netzwerk (DEN) e.V.
Description:
DEN – Das Netzwerk für unabhängige Energieberatung, Planung und Nachhaltigkeit

Das Deutsches Energieberater-Netzwerk steht für wirtschaftlich unabhängige, neutrale und qualifizierte Beratung rund um das energieeffiziente Planen, Bauen und Sanieren. Seit 2002 vereinen wir über 1.200 Energieberater:innen, Ingenieur:innen, Architekt:innen, Planungsbüros und Techniker:innen in einem bundesweiten Netzwerk.

Unsere Mitglieder arbeiten an der Schnittstelle von Energieeffizienz, Nachhaltigkeit und Innovation – von der Gebäudeenergieberatung über Energieaudits und Fördermittelberatung bis hin zu ressourcenschonendem Bauen, Mobilitätslösungen und kommunalem Klimaschutz.

Ob Neubau oder Bestand, Quartierskonzepte oder Materialeffizienz: Unsere Stärke liegt in der Unabhängigkeit – unser Ziel ist eine zukunftsfähige, lebenswerte gebaute Umwelt.

Gemeinsam gestalten wir die Energiewende – fachlich fundiert, praxisnah und immer im Sinne von Umwelt, Gesellschaft und Auftraggebenden.

Name: STH
Description:
Le STH est un acteur principal de la gestion des grands flux maritimes, fluviaux, terrestres, ferroviaires et logistiques.

En perpétuelle et étroite relation avec les différentes administrations actives dans le domaine (administration des douanes, des ports, DGCCRF -Direction générale de la concurrence, de la consommation et de la répression des fraudes-, ministère des transports, de l’agriculture, de l’écologie...) le STH est un centre d'action concret pour fédérer et mettre en avant les intérêts généraux des transitaires, des commissionnaires de transport et logisticiens du Havre et de sa région.
Il recueille l’ensemble des problématiques et les retours d’expérience de ses adhérents afin de concourir, avec ses partenaires, à la bonne organisation fonctionnelle de l’ensemble des acteurs portuaires et au rayonnement logistique de la place Havraise.

Le STH est source d’information dans tous les domaines du droit du transport et organise, avec des centres, écoles ou institutions agréés des formations de déclarant en douane et des formations de perfectionnement pour l’ensemble des salariés de notre profession.

Name: HoustonCIO

HoustonCIO is one of 30 chapters in the Inspire Leadership Network, a national membership organization comprised exclusively of CIOs
from public and private businesses, government, education, healthcare, and nonprofit institutions.

HoustonCIO exists to help CIOs thrive in today’s most
challenging C-suite executive role. The chapter regularly
convenes leading CIOs and fosters meaningful relationships
by hosting non-commercial, member-led programs—helping
CIOs gain leadership advantage.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be an Houston-based CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. Since inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Description:

Elle favorise un sentiment d’appartenance pour ses adhérents en les fédérant, en les valorisant tout en agissant pour défendre leurs intérêts.

L’APPA intervient sur des thèmes variés : conseils, assistance technique, information juridique, formation… relatifs à la gestion portuaire. Ces services sont mutualisés.

L’APPA permet une interaction entre ses adhérents et les entreprises privées proposant des produits et services pour les ports de plaisance.

Elle dialogue avec les représentants de l’Etat en régions ainsi elle participe au développement économique, touristique et social de la façade Atlantique. 

Son Conseil d’Administration est composé de 12 membres bénévoles et motivés, prêts à organiser événements spécifiques ou journées techniques adaptés aux besoins de ses adhérents.

Vous l’aurez compris, l’APPA valorise un patrimoine, un savoir-faire !

Name: DIRIGEANTS RESPONSABLES FINISTERE - BRETAGNE
Description:
En 2004, des hommes et des femmes précurseurs se sont réunis autour d’une même volonté : œuvrer concrètement et collectivement à une société meilleure, plus soutenable, plus solidaire, préservant notre patrimoine environnemental, humain et économique, pour s’adapter aux mutations de notre société tout en créant de nouvelles richesses partagées et des emplois ancrés sur le territoire finistérien.

L’association assure la valorisation, la promotion des actions de RSE (Responsabilité Sociétale des Entreprises) conduites par les adhérents dans l'intérêt collectif des membres.
Pour atteindre ces objectifs, elle se fixe comme orientations principales :
•	d’identifier les bonnes pratiques, de favoriser le partage d’expériences, de porter à la connaissance du public et des organisations les actions engagées de façon à apporter une plus-value aux projets de développement  portés par ses membres.
•	de constituer un lieu ressources (actions conduites hors Finistère, recommandations nationales, européennes) par contact avec d’autres réseaux.
•	de susciter, organiser et participer à des débats publics sur des sujets sensibles en rapport avec des démarches RSE.

La raison d’être de notre association est la suivante :
Face à l’urgence environnementale et sociale, les dirigeants finistériens se mobilisent, expérimentent et transforment leurs entreprises pour contribuer à un futur désirable.

Phillipe BIHAN Président du Club

Name: Integrative Oncology Working Group
Description:
The Integrative Oncology Working Group (IOWG) is a global community of cancer care providers dedicated to bridging advancements in surgical, medical, and radiation oncology with evidence-informed integrative care. We combine integrative, functional, lifestyle, and mind-body medicine with cutting-edge conventional treatments to deliver comprehensive, patient-centered cancer care rooted in scientific evidence.

Oncologists often face questions about nutrition, supplements, acupuncture, and lifestyle changes—areas conventional training may not fully address. IOWG provides a credible platform for exploring these topics, ensuring integrative approaches are scientifically grounded and complement conventional therapies.

Since 2020, IOWG has grown from 10 members to a global network of over 2,600 healthcare professionals across 43 countries, including oncologists, primary care physicians, naturopathic oncology, and other specialists—all united by a commitment to advancing integrative oncology.

Looking ahead, IOWG aims to be a trusted, leading hub for whole-person cancer care by integrating advancements in conventional oncology, innovative mind-body techniques, and emerging technologies such as digital tools and precision medicine. We are committed to exploring how novel diagnostics and transformative care models can enhance integrative oncology and improve patient outcomes.

To date, IOWG has hosted over 70 free webinars, fostering education and collaboration among global healthcare professionals. We are excited to launch a beta test of our virtual community platform in a few months to connect members globally for collaboration, education, and resource sharing. Join us and help shape the future of a holistic integrative oncology by subscribing to our email list: https://iowg.myflodesk.com/joinemail.

The views expressed are those of IOWG and do not reflect the views of the Department of Veteran Affairs or the United States Government.

Name: American Corner in Sulaymaniyah
Description:
The American Corner's Program is a United States Department of State-sponsored initiative inaugurated worldwide more than 17 years ago. Since 2004, the U.S. has launched almost 700 American Corners in approximately 70 countries.

The American Corner program has come to the Library of the University of Sulaymaniyah (UOS). The objective of this program is to establish affiliations between Iraqi and U.S. institutions and individuals that promote and facilitate linkages and relationships across a range of fields.

The American Corner at UOS Library exemplifies that by providing a platform for educational programs and access to American print, multimedia, and other materials. It will run speaker and discussion group programs, film presentations, online engagements, and other activities. 



In addition to serving as a general resource center, the Corner serves as a space for cultural programming, supporting English-language teaching/learning, advising about educational opportunities in the United States, and activities that inform and engage Iraqi alumni of U.S. government exchange programs.

Name: Steuerberaterverband Berlin-Brandenburg e.V.
Description:
Gemeinsam steuern!
Im Berufsalltag braucht man wesentlich mehr als eine gute Ausbildung. Besonders wenn es um Steuerberatung oder Wirtschaftsprüfung geht, bekommt niemand einen Fuß auf den Boden, der sich nicht kontinuierlich fortbildet oder Unterstützung von Gleichgesinnten hat. Und genau deshalb gibt es uns: den Steuerberaterverband Berlin-Brandenburg.

Wir sind DER durch die freiwillige Mitgliedschaft legitimierte INTERESSENSVERTRETER der steuerberatenden Berufe in der Region. Wir unterstützen Sie in Ihren Belangen im schönsten Beruf der Welt.

Verband kommt von verbinden: Einer für alle
Im Steuerberaterverband Berlin-Brandenburg haben sich Angehörige der steuerberatenden und wirtschaftsprüfenden Berufe verbunden. Wir haben weit überwiegend Steuerberaterinnen, Steuerberater und Steuerbevollmächtigte, aber auch viele Wirtschaftsprüfer/innen und vereidigte Buchprüfer/innen, sowie etliche Rechtsanwältinnen und Rechtsanwälte, insbesondere Fachanwälte für Steuerrecht, in unseren Reihen.

Warum wir uns verbunden haben? Weil wir berufspolitische Ziele vertreten: gegenüber Senatsverwaltung und Finanzministerium, Finanzämtern und Berufsorganisationen. Weil wir den Nachwuchs fördern und für Fortbildung sorgen: mit regelmäßigen Veranstaltungen, Seminaren und Vorträgen. Weil wir unseren Mitgliedern mit praktischen Hilfen den Berufsalltag erleichtern. Und weil wir mit unserer (für Mitglieder kostenfreien) Jobbörse neue Perspektiven eröffnen. Dies alles lässt sich nur organisieren, wenn man gut verbunden ist.

https://stbverband.de/impressum

Name: CCIJP
Description:
La CCIJP est la commission d’attribution de la carte d’identité des journalistes professionnels en France. C’est une instance paritaire créée par la loi du 29 mars 1935. Elle délivre la « carte de presse » aux postulants qui remplissent les conditions fixées par cette même loi, notamment dans son article L 7111-3 (Code du travail). 
#cartedepresse #CCIJP #journalistes

Name: NextGen Professionals (AY Canada)
Description:
Networking Extravaganza:

Connect with over +550 Canadian professionals, entrepreneurs, and students residing in Toronto.
Foster valuable connections across diverse industries and build a robust professional network.

Insightful Panels and Discussions:
Gain valuable insights from experts in IT, real estate, startups, law, and more.
Engage in discussions on relevant topics, sharing experiences and expertise to inspire personal and professional growth.

email at: hello@albanianyouth.org, apply@albanianyouth.org and partners@albanianyouth.org

Name: Game Changers
Description:
Game Changers is built on the values of Connection, Co-Creation, and Conscious Growth. 

Our mission: to help entrepreneurs play to their potential by mastering both the inner and outer game, powered by a game-changing team. 

Our vision: to build the world’s most values-aligned entrepreneurial community.

Name: International Big Cat Alliance
Description: Strengthening global efforts and partnerships for big cat conservation.

Name: Jeune Chambre de la Mauricie
Description:
Forte de plus de 38 années d’existence, la Jeune Chambre de la Mauricie propose à la communauté d’affaires régionale des opportunités de développement à travers une programmation variée et audacieuse. 

Destinée aux gens d’affaires âgés de 18 à 40 ans, la Jeune Chambre de la Mauricie offre, depuis 1986, bien plus qu'un simple réseau. Elle est devenue un acteur clé dans le développement des professionnels et des entrepreneurs de demain. En inspirant les jeunes à réaliser leurs projets ambitieux, elle crée une véritable effervescence entrepreneuriale.

Sa mission est de générer des opportunités afin de soutenir, développer, rassembler et faire rayonner les jeunes gens d’affaires de la Mauricie.

Name: Žalgiris Group
Description:
ŽALGIRIS GROUP is an organization that unites all companies and brands operating in the structure of Kaunas Zalgiris and Zalgirio arena. Kaunas Zalgiris basketball and football clubs, Zalgirio arena, Zalgirio Honorary Club and the Sala restaurant operating in the arena are elements of a unified organization. We all share the same mission, are guided by the same values and pursue the same strategic goals.

A constantly improving, growing and world-changing sports and leisure organization!

Name: Growth minds
Description: In a world full of one-off networking events, Growth Minds is an institution that helps leaders better understand themselves so they can build a better Europe. Through dinners, trips, education, and mentorship, we create consistent forums designed to push individual leaders to the limits of their personal growth.

Name: Confederação das Associações Económicas de Moçambique - CTA
Slovak PRO
Description:
Slovak PRO is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization that offers professional, cultural, and educational opportunities for the Slovak community in the United States. 

The organization began in 2001 as the Young Slovak Professionals Network and was reborn as Slovak PRO in 2007. What started as small professional meetups has grown into an engaged community of more than 3,000 members who are proud of Slovakia and committed to creating opportunities and connections for their fellow Slovak professionals. 

Beyond organizing professional & networking events, Slovak PRO’s team works to support and engage with other Slovak organizations in their activities in order to build a strong, engaged community of Slovaks around the world.

We value genuine professional connections, access to a trusted network of experts, maintaining an engaged and inclusive community, inspiring pride and support of Slovakia.

Name: Relacionamento com Comunidades
Description:
Para trabalhar com gente é preciso gostar de gente!

Ao longo dos anos, a atuação na área de Relacionamento com Comunidades tem se tornado cada vez mais importante e, portanto, mais relevante no mercado de trabalho. 

Há um aumento significativo de profissionais dedicados a está especialidade e aqui estaremos juntos para o diálogo e crescimento coletivo.

Name: ICMAI Dubai Overseas Centre
Description:
“Behind Every Successful Business Decision, there is always a CMA”

ICAI/CMA (The Institute of Cost Accountants of India) is professional body of Cost and Management accountants with over 89,000 fully-qualified members and 680,000 students worldwide.

Our Vision & Mission are as follows: 

Vision Statement:
"The Institute of Cost Accountants of India would be the preferred source of resources and professionals for the financial leadership of enterprises globally."

Mission Statement:
"The Cost and Management Accountant professionals would ethically drive enterprises globally by creating value to stakeholders in the socio-economic context through competencies drawn from the integration of strategy, management and accounting."

The Institute of Cost Accountants of India was first established in 1944 as a registered company under the Companies Act with the objects of promoting, regulating and developing the profession of Cost Accountancy.
On 28th May, 1959, the Institute was established by a special act of Parliament, namely, the Cost and Works Accountants Act, 1959 as a statutory professional body for the regulation of the profession of cost and management accountancy.

Its members are working worldwide in SMEs, MNCs, as Cost & Management Accountants, Financial Managers/Controllers, CFOs, and CEOs, continuously contributing for the growth of the industrial and economic climate of that country.

CMA Dubai Overseas Centre, UAE is established in 2015 and officially registered in 2022. The prime objective of this Overseas Centre is to contribute on the development of Cost & Management Accounting profession in the region. This Center is committed to provide the professional development and liaising support to its members and students in the region.

Name: Occupational Safety and Health Professionals Nepal-OSHPN
Description:
Occupational Safety and Health (OSH) is the interdisciplinary sector with multidimensional origin and its goal is directed in fostering a safe and healthy work environment in Nepal. The scope defines three major sectors, 1) government, 2) the industries/ employers and 3) the workforce/trade unions. The organization will believe on professional, progressive and productive (3P) integrity and always emphasized on their contribution with high moral, ethical and socially responsible and inspire them to serve as an active practitioner for national development. The organization will always maintain and promotes its core value Independent, Integrity, Trusty, Cooperative and Transparency. The organization will function in close cooperation and coordination with the government sectors, non-government organizations and corporate sector in Nepal as well as other similar interest groups. This organization will base on a firm foundation of the Code of Ethics and Professional Conduct. 
2. Objectives 
•To organize OSH professionals for the protection of their rights and ethical value.    
•To contribute for strengthening and establishing OSH issues into the priority of the concern stakeholders at three tier (Central, Province and Local level) and all economic/industrial sectors through advisory services in respect to policy, education and implementation.
•To develop professional cooperation and collaboration among the relevant national and international organizations (GOs, NGOs, Academia, Private Sector, Trade Unions, Development Partners, International agencies).  
•To work and contribute towards establishing certification systems for professionals based on the education, experiences, skill and efforts.  
•To organize capacity building, advocacy and promote competence-based activity for OHS professionals through various means such as education, campaign, research, seminars for all concerns. 
•To work for developing harmonic relation among all the organizations and professionals.

Name: RENEW MENA
Description:
The RENEW-MENA initiative aims to directly support female entrepreneurs and other actors in the clean energy market ecosystem in the Middle East and North Africa Region. 

Our goal is to boost women’s role in energy by harnessing the recognized potential of women professional networks to access role models, provide and receive mentorship, build confidence, and create safe spaces. The initiative has three pillars, focusing on:

1. The transition from STEM education to work
2. Recruitment, retention, and advancement
3. Entrepreneurship and financial inclusion with a focus on renewables and new technology

RENEW MENA is a program & network hosted by the World Bank and it is supported by ESMAP.

Name: Athletic Equipment Managers Association
Description:
The purpose of the Athletic Equipment Managers Association (AEMA) is to promote, advance, and improve the Equipment Managers Profession in all of its many phases. One goal is to work as a group to bring about equipment improvements for the greater safety of all participants in sports and recreation. Members of the AEMA enjoy the opportunity to meet fellow equipment managers at convention, share ideas, and learn more efficient techniques to help improve their work place.

AEMA Certification is an educational program that gives athletic equipment managers an accepted level of proficiency in the performance of their jobs. Scantron Corporation is contracted with the Athletic Equipment Manager’s Association (AEMA) to develop a Certification Standard for Athletic Equipment Management. Through a role delineation process, the following areas of job performance were identified for athletic equipment managers: Management, Administration, and Professional Development; Procurement; Accountability; Maintenance; Fitting and Safety.

Name: Union Portuaire Rouennaise
Description:
L'Union Portuaire Rouennaise (UPR) est une association loi 1901, créée en 1927 qui a pour objectif de promouvoir le port de Rouen, sa compétitivité et son  avenir ; connaître, défendre ou combattre toute question le mettant en cause.

L’UPR regroupe près de 130 entreprises :
- Des armateurs, des consignataires de navires, des agents maritimes,
- Des organisateurs de transport, des représentants en douane,
- Des manutentionnaires.

L’UPR les fédère et assure en externe la défense et la promotion de leurs intérêts à l’égard de leur environnement, qu’il soit :
- Économique (CCI, établissements publics divers, SNCF, VNF …),
- Administratif, (Douanes, Affaires maritimes, Police de l’Air et des Frontières, DREAL, GPMR …),
- Ou politique (villes, départements, région, État, UE …).

L’UPR propose en outre à ses adhérents différents services :
- Ressources humaines,
- Conditions de travail,
- Informatique portuaire,
- Analyse et prise en charge des dossiers sectoriels.

Name: Entrepreneurship & Career Development Society of NotreDamians
Description:
ESND, the Entrepreneurship & Career Development Society of NotreDamians, is a community focused on empowering individuals to enhance their career prospects, skills and develop entrepreneurial mindsets, providing supports and resources.

Mission: Guiding and empowering youth by providing career guidance, fostering entrepreneurial skills, and inspiring young entrepreneurs.

Vision: Building a strong-influential-vibrant community-network and cooperative platform that fosters innovation, collaboration, and growth among NotreDamians.

Motto: Ignite, Innovate and Inspire.

Functions:
-Supporting & promoting NotreDamian entrepreneurs.
-Building up entrepreneurial mindsets and spirits among youths.
-Sharing professional advice and guidance about career life by experts.
-Arranging events, sessions, seminars, bootcamps, and workshops for youths to unleash their latent potential and make them skilled in different sectors.
-Building strong networks and close ties between companies, campuses and alumnies.

নটরডেমিয়ানদের মধ্যে প্রফেশনাল নেটওয়ার্কিং বৃদ্ধি করাই এই কমিউনিটির প্রধান লক্ষ্য। এটি ক্যারিয়ার ডেভেলপমেন্ট ও উদ্যোক্তা বিষয়ক বিভিন্ন সেশন-সেমিনার-ওয়ার্কশপ-বুটক্যাম্প আয়োজনের পাশাপাশি দেশে বিদেশে অবস্থানরত, সরকারি-বেসরকারি, কর্পোরেট-নন কর্পোরেট, শিক্ষক-শিক্ষার্থী নটরডেমিয়ানদের মতামত বিনিময়, কর্মক্ষেত্রের অভিজ্ঞতা বর্ণন, বিভিন্ন সেক্টরের সুযোগ সুবিধা, বিদেশে উচ্চ-শিক্ষা, বিদেশ বাণিজ্য সহ সকল সাইডের সাহায্য সহযোগিতার কমিউনিটি প্ল্যাটফর্ম। এছাড়াও নটরডেমিয়ান যারা বিভিন্ন বিজনেস বা সেবার সাথে সংশ্লিষ্ট রয়েছেন তাঁরা তাদের প্রোমোশনাল বিভিন্ন ইভেন্টও আয়োজন করতে পারবেন।

Name: IIA Bolivia
Description:
The Institute of Internal Auditors (IIA), con sede en Altamonte Springs – Florida – USA, es líder de la profesión de auditoría interna en cuanto a estándares, certificación, educación, investigación y orientación técnica en todo el mundo.

El Instituto de Auditoría Interna y Gobierno Corporativo "IIA Bolivia" es una afiliada autorizada por el IIA, que le permite trabajar bajo el alcance de estándares internacionales emitidos por el IIA, contando con pleno acceso a guías profesionales, herramientas, recursos y la capacidad de colaborar con socios locales en el desarrollo y la capacitación para los auditores internos que aspiran a lograr certificaciones de auditoría interna reconocidas a nivel mundial, como el “CIA”. 

Nuestro principal objetivo es el de promover un liderazgo dinámico para la profesión de Auditoría Interna en Bolivia por medio de una orientación técnica permanente a nuestros miembros, programas de formación profesional actualizados, oportunidades de desarrollo continuo, networking, con el fin de mejorar sus competencias y así puedan agregar mayor valor en sus organizaciones.

Name: Commonwealth Chemistry
Description:
We are the Federation of Commonwealth Chemical Sciences Societies – or simply, Commonwealth Chemistry.

Bound together in the spirit of the Commonwealth, we champion equal opportunity for all, drive innovation, and promote excellence in the chemical sciences for the benefit of the Commonwealth nations and their people.

The organisation was formally set up in 2020 and is led by an Executive Board of senior representatives from across the Commonwealth. It is headed by President Professor Neil Coville and supported by the Secretariat.

Commonwealth Chemistry and its member societies are governed by the Articles of Association and Rules of the organisation.

Name: Corporate Eco Forum (CEF)
Description: Corporate Eco Forum (CEF) is an invitation-only forum for senior executives representing large, influential companies that demonstrate a serious commitment to sustainability as core to business strategy. With combined revenues of over $5.5 trillion, member companies span all major industries and have a global presence. CEF empowers its members to deliver a sustainable future by cultivating a high-trust, neutral space for candid, closed-door, peer-to-peer discussions that catalyze meaningful connections, focused insights, and bold action.

Name: Grand Bureau
Description:
Grand Bureau est le réseau des professionnel·les des musiques actuelles en Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes.
Issu de la fusion de quatre réseaux existants (FEPPRA, GRADA, GRAL, TAGADA TSOIN TSOIN), Grand Bureau a été créé en octobre 2016 et rassemble plus de 150 adhérent·es de toute la filière musicale régionale.
L’association est un espace de concertation et de rassemblement, d’échanges d’expériences, de sensibilisation et d’information pour et par ses adhérent·es. Ses objectifs principaux sont de :
• Favoriser et soutenir la création artistique dans le secteur musical sur le territoire
• Donner un cadre de coopération aux professionnel·les des musiques actuelles
• Accompagner et structurer les acteurs et actrices du secteur
• Représenter la filière des musiques actuelles à un niveau régional et national
Ses activités se développent autour de quatre axes forts :
• La coopération : pour travailler collectivement au développement des politiques culturelles locales, régionales et nationales dans différents espaces de concertation
• L’accompagnement : pour rendre visible la diversité des pratiques sur le territoire régional, mutualiser les connaissances des membres et favoriser le repérage artistique
• La sensibilisation : pour trouver ensemble des solutions face aux risques auditifs, face aux violences sexuelles et sexistes dans le milieu de la musique, face aux questions d’écologie et les problématiques sociétales qui impactent nos pratiques
• La ressource : pour diffuser au plus grand nombre toutes les informations du secteur sur tous les pans de nos métiers liés aux musiques actuelles

L’association est pilotée par un conseil d’administration composé de seize personnes garantes de la diversité de la filière, d’un bureau composé de sept personnes et d’une équipe salariée de cinq personnes.

Name: GPTI - Grupo de Profissionais de TI
Description:
O GPTI (Grupo de Profissionais de Tecnologia da Informação) é uma plataforma inovadora e dinâmica de iniciativa privada que visa ser o epicentro da transformação tecnológica no Brasil.

Além disso, somos muito mais do que uma comunidade de profissionais de TI, somos uma rede dedicada a fomentar o crescimento e fortalecer a colaboração na área de Tecnologia da Informação.

Name: BostonCIO
Description:
BostonCIO is one of 40+ chapters in the Inspire Leadership Network, a national membership organization comprised exclusively of CIOs
from public and private businesses, government, education, healthcare, and nonprofit institutions.

BostonCIO exists to help CIOs thrive in today’s most
challenging C-suite executive role. The chapter regularly
convenes leading CIOs and fosters meaningful relationships
by hosting non-commercial, member-led programs—helping
CIOs gain leadership advantage.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a New England-based CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. Since its inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: ISHRAE Mumbai Chapter
Description:
BACKGROUND

The Indian Society of Heating, Refrigerating and Air Conditioning Engineers (ISHRAE), was founded in 1981 at New Delhi by a group of eminent HVAC&R professionals. ISHRAE membership count stands at over 25000 which includes both regular and student members. ISHRAE operates from 61 chapters and subchapters including 6 international chapters, with HQ in Delhi. It is led by a team of elected officers, who are members of the Society, working on a voluntary basis, and collectively called the Board of Governors.

MISSION

To promote the goals of the Society for the benefit of the general public. Towards this objective, the Chapters of the Society participate in, and organize, activities to protect the Environment, improve Indoor Air Quality, help Energy Conservation, provide continuing education to the Members and others in the HVAC & related user Industries and offer certification programs, career guidance to students at the local colleges and tertiary institutions.

AIMS & OBJECTIVES

Advancement of the Arts and Sciences of Heating, Ventilation, Air Conditioning and Refrigeration Engineering and Related Services.
Continuing education of Members and other interested persons in the said sciences through Lectures, Workshops, Product Presentations, Publications and Expositions.
Rendition of career guidance and financial assistance to students of the said sciences.
Encouragement of scientific research.

Name: Fédération Française des Musicothérapeutes
Description:
La Fédération Française des Musicothérapeutes représente les musicothérapeutes et leurs pratiques dans l'intérêt et la sécurité des patients.

Elle développe des relations avec les pouvoirs publics et les acteurs de la santé en France. Elle offre à ses adhérents un ensemble d'offres pour les accompagner dans leur pratique professionnelle.

Elle travaille, entre autres, en partenariat avec @FranceParkinson, @Cairn.info, @Fuzeau et la @SACEM.

Elle est adhérente à la NPIS.

Name: Ordre des dentistes du Québec
Description: About the Ordre des dentistes du Québec: The Ordre des dentistes du Québec represents over 4,975 dentists. Its mission is to ensure the quality of dental services by maintaining high professional and ethical standards, and to promote oral health among Quebecers.

Name: GrowedIn Group
Description:
GrowedIn Group is a portfolio of companies built around one clear mission — to help ambitious people create meaningful impact through better systems, sharper thinking, and teams they trust.

Every company in the group reflects our belief that long-term success isn’t accidental. It’s the result of consistent clarity, world-class execution, and environments where people love what they do.

From personal branding to digital growth, we build with precision and operate with purpose. Our companies run independently but share one cultural code: high standards, no shortcuts, and respect for craft.

Current Companies:

 GrowedIn — Personal branding and thought leadership for founders, executives, and teams on LinkedIn.
 GrowedIn Digital — A performance-first marketing agency that helps brands grow with focus and execution.

Name: IFFA - International Federation of Football Agents
Description:
IFFA serve as a unified voice for agents, advocating for fair regulations, promoting ethical practices, and creating opportunities for collaboration and growth in the football industry. Our goal is to strengthen agent representation in player, coach, and club transfers while ensuring agents stay informed and connected in an ever-evolving football landscape.

Become a Member of IFFA

Complete the registration form: https://mailchi.mp/cbbc1e8efb95/iffa

After submitting the form, email a screenshot of your FIFA Agent Licence to info@thefootballweek.org to complete your application.

Join us in shaping the future of football representation.

Name: Transition Emploi Retraite
Description:
Transition Emploi Retraite est né d un constat : trop peu d actifs gèrent leur fin de carrière et prépare leur projet de nouvelle vie de retraités. 

 Notre solution est dédiée à tous les actifs qui souhaitent avoir une fin de carrière en beauté.

 Comment maintenir sa motivation, sa santé, son engagement et le
Sens de sa vie sur les dernières années de sa carrière professionnelle ? 
 Savoir transmettre son capital savoir, 
 Envisager son avenir en Réalisant une introspection : mettre à jour ses envies et comprendre comment mettre à profit tous ses talents. 
 Donner du sens et de l utilité  à sa vie 
 Protéger sa santé physique, intellectuelle et morale, 
 Apprendre à gérer son nouveau timing,
Autant de questions essentielles lorsque l’on termine un cycle de vie pour en débuter un nouveau. Lorsque l’ on quitte des repères pour ouvrir un nouveau chapitre plein de nouvelles libertés inconnues. 

L ‘ Anticiper, la préparer, l’ envisager.. c est s’ apporter de la
Sérénité et réduire les écueils et les risques lies à cette phase de destabilisation. 

 Notre réseau national de Coachs de proximité, 
 notre programme sur mesure de 24h qui vous accompagne jusqu’à 12 mois après votre départ,
 Notre plateforme qui vous informe, vous gâte en contenus (ateliers, Tito, infos, conférence…). Vous donne accès à toute l info dont vous avez besoin ! 

 Sensibiliser est notre devoir.
Mais vous aussi, DIRIGEANTS, DRH, responsables CSE, RSE, QVT… collaborateurs et mêmes enfants de futurs actifs à la retraite, nous sommes tous concernés par ce sujet. Parce que nous avons tous autour de nous des exemples de personnes qui ont mal vécu cette période de vie. 

 Aujourd’hui, s’octroyer une pause et se faire accompagner est une solution sereine. Faites ce bilan de carrière et offrez vous une nouvelle vie en première class !

Name: Psychological Association of the Philippines (PAP)
Description:
Founded in 1962, the Psychological Association of the Philippines is an organization committed to the promotion of excellence in the teaching, research, and practice of Psychology, and its recognition as a scientifically-oriented discipline for human and social development.

To date, the organization is composed of eight major divisions representing the key areas in the practice of psychology in the Philippines. These divisions are as follows:   Assessment Psychology, Clinical Psychology, Counseling Psychology, Developmental Psychology, Educational Psychology, Industrial-Organizational Psychology, Social Psychology, and Teaching Psychology.

Name: EthicsGO
Description:
EthicsGO è  il primo organismo di verifica e validazione dei claim etici e sostenibili riconosciuto da Accredia. 
*** Oggetto della certificazione 
𝗖𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗶𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗜𝗠 Sustainability Programme è il progetto che contraddistingue lo schema di valutazione della conformità di EthicsGO in linea con la Certificazione UNI ISO TS 17033 - Ethical claims and supporting information -, nel rispetto dell’ultima versione della circolare interpretativa di Accredia.

𝗖𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗶𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗜𝗠 è un progetto unico ed innovativo che ha ottenuto il riconoscimento da parte di Accredia.
Oggetto della certificazione sono i claim etici sotto il profilo dei tre pilastri per lo sviluppo sostenibile: ambientale, sociale ed economico.

𝗖𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗶𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗜𝗠 permette di comprendere non solo le opportunità di comunicazione ma anche la differenza tra asserzione, dichiarazione e promessa rispetto a semplici espressioni o aggettivazioni, per nulla distintive, e che per loro natura non sono certificabili. 

***Finalità di 𝗖𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗶𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗜𝗠 Sustainability Programme
La tutela del consumatore e dell'impresa a garanzia di una reale trasparenza e assoluta veridicità delle caratteristiche di eticità di prodotto, processo, servizio ed organizzazione vantate dal claim.

***Iter di Certificazione 
Il richiedente deve inviare il claim da certificare, la forma grafica e simbolica della comunicazione e il media sul quale è diffuso (labelling, video, web, TV ...) , attraverso il form presente sul sito
︎︎︎
http://www.ethicsgo.com/ita/content/richiedi-un-parere-1

Name: Canadian Massage and Manual Osteopathic Therapists Association
Description:
With Strong Hands, Strong Hearts, and Strong Minds we Provide Professional Association Services for Massage Therapists in unregulated provinces in Canada, for Massage/Spa Practitioners in regulated provinces in Canada and for Manual Osteopathic Therapists in Canada from coast to coast to coast. 
Since our beginnings as a completely volunteer driven organization, we have grown to the place of providing a fully operational office and staff that can be reached during regular business hours. This has allowed us to increase service to both members and prospective members and frees up our volunteers to promote the benefits of the Canadian Massage and Manual Osteopathic Therapists Association to the public and future members.
Our governing Board of Directors is elected by our membership, from within our members, and is responsible for policy adoption and revision as necessary, oversight of all financial matters and oversight of all committees struck by the Board.
Our association is active on several internal and external committees at the federal, provincial, and municipal levels of government. We are one of 4 associations that represent massage therapists recognized by Alberta Health and Wellness.
Massage Therapists with membership in the Canadian Massage and Manual Osteopathic Therapists Association are automatically recognized by health insurance companies, as we do not accept massage therapist members with less than 2200 hours of training from a recognized school, nor do we recognize experience in lieu of education.
Manual Osteopathic Therapists with membership in the Canadian Massage and Manual Osteopathic Therapists Association are recognized by a growing number of health insurance companies as we do not accept Manual Osteopathic Therapists with less than 1000 hours of training in a WHO Type II program from a recognized school, nor do we recognize experience in lieu of education.
Our members practice nationwide in Canada from coast to coast to coast.

Name: Eurachem
Description:
Eurachem is a network of organisations in Europe with the objective of establishing a system for the international traceability of chemical measurements and the promotion of good quality practices. 

Eurachem provides a forum for the discussion of common problems and for developing an informed and considered approach to both technical and policy issues. It provides a focus for analytical chemistry and quality related issues in Europe.

Name: Engineers Australia Northern Division (NT)
Description:
With approximately 1000 members in the Northern Territory, we are the representatives of our engineering profession in the Northern Division Committee. 

Not all leaders are engineers, but we believe all engineers are leaders. 

Our collective mission is to advance society through great engineering and we do this through leadership of the profession, supporting pathways into engineering, advocacy for engineering led solutions of the problems facing the Northern Territory, an effective volunteer network, and supporting a strong professional framework. 


This page/group is office bearer/volunteer built and run by local Territorian engineers. This is not the official page of Engineers Australia and is
not moderated or managed by Engineers Australia employees.

Description:

Founded in 2009, WGCN has grown to more than 2,000 members across the United States, Canada and overseas. Our commitment to serving members extends through regional subgroups and additional niche subgroups, each designed to address distinct interests and expertise.

Joining WGCN is free and available to women in-house lawyers with at least eight years of legal practice experience, serving in the highest legal position in an organization, other than in a law firm.

Experience the advantages of being part of an authentic and trusted community of General Counsel and apply to join today: https://wgcn.net/wgcn-membership/

The pillars of our community are to provide support for personal growth, education for professional growth, and opportunities for career growth.

We support and advocate for pharmacy professionals to join their state organizations and national organizations.

Name: CPME Côte-d'Or
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page officielle de la Confédération des Petites et Moyennes Entreprises de Côte-d'Or, une organisation patronale interprofessionnelle représentative au niveau national, engagée au service des TPE-PME.

À la CPME, nous sommes dévoués à soutenir, défendre et promouvoir les intérêts de toutes les entreprises, qu'elles évoluent dans le secteur du commerce, de l'industrie, des services ou de l'artisanat. Notre mission est claire : dialoguer directement avec les pouvoirs publics, participer activement aux instances de concertation officielles dans les domaines sociaux et économiques, et proposer des solutions constructives pour renforcer le tissu entrepreneurial.

Nous sommes convaincus qu'un projet centré sur l'humain est essentiel pour l'avancement général. Notre mouvement rassemble des chefs d'entreprise adhérents et militants, tous engagés dans la défense des intérêts des entreprises patrimoniales.

 Rejoignez-nous pour être au cœur de la croissance et du développement local, et ensemble, bâtissons un avenir plus solide pour les TPE-PME.

Description: The Outsourcing Institute, now part of The Digital Enterprise Institute, was the world’s largest professional association dedicated solely to outsourcing. Name: SAIMechE
Description:
The South African Institution of Mechanical Engineering (SAIMechE) is the senior body representing the discipline of mechanical engineering in South Africa. It covers all fields of application as diverse as automobile, energy generation, process engineering, heavy manufacture, design, management, research, mining and education. 

SAIMechE is a voluntary association of Mechanical Engineers, Technologists and Technicians that have access to various grades of membership and the associated benefits. SAIMechE celebrated its centenary in 1992, marking the event with a number of valuable activities.

To serve the interests and needs of its members and of the Mechanical Engineering Community, and to promote the continued supply of appropriate and sufficient Mechanical Engineering skills to meet the nation’s needs, thereby enhancing the competitiveness of local industry to the benefit of all. In addition, the SAIMechE motto is ‘Scientia Progredimur’ – By Knowledge We Advance.

Name: Schweizerische Zahnärzte-Gesellschaft

Gut für die Zahnärzteschaft und alle Patientinnen und Patienten.

Die Schweizerische Zahnärzte-Gesellschaft SSO vereint als Berufs- und Standesorganisation die in der Schweiz tätigen Zahnärztinnen und Zahnärzte. Wir vertreten unsere Mitglieder gegenüber Behörden und Tarifpartnern und sind die allgemeine wissenschaftliche Gesellschaft für Zahnmedizin in der Schweiz.

Mobile Growth Association (MGA) is a global leader dedicated to the professional and business growth of the mobile industry. As mobile technology is central to our daily lives, MGA provides its community with the tools, knowledge, and networking opportunities to thrive in this fast-evolving ecosystem.

MGA hosts a series of online and in-person events focused on app marketing, mobile growth, user acquisition, retention, and monetization. We educate on best practices, tackle industry trends, and predict future developments in mobile technology. Our global community includes app marketers, app developers, app product development professionals, mobile entrepreneurs, investors, and leaders who are passionate about growing their apps, businesses, and careers.

2.  We educate first-time founders through "Startup Study Halls" and first-time funders through "Startup Investing 101" programming.  

3.  We create community through our Meetups which allow attendees to connect with experienced executives and fellow budding entrepreneurs.

5.  We believe that diversity is a competitive advantage. Anyone (men included) who has a passion for startups and investing is invited to become a member and participate in our programs and events.

Name: ARIA Sud
Description:
Membre de l’Ania (Association nationale des industries alimentaires), l’Association régionale des industries alimentaires (Aria) de la région Sud Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur est au service de la compétitivité des entreprises, du développement de l’emploi et de la conquête de nouveaux marchés. 

Créée en 1989 par des industriels de la région Sud Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur sous le nom de Fédération régionale des industries agroalimentaires (Friaa), l’Aria Sud est une des Aria les plus anciennes de France. Elle fédère plus de 250 entreprises sur ce territoire et favorise le développement du tissu alimentaire régional par un travail en réseau et une offre de services adaptés.

DallasCIO exists to help CIOs thrive in today’s most
challenging C-suite executive role. The chapter regularly
convenes leading CIOs and fosters meaningful relationships

CIOs gain leadership advantage.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a North Texas-based CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. Since inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: The PMO Strategy and Execution Hub
Description:
PMO is not a bureaucratic layer. It’s not a collection of tools.
It is a strategic partner — one that drives execution, shapes delivery, and evolves alongside technology and organizational complexity.

At the PMO Strategy & Execution Hub, we explore what happens when innovation, AI, and high-agency thinking are brought to the center of how organizations execute.

We examine the rise of the Chief Project Officer, the future of portfolio design, and the redefinition of delivery leadership in fast-shifting environments.

We bring together program and portfolio leaders, project managers, and those stepping into leadership roles — to exchange thinking, frameworks, and real-world experiments.
We also attract contributors and enthusiasts who don’t need a title to bring ideas that cut through noise.

Volunteers are welcome — especially those who think independently and act without waiting to be managed.
This is a space for proactive minds: to test ideas, expand your portfolio through live experiments, and take part in a working lab where strategy, execution, and innovation converge.

Where strategy meets execution — and innovation takes form.

Name: The Institute of Commercial Forensic Practitioners (ICFP)
Description:
Cohering and regulating South Africa’s commercial forensic industry is relevant to all major role-players and stakeholders both interested in and involved in addressing commercial crime and other forms of abuse in the commercial environment.

In the last 20 years the commercial environment has changed significantly, it is now characterised by complex business dealings worth staggering amounts of money and increasingly sophisticated systems. These changes continue to introduce new risks as criminals are quick to exploit loop-holes and gaps in latest technologies and systems. 

Commercial crime (and other exploitation of the commercial environment) results in large-scale losses with millions and even billions being lost.
Particular expertise and services have developed to combat new risks, crimes and other types of abuse. It is out of this need that a distinct and recognised line of work has evolved:
practitioners who detect and deter commercial crime and other forms of exploitation of commercial systems.

This focus or line of work forms the basis of a new industry (the commercial forensic industry) which up to now has been largely undefined and fragmented. Although this line of work is not new, the recognition of a marked out (delineated) and focused industry is a relatively new development. The commercial forensic industry is now recognised both locally and abroad and encompasses a wide range of professionals, each with unique and clearly distinguishable knowledge, skills and experience.
Increasingly major role players, at the forefront of developing the necessary expertise and services to combat exploitation of the commercial environment, have recognised the need to build, nurture and regulate the commercial forensic industry (the industry).

It is with this in mind, that leading professionals in the industry met in August 2007 to discuss the need to cohere and regulate South Africa’s commercial forensic industry.

El Colegio Oficial de Ingenieros Técnicos Industriales de Valencia y Graduados en Ingeniería (COGITI Valencia) es una Corporación de Derecho Publico encargada de la ordenación del ejercicio de nuestra profesión. 

Su principal fin es la representación de sus colegiados ante las administraciones públicas, instituciones y colectivos de toda índole. Asimismo, se encarga de la defensa de los intereses profesionales de sus titulados en el ámbito de sus competencias profesionales, así como de los intereses de los clientes, asegurando el cumplimiento de la ética profesional y del Código Deontológico de la Ingeniería Técnica Industrial.

Name: Association of Science Communicators
Description:
ASC is a non-profit organization that seeks to empower and inspire the science communication community to expand their communication potential and affect the world. We promote responsible practices in science communication, facilitate discussion and exchange of ideas, enable networking, and foster public engagement.

We serve science communication practitioners, which we define as anyone who engages in science communication and outreach, and science communication facilitators, defined as professional communicators who train others, convene groups, and otherwise make up the professional science communication community.

Each year we organize an conference where scientists, journalists, politicians, students, and anyone who loves science can convene and share their expertise. This gathering offers networking opportunities, instructional workshops, and presentations on how to better communicate science to..."everyone."

Name: Minutes of Manager
Description: Minutes of Manager is a community & third space for manager and emerging professionals to learn, collaborate, connect & grow

Name: WITSEND Community
Description:
WITSEND is a professional network for women in leadership in digital or tech companies or in sectors being disrupted by tech. 

We host live events and zoom calls - on topics from managing hybrid cultures to the impact of generative AI and from leading authentically to raising capital - connect people with Board-level opportunities and introduce women to each other to share notes and support each other through the highs and lows of their careers. 

The link to apply to join is witsend.online/apply-to-join

The WITSEND community was originally established in 2016 by 9 women CEOs in the digital and media space in the UK, who found it powerful, energising and fun to share notes and support each other. The membership now includes CEOs, leaders, founders, investors, academics and non-execs across multiple industries and multiple countries, including the UK, Europe and the US

Name: PEF Community
Description: A global community of post-exit founders supporting each other on life’s endless journey to find purpose, fulfillment, and meaning.

Name: Alliance des Mobilités
Description:
19ème métier de MOBILIANS (ex CNPA), l'Alliance des Mobilités représente et fédère les entrepreneurs du secteur des nouvelles mobilités et du service de l'automobile depuis 2019.


 Par un accompagnement sur-mesure dans leurs démarches ainsi que le maintien d'un dialogue permanent avec les décideurs publics et les métiers traditionnels de l'automobile, l'Alliance des Mobilités œuvre quotidiennement pour fournir à ses adhérents un cadre favorable au développement de leur activité.

Name: AnimFrance
Description:
AnimFrance est un syndicat exclusivement dédié au secteur de la production audiovisuelle et cinématographique d'animation, à l'origine de la négociation de la première Convention Collective Nationale de la production de Films d'Animation. 
Créé en 1989 par quelques productrices et producteurs pionniers du genre, le syndicat fédère aujourd’hui plus de 70 sociétés de production déléguée et studios de fabrication installés sur l’ensemble du territoire, qui représentent 96% de la masse salariale du secteur. 
Citia et le Pôle Image Magelis, pôles de développement économique territoriaux, sont membres associés du Syndicat. 
Dans une démarche permanente de dialogue avec l'ensemble de ses partenaires (auteurs, réalisateurs, techniciens, scénaristes, étudiants, écoles, institutions, diffuseurs, distributeurs), AnimFrance poursuit son action au service du développement de l'écosystème artistique et économique de l'Animation sur l’ensemble du territoire français, soucieux de la diversité créative du genre, engagé pour l'égalité des chances, pour la parité, pour la lutte contre toute forme de harcèlement et de discrimination, et pour définir et mettre en œuvre des alternatives industrielles écoresponsables pour la filière. 
AnimFrance assure également à l’ensemble de ses membres un accompagnement juridique et social, ainsi que des occasions régulières d’informations et d’échanges par la tenue de commissions mensuelles ainsi que d’évènements à l’occasion des grandes manifestations du secteur.

Name: Geological Society of Australia
Description:
The GSA is a broadly based professional society that aims to represent all Earth Science disciplines. This diversity is one of the great strengths of the Society.

The aims of the GSA are to:
1- Promote the understanding and importance of Earth Science, and the status of Earth Scientists
2- Influence decision-making processes to support geoscience education, research and employment
3- Provide professional development opportunities
Communicate with and inform the Earth Science community
4- Practise good governance and management.
