Name: American Association of Municipal Executives
Description: A community that supports, develops, and advocates on behalf of city managers and public sector executives.

Name: Linkejuntas Perú
Description:
Desde 2018, Linkejuntas se ha establecido como una comunidad profesional líder en networking y colaboración en Perú. Nuestros miembros son profesionales, expertos y referentes (Top Voice) de LinkedIn que buscan construir y cultivar relaciones estratégicas de alto valor.  

En Linkejuntas, el networking y la colaboración son pilares fundamentales para el crecimiento profesional y empresarial. Organizamos encuentros presenciales, como juntas de café y eventos de networking, en un ambiente positivo que fomenta: El establecimiento de contactos de calidad, el crecimiento de la marca personal y la creación de oportunidades para tu carrera o negocio. 

Si cuentas con un perfil activo en LinkedIn, ya has dado el primer paso para unirte a nosotros. Te invitamos a ser parte de Linkejuntas!

Name: UIMM CHAMPAGNE ARDENNE
Description:
Droit du travail, convention collective de la métallurgie, formation et recrutement dans l’industrie, qualité, sécurité, environnement…
l’UIMM Champagne-Ardenne dispose de spécialistes à Reims, Charleville-Mézières, Troyes et Saint-Dizier. En permanence à votre écoute, ils apportent des solutions adaptées et concrètes.

En étant adhérent de l’UIMM Champagne-Ardenne, vous bénéficiez du soutien d’une organisation patronale historique et reconnue pour le développement de votre entreprise industrielle.

Notre réseau de proximité et de confiance vous garantit une offre de services sur-mesure pour vous accompagner au mieux dans votre quotidien : aide juridique, financement, emploi, conseil , formation, sécurité, environnement…

Véritable accélérateur de la transformation industrielle,
l’UIMM Champagne-Ardenne s’engage à promouvoir une industrie de solutions et d’innovations en représentant vos intérêts auprès des acteurs locaux.

Votre compétitivité est au cœur de nos préoccupations,
ensemble nous allons bâtir l’industrie de demain.

Name: Confédération des acteurs du tourisme (CAT)
Description:
La CAT est l’interlocuteur privilégié des pouvoirs publics pour orienter et développer la politique du tourisme en France. 

Créée en juin 2017 sous l’impulsion de plusieurs fédérations professionnelles, la CAT est l’unique organisation réunissant l’ensemble des acteurs de l’industrie touristique : hôteliers, restaurateurs, campings, résidences de tourisme, villages de vacances, opérateurs de voyages et de séjours, transporteurs de voyageurs et loueurs de voitures, activités génératrices de flux touristiques (domaines skiables, entreprises ou activités de sport et de loisirs, acteurs du tourisme sportif, ports de plaisance, filière des événements professionnels…), métiers de l’économie sociale et solidaire dans le tourisme, acteurs de l’innovation touristique.

Name: GeorgiaCIO
Description:
GeorgiaCIO is one of 40+ chapters in the Inspire Leadership Network, a national membership organization comprised exclusively of CIOs
from public and private businesses, government, education, healthcare, and nonprofit institutions.

GeorgiaCIO exists to help CIOs thrive in today’s most
challenging C-suite executive role. The chapter regularly
convenes leading CIOs and fosters meaningful relationships
by hosting non-commercial, member-led programs—helping
CIOs gain leadership advantage.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be an Georgia-based CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. Since its inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: Colegio Oficial de Químicos del Sur
Description:
Colegio Oficial de Químicos del Sur. Somos la institución referente para los profesionales del sector químico en Andalucía y Extremadura.

Entre nuestros servicios más destacados, ofrecemos un seguro de responsabilidad civil para profesionales del sector, certificados oficiales para ensayos, visados de proyectos e informes, asesoramiento jurídico y laboral en materia de empleabilidad, prácticas en empresas y una gran variedad de cursos de formación propios y actualizados dirigidos al sector químico, tanto presenciales como online a través de nuestra aula virtual.

Defendemos la profesión química, impulsamos la empleabilidad y ofrecemos formaciones actualizadas para nuestros colegiados.

Name: Fibois Hauts-de-France
Description:
Fibois Hauts-de-France regroupe tous les professionnels de la filière forêt bois. La structure a pour mission la promotion de ses acteurs et du matériau bois.
#forêt #bois #hautsdefrance

Name: EAI European Alliance for Innovation
Description:
The European Alliance for Innovation (EAI) is the world’s largest open ICT society. 

We help more than 250,000 researchers around the world achieve progress through collaboration, achieve recognition, and share their knowledge. 

Providing tools and initiatives like our unique Annual Researcher of the Year Award which increases a researcher’s visibility in both their workplace and community. This brings with it the potential for new opportunities, for progression in their careers and as well as having a positive impact on their self-esteem.

We do this through free membership, a platform of innovative collaboration tools, our publishing services and our global conferences, all of which have been built to encourage, mentor, and shape a researcher’s journey to success.
EAI’s mission is to create environments for improving research and to transform best ideas into commercial value proposition through community cooperation.

EAI’s guiding community principles are transparency, objectivity, equality, and openness. Through a unique cooperation methodologies EAI creates an environment that rewards excellence transparently, and builds recognition objectively regardless of age, economic status or country of origin, where no membership fees or closed-door committees stand in the way of research careers.

Through these shared values, EAI leads the way toward advancing the world of research and innovation, empowering individuals and institutions for the good of society to fully benefit from the digital revolution.

Name: Jordan Pharmacists Association JPA - نقابة صيادلة الأردن
Description:
تأسست نقابة الصيادلة في عام 1957 استنادا إلى قانون الصيدلة في المملكة الأردنية الهاشمية رقم 10 لعام 1957 المنشور في العدد 1323 من الجريدة الرسمية الصادرة في 17 آذار 1957. و هي إحدى النقابات المهنية الأردنية، وينتسب لها أكثر من 29463 صيدلي و صيدلانية حتى شهر حزيران/ 2022، وهم يشكلون مجموع الصيادلة الأردنيين.


Who we are?
In 1957, the Jordan Pharmacists Association (JPA) was founded to serve and represent pharmacists and pharmacy profession in Jordan. The JPA works closely with the Ministry of Health (MoH), regulatory bodies, authorities and other professional associations to assure the delivery of high-quality pharmaceutical care and services to the Jordanian population.

What we do?
The JPA aims to assure the development of the pharmacy profession, encourage scientific research, regulate and develop pharmacy practice and services. One of the JPA top priorities is to protect and advocate pharmacists’ rights and best interests throughout different stages of their professional lives.

Jordan Pharmacists Association
PO Box 1124
11118 Amman
Jordan

E: info@jpa.org.jo
E: contactus@jpa.org.jo
W: www.jpa.org.jo
P: +962 (6) 5665320

Name: NIGERIAN INSTITUTE OF FOOD SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY (NIFST)-LAGOS CHAPTER
Description:
This is the official LinkedIn Page of the Nigerian Institute of Food Science and Technology (NIFST)-LAGOS CHAPTER.

The Nigerian Institute of Food Science and Technology (NIFST) is the only Registered Non-Profit Making Body representing Food Professionals drawn from Nigeria's Academia, Industry, Government, and Research Institutes. The Mission of the Institute is a reflection of the Rich Human Resources of NIFST.

NIFST provides professional support to Members and the Food Industry advances and promotes Food Science and Technology as a Profession cum Discipline and contributes to Nation building. Over forty institutions of higher learning in Nigeria offer this discipline.

Established in 1976, NIFST membership has grown to well over 6,000 members spread across ten active chapters representing all the geopolitical zones in Nigeria. NIFST membership also extends beyond the shores of Nigeria with members resident in the United States, United Kingdom, Canada, South Africa, Ghana etc.

Activities of the Institute include; Consultancy, Symposia, Seminar, Training Workshops, Lecture Series and Career Talks organized either solely or in partnership with other Government Agencies, Research Institutes, or Professional Bodies.

Name: Deutsche Gesellschaft für Soziale Arbeit e.V. (DGSA)
Description:
Die Deutsche Gesellschaft für Soziale Arbeit (DGSA) ist die wissenschaftliche Fachgesellschaft für die Soziale Arbeit und wurde im Jahre 1989 als gemeinnütziger eingetragener Verein gegründet. Sie widmet sich der Förderung der Disziplin und Profession Sozialer Arbeit und entfaltet dafür eine Reihe von Aktivitäten in Forschung, Theorie und Lehre.

Neben dem Fachdiskurs innerhalb der Sektionen und Fachgruppen gehören dazu auch die Veröffentlichung und Verbreitung wissenschaftlicher Erkenntnisse sowie curriculare Weiterentwicklungen und die Förderung des wissenschaftlichen und professionellen Nachwuchses. Ebenso begreift die DGSA es als ihre Aufgabe, sich mit fachlichen Beiträgen aktiv in gesellschaftspolitische Debatten einzubringen.

Die DGSA ist dem internationalen Fachdiskurs verpflichtet. Sie widmet sich der internationalen Zusammenarbeit und stärkt so die Identität und Wirksamkeit der Profession und Disziplin. Konferenzen, Symposien und Kolloquien ermöglichen Austausch im Sinne politischer, weltanschaulicher und fachlicher Pluralität.

Als gemeinnütziger eingetragener Verein wird die DGSA von einem alle zwei Jahre neu gewählten Vorstand vertreten.

Name: GIH-Bundesverband für Energieberatende
Description:
Der Bundesverband GIH e.V. ist regional strukturiert. Als Dachverband von 13 Mitgliedsvereinen in den Bundesländern repräsentiert er über 5.300 qualifizierte Energieberatende, darunter Handwerksmeister und Techniker, Ingenieure, Architekten und Naturwissenschaftler. 

Die im GIH organisierten Energieexpert:innen übernehmen Beratungsleistungen für Wohngebäude, Gewerbe und Industrie sowie Kommunen. Weitere Angebote wie Baubegleitung, Wärmebilder oder Luftdichtigkeitsmessungen runden ihr Leistungsspektrum ab.

Die ersten Landesverbände gründeten sich 1999 als GIH Gebäudeenergieberater im Handwerk e.V. Sie schlossen sich 2001 zum Bundesverband GIH Gebäudeenergieberater Ingenieure Handwerk e.V. zusammen. Seitdem ist der GIH stetig gewachsen. Ein Grundsatz ist dabei immer gleich geblieben: Die GIH-Energieexperten beraten neutral, gewerkeübergreifend und unabhängig.

Name: Uniunea Națională a Barourilor din România
Description: UNBR este persoană juridică de interes public și unica organizație profesională care, împreună cu barourile membre, asigură exercitarea calificată a dreptului la apărare, competența și disciplina profesională, protecția demnității și onoarei avocaților membri. Profesia de avocat se exercită numai de avocații înscriși în tabloul baroului din care fac parte, barou component al UNBR.

Name: Youth Global Network
Description: Empowering youths worldwide

Name: The Indian Pharmaceutical Association - Students' Forum, Pune
Description:
The Indian Pharmaceutical Association - Students' Forum, Pune (IPASF Pune) is a vibrant community of pharmacy students across the Pune region. We aim to unite pharmacy students, channeling their energy to make a positive impact on society while enhancing their academic, leadership, management, and professional skills. In 2023, we proudly co-organized the First International Clinical Pharmacy Summit with the Federation of Clinical Pharmacists in India (FCPI). 
Our strong student network includes over 3,500 alumni members.
At IPASF-Pune, our motto is "Establish, Empower, Emerge." We work tirelessly to *Establish* a strong foundation for our members by organizing national and international events, workshops, and conferences that offer students the chance to interact with industry leaders and experts. Through our community outreach programs, we focus on public health awareness, disease prevention, and health education.

We *Empower* our members by providing mentorship, research opportunities, and internships to help students apply their academic knowledge in real-world settings. We encourage innovation, fostering a culture of scientific inquiry and creativity through participation in research projects and competitions.

Finally, we support our members to *Emerge* as leaders. By collaborating with pharmaceutical companies, healthcare institutions, and academic bodies, we ensure our students gain hands-on experience and stay updated with the latest advancements in the field. 

Through our diverse initiatives, we not only enhance the professional skills of our members but also instill a sense of social responsibility. At IPASF-Pune, we are preparing the next generation of leaders in the pharmaceutical and healthcare industries.

Name: Ziviltechniker:innen Österreichs
Description:
Ziviltechniker:in ist eine spezifisch österreichische Berufsbezeichnung für freiberuflich tätige, staatlich befugte und beeidete Architekt:innen und Zivilingenieur:innen. 

Seit 1860 entwerfen, planen und prüfen Ziviltechniker:innen unabhängig und verantwortungsvoll gebaute Umwelt für alle Lebensbereiche.

Name: FEMINNO Global
Description:
FEMINNO is a global platform dedicated to empowering women and girls in STEM through education, innovation, and leadership. Founded in Armenia and now expanding internationally, FEMINNO works at the intersection of gender equity and technological advancement, offering opportunities for learning, mentorship, visibility, and community-building.
Our mission is to elevate the role of women in the innovation ecosystem by breaking down access barriers, nurturing talent from early education to career advancement, and positioning Armenia as a hub for female-led innovation. We believe that sustainable progress in science and technology is only possible through inclusive participation.

Since 2022, FEMINNO has implemented a wide range of initiatives—from large-scale conferences to targeted educational programs and scholarships. The FEMINNO Conference is now the largest female innovation event in the South Caucasus, bringing together global thought leaders, students, researchers, and policymakers. The STEM Acceleration Award program started in 2024, and is now an annual program equipping over 200 Armenian schoolgirls with mentorship, training, and the opportunity to develop real-world STEM projects. Meanwhile, the Sona Mnatsakanyan Scholarship program supports high-potential Armenian girls in pursuing world-class STEM education abroad.

FEMINNO is also an incubator of mentorship and peer networks, bridging local and diaspora communities to support a new generation of STEM leaders. With chapters launched in Yerevan and Los Angeles, and more on the horizon, FEMINNO is shaping a global movement.

Our work is rooted in inclusion, excellence, and the belief that empowered girls create empowered futures. We build an ecosystem, not just events, where innovation, equity, and leadership thrive together.

Name: HKIE Geotechnical Division
Description: The Geotechnical Division of the HKIE was formed in 1987 but our history can be traced back to 1980 when the Geotechnical Group (the former body of the Geotechnical Division) was formed within the HKIE. We are a learned society to promote the status of geotechnical engineers in society. We organise technical talks, site vists, annual seminars and international conferences to facilitate the exchange of knowledge and experience. We place emphasis on developing and nurturing our young members to become geotechnical professional experts.

Name: Ethiopian Medical Women's Association
Description:
The Ethiopian Medical Women Association is a registered professional association for female physicians working all around the country. The association is committed to supporting current and future underrepresented women in medicine, and increasing the number of clinically excellent, culturally competent and socially conscious physicians who address the needs of undeserved communities particularly that of women and young girls.

Efforts to increase the fair distribution of benefits and responsibilities between women and men are improving these days in the health sector. Women should not only have equal access and opportunity, but should be given the means to utilize these opportunities.

The Ethiopian Medical Women’s Association puts a great emphasis on empowering women in medicine, and women in general by setting a specific theme that focuses on various issues. We believe women in medicine have a lot to offer to the sector and hence need every opportunity to amplify their voices and grab the anchor that put them through.

Name: Flowtopia
Description:
Make work visible. Accelerate flow. Drive customer joy.

Manage your value streams, teams and organization to minimize waste and put the right things in your customers' hands at the right time. Boost your career and business performance by developing your practitioner capabilities.

Optimize your organization's performance with the help of the Flowtopia community. We help digital business leaders and practitioners go from feeling the pain and friction in daily work to creating fast, efficient, and collaborative value flow, so they can continuously improve their business outcomes and spread customer joy.

Get real-world case stories and insights from the world's leading practitioners. Use proven roadmaps and templates to support your own implementations. Augment your value streams with intelligence for deep, actionable insights. Get mentoring and coaching, participate in huddles, and connect with peers who challenge and support your growth. 

Let's flow!

Name: Xelyo
Description: Xelyo (Formerly known as VCK) gathers over 200 organisations that actively incorporate quality in their business. We connect and support organisations in their efforts to continuously improve their performance and the quality of their business. Our members enjoy networking activities, as well as (digital) meetings and Quality Talks all year round.

Name: iOH The Association of Occupational Health and Wellbeing Professionals (1205635)
Description:
Welcome to iOH 
We are a charitable professional organisation, established in 1992 with over 1000 professional voices working for the public benefit, the advancement of public health, particularly workplace health, by:
* Providing or assisting in the provision of professional knowledge, skills, and experience for occupational health practitioners.
* Promoting good practice among occupational health practitioners.

To join this group, please register with our membership website: https://ioh.org.uk/
Active members can use our networking group to discuss professional issues within the scope of professional and clinical guidelines. 
 Quarterly OH Journal (OH Today) with a global readership
 Free CPD Webinars (Recordings only for Members) and Activities
 Subsidised Tickets to the Annual Ruth Alston Memorial Lecture and Gala Dinner (RAML)
 Free Vitalograph Training
 Member Voting Rights
 Free Revalidation support
 Free Professional Support Service for members
 Self-Service Membership Portal
 Safe Space “Member Only” FB Community

All this for just £10 a year, and students can gain access to 1-year free student membership

Description:
Building relationships
Generating inspiration and awareness
Igniting new collaborations

Name: CSNGT - Chambre Syndicale Nationale des Géomètres Topographes
Description:
La CSNGT est l'organisation professionnelle qui représente depuis 1980 les Géomètres Topographes, sous la forme d'un syndicat patronal.
Elle rassemble les indépendants, les cabinets de géomètres, les bureaux d'études en topographie et les cellules topographiques des entreprises de travaux.
La CSNGT agit au bénéfice des adhérents avec plusieurs missions :  institutionnelle, défense, promotionnelle, management de la qualité, proximité, solidarité.
Ses objectifs : représenter la voix des adhérents, renforcer l’attractivité de la profession et des entreprises qui la compose, anticiper les défis de demain et être acteur de l’avenir.

Name: Ophthalpreneurs
Description:
IS IT A CONGRESS?  A SOCIETY? 
PERHAPS A CLUB OR A FORUM?

𝖮𝖯𝖧𝖳𝖧𝖠𝖫𝖯𝖱𝖤𝖭𝖤𝖴𝖱𝖲 transcends all these definitions, carving out a unique space of its own. It is not just another label; it is a movement, a powerful call to action, assembling the stakeholders of private and patient-pay ophthalmology, fostering a dynamic community eager to learn, share, network, and catalyze change.

Name: Glue Club
Description:
Glue Club is where the strongest startup leaders in the world come together to find growth, opportunity, and sanity amidst the chaos of building a company. Join Glue Club to learn from Molly Graham and other experienced startup leaders, solve problems with peers, and create space for self-reflection. 

We welcome leaders from all functions, because bringing together different experiences makes every conversation more powerful.

Name: Pittsburgh Professional Women
Description:
We're not your typical women's organization.
Pittsburgh Professional Women is a vibrant, high-energy, positive community where professional women from all backgrounds come together to find inspiration, motivation, and practical success strategies. Our mission is to empower women to thrive in both life and business through valuable tips, engaging discussions, and supportive connections.

Check out our schedule of events here:

Name: ICology
Description: If internal comms is your passion, ICology is your community. Join us and be the change.

Name: Economists Society of Kenya (ESK)
Description:
The idea to form the society was conceptualized through a series of meetings involving Economists base at the ministry of planning ,National Development and Vision 2030 with a view to bring on board Economists from all the sectors of the economy.

The Society was officially registered in 2015 as a non-political professional body with the aim of advancing the role of economists in planning, budgeting, policy development, research and analysis with view to influence county national and regional development to ensure that the county remains focused to the constitutional socio-economic ideals and the aspirations of the Kenya Vision to be a globally competitive and industrialized middle income country with high quality of life by the year 2030.

ESK draws its membership from practicing Economists in the Civil Service, Legislature, Parastatals, County Governments, Academia, the Private Sector, International Organizations and not-for-profit agencies .In order to bridge the gap between aspiring Economists and practicing economists, ESK provides an opportunity for Economics students to attain membership as Associates. Further, the Society plans to confer Honorary Membership to exceptional Kenyans with substantial contributions to the field of Economics or the economy at large.

Name: IEEE Computational Intelligence Society
Description: The IEEE Computational Intelligence Society is a professional society of the IEEE which focuses on Nature-inspired problem solving.

Name: Learnext
Description: Learnext (formerly goKampus) is an AI-powered learning platform that enables organizations and government institutions to enhance workforce skills through scalable, data-driven learning solutions. Our AI capabilities include Nexa, a 24/7 AI personal coach, automated conversion of enterprise materials into video courses with assignments, and AI-driven grading, ensuring an efficient and personalized learning experience for professionals in an evolving digital world.

Name: Atlas Breeze Int'l Group | گروه بین المللی نسیم اطلس
Description:
The development and growth of your business organization depends on financial and time investment on your main goals.
Atlas breeze International group, by providing comprehensive organization’s supporting functions services and business administration as a business partner of its customers, invites you to focus on the main expertise and goal of your organization and business.
All the supporting factors in your business and organization are provided to you in an integrated manner in accordance with the structure.
We transfer expertise to you. Specialties that spend time and money on them will take you away from your main goals.


توسعه و رشد سازمان کسب و کار شما در گرو سرمایه گذاری مالی و زمانی بر اهداف اصلیتان است.
مجموعه نسیم اطلس، با ارائه خدمات جامع و فراگیر پشتیبانی سازمانی و مدیریت کسب وکار به عنوان همراه تجاری مشتریان خود، شما را به تمرکز بر تخصص و هدف اصلی سازمان و کسب و کارتان دعوت می نماید. 
تمامی عوامل پشتیبان در کسب و کار و سازمان شما بصورت یکپارچه منطبق با ساختار برای شما فراهم میگردد.
ما به شما تخصص انتقال می دهیم. تخصص هایی که صرف هزینه و زمان بر آنها شما را از اهداف اصلی تان دور خواهد نمود.

Name: Linking Pharma Women
Description:
This is a space for women to connect, learn from each other, share stories and experiences, and provide support.

Our mission is to inspire and connect industry women by sharing tips, tools, and guidance through networking and empowering one another. Our purpose is to support women as they navigate their professional journeys.

Through our own experience, we can support and motivate each other. We don’t have it all figured out and we won’t pretend to. Our goal is to build a community of industry specific, like-minded women and provide support through mentoring, connecting, and investing in women at all stages of their career.

Name: Consumer Duty Alliance
Description:
The Consumer Duty Alliance, launched 9 March 2023, is an independent, ‘not-for-profit’ professional body. It aims to support the retail finance sector in the adoption and implementation of the FCA’s Consumer Duty requirements through the alliance of like-minded individuals and firms. 

Individuals and firms can join the Alliance for free then use a unique digital badge and Consumer Guide to promote their commit

Name: Florida Society of Health-System Pharmacists, Inc. (FSHP)
Description:
The Florida Society of Health-System Pharmacists (FSHP) - a professional association of pharmacy practitioners promoting continual improvement.

FSHP's mission is to represent its members and to provide leadership to enable its members practicing in hospitals, health-systems and other organized healthcare settings to:

Provide high-quality pharmaceutical care services aimed at drug-use control and rational drug therapy.

Develop professional standards for pharmaceutical services.

Promote pharmacy as an essential component of the healthcare team.

Foster an adequate supply of well-trained, competent pharmacists, pharmacy technicians and associated supportive personnel.

Develop and conduct programs for maintaining and improving the competence of its members.

Disseminate information about pharmaceutical services and rational drug use.

Contribute to programs that emphasize the health needs of the public and the prevention of disease.

Improve communication among pharmacists, other members of the health care industry and the public.

Promote research in the health and pharmaceutical sciences and in pharmaceutical services.

Promote the economic welfare of its members.

Name: ALCOVA EURL
Description:
organisme d'inspection et évaluation de la conformité accrédité ISO 17020, implantée à Oran, est spécialisée dans les domaines suivants :

* APV/G ( ESP)

Name: Black in Health Policy
Description:
Founded in 2023, Black in Health Policy is a dynamic group of industry professionals dedicated to enriching the knowledge and expertise of Black health policy professionals to increase their impact in and access to
every health sector. Our mission is to sustain, support, and expand the pipeline of Black health policy professionals entering leadership positions in health organizations across the Washington DC Region and ultimately influence federal health policy.

Name: Bielars & Scholtes
Description:
Voor een toekomstbestendig Nederland zijn innovatieve leiders nodig. Mensen die de huidige status quo ter discussie durven stellen en onverwachte, ongewone en verrassende inzichten durven onderzoeken. Leiderschap vanuit kracht, professionele kwetsbaarheid en lef. 

Bielars & Scholtes zet zich in voor leiderschapsontwikkeling met lef. Leiderschap is een vak en je neemt altijd jezelf mee in de context waar je leiding geeft. Dat vraagt om kennis over leiderschap en kunde van jezelf. 

Bielars & Scholtes kijken met een optimistische blik de wereld in. We houden van mens- en denkkracht en geloven in sterke netwerken. We zoeken naar verschillende invalshoeken om complexe problematiek bespreekbaar te maken. Vanuit verbinding, vertraging en vertrouwen geven we richting, ruimte en ruggensteun aan een wereld in transitie.

Name: Date Tech Pakistan
Description: Date Tech Pakistan is the country's first platform connecting tech enthusiasts, professionals, and innovators. Our mission is to bridge the gaps between event organizers, audiences, sponsors, and tech leaders, creating opportunities for collaboration and growth. We curate relevant tech events, from conferences and hackathons to podcasts and seminars, ensuring you never miss an opportunity to engage with the tech community. Whether you’re a student, entrepreneur, or industry expert, we schedule your "tech dates" to keep you connected with the latest trends and developments.

Name: Berufsverband der Compliance Manager (BCM) e.V.
Description: Der Berufsverband der Compliance Manager (BCM) ist mit mehr als 1100 Mitgliedern die größte berufsständische Vereinigung für Compliance-Beauftragte aus Unternehmen, Organisationen und Verbänden. Der Verband mit Sitz in Berlin vertritt die Interessen seiner Mitglieder auf regionaler und auf Bundesebene gegenüber Politik, Wirtschaft und Gesellschaft und richtet sich exklusiv an Inhouse Compliance Manager. Dafür stellt der BCM ein umfassendes Angebot an Services und Leistungen zur Verfügung, um seine Mitglieder über aktuelle Compliance-Themen zu informieren und den Wissensaustausch untereinander optimal zu gewährleisten und weiterzuentwickeln. Weitere Informationen zum BCM erhalten Sie unter: www.compliance-verband.de

Name: EIT Community Hub Türkiye
Description:
The EIT Community Hub Türkiye is your gateway to Europe’s largest innovation network, connecting Turkish entrepreneurs, startups, researchers, and local governments with the resources, expertise, and partnerships they need to create impactful solutions.

The Hub brings together all EIT Knowledge and Innovation Communities (KICs) active in Türkiye, including EIT Urban Mobility, EIT InnoEnergy, and EIT Food, fostering collaboration and driving innovation across sectors.

The EIT Community Hub Türkiye operates through a consortium comprising Fark Labs, Sabancı University, and TÜBİTAK, and is actively supported by our EIT Community Türkiye Officer. Together, we bridge Türkiye’s innovation ecosystem with the European Union, enabling local innovators to scale their ideas, access mentorship from Europe’s leading experts, and connect with funding opportunities.

Our mission is to empower Türkiye’s innovation ecosystem to make a global impact, contributing to sustainable growth and strengthening ties between local and EU networks. Join our vibrant community and help shape the future of innovation in Türkiye and beyond. 

The EIT strengthens Europe’s ability to innovate by powering solutions to pressing global challenges and by nurturing entrepreneurial talent to create sustainable growth and skilled jobs in Europe. The EIT is an EU body and an integral part of Horizon Europe, the EU Framework Programme for Research and Innovation.

The EIT Community Hub is funded by the EIT, a body of the European Union.

Name: CooperlinkBrasil
Description:
Somos a CooperlinkBrasil. Proteção que conecta.

Nossa jornada é construída com base em um compromisso inegociável: oferecer tranquilidade, segurança e excelência em proteção veicular — sem burocracia, com transparência e proximidade.

Com mais de 50 mil associados espalhados por 23 estados brasileiros, entregamos atendimento ágil, tecnologia de ponta e cobertura completa — desde os imprevistos do dia a dia até situações mais complexas, como roubo ou perda total.

Acreditamos que o verdadeiro motor do nosso crescimento são as pessoas. Por isso, investimos em parcerias sólidas, uma equipe comprometida e uma rede credenciada de confiança, presente em todo o Brasil e até fora dele.

Seguimos crescendo porque escolhemos cuidar — juntos, de verdade.

Proteção Veicular é na Cooperlink!

Name: Black Executive Men
Description:
Black Executive Men (BEM) convenes private, in-person forums for Black men in corporate leadership.

BEM is designed for executives carrying real enterprise decision-making responsibility who value candid dialogue with peers operating at similar scale.

Through closed-door forums, members engage in real conversations on executive-level challenges and opportunities—across talent, capital, governance, and enterprise transformation—without performance, posturing, or attribution.

BEM is for Black men operating at the VP, C-suite, and board levels who seek clarity, perspective, and better judgment—not networking events or referrals.

Membership is by consideration.
Annual membership: $5,000
blackexecutivemen.com

Name: IAEM Canada Council
Description:
The IAEM-Canada Council encompasses members from every Province and Territory in Canada in addition to the Committee representatives from numerous professions in public, private and government entities across the country.

The IAEM-Canada Region became the first region outside the United States in 2003 under the previous IAEM structure. The IAEM-Canada Region became the IAEM-Canada Council (one of seven Councils worldwide) in 2007, when the current organizational structure went into effect. 

IAEM Canada’s Mission is to advance the profession by promoting the principles of emergency management; to serve its members by providing information, networking and professional development opportunities; and to advance the emergency management profession.

Name: Women In Accounting Peru
Description:
"Empoderamos a las Contadoras  peruanas con herramientas y recursos que apoyen el desarrollo de su máximo potencial, para incrementar y fortalecer su participación y liderazgo en la sociedad empresarial del país"
En nuestro compromiso por impulsar un cambio significativo en la sociedad empresarial de Perú, estamos decididas a empoderar a las mujeres contadoras del país. Queremos brindarles las herramientas y recursos necesarios para que alcancen su máximo potencial y se conviertan en líderes influyentes en el mundo de los negocios.
Imagina un Perú donde las Contadoras no solo sean parte de las empresas, sino que también estén al frente, tomando decisiones estratégicas y liderando equipos. 
Queremos que este sea el futuro que construyamos juntas.

¿Por qué es esto importante? Porque la diversidad de género es un motor de innovación y éxito empresarial. Las Contadoras peruanas tienen un potencial ilimitado, y cuando les brindamos las herramientas y la confianza para alcanzar su máximo potencial, no solo están creciendo como individuos, sino que también están contribuyendo al crecimiento económico de nuestro país.

En el corazón de nuestra iniciativa se encuentran programas de capacitación de vanguardia, redes de apoyo sólidas y la promoción de modelos a seguir que han triunfado en el mundo empresarial. Estamos formando alianzas estratégicas con universidades, empresas líderes y asociaciones profesionales para ofrecer oportunidades únicas de desarrollo profesional.
Creemos en medir nuestro impacto, y cada logro de una Contadora peruana empoderada es un paso hacia adelante en nuestro camino hacia una sociedad empresarial más equitativa y próspera.
Únete a nosotras en este emocionante viaje para transformar el panorama empresarial de Perú. Juntas, podemos hacer que la voz y el liderazgo de las Contadoras peruanas sean una parte integral de nuestro éxito empresarial y económico.  Juntas, lograremos un futuro más brillante y empoderado para todas las mujeres Contadoras!

Name: Iowa Pharmacy Association
Description: The Iowa Pharmacy Association is the state society representing the profession of pharmacy in Iowa, united for the purpose of promoting safe and effective medication use to improve the health of patients. Since 1880, the Iowa Pharmacy Association works to preserve and advance the interests of the profession and to serve the professional needs of all pharmacists, student pharmacists, and pharmacy technicians.

Name: Syndicat de l’Art Funéraire - SAF (ex CSNAF)
Description:
Le SAF, Syndicat de l’Art Funéraire (ex CSNAF) fédère l’ensemble des fournisseurs de produits et services funéraires : cercueils, capitons, plaques, vases, fleurs, accessoires, monuments, urnes, soins aux défunts et matériels de thanatopraxie, registre de condoléances, véhicules funéraires, négoce, prestations informatiques, services funéraires …

Name: Supply-Build Canada
Description:
For 135 years, we’ve worked to help you — Canada’s lumber and building material retailers — adapt to a changing industry, changing country and changing world. We proudly represent manufacturers, distributors, and retailers who provide every material needed to construct Canada’s homes and businesses. 

While we’ve built a reputation as a leader in our industry, our power comes from our dedication to serving members. Through education, workforce development, and advocacy, we empower our members to build stronger communities. 

As your partner in business, we’ll shape the future of the industry from coast to coast — together. 

Visit our website to learn how you can become a member today.

Name: Board of Certification/Accreditation
Description:
The Board of Certification/Accreditation (BOC) is a credentialing organization that provides accreditation for facilities supplying patients with durable medical equipment and orthotic and prosthetic products, as well as professional certification for pedorthists, orthotic fitters, mastectomy fitters, and DME specialists.
  
Connect with us on LinkedIn for updates on facility accreditation with BOC, for updates on CMS standards in your field and to connect with other practitioners and facilities associated with BOC.

Plus, connect with us for discount opportunities for your BOC-accredited facility!

Name: Coast Guard Aviation Association (Ancient Order of the Pterodactyl)
Description:
The organization was founded as the Ancient Order of The Pterodactyl with the hopes, aspirations and hard work of a small band of kindred spirits. In the spring of 1977, Andrew Wall, George F. Thometz, Marion ‘Gus’ Shrode, and Norman L. Horton, all retired Coast Guard aviators, informally organized a fraternal association open to all pilots who had flown or were flying Coast Guard aircraft. The organization was later expanded to included all personnel who flew in Coast Guard aircraft under official orders. Only those who have willfully placed themselves in harms way and have known that innermost feeling which comes from the personal experience which results in the saving of life or property can understand the bonding and uniqueness of Coast Guard aviation crewmembers.

The organization’s name was changed to the Coast Guard Aviation Association to better capture the mission, values and intent to provide those with interest, history and association in all things Coast Guard aviation.  

From humble beginnings in 1977, today’s organization represents 1500 members.  Membership includes active duty Officers and Enlisted, retired and former Coast Guard Aviation personnel, Coast Guard Auxiliarists, industry supporters and general public supporters.  The organization focuses on the enlargement and perpetuation of Coast Guard aviation history.  This is accomplished through support of Coast Guard Aviation at the National Museum of Naval Aviation in Pensacola, Florida; Smithsonian Institute in Washington, D.C.; and at other appropriate museums.  It is also realized by recognizing the accomplishments of our current Active Duty Aviation Force with annual service wide awards sponsorship.

Name: European Marketing and Management Association
Description:
About

Established in 2007, the European Marketing and Management Association (EUMMAS) is a professional body dedicated to advancing research and education in marketing and management domains. EUMMAS serves as a platform for academics, practitioners, and policymakers to exchange ideas and foster collaboration in these disciplines.

EUMMAS provides various benefits to its members, such as publishing academic journals, organizing conferences, workshops, and granting access to research and educational materials. Additionally, the association advocates for policies that enhance the marketing and management professions globally.

Comprising members from diverse backgrounds worldwide, including academics, researchers, business professionals, and students passionate about marketing and management, EUMMAS is committed to promoting excellence and fostering innovation in these fields. It actively supports the continuous professional growth of its members.

Mission and Vision

As we grow and change our mission and vision change too.

Our mission is simple – we are connecting leaders. We believe that putting together businesses and academia i.e. companies, professionals, teachers, and students is the key to providing continuous personal, professional and social growth and development.

Our vision is to become a leader in providing high-end service and support to our stakeholders worldwide.

Name: Cluster algues Bretagne
Game Changers

Game Changers is a group of professionals across Southern California who leverage their expertise through cross referral networking. 

Our goal is to help businesses succeed through our hard work and strategic connections.

Name: art contemporain en Bretagne
Description:
Créée en 2002, a.c.b – art contemporain en Bretagne est une association qui a pour objet de mettre en œuvre une démarche coopérative pour structurer et développer le secteur des arts plastiques et visuels en région. 

En tant que réseau, a.c.b fédère les acteur·trices professionnel·les de l’écosystème : artistes plasticien·nes (individuel·les, collectifs), les autres professionnel·les de l’art (commissaires d’exposition, critiques d’art, salarié·es, étudiant·es etc.), ainsi que des structures.  

a.c.b organise des actions permettant d’étudier, représenter, accompagner, rendre visible et structurer cet écosystème tout en participant à la défense du secteur et aux intérêts communs de ses adhérent·es.

Depuis 2017, a.c.b coordonne le PREAC - Pôle ressources pour l'éducation artistique et culturelle en art contemporain ☞ www.preac-artcontemporain.fr

Name: TennesseeCIO
Description:
TennesseeCIO is one of 30 chapters in the Inspire Leadership Network, a national membership organization comprised exclusively of CIOs
from public and private businesses, government, education, healthcare, and nonprofit institutions.

TennesseeCIO exists to help CIOs thrive in today’s most
challenging C-suite executive role. The chapter regularly
convenes leading CIOs and fosters meaningful relationships
by hosting non-commercial, member-led programs—helping
CIOs gain leadership advantage.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be an Tennessee-based CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. Since inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: Society for Total Worker Health
Description:
The Society for Total Worker Health, founded in 2022 as a 501(c)(3), unites members with a shared passion: advancing worker health, safety, and well-being. 

The issues facing today’s workers and workplaces require a new approach. We must bring together people from across disciplines to address complex challenges through shared learning and collective problem solving.

The field of Total Worker Health is growing, increasing the need for a place to convene people who want to help shape the future of Total Worker Health (TWH). Inspired by NIOSH more than a decade ago, the field of TWH is growing, increasing the potential to improve the well-being of more workers around the globe. This Society, independent from the constraints of its government roots, can boldly innovate, can offer promising strategies for advancing this new discipline, and can convene and inspire people who want to help shape the future of TWH.

Mission & Vision
To serve as a hub, a community, for sharing new and innovative ideas to expand Total Worker Health research, training, education, dissemination, and real-world solutions.

A place for professionals and students to engage across all disciplines.

The Center for Health, Work & Environment serves as the fiscal and program partner for the Society, supported by a Center of Excellence for Total Worker Health Cooperative Agreement U19OH011227, funded by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention and the National Institute for Occupational Safety and Health.

Name: E8 Society
Description:
E8 Society, an exclusive and invitation-only membership club for the most influential individuals across industries. Our mission is to unite the world's top leaders, entrepreneurs, and visionaries in an elite circle that fosters meaningful connections, intellectual growth, and the cultivation of global influence. having members in US,EU,UK & UAE.

Founded in the late 19th century in Europe, amidst a time of great transformation, E8 Society was born from a select group of visionary people who sought to create an unbreakable circle of influence. At the heart of its foundation was a simple but powerful belief: true power is not given—it is built, shared, and preserved through generations.
Our gatherings are held in private locations around the world, and we host events that are as intellectually stimulating as they are exclusive.

Our members are CEOs, to political leaders, renowned entrepreneurs,HNWI and global influencers from different sectors. They are individuals who shape industries, drive innovation, and have the power to make an impact on a global scale. Through the E8 Society, they have access to an unparalleled network of like-minded leaders committed to shaping the future.

The Eight Pillars of E8 Society

Power – The ability to shape the course of history.
Discretion – Silence is the currency of influence.
Loyalty – A bond stronger than contracts.
Vision – Seeing opportunities before the world recognizes them.
Resilience – Adversity does not break those who belong here.
Legacy – Building not for today, but for generations.
Access – The right doors open only for the right people.
Dominion – Not just being part of the world, but shaping it.

Membership is by invitation only, and the process is highly selective. If you're ready to take your influence to the next level and align with the world’s most powerful leaders, reach out to learn more about becoming part of the E8 Society.

Name: International Institute for Complementary Therapists
Description:
IICT is the world's largest member group of natural and complementary therapists.

We provide membership and access to insurance for over 1,300 modalities - the largest list in the world, and growing.

Our members are located across the globe, and we have a dedicated team servicing Australia, New Zealand, Canada, the UK, the US and Europe.

Name: UNICEM Sud PACA-Corse
Description:
L'UNICEM Sud PACA-Corse est l’une des 13 entités régionales de l’Union Nationale des Industries de Carrières et Matériaux de Construction. 
Nous fédérons 270 entreprises et plus de 470 sites industriels répartis sur le territoire, qui constituent la filière amont du BTP et contribuent à aménager le territoire.

Name: Meridian Nordic Ltd
Description:
Meridian Nordic Ltd is a boutique international B2B Matchmaking & Strategic Introduction firm supporting maritime, energy, aquaculture, and industrial companies in identifying, accessing, and connecting with the right global partners.

The company builds on decades of involvement in Norway’s ocean industries and long-standing international commercial relationships across the Nordics, Europe, and Asia. 

Meridian Nordic operates where credibility, trust, and local understanding are essential, and where successful partnerships depend on judgment rather than volume.

Our work is relationship-driven and highly curated. We focus on professional introductions between companies, suppliers, technology providers, buyers, and strategic partners where relevance, cultural alignment, and long-term value matter more than broad exposure. 

Each engagement is handled discreetly, with a clear understanding of sector dynamics, commercial realities, and cross-border complexity.

Meridian Nordic acts as a trusted intermediary for companies seeking partner access, international cooperation, supplier and buyer relationships, and strategic collaboration. 

Typical engagements include market entry support, partner identification, international positioning, and confidential matchmaking assignments where discretion and experience are critical.

We work selectively with organizations that value longterm positioning, trusted networks, and international reach over shortterm visibility or transactional outcomes. 

Our role is to reduce risk, create clarity, and enable constructive commercial relationships in complex B2B environments.

Rooted in Nordic industry heritage and shaped by global commercial experience, Meridian Nordic provides a calm, reliable bridge between companies operating across borders, industries, and cultures

Name: Powered By Health Initiative (PBHI)
Description: Powered By Health Initiative (PBHI) is a global organization focused on advancing health equity and social justice by empowering vulnerable communities. We provide integrated healthcare services, advocate for policy reforms, and address the social determinants of health. PBHI works to eliminate barriers to healthcare, promote gender equality, and create economic opportunities, ensuring that every individual has access to quality care and the resources to thrive. Our mission is to foster lasting change through community-driven solutions and systemic advocacy, making healthcare a universal right for all.

Name: Monumental Men's Network
Description:
The Monumental Men's Network (MMN) is a vibrant and empowering community dedicated to the success and advancement of corporate Black men. Our mission is to cultivate a powerful ecosystem of Black male executives who drive professional excellence, create transformative leadership opportunities, and generate collective economic impact through strategic collaboration and mutual empowerment. 

Our community is not just about career advancement; it's about creating a legacy of empowerment and breaking barriers. By uniting like-minded individuals, we amplify our collective strength and pave the way for future generations of Black male leaders.

Founded on the principles of excellence, leadership, and solidarity, Monumental Men serve as beacons of opportunity and growth. Our vision is to empower Black men executives across industries to achieve unparalleled career growth, impactful leadership, and meaningful fellowship that drives personal success and community transformation. To do this, we offer a robust platform for regular socials, educational workshops, and exclusive networking events designed to enhance both personal and professional development.

Name: BNI Cap €xpansion
Description:
Notre mission :
Aider les entrepreneurs et professions libérales à développer leurs ventes grâce à notre approche structurée, positive et incitative du marketing de recommandation.

 Notre philosophie « Qui Donne Reçoit » :
C’est l’état d’esprit que partagent les Membres BNI. Celui qui donne des recommandations en reçoit lui-même. C’est parce que tout le monde donne que tout le monde reçoit.  Un accompagnement régulier :

Nous changeons la manière dont le monde fait des affaires

Name: DallasCISO
Description:
DallasCISO is the preeminent peer leadership network of North Texas chief information security officers. Our membership is comprised exclusively of CISOs (or equivalent executive roles) from public and private companies, government, education, healthcare and nonprofit organizations.

Our mission is to build a strong, professional community among North Texas' information technology leaders, by providing a forum to share ideas, best practices and experiences relevant to CISOs.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Dallas CISO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
Established in 1998, the ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. This annual event honors chief information security officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: FID - Fonds d'Intervention pour le Développement
Description:
Le FID, au cœur de l’action pour le bien-être durable de la population.
Engagé pour le développement humain depuis 1993, le FID accompagne les communautés dans leurs quêtes de mieux-être.

Né en 1993, le FID a été appelé à accompagner les efforts du gouvernement pour atténuer les effets induits par les mesures d’ajustement structurel de l’époque. Nous avons été les pionniers à impulser le tissu entrepreneurial de PME et de Bureaux d’études dans le BTP au niveau local. Nous avons accompagné les collectivités de base à tracer les plans de développement en harmonie avec leurs réalités et leurs visions. Nous avons été auprès des populations pour améliorer leur accès aux services sociaux de base (éducation, santé) à travers les infrastructures et pour leur fournir des emplois via le système HIMO.

Notre expertise nous a permis d’être là où le devoir nous appelait : pour remettre en état les routes, pour redonner un toit aux écoles, aux dispensaires, pour assainir les quartiers …

Au fil du temps, le FID a grandi avec une pleine conscience de sa mission, celle d’agir pour le bienêtre des communautés. Aujourd’hui, nous soutenons les familles les plus vulnérables à investir dans l’éducation de leurs enfants et dans la santé, à gagner en productivité agricole et à développer leur capacité de résilience face aux chocs et aux catastrophes naturelles.

Name: Norwegian Corrosion Society | Norsk Korrosjonsteknisk Forening

The association is committed to facilitating the exchange of experiences with other associations, committees, and similar organizations working with corrosion and materials science in Norway and internationally, including
participation in these activities when necessary.

7 - 11 September 2025 we are hosting the EUROCORR 2025 in Stavanger, Norway.

Name: Emirates Association for Accountants & Auditors جمعية الإمارات للمحاسبين ومدققي الحسابات
Description:
The Emirates Association for Accountants and Auditors represents the National Society of the United Arab Emirates, which is a non-profit association that adopts a comprehensive strategy to contribute to the development of the accounting and financial audit profession in the country. The association was established in 1997 by Ministerial Resolution No. 227 with the main objective of building national capacities in the field of the profession in line with best practices and international standards. We are also making utmost efforts with the relevant authorities to set standards for accounting and auditing, and to propose new regulations for the profession, as well as to disseminate the highest standards of ethical and professional behavior among the profession. The mission of the Emirates Society of Accountants and Auditors is to serve the members, the profession and the community in this regard. Our core values are credibility, transparency, professionalism, continuous career development, effective management of relationships and partnerships, community service and the public interest.

تمثل جمعية الإمارات للمحاسبين ومدققي الحسابات الجمعية الوطنية لدولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة وهي جمعية غير ربحية تتبني استراتيجية شاملة للمساهمة في تطوير مهنة المحاسبة والتدقيق المالي في الدولة. تأسست الجمعية في عام 1997 بقرار وزاري رقم 227 لهدف رئيسي هو بناء القدرات الوطنية في مجال المهنة بما يتماشي مع افضل الممارسات والمعايير العالمية. كما نبذل اقصى الجهود مع الجهات ذات العلاقة لوضع معايير للمحاسبة والتدقيق، واقتراح لوائح تنظيمية جديدة للمهنة ، فضلآ عن نشر أعلى معايير السلوك الأخلاقي والمهني في أوساط المهنة. تتلخص رسالة جمعية الإمارات للمحاسبين ومدققي الحسابات في خدمة الأعضاء والمهنة والمجتمع وفي هذا الصدد. وتتلخص قيمنا الأساسية في المصداقية والشفافية والمهنية والتطوير الوظيفي المستمر وإدارة فعالة للعلاقات والشراكات وخدمة المجتمع والمصلحة العامة.

Name: GPM LATAM
Description:
GPM LATAM alineada con la misión de GPM Global, aboga por la sostenibilidad en la profesión de proyectos, ayuda a las empresas a ser más resilientes, a los gobiernos más eficientes y a las sociedades más sólidas mientras protegemos nuestros recursos naturales.

¿Por qué GPM LATAM? Según el Banco Mundial, los desafíos que se plantean para América Latina y el Caribe desde hace tiempo en materia de infraestructura, educación, innovación y eficiencia del gasto deben afrontarse con reformas que también aborden los efectos del cambio climático y aprovechen las enormes oportunidades de crecimiento que ofrece el Camino hacia Economías más Sostenibles. 

Acerca de GPM Global es el líder mundial en prácticas de gestión de proyectos sostenibles. Como empresa social, aboga por enfoques de proyectos basados en principios y valores. Desde sus múltiples estándares premiados hasta su capacitación, evaluaciones y certificaciones, es un impulsor clave del desarrollo sostenible y regenerativo y del cumplimiento de los objetivos de desarrollo sostenible (ODS) para 2030.

Name: DBMB e.V. Deutscher Braumeister- und Malzmeister-Bund e.V.
Description:
Der DBMB - Erfahrungsaustausch und Interessenvertretung. Um die kollegialen Kontakte und den sich praktizierenden Erfahrungsaustausch werden die Brauer von den Angehörigen anderer Berufe beneidet. Firmen und Personen, die die Ziele unseres Berufsverbandes unterstützen wollen, können Fördermitglieder der Landesgruppen oder des Bundes werden. Bund und Landesgruppen haben als eingetragene Vereine eigene Satzungen, die Aufgaben und Ziele festlegen und die Mitgliedschaft regeln.

Wichtige Punkte:
Vierteljährlich erscheint ein Mitteilungsblatt. Es unterrichtet über wichtige Geburtstage und Veränderungen im Kollegenkreis, teilt Termine mit und dient durch fachbezogene Artikel der Fortbildung. Im Jahrbuch werden die Adressen aller Mitglieder mitgeteilt sowie die Leitungsgremien des DBMB dargestellt.
Die Veranstaltungen des Bundes und der Landesgruppen dienen der Fortbildung und dem kollegialen Austausch, jedoch kommt dabei auch das gesellige Zusammensein nicht zu kurz.
Bei arbeitsrechtlichen Problemen oder Fragen zu Anstellungsverträgen usw. steht der Ressortleiter mit einem Fachanwalt zur Beratung zur Verfügung.
Mitglieder des DBMB wirken in den Prüfungskommisionen der Berufsschulen mit, beraten bei der Fassung des Berufsbildes und halten Kontakt zu Schulen und Hochschulen.
Der DBMB hält den Kontakt zu seinen Mitgliedern in aller Welt und zu den einschlägigen Berufsvereinigungen anderer Länder.
Der DBMB konnte 1993 sein 100jähriges Bestehen feiern und hat bis heute nichts von seiner Attraktivität eingebüßt. Das wurde besonders bei der Ausweitung des Tätigkeitsbereiches nach Osten deutlich.

Manche kollegiale und organisatorische Hilfe konnte den Mitgliedern gegeben werden.

Jedem Brauereitechniker sollte es ein Anliegen sein, in seinem Berufsverband, dem DBMB, Mitglied zu sein und nach eigenem Vermögen mitzuwirken, das Verbandsleben zu gestalten.

Name: EPOC Network
Description:

Our mission is to ensure that the Boards of all organisations inclusively reflect the society that they serve and in which we all live.
 
We empower our members and work with our sponsors and partner Boards through:
 
- The EPOC Board Fellowship Programme: Offering the opportunity to gain invaluable insights as participating observers on Boards of FTSE 350 companies, private businesses, charities, and not-for-profit organisations.
 
- Exclusive Events: Facilitating connections with Chairs, Senior Board Members, search firms, and peers to accelerate the process of appointing capable, non-executive Board members from our diverse network.
 
- A Supportive Network: Providing access to resources, mentorship, and opportunities that inspire professionals of colour to excel in leadership.
 
EPOC is proud to have facilitated numerous Board appointments, introducing high-calibre, diverse individuals who bring fresh perspectives and drive meaningful impact across sectors. Together, we’re building a future where Boards inclusively reflect the society they serve and in which we all live.
 
Visit our website to learn more about our mission, initiatives, and how to join our network.
