Description:
Oda e Arkitektëve të Republikës së Kosovës (OARK) është organizatë profesionale jofitimprurëse dhe e pavarur, e cila ka për qëllim të sigurojë që individët që ushtrojnë profesionin e arkitektit në Kosovë të veprojnë në përputhje me ligjin në fuqi. Njëkohësisht, OARK përfaqëson dhe mbron interesat e arkitektëve duke garantuar një standard të lartë profesional.

Si person juridik me status të pavarur, OARK është e angazhuar në rregullimin dhe zhvillimin e profesionit të arkitektit në vend. Ajo është pika e parë e kontaktit për të gjithë arkitektët e Republikës së Kosovës. Detyrat dhe përgjegjësitë e OARK-së përcaktohen nga ligji nr. 08/L-012 për Odat e Arkitektëve dhe Inxhinierëve në Fushën e Ndërtimit, Statuti dhe Rregulloret përkatëse. OARK ka autoritet publik për realizimin e funksioneve të përcaktuara nga ky ligj dhe aktet nënligjore të nxjerra në përputhje me të.

E themeluar më 25 janar 2025, OARK shërben si faktor i rëndësishëm rregullator për profesionin e arkitektit, duke mbështetur anëtarët e saj në aspektin e politikave profesionale dhe duke garantuar për investitorët një nivel të lartë cilësie nga anëtarët e saj.

Name: SHRP | Strategic Human Resources Professionals
Description:
Welcome to Strategic HR Professionals (SHRP)
At SHRP, we are more than just a network of Human Resources professionals – we are a global community dedicated to elevating the role of HR in driving organizational success. Our mission is simple yet profound: to align HR functions with strategic objectives and grow businesses through the power of human capital.
Who We Are
Strategic HR Professionals (SHRP) is a dynamic network comprised of passionate HR leaders and practitioners from around the world. With a shared commitment to excellence and innovation, our members represent diverse industries and backgrounds, united by a common goal: to shape the future of HR and transform workplaces into thriving ecosystems of talent and opportunity.
Our Vision
We envision a world where HR is not just a support function, but a strategic driver of organizational growth and prosperity. By harnessing the full potential of human capital, we believe that businesses can achieve sustainable success while fostering environments of inclusivity, creativity, and empowerment.

What We Do
At SHRP, we provide a platform for collaboration, learning, and professional development. Through a range of initiatives, including conferences, workshops, webinars, and networking events, we empower our members to stay ahead of industry trends, exchange insights, and cultivate skills essential for navigating the ever-evolving landscape of HR.

Name: Forum Redaktorów i Korektorów
Description:
Jesteśmy pierwszą w Polsce organizacją zrzeszającą osoby zawodowo zajmujące się redakcją i korektą tekstów.

Forum Redaktorów i Korektorów powstało po to, by:

aktywizować i integrować środowisko redaktorów i korektorów,
chronić interesy członków,
służyć im pomocą,
wspierać ich rozwój zawodowy.

Chcemy stworzyć przestrzeń do wymiany poglądów i doświadczeń oraz współpracować z instytucjami zainteresowanymi najwyższymi standardami opracowania językowego tekstu.

Wierzymy, że wspólnie możemy promować dobre praktyki i działać na rzecz poprawy warunków naszej pracy – od kwestii finansowych po profesjonalne wsparcie w relacjach z wydawcami i z klientami.

Zależy nam także na kształtowaniu pozytywnego wizerunku naszego zawodu i zwiększaniu jego prestiżu. Naszym celem jest również promowanie kultury języka polskiego, literatury i czytelnictwa oraz upowszechnianie wiedzy o rynku wydawniczym.

Name: Fractional Sustainability Leaders Collective
Description: The Fractional Sustainability Leadership Collective, or FSL Collective, is the first of its kind association for Fractional Sustainability Leaders. We strive to champion fractional sustainability leadership as a profession, define excellence in the field, be a trusted hub for businesses to find sustainability leaders, and foster community for sustainability executives.

Name: Black Sea Women in Nuclear Network
Description: The Black Sea Women in Nuclear Network is a regional professional organization whose mission is to connect, support, and empower women in nuclear fields.

Name: ABDS AFRICA
Description: Une Organisation Non Gouvernementale « AFRICAN BUREAU FOR DEVELOPMENT SOLUTIONS » Bureau Africain pour les Solutions de Développement se donne la mission d’accompagner les personnes vulnérables afin de les outiller pour contribuer au développement de la République démocratique du Congo. Et ce, en respectant nos valeurs de l’objectivité, transparence, la rigueur dans le travail et la bonne citoyenneté.

Name: Céramiques de France
Description:
La Confédération des Industries Céramiques de France (CICF) est l'organisation professionnelle de toutes les industries céramiques : sanitaire, carrelage, produits réfractaires, céramiques techniques, arts de la table et décoration (porcelaine, poterie, faïence). 

Elle défend les intérêts de ses adhérents tout en leur apportant un appui juridique et règlementaire utile à leurs activités. Elle contribue à faire connaître les métiers et les formations dans le domaine, et encourage l'innovation de la filière.

La céramique est partout autour de nous : elle est indispensable à notre quotidien et à de nombreux autres secteurs industriels. Faisons-le savoir !

Name: DPtV Deutsche PsychotherapeutenVereinigung
Description: Deutsche Psychotherapeuten Vereinigung is a company based out of 15 Am Karlsbad, Berlin, Germany.

Name: Bio Pharma Networking Group (BPNG)
Description:
Bio Pharma Networking Group (BPNG) is a not-for-profit, volunteer all-inclusive life and health sciences professional community that actively promotes the "real power" of networking. We serve people in various disciplines and corporate cultures who value key-relationship building at all stages of careers. BPNG encourages a crossover effect for valuable lead and resource sharing at our casual monthly events where people can exchange information, trends and ideas. 

Search for your local chapter's LinkedIn Group:

Indiana (INBPNG)
Maryland (MDBPNG)
Massachusetts (MABPNG)
Missouri (MOBPNG)
North Carolina (NCBPNG)
New Jersey (NJBPNG)
New York (NYBPNG)
Pennsylvania (PABPNG)
Toronto (TOBPNG)

Name: AESOP - Associação dos Enfermeiros de Sala de Operações Portugueses
Description:
A AESOP- é uma organização profissional, sem fins lucrativos, fundada em Fevereiro de 1986 e considerada como Entidade Coletiva de Utilidade Pública desde Setembro de 2001.
Integra a Associação Europeia de Enfermeiros de Sala de Operações – EORNA – da qual é membro fundador, em 1992.
A nossa missão:
- Contribuir para a promoção da segurança e qualidade dos cuidados perioperatórios em Portugal através de atividades com intuito do desenvolvimento e disseminação do conhecimento científico da enfermagem perioperatória.
Os nossos objetivos:
 - desenvolver a investigação na área dos cuidados perioperatórios, assegurar a formação contínua dos seus sócios, salvaguardar os interesses profissionais e promover social e deontologicamente os seus associados.
- Realizar estudos e elaborar pareceres sobre assuntos de interesse para os doentes submetidos a cirurgia, para os blocos operatórios e para os enfermeiros perioperatórios.
- Colaborar com outras associações de enfermeiros portuguesas e sindicatos, em tudo o que se verifique ser necessário e útil para o desenvolvimento da profissão.
- Planear e organizar atividades de formação para enfermeiros perioperatórios e publicar a revista técnica AESOP.
- Contribuir para a Literacia em Saúde dos cidadãos portugueses que necessitem de realizar um procedimento cirúrgico ou outro procedimento invasivo.
- No âmbito da sua atividade internacional, elaborar relatórios e colaborar em estudos  da Associação Europeia - EORNA.

Os nossos valores:
Ciência: Rigor científico na procura e síntese de evidência e inovação e rigor na criação de novo conhecimento; 
Qualidade:  informação fidedigna e atempada sobre assuntos de enfermagem perioperatória.
Trabalho de equipa: com e para os enfermeiros perioperatórios portugueses.
Trabalho voluntário: o nosso trabalho é feito de enfermeiros perioperatórios para os seus pares e para os cidadãos portugueses. E assim vai continuar!

A nossa visão: 
Excelência dos cuidados de Enfermagem perioperatória!

Name: Investigative Genetic Genealogy Accreditation Board
Description: Ensuring competence and ethical practice in the field of Investigative Genetic Genealogy.

Name: AFTRI
Description: L'AFTRI représente les intérêts des entreprises françaises de transport routier de marchandises et de voyageurs sur plan international, auprès des institutions et dans l'application des accords bilatéraux. Elle est également garante, en France, du régime TIR.

Name: Pennsylvania Water Environment Association (PWEA)
Description:
PWEA Mission Statement -- Enhance the knowledge and abilities of Pennsylvania's wastewater professionals, promote sound water policies, and promote public awareness of the need to protect water quality.

Value of Membership -- The PWEA membership is comprised of approximately 2,000 professionals involved with the water and wastewater industry in Pennsylvania. The PWEA is a Member Association of the Water Environment Federation, which is a not-for-profit association that provides technical education and training for thousands of water quality professional who clean water and return it safely to the environment. PWEA and WEF members have proudly protected public health, served their local communities, and supported clean water since 1928.

Name: Climate Curious
Description:
Environmental entrepreneur?
Savvy about sustainability?
Net-zero newbie?
Climate Curious is a monthly event for Portland folks interested in climate to clink glasses and talk shop. Come meet new people, ask questions, learn from experts, and share your skills.

Name: The Real Estate Divas - Bay Area
Description: RED is an invitation-only organization developed to assist in the evolution of women in the field of commercial real estate. RED brings together fun-loving women who work in real estate or a related field. RED provides opportunities for like-minded women to meet, network, learn, and bond by supporting various charities that are personal and meaningful to the women in the group.

Name: Women in Contact Center Leadership
Description:
Welcome to Women in Contact Center Leadership. This Virtual Community is a supportive and empowering space designed for women in leadership roles within the contact center industry. This community is dedicated to fostering connections, sharing knowledge, and inspiring growth among female leaders who are shaping the future of customer service.

Members will have access to a wealth of resources, including expert-led webinars, discussion forums, and networking opportunities that promote collaboration and mentorship. Engage with fellow leaders to share insights, best practices, and experiences that can help navigate the unique challenges faced by women in this dynamic field.

Whether you’re looking to enhance your leadership skills, seek advice on industry trends, or simply connect with like-minded professionals, this community is here to support your journey. Join us to celebrate achievements, overcome obstacles, and empower one another in creating a more inclusive and innovative contact center landscape. Together, we can drive change and elevate the voices of women in contact center leadership!

Name: CGEM Settat Berrechid
Description: La CGEM porte la voix du secteur privé marocain en le représentant, en défendant ses intérêts aux niveaux régional, national et international et en oeuvrant pour un climat des affaires favorable à l'acte d'entreprendre.

Name: Albany County Bar Association
Description:
Are you an attorney who lives or works in Albany County, NY? Visit our website www.albanycountybar.com to learn more about membership. 

The Albany County Bar Association's (ACBA) 1,200 members represent a broad spectrum of the legal community such as solo and small firms, corporate and public sector attorneys, paralegals, judges and court personnel. Founded in 1900 to promote collegiality among the bench and bar, the private trade organization has since undertaken many projects and programs that enhance the mission of the ACBA.

Name: ADERAGE - Association des Élèves avocats du Grand Est
Description:
L'ADERAGE est l’association des élève-avocats de l’ERAGE, école d'avocats de l'Est. 
Créée en 2007, l'ADERAGE a pour but de renforcer la confraternité au sein des élèves. 

Pour la promotion 2025/2026, l'association comprend 139 élève-avocats. 

Nous organisons de nombreux évènements tant sur le plan culturel et professionnel (concours de plaidoirie, conférences de professionnels, intervention dans des lycées) que sur le plan sportif (sorties running, cours d’initiation) ou encore concernant les loisirs (week-end de cohésion, afterworks, Gala de fin d'année).

Name: Finance in Tech
Description: FiT is the only private membership network focused on connecting and supporting finance professionals making their way into the tech world.

Name: Unione Italiana Commercialisti
Description:
Unione Italiana Commercialisti è un sindacato professionale di categoria fondato sul rispetto delle differenze per costruire un’identità comune.

La nostra vision è un mix di tradizione e innovazione com l'obiettivo di mettere al centro del sistema di consulenza economica la figura professionale del commercialista.

I commercialisti, ragionieri e dottori, fanno parte della storia economica del nostro paese ed hanno contribuito alla crescita del tessuto delle PMI italiane.

Dalla nostra cultura, i nostri valori, la nostra deontologia professionale ci muoviamo in un percorso ideale di innovazione della professione, del quale il nostro sindacato vuole essere punto di riferimento per il futuro di ogni singolo commercialista.

Perché ogni commercialista è UNICO nelle competenze e nell’esperienza, nella diversità facciamo la differenza!

Name: FNTR Alsace
Description:
La FNTR Alsace est le syndicat territorial de la Fédération Nationale des Transports Routiers (FNTR), l’organisation professionnelle leader
du transport routier de marchandises. Elle représente des entreprises de toutes tailles et de toutes spécialités. La FNTR défend les intérêts de la profession à l’échelle locale, nationale et même européenne.

La FNTR Alsace a pour principal objectif de défendre les intérêts de la profession mais également d’informer, de conseiller et d’accompagner ses adhérents face aux évolutions et aux mutations de la profession.

Name: ProsP'R Rouen
Description: Nous nous réunissons tous les mardis lors de matinales afin de faire des affaires dans la bonne humeur !

Name: Institute of Australian Geographers
Description:
The Institute of Australian Geographers Incorporated is a professional body representing geographers and promoting the study and application of geography in Australia. 

Members are geography academics, teachers, and practising geographers from both the public and private spheres, and other interested members of the public.

We are a registered charity with the Australian Charities and Not-for-profits Commission and provide funding and support for academic geographers in Australia and internationally.

Contact us:
PO Box 4343, Hawker ACT 2614
members@iag.org.au

ABN: 97471418446

Name: LAGBAC - Chicago's LGBTQ+ Bar Association
Description: LAGBAC, Chicago's LGBTQ+ Bar Association, is a professional organization of lawyers, judges, law students and legal professionals. Rooted in the common goals of mutual respect and tolerance, LAGBAC offers an array of networking events for its members.

Name: Texas Energy Council
Description: The Texas Energy Council (TEC) is a 501c(3) nonprofit, non-partisan organization of professional and educational societies dedicated to Advancing Energy Education in Texas. The TEC was originally founded in 1988 as the Dallas Energy Council, changed to the North Texas Energy Council in 1996, and finally to the Texas Energy Council in 2007. Our membership is comprised of over 5,000 members from our various constituent member organizations. TEC is headquartered in Dallas, Texas and provides a forum for all energy-related professional societies and educational institutions to communicate issues and transfer technology and education among its members and the general public. Two elected officers from each constituent organization make up the Board of Directors of the TEC.

Name: Capítulo Ing Económica y Administrativa
Description:
Nuestras Especialidades:

● Ingeniería Administrativa 
● Ingeniería Económica

Name: STSS - Sindicato Nacional dos Técnicos Superiores de Diagnóstico e Terapêutica
Description:
O STSS é uma Associação Sindical constituída por todos os Técnicos Superiores das Áreas de Diagnóstico e Terapêutica (TSDT) nele filiados, abrangendo todo o território nacional. Representa os profissionais de saúde das áreas de diagnóstico e terapêutica, que desenvolvam atividades profissionais, reguladas pelo Decreto-Lei n.º 320/99, de 11 de Agosto, ligadas às ciências e tecnologias da saúde,  que atuam na prestação de cuidados de saúde, nomeadamente, hospitalar, saúde pública, cuidados de saúde primários, continuados e paliativos, no ensino, na investigação e na gestão de serviços, entre outras.

O Sindicato agrupa os trabalhadores TSDT, seus associados, e garante a sua filiação sem distinção de opiniões políticas, conceções filosóficas ou crenças religiosas. Exerce a sua atividade com total independência relativamente ao Patronato, Governo, Partidos Políticos, Igrejas ou quaisquer outros agrupamentos.

O STSS É O SINDICATO MAIS REPRESENTATIVO DOS TSDT. Sendo seu princípio e objetivo a defesa intransigente dos direitos dos TSDT e das profissões no âmbito e nos limites dos seus estatutos.

Name: Startup Canarias
Description:
Startup Canarias nace con el propósito de impulsar el ecosistema emprendedor en las Islas Canarias, conectando a personas con ideas, proyectos y ganas de construir.

Queremos que Canarias se convierta en un lugar donde los emprendedores encuentren recursos, apoyo y visibilidad, al nivel de otros ecosistemas consolidados en ciudades como Madrid o Valencia.

En nuestra comunidad podrás:
‣ Conectar con otros emprendedores y compartir experiencias.
‣ Mostrar tu proyecto y darle visibilidad.
‣ Acceder a un directorio con recursos útiles (venture capital, pitch decks, herramientas, etc.).
‣ Participar en la creación de un ecosistema real y colaborativo en las islas.

Nuestro objetivo es claro: fomentar la cultura emprendedora en Canarias y crear un espacio donde las ideas puedan crecer y convertirse en proyectos con impacto.

Si compartes esta visión, únete y ayúdanos a construir el futuro emprendedor de Canarias!

Name: Women in Safety and Ethics (WISE)
Description:
Women in Safety and Ethics (WISE) is a global community dedicated to empowering and connecting women pursuing safe and ethical AI advancement across academia, civil society, and industry.

Through meetups, mentorship programs, and professional development initiatives, WISE cultivates a robust network of leaders shaping the future of responsible AI development.

Our members range from emerging researchers and policy advocates to senior technical leaders and public servants. By amplifying women's voices in critical discussions about AI governance and safety, WISE works to build an inclusive approach to this critical technology that affects all of humankind.

Name: Sparebankforeningen
Description: Sparebankforeningen er sparebankenes og sparebankstiftelsenes næringsorganisasjon. Vår oppgave er å utvikle og styrke den norske sparebanknæringen som består av 84 sparebanker og 42 sparebankstiftelser.

Name: Piso 40
Description:
Piso 40 es un club exclusivo y global ubicado en World Trade Center Montevideo. Somos una plataforma que le da a cada socio la posibilidad de interactuar empresarial y socialmente con pares locales y del exterior. Formar parte de Piso 40 es estar en contacto con los mayores referentes del mercado y tener acceso a los más relevantes tomadores de decisión. 

Nuestra misión es contribuir desde el sector empresarial a la mejora de la sociedad en la que vivimos, colocando al empresario y al emprendedor como agentes de cambio.

Te invitamos a subir a lo más alto de la ciudad.

Name: Aspiring Medical Science Liaisons at Emory (AMSLE)
Description:
Aspiring Medical Science Liaisons at Emory (AMSLE)

Welcome to AMSLE, the only trainee-led professional development and Medical Affairs organization at Emory University, dedicated to empowering individuals with a passion for the Medical Science Liaison (MSL) profession and broader Medical Affairs careers.

Our mission is to provide a supportive platform that equips aspiring professionals with the resources, knowledge, and connections necessary to successfully transition into these dynamic fields. Our goal is to help you develop the skills and confidence to excel in scientific communication, build strong relationships with key stakeholders, and make a meaningful impact in bridging the gap between science, healthcare, and industry.

While AMSLE is based at Emory, our community is open to all aspiring Medical Affairs professionals—including those pursuing or holding terminal degrees such as PhD, PharmD, MD, DNP, DDS, and other advanced degrees—from any institution or background.

We offer a wide range of free resources, including expert-led webinars, industry insights, professional panels, and career development workshops designed to help you explore and succeed in the MSL and Medical Affairs space.

Whether you’re seeking guidance on breaking into the field, expanding your network, or learning directly from experienced MSLs and Medical Affairs leaders, AMSLE is here to support you every step of the way.

Join our vibrant community of aspiring Medical Affairs professionals to connect, collaborate, and grow your network within this ever-evolving industry.

 Follow us on LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/amsle/
 to stay updated on upcoming events and opportunities.

#AMSLE #MedicalScienceLiaison #MedicalAffairs #MSLCareerPath #EmoryUniversity #CareerDevelopment #ScientificCommunication #Networking

Name: National Association of Reentry Professionals (NARP)
Description:
** Hosting annual conferences and other training opportunities to Educate – Collaborate – Inspire others to continue improving the processes of returning citizens.
** Utilizing system redesign lean processes to address program issues and other reentry challenges
** Providing a voice to the children and families of returning citizens
** Recognizing and awarding the highest level of professionalism in reentry

Name: Tourisme Bas-Saint-Laurent
Description: Tourisme Bas-Saint-Laurent a pour mission de promouvoir le Bas-Saint-Laurent et développer une offre touristique durable afin de permettre une expérience visiteur de qualité. Nos mandats: la promotion du Bas-Saint-Laurent, le développement et la structuration de l’offre, l'accueil et l'information touristique, le leadership et les connaissances stratégiques.

Name: Ismaili Professionals Network & Business Alliance
Description: The Ismaili Professionals Network & Business Alliance builds bridges between Ismaili professionals working and living across Europe, helping them create lifelong relationships with like-minded Ismailis so they can collaborate and share valuable knowledge, resources and opportunities.

Name: WVPA - Workplace Violence Prevention Association
Description: The Workplace Violence Prevention Association (WVPA) is a membership organization that provides businesses the guidance and support needed to establish, implement, and maintain an effective workplace violence prevention plan. While our initial focus is toward compliance with California SB-553, we anticipate additional states adopting similar requirements in upcoming years.

Name: GTM Consortium
Description: The mission of the Go-To-Market Consortium (GTM Consortium) is to provide a best-in-class approach to recurring revenue companies, empowering them to drive sustainable and durable growth through proven GTM strategies.

Name: AELMA
Description: AELMA es la Asociación de Empresarios de Limpieza de Madrid. Defiende los intereses de las empresas de limpieza de toda la Comunidad Autónoma.

Name: NESEI - The Network of European Social Entrepreneurs and Innovators
Description: The main aim of this initiative is to establish, consolidate and develop a Network of social entrepreneurs and social innovators, supporting learning and cooperation activities among its members and helping them bring their innovative solutions to the market.

Name: AON World Network
Description:
AON World Network are a Global Logistics Network operating across six continents worldwide however in reality, we are much more than a network which consists of various dynamic groups, of experienced  and independent global logistics and freight forwarders who are experts in their respective domains.

AON World is the top choice in freight forwarding with a global network covering sea, air, projects, pharmaceuticals, perishables, and trading, alongside a commitment to excellence in various industries.

Dedicated to upholding the highest standards, AON World prioritizes member support, security, global service, and coverage. Establishing a robust network of reliable global agents is crucial, enabling members to exponentially expand their businesses in a cost-effective manner. AON's esteemed members consistently showcase their dedication to optimal service, consistently surpassing customer expectations as a standard practice.

Name: Heritage
Description:
Heritage is the premier membership organization for leaders in family businesses and family offices. 

Heritage offers a unique space for like-minded, ambitious peers to build capabilities, access knowledge, and share information in a high-trust environment. We focus on the unique challenges and opportunities faced by those stewarding and growing a family legacy, providing support in areas such as interpersonal dynamics, transformation, succession planning, legacy management, and personal fulfillment.

Name: The F-Bomb
Description:
The F-Bomb is a growth platform for women in sport.

We exist to support women who work and play sport,  across the business, technical, creative, and performance sides of the industry.

The F-Bomb has two paths:

The F-Bomb Community
A space where women in sport connect, learn, and share opportunities.


The F-Bomb Works
Where strategy turns into action.
Through talks, workshops, strategy, sponsorship work, and projects, we partner with brands, rights holders, and institutions that want to grow women’s sport the right way.

We believe women’s sport is not a side project.
It is serious business. And when it is supported properly, the whole industry grows.

Change doesn’t whisper.

Name: Institute of Internal Auditors Rwanda (Official)
Description: The Institute of Internal Auditors Rwanda (IIA Rwanda), is the National Professional Body that advocate for and promotes the development and professionalization of the internal audit function in Rwanda through capacity-building initiatives, availing of internal audit resources, and advocacy. It is the local chapter of the Institute of Internal Auditors Global (IIA Global) and an affiliate member of the African Federation of Institutes of Internal Auditors (AFIIA).

Name: Ondernemer van het jaar Nijmegen
Description:
Verkiezing Nijmeegs ondernemer van het jaar.

De Stichting Nijmeegs Ondernemer van het Jaar organiseert sinds 2009 jaarlijks de verkiezing van dé ondernemer van Nijmegen.

Deze verkiezing is bedoeld om lokale ondernemers te erkennen, waarbij de nadruk ligt op innovatie, economische groei, werkgelegenheid en maatschappelijke betrokkenheid.

15 November 2024 | 19.00 – 22.00 uur |  Planon Innovation Campus

Name: ALF - Audiologopædisk Forening
Description: Vi arbejder for alle audiologers, logopæders og audiologers fagpolitiske og arbejdsmæssige interesser.

Name: Strategy4Growth
Description:
Stragegy4Growth (S4G) Consultancy, a specialized consultancy providing advisory and project management services to a diverse range of consultancy and projects in Organizational Strategy & Growth | Whole-Of-Organization & Digital Transformation | Operational and Business Realignment. 
We support organizations in navigating the complexities of a rapidly evolving business environment, enabling them to achieve sustained success and competitiveness and we complement our consulting services by providing additional resources, tools, and support to help organizations achieve their transformation goals effectively.

Name: Norges smarteste industribedrift
Description:
Norsk Industri og Siemens er på jakt etter de skarpeste hodene i norsk industrisektor. 

Det kan være utfordrende å være konkurransedyktige i et høykostland som Norge.
Derfor må norsk industri tenke ekstra smart og nytt for å lykkes i fremtiden, ikke minst når det gjelder bruken av digitalisering.

Det finnes allerede mange inspirerende eksempler på bedrifter som har gjort nettopp dette, og det er disse bedriftene Norsk Industri og Siemens nå leter etter, i konkurransen ”Norges Smarteste Industribedrift”.

Vinneren blir kåret av en bredt sammensatt jury.

Name: Syndicate of Kurdistan Pharmacists/Iraq
Description: The syndicate was established by law No. 8 (1999) of the syndicate of Kurdistan pharmacists in accordance to parliament regulation No. 30 (4 November 1991) to be an independent foundation. The syndicate takes care of pharmacists’ affairs and the pharmacist profession in Kurdistan Region-Iraq and works to achieve the goals and objectives of the law it has been established by. It participates in improving human health care through the pharmacist profession and by working with other health care professions to build a good health care system to serve the citizens of the Kurdistan region of Iraq.

Name: Association of Female Executives of Trinidad and Tobago (AFETT)
Description:
The Association of Female Executives of Trinidad and Tobago (AFETT) was formed in 2002 to be the leading network for professional women in Trinidad and Tobago by building a community of women who support each other in becoming more effective in the business world.

This mandate is supported through programs that stimulate professional and personal growth, that encourage mentoring and that offer a forum for the exchange of ideas and resources.

Name: Sports Journalists' Association
Description: The Sports Journalists' Association of Great Britain represents the interests of sports writers, photographers and broadcasters. It is the largest national organisation of its kind in the world.

Name: South Carolina Emergency Management Association
Description: The mission of the SCEMA is to serve the emergency management community in South Carolina by providing information, professional development, and networking through state and local agencies, private industries, and volunteer organizations to advance the emergency management profession.

Name: Restorative Practices International - RPI
Description:
Restorative Practices International (RPI) is a world-wide association for restorative practitioners. We are an independent professional membership body designed to support practitioners working in diverse areas of Restorative Practices and related fields. Formed by practitioners for practitioners, we are committed to continued learning together ensuring our work will be stronger as a result. 

RPI adopts a Restorative Practice approach which involves problem solving, based on the principles, values and philosophy of Restorative Justice. For the purposes of RPI, we use the term ‘restorative practice’ to provide a range of restorative options across fields as diverse as justice (policing, corrections, juvenile justice), schools, workplaces, organisations, faith groups, family and community. These options are characterised by four key values:

Encounter: creating opportunities for victims, offenders (wrongdoers), their families and community members (who wish to do so), to meet to discuss what happened and the impact this had on those involved.

Amends: expecting wrongdoers to take steps to repair the harm they have caused and to make amends.

Reintegration: seeking to restore victims and offenders to wholeness, to become contributing members of society.

Inclusion: providing opportunities for parties with a stake in a specific crime or incident to participate in its resolution (adapted from RJ Online).

Name: UNICEM Île-de-France
Description:
L’UNICEM Île-de-France représente la filière des industries extractives et productrice de matériaux : 
 50 carrières de granulats naturels 
 134 unités de production de béton prêt à l’emploi 
 19 usines de minéraux pour l’industrie 
 92 plateformes fixes de production de granulats de recyclage : 86 plateformes de recyclage de matériaux de démolition et 6 sites de recyclage de mâchefers d’incinération de déchets non dangereux. 

𝐃𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐚𝐠𝐞́𝐞𝐬 𝐩𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐥'𝐞𝐧𝐯𝐢𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐞𝐭 𝐥𝐚 𝐑𝐒𝐄
114 sites adhérents sont engagés dans une démarche environnementale et/ou RSE animée par l’association UNICEM entreprises engagées. 

𝐃𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐨𝐢𝐬 𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐮𝐱 𝐞𝐭 𝐧𝐨𝐧 𝐝𝐞́𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞𝐬 
Les sites des entreprises de la filière, installés au cœur des territoires, sont principalement investis dans la production de granulats naturels et issus du recyclage, de béton prêt à l’emploi, de minéraux pour l’industrie et de pierres de construction et roches ornementales. 
5 926 salariés travaillent au sein de ces sites qui répondent aux besoins du BTP, qui emploient 296 400 salariés.

Name: Black Leadership Circle
Description:
Responding To
- a need for a progressive, inclusive, and supportive safe space for Black Executive Leaders

- a need for capacity building work focused on creating a supported pipeline to leadership positions for Black professionals  

- a need for Black Executive Leaders (in the Greater Baltimore Region) to convene, connect, and align in a new way to amplify the influence of our collective voice

Name: Svenska Tandsköterskeförbundet
Description:
Svenska Tandsköterskeförbundet är ALLA Tandsköterskors röst. 
Vi för din talan och vi finns med när myndigheter och bransch fattar beslut som rör tandvården. Vi arbetar med att stärka Tandsköterskans position och höja yrkets status bl.a. genom att bevaka förändringar av nationell grundutbildning men också efterutbildningar och yrkeskonferenser. Höjd kompetens skall leda till höjd lön. STF är en Remissinstans för Tandvård och ingår i regeringsuppdrag "Jämlik tandhälsa".  
Ingår i Tandvård mot Tobak. 
Vårt mål är att få en yrkesskyddad titel för Tandsköterskor.
Vi vill bli fler! Ett större förbund-Fler fördelar!

Name: ATVC
Description: La ATVC, Asociación Argentina TIC, Video & Conectividad, representa y nuclea a las organizaciones y empresas de conectividad, tecnología y servicios sobre las cuales se desarrolla la economía digital y que motorizan el ingreso, desarrollo y competitividad de la Argentina en la Sociedad de la Información y del Conocimiento.

Name: Dwars door de overgang
Description:
Het is onze missie om de juiste en actuele kennis over de overgang, menopauze en de kracht van een vitale leefstijl onder de aandacht te brengen!

Middels workshops, Masterclasses, Webinars en trainingen helpen wij organisaties, HR, leidinggevenden, vrouwelijke medewerkers en mannelijke medewerkers aan de kennis die iedereen zou moeten weten.

Dit doen wij in samenwerking met verschillende experts en trainers. Zo werken we samen met gynaecologen, slaapcoaches, voedingsexperts, ademcoaches, manueel therapeut, yogadocente en talent en drijfveren (TMA) specialisten.

Op deze manier bieden wij een totaalpakket voor elke organisatie. Wij zijn zeer flexibel in de samenwerking en passen het aanbod graag aan aan de wens van de organisatie / doelgroep.

Wil je hier meer over weten?

Stuur dan een mail naar lieke@vitaliteit.fit

Name: Verbund für Systemische Psychotherapie e.V.
Description:
Der Verbund für Systemische Psychotherapie e.V. setzt sich ein für die Etablierung, Förderung und Weiterentwicklung Systemischer Psychotherapie mit Erwachsenen und mit Kindern und Jugendlichen in Forschung, Lehre und Praxis, bei gleichzeitiger Wahrung der ursprünglichen systemischen Denkweise und Identität. Zweck des Vereins ist die Förderung der Aus-, Fort- und Weiterbildung einschließlich der Studierendenhilfe sowie die Förderung des öffentlichen Gesundheitswesens und der öffentlichen Gesundheitspflege sowie der Kinder- und Jugendhilfe. Dabei ist der Berufsverband an die in Deutschland bereits etablierten systemischen Fachverbände DGSF und SG, als auch die von ihnen anerkannten Institute angebunden.

Darüber hinaus bietet der VfSP Angebote zur Vernetzung, Unterstützung und Fortbildung von Personen und Institutionen, die in der Systemischen Psychotherapie sowie in angrenzenden Berufsfeldern tätig sind, an. Als berufspolitischer Verband vertritt der VfSP die ideellen, fachlichen und wirtschaftlichen Interessen der Institute des VfSP, der systemischen PiA bzw. PtW und approbierten Systemischen Psychoherapeut*innen sowie insbesondere Vertretung dieser Beteiligten bei der Wahrung und Verbesserung der Arbeitsbedingungen in ihren Tätigkeitsfeldern. Dazu bringt der Verbund sich auch im Rahmen der Interessenvertretung gegenüber Politik, Kostenträgern und berufsständischen Organisationen ein.

Name: Oklahoma Small Business Exchange
Description:
The Oklahoma Small Business Exchange (OKSBE) gives local business owners, entrepreneurs, and industry professionals the opportunity to build and strengthen relationships with one another. Recognizing the vital role that small businesses play in driving the local economy, OKSBE serves as a catalyst for growth, innovation, and community development.

Developed by small businesses, for small businesses, Oklahoma's economic future starts here.

Name: DM Leder
Description:

Name: West Midlands Care Association
Description: The Association has hundreds of members who provide quality care services for every area of adult Care. Each Provider is different and the care delivered will depend on the requirements of the residents or service users. Members provide care for Older people, Learning Disabilities, Elderly Mentally Ill, Physical Disabilities, Dementia, Mental Health, Nursing, Supported Living and Home Care. The Association is a non-profit organisation, set up for the benefit of its members and their residents and service users.

Name: Lunar Accel
Description:
Lunar Accel is a nonprofit and community of East & Southeast Asian American professionals driven by our mission to bridge the Asian leadership gap ("bamboo ceiling"). Our annual Career Accelerator is our flagship fellowship for high-potential, early-career professionals, with 200+ alumni and counting. Speakers regularly include Fortune 500 executives, unicorn founders, and Michelin-star restaurant partners. Check out lunaraccel.org for more.

Lunar Accel, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization incorporated in the state of New York. All contributions are tax-deductible for income, gift, and estate taxes.

Name: IIBA Philippines
Description: IIBA Philippines is a non-profit organization dedicated to promoting professional development, community building, and international engagement in the Philippines and the Asia Pacific region. We offer a variety of professional development opportunities and networking events for our members. As an affiliate of the International Institute of Business Analysis (IIBA), we are also supported by a global network of business analysis professionals.

Description: FUSION BUSINESS CLUB est une association de professionnels créée en Avril 2023 à LE HAVRE

Name: AeroLab316
Description: AeroLab est une entreprise axée sur le management et l'exploitation de l'industrie  des transports aériens,  nous sommes spécialisés dans la gestion des plateformes aéroportuaire, la distribution d'équipements pour les installations aéroportuaires et le développement d'affaires. notre portefeuille de services et de solutions s'adresse à une variété de clients dans le secteur de l'aviation civile, tels que les exploitants et gestionnaires d'aéroports, les compagnies aériennes, les agences gouvernementales, les investisseurs et les institutions financières.

Name: ACS Committee on International Activities
Description: Connect and support global chemical practitioners for the benefit of Earth and all its people. The 19-member Joint Board-Council Committee on International Activities (IAC) was established by action of the ACS Board of Directors on June 27, 1962, and was upgraded in 1974 to a joint Board-Council Committee. The IAC is responsible for studying and recommending appropriate Society participation and cooperation in international undertakings pertaining to chemical education, professional activities, and scientific matters of interest to chemists and chemical engineers, and coordinating its efforts with those of other organizations.

 Notre philosophie « Qui Donne Reçoit » :

Name: The Mid-Atlantic CX Forum "Where CX and IT Meet"
Description:
The Mid-Atlantic CX Forum (MACXF) is a peer network of senior Customer Experience, Digital, and Technology leaders committed to advancing the way organizations design and deliver customer value. Based in Philadelphia and serving the broader Mid-Atlantic region, we provide a trusted space for executives to collaborate, learn, and lead transformation across industries.

We exist to connect the business and technology sides of customer experience—bringing together leaders who oversee people, process, and platforms—to exchange insights, challenge assumptions, and co-create new ways of delivering exceptional outcomes for customers and teams alike.

Unlike typical conferences or vendor-led events, MACXF is intentionally small, executive-driven, and community-led. Every discussion, panel, and summit is shaped by members and centered on real challenges and actionable solutions.

As a non-profit professional organization, 100% of proceeds beyond operating costs directly fund STEM programs and technology access for underfunded youth schools throughout the region—allowing members to make a lasting social impact through participation.

→ Real Peers, Real Impact
Connect with senior CX, Digital, and IT leaders driving transformation.

→ Conversations That Matter
Tackle real business and tech challenges—not presentations.

→ Connections, Not Pitches
Meet aligned peers and partners—no sales pressure.

→ Insights You Can Use
Access actionable best practices and intelligence.

→ Purpose in Action
Support STEM programs for underfunded schools.

Practitioners We Serve:
	•	Chief Information Officers
	•	VPs/Directors of Customer Experience, Digital, and Technology
	•	Leaders overseeing business transformation, operations, or IT strategy
	•	Executives driving alignment across people, process, and platforms

Name: Association of Medical Media

Name: Grupo Xeitura S. Coop. Gal.
Description:
Dende 2012 ofrecendo Servizos Culturais, Medioambientais e de Ocio. Traballamos no ámbito da economía social para un heteroxéneo e amplo abano de clientes, dende a administración pública ou entidades sen ánimo de lucro e fundacións, ata outras empresas, entidades privadas ou particulares.
