Name: Sociedad de Doctores e Investigadores de Colombia
Description: La Sociedad de Doctores e Investigadores de Colombia, SoPhIC, es una asociación gremial, sin ánimo de lucro, de nacionalidad colombiana. Creada por un grupo de doctores y doctorandos del país, que busca integrar a los investigadores de todas las disciplinas académicas, tanto a nivel nacional como internacional, abordando diferentes ámbitos para generar el impacto social, económico y científico que requiere nuestro país.

Name: Rix Properties
Description: Rix Properties manages a diverse and ever-growing portfolio of buildings, land and warehouses across England and Scotland.

Name: Professionals of After Loss Services
Description: The burden of administrative tasks placed on families grieving the death of a loved one is often too much for them to handle alone. PALS brings together professionals who provide practical, personalized support after a loss. We are passionate about raising awareness, equipping others to provide these services in their community, and supporting each other along the way.

Name: ISA CAMEROON SECTION
Description:
Welcome to ISA Cameroon, an integral part of the International Society of Automation (ISA), the foremost professional society for Automation boasting nearly 14,000 active members worldwide.

At ISA, our vision is to craft a better world through automation, and our mission is to empower the global automation community through the exchange of standards and knowledge. Every day, our dedicated volunteers work diligently to provide a plethora of programs, services, and tools tailored for our members and the broader automation community.

Regardless of whether you are automation enthusiast or advocate or expert, you are welcome to connect, network, challenge, refer, or engage with anyone in our community according to your preferences. Meanwhile a strict commitment to privacy concerns and professional ethics remains paramount, no matter what it stakes.'

We look forward to welcoming you very soon, in order to fostering a thriving community and advancing the field of automation, all together.

Name: Humanitas Leeuwarden
Description: Humanitas is er voor mensen die samen met een vrijwilliger op eigen kracht iets willen veranderen aan hun situatie. Jaarlijks bieden onze ruim 25.000 goed geschoolde vrijwilligers hulp aan meer dan 70.000 deelnemers. Wij werken binnen zes thema's: Eenzaamheid, Verlies, Opvoeden, Opgroeien, Detentie en Thuisadministratie.

Name: Collectif de Défense des Métiers du Voyage
Description:
Le nom parle de lui même. 
Nous sommes une association à but non lucratif créée pour la défense des métiers du voyages, et notamment les AGV en France.

Name: Cyber Security Hall of Fame
Description:
The Cyber Security Hall of Fame started in 2012 to recognize global cyber security leaders while encouraging future generations to follow in their footsteps. These acknowledged individuals come together to tell the story of cyber security, who were credited for their excellence in technology, education, business, policy, and public awareness of the Cyber Security Industry.

In 2022, we will transition from Cyber’s “Foundational” era to the “Transformational” era - next phase of Cyber Security continuum. This period will focus on cyber security’s shift to business outcomes and will focus on those inventors or technologies that fall within the NIST’s 23 categories under the 5 function areas – Identify, Protect, Detect, Respond, and Recover.

The goal of the cyber security hall of fame is to honor the icons and create an enduring tribute to those individuals that have impacted the industry in the past, present and future.

Name: Fiji Monitoring, Evaluation & Learning Community
Description:
Welcome to the Fiji MEL Community of Practice Page! 
Join us as we bring passion and purpose together to drive meaningful and positive change. 

Our Vision: Enabling meaningful and positive change. 

Our Mission: To share, learn, and create ripples of change through experiences, best practices, and opportunities. 

What we do: 
Foster Collaboration and Learning: 
We create a collaborative MEL learning environment for local practitioners where members can share knowledge and experiences, exchange best practices, and lessons learned to improve MEL development practice in Fiji. 

Increase Awareness and Advocacy: 
We raise awareness of MEL as a profession, advocate for increased leadership in the MEL space, and mobilize resources to support the institutionalization of MEL culture at the community and national level. 

Strengthen Local MEL Capacity: 
We strive to provide learning opportunities such as training, mentoring, and technical support to members to strengthen their Monitoring, Evaluation, and Learning (MEL) skills and capacity. 

We promote the use of culturally appropriate evidence-based MEL approaches and values to development programming in Fiji. 

What guides us: 
Solesolevaki (We will always look out for each other)

Veidolei (We reciprocate), Veinanumi (Heartfelt Consideration)

Veimaroroi (Our Safe Space)

Veidokai (Every Voice Matters)

Veivakabauti (Building Trust, Brick by Brick). 

Who's in our CoP Vuvale? 
Local MEL & Development Trailblazers (Emerging & Established). 

Join our journey—let’s shape a brighter MEL future for Fiji together!

Name: Music-Sports League
Description: Music-Sports League (MSL) is a revolutionary new professional sports league that treats unsigned indie music artists as athletes. The MSL  is a team-based league that pits individually-owned teams of indie artists against one another in single elimination tournaments around the country.

Name: EIT Community Hub Portugal
Description:
The EIT Community Hub Portugal acts as a one-stop shop that gathers all EIT Knowledge and Innovation Communities (KICs) in Portugal and supports and identifies synergies between the EIT Community and local actors. The hub reinforces local entrepreneurship and builds bridges between local and EU innovation networks.

The EIT strengthens Europe’s ability to innovate by powering solutions to pressing global challenges and by nurturing entrepreneurial talent to create sustainable growth and skilled jobs in Europe. The EIT is an EU body and an integral part of Horizon Europe, the EU Framework Programme for Research and Innovation.

Name: Berufsverband Deutscher Rheumatologen e.V.
Description: Wir sind eine starke Gemeinschaft, die sich für die Belange der rheumatologisch tätigen Ärztinnen und Ärzte einsetzt – im Interesse der von uns betreuten Patientinnen und Patienten. Wir stehen für Begeisterung für das Fach Rheumatologie.

Name: Open and User Innovation Society (OUI)
Description:
The OUI Society was formed in 2003 by academic colleagues from different fields that shared the same interest in open source and user innovation activities. The OUI Society emerged as the intellectual home to share and disseminate knowledge and ended up giving birth to a new research field in Open & User Innovation.

The purpose of OUI Society is to advance and disseminate knowledge and research in the fields of open and user innovation. This includes fostering collaboration among researchers, practitioners, and policymakers, promoting education and awareness, and supporting the application of open and user innovation principles in various sectors.

Name: CEOE Castilla y León
Description:
CEOE Castilla y León es una organización profesional de carácter empresarial, confederativo e intersectorial, sin ánimo de lucro, constituida para la coordinación, representación, gestión, fomento y defensa de los intereses empresariales en el ámbito de esta comunidad autónoma.

CEOE Castilla y León integra a empresas, pymes y autónomos de la comunidad a través de sus organizaciones miembro territoriales, sectoriales e intersectoriales; y es a su vez miembro de la Confederación Española de Organizaciones Empresariales (CEOE) y de la Confederación Española de la Pequeña y Mediana Empresa (CEPYME).

Name: UNICEM La Réunion
Description:
L’ancrage territorial est le fruit d’un double engagement de l’UNICEM : doter l’ensemble des entreprises de tous les services qu’une fédération professionnelle se doit d’apporter à ses adhérents et offrir aux parties prenantes un interlocuteur connaissant précisément les spécificités locales pour co-construire la meilleure dynamique économique possible. 

À La Réunion, l’UNICEM est née  en 2017 de la fusion de deux syndicats préexistants, le SICRE (Syndicat industriel des carriers de la Réunion) et l’UCCIR (Union des concasseurs et des carriers indépendants). Sur le modèle métropolitain, l’UNICEM La Réunion se  positionne comme une fédération organisée et efficace qui offre à ses entreprises adhérentes un soutien (réglementation et environnemental notamment) pour l’ensemble des activités. 

𝐍𝐨𝐬 𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐢𝐭𝐞́𝐬 𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐬 
L’UNICEM La Réunion mobilise quatre filières en amont du BTP et regroupe 14 entreprises adhérentes :
 L’extraction de granulats, avec  17 carrières alluvionnaires en activité
 Le béton prêt à l’emploi, avec 12 unités de production réparties sur toute l’île ;
 La préfabrication, avec 13 usines de production ;
 Les adjuvants, qui servent à l’amélioration des bétons.

𝐍𝐨𝐬 𝐨𝐛𝐣𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐟𝐬
  FÉDÉRER LA FILIÈRE MATÉRIAUX DE CONSTRUCTION (granulats, bpe et préfabrication béton)
 PORTER le savoir-faire industriel auprès des services de l’Etat, des élus et des riverains
 PÉRENNISER LA RESSOURCE LOCALE pour répondre aux besoins de l’île en matériaux de construction
 GARANTIR DES PRATIQUES RÉGLEMENTAIRES et favoriser les démarches responsables
 DÉVELOPPER LA FILIÈRE RECYCLAGE dans une économie circulaire

Name: CIFL (Nouvelle Page)
Description:
Créé en 1960, le CIFL est une association professionnelle regroupant les fournisseurs de produits, services et instrumentations de laboratoire dans les domaines de la recherche, de l'analyse et du contrôle, sur le marché français. Il a pour objet la défense des intérêts collectifs de la profession du Laboratoire et de ses adhérents.

Adhérer au CIFL, c'est participer aux différentes activités de notre association et au travail des commissions ; c'est faire progresser nos entreprises et nos salariés ensemble ; c'est réussir la transformation de nos métiers aujourd'hui pour répondre aux défis de demain.
L'adhésion d'une entreprise au CIFL lui permet de bénéficier de nombreux services et avantages, pour un retour sur investissement immédiat.

Name: VdÜ e.V. - Berufsverband der Literaturübersetzenden
Description:
Der VdÜ, 1954 als eingetragener Verein gegründet, ist der Verband deutschsprachiger Übersetzer/innen literarischer und wissenschaftlicher Werke e.V. Die Mitglieder dieses Berufsverbands gehören der Vereinten Dienstleistungsgewerkschaft ver.di an. Der VdÜ bildet zusammen mit dem Schriftstellerverband VS die Fachgruppe Literatur in ver.di.

Der VdÜ vertritt die Interessen der Literaturübersetzer*innen in der Öffentlichkeit, gegenüber den Vertragspartner*innen und deren Verbänden. Wir mischen uns ein. Eines unserer wesentlichen Ziele ist die Verbesserung der rechtlichen und ökonomischen Bedingungen für unseren Berufsstand. Unseren Mitgliedern bieten wir neben Vernetzung vor allem Informationen, Rechtsschutz, Rat und Unterstützung. 

Der VdÜ lebt vom kollegialen Engagement seiner Mitglieder: Alle Mitglieder des Vorstands sind selbst Übersetzer*innen und arbeiten ehrenamtlich; in zahlreichen Initiativen und regionalen Gruppen setzen sich Mitglieder aktiv für die gemeinsamen Interessen ein.

Die LinkedIn-Seite des VdÜ wird ehrenamtlich von Heike Reissig betreut.

Name: Asian Corporate & Entrepreneur Leaders - National (ACEL-National)
Description:
The Asian Corporate & Entrepreneur Leaders, is a non-profit organization providing Asian American & Pacific Islander (AAPI) professionals the opportunities to work together to enhance AAPI leadership in our careers, communities and the local government that we live and serve in.

As the largest and fastest growing AAPI professional organization in the southwest, ACEL continues to provide its members with the tools and resources to further career advancements and to empower AAPIs to become great leaders as well as reliable employees.

In order to achieve our goals ACEL offers a diverse range of professional development programs on the local level. These may include series of panels, workshops and seminars. ACEL engages its membership in community activities, an ongoing mentorship program, cultural awareness and professional networking events. As a 501(c)(3) charitable organization we also seek to promote the active participation of AAPI in society through community service.

Name: Emerging Engines
Description:
We partner with founders and CEOs to design and deliver practical people strategies that drive productivity and performance.

We are embedded, commercial, and outcomes-driven.

Who We Serve:
We specialize in supporting businesses with 5-65 employees, particularly those in growth mode, who haven't made a P&C hire or need more from their existing structure. If you’re ready to grow and need strategic P&C without the overhead of a full-time hire, we’re here for you.

Our Offering:
We deliver tailored P&C solutions through three core products:

Embedded: We become part of your team, owning your P&C function with a hands-on approach.
Virtual: Our flexible remote support model fits businesses that need strategic help without constant on-site presence.
Talent: We find and hire top-tier talent, fast, saving you time and eliminating hefty agency fees.

Our Edge:
We drive business growth by transforming People & Culture (P&C) from a nice-to-have into a productivity powerhouse. We make your team more effective, delivering results faster than traditional HR approaches.

How We Make It Happen:
We align people strategies directly with your business goals, tracking progress with data.
We integrate P&C processes into your growth plan, ensuring every step moves you closer to success.
We get it—running a business can be tough and lonely. We’re here to support and challenge you to be your best.

Our Promise:
We will drive productivity through your people, delivering measurable impact on your business growth.

Name: The Hispanic Collective
Description:
Welcome to The Hispanic Collective on LinkedIn! 

Mission: The Hispanic Collective is a community that has emerged from the Employee Resource Groups of various corporations. It aims to connect professionals across companies, celebrate Hispanic culture and empower personal and career development.

Vision: The largest community that consists of accomplished ERG/BRG/DEI leaders from various industries who are collectively driving impactful change whilst prioritizing community & development.  

Motto: "Empower Excellence, Unleash Your Potential"

Name: Economic Forum of Albuquerque
Description:
Founded in 1982, the Economic Forum of Albuquerque is a non-partisan membership organization of local business and community leaders. The group meets regularly to stay informed on key issues affecting Albuquerque’s regional economy, and to connect and collaborate with peers.

Economic Forum of Albuquerque is committed to moving our economy forward to support the long-term wellbeing of our community. We serve our members, elected officials, and other community decision-makers by bringing them together to discuss a variety of relevant and timely topics.

OUR VISION
Delivering insights, igniting conversations, and inspiring collaboration among influential leaders.

OUR MISSION
Economic Forum of Albuquerque is a member-based organization dedicated to facilitating a strong network of business, government, education, and other leaders who are committed to elevating the economic vitality of the region.

OUR VALUES
> Forward-looking
> Open-minded
> Encouraging
> Connected

COMMITMENTS
Economic Forum of Albuquerque will:
> Educate and inform members, elected officials, and community decision-makers about topics that support the long-term wellbeing of our community.
> Focus on membership that reflects the values of our business community.
> Remain independent, impartial, and separate from any special interest.
> Support public and private groups and agencies that promote executive development.
> Promote economic growth and vitality, and overall success in our city, county, and state.

Business leaders who are interested in learning more about membership may contact the Executive Director for additional information.

Name: Association des Sites Le Corbusier
Description:
L'Association des Sites Le Corbusier, association loi 1901, est un réseau international de villes et d'associations qui coopèrent sur les questions de protection et de promotion du patrimoine corbuséen.
Objectifs : protéger, animer, partager et mettre en valeur le patrimoine de Le Corbusier.

Name: Numeum Occitanie
Description:
Numeum, membre de la Fédération Syntec, est la 1ère organisation professionnelle du numérique en France. 
Nous représentons 80 % des entreprises du numérique : les entreprises de services du numérique (ESN), les éditeurs de logiciels, les plateformes et les sociétés d’Ingénierie et de Conseil en Technologies (ICT).
 
Nos actions :
Valoriser nos membres, nos métiers et défendre leurs intérêts
Incarner la France numérique en Europe
Animer l’écosystème numérique pour favoriser les synergies et l’innovation
Renforcer nos services aux entreprises du numérique
 
Nos ambitions :
- accompagner notre pays dans la généralisation et la démocratisation de la formation numérique
- agir au service d’un numérique responsable pour les entreprises, la société, l’humain et la planète.

Numeum est co-présidé par Godefroy de Bentzmann et Pierre-Marie Lehucher depuis juin 2021.
La Déléguée Régionale en Occitanie est Anne Destouches. 

Notre organisation en chiffres :
2 300 entreprises dont 50% de nos membres en régions et 50% de startups et TPE
85% du chiffre d’affaires total du secteur en France
12 délégations régionales
 
Secteur du numérique : 60,8 Md€ de chiffre d’affaires
Secteur du numérique : 572 000 employés

Name: Centre pour l'Environnement et le Développement - CED
Description: Depuis 1994, le CED est une ONG camerounaise de Défense des droits environnementaux et des communautés locales , qui milite aussi pour le Développement durable au Cameroun et en Afrique

Name: Irish Landscape Institute (ILI)
Description:
The Irish Landscape Institute is the professional body representing Landscape Architects in Ireland, governed by a Constitution and a Code of Professional Conduct. The Institute has a membership of 200+, made up of fellows and full members, graduate members, student members, honorary members and affiliates. ILI is a registered member of  EFLA (European Foundation for Landscape Architecture), World Urban Parks and IFLA (International Federation of Landscape Architects).

The ILI aims to:

- Set standards of excellence in the fields of landscape planning, landscape architecture and landscape management.
- Encourage and facilitate the Continued Professional Development of its members.
Increase public awareness of landscape professionals and their work.
- Support the interaction of landscape architecture with related disciplines such as engineering, architecture and planning.
- Support the development of landscape education at all levels in Ireland.

In promoting knowledge of the profession, the Institute runs a lecture series, which is generally free and open to non-members and associated professionals.  
Conferences are held regularly. 
The ILI Awards are held biennially, honoring excellence in the fields of landscape planning, design and management.

Name: Fédération des Maraîchers Nantais
Description:
Le Maraîchage Nantais est une activité agricole spécialisée de production de légumes primeurs de plein champ et sous serre ainsi que du fameux muguet Nantais. 
Le bassin de production s’étend sur près de 5 000 hectares. Le maraichage est le 1er employeur agricole en Loire-Atlantique et emploie 2 050 emplois permanents et 5 250 contrats saisonniers (hors muguet).

Les Maraîchers Nantais ont une vocation nourricière au service des consommatrices et des consommateurs français. Les Maraîchers Nantais produisent en moyenne 180 000 tonnes de légumes par an, contribuant ainsi à la souveraineté alimentaire nationale. Ils répondent aux besoins annuels en légumes de l'équivalent de la population de Loire-Atlantique.

Le Maraîchage Nantais est organisé, depuis 140 ans, en fédération professionnelle indépendante ancrée sur son territoire et dont l'origine est attestée historiquement à Nantes depuis 1513.

Les productions emblématiques de notre territoire sont le muguet et la mâche nantaise, les radis en botte ou équeutés, le concombre, les tomates, le poireau primeur et une grande variété d’autres légumes (près de 70) comme les jeunes pousses d’épinard, le fenouil ou la patate douce.

Name: Nationalt Videnscenter for Psykologi
Description:
Nationalt videnscenter for psykologi omsætter forskning og fag til løsninger, der styrker den mentale sundhed

Nationalt videnscenter for psykologi udvikler og former psykologien som profession og fag i samfundet. Centret stiller psykologfaglig viden til rådighed der, hvor den kan præge beslutninger og forandre handlemønstre. Gennem forskning, analyser og uddannelse skaber centret læring, der beriger praksis. Vi tilrettelægger specialiserede og anvendelsesorienterede læringsforløb og efteruddannelse til psykologernes fordybelse. Med afsæt i psykologfagets brede tradition - lige fra klinisk praksis til organisationsudvikling - nærer centret den mentale sundhed i Danmark.

Name: Saudi British Women's Network
Description:
Exciting news – website registration for members is coming soon! Stay tuned to join our growing community and gain access to exclusive resources, events, and networking opportunities.

The Saudi British Women’s Network (SBWN) is a cross-cultural platform created to connect, support, and empower women across Saudi Arabia and the United Kingdom.

We bring together leaders, entrepreneurs, and professionals from both nations to share knowledge, foster mentorship, and build meaningful partnerships. Through networking events, leadership forums, and sector-specific initiatives, SBWN provides women with opportunities to grow, collaborate, and contribute to the evolving relationship between Saudi Arabia and the UK.

Supported by leading institutions and guided by an inspiring committee of women, the network aims to ensure that women are not only included in this bilateral dialogue but are shaping it.

Our Mission:
To elevate women’s voices, create professional opportunities, and strengthen UK–Saudi ties through collaboration, mentorship, and community.

What We Offer:
- Mentorship and professional development
- Networking events and leadership roundtables
- Storytelling and visibility for women-led achievements
- A growing community of women driving impact across sectors

Join us as we build a bridge between two nations — empowering women, amplifying their achievements, and fostering lasting connections.

Name: Independent Federation for Safeguarding
Description:
The Independent Federation for Safeguarding (IfS) is a professional body dedicated to empowering those who protect children and vulnerable adults. We exist to ensure every individual with safeguarding responsibilities—particularly Designated Safeguarding Leads (DSLs) and their teams—has the knowledge, skills, and community support they need.

We know how stressful and demanding how safeguarding roles can be. That’s why we’re dedicated to giving DSLs the tools, confidence, and support they need to protect children and young people effectively.

Apply for Associate Membership today: www.ifs-safeguarding.co.uk/JoinUs

Name: Job Advies, Sociaal Juridische en Financiële Zorgverlening
Description:
Interim Advies & Management
Sociale Media Campagne 

Op zoek naar ruim 25 jaar ervaring? 

Zoek niet verder
Expertise gebieden: Sociaal Juridische & Financiele Zorgverlening CBM l Zorg Domein l Sociaal Domein l Onderwijs l Bouw

Name: La Commanderie du Bontemps
Description:
For almost 70 years, the Commanderie du Bontemps has been one of the greatest ambassadors of Médoc, Graves, Sauternes and Barsac wines. With over 300 members, it brings together the most prestigious estates and wine enthusiasts from the four corners of the globe.

 An art of living à la bordelaise
Exceptional dinners and exclusive events punctuate the year, showcasing the elegance and savoir-faire of great wines.

 A commitment to the next generation
Through the Left Bank Bordeaux Cup, we reveal young wine talents and perpetuate the excellence of our wine heritage.

 A community of enthusiasts
Owners, merchants, brokers and enlightened wine lovers come together under the banner of sharing and conviviality.

 Join us and live the passion of great Bordeaux wines!

Name: AVANCE - Association For The Advancement Of Latinos In Sports
Description:
The Association for the Advancement of Latinos in Sports (AVANCE) is a 501(c)(6) non-profit business membership organization committed to advancing the professional and economic mobility of Latinos in the sports industry through advocacy, education, and mentorship.

AVANCE Sports is the ultimate platform for anyone in the sports ecosystem who wants to capitalize on the audience and revenue growth opportunities provided by the U.S. and global Latino markets. It offers memberships for individuals and corporations, organizes a robust mentorship program, showcases top talent, and produces one of the largest sports business conferences in the country.

VISION
We aspire for all Latinos in the sports industry to reach their full potential, becoming a thriving force at all levels, and to parlay their financial success into a lifetime of prosperity.

MISSION
Advance the professional and economic success of Latinos  in the sports industry through: 
ADVOCACY: Showcase and build a pipeline of talent to accelerate Latino representation at all levels of the industry
EDUCATION: Provide market intelligence and data-driven insights about the increasing impact of Latinos in sports externally and deliver professional leadership development for members internally
MENTORSHIP: Organize events and conferences where members come together to share information, build connections, engage with each other and conduct business

Name: Capítulo Ing Económica y Administrativa
Description:
Representamos a las especialidades:
● Administrativa ● Comercial ● de Negocios ● Empresarial ● Empresarial y Sistemas ● en Administración de Empresas ● en Gestión Empresarial ● Económica ● Económica y Empresarial ● Estadística ● Estadística e Informática

Name: Girls Who Impact
Description:
Girls Who Impact is a nonprofit focused on advancing the professional development and entrepreneurial skills of Asian women. Our mission is to empower future women leaders by providing practical startup experience, targeted learning, and mentorship in a supportive and inclusive environment.

We are a thriving community of over 2500 members, with active 7 city chapters spanning three continents. Our presence includes New York, Boston, Los Angeles, Toronto, Hong Kong, London and Paris.

Name: African Diplomatic League
Description:
Africain Diplomatic League est une simulation diplomatique des nations
unies qui vise à rassembler des diplomates, des experts, des
représentants gouvernementaux, des membres de la société civile et des
étudiants intéressés par les enjeux diplomatiques en Afrique. La
conférence fournira une plateforme pour discuter des défis, des
opportunités et des meilleures pratiques de la diplomatie africaine, ainsi
que pour renforcer la coopération et la compréhension mutuelle entre les
pays africains.

Name: Social Media Association
Description:
Tweet, pin, or post — the Social Media Association is for you!

SMA brings together the media community both online and offline. Our members are forward-thinking people interested in business and media innovation.

We are entrepreneurs, business owners, managers, influencers and strategic decision makers. Our goal is a non-competitive environment where we can learn, share and have fun together: informing, inspiring, and empowering business through social, digital, and future media.

Name: Naija Startups Business Leader Network
Description:
Naija Startups is a distinguished Business Leader Network founded by respected Pan-Africanist, Aramide Abe (INSEAD MBA 11D). As one of Africa's most influential professional communities, we bring together entrepreneurs, policymakers, corporate professionals and board-level leaders from diverse industries across Africa and its Diaspora. Our platform creates a dynamic ecosystem for high-impact collaboration, strategic growth, and exclusive opportunities. Members benefit from expanded professional connections, enhanced leadership capabilities, and privileged access to resources essential for business development and career advancement.

Our History
Founded in 2015 as an entrepreneurship movement and platform for emerging startups, the organisation has evolved to attract a significant community of full-time career professionals, policy makers, and senior business leaders beyond its original target audience. The network has expanded internationally, with members across Europe, North America, the Middle East, and throughout Africa. Its demographic now primarily spans professionals aged 35-65 years.


Our Key Pillars
1.Networking - Our acclaimed Banter Room serves as a WhatsApp platform for dynamic business discussions, fostering an environment of respectful dialogue, intellectual exchange, and engaging interaction. We complement this virtual community with quarterly events hosted in global cities.
2.Access to Opportunities - Our Members Groups function as the central gateway to valuable prospects, including funding resources, executive positions, exclusive events, and career openings.
3.Personal Development and Mentorship - Through our innovative Buddy Connect program, we strategically pair members to create accountability partnerships that drive professional growth and provide ongoing support.

At Naija Startups, we cultivate a dynamic ecosystem where members develop advanced leadership capabilities, achieve investor readiness, and gain privileged access to opportunities

Name: Genes Perú - Gremio Nacional de Emprendimientos Sostenibles del Perú
Description:
GENES PERU, el Gremio Nacional de Emprendedores Sostenibles del Perú, se presenta como una asociación civil sin fines de lucro cuyo propósito fundamental es promover y articular asistencia gratuita para emprendimientos sostenibles en todo el país. Su alcance abarca las 25 regiones, enlazando el ecosistema peruano con la meta de la Agenda Perú 2030.                                           

Centrado en fortalecer capacidades y promover áreas sectoriales, GENES PERU tiene un enfoque integral que incluye recursos naturales, ciudades y comunidades sostenibles, producción sostenible y consumo responsable, y servicios sostenibles.                              

A dondé vamos?  Promovemos un cambio significativo en el Perú a través de políticas que aseguren el desarrollo sostenible en el ámbito empresarial y emprendedor. Estamos comprometidos en fomentar el crecimiento de emprendedores y emprendedoras, contribuyendo al desarrollo territorial sostenible, y asegurando que el capital trabaje al servicio de la vida, no que la gobierne.

Propósito basado en el ODS 17
GENES Perú opera en sinergia con actores públicos y privados nacionales e internacionales para avanzar hacia un mundo sostenible, contribuyendo al cumplimiento de la Agenda Perú 2030 y la Visión 2050.

GENES Perú es un catalizador de la economía circular y las finanzas regenerativas en el Perú, promoviendo un cambio real y duradero en el país. Únete a GENES Perú para transformar la economía y promover un futuro más sostenible para todos. 

Pilares de GENES PERU:
- Fomentar la cultura de innovación disruptiva.
- Fortalecer capacidades.
- Desarrollar la innovación abierta.
- Empoderar a la comunidad para crear ok emprendimientos sostenibles.
- Contribuir al desarrollo sostenible de Peru 2030, basado en la educación de calidad, la innovación y la tecnología.
Involucrar a todos los actores del ecosistema en la co-creación de soluciones inclusivas.
- Utilizar tecnologías modernas para mejorar cadenas de valor impacto

Name: DACH-PP Deutschsprachiger Dachverband für Positive Psychologie
Description:
Deutschsprachiger Dachverband für Positive Psychologie e.V.

Deine Anlaufstelle für Positive Psychologie im DACH-Raum
Als Teilbereich der akademischen Psychologie hilft die Positive Psychologie immer mehr Menschen dabei, ihr Leben aktiv und selbstbestimmt zu gestalten. Im deutschsprachigen Raum stellt der Dachverband DACH-PP e.V. für Positive Psychologie Ergebnisse und praktische Übungen der Wissenschaft des gelingenden Lebens einem breiten Publikum zur Verfügung.

Der Dachverband für Positive Psychologie ist deine Anlaufstelle für:
Frei zugängliche Inhalte, Übungen und Videos zur Positiven Psychologie
Informationen zu Ausbildung- und Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten für Einzelinteressierte, Organisationen, Coaches und TrainerInnen


Deine Vorteile:
Informationen, Videos und Zugang zu Kongressen der Positiven Psychologie
Nutzung eines separaten Mitgliederbereiches mit zusätzlichen Inhalten, Übungen und Ressourcen sowie zur Präsentation des eigenen Anwender-, Coach- oder Trainerprofils
Vernetzung von Mitgliedern durch Netzwerkmeetings und spezifische Fachgruppen
Suchen, finden und kontaktieren eines Ausbildungs-Instituts, Trainer, Coach oder Anwender der Positiven Psychologie in deiner Nähe
Möglichkeit der aktiven Mitgestaltung der Positiven Psychologie im deutschsprachigen Raum

Der DACH-PP ist sowohl für privat Interessierte als auch für beruflich Interessierte sowie Organisation und Unternehmen eine wichtige Anlaufstelle. Im frei zugänglichen Bereich und Blog werden regelmäßig interessante Artikel und Videos veröffentlicht. Der Mitgliederbereich bietet viele weitere Ressourcen sowie die Möglichkeit sich mit anderen Anwendenden, Ausbildenden und Coaches der positiven Psychologie zu vernetzen und über eine eigene Profilseite gefunden zu werden. Du kannst in Fachgruppen mitwirken oder eigene Fachgruppen gründen.

Name: Radar Legal Tech Latam
Description:
Estamos construyendo el primer Mapa Legal Tech Interactivo para reunir las soluciones existentes en este ecosistema en 20 países de Latinoamérica. 

Nuestra meta: 

1. Entendimiento general del Ecosistema: Queremos generar un entendimiento común del estado actual del Ecosistema Legal Tech a lo largo de los países de la región.

2. Participación de actores del ecosistema en cada país: Buscamos la participación de organizaciones que hagan parte del sistema Legal Tech en cada país con el fin de hacer de este un gran proyecto colaborativo.

3. Visibilidad de las Soluciones existentes: Queremos ser una ventana para que los emprendimientos y empresas con soluciones funcionales, puedan dar a conocer sus productos y servicios.

4. Mapa interactivo actualizado en tiempo real: Al igual que la realidad, buscamos que el Mapa sea dinámico y permita la inclusión de nuevas soluciones a lo largo del tiempo, no queremos una foto estática.

Name: Sigma Expo Group
Description:
SIGMA EXPO GROUP LLC is one of the leading organizers of exhibitions in Russia. The company specializes in holding major events in various industries, including construction, transport, the automotive industry, logistics services and the Horeca and Retail industries. 
SIGMA EXPO GROUP is a whole set of symbols that carry the mission, goals of the company and our business philosophy.
Location: Dmitrovskoye sh., 71B, BC 7One, entrance B, 6th floor, office 605, PO Box 11

Name: Texoma FC
Description: United Soccer League One Franchise Kicking Off March 2025!

Name: Canadian Association of Municipal Communicators
Description:
The Canadian Association of Municipal Communicators (CAMC) is a non-profit professional association specifically created to bring together local government communications professionals from across the country, while helping the industry – and, in effect, your organizations – grow.

Communications act as an organization's No. 1 tool in building a relationship with residents, and comms leaders are some of the most strategic minds in local government.

At the same time, there has been a notable rise in residents' demands and expectations tied to municipal public communications over the years. Residents want transparency and accountability. They expect to know what their local government is doing at every turn, and the 'why' behind it all. Alongside this increased demand, municipal communicators have been faced with more challenges than ever before.

Meanwhile, municipal communicators are facing ever-constrained capacity, with many comms pros looking to build connections with others throughout the industry to bolster some of that capacity organically. By sharing our experiences, approaches, and resources, the entire industry benefits – but so, too, do each of our Members.

Member benefits include:
• Professional Growth Opportunities (PD & Training)
• Networking Opportunities
• Professional Accreditation
• Resource and Materials Sharing
• Mentorship Program
• And more!

Further, the CAMC is proud to act as an advocate for municipal communicators, its Members, and the industry, recognizing the increased impact of public communications and engagement on community success and sustainability.

Together, we can do more!

Name: AGENCE NATIONALE DE GESTION DES URGENCES ET CATASTROPHES HUMANITAIRES
Description: L'ANGUCH, Agence Nationale de Gestion des Urgences et Catastrophes Humanitaires, est un EPA créé par le décret D/2022/0320/PRG/SGG du 23 juin 2022. Placée sous la tutelle technique du Ministère de l'Administration du Territoire et de la Décentralisation, et sous la tutelle financière du Ministère de l'Économie et des Finances.

Name: Amplify {Women of Color
Description:
Amplify is a professional community that prioritizes the needs of self-identified Women of Color. We meet virtually and in-person to share professional development strategies, wisdom teachings and self-care practices that enable holistic growth.

The group serves early, mid and executive career professionals that:

 Self-identify as Women of Color
 Desire self-improvement 
 Want to serve their community

We value authenticity, intention and integrity and provide psychologically safe spaces to share our lived experience, be witnessed without judgement and learn from others.

White women and men are important allies and curated content and events are available for Women of Color and our Ally Community. True allies understand the need for intentionally reserved safe spaces for Women of Color and respect healthy boundaries.

Name: Arab Atomic Energy Agency (AAEA)
Description:
The Arab Atomic Energy Agency (AAEA) is a specialized Arab scientific organization operating within the framework of the League of Arab States. It focuses on nuclear sciences and their peaceful applications, aiming to foster joint Arab scientific efforts and keep pace with global scientific and technological advancements in this field. The agency is also dedicated to raising scientific and technical awareness among Arab citizens about nuclear sciences and their peaceful uses, striving to create a qualitative scientific and technological shift in the course of Arab civilizational development.

The AAEA began its actual work on February 15, 1989. Its permanent headquarters is located in Tunis, the capital of the Republic of Tunisia. The agency currently has fourteen member states: Jordan, Bahrain, Tunisia, Saudi Arabia, Sudan, Syria, Iraq, Palestine, Kuwait, Lebanon, Libya, Egypt, Mauritania, and Yemen. 
The Arab Atomic Energy Agency welcomes the accession of other Arab countries.

Name: PMI Tulsa Chapter
Description: Tulsa's chapter of Project Management Institute.  One of 300 chapters around the world dedicated to serving project management professionals and partners in the Tulsa region.  Promoting the career of project management and developing project leaders and changemakers of today and tomorrow.

Name: Fédération Française de la Cordonnerie Multiservice
Description:
La FFCM est l'organisation professionnelle qui regroupe les chefs d’entreprise de la cordonnerie : cordonniers réparateurs, cordonniers multiservice, cordonniers bottiers.

La FFCM a pour but de défendre les intérêts de la profession, de la représenter auprès des pouvoirs publics et privés, d’informer et d’accompagner ses adhérents sur les sujets techniques, sociaux, juridiques …, de promouvoir les métiers de la cordonnerie et d’établir des liens de bonne confraternité entre tous ceux qui la composent.

La FFCM gère la convention collective nationale de la cordonnerie multiservice, où elle négocie ses clauses, avenants et accords, mises à jour, avec les Syndicats de salariés de la branche Cordonnerie Multiservice.

La FFCM est également un organisme de formation et dispense à ce titre les stages de perfectionnement répertoriés ICI (voir aussi le menu "les stages de perfectionnement de la rubrique "Les métiers de la cordonnerie").

La FFCM publie 4 fois par an le Magazine de la  Cordonnerie Multiservice (Ex Officiel des Métiers de la Cordonnerie) qui a pour vocation d’informer ses adhérents et ses abonnés de l’actualité de notre secteur et faire connaître notre profession auprès de ses partenaires extérieurs et institutionnels  (techniques métiers, social,  fiscal et juridique, échos professionnels, petites annonces...).

Name: The Association for Dance Movement Psychotherapy UK
Description:
The Association for Dance Movement Psychotherapy UK (ADMP UK) is the professional organisation for Dance Movement Psychotherapy (DMP) in the United Kingdom and was originally founded in 1982.

ADMP UK aims to support the development of DMP in the UK and internationally; foster communication among Dance Movement Psychotherapists; and promote the use of DMP throughout the United Kingdom and abroad.

ADMP UK also serves to uphold professional standards within the profession of Dance Movement Psychotherapy and oversees the professional codes of conduct for the profession.

ADMP UK works with the other arts therapy (Art Psychotherapy, Dramatherapy, Music Therapy) and psychotherapy organisations in the UK and abroad to develop links and continue to further the profession of Dance Movement Psychotherapy in the UK.

ADMP UK is a member of the European Association for Dance Movement Therapy (EDMT) and an Organisational Member of the United Kingdom Council for Psychotherapy (UKCP), through the Humanistic and Integrative Psychotherapy College (HIPC).

Name: GEOFORUM
Description:
GeoForum er en landsomfattende, ideell interesseorganisasjon for personer og bedrifter/etater som har interesse for geografisk informasjon.

GeoForum ble stiftet i mai 1969 under navnet Norges Karttekniske Forbund. Vi er en landsdekkende medlemsorganisasjon med ca. 2 100 medlemmer fordelt på 15 lokalavdelinger.

Organisasjonen består av et sentralt ledd med styre, 15 lokalavdelinger og sekretariat med  tre ansatte. GeoForums øverste organ er representantskapet. Det består av GeoForums styre og representanter fra lokalavdelingenes medlemmer. Medlemmer (tidligere betegnet som personlige medlemmer) kan delta i GeoForums styrende organer. I tillegg kan det opptas bedriftsmedlemmer, herunder etater, institusjoner, kommuner og foretak/selskap.

Organisasjonen har et GeoForum utgir medlemsbladet Posisjon, som kommer ut 4 ganger per år.

GeoForum arbeider for å synliggjøre bruk av geomatikk i samfunnet og skal fremstå som en fellesarena for medlemmer og andre med interesse for geomatikk. Gjennom kurs og konferansevirksomhet skal GeoForum være en aktiv pådriver for å utvikle kompetansen og bedre rekrutteringen.

Name: New Jersey ASPA
Description: The New Jersey Chapter for the American Society for Public Administration is committed to the advancement of excellence in #publicservice and promotes best practices in public administration. #NJASPA strives to create a space for public and nonprofit personnel to network with industry professionals, to learn, and to grow in their careers. Institutions of higher learning in New Jersey that support degree programs in public administration are organizational members of #NJASPA.

Name: HoustonCISO
Description:
HoustonCISO is the preeminent peer leadership network of Houston chief information security officers. Our membership is comprised exclusively of CISOs (or equivalent executive roles) from public and private companies, government, education, healthcare and nonprofit organizations.

Our mission is to build a strong, professional community among Houston's information technology leaders, by providing a forum to share ideas, best practices and experiences relevant to CISOs.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Houston CISO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
Established in 1998, the ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. This annual event honors chief information security officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: Association Tunisienne des Professionnels de la Vente
Description:
ATPV se positionne comme un acteur clé dans la transformation des métiers de la vente, en offrant une plateforme d’échange, de formation et de promotion pour les talents commerciaux tunisiens.
Notre Communauté : Professionnels diversifiés, du business development à la relation client, tous engagés dans l'excellence commerciale.
Notre ambition est de faire rayonner l'excellence commerciale tunisienne au-delà de nos frontières, en particulier sur le continent africain, en créant une communauté dynamique et diversifiée qui partage les mêmes valeurs d'engagement, d'innovation et de collaboration.

Name: Impulsione Leadership Experience
Description:
Impulsionando líderes, moldando o futuro: uma cúpula de energia renovável que reúne os pioneiros do setor para uma sinergia única de capacitação executiva, negociações estratégicas e networking de alto calibre.

Ousados e pioneiros, a 1ª edição veio como o maior movimento de networking do setor de energia renovável, agora na 2ª edição transformado no 1º treinamento de liderança para o mercado de energia renovável.

Viva 2 dias que valem por meses. Experimente vivências intensas, exercícios, networking e uma ambiência que vai mudar a sua carreira & negócios.

Sabemos que o setor de energia renovável tem crescido de forma acelerada, com projetos de alta complexidade e projeções financeiras milionárias. Contudo, a preocupação crescente é a insuficiência de líderes capacitados, com habilidades técnicas e comportamentais alinhadas a esse crescimento.
Aqui, você terá a oportunidade de aprimorar suas habilidades técnicas (hard skills) sobre o setor e suas habilidades comportamentais (soft skills). 

Mas fique atento:
Não é um evento de palestrinha. Não é um evento de “networking”. É um treinamento. É capacitação para sair de lá com um MÉTODO para construir narrativa e influência com o objetivo de aumentar sua liderança!
 
O 1º treinamento exclusivo para os líderes do mercado de energias renováveis! 

Nós sabemos onde os líderes e grandes players do setor de energia renovável estarão neste fim de semana, agora a pergunta é, e você?

Name: The Institution of Engineers in Scotland
Description:
The Institution of Engineers in Scotland (IES) promotes the exchange of information, new thinking and encourages young engineers.

For members, other engineers and those who aspire to be engineers: we organise activities that members, who come from a wide range of disciplines, enjoy and from which they learn. We are a multidisciplinary institution because we simply believe all should be curious to learn from others both inside and outside their own speciality. We promote engineering as a career.

For society and the environment: We show that the use of engineering principles can help to resolve complex issues that relate to society and the environment. We share the excitement and inspiration of engineering with all sectors of society.

Name: Organisational Behaviour Institute
Description: Welcome to the Organisational Behaviour Institute (OBI), where we believe that work doesn't have to be a drag. Our mission at the OBI is to transform workplaces into environments where individuals thrive, teams excel, and organisations prosper.

Name: Kaderverband des öffentlichen Verkehrs KVöV
Description:
Der Kaderverband des öffentlichen Verkehrs KVöV steht allen Führungs- und Fachkräften sowie Nachwuchskadern offen, die zusammen den öffentlichen Verkehr planen, gestalten und ausführen.

Er vertritt die Interessen seiner Mitglieder gegenüber ihren Arbeitgebern und setzt sich für fortschrittliche Arbeitsbedingungen ein.

Unter öffentlichem Verkehr verstehen wir alle Anbieter im Bereich Bahn, Bus, Tram sowie auch alle Unternehmen, die den öffentlichen Verkehr mitbestimmen, vertreten und unterstützen.

Die Rechtsform ist die eines Vereins.

Name: The Social Workers Association of Alberta (SWAA)
Description: SWAA is committed to promoting the profession, advocating together for what matters, and supporting social work in Alberta. We are here to connect our members so you can achieve professional excellence.

Name: FPU Romania
Description:
Founded in 2020, the Flight Personnel Union Romania (FPU Romania) represents and organizes pilots and cabin crew based in Romania, and it is a branch of Flyvebranchens Personale Union, a Danish trade union federation fighting social dumping in European aviation.

FPU Romania was born out of a pure ambition to improve working conditions. We are committed to preserving flight safety, and we mean it. We stand for Just Culture—it’s not just a phrase for us; it’s a principle we embrace as a rule of law.

With much-needed innovation in this space, we made it effortless for you to join us, allowing you to seamlessly enjoy the benefits of our membership. That‘s what our website and social media represent right now—a way to connect with us.

Have a question or comment? Feel free to drop us a line.

For prospective FPUR members seeking support, please contact us through the following channels:

General Inquiry and Membership Services:
office@fpu-romania.dk

Join FPUR:
join@fpu-romania.dk

Alternatively, you can submit your request to join through our online form.

Name: Asociación Española de Prospectiva
Description:
Trabajamos por promover la excelencia profesional en el ámbito de la Prospectiva Estratégica, Strategic Foresight y diseño de futuros, posicionando estas disciplinas como esenciales para el desarrollo sostenible de organizaciones, territorios y la sociedad. 

Buscamos ser el referente en el área, impulsando su reconocimiento como herramienta clave para la competitividad y la construcción de un futuro más próspero.

Name: US Soccer Agents Association

Name: Clinical Psychology Society of India CPSI
Fachverband Bürgerbeteiligung
Description:
Der Fachverband Bürgerbeteiligung ist der berufsständische, auf Praxis ausgerichteter, wissenschaftsbasierte Fachverband der Bürgerbeteiligung und Interessenvertretung der in diesem Bereich beruflich Tätigen. Als Sprachrohr der Branche wirbt er für Vertrauen und Akzeptanz und verdeutlicht den Nutzen der Bürgerbeteiligung gegenüber Politik, Verwaltung und Öffentlichkeit. Er ist eine Institution für fachliche Qualifikation und Know-how-Transfer. Mit seinem Angebot an Seminaren und Fachtagungen ist er das führende Kompetenzzentrum der Branche.

Unser Verein bietet allen, die in der Bürgerbeteiligung tätig sind, eine Plattform, um sich in fachlichen und berufsständischen Belangen zu engagieren oder sich durch das breite Mitgliederbündnis vertreten zu lassen.

Name: Fundación Puertos De Las Palmas
Description:
En la Fundación Puertos de Las Palmas, nos comprometemos a promover la integración de los puertos de interés general de la Provincia de Las Palmas en el desarrollo social, económico y medioambiental de nuestras Islas. A través de nuestra labor, fomentamos sinergias entre asociaciones, empresas y la comunidad portuaria, contribuyendo a fortalecer la sostenibilidad y competitividad de los puertos de la región.

Nuestro trabajo se centra en tres pilares fundamentales: educación, cultura y sostenibilidad, impulsando acciones que favorezcan el desarrollo del ámbito marítimo y portuario. A través de nuestras iniciativas, buscamos no solo potenciar la infraestructura y capacidad logística de los puertos, sino también promover un modelo de gestión moderno y eficiente que impulse el empleo, la riqueza y la prosperidad a largo plazo de Canarias.

Desde nuestra Fundación, seguimos firmes en el compromiso de ser un referente en la comunicación, educación y transformación del sector portuario, contribuyendo a un futuro más próspero y sostenible para todos.

Name: Kamel Lazaar Foundation
Description: The Kamel Lazaar Foundation responds to the imminent need for creation and promotion of the visual arts in the Maghreb and the Arab world. Its aim is to support cultural practices and create a forum for dialogue in the region and beyond.

Name: DHyG e.V. - Deutsche Hydrographische Gesellschaft
Description:
Die Deutsche Hydrographische Gesellschaft (DHyG) ist ein berufsständischer Verein, der sich für die Interessen der Hydrographie einsetzt und sich als Sprachrohr der Hydrographen versteht. Seit 1984 fördert die DHyG die praktische und wissenschaftliche Hydrographie sowie die nationale und internationale Zusammenarbeit. Die DHyG bietet allen Interessierten ein Forum des regelmäßigen Fachaustauschs.

Einmal im Jahr richtet sie eine Tagung aus: den Hydrographentag. Zudem gibt sie drei Mal im Jahr die Hydrographischen Nachrichten heraus, die einzige deutschsprachige Fachzeitschrift für Hydrographie und Geoinformation.

Die DHyG ist Mitglied in mehreren Vereinen und Organisationen. Durch das so entstehende Netzwerk lässt sich im Verbund mehr erreichen. Dasselbe Ziel verfolgen die Vereine, die im Jahr 2008 die „Bremer Erklärung“ abgegeben haben. Gemeinsam wollen die Vereine – neben der DHyG zum Beispiel der DVW oder der VDV – die berufsständischen Interessen gegenüber der Öffentlichkeit und der Politik vertreten. Auch werden gemeinsame Fort- und Weiterbildungen angeboten. Die Zusammenarbeit kommt allen Mitgliedern zugute.

Name: Swiss Association for Child and Adolescent Psychiatry and Psychotherapy (SGKJPP / SSPPEA / SSPPIA)
Description: The Swiss Association for Child and Adolescent Psychiatry and Psychotherapy is the national society of child and adolescent psychiatrists working in Switzerland.

Name: Conexión Pyme
Description:
En Conexión Pyme conectamos empresas proveedoras con compradores reales, tomadores de decisión y aliados estratégicos en toda Hispanoamérica.

Somos una comunidad exclusiva para empresas B2B que buscan crecer, cerrar negocios y generar oportunidades reales a través de:

Description: Alternaffaires est un regroupement de jeunes alternants qui s'entraident pour développer leurs activités. Ils partagent des informations des conseils et des opportunités pour évoluer professionnellement.

Name: KansasCityCIO
Description:
KansasCityCIO is one of 40+ chapters in the Inspire Leadership Network, a national membership organization comprised exclusively of CIOs
from public and private businesses, government, education, healthcare, and nonprofit institutions.

KansasCityCIO exists to help CIOs thrive in today’s most
challenging C-suite executive role. The chapter regularly
convenes leading CIOs and fosters meaningful relationships
by hosting non-commercial, member-led programs—helping
CIOs gain leadership advantage.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Greater Kansas City-based CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. Since its inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: The Global Center for AI Excellence
Description:
The Global Centre for AI Excellence (GCAIE) was established in London as the world’s first independent, not-for-profit platform dedicated to advancing AI excellence. It is the result of more than a decade of collaboration between academia, industry leaders, policymakers, and international standard-setting bodies, providing the credibility and neutrality required to convene stakeholders and set a global benchmark. 

Our Vision is to have a world where AI powers human progress, Responsible, trusted, inclusive, and at scale.

Our Mission is to drive trust, shape standards, and unlock value for the AI economy.

As a neutral, not-for-profit platform, the GCAIE establishes a common framework for AI excellence, one that enables organizations to scale AI responsibly, capture long-term value, and build stakeholder trust.

GCAIE is a global movement for AI excellence. Through the Global AI Excellence Model (GAIEM) and the SCALE Assessment Tool, we provide organizations with a structured path to measure readiness, close capability gaps, and achieve world-class performance.

GAIEM is anchored in the world’s foremost AI standards and frameworks: the EU AI Act, the NIST AI Risk Management Framework, and key ISO/IEC benchmarks, including 42001 (AI management systems), 23894 (AI risk management), 38507 (AI governance), and 22989 (AI terminology). These references ensure GAIEM is globally credible, future-proof, and aligned with the highest bar of responsible AI practice.

By anchoring on trusted global standards, capturing the experience of early adopters, and curating what works in practice, GAIEM establishes a shared global compass for AI. Beyond compliance, it enables organizations to turn responsible AI into a source of growth, resilience, and sustainable long-term value.

Name: IACUS · International Accreditation Center of the United States
Description: Welcome to the International Accreditation Center of the United States (IACUS), a leading accreditation and certification organization. IACUS is a world-class and international independent accreditation organization. With over 10 years of experience, we have been dedicated to establishing high-quality standards and providing certification and accreditation services to organizations, companies, individuals, and educational institutions worldwide.

Name: Pacific Islands Investment Forum
Description: The Pacific Islands Investment Forum is an industry group of 20 Superannuation, Provident, Trust, and Sovereign Funds in 12 countries across the Pacific region. Together we represent the savings and financial wellbeing of over 1.6 million members — providing a platform for Collaboration, Education, and Co-Investing to improve financial security for Pacific people.

Name: MiRAjO Collective
Description:
MiRAjO is the platform for dreamers, leaders, and doers.

We bring together programs, communities, and tools designed to help you reset, connect, and grow:

 25 Days 25 Nights - The reset you’ve been waiting for. A disciplined 25–day journey to quiet the noise, hear yourself clearly, and move forward with focus.

 Couples in Entrepreneurship - Built for partners in both life and business. Learn how to work together, build together, and love together without losing balance.

 Healthy Networking - Networking with intention. We meet inside health-focused venues that encourage connection, conversation, and wellness at the same time.

 MiRAjO Directory - Your place to be seen. A straightforward business directory designed to help you connect, get leads, and grow your business.

At MiRAjO, everything is created with one vision in mind: supporting leaders not just in business, but in life.

Name: Australian Cinematographers Society
Description: The ACS is a non-political society of craftspeople wishing to further develop their skills through mutual cooperation. Membership is open to all persons involved or associated with the motion picture and television industry.

Name: FAFCEA
Description:
Le Fonds d'Assurance Formation des Chefs d'Entreprise Artisanale (FAFCEA) est un organisme clé dans le domaine de la formation professionnelle en France, dédié spécifiquement aux chefs d'entreprise artisanale et à leur conjoint collaborateur ou associés. Depuis sa création, le FAFCEA œuvre pour le développement des compétences et l'accompagnement des artisans dans leur parcours professionnel, en finançant leur formation.

Notre Mission :
Notre mission principale est de financer et de faciliter l'accès à la formation continue pour les artisans et leur conjoint afin de soutenir leur croissance, leur compétitivité et leur capacité d'innovation. Nous croyons fermement que la formation est un levier essentiel pour le succès et la pérennité des entreprises artisanales.

Nos Services :
•	Financement de la formation : nous prenons en charge tout ou partie des coûts de formation 
•	Conseil et accompagnement : nos experts sont à disposition pour aider les Artisans à identifier leurs besoins en formation, à les orienter vers les programmes les plus adaptés et les accompagnent dans l’instruction de leur demande de prise en charge.

Impact :
Grâce à notre soutien, des milliers d'artisans à travers la France ont pu développer leurs compétences, améliorer la qualité de leurs services, et renforcer la compétitivité de leurs entreprises. Le FAFCEA joue un rôle crucial dans la dynamisation du secteur artisanal, contribuant ainsi au tissu économique et social de notre pays.

Nous rejoindre :
Pour en savoir plus sur nos actions ou pour bénéficier de nos services, n’hésitez pas à visiter notre site internet www.fafcea.com

Ensemble, façonnons l’avenir de l’Artisanat français.

Name: Global Sales Leadership Society
Description: Michigan State University’s Sales Leadership Minor is one of the best in the country and the only program of its kind nationwide that leverages the strengths of two nationally ranked colleges: the Broad College of Business and the College of Communication Arts & Sciences. The group is a networking source for students looking to pursue a career in sales, and will help provide them with the knowledge, tools, and experience needed to be successful in the industry. A variety of corporate sponsored events are held during the GSLS meetings that will help provide inside tips straight from the mouths of many of the corporations that you desire to work for.

Name: Colexio de Educadoras e Educadores Sociais de Galicia
Description:
O Colexio de Educadoras e Educadores Sociais de Galicia está ao servizo da cidadanía, e moi especialmente dos colectivos destinatarios da acción socioeducativa das e dos profesionais da Educación Social.

É unha corporación de dereito público constituída por lei, e concibida para:

- Ordenar o exercicio profesional en calquera das súas formas e modalidades.
- Representar os intereses xerais relacionados co exercicio da profesión de educación social.
- Cooperar na mellora dos estudos conducentes á obtención do título de educación social.
- Mellorar o nivel de calidade das prestacións profesionais das/dos colexiadas/os, promovendo a súa formación e perfeccionamento.
- Defender os intereses profesionais das/dos colexiadas/os.
- Velar para que a actividade profesional se adecúe aos intereses da cidadanía.
- Promover o recoñecemento social e profesional da educación social.

Name: WAPOR
Description: For more than 70 years, the World Association for Public Opinion has promoted the highest professional standards, ethics and techniques for polling around the world. Our international membership represents the industry’s most respected names in the survey and public opinion research field. Through publications, seminars, meetings and educational initiatives we engage in a rich ongoing conversation about how best to collect data and maintain data quality not just in advanced democracies, but also in emerging democracies.

Name: STOCKHOLM ROTARY Grand Hôtel
Description:
Rotary är ett globalt och inkluderande affärsnätverk med över 1,4 miljoner handlingskraftiga människor i mer 50 000 klubbar runtom i världen. Gemensamt för oss alla är att vi vill mötas, utvecklas och ständigt vidga våra affärskontakter och vyer, samtidigt som vi vill göra goda insatser för samhället, både här hemma och längre bort. 

Till Sverige kom Rotary i början av 1926 genom tillkomsten av Stockholm Rotaryklubb vars charterbrev undertecknades den 20 februari 1926 genom etableringen i Sverige av Kurt Belfrage.

Idag träffas STOCKHOLM ROTARY tisdagar 11:45-13:15 på Grand Hôtel och ånjuter möjligen Sverges mest välrenommerade talarlista. 

Vil du vara med att ta ansvar för en hållbar samhällsutveckling, få nya vänner och professionell utveckling – då är Rotary något för dig!

Name: SONART - Musikschaffende Schweiz
Description: SONART – Musikschaffende Schweiz ist der Berufsverband der freischaffenden Musiker*innen in der Schweiz. Name: Miami Biotech Collective
Description:
Miami Biotech Collective is South Florida’s largest and most influential community of biotech leaders — bringing together CEOs, founders, investors, academic institutions and the public sector. United by a shared mission, we exist to cultivate high-value relationships, unlock opportunities, and accelerate the growth of the region’s biotech sector. 

Our goal is to make Greater Miami a global biotech destination. We connect people, sharing resources, and supporting strategic initiatives. In doing so, we’re creating an environment where companies, careers and innovators thrive — and where biotech has the power to shape the region’s future.

Amplify your impact. Meet interesting people. Join us 

CLICK HERE TO SIGN UP--> https://forms.gle/TWWcaBtthRdXCiAX9

Name: Region VI - American Society of Safety Professionals
Description:
For more than 100 years the American Society of Safety Professionals (ASSP) have supported occupational safety and health (OSH) professionals in their efforts to prevent workplace injuries, illnesses and fatalities. We provide education, advocacy, standards development and a professional community to our members in order to advance their careers and the OSH profession as a whole.

ASSP has a large network of chapters across our U.S. and global regions provide accessible, face-to-face opportunities for ASSP members to become better safety professionals.  

We are Region VI within the United States comprised of all local chapters in North Carolina, South Carolina, Virginia, Maryland, the District of Columbia and Delaware.  The Region helps support the operational arm of the Chapters we serve.

Name: MediPhorum
Description:
MediPhorum’s mission is to create an environment where the global MedTech industry can collaborate and accelerate its rate of progress for the benefit of all.

MediPhorum by BioPhorum has been launched to bring together Senior Business Leaders and Subject Matter Experts across multiple MedTech disciplines, including drug delivery. 

The foundation of the MediPhorum program was developed by leaders and subject matter experts from existing BioPhorum member companies who came together to identify common problems and assess opportunities for collaboration across a range of topics including: drug device co-development, regulatory compliance, device design, digital healthcare and supply chain.  

In a constantly evolving regulatory and technological landscape, MediPhorum provides a channel for companies to network and share real world challenges in a safe, open and collaborative setting. By working together to develop consensus views and best practice approaches to solve problems, MediPhorum aims to help the industry to get these important products to more patients worldwide. 

MediPhorum is open to licence holders and suppliers and is likely to benefit Leaders and subject matter experts (SME’s) working across combination product development, device engineering, packaging development, regulatory, ESG and Sustainability, and advances in digital / connected health.

Name: UNNE - Union Nationale des Notaires Employeurs
Description:
L’Union Nationale des Notaires Employeurs est une organisation patronale, reconnue comme représentative par le ministère du travail en 2021.

Sa raison d’être ?  Agir pour les notaires employeurs, soutenir et promouvoir leurs missions.

Name: SIFA - Shooting Industry Foundation of Australia
Description:
Founded in 2014, The Shooting Industry Foundation of Australia (SIFA) is the peak body that represents the Australian shooting industry. Since our inception, SIFA has worked in advocacy, research, education and safety promotion to inform the public, regulators and politicians about the vital role our industry plays in Australia.

At the core, SIFA’s main role is to promote, develop and represent the interests of a vital Australian industry that adds significant value to the Australian economy. In 2019 alone, it was estimated that the gross contribution of the Australian shooting industry to GDP was $2.4 billion and supported some 19,500 full time jobs.

We are a true partner to all industry stakeholders including the government and various regulatory bodies. We look for sensible outcomes and opportunities so the entire Australian shooting industry can continue to prosper and develop as a crucial part of Australia’s trade and business landscape.

SIFA takes its role as an industry peak body extremely seriously. We understand the need for sensible industry regulation whilst upholding public safety. We function to ensure that law abiding Australian firearms businesses can start-up, grow and operate with minimal regulatory interference whilst ensuring that law makers focus on developing real solutions to keep firearms out of the wrong hands.

Name: IEEE UAE Section
Description:
IEEE UAE Section, established in 1987, as a part of IEEE Region 8 of the mother organization IEEE . 

“IEEE vision is to advance global prosperity by fostering technological innovation, enabling members’ careers and promoting community worldwide”.

The mission of the section is to reach this vision by promoting the engineering process of creating, developing, integrating, sharing and applying knowledge about electro-technologies and sciences. This engineering process promotion is achieved through publishing periodicals, books, standards, conferences, proceedings, electronic products and mixed media.

Since its establishment, the IEEE UAE section has played an essential role in widening the scope of techno-electrical and computing awareness in the society. IEEE UAE Section will continue to build the technological infrastructure to develop techno-electrical industry, and to improve life-styles of individuals.

In today's ever-changing business landscape find your community of other businesses united in the preservation of local, advancing their businesses and teams, and a commitment to a thriving RVA.

Name: Associació Catalana de Científics i Tecnòlegs dels Aliments
Description:
L'Associació Catalana de Científics i Tecnòlegs dels Aliments va nèixer amb l’objectiu d'esdevenir una plataforma que connecti tots els professionals i estudiants de l’àmbit de la Ciència i Tecnologia dels Aliments (CTA) de Catalunya.

La reunió fundacional de l'Associació Catalana de Científics i Tecnòlegs dels Aliments va tenir lloc el 10 d'abril de 2018, fruit del treball conjunt d'un grup de joves graduats en CTA de les diferents universitats catalanes que imparteixen aquest ensenyament.

La seu oficial de l’associació s'emplaça al Campus de l’Alimentació de la Universitat de Barcelona, un entorn universitari dedicat a les ciències relacionades amb l’alimentació.

Name: ChicagoCISO
Description:
ChicagoCISO is the preeminent peer leadership network of Chicagoland chief information security officers. Our membership is comprised exclusively of CISOs (or equivalent executive roles) from public and private companies, government, education, healthcare and nonprofit organizations.

Our mission is to build a strong, professional community among Chicagoland's information technology leaders, by providing a forum to share ideas, best practices and experiences relevant to CISOs.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Chicagoland CISO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
Established in 1998, the ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. This annual event honors chief information security officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession. MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be an Alabama-based CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. Since inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: todonetworking
Description:

Por eso realizamos grupos semanales donde, además de hacer cada uno su “Elevator Pitch“, se crea de forma natural un pequeño debate para resolver dudas o aportar ideas.

Name: Interstaff
Description:
Interstaff is an Australian-owned and operated migration agency specialising in providing employers with strategic immigration advice to engage global talent for work in Australia. 

With over 35 years of Australian visa and immigration expertise since being established in 1988, Interstaff’s Registered Migration Agents assist a wide array of businesses – from small to medium-sized enterprises to large multinational corporations across diverse industries such as Oil and Gas, Mining, Engineering and Construction, Information Technology, Government Departments, Agriculture, Health and Education. 

Interstaff adopt a customer-centric approach to all our services, enhancing the experience for both employer sponsors and their employees at every stage of the visa journey. 

Headquartered in Perth, Western Australia, Interstaff’s team of Registered Migration Agents provides Australian immigration services both domestically and globally, combining the advantages of a local presence with global reach.

Name: Indiana State Teachers Association
Description:

Name: National Black MBA Association, Los Angeles Chapter
Description:
The National Black MBA Association - Los Angeles Chapter (LABMBA or NBMBAA-LA) was founded in 1974. We represent Southern California and have 500+ members as far South as San Diego, as far East as the Inland Empire and as far North as the San Fernando Valley. We are in partnership with several corporate partners in a wide range of industries both in the public and private sector.

We empower undergraduate and graduate students, professionals, and entrepreneurs from underestimated groups through a wide range of strategic business partnerships, financial resources, career and educational programs, lifestyle experiences, and leadership opportunities.

We also empower high school students through our Leaders of Tomorrow program by providing mentoring, coaching, goal setting, and opportunities to serve their communities.

Name: Steuerberaterverband Hamburg e.V.

Mit seinem umfangreichen, attraktiven Weiterbildungs- und Veranstaltungsangebot ist der Steuerberaterverband Hamburg e.V. eine wichtige Anlaufstelle für die beruflichen Zusatzqualifizierungen für Steuerberater:innen.
Das Fortbildungsprogramm ist das perfekte Rüstzeug für Ihren Berufsalltag. 
Neben fachlichen Themen zum Steuerrecht steht auch die Digitalisierung im Beruf im Fokus des Programms.

Nasce per soddisfare queste tre esigenze specifiche:
1. Garantire la qualità della preparazione e delle competenze del Coach Professionista.
2. Offrire uno spazio di confronto e aggiornamento formativo costante.
3. Avviare iniziative per l’incontro tra Coach e Coachee per sostenere il successo professionale del Coach iscritto ad Asso.Co.Pro

Name: AE Chile | Asociación de Auditores Externos de Chile A.G.
Description:

Conscientes de que un adecuado clima de negocios supone credibilidad y confianza entre los actores, promovemos la adopción de normas y prácticas que provean de información al mercado, a la autoridad y a la opinión pública.
Somos una asociación gremial que congrega a las firmas de auditoría externa en Chile, cuya meta es ser referentes de proactividad y eficiencia en la comunidad de negocios en todos aquellos aspectos que mejoren los estándares de transparencia.
