Name: Grupo Montéz MX
Description:
Guardian Hill's MX es una organización dedicada a la creación de un impacto duradero en dos sectores clave: la construcción y la producción filmográfica educativa histórica. Con raíces en la ingeniería civil, arquitectura y la producción audiovisual, nuestro enfoque es holístico, abarcando desde la planificación y ejecución de proyectos constructivos hasta la divulgación histórica a través del cine.

Nuestras Divisiones:

1. Guardian Hill's Constructores:
   Nos especializamos en construcción, planificación urbana y gestión de proyectos, con un equipo comprometido en diseñar y construir espacios que perduren en el tiempo, siempre con un enfoque innovador y sostenible.

2. Guardian Hill's Productores:
   Nos dedicamos a la producción de contenido cinematográfico con un fuerte énfasis en la historia, la ciencia y la educación. Nuestro objetivo es crear películas y documentales que informen, inspiren y mantengan viva la rica herencia cultural e histórica.

Misión:
Nuestra misión es doble: construir infraestructuras que mejoren la calidad de vida y preservar historias que enriquezcan el conocimiento y la identidad cultural. A través de nuestras dos divisiones, buscamos ser un puente entre el pasado y el futuro, uniendo la solidez de la ingeniería con la creatividad de la producción audiovisual.

 Visión:
Guardian Hill's aspira a convertirse en un referente nacional e internacional en la creación de proyectos que fusionen innovación y tradición, impactando positivamente en comunidades y en la sociedad en general.


En Guardian Hill's, cada proyecto es una oportunidad para hacer una diferencia significativa, ya sea en la construcción de un nuevo hogar o en la producción de un documental que inspire a futuras generaciones.

Te invitamos a ser parte de nuestra visión y contribuir al legado que estamos creando.

Hvis du vil vide mere, kan du skrive til os her på siden eller på andersdalsager@gmail.com. Vi svarer altid inden for få dage.

Name: OPQTECC Organisme de qualification
Description:
Créé en 1965, l’OPQTECC est le seul organisme de qualification représentatif des économistes de la construction et des programmistes. 

L’association agit à deux niveaux :
 la qualification des entreprises 
 et la certification des personnes

Ses valeurs ?

 Neutralité : l’OPQTECC est indépendant vis-à-vis des organisations professionnelles. 

 Objectivité : les critères d’attribution de qualifications et de certifications sont factuels et prédéfinis.

 Optimisation : la révision régulière de la nomenclature permet de l’adapter à la réalité du terrain. (cf. encart « Extrait des statuts de l’association »)

 Pérennité : les qualifications et certifications sont renouvelables tous les 4 ans (sous conditions de répondre aux critères exigés).

 Qualité :  depuis 1996, un suivi d’heures de formation est exigé lors du renouvellement de qualification/certification.

Pour en savoir plus : 
 01 45 56 92 67 
 secretariat@opqtecc.org
 https://www.opqtecc.fr/

Name: UNICEM Grand Est
Description:
L’UNICEM Grand Est est la fédération qui regroupe les industries extractives de minéraux et les fabricants de matériaux de construction par transformation.   

𝐍𝐨𝐬 𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐫𝐞𝐬 
 𝐈𝐧𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐞𝐫 𝐞𝐭 𝐚𝐜𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐚𝐠𝐧𝐞𝐫 les 145 entreprises adhérentes dans leurs activités au quotidien. 
 𝐄́𝐜𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐫𝐞𝐫 les décideurs publics sur le rôle clé des activités de la filière et assurer le dialogue avec les associations. 
 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐮𝐯𝐨𝐢𝐫 l’emploi durable et raisonné des matériaux locaux en s’inscrivant dans l’économie circulaire. 
 𝐏𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐫 les connaissances, développer des expertises et encourager la mise en place des meilleures pratiques dans la gestion des sites de production. 
 𝐀𝐬𝐬𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐫 la promotion des démarches de progrès (Charte Environnement et Charte RSE), développées par la profession. 
 𝐅𝐚𝐢𝐫𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐚𝐢̂𝐭𝐫𝐞 au plus grand nombre l’industrie des matériaux. 
 𝐒𝐨𝐮𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐫 l’attractivité des métiers proposés par la filière auprès des jeunes. 

 𝗟𝗲𝘀 𝘀𝗶𝘁𝗲𝘀 𝗲𝗻 𝗚𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗱-𝗘𝘀𝘁

Près de 400 sites d'extraction : 
 315 carrières de granulats 
 31 carrières de roches ornementales  
 48 sites de minéraux pour l’industrie alimentant 25 usines 

148 unités de production de béton prêt à l’emploi ;  
90 plateformes de recyclage 

𝐃𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐨𝐢𝐬 𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐮𝐱 𝐞𝐭 𝐧𝐨𝐧 𝐝𝐞́𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞𝐬  

Près de 5 000 salariés travaillent au sein des entreprises de la filière, installées au cœur des territoires, qui répondent aux besoins du BTP, qui emploient 105 000 salariés.  

 
𝐃𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐚𝐠é́𝐞𝐬 𝐩𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐥'𝐞𝐧𝐯𝐢𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐞𝐭 𝐥𝐚 𝐑𝐒𝐄. 

114 sites adhérents sont engagés dans une démarche environnementale et/ou RSE animée par l’association UNICEM entreprises engagées.

Name: SDI (Syndicat des Indépendants et des TPE)
Description:
Le Syndicat des Indépendants (SDI) est la seule organisation interprofessionnelle patronale apolitique et financièrement indépendante dédiée à l’ensemble des entreprises de moins de 20 salariés, qui représentent 98 % des entreprises françaises, à savoir : les indépendants, TPE (Très Petites Entreprises).

Nos missions :
• Donner la parole aux Indépendants, TPE et PME
• Porter leurs voix
• Replacer leurs propositions au cœur des décisions économiques et politiques

Créé en 1993, le SDI représente aujourd’hui 25 000 dirigeants, commerçants, artisans et professions libérales. 

En 2017, le SDI a lancé le mouvement https://les98pourcent.fr/  pour interpeller les candidats à la Présidentielle et replacer les propositions des 98 % au cœur des programmes.

Name: The Norwegian Smartgrid Centre
Description:
Våre medlemmer kommer fra bransjeorganisasjoner, forskning, utdanning, produksjon, distribusjon, leverandør- og tjenesteyting innen kraftsektoren. Sammen bidrar vi til en akselerert utvikling av teknologi, næringsliv og marked, samt økt systemintegrasjon og digitalisering i energisystemet. 

Smartgridkonferansen er vår viktigste arena for samhandling og nettverksbygging. Vi arrangerer Smartgridkonferansen sammen med Fornybarakademiet. For å spre kunnskap og informasjon om forskning og innovasjon arrangerer vi fagdager for medlemmene og månedlige webinarer og nyhetsbrev for alle. Vi tar også initiativ til og gjennomfører samarbeidsprosjekter med og for våre medlemmer. 

Vil du vite mer se våre nettsider, eller ta kontakt!

Name: Austin Venture Association
Description:
Austin’s startup and venture capital scene is now a new frontier experiencing unprecedented growth. We're a community of accredited startup investors in the greater venture community of: venture capitalists, accelerators, university incubators, corporates, angels, family offices, and more.

We focus on three main areas to amplify and organize Austin's greater venture community, provide education and professional development, and deliver more and better startup support.

Name: ABOUV | Bezt Labs
Description:
BEZT LABS, an award-winning HR Tech startup is on a mission to revolutionise the talent assessment and acquisition landscape and to address the rising unemployment crisis by leveraging our unique innovations and cutting edge technologies. Much like a Child's right to education, We also envision a not so long future where every youth has a right to employment. 

Despite WORK being vital to human progress and success at large, the methods of hiring talent and finding jobs are utterly chaotic, outdated, and broken. We are working to change this with a key focus on making keywords measurable and creating a data driven hiring processes. While we empower organisations to make faster and better-informed recruitment decisions, we provide job seekers validation and visibility to showcase their skills in a meaningful way.

At the core of this mission is ABOUV, a first of its kind, bite sized, mix mode, 360° assessment-first AI platform. Built on our proprietary FACETS framework, our platform serves as a disruptive alternative to the traditional keyword based resumes where each pre-assessed talent are measured across 100+ competencies providing a holistic view of their strengths and potential. Designed to meet the demands of modern hiring, abouv combines in-depth skill reports with bidirectional AI matching, enabling companies to hire talent in as low as 30 minutes.

We have built our culture on the 5 Hs: being Happy, Helpful, Honest, Humble, and Hungry at work. These values guide us in our mission to create meaningful employment opportunities for the youth. At Bezt Labs, we understand the challenges that students face in today’s competitive job market, and our innovative approach bridges the gap between education and employment. We are not just helping students find jobs; we are empowering them to build successful careers and achieve their full potential. Join us as we work towards a future where every young person has the chance to succeed.

Name: COLLEGE OF BUSINESS ANALYSIS AND COMPLIANCE STUDIES
Description: College of Business Analysis and Compliance Studies is a professional institute for skills and career development on Corporate Analysis, Statutory Compliance and Enterprise Management for corporate renaissance and sustainability.

Name: Syndicat National des Diététiciens - SND
Description:
Le SND est un syndicat professionnel national régi par le Code du travail.

 Notre rôle : étudier et défendre les droits et les intérêts des diététiciennes et diététiciens dans tous les secteurs d'activité.

Name: 249BD
Description:

بنربط بين الناس، بنشجّع التعاون، وبنطوّر القدرات عشان نحرّك عجلة النمو والابتكار والريادة في كل المجالات

249BD – The Sudanese Business Development Community
A non-profit network empowering Sudanese talents in business development.
We connect professionals, foster collaboration, and build capabilities to drive growth, innovation, and leadership across industries.
Whether you’re in Sudan or abroad, join us in shaping a future where Sudanese excellence leads the way.

 We believe in the power of connection, culture, and continuous development.

Name: SIX° Networking
Description:
Our Purpose: 
We enrich lives. We propel each other into our highest potential. Our connections transform dreams into reality.

We believe the best kind of “networking” starts with relationships.

SIX° is a community of leaders and connectors who understand the value of investing time and energy to develop meaningful relationships. We hosts thoughtfully curated events and intimate group experiences to bring together small business owners, company founders, solopreneurs and sales professionals who are in pursuit of achieving their highest potential in business and beyond.

Name: Steuerberaterverband Niedersachsen Sachsen-Anhalt
Description: Der Steuerberaterverband Niedersachsen Sachsen-Anhalt vertritt die Interessen von mehr als 5.200 Steuerberaterinnen und Steuerberatern. Der Verband setzt sich für ein bürger- und mittelstandsfreundliches Besteuerungsverfahren ein und fördert die Zusammenarbeit zwischen den Bürgern, den Angehörigen der steuerberatenden Berufe und der Finanzverwaltung.

Name: Tech Brews
Description:
Tech brews is an inclusive, free and open community for the tech ecosystem. Whether you’re a startup founder, product manager, academic or industry leader, we hope you find meaningful discussions, relationships and collaborations. Our aim at Tech Brews is to create a one community from different sectors. Due to the background of the founding team, Health/Bio sector is the most established, but if you are from a different sector and want to create a community feel free to reach out.

*Join our WhatsApp group for updates on events and meetups!

**We have guests to speak on their area of expertise in different industries and encourage member knowledge and expertise sharing.

Founder: Dr Terence Tan

Name: Women's Council on Energy and the Environment (WCEE)
Description:
The Women’s Council on Energy and the Environment’s (WCEE) mission is to provide non-partisan, policy-neutral forums on energy and environmental issues and to foster the professional development and leadership capabilities of its members.

Founded in 1981, WCEE is a member-driven organization that values the diversity of membership and substantive programming. WCEE creates an open, cooperative and supportive environment for its members across the U.S. to engage in educational and networking, focusing on women, energy, and the environment. 

NOTE: WCEE aims to foster thoughtful discussions on energy and environmental topics between its members and non-members. WCEE monitors this site and reserves the right to remove any disrespectful or inappropriate content.

Name: Ohio City/County Management Association
Description:
OCMA is the leading organization in the State of Ohio promoting and developing excellence in local government. OCMA supports its members through professional development programs, member services, promoting high ethical standards, and networking with other professional organizations to achieve excellence in government.

Working as a local government administrator can be an isolating experience. Having the ability to candidly interact and learn from your peers can not only allow you to grow professionally, it can also allow you to cathartically survive a tricky political landscape and provide a better work/life balance.

Name: SerbLink
Description:
SerbLink is a global community dedicated to uniting over 10 million Serbs worldwide.

With a commitment to bringing Serbs together, we aim to overcome the obstacles of worldwide dispersion by providing a platform that allows them to connect, support, and empower one another. More importantly, we aspire to foster a sense of belonging by fulfilling services that are tied to their Serb identity. 

SerbLink is not a political organization, maintains no affiliations with governing bodies and does not have the desire to be a nationalistic, separatist, or religious organization. In fact, we believe that both cooperating and understanding different nationalities, religions, and ethnicities will yield the betterment of the Serbs and the world as a whole.

Join us in creating a stronger, more connected Serbian community!

Name: Avandis Consulting
Description:
Avandis Consulting works with the spectrum of businesses from owner-managed firms to large organisations. We work closely with founders and business leaders harnessing our international expertise and knowledge to provide wide-ranging individualised solutions for complex strategy and financing challenges.  We advice on managing day to day operations to devising growth initiatives to optimise business performance.

Our partners have diverse professional experience, and academic backgrounds in  banking,  economics, entrepreneurship from top ten educational institutions in the UK and France, We are fluent or bilingual in English and French. Living and working in countries across Europe, Africa and Asia; our cosmopolitan background has allowed us to develop strong a multicultural foundation deepening our understanding of diverse business environments.

Our managing partner is a highly sought after public speaker on business, entrepreneurship, women's leadership and women's economic empowerment and has spoken in France, U.K. and Nigeria and at prestigious institutions such as the LSE and Cambridge Judge Business School.

Name: Fédération Octopus
Description:
Octopus est, depuis 2018, la Fédération des Musiques Actuelles en Occitanie.
Elle est composée à ce jour de plus de 130 adhérent·e·s réparti·e·s sur les 13 départements de la région.
L’équipe est constituée de 10 personnes, entre Toulouse et Montpellier, qui participent à fédérer les acteur·rice·s des musiques actuelles de la région et à défendre leurs intérêts, ainsi que ceux de la filière.
L’association accompagne la structuration et le développement professionnels grâce à la veille, la ressource, et l’organisation de formations.
Elle œuvre également à la prévention, la réduction des risques et la santé, en milieu festif, ainsi qu’à la lutte contre les violences sexistes et sexuelles, et les LGBTI-phobies.
Enfin, la fédération soutient les musiques actuelles grâce aux dialogues et concertations avec les partenaires institutionnels, à l’observation, et la représentation.

Name: The Society for Archaeological Sciences
Description:
The Society for Archaeological Sciences (SocArchSci or SAS) is an international association and US-registered 501(c)(3) tax-exempt private foundation that promotes research on and dissemination of knowledge about our human past, studied through a wide range of physical, natural, and computational science techniques.  The Society represents a distinguished group of scholars, students, and professionals from around the world and is committed to the stewardship of high ethical and technical standards.  

Through the SAS Bulletin, the SASnet listserv, and multiple social media channels the Society serves as an international forum to discuss current trends, innovative techniques, and new challenges in archaeological research.  The Society also has formal affiliations with several leading peer-reviewed journals including Journal of Archaeological Science, Journal of Archaeological Science: Reports, Archaeometry, and Archaeological and Anthropological Sciences.  SAS is a member of the Federation of Analytical Chemistry and Spectroscopy Societies (FACSS: https://www.facss.org/Member-Societies/) and supports joint programming with other organizations on an ad hoc basis.  SAS organizes and co-sponsors symposiums and award competitions at multiple conferences and workshops each year; look for us especially at the International Symposium on Archaeometry, the annual meeting of the Society for American Archaeology, and the annual conference of FACSS - The Great Scientific Exchange (SciX).  We are always seeking new partners in advancing the archaeological sciences and promoting the professional and intellectual development of our members.

Name: AusIMM Geoscience Society
Description: The Geoscience Society represents the interests of AusIMM members in the field of geoscience and related technical areas.

Name: South African Genetics Society
Description:
SAGS assists and advises on the establishment of standards of teaching, training and research in genetics in South Africa. It also communicates information to the general public on the value of historic and new developments in genetics, and encourages education and training in this regard.

The Society strives to facilitate multi-disciplinary and multi-institutional scientific co-operation in genetics, in the context of Southern Africa and Africa. It supports and fosters genetics through congresses, symposia, workshops, newsletters, and publications.

Name: Fachverband Sanitär-Heizung-Klima Baden-Württemberg
Description:
As a trade and employers' association, the Sanitär-Heizung-Klima Baden-Württemberg trade association represents the interests of Baden-Württemberg's sanitary, heating and air-conditioning trade businesses vis-à-vis the state, market partners and the public.

With its practical and expert approach, the association also offers its 47 member guilds and the 3,200 or so HVAC contractors they represent a wide range of tailored consulting and other services in all areas relevant to the company. We see ourselves as shapers of the energy transition in buildings and support our member companies in the transformation to digitalization and climate protection.

Name: BNI Maritimes Inc.
Description:
𝐑𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐑𝐞𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐩𝐬. 𝐑𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐑𝐞𝐟𝐞𝐫𝐫𝐚𝐥𝐬. 𝐑𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐑𝐞𝐬𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐬.

BNI Maritimes supports business owners and professionals across Nova Scotia, New Brunswick, and Prince Edward Island by helping them build trust-based relationships that lead to measurable growth.

As part of BNI (Business Network International), the world's largest business networking and referral organization, we offer a structured, proven system for generating referrals and creating strong, lasting connections.

We’re continuing to build on BNI’s strong foundation in the region with a refreshed, people-first approach that reflects our renewed focus on helping every member feel supported, valued, and seen.

𝐖𝐡𝐲 𝐉𝐨𝐢𝐧 𝐁𝐍𝐈 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐬?
