BNI isn’t just another networking group. It’s a referral-driven system that works, with people who care and a growing community that’s ready to support your success.

We’re expanding chapters across Atlantic Canada, and we’d love to help you find the right one.

Learn more at www.bnimaritimes.com

Name: Black Professionals in Life Sciences (BPLS)
Description:
Welcome to our vibrant community dedicated to actively championing the success of black professionals in the life science industry. Black Professionals in Life Science (BPLS), formerly known as BPiH is an organisation that empowers ethnically diverse professionals in Life Sciences through networking, mentorship, coaching and career development initiatives. 

Mission Statement: 

At BPLS, our mission is to close the ethnic diversity gap in the life sciences industry by providing unwavering support, resources, and opportunities to Black and ethnically diverse professionals. Together, we are committed to creating an equitable and inclusive environment where talent knows no boundaries.

Vision Statement:

Our vision is a future where the Life Science industry mirrors the rich diversity of our society. By 2035, we envision a UK Life Science workforce where Black and other Ethnically diverse professionals not only have representation but also thrive in leadership roles. Where Black Excellence is recognised and celebrated.

Name: MEDEF 29 | Mouvement des Entreprises de France - Finistère
Description: La principale organisation professionnelle du Finistère pour vous accompagner, vous aider et vous mettre en relation avec d'autres dirigeants.

Name: Edgers
Description:
EDGERS acompaña a organizaciones y a profesionales en la gestión de la enorme incertidumbre del presente. 

Nuestro propósito es mejorar el mundo invitando a profesionales y organizaciones a utilizar el futuro como herramienta.

Name: Egyptian Healthcare Supply Chain Association
Description:
The Egyptian Healthcare Supply Chain Association (EHSCA) is a non-profit professional organization that brings together leading experts, practitioners, and academics in healthcare supply chain management. Established to serve as a national platform for knowledge exchange and collaboration, EHSCA is committed to empowering Egypt’s healthcare sector by driving operational efficiency, strategic transformation, and sustainable practices.

Our mission is to adopt and localize global best practices rooted in science to elevate healthcare supply chain performance in Egypt. We aim to build a professional community capable of leading impactful change and contributing to a resilient and future-ready healthcare system.

EHSCA’s key objectives include:

Enhancing the efficiency and sustainability of healthcare supply chains through policy advocacy, workforce development, and modern tools.

Promoting scientific and accredited methodologies in procurement, inventory, distribution, quality control, and strategic planning.

Supporting localization by empowering national talent and encouraging local manufacturing of medical supplies and equipment.

Fostering a culture of sustainability across environmental, economic, and institutional dimensions.

Delivering accredited training programs and certifications to build a new generation of healthcare supply chain professionals.

Building partnerships with government, private sector, and academia to ensure an integrated approach.

Contributing technical expertise to national policy development aligned with healthcare priorities.


EHSCA aspires to become Egypt’s national center of excellence in healthcare supply chain management and a key enabler of Egypt Vision 2030 and the New Republic’s goals.

Name: Thai Corporate Counsel Association (THAI-CCA)
Description:
Founded on 23 February 2023, The THAI-CCA is Thailand's inaugural corporate counsel association, created by corporate counsels, for corporate counsels. Our mission: to provide unparalleled opportunities for legal education, networking, and community growth. 

At THAI-CCA, members engage in a vibrant exchange of legal knowledge, experiences, innovations, and best practices. We are a catalyst for career advancements, industry insights, and the latest legal trends. 

Membership at THAI-CCA is inclusive and open to all corporate counsels in Thailand, irrespective of background or expertise. Join us in shaping the future of Thailand's legal landscape.

For collaboration, reach out to us at thaicca.board@gmail.com. Please note, while we appreciate all inquiries, we regret that we may not be able to respond to event or personal queries due to capacity constraints.

Name: CIAO AFRICA
Description:
CIAO AFRICA est une association privée d'entrepreneurs italiens et ouest-africains qui vise à promouvoir les relations commerciales et les liens économiques entre les entreprises italiennes et ouest-africaines.
CIAO AFRICA a été fondée en 2024 par l'ingénieur Niccolò Tendi, actuel président, et par un groupe d'une centaine d'entrepreneurs italiens et ouest-africains.
La structure agit en réciprocité au profit des entrepreneurs italiens et ouest-africains en leur offrant un service d'accompagnement, de lobbying, d'intermédiation, de conseil et de renseignement. C'est aussi un lieu de rencontres personnelles et de débats professionnels où se retrouvent le « savoir-faire » des partenaires et les connaissances spécifiques de personnes hautement qualifiées.
CIAO AFRICA est un point de départ important pour toute activité qui se déroule entre l'Italie et l'Afrique de l'Ouest.

Name: The FP&A Hub
Description:
Plan Buddies serves as a global community uniting Business Planning and Analysis practitioners worldwide. 
Our mission is simple: to inspire, connect, and empower professionals in this dynamic field. Whether you're a seasoned expert or just stepping into this realm, our community offers a nurturing space for networking, learning, and growing together. Being a part of Plan Buddies means joining a diverse network of passionate individuals committed to driving success through effective planning and analysis. Here, you'll discover a wealth of knowledge, share experiences, and collaborate with professionals who comprehend the challenges and opportunities within this domain. 
Our community is purpose-built to cultivate professional growth. Through engaging discussions, enlightening articles, and interactive events, we aim to inspire and motivate our members to excel in their roles. 
Whether seeking advice on best practices, exploring emerging trends, or pursuing career prospects, Plan Buddies is the ultimate destination. Joining 

Plan Buddies grants you access to: 
 Knowledge Hub: Dive into a repository of resources, articles, webinars, and more to stay informed and inspired. 
 Networking: Connect with peers, mentors, and mentees to expand your network and gain fresh perspectives. 
 Mentorship: Engage in our Mentorship Program for tailored guidance and the opportunity to share your expertise.
  Career Advancement: Explore discussions on career progression, job recommendations, and exciting opportunities.
  Engagement: Participate in lively discussions, events, and challenges to stay motivated and deeply involved.

Name: Australian Institute of Office Professionals
Description:
The Australian Institute of Office Professionals is the only professional membership association for Office Professionals in Australia and is a vibrant community of members who empower, collaborate, mentor and upskill through pathways to education.
Members includes both the corporate and public sector of business and covers a huge various of job titles.  
Since 1963, AIOP has experienced many changes and today is primarily focused on improving the profile of the office profession across the business community; increasing its members’ pathway to education; providing access to professional development activities including national and division webinars featuring excellent presenters and topics; and face-to-face activities in each Division.

Name: ACSIEL Alliance Electronique
Description:
Depuis le 2 janvier 2026, ACSIEL, SNESE et SPDEI ont fusionné afin de créer la Fédération de l’Electronique Française (FdEF). Suivez nous dès maintenant sur le LinkedIn de la FdEF !

La FdEF unit les acteurs de l'électronique pour parler d'une seule voix, renforcer les synergies et contribuer à accélérer la croissance du secteur en France.
Notre vision, basée sur les axes prioritaires du CSF Electronique, est de construire une filière française forte, innovante et durable.

Nos missions :
- engager et rendre visible l’ensemble des membres de la filière
- porter une vision stratégique commune pour renforcer la filière
- promouvoir les métiers et attirer de nouveaux talents
- stimuler l’innovation et favoriser les synergies à l’intérieur de la filière et avec les filières amont et aval
- représenter l’industrie électronique auprès des pouvoirs publics afin de défendre ses intérêts et promouvoir ses activités


---
ACSIEL Alliance Électronique était l’organisation professionnelle de l’industrie électronique française qui fédérait tous les acteurs de la chaîne de la valeur de fabrication des composants, des systèmes, du test et de la mesure électronique, des équipements, des consommables et des services électroniques en France.

De la recherche académique et l'innovation au test et mesure en passant par la fabrication de composants, de semi-conducteurs et d'équipements pour l'industrie électronique, Acsiel est un écosystème intégré et cohérent, accélérateur de l'électronique française.

Son positionnement était celui d’une organisation qui parle aux donneurs d’ordres et aux pouvoirs publics, qui échange avec tous les acteurs socio-économiques, qui crée et promeut les conditions du développement de l’activité, des métiers et des emplois.

Acsiel est membre fondateur du Comité Stratégique de Filière « Industrie Electronique » labellisé par l’état français.

En attendant le site de la FdEF : www.acsiel.fr

Name: Dutch Farm Design B.V.
Description:
After more than 15 years of experience in agricultural installation technology, we founded Dutch Farm Design in 2019. With a dedicated team, we provide innovative and sustainable technical installations for poultry and pig farming worldwide. For us, it's not just about installations—it’s about smart, future-proof solutions that help businesses grow.

Our approach is built on craftsmanship, trust, and a unique vision. We believe in customized solutions and thinking beyond standard systems. This ensures redundant, climate-resistant, and high-quality installations that guarantee maximum reliability and efficiency, regardless of the conditions.

 Redundant and energy-efficient systems for optimal reliability and lower operational costs
 Tailor-made solutions for HVAC, electrical, mechanical, fire protection, sanitary systems, and more
 Climate-specific designs for diverse global regions
 High-quality materials such as PVC and fire-resistant panels, doors, and windows
 Data & communication systems and compressed air solutions
 End-to-end project support: from design to on-site quality assurance

 Contact: +31 (0)528 217 056
 Email: sales@dfdbv.com

Name: NSPS Young Surveyors Network (YSN)
Description:
Modeled after and closely tied to the International Federation of Surveyors (FIG) Young Surveyors Network, the NSPS Young Surveyors Network is an organization dedicated to creating a national network of Young Surveyors within NSPS and its affiliate organizations.

With the first meeting held in 2014, the organization was developed to build networks and grow relationships for surveyors under the age of 35 or who recently graduated. As those new to the profession have a greater opportunity to increase personal and professional networks, they will motivate others to join the community and promote the surveying.

The definition of a Young Surveyor is someone under the age of 35 or who earned their degree within the past ten years. All surveyors, however, are welcome to join, but the focus will remain on supporting those new to the industry.

Name: Irish Association of Humanistic & Integrative Psychotherapy (IAHIP)
Description:
The Irish Association of Humanistic & Integrative Psychotherapy (IAHIP),is the professional body in Ireland for humanistic and integrative psychotherapy.  Humanistic and integrative psychotherapy has its roots in humanistic philosophy, which emphasises human dignity and the human capacity for fulfilment.  It aims to work with a full range of influences to encourage the development of the individual and her/his relationship to others and to society.

Our role is:
to set and maintain standards in humanistic and integrative psychotherapy
to accredit qualified practitioners
to accredit qualified supervisors
to provide training and supervision of trainees and continuous professional development
to represent our members nationally and internationally
to foster research

Name: PM's Connect
Description:
PM’s Connect is a community of passionate builders; project managers building their careers and PM creators building their brands. We aim to build confidence and overcome the confusion phase after training/ taking courses. Our goal is to help each other understand better what and where best to start from.

A space where Entrepreneurs and Project Managers share their stories on their journeys to project management and insights into the brands they are currently building.

Our mission is to document the evolution of Africa’s project management landscape, highlighting key players, their journeys, the obstacles they overcame, and the valuable lessons they learnt.

P.S: For project managers looking to grow within the PM space, join our WhatsApp community here: 
https://chat.whatsapp.com/FhglebVBvG0H6DwBqyQ7Nt

Name: Athletic Equipment Managers Association
Description:
The purpose of the The Athletic Equipment Managers Association (AEMA) is to promote, advance, and improve the Equipment Managers Profession in all of its many phases. One goal is to work as a group to bring about equipment improvements for the greater safety of all participants in sports and recreation. Members of the AEMA enjoy the opportunity to meet fellow equipment managers at convention, share ideas, and learn more efficient techniques to help improve their work place.

AEMA Certification is an educational program that gives athletic equipment managers an accepted level of proficiency in the performance of their jobs. Scantron Corporation is contracted with the Athletic Equipment Manager’s Association (AEMA) to develop a Certification Standard for Athletic Equipment Management. Through a role delineation process, the following areas of job performance were identified for athletic equipment managers: Management, Administration, and Professional Development; Procurement; Accountability; Maintenance; Fitting and Safety.

Name: American Federation of Restorers
Description: The American Federation of Restorers (AFOR) is a membership organization dedicated to reforming and advancing the property damage restoration industry in the United States. AFOR aims to promote education, standardization of best practices, accountability, community, and the welfare of frontline workers and homeowners. By addressing the systemic issues prevalent in the industry, AFOR seeks to eliminate frivolous spending, lawsuits, and profit-over-people ideologies while raising industry standards, and protecting the rights of restoration workers.

Name: Engineers Australia WA Division
Description:
Western Australia has a diverse membership with over 20,000 members across all aspects of engineering and the built environment. The WA Division Committee is the member elected representative body of our engineering profession within Western Australia.  If you wish to contact us, please send an email to WA@engineersaustralia.org.au 
Not all leaders are engineers, but we believe all engineers are leaders. 

Our collective mission is to advance society through great engineering and we do this through leadership of the profession, supporting pathways into engineering, advocacy for engineering led solutions of the problems facing Western Australia, an effective volunteer network, and supporting a strong professional framework. 


This page/group is office bearer/volunteer built and run by local WA engineers. This is not the official page of Engineers Australia and is not moderated or managed by Engineers Australia employees.

Name: Safrea (Southern African Freelancers' Association)
Description:
SAFREA is the South African Freelancers' Association, dedicated to supporting and promoting the interests of freelancers in the communications industry in Southern Africa. 

Members include all areas of communication including: writers, editors, proofreaders, photographers, videographers, graphic designers, illustrators, researchers, translators, and other experts. Membership to SAFREA includes access to workshops, training and skills development, administrative support and other benefits.

Founded in 1999, Safrea promotes the interests of freelance media specialists, working to raise their professional standing and to make working as a freelancer more rewarding.

Name: CEO Minds Pakistan
Description:
CEO Minds Pakistan is a national platform dedicated to bringing together CEOs, founders, directors, and business owners from across Pakistan. With a vibrant and expanding network of over 500 registered CEOs, the initiative serves as a bridge between influential leaders, fostering collaboration, innovation, and shared growth. Our mission is to strengthen the leadership community and contribute meaningfully to the development of Pakistan’s economy by creating opportunities for networking, learning, and global exposure. Through a wide range of programs and initiatives, we aim to empower top-level professionals and future leaders alike.

Our platform hosts several impactful initiatives, including CEO Minds Summits that gather industry leaders under one roof, CEO Awards that celebrate excellence and innovation, and CEO Networking sessions that create space for meaningful business connections. We also offer the Future CEOs Fellowship Program to nurture emerging leadership, CEO Minds Media Spotlight to highlight inspiring stories, and Boardroom Talks to engage in in-depth discussions on relevant business challenges. Additionally, our Skillful Labs initiative focuses on equipping CEOs with modern tools and insights, while our CEO Trips combine leisure and networking in refreshing environments. To support well-being, the CEO Sports Program encourages physical and mental fitness through organized activities, and the CEO Podcast Series gives leaders a voice to share their journey and expertise across our media channels. Further expanding our reach, our Global Market Access Program helps Pakistani businesses explore international markets and opportunities.

Name: North Carolina Public Health Association
Description:
The NC Public Health Association was formed in 1909 by a group of concerned county superintendents of health in an effort to promote public health in North Carolina. Over 100 years later, our Association of individuals and organizations continues working to improve the public's health through political advocacy, public awareness, professional development, and serving as an interface between research and practice.

OUR MISSION
North Carolina Public Health Association is an association of individuals and organizations working to improve the public's health through political advocacy, public awareness, professional development, and the interface between research and practice.

APHA AFFILIATE MEMBER
North Carolina Public Health Association is an affiliated association of the American Public Health Association (APHA). We have collaborated with APHA to grow stronger as organizations, to share expertise, influence, and resources, and to advocate for common priorities at the local, state and federal levels.

Name: Venre
Description: Situated in the heart of United States, Venre Organization stands tall as a creative powerhouse. Since its inception in 2021, this versatile company has been offering an impressive array of services that encompass software development, financial solutions, and top-notch marketing strategies. Their team of experts collaborates seamlessly with businesses of all sizes, transforming ideas into impactful solutions that drive growth and innovation. From designing visually captivating websites to developing custom software and implementing effective marketing campaigns, Venre Organization is dedicated to empowering clients with cutting-edge tools and strategies that propel them toward success.

Name: Colegio de Profesionales en Ciencias Políticas y Relaciones Internacionales Costa Rica
Description: Este Colegio Profesional pretende garantizar la calidad del ejercicio de las Ciencias Políticas y las Relaciones Internacionales; así como articular y defender los intereses gremiales para el desarrollo de nuestras personas profesionales, en beneficio de la sociedad costarricense.

Name: Black Women’s Council
Description:
The Black Women’s Council (BWC) is a national platform committed to the empowerment, elevation, and unification of Black women across all industries and stages of life. Rooted in purpose and driven by passion, BWC was founded to amplify the voices of Black women, cultivate leadership, foster economic advancement, and build spaces where Black women can thrive unapologetically.

Through advocacy, mentorship, community engagement, and professional development, BWC exists to support and uplift the next generation of changemakers, entrepreneurs, creatives, and leaders. Our mission is to dismantle systemic barriers, restore confidence, and affirm the brilliance of Black women in every space they occupy.

BWC is more than a network—it’s a movement of women leading with purpose, power, and pride.

Name: Deutscher Berufsverband Rettungsdienst e.V.
Description:
Der DBRD – Die berufspolitische Stimme des Rettungsdienstes.

Der Deutsche Berufsverband Rettungsdienst e.V. (DBRD) vertritt die Interessen des gesamten Rettungsfachpersonals – engagiert, fachlich fundiert und politisch wirksam.

Als unabhängiger Berufsverband setzen wir uns auf Bundesebene dafür ein, dass die Arbeit im Rettungsdienst unter besseren Rahmenbedingungen stattfinden kann: mit mehr Anerkennung, fairen Strukturen und einer starken fachlichen Basis.

Was wir tun:
Praxis in die Politik bringen: Wir vertreten die Perspektiven aus dem Einsatzalltag in politischen Entscheidungsprozessen.

Gesetze mitgestalten: Wir begleiten Gesetzgebungsverfahren, verfassen Stellungnahmen und beziehen klar Position.

Wissen fördern: Wir entwickeln Fortbildungsformate, fördern kollegialen Austausch und stärken die berufliche Identität.

Für alle, die im Einsatz alles geben.

Wer im Rettungsdienst arbeitet, kennt die hohe Belastung – aber auch die große Leidenschaft für diesen Beruf. Wir setzen genau hier an:

Wir wollen Menschen im Einsatz stärken, ihnen den Rücken freihalten – und dafür sorgen, dass ihre Arbeit gesehen, verstanden und ernst genommen wird.

Ob Du schon lange im Beruf bist oder gerade erst einsteigst: Wir sind an Deiner Seite.

#gerneperdu #DBRD #performanceistkeinverbrechen #Rettungsdienst #Notfallsanitäter #Berufspolitik #ZukunftRettungsdienst #WirSindRettung #RettungMitSystem #RettungMitVerstand #WirRettenBeruflich #MitHerzUndHaltungFürDenRettungsdienst

Name: Network Club Angola
Description:
Novos contactos, Conselhos profissionais, Business plans,
Dicas de gestão, Troca de experiências.

Name: The PA+PER
Description: Welcome to the PA+PER Magazine. The first magazine dedicated to sharing updates and information on the Physician Associate profession in the UK, and around the world. Run and Edited by Physician Associates, we welcome readers from all clinical and healthcare background to learn more about the Physician Associate role

Name: Union des Ports de Plaisance Provence Alpes Côte d'Azur et Monaco (UPACA)
Description:
L’Union des Ports de Plaisance Provence Alpes Côte d’Azur et Monaco (UPACA), est la représentation, sur ce secteur géographique ,des gestionnaires de port de plaisance auprès de l’État, des collectivités territoriales et des diverses institutions.

Regroupant plus de 97% des ports de plaisance, l'UPACA se destine à accompagner tous les gestionnaires de plans d’eaux et les gestionnaires de port à sec qui hébergent des navires de plaisance, quel que soit le statut du gestionnaire, quel que soit le statut du plan d’eau ou celui du port à sec. Plus d'informations et plaquette de présentation sur notre site Internet.

Name: ALPHA Scientists In Reproductive Medicine
Description:
Alpha was founded in 1994 by three internationally renowned scientists with a passion for embryology.

Witnessing the rapid developments in IVF and related technologies, Jacques Cohen, Brian Dale, and Steen Willadsen formed the organization to get clinical embryology to be recognized as a profession and clinical embryologists to organize and have their own advocacy and communication platform.

Name: Consent Foundation
Description: Consent Foundation is an pro-bono, not-for-profit organization from and by participants within the data privacy ecosystem, united by a shared commitment to upholding data protection, privacy, and rights. With its members consisting of Data Fiduciaries, Data Processors, Consent Managers, Publishers, Auditors, and others, the Consent Foundation takes the lead in pursuing its mission to establish frameworks, standards, and industry programs that foster business growth in the Indian market.

Name: Ogólnopolski Związek Zawodowy Psychologów
Description:
OZZP jest związkiem zawodowym, powstał z myślą o zjednoczeniu środowiska psychologów w Polsce i skutecznego walczenia o jego interesy.  Pragniemy reprezentować interesy psychologów wszystkich specjalności. W swoje szeregi przyjmujemy psychologów z całego kraju, bez względu na to w jakiej branży pracują.
Członkiem związku może zostać również psycholog pracujący w ramach własnej działalności, kontraktu czy na umowę cywilnoprawną a także aktualnie niepracujący.

Dołącz do nas!
https://www.ozzp.org.pl/czlonkostwo.html

Name: Textile Engineers Club
Description: Textile Engineers Club is an organization for Textile Engineers, whose motto is to develop Textile Engineers around the country to create a better Textile Industry.

Name: OAAPN -- Ohio Association of Advanced Practice Nurses
Description:
OAAPN is the largest and only full-service statewide professional membership organization for Advanced Practice Registered Nurses of all specialties within Ohio.  OAAPN represents the interests of more than 12,800 APRNs currently practicing in Ohio and continually advocates at local, state, and federal levels for the recognition of APRNs as providers of high quality, cost effective, accessible healthcare for all Ohioans.  
 
OAAPN's history dates back to the 1980s until officially organizing in 1990 and have provided Ohio's APRNs with a unified community to network and advocate for APRN issues while succeeding on many fronts through the years.  OAAPN continually strives to remove barriers to APRN practice and has become a leading information resource within Ohio regarding APRN practice, legislative and reimbursement issues as well as providing a gateway of opportunities to employment and continuing education.

Name: Rosen's Diversified, Inc.
Description: RDI is comprised of Rosen’s Inc., American Foods Group, and Scientific Life Solutions.

Name: Ghana Institute of Geoscientists (GhIG)
Description:
The Ghana Institute of Geoscientists (GhIG)
GhIG is the umbrella association of all Geoscientists in Ghana. Previously known as the Ghana Geological Society, it was established in 1996 with the mandate and mission, among other things, to regulate and promote the progress of the professional practice of Geoscience in Ghana. Its motto is To the Earth for its Wealth and Preservation. The membership of GhIG consists of Students, Professionals, Fellows and Honorary Fellows.

Name: Indian Polyurethane Association (IPUA)
Description: IPUA, founded in 1992, unites raw material, machinery, processing, molding & lab stakeholders.

Name: Corporación Regional de Desarrollo Productivo Los Ríos
Description: Somos la Corporación Regional de Desarrollo Productivo de Los Ríos, una institución público-privada sin fines de lucro, comprometida con el desarrollo sostenible de nuestra región.

Name: HR Bern
Description:
Du suchst echtes HR-Know-how und ein starkes lokales Netzwerk? Willkommen bei HR Bern.

Seit 1956 sind wir die Anlaufstelle für HR-Fachpersonen im Berner Mittelland. Hier triffst du Gleichgesinnte aus KMU und Grosskonzernen zum Austausch auf Augenhöhe.

Was dich bei uns erwartet: 
 Expertenwissen: Aktuelle Trends von Recruiting bis Transformation. 
 Netzwerk: Über 700 Mitglieder und 4 Regionalgruppen (Bern, Oberaargau-Emmental, Oberland, Seeland). 
 Events: 15+ Anlässe pro Jahr – Fachforen, Firmenbesuche und Netzwerk-Apéros. 
 Weiterbildung: Praxisnahe Impulse für dein Tagesgeschäft.

Werde Teil der engagiertesten HR-Community der Region.

 Jetzt Mitglied werden: https://www.hrbern.ch/mitgliedschaft/mitglied-werden/

Name: Fachverband Sanitär-Heizung-Klima Baden-Württemberg
Description:
As a trade and employers' association, the Sanitär-Heizung-Klima Baden-Württemberg trade association represents the interests of Baden-Württemberg's sanitary, heating and air-conditioning trade businesses vis-à-vis the state, market partners and the public.

With its practical and expert approach, the association also offers its 47 member guilds and the 3,200 or so HVAC contractors they represent a wide range of tailored consulting and other services in all areas relevant to the company. We see ourselves as shapers of the energy transition in buildings and support our member companies in the transformation to digitalization and climate protection.

Name: WinOrWin Sophia
Description:
WinOrWin un réseau de club d’affaires indépendant et français pour des entrepreneurs qui à un niveau local souhaitent s’apporter des contacts qualifiés, des conseils, du soutien et de la bonne humeur ! Notre réseau compte aujourd’hui près de 90 clubs à travers la France.

25% des entrepreneurs adhèrent à un club d’affaires, pourquoi pas vous ?

  Le fonctionnement de notre club d'affaires :
- 1 représentant par corps de métier et par club
- 1 réunion tous les 15 jours
- des afterworks 1 fois par mois
- des événements interclubs : sportifs, galas...
- avec une adhésion annuelle uniquement à 490€ HT par an.

Le tout dans un Win Spirit : de l'écoute, de la bienveillance, du sourire.

Name: Asociación de Geógrafas Chile
Description: Geógrafas Chile, es una red de geógrafas, profesionales y estudiantes,que buscan posicionar y relevar el saber de la profesión desde una perspectiva feminista, visibilizando problemáticas geográficas y aportando en la toma de decisiones a distintas escalas, para contribuir a la sociedad.

Name: UIMM Val de Loire
Description:
L’UIMM La Fabrique de l’Avenir, un réseau de proximité et de confiance constitué de 59 UIMM territoriales (qui couvre 1,5 million de salariés et 42 000 entreprises industrielles de la métallurgie).
L’UIMM Val de Loire adhère à l’UIMM La Fabrique de l’Avenir.
Elle constitue un réseau engagé au service du développement des entreprises, qui fédère 188 entreprises adhérentes dans le Cher (18) et le Loir et Cher (41).
Nous sommes engagés aux côtés des femmes et des hommes qui fabriquent l’industrie !
À ce titre, notre mission est de contribuer à installer un écosystème propice à la croissance industrielle, de créer l’environnement social le plus favorable au développement des entreprises adhérentes, de représenter et défendre leurs intérêts en leur apportant conseil et assistance sur nos 2 territoires :
portant la voix de l’industrie et défendant ses intérêts
facilitant la gestion des contraintes des industriels sur les volets RH, droit social et HSE
aidant les industriels à être plus performants.
Elle est l’interlocutrice :
des pouvoirs publics
des partenaires sociaux avec qui elle négocie périodiquement
des entreprises qu’elle assiste et conseille dans tous les domaines de la vie de l’entreprise, notamment dans ceux de la politique et de la gestion sociale
L’UIMM Val de Loire représente et défend les entreprises de la branche dans toutes les instances paritaires (Prud’hommes, URSSAF…) par le biais de ses mandataires.
L’UIMM Val de Loire - La Fabrique de l’Avenir avec son réseau met à disposition des entreprises industrielles une large palette de services :
Appui juridique et contentieux
Formation initiale et continue du niveau V au niveau I, certifications (CQPM, CQPI, CCPM, CCPI, blocs de compétences), formation à la carte
Conseils en ressources humaines, recrutement, évaluation, reclassement/outplacement, bilans de compétences, GPEC
RSE
Mixité
Promotion, attractivité des métiers
Insertion, inclusion
Détection des aides publiques et montage des dossiers de financement

Name: Cleveland Talent Alliance
Description: The Cleveland Talent Alliance is a consortium of public, private and nonprofit organizations working to retain and attract talent to the region with an initial focus on the fast-growth sectors of IT/technology (including financial services), health care and advanced manufacturing.

Name: Associação Portuguesa de Medicina Geral e Familiar - APMGF
Description:
A Associação Portuguesa de Medicina Geral e Familiar (APMGF) é uma associação socioprofissional forte e interveniente que marcou de forma decisiva a criação e evolução da Medicina Geral e Familiar (MGF) em Portugal, contribuindo com ideias e soluções inovadoras que dignificaram a Associação e desenvolveram a MGF.

Conta com mais de 40 anos de atividade e cerca de 4000 sócios Internos e Especialistas em MGF, com a ambição de que cada vez mais médicos de família possam unir-se a este projeto.

Tem como principais objetivos moldar o futuro da MGF, continuar a contribuir para a qualidade dos cuidados oferecidos aos utentes e pugnar pelas condições de exercício de todos os Médicos de Família em Portugal.

The Portuguese Association of General and Family Medicine (APMGF) is an active socio-professional association which decisively shaped the creation and evolution of General and Family Medicine in Portugal, contributing with ideas and innovative solutions that propelled Family Medicine forward.

It has more than 40 years of remarkable achievements, around 4000 Family Medicine Residents and Specialists as members and aiming to recruit an even greater number of family doctors to join its ranks.

Its main objectives include framing the future of Family Medicine, continue to contribute to the quality of care offered to patients and uphold the improvement of working conditions for all Family Doctors in Portugal.

Name: Pain Medicine Academy of Advanced Practice Providers
Description: The Pain Medicine Academy of Advanced Practice Providers is a National Association of PA, APRN, Nursing and Healthcare Professionals who practice acute and chronic multidisciplinary Pain Management. If you are an APP who treats pain, welcome home!

Name: Société Française de Physiothérapie (SFP)
Description:
Les membres de la Société Française de Physiothérapie (SFP) sont des masseurs-kinésithérapeutes, des physiothérapeutes, ou toute personne justifiant d’un titre admis en équivalence et autres professionnels ayant un lien avec la kinésithérapie/physiothérapie. 
La Société Française de Physiothérapie est dirigée par un conseil d'administration composé de 12 membres au maximum.

Les membres sont répartis dans 3 collèges (collège des pratique, collège de l'enseignement, collège des sciences du vivant). Des groupes de travail et 5 groupes d’intérêts permettent aux membres de s'investir pour l'association.

OBJECTIFS DE LA SFP
 
La Société Française de Physiothérapie est une association scientifique professionnelle (loi 1901) qui s'est fixée différents objectifs.

* Promouvoir la recherche en kinésithérapie/physiothérapie
* Organiser des réunions scientifiques, des congrès
* Publier des documents scientifiques
* Editer des ouvrages
* Octroyer des bourses et des prix de recherche en physiothérapie/kinésithérapie
* Collecter, gérer et diffuser la documentation professionnelle
* Coordonner et échanger des travaux avec les associations et structures équivalentes à l’échelon national et international
* Promouvoir leur représentation
* Constituer un pôle de référence et d'expertise pour la physiothérapie/kinésithérapie, ainsi que pour les formations initiale et continue, auprès des instances professionnelles, universitaires, ordinales, sociales ou autres.

Name: NHO Byggenæringen
Description: The Federation of Norwegian Construction Industries (NHO Byggenæringen) is a business and employer policy organization for companies in the construction industry. We are an umbrella organization for 13 industries and have more than 3,400 member companies with more than 72,000 employees. NHO Byggenæringen was established in 1997 and is currently the third largest association in The Confederation of Norwegian Enterprise (NHO).

Name: Bundesverband Deutscher Vermögensberater e.V. - BDV
Description: Der Bundesverband Deutscher Vermögensberater (BDV) vertritt als größter Berufsverband die Interessen selbstständiger Vermögensberater. Mit über 50 Jahren Erfahrung in Vermögensaufbau und Absicherung ist der Verband mit seinen mehr als 15.000 Mitgliedern ein wichtiger Gesprächspartner von Bundestag, Bundesrat, den Landesregierungen und ist aktiv auf europäischer Ebene, wenn es um die Rahmenbedingungen der Finanzberatung geht. Gleichzeitig fördert der Verband das Berufsbild der Vermögensberatung in der Bekanntheit, im Ansehen und in seiner Bedeutung.

Name: Green Energy Cluster Algeria
Description:
Green Energy Cluster Algeria (par abréviation Cluster GEC’A) est la nouvelle dénomination du Cluster Energie Solaire (CES). C’est un groupement d’entreprises, d’universités, de grandes écoles et de centres de recherche créé en vue de construire des synergies entre ses membres, améliorer la compétitivité des entreprises, participer à la formation des acteurs du secteur et être une force de proposition sur tous les thèmes et les questions qui touchent à la transition énergétique en Algérie.
VISION: Green Energy Cluster Algeria participe à construire une transition énergétique équilibrée fondée sur le gaz naturel, les énergies renouvelables et l’efficacité énergétique à l’horizon 2035. Pour cela, il entend s’appuyer sur sa capacité à rassembler les membres de la filière pour inciter les pouvoirs publics à mobiliser les ressources nécessaires y compris en stimulant l’innovation pour accélérer cette transition au profit du pays.
MISSIONS:
* Inciter les pouvoirs publics à planifier et à réaliser le programme des énergies renouvelables de 15000 MW d’ici 2035.
* Inciter de nouveaux secteurs intéressés par les énergies vertes à se procurer des projets EnR.
* Promouvoir les compétences locales et les entreprises de droits algériens activant dans l’industrie verte.
* Mobiliser les acteurs, favoriser les synergies entre les membres de l’organisation afin de construire et de renforcer la compétitivité des entreprises du groupement.
* Travailler en partenariat avec les pouvoirs publics pour faire émerger un tissu industriel de qualité dédié aux industries vertes. 
*Promouvoir la chaine de valeur locale au niveau régional.
NOS VALEURS: Engagement, Ethique, Qualité, Protection de l’environnement et Innovation.
Le nombre de membres est passé de 15 en 2017 à 40 en 2022.

Name: مجموعة الأصول الثقافية Cultural Assets Group
Description:
تقود مجموعة الأصول الثقافية نهجًا مبتكرًا يلّبي طموحات المستقبل ويدعم استدامة وتطور القطاع الثقافي والإبداعي عبر ركائزها المبتكرة. بإدارة عدد من الشركات المتخصصة، التي تعمل على تمكين وتوحيد جهودهم لتحقيق الإثراء الثقافي، ملتزمة ببناء سرد ثقافي ملهم ومستدام يمتد أثره عبر الزمان ويعمّق روابط المجتمع.

Cultural Assets Group is a leading organization with an authentic and innovative approach. Its visionary pillars meet future aspirations and support the sustainability and development of the cultural and creative sector.

The Group fosters collaboration among diverse companies and brands engaged in multifaceted cultural commitments, leading a united approach to cultural enrichment.

The Group adopts a distinctive cultural vision—positioning culture as a bridge between the past and future. By honoring both its tangible and intangible assets, the Group is committed to cultivating a sustainable and influential cultural narrative that transcends time and place.

Name: PMI Kenya Chapter
Description:
PMI Kenyan Chapter, is a non-profit, professional organization and a chartered component of the Project Management Institute (PMI), the largest professional membership association for the project, program and portfolio management profession

PMI Kenya Chapter, delivers value for more than 500 thousand professionals working in nearly every, industry and region in Kenya through advocacy, collaboration, education and research

The Chapter advances the careers, practice, science, and profession of project management through PMI’S globally recognized standards, certifications, resources, tools, academic research, publications, professional development courses and networking opportunities.

Name: Energy Managers Association
Description: The Energy Managers Association has been established as the voice of the Energy Management industry.

Name: epi
Description: Instutute of European Patent Attorneys

Name: Sociedad Argentina de Análisis Político (SAAP)
Description:
Fundada en 1982, la Sociedad Argentina de Análisis Político (SAAP) es una asociación civil sin fines de lucro que nuclea a politólogos argentinos y a profesionales vinculados a la Ciencia Política y a las Relaciones Internacionales. Con 700 socios individuales plenos (asociados graduados) y diez SOCIOS INSTITUCIONALES, la SAAP promueve diversas actividades entre las que se destaca la organización de los CONGRESOS NACIONALES DE CIENCIA POLÍTICA, conjuntamente con Universidades Públicas y Privadas y otras entidades vinculadas a la disciplina. En el ámbito internacional, la SAAP es miembro permanente de la International Political Science Association (IPSA), y en esa condición ha organizado el XV CONGRESO MUNDIAL DE CIENCIA POLÍTICA (Buenos Aires, 1991), al cual asistieron 1400 participantes de 55 países.

Como parte de su tarea de divulgación e información a sus miembros, la SAAP editó periódicamente hasta el año 2001 el Boletín SAAP, que fue continuado por la REVISTA DE LA SAAP cuyo primer número apareció a fines del año 2002. La revista se distribuye entre profesionales, docentes, investigadores y alumnos asociados a la entidad, como así también a Institutos, Fundaciones y Centros vinculados con la Ciencia Política. La SAAP también participa activamente en las redes sociales como Red SAAP.
Además, la SAAP promueve actividades tendientes a la actualización metodológica y temática de sus miembros, incluyendo mesas redondas, conferencias, seminarios y concursos.

Name: Institute of Concrete Technology
Description:
The Institute of Concrete Technology is about bringing people together who are interested in concrete and wish to progress their career in technical field of concrete technology.

The Institute's mission is to promote concrete technology as a recognized engineering discipline and to advance the professional status of practicing concrete technologists worldwide.

The ICT is the concrete sector’s professional development body and is a network of concrete technologists dispersed throughout the world, represented in many diverse countries. It is an awarding body for qualifications in concrete technology and a facilitator of CPD and networking opportunities. 

Membership of The ICT, is open to a wide range of people who have an interest in furthering their career in concrete. From students to those that have worked in the industry for many years with classes of membership is linked to levels of qualification or experience.

Four stages of qualifications set the course for career development, from Stage 1 suitable for students, lab technicians and commercial representatives to Stage 4 suitable for Technical Managers, University Lecturers/Researchers and Consultants. Stages 2 & 3 offer a pathway to progress your knowledge and experience through qualifications from Stage 1 to 4. 

Those achieving MICT (Stage 4) may apply to the awarding body ,the Society of Operations Engineers (SOE), to be assessed for inclusion in the register for engineers and engineering technicians held by EngC. Registration allows members to use the appropriate designation, depending on grade, from Chartered Engineer to Incorporated Engineer and Engineering Technician.

Name: SNE - Sindicato Nacional dos Enfermeiros
Description:
O SNE - Sindicato Nacional dos Enfermeiros é um sindicato de âmbito nacional, fundado a 12 de fevereiro de 2022. A sede nacional é em Lisboa e 5 Delegações Regionais (Açores, Madeira, Norte, Centro e Sul).

Lema: Renovar a Esperança

Valores: Liberdade, Igualdade e Solidariedade

Name: Swiss Marketing Association
Description:
Swiss Marketing ist der Berufs- und Fachverband für Marketingfachleute. Hier bündelt sich das Fachwissen von rund 2000 Fach- und Führungskräften aus unterschiedlichen Branchen.

Swiss Marketing gestaltet Berufsbilder aktiv mit, initiiert und organisiert eidgenössische Berufsprüfungen, schafft neue Bildungswege und nimmt aktiv Einfluss zur Sicherstellung hoher Ausbildungsstandards.

Swiss Marketing ist in der Schweiz landesweit vertreten und fest verankert. Der Erfahrungs- und Wissenstransfer findet vor allem in den regionalen Clubs statt.

Jetzt Mitglied werden!

Eine Mitgliedschaft in unserem Marketing-Verband verschafft dir zahlreiche handfeste Vorteile: aktives Networking, Gratisabos, vergünstigte Eintritte zu Events, Rabatte bei Partnerunternehmen und vieles mehr.

Name: Saudi Quality Council  المجلس السعودي للجودة
Description: Quality الجودة

Name: Cabinet M.L Consulting
Description:
Cabinet M.L Consulting

Mission :
Le Cabinet M.L Consulting s'engage à renforcer les capacités des acteurs humanitaires afin de maximiser leur impact dans des contextes complexes et en évolution rapide. Notre mission est d'apporter des compétences pratiques et des connaissances spécialisées pour améliorer la réponse aux crises humanitaires et contribuer au développement durable des communautés vulnérables.

Domaines d'Expertise :
Notre cabinet se spécialise dans la formation humanitaire et de développement durable.

Programmes de Formation :
Nous proposons des programmes de formation adaptés aux besoins des travailleurs humanitaires, des ONG, des agences gouvernementales et des volontaires. Nos cours incluent des simulations réalistes, des études de cas basées sur des situations réelles et des séances interactives pour préparer les participants aux défis concrets sur le terrain.

Formateurs et Consultants :
Les formateurs du Cabinet M.L Consulting sont des experts chevronnés ayant une expérience significative dans des situations humanitaires variées. Ils partagent leurs connaissances pratiques et leurs compétences opérationnelles, garantissant une préparation adéquate aux professionnels engagés dans des missions humanitaires.

Approche Personnalisée :
Nous comprenons la diversité des besoins dans le domaine humanitaire. Ainsi, nous proposons des programmes sur mesure, tenant compte des spécificités géographiques, culturelles et sectorielles de nos clients.

Outils Pédagogiques :
Nos formations intègrent une variété d'outils pédagogiques, tels que des scénarios interactifs, des séances de simulation sur le terrain, des modules d'apprentissage en ligne et des ateliers pratiques.

Name: Pôle AVENIA
Description:
Pôle AVENIA is a non-profit organization recognized as a competitiveness cluster by the French government in 2010. Our mission is to drive innovation and foster collaborative business in subsurface industries in support of the ecological and energy transition.

We contribute to the development of world-class sectors in France and Europe by bringing together industrial, academic, and institutional stakeholders.

Target industries :
   - Upstream Oil & Gas
   - Geothermal Energy
   - Geological storage 
   - Mine & Quarry
   - Water
   - Geotechnical & Civil engineering 
   - Natural Hydrogen

What we offer :
  - Coaching and help in building your collaborative innovation projects (Phasing work packages, finding partners, financing schemes, etc...)
  - Access to public funding through an evaluation & labeling of your projects
  - Access to our pool of experts 
  - Direct links to major players in subsurface industries.
  - Help in going international through the cluster network


Joining POLE AVENIA means multiplying your opportunities for:

    - Innovation: Collaborate on groundbreaking projects and access cutting-edge expertise.
    - Business: Build connections that drive growth and open new markets.
   - Visibility: Boost your profile within the subsurface industries 
   - Collaboration: Benefit from shared resources, and collective intelligence.

Name: In-House Agency Forum (IHAF)
Description:
IHAF was established in 2005 based on an observation that the in-house agency community was lacking any formal venue to share and gain knowledge regarding the unique business of running an in-house creative services operation – and that as the marketing communications world shifts from traditional to non-traditional vehicles, the importance of knowledge sharing for in-house agencies would only increase.

The intention of the In-House Agency Forum is to continuously evolve membership benefits and programming to keep pace with the changes in the marketing communications industry while focusing on three core offerings:

    * Benchmarking Data
    * Events and Conferences
    * Networking

As of today, the organization has attracted a broad cross-section of corporate and supplier members and established itself as an integral professional community focused on best practices and the studied evolution of the in-house agency capability.

Name: Physio Deutschland - Deutscher Verband für Physiotherapie e.V.
Description: Als mitgliederstärkster Berufsverband Deutschlands vertreten wir die Interessen aller Physiotherapeut:innen, ob angestellt, selbständig oder noch in Ausbildung/Studium.

Name: Canadian Evaluation Society - Société canadienne d'évaluation
NODA
Description:
As an inclusive community, NODA enhances and elevates orientation, transition, and retention practices in higher education that cultivate the professional development and education of student leaders, graduate students, practitioners, and scholars.

NODA was chartered in 1976 and continues the tradition of orientation, transition, and retention professionals who have met annually for over 40 years. In 2013, in order to better reflect the membership, NODA Board of Directors changed the association name to NODA – Association for Orientation, Transition, and Retention in Higher Education. Today, NODA is an international association comprised of professional administrators, students, faculty, and related organizations. The Association strives to attract a pluralistic membership and leadership, which endeavors to facilitate the professional development of its members. NODA is further dedicated to inter-association cooperation, the advancement of professional and ethical standards, and the production of scholarly works.

Name: INDEX Nonwovens
Description:
Bringing together key players from every dimension of the innovative world of nonwovens, INDEX is the largest global meeting place for the nonwovens market, its suppliers and customers. The next edition of this event will take place at Palexpo, in the vibrant international city of Geneva from May 19-22, 2026.

Taking place only once every three years, this dynamic event brings together over  12,500 trade visitors from over 100 countries to see the products and services displayed by over 600 exhibitors (an increase of 20% on the previous edition), from 42 countries, in more than 50,000m2.

INDEX is the premier industry platform, where senior industry professionals from around the world come together to seek competitive insights, learn about the latest technologies, and network, for four days of intensive and rewarding business activities.

Four days in which to discover new commercial opportunities, identify new markets and applications and exchange experiences with like-minded professionals, focusing exclusively on the very best that the nonwovens industry and its suppliers have to offer.

The full event programme, free tutorials and conferences, special features and workshops, is available on this site . Add the page to your "Favourites" (CTRL + D), and sign up for the INDEX newsletter to be updated on the exhibition as it develops.

Don’t miss the inspiring opportunity that INDEX26 will represent for your company. Click on the link to add the INDEX26 dates to your Outlook calendar to be sure you don’t miss the event.

Name: Springtij
Description:
Springtij brengt mensen, die een verschil maken in de duurzame transitie, met elkaar in beweging. In een inspirerende omgeving worden hart en hoofd met elkaar verbonden. Zo ontstaan er nieuwe samenwerkingsverbanden, handelingsperspectieven en worden systeemveranderingen gecreëerd voor een duurzame toekomst.

Een van de belangrijkste activiteiten is het jaarlijkse Springtij Forum op Terschelling. Woensdag 24 t/m vrijdag 26 september 2025.

Name: Running Industry Alliance (RIA) & The Running Conference (TRC)
Description:
Running Industry Alliance (RIA) is an independent, member-based trade organisation serving the UK & Ireland running industry with global reach. 

We unite ten key verticals - brands, retailers, events, media, charities, suppliers, services, NGBs, agents/distributors, and buying groups - into one continuous, collaborative and supportive community and eco-system. 

“We exist to collectively assist our Members to drive the Running Industry forward to improve the Sport & Business of Running.”

Our Four Pillars
1. Membership: We build a connected and collaborative business ecosystem. Membership includes networking, mentoring, peer support and international alliance access.
2. Events: From intimate gatherings to TRC, guided sessions, and trade show meet ups, we create safe business, constructive spaces for industry conversations and business deal-making
3. Awards: We celebrate excellence, innovation, and positive impact across 18+ categories - bringing the industry together in recognition and ambition.
4. Data, Research & Insight:With research and market intelligence collaborative reporting like National Running Report, The Mass Participation Pulse Report, Global Running Culture Report and ongoing data collab initiatives, we empower members to make data-fuelled business decisions.

Flagship Member Events
* The Spring Gathering: April - leadership & member community-led event
* The Running Conference (TRC): 7th to 9th December - flagship RIA + TIA Member B2B gathering - guaranteed ticket for every RIA Member
* Running Industry Awards - 9th December - dedicated standalone awards collab with England Athletics and RunEvents - free to nominate and vote! 

Explore more and join the movement:

 www.runningindustryalliance.com www.therunningconference.com
 www.triathlonindustryalliance.com
 www.runningindustryawards.com

Running Industry Alliance (RIA): Bringing the industry together to elevate the sport & business of running.

Name: Acteurs du Traitement des Eaux de la Parcelle
Description:
Le Syndicat ATEP, Acteurs du Traitement des Eaux de la Parcelle, rassemble les fabricants, les entreprises de services et leurs partenaires afin de contribuer à l’essor de la valorisation des eaux de la parcelle autour de :
•	L’assainissement non collectif (ou autonome),
•	La gestion des eaux pluviales,
•	La valorisation des eaux non conventionnelles (eaux usées traitées, eaux grises, eau de pluie).

Name: bdia bund deutscher innenarchitektinnen und innenarchitekten
Description: Der bdia fördert und festigt seit über 70 Jahren den Berufsstand und die Berufsausübung der Innenarchitektinnen und Innenarchitekten in Deutschland. Dabei setzt er sich als Berufsvertretung seiner Mitglieder für deren Belange in der Öffentlichkeit und gegenüber Wirtschaft und Politik ein. Der bdia ist bundesweit der einzige Innenarchitekt*innenverband.

Name: Ingeniería Industrial en Bizkaia
Description:
Perfil Oficial de LinkedIn del Colegio Oficial de Ingenieros e Ingenieras Industriales de Bizkaia (COIIB).

 Profesionales de la Ingeniería Industrial 

Prestación de servicios dirigidos  a los Ingenieros Industriales en su desarrollo profesional y en su responsabilidad con la sociedad.

Sus fines son:
 Fomentar el progreso de la Ingeniería al servicio de la industria, teniendo como objetivo el bienestar de la sociedad.
 La ordenación del ejercicio de la profesión regulada.
 La representación de sus profesionales.
 Garantizar el bilingüismo, la inclusión y la sostenibilidad.

En definitiva, dar soporte y coordinar todas las acciones que estén orientadas a promover  una mejora en el conjunto de la actividad profesional de sus colegiados, como garantía de los derechos de los ciudadanos.

Name: ProFound
Description: ProFound is a small business that provides executive search, consulting, and coaching services to organizations. ProFound also hosts a professional network for leaders connected to the disability community—whether through lived experience, career, advocacy, or allyship. We bring together disability-inclusive leaders and organizations to share best practices, build partnerships, and accelerate careers.

Name: Setsco Services Pte Ltd
Description:
With 40 years of extensive experience, Setsco Services Pte Ltd is one of Singapore’s largest test and inspection companies accredited by the Singapore Accreditation Council – Singapore Laboratory Accreditation Scheme (SAC-Singlas) to ISO/IEC 17025, and by SAC to ISO/IEC 17020 and ISO/IEC 17065.

Setsco is a leading organization offering a comprehensive range of testing, calibration, inspection, certification, consultancy and training services to key markets such as Oil & Gas, Aerospace, Marine, Food, Electronics, Environmental, Construction, and Building & Facilities.

Our Vision:
To be the leading technology centre in the region

Our Mission:
Setsco provides assessment and consultancy in the field of science and engineering through testing, inspection, applied research and technology applications with the aim of achieving quality and safety for the industry

Our Values:
We are committed to provide professional services and excellent customer service
We deploy state-of-the-art technology in strengthening our competitiveness
We encourage teamwork and provide ample opportunities for our staff’s personal growth and development

Find out more about SETSCO Services Pte Ltd at www.setsco.com.

Name: Institut Kimia Malaysia (IKM)
Description: Institut Kimia Malaysia (IKM), or the Malaysian Institute of Chemistry, is a professional organization incorporated under the Chemists Act 1975 on 1st November 1977 and is under the jurisdiction of the Ministry of Science, Technology & Innovation (MOSTI). IKM was earlier inaugurated on 8th April 1967 with 27 founding members and subsequently registered under the Societies Act 1966 on 13th October 1967. IKM has grown in tandem with the rapid development of Malaysia to become a well-established and strong professional organization recognized both locally and internationally. Membership of IKM comes from both the manufacturing and service sectors, universities and other institutions of higher learning, research and development institutions, and government and education sectors. With membership of more than 5,500 in March 2023, IKM enjoys a prominent place among the professional scientific organization in Malaysia. The Institute is also playing a leading role in the development of chemistry in Malaysia.
Location: Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur

Name: Consultants for Impact
Description: Consultants for Impact is a global network of consultants dedicated to doing good strategically. We support and connect consultants who are tackling the world’s most important, solvable, and neglected problems. Our team provides free expert-guided 1:1 Career Conversations, weekend retreats, support for your firm’s workplace group, job recommendations, and more. Visit us at www.consultantsforimpact.org!

Name: SYNASAV
Description:
Le SYNASAV, créé en 1966, fédère les entreprises de la maintenance en Génie climatique. C'est l'organisation professionnelle des experts de la maintenance et des services en efficacité énergétique du logement, tous systèmes et toutes énergies.
Le SYNASAV, c'est LA référence métier incontournable pour la maintenance de tous les équipements du logement. Il propose soutien et services aux chefs d’entreprises en proposant assistances techniques, juridiques, fiscales, sociales, des documents types, un cercle de partenaires filières experts. Bénéficiez de la qualification "QUALISAV" et de l’appellation Professionnel du Gaz à un tarif réduit…
Le SYNASAV fédère tous les profils de chefs d’entreprise (artisans, dirigeants de tpe/pme, dirigeants de groupes nationaux). Ces entreprises représentent près de 1000 établissements 16 000 salariés 3 000 recrutements annuels, 12 millions d'appareils entretenus, 6 millions d'appareils sous contrat, 14 millions d'interventions par an pour près de 2 milliards d'euros de chiffres d'affaires.

Le SYNASAV c’est la référence métier de la maintenance des équipements du logement en matière de recrutement, de formation et de qualification des intervenants. Il est un acteur à part entière de la « Transition énergétique ». Il agit en faveur de la maîtrise de l’énergie, de la réduction des dépenses de chauffage et de la sécurité des biens et des personnes. L'efficacité énergétique est au cœur de ses préoccupations. Engage auprès des pouvoirs publics et des consommateurs, le SYNASAV s’implique au quotidien pour promouvoir et défendre une maintenance efficace des appareils de chauffage et lutte contre la précarité énergétique.

Le recrutement, la formation et la qualification des techniciens est une priorité. Le SYNASAV attribue les appellations officielles et les qualifications professionnelles propres aux métiers de la maintenance. Il délivre la qualification professionnelle spécifique à la maintenance : « QUALISAV efficacité énergétique ».

Name: TALK
Description:
TALK (Talent Acquisition Leadership Keynotes) is the world’s largest society of Talent Acquisition professionals with 80 independent chapters in major cities in North America.

TALK connects TA Leaders, helping them network, share best practices, innovate, improve their business processes, and make new friends.

Each TALK chapter hosts events determined by its local board and members.  Events range from informal outings and lunches to more formal events over lunch or dinner at local 5-star venues.

TALK also provides an online platform where members can join, invite others to join, connect with peers, network, participate in webinars, and engage in member's only forums to get quick and confidential advice from peers.

There is no cost to join!

Name: PMI Ottawa Valley Outaouais
Description:
The Ottawa Valley Outaouais Chapter (OVOC) is a volunteer-driven organization that is part of the Project Management Institute (PMI), the world's leading project management organization. We are a focal point for promoting and transferring project management knowledge in the Ottawa Valley and Outaouais region, serving more than 30 communities in Eastern Ontario and Western Quebec. With us, you can increase your professional visibility through networking, events, certifications and volunteering. We welcome people from all walks of life - regardless of whether you are just starting your career in project management or are already an expert in the field. Stay connected to PMI OVOC: 
Website: https://www.pmiovoc.org
Twitter / Instagram: @pmi_ovoc 

Le chapitre de la Vallée d’Ottawa et l'Outaouais (OVOC) est une organisation bénévole qui fait partie du Project Management Institute (PMI), la principale organisation mondiale de gestion de projet. Nous sommes le point central pour la promotion et le transfert des connaissances en gestion de projet dans la région de la Vallée d’Ottawa et de l’Outaouais, et nous sommes au service de plus de 30 communautés dans l'est de l'Ontario et l'ouest du Québec. Avec nous, vous pouvez accroître votre visibilité professionnelle grâce au réseautage, aux événements, aux certifications et au bénévolat. Nous accueillons des personnes de tous les milieux, que vous soyez au début de votre carrière en gestion de projet ou que vous soyez déjà un(e) expert(e) dans le domaine. Restez connecté avec PMI OVOC: Site web: https://www.pmiovoc.org 
Twitter / Instagram: @pmi_ovoc

Name: Humanitarian Logistics Association
Description:
HLA is a membership association for humanitarian logistics professionals who respond to take relief to and create infrastructure for those affected by global emergencies.

It has been established as a neutral interface between aid organisations, the private and academic sectors, and other interested parties and aims to manage a wide spectrum of issues.

Name: Arbeid & Inkludering i NHO
Description: ARBEID & INKLUDERING I NHO SERVICE is a company based out of Postboks 5473 Majorstuen, OSLO, Oslo, Norway.

Description: Black Project Management Professionals is a dynamic network for Black PMs driving impact through project delivery, innovation, and technology.  Join us to network, learn, and lead change together.

Name: Mouvement des Petites et Moyennes Entreprises de Côte d'Ivoire
Description:
Le MPME (Mouvement des Petites et Moyennes Entreprises de Côte d'Ivoire) est la plus ancienne organisation patronale des PME en Côte d'Ivoire, depuis 1980.
Le MPME a pour missions entre autres de :
> Œuvrer pour la création d'un environnement propice au développement des PME et PMI exerçant en Côte d'Ivoire
> Offrir des services à valeur ajoutée, et Mobiliser les ressources en vue d'assurer la compétitivité de ses membres 
> Assurer la représentativité de ses membres vis-à-vis des Pouvoirs publics et des Partenaires au développement

Toutes les entreprises répondant aux critères de PME/PMI tels que définis par la législation ivoirienne en vigueur, ayant son siège ou exerçant une activité économique sur le territoire ivoirien peut être membre du MPME et participer à la dynamique de développement d'un secteur privé plus fort.

Name: Exeter Chamber
Description:
Exeter Chamber is passionate about Exeter and cultivating the right environment for business to thrive. We provide a voice for business at local, regional and national level.

Businesses from start-ups to those employing 1,000s+ join Exeter Chamber to help their organisations connect with others in the city.  

We offer a year-round programme of events designed to help you learn more about the city, and identify opportunities for growth.

We run specialist groups for our members, including Exeter Initiative for Science and Technology (EXIST).

Name: The Colors of Her Success
Description:
The Colors of Her Success is a platform dedicated to equipping women -- particularly Black women with the tools, resources, and network they need to successfully navigate their seat at the table.

As Black women, navigating corporate can be scary not to mention isolating. With our podcast, career development content, and empowerment events The Colors of Her Success is bridging the gap for ambitious women looking to elevate personally and professionally.

Name: Tugboat Institute
Description:
Tugboat Institute is a membership organization that brings together Evergreen CEOs across industry sectors to share best practices and unique insights, and to develop trusted bonds for their respective Evergreen paths. 

Evergreen leaders are seasoned entrepreneurs, CEOs and presidents with the vision, creativity, resourcefulness, patience and grit to build and scale a business that will stay private indefinitely. We exist to support these leaders and their companies.

Subscribe to our Evergreen Journal that chronicles Evergreen leaders and their ideas: https://www.tugboatinstitute.com/evergreen-journal/

Name: Austrian Experts - Das Netzwerk für Steuerberater:innen und Wirtschaftsprüfer:innen
Description:
Die Austrian Experts sind das Netzwerk für Steuerberater:innen und Wirtschaftsprüfer:innen und für alle, die es werden wollen. Wir gestalten Rahmenbedingungen, vermitteln Wissen und vernetzen Menschen. Unser Ziel ist es, optimale Arbeitsbedingungen für alle Menschen zu schaffen, die in unseren Berufen arbeiten. Damit leisten wir einen wertvollen Beitrag um unseren Beruf qualitätsvoll, erfolgreich und mit Freude ausüben zu können.

Zeiten wie diese sorgen mit den Themen Regulierung, Digitalisierung, AI sowie veränderte Arbeitswelten für Belastung und Unsicherheit. Zum Lösen braucht es fachliche und menschliche Kompetenz. Die Austrian Experts sind ein Netzwerk von fachlich versierten, vertrauenswürdigen und tatkräftigen Expert:innen, die Entwicklungen erkennen, zukunftsorientiert denken und lösungsorientiert handeln. Deswegen sind für uns auch Vertrauen, Kompetenz und Respekt genauso unverzichtbar wie Offenheit und Passion.

Als unabhängige Interessensvertretung verhandeln wir im konstruktiven Dialog oder respektvollen Diskurs optimale und nachhaltige Rahmenbedingungen für unseren gesamten Berufsstand. 
Unsere Expert:innen vermitteln aktuelles Wissen, informieren über zukünftige Trends und unterstützen mit praxisnahem Know-how für ein erfolgreiches Arbeiten state of the art. 
Unser Miteinander ist geprägt von Empathie und Menschlichkeit. Wir nehmen unsere gesamtgesellschaftliche Verantwortung wahr, zeigen neue Perspektiven auf, geben wertvolle Impulse und leben einen Austausch auf Augenhöhe.

Sei dabei und gestalte mit uns gemeinsam die Zukunft unseres Berufstandes. Alle Informationen über uns und eine Mitgliedschaft bei den Austrian Experts findest du unter https://www.ae-net.at/kontakt/jetzt-mitglied-werden

Name: Hull & Humber Chamber of Commerce
Description:
Hull & Humber Chamber of Commerce is East Yorkshire and Northern Lincolnshire’s leading business organisation, giving our 1400 Chamber Member companies a voice and helping them grow by marketing their products and services to each other.

We organise regular networking events across the region, produce a Members' magazine and offer you numerous other ways to make new contacts and attract new business.  We are also the 'voice of business' in the Humber, representing our Members' views at local, regional and national levels.  Through our International Trade team we can offer expert advice on all aspects of trading abroad, and our training company can help you increase your staff's skills and productivity.

If you haven't already, please join the Chamber's Members only LinkedIn Group (see 'Featured Groups' to the right on this page) and start or comment on Discussions, etc, to nearly 1000 business people who are members of the Group.

For further information about the Chamber and Membership please contact Kay Hudson on 01482 324976 or email k.hudson@hull-humber-chamber.co.uk
Please feel free to connect with Kay on LinkedIn.

We Mean Business.

Name: HR Nurture
Description:
Welcome to HRNurture – where People and Technology converge.

We’re passionate about sharing practical, insightful, and forward-thinking content that empowers HR professionals and tech enthusiasts alike. Whether you're navigating the evolving world of human capital management or exploring how data, AI, and automation are reshaping HR strategies — we've got you covered.

From people analytics to talent acquisition tips, HR tech trends, and workplace culture insights, HRNurture aims to educate, inspire, and connect a growing community of future-ready professionals.

Let’s nurture growth, spark conversations, and shape the future of work - together.

Name: ASCI - Australasian Supply Chain Institute
Description:
Australasian Supply Chain Institute (ASCI) is the not-for-profit Professional Accreditation Body for Supply Chain Management in Australasia. 

ASCI enhances the status of supply chain management as a profession by improving the quality of the workforce, public trust and confidence with respect to compliance of relevant regulatory or legal requirements.

Drawing from its heritage, ASCI has developed a professional accreditation scheme to register Supply Chain Professionals, Practitioners and Associates. The scheme aligns with the requirements of the Professional Standards Authority - the independent statutory body responsible for promoting professional standards and consumer protection.

Name: The Chemical Engineer
Description: We are the member magazine of the Institution of Chemical Engineers (IChemE).  Follow us for news and views from the world of chemical, process, and biochemical engineering.

Name: Operating Model & Organization Design
Description: This channel is a moderated community forum to share organization design writing and blogs, professional association news, conference and webinar announcements, and job openings. Send postings to Amy Kates.

Description:
Energy Club is a leading communication platform that brings together energy market leaders, provides service and content of the highest quality.

Name: Maison des Entreprises de l'Eure
Description:
La Maison des Entreprises de l'Eure regroupe l'UIMM et le MEDEF de l'Eure. 

Depuis 1937, elle rassemble, représente et accompagne plus de 350 entreprises et branches professionnelles sur le département, au travers de ses différents services :
 
- Juridique et Social
- Economique et Industriel
- Ressources Humaines - Emploi
- Communication et Relations Extérieures. 

Au quotidien, notre équipe de 17 collaborateurs accompagne les entreprises de toutes tailles et de tous secteurs d'activité dans leurs besoins et projets ! 

Vous souhaitez en savoir plus ou nous rejoindre ? Contactez-nous !

Name: Dynaflow Research Group
Description:
Since 1989, DRG has been active as a leading Engineering Consulting firm providing technical services across all aspects of pipeline analysis and design. Our focus is on complex and multidisciplinary projects that require a specialist approach. Examples of such studies are projects on Flow-Induced Vibrations, Multi-Phase flow analysis, Flow Assurance, Fatigue analysis, Pulsation analysis, and Fibreglass engineering. DRG is always focused these projects on achieving several benefits for its clients such as:

- Improved safety and efficiency 
- Reduced operating costs 
- Optimised capital experience 
- Maximised throughput and improved flow distribution 
- Improved operating procedures 
- Loss Prevention

DRG has developed several professional software solutions such as BOSfluids, for transient fluid and gas analysis, and BOSpulse for pulsation analysis our expertise in dynamic stress analysis and extensive knowledge of governing design codes (ASME VIII Div.1 and 2, API618, API67etc.), DRG can provide intelligent solutions to the most complicated problems. 

We offer several types of training courses on a wide range of subjects including programming C++, fiberglass engineering, ASME VIII Division 1 and 2, dynamic pipe stress to pulsation, and surge analysis. Most of these will be offered regularly throughout the year. We also develop customized training programs that suit the specific needs our customers have.

We distinguish ourselves through our staff of highly skilled and trained (MSc or Ph.D. in Aerospace, Mechanical Engineering, and Physics) engineers who are focused and dedicated to an outstanding career in Engineering, constantly seek the best people to help us improve our services, and work with us on the most challenging multi-disciplinary projects.

Name: Mourid Professionals
Description:
Mourid Professionals est une plateforme de mobilisation et de valorisation des savoirs, créée en 2020 par des talibés Mourides engagés, dans le but de mettre l’expertise professionnelle au service des projets de Cheikh Ahmadou Bamba et du développement durable de la communauté.

Nous rassemblons des profils variés – ingénieurs, chercheurs, financiers, communicateurs, développeurs, urbanistes, entrepreneurs, étudiants et cadres – autour d’un principe fort : “Àddiyay xam-xam”, le service par la connaissance utile.

À travers des projets concrets et impactants, nous accompagnons les dahiras, institutions mourides et initiatives communautaires dans leur transformation numérique, leur structuration, leur communication et leur gouvernance.

Parmi nos réalisations :

Système de gestion des hôtes du Grand Magal de Touba (Moukhadimatoul Khidma)
Système administratif et financier de l’Institut Al Azhar de Serigne Mourtadaa ibn Cheikhoul Khadim
Programme de mentorat et ateliers pour les jeunes élèves à Diourbel
Organisation des Ateliers du Magal, cycle annuel de réflexion stratégique
Développement du site et de la solution de collecte digitale de Touba Ca Kanam
72h Bootcamp à Touba pour impulser une dynamique numérique communautaire
Vous êtes animé(e) par le Khidma et porteur(se) d’un savoir utile ?
Mourid Professionals vous ouvre ses portes : venez mettre votre expertise au service de Cheikhoul Khadim.

Name: ROMAR
Description:
• Las personas que pertenecemos a ROMAR actuamos con libertad, honestidad y responsabilidad.

• Trabajamos con profesionalismo, disciplina y creatividad promoviendo la mejora
continua, el crecimiento económico sostenible, la protección del ambiente y el
