Name: SNDEC - Syndicat National du Décolletage
Description:
NOTRE AMBITION
Faire de l'industrie du décolletage français un acteur incontournable sur le marché mondial.

NOS VALEURS
Le S.N.D.E.C veut donner la possibilité à toutes les entreprises de décolletage et ce, quelle que soit leur taille, d’exister et de se renforcer face à la complexité de l’économie mondiale. C’est en soutenant ces valeurs que la profession fait et fera la différence, en exigeant d’elle-même l’excellence. La force de nos valeurs tient en sa dynamique collective.

NOTRE RÔLE Unir les savoir-faire et le faire savoir
Suivre l’évolution des technologies et des mentalités est aujourd’hui primordial pour toute industrie désireuse de progresser et de jouer un rôle important sur un marché étendu à tous les continents. Le S.N.DEC se veut donc fédérateur du Décolletage français, afin que toute la profession participe à ce grand marché et qu’elle assure son avenir. 

NOS MISSIONS Fédérateur des entreprises
Acteur au plus haut niveau de l’Etat pour défendre et promouvoir l’intérêt de vos entreprises
Facilitateur d’échanges avec vos clients et partenaires
Créateur de réseaux et de centres de compétences au service des entreprises de décolletage
Vecteur de l’image de la profession
Initiateur de projets pour anticiper, prévoir et préparer
Porteur de services et de conseils auprès de ses adhérents

Name: Ethiopian Pharmaceutical Association (EPA)
Description:
Established in 1974, he Ethiopian Pharmaceutical Association (EPA) is a National Association of pharmacists in the Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia working to uphold the honor and ethics of the profession, safeguarding members’ professional rights and working with relevant stakeholders to ensure that the public gets quality pharmaceutical products and services in Ethiopia. 

VISION

EPA aspire to advance the health and well-being of the society and to become one of the leading professional associations in Ethiopia, a model in Africa and globally respected.

MISSION

EPA is committed to ensure the provision of pharmaceutical services of the highest quality through promotion of responsible and ethical practice and empowerment of its members to advance pharmacy practice

OBJCTIVES

•	Advocate and promote the provision of quality pharmaceutical service to the society 
•	Build and maintain professional competency and promote ethical practice
•	Protect members’ professional autonomy, benefit and rights
•	Advance the profession of Pharmacy in Ethiopia
•	Build the capacity of the association (technical, financial, infrastructure etc) 
•	Working in collaboration with relevant stakeholders to ensure the provision of quality pharmaceutical products and services
Location: Addis Ababa, Arada Sub-city, District 07, House Number 090, Addis Ababa

Name: Associação Brasileira de ESG
Description:
A Associação Brasileira de ESG é uma organização da sociedade civil, sem fins lucrativos, que congrega e representa pessoas físicas e jurídicas no Brasil, comprometidas com os padrões e boas práticas ESG  - Environmental, Social and Governance (Ambiental, Social e de Governança).

Atualmente possui mais de 50 conselheiros e 500 associados. Juntos representam mais de 67% do PIB nacional.

Nossa missão é contribuir para que o Brasil seja protagonista mundial em práticas ESG. Deixando um legado para um mundo mais justo, sustentável e inclusivo.

Name: Česká komora autorizovaných inženýrů a techniků činných ve výstavbě
Description:
Česká komora autorizovaných inženýrů a techniků činných ve výstavbě je veřejnoprávní stavovská organizace, která vznikla v roce 1992 na základě zákona č. 360/1992 Sb.

Jak vyplývá ze stavebního zákona, je autorizace nutnou podmínkou pro výkon vybraných činností, jejichž výsledek ovlivňuje ochranu veřejných zájmů ve výstavbě.

Name: APLA-Association of Privacy Lawyers in Africa
Description:
APLA is a membership organization founded in 2022 with a mission to have a centralized effort towards defining, promoting and improving the data privacy legal profession in all 55 countries in Africa. 
We are committed to providing a forum for data privacy legal professionals to share best practices, track trends, advance privacy legal rights, standardize the designations for data privacy legal professionals in Africa and provide education and guidance on opportunities in the field of data protection and privacy law.

Name: World Urban Forum 12 Egypt
Description: The Twelfth Session of the World Urban Forum WUF12, convened by the United Nations Human Settlements Programme (UN-Habitat), will take place in Cairo, Egypt, from 4 to 8 November 2024, returning to the African continent after more than 20 years

Name: UK Evaluation Society
Description: The UK Evaluation Society was established in 1994 and is the principal professional organisation for evaluation in the UK. We aim to provide leadership on evaluation and believe that evaluation makes an important contribution to human endeavour.

Name: Chartered Governance Institute New Zealand
Description: The Chartered Governance Institute New Zealand is a leader in providing training, development and advocacy in governance, strategy, compliance, and risk management. We support those who advise or administer boards. As part of the global Chartered Governance Institute, with over 42,000 members, we’ve been a trusted pillar of New Zealand’s governance community since 1937. Our internationally recognised Chartered Secretary and Chartered Governance Professional qualifications offer academic rigour and international portability. Through education and training, we empower members—chartered secretaries, governance advisors, risk managers, compliance officers, lawyers, and accountants—to excel in governance and achieve chartered status

Name: Indian Potato
Description:
Welcome to Indian Potato, premier source for the latest updates, insights, and trends in the world of potato cultivation and the Indian potato sector. 

Our primary goal is to build a community centred around potatoes in India by connecting stakeholders including farmers, agricultural professionals, scientists, researchers, processors, companies, and enthusiasts. We are dedicated to providing comprehensive, accurate, and timely information on the latest research, technological advancements, and best practices. 

Explore news on storage solutions, processing technology, innovations like AI in grading and bio-ethanol production, seed treatments, market trends, company partnerships, collaborative initiatives for regenerative farming, major events like the Global Potato Summit, regional festivals, and inspiring success stories from farmers. Our mission is to enhance knowledge and practices for everyone passionate about potatoes in India.

Name: ACCR - Association des Centres culturels de rencontre
Description:
Créée en France en 1973 et reconnue d’utilité publique dix ans après, l'Association des Centres culturels de rencontre (ACCR) rassemble, en 2025, 30 membres en France et une quinzaine d'autres membres dans le reste du monde.

Lieux de patrimoine dédiés à des projets artistiques, culturels et scientifiques novateurs, ces membres sont fortement impliqués dans la promotion du secteur culturel, dans l’éducation, et dans les enjeux de développement territorial. Consacrés par le label d’Etat « Centre Culturel de Rencontre » (CCR), ils disposent, de même que l’Association, du soutien du ministère de la Culture français.

L’ACCR est chargée de coordonner en France et de développer à l’international le réseau des Centres culturels de rencontre. Elle favorise ainsi leur rayonnement régional, national et mondial à partir de leur enracinement local. Présidée par Hubert Tassy, l’ACCR représente ses membres dans les instances nationales, européennes et internationales. Par ailleurs, elle coordonne pour le ministère de la Culture deux programmes de résidence qui permettent aux CCR français d’accueillir des artistes et professionnels de la culture étrangers ou réfugiés, facilitant ainsi les échanges artistiques et culturels transnationaux.

Name: LeaderShe | Liderança Feminina em Saúde
Description:
A LeaderShe atua na construção de novos referenciais de liderança no setor da saúde.
Combinamos visão de futuro, conhecimento aplicado e protagonismo com propósito para impulsionar mulheres que lideram pessoas, negócios e transformações.

Nosso trabalho parte de três pilares: crescimento estruturado, protagonismo coletivo e transformação com propósito.
Eles se desdobram em trilhas que integram conteúdo, relacionamento, formação e influência.

Mais do que um movimento, somos uma força ativa de desenvolvimento e impacto, comprometida em tornar a presença feminina cada vez mais estratégica, plural e decisiva no setor.

She Leads. She Changes.

Name: Coalition Against Financial Crime
Description:
The Coalition Against Financial Crime (CAFC) is a public-private working group dedicated to fostering collaboration, innovation, and action in the fight against financial crime. We bring together financial institutions, law enforcement, regulators, and industry leaders to share intelligence, best practices, and solutions that strengthen the global anti-financial crime (AFC) ecosystem.

Free from politics and bureaucracy, CAFC is committed to breaking down silos, driving meaningful change, and equipping AFC professionals with the tools to stay ahead of evolving threats. Through our high-impact conferences, roundtables, and webinars, we provide actionable intelligence, real-world strategies, and direct access to key stakeholders shaping the AFC landscape. 

Join us in bridging communities for a safer financial world.

Name: VINSEO , French Vine & Wine suppliers
Description: The VINSEO cluster, a network of suppliers to the wine sector in the Occitanie region and in the south of France.

Name: CMO Huddles
Description:
Today’s top CMOs are bringing amazing new insights, perspectives, ideas, talents to the table every day, yet they often struggle to get respect in the C-Suite and find themselves isolated from peers. With access to a diverse network that has solved just about every marketing challenge, CMO Huddles is designed to help CMOs make faster, better, and more informed decisions. 

Our promise to you: One inspired hour a month will equal 10 hours of perspiration saved.

Our purpose is to bring together and empower an elite cross-section of B2B CMOs to share, care, and dare each other to greatness. 

Here are the 4 ways CMO Huddles supports our community:
--Huddles: Join expertly moderated, problem-solving conversations about current CMO challenges with highly effective peers in a circle of trust. All huddlers are reasonably vetted to ensure high-quality conversations.

--Consulting: To help you address your pressing issues, we arrange 1:1s with fellow CMOs who’ve been there and solved for that. You’ll also have access to expert CMO coach Drew Neisser.

--Resources: Gain insights and ideas from pithy weekly recaps, an ever-expanding resource library, an always-on Slack channel, and an approved vendor network. We also offer support for CMOs in transition.  

--PR: With a wide range of exclusive PR opportunities, CMO Huddles will help build awareness and recognition for you as a marketing thought leader and your company as an industry thought leader.

Huddles are moderated by Drew Neisser, who has extensive experience working with hundreds of innovative CMOs in various roles as agency owner, author, columnist, podcaster, marketing executive and long-term partner of The CMO Club.

Name: Tepeyac Leadership, Inc
Description:
Catholic Professionals: Stop camping at the parish—lead beyond It!

 Become a Tepeyac Leader  https://tliprogram.org/

Tepeyac Leadership, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) Catholic nonprofit, listed in The Official Catholic Directory, with canonical status as a private juridic person.

Name: United Latino Students Association
Description: The United Latino Students Association (ULSA) a non- profit organization that was established in 1990 to promote unity and provide a strong networking channel among Latino-based professional-oriented organizations. This is accomplished by enhancing personal, professional, and social networking skills. In addition, ULSA promotes educational objectives and academic excellence by providing financial assistance through the ULSA scholarship fund.

Name: Deutsche Gesellschaft für Zerstörungsfreie Prüfung (DGZfP)
Description:
Die Deutsche Gesellschaft für Zerstörungsfreie Prüfung e.V. (DGZfP) wurde 1933 in Berlin gegründet und ist die älteste ZfP-Gesellschaft der Welt. Sie ist ein Zusammenschluss von rund 1.600 Mitgliedern, zu denen neben Privatpersonen etwa 650 namhafte Konzerne, mittelständische Unternehmen, Forschungseinrichtungen, Universitäten und Behörden zählen.

Als moderner technisch-wissenschaftlicher Verein verstehen wir es als unsere zentrale Aufgabe, die Entwicklung, Anwendung und Verbreitung der Zerstörungsfreien Prüfverfahren zu fördern. Wir sind Bindeglied zwischen Forschung und Entwicklung, ZfP-Anwender*innen, Unternehmen, die ZfP-Geräte herstellen, Dienstleistenden und der Öffentlichkeit. Die DGZfP organisiert die Kommunikation und den Erfahrungsaustausch zwischen diesen Interessengruppen durch die Vernetzung in Arbeitskreisen und Fachausschüssen, auf Seminaren und Tagungen sowie auf Online-Plattformen und durch die Herausgabe von Publikationen.

Durch unsere breite Aufstellung in einem sich ständig wandelnden industriellen Umfeld sowie unser Engagement für Qualitätssicherung leistet die DGZfP einen wertvollen Beitrag zur Förderung des Wirtschaftsstandorts Deutschland.

Die DGZfP ist Gründungsmitglied im Europäischen Verband für Zerstörungsfreie Prüfung (EFNDT) und Mitglied im Weltverband für ZfP (ICNDT).

Zur Förderung des wissenschaftlich-technischen Nachwuchses vergibt die DGZfP alljährlich den mit 5.000 Euro dotierten Wissenschaftspreis, weiterhin den Anwenderpreis und den Nachwuchspreis. Der Studierendenpreis der DGZfP beinhaltet die gebührenfreie Teilnahme am Grundkurs für Zerstörungsfreie Prüfung (BC-Kurs). Die DGZfP beteiligt sich bei „Jugend forscht“ mit ZfP-Sonderpreisen auf regionaler und Landesebene und auch im Bundeswettbewerb, um interessierte jungen Menschen auf das Fachgebiet ZfP aufmerksam zu machen und sie für die Mitarbeit zu gewinnen.

Name: IRMS - Information and Records Management Society
Description:
The Information and Records Management Society (IRMS) is the foremost professional association for all those engaged in the management, governance or utilisation of information and records - regardless of organisational status or educational attainment.

For more than 30 years, we have been supporting information professionals in the UK and Ireland and beyond, and promoting the profession across the public, private and third sectors.

The IRMS is renowned for its inclusivity, which flows through everything we do. Membership of the Society offers a wide range of benefits, including:
– Develop as a Professional 
– Access to Knowledge 
– Be part of a Community 

With effective information management increasingly recognised as an essential requirement in the digital age, join us to make sure you benefit from the shared knowledge and expertise of our 1000+ members, and stay one step ahead in this exciting and ever-changing sector.

Name: Operational Excellence- Akij Resource
Description:

Akij Resources Ltd formed their OPEX team at February 2023 & The team will be responsible for identifying areas where improvements can be made, developing strategies to implement changes, and monitoring progress towards achieving operational excellence.

Name: Japan Training Center LatAm
Description: Japan Training Center LatAm (JATCELA),somos una organización especializada en el Management Production System The Japanese Way, en la integración del TPM, TPS, TQM + Kaizen, con proyección internacional, comprometida con la capacitación y consultoría en la mejora continua  de la calidad, productividad, seguridad y salud laboral en las empresas de Latinoamérica, EEUU, Canadá y España del modelo japonés de producción, conformada por excelentes profesionales capacitados como instructores y consultores en Japón.

Name: Creator Economy NYC
Description:
Creator Economy NYC (CENYC) is the leading community for creators, marketers, and the brands shaping the modern creator economy.

Born in New York and built for global impact, CENYC brings together the industry through high-impact events, original content, and educational programming designed to help creators and the industry supporting them grow their businesses and expand their opportunities.

Led by founder Brett Dashevsky, CENYC is redefining how the creator economy connects, learns, and accelerates.

Name: LA DISTRIBUCIÓN ANGED
Description:
LA DISTRIBUCIÓN. ANGED es la organización más representativa del comercio en España. Con 7.400 establecimientos y 236.000 empleados, sus 21 empresas asociadas ofrecen la más amplia y completa variedad de canales, formatos comerciales, productos y marcas en todas las categorías: alimentación, moda, hogar, muebles, bricolaje, electrónica, cultura, juguetes, bazar, accesorios de taller y servicios. Todos los días visitan nuestras tiendas 4,5 millones de consumidores. ANGED cuenta con el convenio colectivo más importante de España y el único de ámbito nacional en el comercio. Somos un motor para la economía nacional, con una facturación de 48.000 M€; unas compras a proveedores españoles de 35.400 M€; una quinta parte de la inversión total del comercio; y una aportación social y tributaria de 13.000 M€, lo que sitúa a nuestras empresas a la cabeza del empleo y la inversión, con una enorme influencia sobre otras actividades como la industria, los servicios, la restauración, el ocio o la logística.

Empresas asociadas a ANGED: El Corte Inglés, Carrefour, Leroy Merlin, Alcampo, IKEA, Obramat, MediaMarkt, Conforama, EROSKI, C&A, Costco, Apple Retail, FeuVert, Fnac, Sarton Canarias, ToysRUs, Aurgi, Norauto, Avolta, Action y Homa.

Name: Latin American Design
Description:
A celebration of Latin American creativity and visual arts.
LAD is an organization that was created to promote latin american design.
LAD aims to inspire, educate and raise awareness of the social significance of design.

About Latin American Design Festival:
The festival is an annual event, a meeting to inspire, educate
and raise awareness about the social potential of design through

Name: FFTB - Fédération Française des Tuiles et Briques
Description:
Les tuiles et briques : une histoire ancienne qui ne craint pas l'avenir !
L'industrie française des tuiles et briques est la seconde plus importante d'Europe. Actuellement 1 logement neuf sur 3 (individuel et collectif) est construit en briques et plus de 70% des maisons neuves sont protégées par un toit en tuiles. 134 lignes de production au cœur des territoires en France produisent 94% des tuiles et briques utilisées en France.

Name: Association of Science Communicators
Description:
ASC is a non-profit, professional member-organization creating connections to meet the needs of the multifaceted science communication community. 

We are the hub for the professional science communication community helping those at the interface of Science & Society advance the value of science as societally beneficial human right. 

SCIENCE COMMUNICATORS ARE professionally skilled in enhancing the public awareness, interest, enjoyment, culture, and understanding of science.

ASC IS an inclusive & diverse professional network of expert practitioners, facilitators, researchers, and trainers with the common essential goal of effectively communicating to increase the impact of science in society. We strengthen professionalism in science communications by… 
- Promoting a strong community of practice for science communicators
- Supporting science communicators as they work to reach audiences across multiple platforms and media
- Expanding professional development and certification programs for science communication practitioners and facilitators
- Building the professionalization of science communicators as a field
- Creating connections between scientists and communications professionals

Each year we organize SCIENCE TALK, one of the premiere meetings of the professional science communication community. This gathering offers networking opportunities, instructional workshops, and presentations on better communicate science... always "by Science Communicators, for Science Communicators."

Name: ISACA Singapore Chapter
Description:
As an independent, nonprofit, global association, ISACA engages in the development, adoption and use of globally accepted, industry-leading knowledge and practices for information systems.

ISACA was incorporated in 1969 by a small group of individuals who recognized a need for a centralized source of information and guidance in the growing field of auditing controls for computer systems. Today, ISACA has more than 100,000 members and over 200 chapters worldwide.

ISACA Singapore chapter was incorporated in 1983 and serves the 3,600 local members in Singapore.

Name: Critt Agroalimentaire Sud
Description:
Le CRITT Agroalimentaire PACA apporte des conseils et appuis techniques aux entreprises sur leurs projets d'innovation, leur performance industrielle, la sécurité des aliments, la qualité nutritionnelle des produits, la réduction des impacts environnementaux (énergie, eau, déchets), la création / optimisation de gammes bio et l'optimisation de l'empreinte environnementale des produits alimentaires.
Nos services se déploient en formations inter ou intra entreprises, en accompagnements individuels et en diffusion d'informations techniques et réglementaires.

Name: Dish Out Love
Description:
There is more to Gross Profit and Net Profit than money. The impact never get captured in the balance sheet! On the contrary, measuring profits only in terms of money forces us to create an ecosystem which is not sustainable nor Tulya. Its time to redefine how profit is measured. We would love like minded individuals to join us, guide us, and help us create a role model business around "impactful profitability". One that leaves behind a better world for our children! 

Stories of women who have conquered many challenges and emerging successful in career inspires us all. But, the majority of  stories are yet to unfold and they need love and support. Started as a tribute to mothers unconditional love, we are moving ahead with Dish Out Love. Thank you for being an integral part of our journey!

Name: Svaz účetních České republiky
Description:
Svaz účetních ČR je dobrovolnou a nezávislou profesní organizací s celostátní působností sdružující účetní, auditory, daňové poradce a ostatní zájemce.
Nejvýznamnějším úkolem Svazu v současnosti je přispět k rozvoji a zkvalitnění účetní profese v ČR a dosažení její úrovně srovnatelné se zeměmi Evropské unie. Tento cíl je naplňován mimo jiné realizací systému certifikace účetní profese, vytvořeného ve spolupráci se zahraničními experty a zejména v návaznosti a úzkou spolupráci s britskou The Association of Chartered Certified Accountants - ACCA. Systém certifikace běží již od roku 1997. 
Kromě projektu certifikace Svaz zajišťuje rozsáhlou a systematickou vzdělávací a poradenskou činnost prostřednictvím vlastní metodické sekce. 
Velmi významná je činnost metodická zaměřená na řešení konkrétních dílčích problémů v praxi i systematickou práci v oblasti účetní a související legislativy a účetní metodiky. V lednu 1999 byla ustavena Národní účetní rada, která má zejména koordinovat a sjednocovat postup zakladatelů, kterými jsou Svaz účetních, Komora auditorů ČR, Komora daňových poradců ČR a Vysoká škola ekonomická v Praze, zastoupená Fakultou financí a účetnictví.
Svaz účetních České republiky, z. s. se sídlem Vinohradská 2022/125, Praha 3, jakožto svazový spolek, je držitelem ochranné známky „Svaz účetních“ a „Komora certifikovaných účetních“.

Name: American Clinical Neurophysiology Society
Description:
Mission: To serve patients and society by empowering members to advance the science, practice and profession of clinical neurophysiology.

Vision: To optimize neurologic health through understanding of nervous system function.

The American Clinical Neurophysiology Society (ACNS) was founded in 1946, originally named the American Electroencephalographic Society (AEEGS). In 1995, AEEGS changed its name to the current designation, ACNS, to more accurately encompass the scope of its mission and goals. ACNS is the major professional organization in the United States devoted to the establishment and maintenance of standards of professional excellence in clinical neurophysiology in the practice of neurology, neurosurgery and psychiatry. ACNS members utilize neurophysiology techniques in the diagnosis and management of patients with disorders of the nervous system and in research examining the function of the nervous system in health and disease.

Name: Syndicat des Médecins Libéraux - SML
Description: Fondé en 1981, le Syndicat des Médecins Libéraux (SML) est un syndicat polycatégoriel représentatif de tous les médecins quel que soit leur secteur d’activité. Il assure la représentation et la défense de tous les types d’exercices libéraux, de toutes les spécialités et de toutes les formes d’expertises. Le SML axe son action sur la défense des piliers de l’exercice libéral du médecin que sont l’indépendance, la liberté d’installation, la liberté de prescription et le paiement direct à l’acte dans le cadre d’une valorisation juste des honoraires médicaux. Il promeut une approche pragmatique, adaptée aux réalités du terrain pour répondre aux évolutions des besoins de soins. Il est pionnier dans la promotion de la prévention, de la télémédecine et de la E-santé. Force de propositions, il participe activement au dialogue avec les Pouvoirs publics et l’Assurance-maladie. Le SML est représenté dans toutes les régions et possède des élus dans chacun des trois collèges composant les URPS de médecins libéraux. Le SML est présidé depuis décembre 2022 par le Dr. Sophie Bauer.

De forskellige faggrupper er knyttet til 14 landsdækkende udvalg, hvor du kan danne netværk, hente faglig inspiration og følge med i hvad der sker inden for dit fag.

TL har ni lokalafdelinger fordelt over hele landet. Her kan du få personlig hjælp og vejledning.

TL er uafhængig af partipolitik.

Name: SFEPA - Syndicat des Fabricants d'Explosifs de Pyrotechnie et d'Artifices
Description:
Une industrie pyrotechnique de pointe dans un environnement réglementaire exigeant

L’industrie pyrotechnique développe, produit, transforme, commercialise et utilise des substances et des objets explosifs très variés. Héritière d’une longue tradition, elle est présente aujourd’hui dans de nombreux secteurs, souvent de pointe : la défense, le spatial, la santé, les mines et carrières, la sécurité automobile, les artifices de divertissement etc. Au croisement de l’industrie chimique et de l’industrie mécanique, elle développe et utilise une très large gamme de substances explosives. Et requiert une grande maitrise des processus. 
Cette industrie se trouve au centre de nombreuses réglementations françaises et internationales relatives à la sécurité des travailleurs et des consommateurs, à la protection de l’environnement des sites industriels et des ressources naturelles, à la sécurité d’utilisation des produits et leur mise sur le marché européen, à la garantie de la sécurité publique, à la sécurité des transports des marchandises … : rares sont les domaines industriels aussi régulés !

Une expertise au service des industriels

Le Syndicat des Fabricants d’Explosifs, de Pyrotechnie et d’Artifices (SFEPA) accompagne depuis plus de 100 ans l’industrie pyrotechnique. Doté d’une expertise et d’une base de connaissances inégalées en France, il met à disposition de ses adhérents des données réglementaires mais aussi des compétences en pyrotechnie, en sécurité industrielle, en sûreté des installations, un retour d’expériences et une analyse critique. 
Regroupant la quasi-totalité des acteurs de la pyrotechnie industrielle française (15 Md€ de CA annuel, plus de 40 000 salariés), le SFEPA a donc toute légitimité à représenter également la profession auprès des administrations françaises et européennes lors des phases d’élaboration et de consultation des nouveaux textes ou évolutions réglementaires concernant les explosifs.

Name: World Economic Forum For Asia-Africa (WEFAA)
Description:
International Trade and the World Economy - WEFAA FOCUS - Integration into the world economy has proven a powerful means for countries to promote economic growth, development, and poverty reduction. Over the past 20 years, the growth of world trade has averaged 6 percent per year, twice as fast as world output. But trade has been an engine of growth for much longer. Since 1947, when the General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade (GATT) was created, the world trading system has benefited from eight rounds of multilateral trade liberalization, as well as from unilateral and regional liberalization. Indeed, the last of these eight rounds (the so-called "Uruguay Round" completed in 1994) led to the establishment of the World Trade Organization to help administer the growing body of multilateral trade agreements.

The resulting integration of the world economy has raised living standards around the world. Most developing countries have shared in this prosperity; in some, incomes have risen dramatically. As a group, developing countries have become much more important in world trade—they now account for one-third of world trade, up from about a quarter in the early 1970s. Many developing countries have substantially increased their exports of manufactures and services relative to traditional commodity exports: manufactures have risen to 80 percent of developing country exports. Moreover, trade between developing countries has grown rapidly, with 40 percent of their exports now going to other developing countries.

However, the progress of integration has been uneven in recent decades. Progress has been very impressive for a number of developing countries in Asia and, to a lesser extent, in Latin America. These countries have become successful because they chose to participate in global trade, helping them to attract the bulk of foreign direct investment in developing countries.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Central Texas-based CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. Since its inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: Persatuan Aktuaris Indonesia
Description:
Persatuan Aktuaris Indonesia disingkat PAI atau dalam bahasa Inggris disebut Society of Actuaries of Indonesia adalah organisasi nasional dari profesi aktuaris di Indonesia yang berdedikasi untuk memberikan pelayanan kepada publik umum dan anggotanya.
PAI didirikan pada tanggal 19 Oktober 1964 dengan jumlah 25 anggota pada saat itu. Selama bertahun-tahun, peraturan pemerintah mengenai industri asuransi dan dana pensiun yang memerlukan keahlian seorang FSAI telah berkontribusi pada pertumbuhan profesi aktuaris di Indonesia dan menghasilkan pengakuan pemerintah terhadap gelar Fellow of the Society of Actuaries of Indonesia (FSAI).
PAI mengeluarkan petunjuk Standar Praktek Aktuaria and Kode Etik Aktuaris yang berisi panduan praktek yang profesional dan standar kode etik yang harus dijalankan. Petunjuk ini membantu para anggota mengenai standar profesional yang dianggap wajar dilakukan dalam berbagai kesempatan yang mereka hadapi. PAI juga mengeluarkan petunjuk mengenai proses pendisiplinan anggota untuk memastikan kepatuhan pada praktek profesional dan standar kode etik para anggotanya.
PAI telah menjadi anggota penuh (full member) dari International Actuarial Association (IAA) sejak tahun 2007. Sebagai anggota organisasi internasional, PAI mewakili aktuaris-aktuaris Indonesia di kancah internasional dan bekerja sama dengan organisasi aktuaria lainnya atas dasar kepentingan bersama.

WIND resources offer everything from the foundations of weight-inclusive care, to Levels 2+ training in clinical, counseling, and communication skills. WIND strives to create a space that centers the most marginalized, and those most impacted by antiquated care in the current healthcare system, learning from both credentialed providers and those who hold lived experience. 

WIND's vision is a healthcare environment in which weight-inclusive care is the norm, not the exception. We value continuing education that is social-justice-aligned, and prioritizes learning from those not often offered a "seat" at the tables in policy, academic, and healthcare. 

Connect with WIND through our in-person events, virtual resources, professional membership, and free online community.

Description:
Somos la asociación civil de profesionales de la evaluación de Argentina. Nos proponemos contribuir a la consolidación de la cultura de la evaluación en diversos ámbitos de gestión en nuestro país y la región.

Para ello, a) promovemos el desarrollo de capacidades en monitoreo y evaluación, b) contribuimos a fortalecer la agenda sobre la relevancia de la evaluación y el uso efectivo de sus hallazgos; c) impulsamos el trabajo colaborativo entre profesionales, organizaciones e instituciones en el ámbito nacional e internacional.

Concebimos la evaluación como una herramienta integral para la gestión del conocimiento, el aprendizaje organizacional y  la mejora continua, en pos de la construcción de sociedades más justas.
Location: Ciudad Autonoma de Buenos Aires , Buenos Aires

Name: Engineer NEXT
Description:
Welcome to Engineer NEXT! 

We are a team of dedicated and passionate professionals committed to collaboration, growth, and success. To ensure the best experience and outcomes for all members, we encourage the following:

1. Embrace Support and Collaboration
Every member is encouraged to actively support one another by sharing knowledge, offering guidance, and contributing to group activities. Together, we achieve more!

2. Build Meaningful Connections
Foster strong relationships by regularly connecting with fellow members. One-on-one meetings are a great way to deepen bonds, exchange ideas, and grow both personally and professionally.

3. Create a Thriving Network
Engage actively to develop a robust network of professionals. Your participation helps build valuable connections with contractors, suppliers, and employers, benefiting all members.

4. Stay Engaged and Active
Active participation ensures a dynamic group environment. Commit to staying engaged in group discussions and activities to maximize our collective growth.

5. Attend Group Meetings
Regular attendance at all meetings is encouraged to maintain consistency and momentum. A member can miss up to 3 meetings annually if necessary. Beyond that, the team may consider a member’s continuity in the group.

6. Fulfill Commitments
Members are expected to diligently complete all assigned tasks to ensure the group’s success and progress. Your contributions make a significant difference!

7. Exhibit Professionalism
Uphold the highest standards of professional behavior in all interactions, fostering respect, trust, and collaboration among members.

8. Be a Bridge to Opportunities
Actively help the group by sharing valuable referrals for contractors, suppliers, and job opportunities. Your contributions to connecting others can inspire success for all.

Let’s work together to make Engineer NEXT a positive, impactful, and supportive space where we all thrive and succeed!

Name: CEND - Comité de Ensayos No Destructivos
Description:
El Comité de Ensayos No Destructivos en la Ingeniería Civil y el Patrimonio Histórico, es una organización formada por prestadores y estudiosos de la especialidad. Nació en el año 2015, en el seno del Chapter Argentino del ACI. Cuenta con medio centenar de integrantes. Sus objetivos son: Promover los END en la ingeniería civil; intercambiar información entre profesionales, empresas e instituciones que realicen actividades en este campo; adquirir nuevos conocimientos sobre las distintas técnicas y sus aplicaciones; abordar proyectos de I&D en colaboración; otorgar premios y distinciones a la calidad y la excelencia en el desarrollo de nuevos métodos de END; organizar conferencias y seminarios; elaborar guías técnicas y perfeccionar normas y establecer procedimientos de certificación; y mantener un Directorio de actores en el campo de los END aplicados a la ingeniería civil y el patrimonio histórico en la Argentina.

¿Cómo ser Miembro del CEND? Contáctenos acicend@gmail.com

Name: Female Founder House
Description: We are an exclusive community for female founders and investors passionate about redefining how businesses are built leading with intention to further the world.

Name: Mujeres en Marketing
Description:
El objetivo de esta comunidad es ser una red para compartir, inspirarnos, buscar y dar consejos, hablar de los temas que nos afectan como mujeres y sobre todo, darnos una mano para poder SALIR EXITOSAS de estos temas.

¿Cómo ser parte?Te registras en www.mujeresenmarketing.org
Si pasas la admisión, recibirás un correo de bienvenida con las instrucciones para acceder.
Hacemos admisiones los miércoles de cada semana.

Name: Le Club Africain des Entrepreneurs
Description:
Le Club Africain des Entrepreneurs est une organisation panafricaine  rassemblant des femmes et des hommes investis dans l’aventure entrepreneuriale et fédérés par un engagement commun en faveur d’un développement durable et responsable en Afrique. Impulsé par la famille de fonds d’impact Investisseurs & Partenaires (I&P), sa mission consiste à mener des actions de plaidoyer en vue de soutenir la cause entrepreneuriale et de développer les opportunités économiques à l’intérieur mais également à l’extérieur de son réseau de membres.

Crée en 2016, Le Club Africain des Entrepreneurs est une association basée en Côte d’Ivoire et est constitué de plus de 150 PME présentes dans seize pays africains (Bénin, Madagascar, Burkina-Faso, Mali, Cameroun, Mauritanie, Comores, Niger, Côte d’Ivoire, Nigeria, Gabon, Sénégal, Ghana, Ouganda, Kenya, Afrique du Sud). L’association a été créée afin de contribuer à l’émergence d’une classe entrepreneuriale panafricaine de qualité.

Name: LINKEDIN  LOCAL - OGUN
Description:
Hello Champ!

We duly welcome you to this page and we celebrate you for showing interest to being a part us.

VISION(WANT WE SEE)
To have OGUN occupants sensitised about LinkedIn and it's opportunities.

 MISSION (WHAT WE DO)
Organise LinkedIn events to enlighten OGUN occupants and bring online connections to physical collaboration.

INTRODUCTION
LinkedIn local has been an event with the motive of helping individuals who uses LinkedIn actively to take their relationship with others physical and collaborate much more, as well as learn how to be more relevant on the space.

Linkedin local Oguns is aimed at achieving this above as well and we want to bring the information about the Gospel of LinkedIn to the occupants of Ogun State and also help those using LinkedIn before, connect with their connections offline and build much more productive collaborations

Name: ISC2 Los Angeles Chapter
Description:
We are the ISC2 LA chapter, a local non-profit association for information security professionals.

ISC2 is the World’s Leading Cybersecurity and IT Security Professional Organization.

Name: Professional Association of Writers and Editors (Internat'l)
Indonesian Export Channel
Description:
Indonesian Export Channel (IEC) or Kanal Ekspor Indonesia is one of the biggest exporter associations in Indonesia. Started amidst COVID-19 pandemic in late 2021, IEC members now has spread all over Indonesian archipelago.

Despite its young age IEC has succeed in building a strategic partnership with a lot of stakeholders nationally and internationally

Join us now to enhance your exporting acumen and network

Name: UNICEM Centre-Val de Loire
Description:
UNICEM Centre-Val de Loire regroupe 132 entreprises adhérentes réparties sur 6 départements. L’UNICEM Centre-Val de Loire place l’aménagement durable des territoires au cœur de sa politique en initiant des collaborations constructives avec ses parties prenantes.
Les entreprises adhérentes de l’UNICEM ont différents types de ressources comme :
-> Le Granulat,
-> Le béton prêt à l’emploi,
-> Le Recyclage des matériaux inertes.

Name: Biomed Austria - Österreichische Fachgesellschaft für Biomedizinische Analytik
Description:
Biomed Austria ist die einzige berufspolitische Interessenvertretung der Biomedizinischen Analytiker*innen in Österreich.

Als Fachgesellschaft vertreten wir die Interessen unserer Berufsgruppe gegenüber Öffentlichkeit, Behörden, Politik und anderen Gesundheitsberufen. Wir engagieren uns für die Weiterentwicklung des Berufs und des Berufsgesetzes, bringen Expertise bei Veränderungen des Berufsbildes ein und unterstützen bei berufsrechtlichen Fragen.

Ein zentrales Anliegen ist die Bereitstellung eines qualitätsgesicherten, kostengünstigen und fachlich vielfältigen Fortbildungsangebots. Zusätzlich vergeben wir das MTD-CPD-Zertifikat, das bei Erfüllung der Richtlinien mit einer Gültigkeit von fünf Jahren kostenlos für Mitglieder ausgestellt wird.

Biomed Austria ist Teil von MTD-Austria, dem Dachverband der gehobenen medizinisch-therapeutisch-diagnostischen Gesundheitsberufe. Gemeinsam mit den sechs weiteren Berufsvertretungen setzen wir uns für die Stärkung aller MTD-Berufe sowie für eine hochwertige Aus-, Fort- und Weiterbildung ein.

International sind wir Mitglied der EPBS (European Association of Biomedical Scientists) und der IFBLS (International Federation of Biomedical Laboratory Science). Innerhalb der EPBS streben wir europaweit vergleichbare Berufsausbildungen auf hohem Niveau an, um die Mobilität und Anerkennung der Abschlüsse zu fördern. Mit der IFBLS beteiligen wir uns an internationalen Projekten und Gremien der Gesundheitsversorgung.

Name: Club de Innovación de Paraguay
Description:
El Club de Innovación del Paraguay es una iniciativa que nace del programa OPNX impulsado por el BID Lab y la UIP, con el objetivo de fortalecer el ecosistema de innovación del país.

Es una asociación civil sin fines de lucro que conecta al sector privado, público y académico para impulsar juntos la competitividad, la sostenibilidad y el desarrollo de nuevas soluciones innovadoras en Paraguay.
Reúne a empresas líderes comprometidas con transformar su cultura, profesionalizar sus equipos e innovar con propósito.

Name: Engineers Australia Canberra Division
Description:
With around 3,900 members in the ACT, we are the representatives of our engineering profession in the Canberra Division of Engineers Australia.

Our collective mission is to advance society through great engineering and we do this through leadership of the profession, supporting pathways into engineering, advocacy for engineering led solutions of the problems facing Canberra, an effective volunteer network, and supporting a strong professional framework. 

This page/group is office bearer/volunteer built and run by local Canberra engineers. This is not the official page of Engineers Australia and is not moderated or managed by Engineers Australia employees.

Name: Compliance Institute of Zambia
Description:
Compliance Institute of Zambia exists to promote and enhance the standards of compliance practices across various sectors in Zambia, fostering collaboration, knowledge sharing, and professional development among its members and its stakeholders.

The Association shall exclusively engage in compliance-related endeavors and shall refrain from participating in any activities that could potentially be perceived as conflicting with the objectives of non-compliance related entities within and beyond the country.

Name: Taiwan Bio Industry Organization (Taiwan BIO)
Description: Since its founding in 1989, the Taiwan Bio Industry Organization (Taiwan BIO) has been promoting the interests of its members from industry, the government and academia as well as promoting the development of the biomedical industries and their contribution to Taiwan's economy and people. The more than 100 organizations and 3,000 individuals that make up Taiwan BIO membership represent the entire life sciences industry spectrum, including from the biotechnology, pharmaceutical, diagnostics, medical devices and materials, agricultural biotechnology, and nutraceuticals sectors.

Name: Ingenieurkammer Niedersachsen
Description: Die Ingenieurkammer Niedersachsen ist das Sprachrohr der niedersächsischen Ingenieurinnen und Ingenieure gegenüber der Öffentlichkeit und der Politik. Sie hat rund 6.000 Mitglieder aus allen Ingenieurdisziplinen und vertritt die Interessen des Berufsstandes.

Name: Dansk Told & Skatteforbund
Description:
Dansk Told & Skatteforbund - Kort fortalt

Dansk Told & Skatteforbund er den forhandlingsberettigede organisation for ca. 2.400 tjenestemænd og overenskomstansatte i Skattemininisteriet - Skatteforvaltningen (Skattestyrelsen, Gældsstyrelsen, Toldstyrelsen, Vurderingsstyrelsen, Motorstyrelsen, Udviklings- og Forenklingsstyrelsen og Administrations- og Servicestyrelsen), Skatteministeriets Departement, Spillemyndigheden og Skatteankestyrelsen.

Forbundet er partipolitisk uafhængig og tilsluttet hovedorganisationen FH og centralorganisationen CO10.

Dansk Told & Skatteforbunds øverste myndighed er kongressen, som mødes hver 3. år. I år uden kongres afholdes et repræsentantskabsmøde.

Name: SAAHSP
Description:
SAAHSP is a Non Profit Organisation serving its members and the Skin, Body, and Nail Care Profession and Industry as the Professional Body in South Africa. SAAHSP is legally constituted to protect the Public Interest in relation to services provided.  

The organisation will develop, award, monitor and revoke Professional Designations and regulate Continual Professional Development (CPD)

Name: Konur í stjórnum - Women on Boards Iceland
Description:
Konur í stjórnum – Women on Boards Iceland was established in early 2025 by a group of experienced women board directors aged 35 to 50, with the support of KPMG as well as the invaluable goodwill of the Confederation of Icelandic Enterprises and other trusted partners.

We aim to contribute toward greater diversity in the boardroom and beyond, driving growth and value creation across sectors, by providing networking opportunities, practical education and training with a clear focus on the role and responsibilities of board of directors.

For more information and partnership opportunities please reach out through Linkedin messaging and, join our journey by signing up to our newsletter.

Name: CPME Corrèze 19
Description:
Créée en 1987, la CPME Corrèze (Confédération des Petites et Moyennes entreprises) est l’organisation patronale interprofessionnelle dirigeants de TPE PME qui engagent chaque jour leur savoir, leurs avoirs et leur honneur.

Outre les actions qu’elle mène avec la CPME pour rendre l’écosystème favorable à l'entrepreneuriat, son statut de membre des partenaires sociaux lui permet de faire entendre la voix des entrepreneurs et de défendre les intérêts des TPE PME du territoire dans tous les organismes paritaires : conseil des prud’hommes, URSSAF, Médiation du crédit, SPST, CPRI, etc.

Name: Malaysian Society of Clinical Psychology
Description:
The Malaysian Society of Clinical Psychology was established in 2010 by a group of clinical psychologists who were passionate about developing the field of clinical psychology in Malaysia while educating the Malaysian public about mental health and treatment. As an organisation comprised of professionals as well as student members, we hope to promote continuous education in clinical psychology.

Today, we are a growing organisation. As our numbers multiply, we hope that our presence and influence in the sphere of mental health in Malaysia will likewise continue to grow. Our website is dedicated to this mission.

We look forward to be able to serve our fellow clinical psychologists and the populace of Malaysia. Onwards and forwards towards a mentally, emotionally and psychologically healthy Malaysia!

Name: SheCan Connect Global Network
Description:
SheCan Connect Global Network (SCGN) is a powerful movement uniting women worldwide in community service, social impact, and philanthropic leadership. Our network includes women passionate about faith-driven leadership, community transformation, and creating meaningful change both locally and internationally.

We believe faith-driven leadership fuels transformation. That’s why we equip women with the resources, skills, and connections to expand their impact across Leadership, Innovation, Faith, and Economic Mobility (LIFE).

We believe in Faith. We believe in Women. We believe #SheCan

What We Do
Through SCGN’s dynamic community, women gain access to opportunities that turn vision into action. Whether you're an established leader, an aspiring changemaker, or someone seeking certification in community impact initiatives, we provide:

Peer Mentorship – Connect with like-minded leaders and changemakers.
Professional Development – Gain access to training, mentorship, and certifications.
Dynamic Community of Driven Women – Join a global community dedicated to service and success.
Empowerment & Inspiration – Learn from industry experts and thought leaders.
Global Travel & Immersion – Experience transformative learning across cultures.

Our Impact Approach: The LIFE Framework

LEADERSHIP – Equipping women with the skills, confidence, and support to lead
INNOVATION – Driving creative solutions and expanding digital opportunities for women
FAITH – Strengthening resilience and purpose through faith-driven leadership
ECONOMIC MOBILITY – Providing funding, scholarships, and investment opportunities for women-led ventures

SCGN bridges global insights with local solutions—helping women thrive in their communities and beyond.

Join us. Lead with purpose. Create lasting change.

 Subscribe today and become part of the movement! #SheCanConnect

https://shecanconnectgn.com/global-network-subscription/

Name: BUSINESS ARMOR CLUB
Description:
Le Business Armor Club est une association
regroupant des dirigeants des Côtes d’Armor.
Ce club d’affaires indépendant a pour vocation
de développer le réseau de ses adhérents.
Notre approche est centrée sur l’entraide et
l’accompagnement. Le Business Armor Club
vise principalement à favoriser les
recommandations d'affaires entre ses membres.

Chaque membre bénéficie de l'exclusivité
dans son domaine d'activité. Aucune
concurrence n'est présente au sein du groupe.

Name: Les entreprises s'engagent - Club Loire
Description:
"Les entreprises s'engagent" Club Loire, c’est la communauté ligérienne des entreprises engagées pour une société inclusive et un monde plus durable. 

Elle est constituée à ce jour de 150 entreprises engagées sur l'ensemble du département de la Loire et pilotée par 3 clubs d'entreprises : FACE Loire, Forez Entreprendre et le Crepi Loire Haute-Loire.

Elle anime des coalitions inédites qui réunissent des entreprises de toutes tailles, mais aussi les services de l’État et les collectivités, des décideurs, des associations et des leaders engagés issus de toutes sphères.

Notre mission ? Engager les entreprises volontaires du territoire pour faire face, avec l’État, aux grands défis sociaux et environnementaux actuels.

Name: Mná Mheiriceá
Description:
Mná Mheiriceá is an intentional continuation of the legacy Irish women have built in America since their first arrival as an enterprising, independent, future-oriented community. 

We are a convener and resource for the new graduate, the mother, and the executive who understand that it is not just raising a child that takes a village, but raising ourselves as well. Mná Mheiriceá strives to convene women regardless of background to understand and celebrate all it is to be a woman. 
Mná Mheiriceá hosts women-centered professional, wellness, and social events that are accessible to all members of our community regardless of employment history, background, education, or age. We can connect you with a mentor or sounding board. We can be a resource or a respite, and are prepared to celebrate your success, be it personal, or professional.

Name: DMO Tunis-Carthage
Description:
L'ambition du DMO est de faire de Tunis-Carthage une véritable destination touristique, leader au nord de la Méditerranée en matière de tourisme "City", en profitant de ses nombreux atouts.
- Notre vision: 
Nous sommes un organisme de gestion de destination, autonome, qui s’engage à fédérer les acteurs du tourisme et à créer de la valeur pour l’ensemble de l’écosystème de Tunis-Carthage.
- Notre mission:
Cultiver l’identité de la destination Tunis-Carthage afin de renforcer le sentiment d’appartenance des acteurs locaux et de catalyser les énergies et la créativité des acteurs du tourisme à travers l’établissement et le développement de partenariats publics/privés/société civile pour en faire une destination captivante, notoire et durable.

Name: LSP MSDM Talenta Gemilang
Description:
LSP P3 dalam Bidang MSDM adalah lembaga sertifikasi profesi yang fokus pada pelatihan dan sertifikasi di bidang Manajemen Sumber Daya Manusia. 

LSP MSDM Talenta Gemilang menawarkan program yang dirancang secara menyeluruh dengan pendekatan praktis untuk mendukung pengembangan keterampilan dan pengetahuan individu maupun organisasi. 

Tujuan kami adalah membantu menciptakan pengelolaan sumber daya manusia yang efektif dan profesional sesuai dengan kebutuhan era modern.

Name: Emirates Professional Golfers Association
Description: The Emirates PGA (Professional Golfers' Association) is a leading organisation dedicated to the development and promotion of golf in the United Arab Emirates. It serves as the professional body for golf coaches, players, and industry professionals within the region. The Emirates PGA offers a wide range of services, including high-quality coaching programmes, professional development opportunities, and the organisation of tournaments and events. With a focus on enhancing the standards of golf instruction and fostering the growth of the sport, the Emirates PGA plays a pivotal role in nurturing both amateur and professional golfers. Additionally, it supports various initiatives to engage the community, such as youth development programmes, women’s golf initiatives, and partnerships with local golf clubs and organisations. Through its commitment to excellence, the Emirates PGA continues to shape the future of golf in the UAE.

Name: Desi Daughters
Description:
Desi Daughters provides culturally relevant information, resources, and community to daughters (and sons!) of aging South Asian elders.

Our free online community (over 10k members and growing) provides a supportive space to learn from and lean on each other. 

Many of our elders and families share culturally similar caregiving needs and challenges, but no central resource was available to reference. This community fills that void by creating a supportive space where we can share our experiences with and learn from one another.

Our premium offering is Local Chapter membership. Local Chapters are private, location-specific, facilitated groups where you can connect with others who are supporting a senior in that area or other local seniors.

Chapters facilitate sharing local area insights, coordinating activities or meet-ups, learning about local culturally relevant options, and more in a supportive space and based on personal experience. 

Chapter membership also includes: our growing business directory with 125+ listings and member comments, over a dozen on-demand replays, and caregiver resources.

Additionally, membership includes priority access to the Desi Daughters team to help you navigate your journey.

Learn more here: https://tinyurl.com/joindesidaughters

Name: BNI Essonne Terres d'avenir
Description:
Notre mission :
Aider les entrepreneurs et professions libérales à développer leurs ventes grâce à notre approche structurée, positive et incitative du marketing de recommandation.

 Notre philosophie « Qui Donne Reçoit » :
C’est l’état d’esprit que partagent les Membres BNI. Celui qui donne des recommandations en reçoit lui-même. C’est parce que tout le monde donne que tout le monde reçoit. C’est cette philosophie qui apporte de la cohésion au Groupe, constitue un véritable moteur et implique un mode de fonctionnement basé sur la solidarité, la confiance et l’entraide.

 Un accompagnement régulier :
BNI fédère 325 800 Membres à travers le monde, 18 000 en France et Belgique francophone, autour d’une méthode commune basée sur le marketing de recommandation.
Son équipe de professionnels accompagne, forme et encadre les Groupes BNI pour assurer la réussite de tous les Membres.

Nous changeons la manière dont le monde fait des affaires

Name: Women Techmakers Ukraine
Description:
Women Techmakers Ukraine is a community that helps women thrive in tech through events, resources, and professional networking. 

Women Techmakers Global is a Google initiative led to reducing the gender gap in the technology industry, providing women with the resources they need to succeed.

Name: The Horeca Hub
Description: La plataforma digital de los profesionales de Restauración y Hospitalidad

Name: AIPE Asociación de Ingenieros Profesionales de España
Description: Asociación de Ingenieros Profesionales de España

Name: PRSA Greater Cleveland
Description:
The Public Relations Society of America, charted in 1947, is the world’s largest organization for PR professionals, with nearly 20,000 members in 117 chapters. The Greater Cleveland Chapter has nearly 300 members throughout Northeast Ohio.

The PRSA Greater Cleveland Chapter is the professional organization that brings together public relations, communications and marketing practitioners throughout Northeast Ohio. Among the Chapter’s most important activities and duties:

-Coordinate networking events and activities
-Develop and host professional development activities for members on all levels
-Serve as a resource for public relations students at all levels
-Provide recognition of excellence and best practices in all facets of the field of public relations
-Develop and establishes, in conjunction with the national chapter, ethical standards for the profession

Name: Hong Kong Ambassadors Club
Description:
Hong Kong 3.0 – Prosperity Connected Globally

The Hong Kong Ambassadors Club (HKAC) is an organisation for global investors, business magnates and aspiring public figures seeking to deepen ties, build connections, and participate in intimate and high-level conversations with Hong Kong’s best while obtaining critical information and celebrating the unique culture and spirit of its people. The establishment of the Club aims to connect further ecosystem in strategic regions such as the Middle East, and build stronger economic and investment partnerships for the business network and friends towards Hong Kong.

The Club would be dedicated to collaborating with global investors and international business community to engage into global brands to host influential events in HK. The Club is also planning to organise bilateral trade business and investment delegation visits among strategic markets for Hong Kong such as the Middle East, South East Asia and the Greater Bay Area, and facilitate partnerships and collaborations between the senior leaders in the public and private sectors among the regions.

Name: Conseil Regen
Description: Nous, collectif de sociétés de conseil, comprenons que le dépassement des limites planétaires et les atteintes à la justice sociale mettent en péril les conditions de vie sur terre et que nos modèles économiques et nos modes de vie en sont la cause. Fort de cette prise de conscience, nous savons qu'il n'y a pas d'avenir soutenable, ni pour chacun d’entre nous, ni pour les entreprises, sans la mise en œuvre de transformations profondes et systémiques, à la hauteur de ces enjeux. Déterminés à façonner un monde souhaitable, nous nous engageons à contribuer à résoudre les défis les plus pressants de notre époque, tels que le dérèglement climatique, la perte de la biodiversité, la dégradation des écosystèmes et l’atteinte aux droits humains.

Name: Belgian Travel Confederation - BTC
Description: The Belgian Travel Confederation (BTC) is the concretization of the goals that the Belgian travel industry associations wish to realize together. The keys objectives are: JOIGNING FORCES, being ONE VOICE to the public, politics and corporate world as well as give the chance to the actors to benefit from the COMPLEMENTARITY of each association members. This POST COVID period is a real opportunity to work on transversal projects such as EDUCATION, SUSTAINABILITY, DIGITALIZATION and EXPERTISE RECOGNITION .

Name: Alliance Police nationale
Description: Alliance Police Nationale regroupe aujourd'hui plus de 30 000 adhérents.Particulièrement attachée aux institutions de la République, au code de déontologie de la Police Nationale et aux principes de la déclaration universelle des droits de l'homme et du citoyen, l'organisation défend les intérêts moraux et professionnels des policiers en charge de la Paix publique, des Investigations et de l'Ordre public.

Name: Faszination Technik
Description: Finde heraus, welcher technische Beruf am besten zu dir passt.
