Name: Réseau Culture 360°
Description: Le Réseau regroupe 15 conseils régionaux de la culture (CRC), des équipes comprenant plus de 115 professionnels. Ensemble, les CRC représentent plus de 4300 artistes, artisans.es, écrivains.es, organismes artistiques et culturels, partout sur le territoire. La mission du RCRCQ est de concerter, de représenter et d’appuyer les CRC pour favoriser la vitalité artistique et culturelle des territoires du Québec.

Name: SNFMI - Société Nationale Française de Médecine Interne
Description: La SNFMI a pour mission de promouvoir et diffuser toutes les question relatives à la Médecine Interne

Name: H2V INSIGHTS by H2 LATAM SUMMIT
Description:
H2V Insights Lima es la primera serie de Foros Internacionales especializados en Hidrógeno Verde en nuestro país. Este 2023 inauguramos Lima - Perú con un exitoso H2V Insights I: Molécula y derivados (20JUL23) y ahora seguimos con el H2V Insights II: Estrategia Nacional en Noviembre de 2023 en el Swissôtel en el distrito de San Isidro. H2V Insights Lima, la primera serie de Foros Internacionales autorizados por  el Gobierno del Perú y con el respaldo de las principales Asociaciones de Hidrógeno de la región será el punto de encuentro de los actores claves de esta importante industria.

Visita nuestra website: www.h2-latamsummit.com o escríbenos para obtener mayor información: info@h2-latamsummit.com

Name: FREELENS e.V.
Description: Wir sind FREELENS, der größte und mitgliederstärkste Berufsverband für Fotograf*innen in Deutschland und vertreten die Interessen von über 2.000 Mitgliedern. Wir engagieren uns in berufspolitischen, rechtlichen, wirtschaftlichen und sozialen Belangen von Fotograf*innen, treten für die Wertschätzung ihrer Arbeit und die Förderung der kulturpolitischen Bedeutung der Fotografie ein.

Name: ACS Division of Agrochemicals (AGRO)
Description: AGRO, a Division of the American Chemical Society, brings together a worldwide community of scientists and stakeholders to advance knowledge and promote innovative solutions for the protection of agricultural productivity, public health, and environment.

Name: Danske Byggefag
Description:
Danske Byggefag (tidligere BAT-Kartellet) er det fælles talerør for syv fagforbund på byggeområdet.

Vores medlemmer er 3F Byggegruppen, Malerforbundet, Blik- og Rørarbejderforbundet, Dansk El-Forbund, Dansk Metal, HK Privat og Teknisk Landsforbund.

De syv forbund repræsenterer godt 80.000 ansatte i den danske byggesektor.

Danske Byggefag arbejder for et arbejdsmarked med ordnede forhold, overenskomster, bedre arbejdsmiljø og mindre svindel. 

Danske Byggefag ledes af en bestyrelse, tre stående udvalg og to netværk bistået af et sekretariat. 

Danske Byggefags opgave er at at påvirke politikere, embedsmænd, organisationer og arbejdsgivere til at skabe en stærkere byggebranche med flere og bedre jobs.

Name: Colegio Oficial de Ingenieros Técnicos Aeronáuticos, e Ingenieros Aeroespaciales
Description:
Bienvenidos al Colegio Oficial de Ingenieros Técnicos Aeronáuticos e Ingenieros Aeroespaciales.

En este espacio, estamos dedicados a impulsar la excelencia en la ingeniería aeroespacial, un sector que no solo desafía los límites de la tecnología, sino que también transforma nuestro mundo. Aquí, compartimos noticias de última hora, eventos destacados y todos los avances que marcan el rumbo de nuestra industria.

Nuestra misión es ser la voz de los profesionales que están construyendo el futuro de la aviación y el espacio. Desde innovaciones que redefinen la movilidad aérea hasta iniciativas que promueven la sostenibilidad en el sector, somos el nexo entre la comunidad de ingenieros y las tendencias globales que están moldeando nuestro entorno.

Únete a nosotros en esta apasionante travesía. Aquí encontrarás recursos valiosos, oportunidades de networking y una plataforma para colaborar y compartir ideas que nos llevarán a nuevas alturas. Juntos, alcanzaremos las estrellas y más allá!

Descubre, conecta y vuela alto con nosotros!

Name: Dallas/Fort Worth Alliance of Black Accountants
Description: The Dallas-Fort Worth Alliance of Black Accountant (DFW-ABA) is dedicated to empowering and uplifting professionals in the accounting and business fields. We believe that by providing a supportive and inclusive community, resources, and opportunities for growth, we help professionals thrive in their careers and make a positive impact in the nonprofit sector. DFW-ABA is made up of passionate individuals who are committed to creating a more diverse and equitable industry. We welcome all accountants and business professionals to join our community and be a part of this mission.

Name: AMERSA
Description:
AMERSA's mission is to improve health and well-being through multidisciplinary leadership in substance use education, research, clinical care, and policy. 

AMERSA works to promote and advance multidisciplinary engagement, education, mentorship, and leadership among those who teach, study, advocate, and provide clinical care in the field of substance use and addiction.

Name: IRSE Australasia Younger Members Society
Description:
Institution of Railway Signal Engineers, Australasian Section, Younger Members Society.

Protecting the safety of all those who travel and work on railway systems.

The IRSE is the professional institution for railway control systems engineers - advancing the knowledge and practice of the profession through developing, supporting, regulating and promoting professional standards for technical and ethical competence.

The IRSEA YMS is for those in Australia and New Zealand who are in the initial professional development stage of their career (typically ten years or less experience).

Name: Crea-PB
Description: O Conselho Regional de Engenharia e Agronomia da Paraíba (Crea-PB) é uma entidade responsável por fiscalizar e regulamentar o exercício profissional das áreas de engenharia, agronomia, geologia, geografia e meteorologia no estado da Paraíba. Sua missão é garantir a qualidade, a segurança e a ética nas atividades dessas profissões, promovendo o desenvolvimento sustentável e o bem-estar da sociedade paraibana. O Crea-PB atua no registro e na fiscalização de profissionais e empresas, na emissão de Anotação de Responsabilidade Técnica (ART) e na promoção de ações educativas e de valorização profissional. Como órgão representativo, o Crea-PB desempenha um papel fundamental na proteção dos interesses dos profissionais e na salvaguarda dos padrões de excelência nas áreas técnicas abrangidas.

Name: Nebraska Pharmacists Association
Description:
The Nebraska Pharmacists Association (NPA) strives to be the most relevant resource in advocating, educating, and connecting our pharmacy community. You’ll find our staff genuine, our commitment unwavering, and our support timely. 

Our team is based in Lincoln, but be assured our mindset is statewide and beyond.  We travel, connect, and engage with pharmacy professionals every day.  We draw on our member’s ideas, insights, and expertise so we can actively provide the resources, assistance, and advocacy you need to be successful.

Our members have diverse interests and practice areas. They work, teach, and study in the pharmacy field. The NPA is your champion across all disciplines in pharmacy, and our diverse membership offers an unparalleled local peer network. We create many opportunities for you to engage, learn, give back, and grow. The NPA is well positioned to stay on top of what's new, what’s changed, and what’s coming in pharmacy.  But we don’t just report information.  We advocate, educate, and connect.

Name: ASCE Region 7
Description: ASCE Region 7 represents civil engineers across Colorado, Iowa, Kansas, Missouri, Nebraska, South Dakota, and Wyoming. We serve as a link between the American Society of Civil Engineers and our local Sections and Branches, supporting members through leadership, resources, and recognition. Whether it's through our grant and awards programs or guidance on ASCE initiatives, Region 7 is committed to advancing the profession and supporting our engineering community.

Name: Somali Business Support Network (SBSN)
Description: An integrated network of Somali business development institutions which is a nonprofit organization that connects the innovation hubs, business development professionals, and TVET centers that support SME promotion in Somalia.

Name: Boardroom Beauty Collective
Description: Our Mission is to redefine the face of  leadership in beauty. We help underrepresented and next-gen beauty talent elevate their influence, expand their network, and enhance their leadership potential with a breadth of media and depth of impactful programming.

Name: National Disabled Legal Professionals Association
Description: The National Disabled Legal Professionals Association (NDLPA) was founded in 2022 to organize and unify disabled attorneys, judges, and legal professionals into a force for change in the legal profession. NDLPA aims to advocate for and empower disabled legal professionals; promote professional growth and opportunity for attorneys and legal professionals; improve access and inclusion in the profession; and ensure access to justice for all.

Name: Alberta Veterinary Technologist Association
Description: We advocate for the role of RVTs within the profession, provide professional development, enhance animal welfare through high-quality veterinary medicine and regulations, support our members to build a strong network, and represent the profession through a strong and collaborative association.

Name: Synchronverband
Description: Synchronverband e.V. - Die Gilde is a professional organization representing the German dubbing industry. Our members are creatives, technical personnel, both freelance and employed, as well as dubbing companies. We provide a forum for conversation between all players in the German dubbing industry, including streamers and distributors. We provide education and information to our members and to newcomers (esp. scriptwriting and acting), we represent the industry to the public, and we are proud to foster diversity and inclusion via our Diversity Workgroup.

Name: EAFT, European Association for Terminology
ASCHP
Description:
The ASCHP is home to community or workplace-based counsellors who work in structured and supervised environments including, but not limited to private Wellness/Counselling Centres or government institutions, schools, Non-Governmental Organisations (NGO’s) including Faith Based, Community Based and Not-for-Profit Organisations, the South African Police Service, Counselling Call Centres, Hospitals, Clinics and Support Agencies, Sports Centres, Education and Training facilities, Health and Emergency services and facilities.

A nationally recognized professional body ensures consistency in standards across and within provinces in South Africa, and across different counselling contexts. It provides a learning pathway for unqualified counsellors who currently work in a variety of contexts, often in environments where mental health professional such as psychologists and social workers are not necessarily accessible to the majority of the population. Registration of counsellors with a professional body will provide a consistent basis for evaluating and regulating counselling and will ensure greater access to counselling services.

Counselling enables one or more people to go through the process of finding solutions to their concerns or difficulties. Counselling may take various forms, including with individuals, couples, families or domestic units and groups. The ASCHP has identified accredited training providers to enable counsellors to gain accredited and applicable qualifications. This will allow counsellors to be recognised and will address current national health and social service priorities. Ideally, qualifying learners will operate under supervision.

Name: Torch Collective
Description: Torch is a highly vetted membership community for innovators in Nashville. Our mission is to make authentic, high-value connection easy, engaging and routine for founders, dealmakers and disruptors.

Name: Appalachian Society of American Foresters
Real_GRC
Description:
Uma associação criada por mulheres, para mulheres, que estão iniciando, recomeçando ou buscando se recolocar nas áreas de Compliance, Riscos, Controles Internos, Auditoria Interna e Governança.
Nosso propósito é promover o fortalecimento da cultura de compliance, incentivando a troca de experiências e o desenvolvimento coletivo.
Acreditamos no poder da colaboração para construir ambientes éticos, transparentes e sustentáveis.

Juntas, vamos mais longe.

Name: NYC Founders Club
Description: A curated community built by founders for founders.

Name: U2P AUVERGNE-RHONE-ALPES
Description: L’U2P Auvergne Rhône-Alpes, seule organisation interprofessionnelle représentative de l’artisanat, du commerce de proximité, et des professions libérales.

Name: M Society
Description:
M Society este o comunitate elitistă care nu doar discută idei, ci le pune în mișcare.

În spatele ușilor închise, se ascunde o lume a conexiunilor infinite, unde
antreprenoriatul, cultura și experiențele sociale se întâlnesc pentru a modela viitorul.

Te invităm să deschizi ușa către oportunități exclusiviste, reuniuni de networking și conversații care inspiră.

Pășește în universul vizionarilor și al liderilor care dau naștere unor inițiative remarcabile la fiecare strângere de mână.

Name: Anza Grow Academy
Description:
Anza Grow program is a 12 week program aimed at helping aspiring entrepreneurs turn their business ideas into successful ventures.
 
The Grow program provides a range of resources and support for startups, including workshops, mentorship and coaching, and networking opportunities.

Name: Associação dos Produtores Rurais de Carauari (ASPROC)
Description: A Associação dos Produtores Rurais de Carauari (ASPROC) foi criada em 1994 pelo movimento de extrativistas que se uniram para lutar contra um sistema imposto de exploração econômica, social e ambiental na região do Médio Juruá, Amazonas. Localizada no município de Carauari, a 780 km de Manaus, a associação representa aproximadamente 800 famílias de 55 comunidades ribeirinhas. Desde sua criação, a ASPROC tem representado os interesses das populações tradicionais no Médio Juruá pela melhoria da qualidade de vida com a garantia de direitos sociais. E assim, vem propondo e criando soluções aos problemas locais, principalmente em relação as grandes distâncias percorridas. Além disso, a gestão participativa com a organização social das comunidades foi uma estratégia para promover o desenvolvimento econômico e social da região, possibilitando a realização da cogestão dos recursos naturais de grande importância sociocultural por meio do desenvolvimento de cadeias de valor da Sociobiodiversidade, como é o caso do manejo sustentável do pirarucu e da cadeia da borracha.

Name: Newcastle Upon Tyne Law Society
Description: The Newcastle upon Tyne Law Society has served solicitors in the North East of England since 1826 and have promoted professional expertise for nearly 200 years. We have representatives on many local, regional and national legal committees, have a wide-ranging legal education programme and run a number of social events including the Newcastle Law Dinner.
Location: Newcastle Upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear

Name: Beyond the 9th
Description:
If you’re a working mama and you're feeling: Alone. Lonely. Hormonal. Overwhelmed. Stressed. Torn. Unseen. Unheard. All of the above.

Join me and over 670 hard working moms in Beyond the 9th. We’re here for you.

Inside the community, you’ll have exclusive access to:

 Workshops led by experts on a variety of topics specifically for working mothers
 Discussion boards with other members
 Networking with other professional mamas
 How-to guides with everything from calendaring tips to workplace negotiation tactics

…and so much more. 

Our mission is to help working mamas feel supported, less alone, and better prepared to handle the challenges we face beyond the 9th month.

I hope you'll join us. 

Join at beyondthe9th.com

Name: VDG Verband Deutscher Garten-Center e.V.
Description: Der Verband vertritt die Interessen der grünen Handelsbetriebe in Deutschland.

Name: CAPEB Hauts-de-France
Description: Organisation Professionnelle des petites entreprises du Bâtiment

Name: AEM USA DFW Chapter - Asociación de Empresarios Mexicanos
Description: The US – MX Business Association was established in 1996 by a group of Mexican entrepreneurs who came up with the idea of teaming up to help Mexican business-people and professionals to achieve success in the United States and to assist American business-people interested in doing business in Mexico.

Name: Swissinterpro
Description:
Swissinterpro est l’association suisse des entreprises qui veulent profiter des opportunités de la numérisation, mettre en place des formes de travail agiles et se positionner de manière optimale avec leurs équipes.

Qu’il s’agisse de start-ups à la pointe de la technologie, d’écoles internationales ou d’entreprises bien établies, d’un membre de la direction de longue date ou d’un nouveau venu, Swissinterpro est une communauté professionnelle et intersectorielle dans laquelle les membres se complètent et avancent ensemble.

Ils bénéficient du savoir-faire et du soutien de l’association et ont accès aux outils & technologies qui facilitent la transformation numérique, automatisent les processus standard et les libèrent des tâches administratives. Autre atout : avec HOTELA, les membres de l’association bénéficient de toutes les assurances sociales – de manière interconnectées et toutes à la même adresse.

Name: USPORT Miami
Description: USPORT is an organization that is designed to provide members with opportunities to network in and get experience with all areas of the sport industry. This is accomplished by going beyond academics to bring the experience of the sports world to each member. The organization brings in guest speakers, hosts events, partners with professional sport organizations, and more by utilizing the vast opportunities available in the South Florida market. Students of all majors and minors are welcome to join.

Name: Trans Rally
Description: Trans Rally is an organization for and by the trans community and its friends. Our goal is to economically empower our members by providing holistic support, including help with job searches, networking, and community support!

Name: STEP México
Description:
Welcome to STEP Mexico

STEP is a global professional body, comprising lawyers, accountants, trustees and other practitioners that help families plan for their futures.

Our mission is to inspire confidence in families planning their assets across generations by setting and upholding high professional standards, informing public policy, promoting education, and connecting practitioners globally to share knowledge and best practice.

Full STEP members, known as TEPs, are internationally recognised as experts in their field, with proven qualifications and experience.

Name: Chicagoland Veteran Business Owners
Description:
The Chicagoland Veteran Business Owners Group is a professional network committed to empowering veteran entrepreneurs and strengthening the veteran-owned business community in the Greater Chicago area. We provide a platform for networking, collaboration, and business growth while advocating for the success of those who have served.

Our members are veterans who have taken their leadership, discipline, and commitment from military service into the business world. Whether you're a veteran business owner, a company looking to partner with veteran-led enterprises, or a supporter of veteran-owned businesses, we welcome you to connect with us.

Our Mission

To foster a thriving network of veteran-owned businesses by providing valuable resources, meaningful connections, and growth opportunities. We aim to amplify the success of veteran entrepreneurs while supporting the broader Chicagoland business community.

What We Offer:

 Networking & Collaboration – Build meaningful relationships with fellow veteran entrepreneurs and industry professionals.
 Business Growth & Support – Access mentorship, resources, and strategies to help scale your business.
 Advocacy & Awareness – Increase visibility and recognition for veteran-owned businesses in the Chicagoland area.

At Chicagoland Veteran Business Owners, we believe in the power of service—both in uniform and business. Join us as we continue to lead, innovate, and support one another in the entrepreneurial journey.

Get involved today and connect with a community that understands your mission.

Name: National Plaintiffs' Law Association (NPLA)
Description:
National Plaintiffs' Law Association is a group of current law students and alum dissatisfied with the control large defense-orientated law firms exercise over legal academia and the resulting culture at elite law schools. 

NPLA exists to support law students looking to become plaintiff-side attorneys. Comprised of law students from across the country, NPLA is a national resource and network for those passionate about practicing on behalf of plaintiffs. From Berkeley to Harvard, we have affiliated organizations on multiple campuses and are seeing a meaningful uptick in interest in plaintiff-side careers and perceptible changes in students’ perceptions of plaintiff-side attorneys. NPLA supports law students looking to become plaintiff-side attorneys. 

Comprised of law students nationwide, NPLA is a resource and network for those passionate about fighting for justice on behalf of plaintiffs. NPLA addresses the resource and opportunity gaps that exist for law students who want a career in plaintiff-side litigation.

Name: Jovem Aprendiz Brasil
Description:
Somos um site informativo direcionado para divulgação de vagas de jovem aprendiz para todo o Brasil.

Portanto, nosso trabalho é divulgar as vagas de diversas empresas e regiões para ajudar jovens em busca do primeiro emprego.

Além disso, possuímos conteúdo sobre o Programa de Aprendizagem, direitos e benefícios, entrevista de emprego, currículo e dicas para você se preparar para o mercado de trabalho.

Name: Istituto Italiano di Cultura Rabat - المعهد الثقافي الإيطالي بالرباط
Description: L'Institut Culturel Italien de Rabat est un organisme du Ministère italien des Affaires Etrangères et de la Coopération Internationale, chargé de diffuser et de promouvoir la langue et la culture italiennes. Parmi ses principaux objectifs se trouvent l'organisation de cours de langue et de culture italiennes et la réalisation d'initiatives culturelles qui ont pour thème l'Italie, sa vie culturelle, artistique et scientifique.

Name: The Franchise Dept.
Description: We want to help you grow! You've put in the hard work of growing your dream into something much more than that; a living breathing brand. You've developed those key differentiators and processes that have made you an outlier in your industry and now you think you're ready to share this engine with the world through franchising.  That's where we come in.  Scaling from operating multiple units to developing your franchise ecosystem internally can seem like a daunting task, and without massive capital investment and years of R & D, it can be.  The Franchise Dept. serves to fit in and help guide your team through this process.  By leveraging our extensive experience, both as franchisees and franchisors, as well as our partnerships across the franchising industry, we will help you build the solid foundation needed to bring you and your franchisee's continued success into the future. We'd love to hear more about what you do!

Name: National Association of Social Workers - Wisconsin Chapter
Description: To support all social work practitioners in their mission to serve and strengthen relationships within diverse populations; to promote social justice; and to enhance the dignity and worth of all people in the State of Wisconsin through the promotion of quality practice, competent practitioners, integrity and unity of the social work profession.

Name: IABC United States Region
Description: The United States Region of the International Association of Business Communicators (IABC) serves more than 1,000 members and 29 local chapters throughout the United States. We are one of the largest and most diverse regions—truly representing the “International”—in the global community of communication professionals that is the International Association of Business Communicators (IABC).

Name: Asociación Madrileña de Neuropsicología
Description:
La AMNP (Asociación Madrileña de Neuropsicología) es un punto de encuentro de diferentes profesionales que caminan en el sendero de la neuropsicología, un lugar de unión y crecimiento interdisciplinar. Comenzó a andar hace ya algún tiempo buscando entre otros los siguientes fines:
- Punto de encuentro: Ser un punto de encuentro para los profesionales de la Neuropsicología de la Comunidad de Madrid.
- Dar a conocer la profesión del neuropsicólogo las aportaciones que puede hacer a la sociedad y los diferentes contextos y colectivos en los que puede desarrollar su labor.
- Fomentar el desarrollo científico investigador y profesional de la Neuropsicología y favorecer su divulgación.
- Colaborar con los Colegios Profesionales, Asociaciones y Sociedades Científicas, Organismos oficiales y otras Instituciones, en diversas actividades relacionadas con la Neuropsicología.
- Promover la comunicación y la cooperación entre los neuropsicólogos, tanto de la Comunidad y de otras regiones de España, como a nivel internacional.

Name: Ateneo de la Gestión Ambiental
Description:
El Ateneo de la Gestión Ambiental es el primer y único espacio que implementa un sistema de financiamiento plural e inclusivo, validando la participación de la comunidad en el desarrollo de proyectos ambientales.

Buscamos nuclear organizaciones y profesionales independientes para propiciar vínculos e impulsar alternativas sustentables innovadoras.
Nuestra misión es dar trascendencia a la sustentabilidad en cada dimensión del desarrollo humano. Para ello fomentamos la divulgación de contenido, formación profesional y cultural.

Otra forma de hacer gestión ambiental es posible.
Conocé nuestras propuestas en gestionambiental.org

Formá parte del Ateneo!

Name: Ambassadeur Francophone
Description:
Ambassadeur Francophone was founded to simplify the complex administrative processes students and professionals face abroad. Created by expats, we provide transparent, affordable support as a nonprofit, guiding all nationalities in their journey to study or intern in France, Canada, and Mauritius.
---
Basé à Paris, Ambassadeur Francophone propose un accompagnement pour les étudiants expatriés pour une meilleure insertion dans leur vie professionnelle et scolaire en France.

Name: Dansk Selskab for Infektionsmedicin
Description: Dansk Selskab for Infektionsmedicin har til formål at fremme praktiske og teoretiske fremskridt på det infektionsmedicinske område. Selskabet varetager fagets og dets udøveres fælles faglige interesser over for offentlige myndigheder og over for tilsvarende udenlandske selskaber, og virker rådgivende vedrørende uddannelsen i infektionsmedicin og fagets udvikling i øvrigt.

Name: IMechE Yorkshire Region
Description: The past 100 years have seen many changes in the world of Engineering, and Yorkshire has been at the forefront of Innovation and Technology. The Region is home to many leading Engineering companies and is also home to world-leading research facilities within our Universities and Academic Institutions. This is reflected in the breadth and expertise of our Regional membership of over 6,000.

Name: APB-Guinée
Description:
L'Association Professionnelle des Banques et Etablissements de Crédit en Guinée regroupe les principales Banques et institutions financières du pays, ayant pour mission de promouvoir la stabilité, l'innovation et le développement du secteur bancaire.
Elle s’est fortement développée en passant de 05 membres à 22 Etablissements de Crédit composés de 19 banques à vocation commerciale, de 2 Institutions Financières Spécialisées et d’un Etablissement de Crédit-Bail.
Le but principal de l’APB est de défendre les intérêts de ses Membres et de promouvoir la profession bancaire.

Name: IUDI DNCR Chapter
Description: This is the page for Delhi NCR Chapter of the Institute of Urban Designers India

Name: Deutschschweizer Logopädinnen- und Logopädenverband
Description: Der DLV setzt sich für die Anliegen und Interessen seiner Mitglieder ein.

Name: CoMuse
Description:
CoMuse is emotional intelligence at work.

CoMuse is an online professional development community that offers group coaching, mentorship and networking in the practical applications of Emotional Intelligence, compassion, empathy, interpersonal communication and mindful-work for creative entrepreneurs in Music, Media & Entertainment.  As a subscription-based platform we provide year-round support; we fill in the gaps where one-off training and mobile apps fall short in both implementation and accountability.

Our mission is to bring the practical applications of emotional intelligence to the creative industries in order to work better together.

We are the largest global support of emotional intelligence at work for creative entrepreneurs and their organizations via our online community platform. We provide safe spaces to practice tough conversations with positive outcomes–redefining success. The results of our work are ecological. There is evidence that shows this work creates positive outlooks for individuals and builds more sustainable (read: longevity) careers, teams and companies. We have witnessed firsthand the positive ripple effects within the creative industries and shifts on how we will work better together in our relationships.

Name: Talent Acquisition Leadership Council
Description: The Talent Acquisition Leadership Council (TALC) has over 150 members from over 55 Mid Atlantic companies. We now meet once a quarter to share best practices and discuss industry challenges. In order to attend our events, all members must be leading or managing a team in a corporate talent acquisition organization (no vendors, HR generalists/managers, recruiters, headhunters, or staffing agency professionals). Our members include recruitment leaders (vice presidents and directors) from companies such as Deloitte, Booz Allen, Northrop Grumman, KPMG, Freddie Mac, Amazon, Capital One, SAIC, Accenture, CACI, General Dynamics, and Fannie Mae.

Name: Instituto Axé
Description:
"Evocar... 
…vivências, ancestrais, ritos, mitos e tradições. Raízes da cultura e do imaginário dos povos africanos e autóctones, constituintes da religiosidade afro-brasileira, que florescem por meio de artigos do dia-a-dia."

A Loja Axé é uma loja colaborativa de artigos afrorreligiosos. Nosso maior propósito é dar visibilidade aos pequenos e médios produtores, artesãos, artistas que, por meio de seus produtos, transmitam os valores, histórias, símbolos que tragam à memória religiosidade e ancestralidade.
 
E se você trabalha com produtos ou serviços relacionados às religiões afrobrasileiras ou à temática afro, e crê que seu trabalho vem ao encontro da nossa proposta e-mail para contato@loja-axe.com.
Pra nós, trabalharmos juntos seria razão de grande alegria!

Ademais, conheça também nossas outras iniciativas:

Mídias sociais
https://www.facebook.com/Loja.Axe/
http://instagram.com/loja.axe

Criação de conteúdo
http://blog.loja-axe.com/

Vagas no Ilê
http://vagas-no-ile.loja-axe.com/
Para colaborar na recolocação do nosso povo ao mercado de trabalho.

Nosso site de anúncios classificados
http://classificados.loja-axe.com/

#Axé

Name: Energy Coalition of Ohio
Description:
The Energy Coalition of Ohio was established to facilitate an open conversation about diverse energy streams that are accessible to businesses and organizations of all sizes. By taking collective action to educate small and midsize consumers on how to transition to renewable energy sources, we will realize the massive economic opportunity of renewable energy in Ohio, and achieve the clean future that our children and our communities deserve.

Driven by our passion to build a sustainable future and by our industry knowledge of renewable energy, we have the bandwidth to reshape the energy discussion in Ohio to include more consumers than just large corporations. 

Some of us are CEOs, some of us are project managers, and some of us are non-profit leaders. But what we all have in common is that we are dedicated to making clean energy resources accessible to everyone.

Name: BNI Calathea
Description:
Notre mission :
L'entraide entre entrepreneurs à développer leurs ventes grâce à notre approche structurée, positive et incitative du marketing de recommandation.

 Notre philosophie « Qui Donne Reçoit » :
C’est l’état d’esprit que partagent les Membres BNI. Celui qui donne des recommandations en reçoit lui-même. C’est parce que tout le monde donne que tout le monde reçoit. C’est cette philosophie qui apporte de la cohésion au Groupe, constitue un véritable moteur et implique un mode de fonctionnement basé sur la solidarité, la confiance et l’entraide.

 Un accompagnement régulier :
BNI fédère 325 800 Membres à travers le monde, 18 000 en France et Belgique francophone, autour d’une méthode commune basée sur le marketing de recommandation.
Son équipe de professionnels accompagne, forme et encadre les Groupes BNI pour assurer la réussite de tous les Membres.

Nous changeons la manière dont le monde fait des affaires

Name: Women in Healthcare Network
Description: At WIHCN, our objective is to establish a dedicated space for women working in the healthcare industry broadly - both in the public and the private sectors. Our hope is that WIHCN will foster career and personal growth through educational meetings and mentorship programs, advancing the healthcare landscape of our nation.

Name: The Institute of Internal Auditors Malawi
Description: The Institute of Internal Auditors Malawi is an association incorporated on 9th February 2005 as a company limited by guarantee under Section 14 of the Companies Act 1984 and is an Affiliate of The Institute of Internal Auditors Inc and The African Federation of Institute of Internal Auditors (AFIIA).  The Institute’s core mandate is to assist organizations to improve their governance, risk management and control (GRC) processes. The IIAM is serving over 500 members in internal auditing, governance, risk management and control, IT audit, education, compliance, and security.

Name: Street Food en Mouvement
Description:
Aujourd’hui, la Street Food est synonyme de créativité, de goût et d’authenticité.

Street Food en Mouvement est une association fondée en 2012 par Thierry Marx et présidée par Olivier Lignon, dont le but est d’encadrer et de développer la Street Food en France.

Elle se mobilise pour l’intégration d’une offre mobile de restauration dans la dynamique urbaine et locale tout en garantissant une cuisine de qualité.

Nos 170 Food Trucks, triporteurs et comptoirs présents partout en France proposent plus de 80 spécialités différentes.

Particuliers, entreprises, collectivités ou agence événementielles, nous pouvons répondre à toutes vos demandes pour vos privatisations et événements. Contactez-nous !

Name: BNI Colibri
Description:
Notre mission :
Aider les entrepreneurs et professions libérales à développer leurs ventes grâce à notre approche structurée, positive et incitative du marketing de recommandation.

 Notre philosophie « Qui Donne Reçoit » :
C’est l’état d’esprit que partagent les Membres BNI. Celui qui donne des recommandations en reçoit lui-même. C’est parce que tout le monde donne que tout le monde reçoit. C’est cette philosophie qui apporte de la cohésion au Groupe, constitue un véritable moteur et implique un mode de fonctionnement basé sur la solidarité, la confiance et l’entraide.

 Un accompagnement régulier :
BNI fédère 325 800 Membres à travers le monde, 18 000 en France et Belgique francophone, autour d’une méthode commune basée sur le marketing de recommandation.
Son équipe de professionnels accompagne, forme et encadre les Groupes BNI pour assurer la réussite de tous les Membres.

Nous changeons la manière dont le monde fait des affaires

Name: Fordham Law Dispute Resolution Society
Description: The Dispute Resolution Society teaches law students oral advocacy skills through alternative dispute resolution. Members compete in negotiation, mediation, and arbitration competitions. The Society's teams have consistently ranked regionally, nationally, and internationally.

Name: CRQ VI
Description: Química, Fiscalização, Registro Profissional, Registro de Empresas

Name: Camara Industriales Fundidores de la Republica Argentina
Description: La Cámara Industriales Fundidores de la República Argentina (C.I.F.R.A.) es la única organización empresarial que representa la industria de fundición en Argentina desde 1946.

Name: CalCPA East Bay Chapter
Description:
Welcome to the East Bay Chapter of CalCPA, your local hub for connecting with finance and accounting professionals. We're not just about promoting business growth and upholding integrity, we're about fostering relationships and creating a strong local community of accounting professionals. Because the future of accounting is anything, but by the numbers, we aim to redefine the image of the profession while enhancing the career experience of our members.

In our community, you have the opportunity to connect, collaborate and grow with local professionals who are driving transformation in the field. Join our chapter today, connect with local leaders and be part of a community shaping the future.

Name: African Membrane Society
Description: The mission of the African Membrane Society (AMSIC) is to train a critical mass of experts in the field of membrane science, filtration and sustainable energy technologies across Africa. AMSIC further encourages the enrollment of students in the STEM disciplines (science, technology, engineering and mathematics). AMSIC seeks to facilitate and ensure access to clean drinking  water, clean ambient air quality and improved human health on the African continent and other regions of the world.

Name: Ethiopian Society of Chemical Engineers (ESChE)
Description:
A few decades ago, few and stalwart chemical engineers felt the need for such a forum within the country to put the nascent initiatives for the development of chemical engineering education and fill the gap of the country in the chemical Engineering profession.

Since its modest beginning at Addis Ababa University, Institute of Technology, ESChE has come a long way in contributing to the profession in the country. Today, with around 2,000 members on its roll, the Society has emerged as the apex professional body of chemical engineering professionals in Ethiopia and has developed a distinct profile of its own, which is ever-changing. As a vibrant society, ESChE is always molding itself and playing a proactive role to keep up with the dynamic needs of the country’s economy.

Name: ITE Mountain District
Description:
The Mountain District of the Institute of Transportation Engineers (ITE) was established in January 2020 and is home to members and students across the states of Arizona, Colorado, Idaho, Nevada, New Mexico, Montana, Utah, and Wyoming. Follow our page to stay up-to-date on information around the District!

The ITE Mountain District, like its parent organization ITE, has its roots in the traffic engineering profession. Mountain District members reflect the diversity of our profession, and count planners, architects, retired professionals, and technicians among its membership. One only needs to be active in the field of transportation, traffic engineering, or planning to be eligible to join ITE. Only Members of ITE may be members of the District or the individual Sections and Chapters within the District.

Name: PACCT for sustainability
Description:
Our Purpose is to accelerate the sustainable transformation of our economy through the development of innovative business models aiming at replacing volume and product centric offers by customers and impact centric services

Our ambition is to create and animate the referent European community of companies, public institutions, banking corporations and research institutes sharing the same purpose. 

Our commitments : 
-Provide our participants with access to structured and unique knowledge to fuel their innovation and explorations of new offers and business models. 
-Create connections between participants to accelerate knowledge sharing and mutual support.
-Promote our ideas at a national and European level.

We are launching two initiatives for 2024 : 
-“Knowledge sharing” : webinars and workgroups in 2024 to provide participants with the keys to successful exploration and operationalization of product-as-a-service and other circular use and result-oriented service models in order to transform the environmental and social impact of the business.
-“European Coalition for Impact” : A collective White Paper that will be THE reference document on that topic for both companies and European institutions. This document will be published in oct. 2024.

Interested in joining this European community? Subscribe here :  https://urls.fr/rXasWK

Name: STEP Mauritius
Description: The STEP Mauritius Branch is a key hub for trust and estate professionals in the region, fostering excellence and knowledge sharing within the industry. As part of the global Society of Trust and Estate Practitioners (STEP), our branch connects members with a worldwide network of experts and resources, supporting the highest standards in fiduciary practice. We provide a platform for continuous professional development, networking, and advocacy, ensuring our members are at the forefront of industry developments in Mauritius and beyond.

Name: Plus Us - (A People2.0 Company)
Description: Our platform supports public sector organisations in the sourcing, management, scheduling and payment of temporary workers whilst facilitating a range of engagement methods.

Name: Artificial Intelligence Ethics Accord
Description:
AI Ethics Accord is at the forefront of promoting ethical standards in the development and deployment of artificial intelligence. Our initiative brings together leading AI companies to commit to principles of integrity, transparency, and responsibility. 

By endorsing the AI Ethics Accord, companies showcase their dedication to ethical AI practices, enhancing trust and accountability within the industry. Our mission is to ensure that AI technologies are developed and used in ways that benefit society, uphold fundamental human values, and foster sustainable progress. Join us in shaping a future where AI acts as a force for good.

Managed by AmarinGlobal.

Name: OTRE Occitanie
Description:
L'OTRE Occitanie est une organisation professionnelle patronale de transport routier.

Elle regroupe des entreprises de transport routier et des activités auxiliaires du transport sur la Région Occitanie : transport de marchandises, déménagement, transport de voyageurs, transport sanitaire, logistique…

L’OTRE Occitanie regroupe plus de 380 PME/TPE de transport sur les territoires d'ex-Midi-Pyrénées et ex-Languedoc-Roussillon.

En appui des entreprises en matières juridiques, règlementaires et sociales, l'OTRE Occitanie permet également de bénéficier de services pour accompagner le développement des entreprises de Transport :

- conseiller à la sécurité
- service paie Transport
- vente de documents de transport
- formations paie, sociale, réglementation
- nombreux partenariats

N'hésitez pas à nous contacter, nous serons ravis de vous accompagner dans vos activités de transport !

Nous contacter :
05 61 58 11 26 ou contact@gtp31.com

https://otre-occitanie.org / www.otre.org

Name: WoMen MeetUp
Description: En la Asociación WoMen MeetUp nos mueve dar visibilidad al talento femenino y promover la igualdad. Somos una entidad alineada con la Agenda 2030 y valores como la inclusión de la diversidad, la sostenibilidad  y la colaboración y acción comunitaria buscando el Win-Win para tod@s. Si te sientes identificad@ no dudes en formar parte de este espacio donde mediante la escucha activa, la empatía, el optimismo y la autoestima mejoramos día a día. Estamos creciendo junt@s y junt@s somos más fuertes. Te esperamos.

Name: Asia Food Forum
Description: The Asia Food Forum is the first Food forum that empowers the food industry in the Asia continent, aiming to expand and grow the food industry between Asian countries and other continents. Paving the way for better collaboration and coordination between the engaging entities, institutions, and countries.

Name: EIT Community Hub Romania
Description:
The EIT Community Hub acts as a one-stop shop that gathers all EIT Knowledge and Innovation Communities (KICs) in Romania and supports and identifies synergies between the EIT Community and local actors. The hub reinforces local entrepreneurship and builds bridges between local and EU innovation networks.

The EIT strengthens Europe’s ability to innovate by powering solutions to pressing global challenges and by nurturing entrepreneurial talent to create sustainable growth and skilled jobs in Europe. The EIT is an EU body and an integral part of Horizon Europe, the EU Framework Programme for Research and Innovation.
The EIT, a body of the European Union, funds the EIT Community Hub.

Name: Wo-Men In Tech Security
Description:
Women In Tech Security (WTS) is an initiative aimed at building cybersecurity awareness and increasing community involvement, especially among women. We were founded as a community organization by young cybersecurity professionals with the goal of making an impact in cyberspace.

The name Women In Tech Security reflects our commitment to encompassing various aspects of technology that involve security. We aim to promote the importance of cybersecurity to the broader tech community, adapting to technological developments across different sectors.

Our name highlights the crucial role of women in all aspects of technology and security. Importantly, our organization is not limited to women; we welcome and include everyone, regardless of background or gender, who shares our vision. Through this initiative, we hope to inspire more women and other tech professionals to engage and take an active role in the cybersecurity field.

Learn more about us and stay updated! :
Instagram : instagram.com/womenintechsecurity_/
WhatsApp Channel : whatsapp.com/channel/0029VagX2lM4yltUsD26RV41

Name: SIMSOG - Society of Indian Medical Students of Obstetrics & Gynaecology
Description:
SIMSOG, the Society of Indian Medical Students of Obstetrics and Gynecology, is the first all-India ObGyn student society established on International Women’s Day, March 8th, 2024. We are a passionate community united by our dedication to women’s health. Our tagline, “Breaking Boundaries, Building Hope,” encapsulates our spirit of determination and optimism as we strive to push boundaries and create a brighter future for women’s healthcare. We cannot wait for you to join us in all our future endeavours!

Passionate about women’s healthcare?
Society of Indian Medical Students of Obstetrics & Gynaecology (SIMSOG) is your platform to maximize experiences in Obstetrics and Gynaecology! From networking to advocacy, we’re dedicated to shaping future leaders. Through our society, we explore endless possibilities in ObGyn academically and non-academically! Join us as a general member for exciting opportunities 

Who can be on board : Undergraduate and Postgraduate Medical and Allied Students (MBBS, MD, MS, BDS, MDS, BPTh, MPTh, BOTh, MOTh)
Everyone can apply for FREE, NO BAR!

To learn more about what we are doing, check our social media handles
https://linktr.ee/simsobgyn

Name: Carolina Investment Group
Description: A student-managed investment fund with $500K AUM in paper trading funds. We provide UNC students with educational sessions and hands-on experience through macroeconomic analyses and algorithmic development all while gaining a unique edge on the markets. Our affiliate club, the UNC M&A Group, focuses exclusively on M&A pitches.

Name: UNICEM Normandie
Description:
L’UNICEM Normandie représente la filière des industries extractives et productrice de matériaux :
 75 sites extractifs 
 106 unités de production de béton prêt à l’emploi 
 3 usines de minéraux pour l’industrie 
 12 plateformes de recyclage

𝐃𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐚𝐠𝐞́𝐞𝐬 𝐩𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐥'𝐞𝐧𝐯𝐢𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐞𝐭 𝐥𝐚 𝐑𝐒𝐄
83 sites adhérents sont engagés dans une démarche environnementale et/ou RSE animée par l’association UNICEM entreprises engagées. 

𝐃𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐨𝐢𝐬 𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐮𝐱 𝐞𝐭 𝐧𝐨𝐧 𝐝𝐞́𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞𝐬 
Les sites des entreprises de la filière, installés au cœur des territoires, sont principalement investis dans la production de granulats naturels et issus du recyclage, béton prêt à l’emploi, minéraux pour l’industrie, pierres de construction et roches ornementales.
2422 salariés (dont 284 intérimaires) travaillent au sein de ces sites qui répondent aux besoins du BTP, qui emploient 84270 salariés.

Name: Food Export USA - South America
Description:
Ajudamos importadores a criar parcerias globais de sucesso com exportadores americanos de alimentos, bebidas e ingredientes.

Ayudamos a los importadores a establecer alianzas globales exitosas con exportadores estadounidenses de alimentos, bebidas e ingredientes!

Name: Modern Learners
Description:
Modern Learners helps organizational leaders build a culture of learning through community, content, and events. We help you design joyful learning experiences by keeping a focus on learning.

WE BELIEVE…
the purpose of community and events is to grow, change, and learn!

Events facilitate connections.

Connections provide opportunities to learn more.

Learning more together builds community. 

Building community leads to a stronger, more sustainable impact.

Creating sustainable impact generates momentum.

Momentum becomes a movement,
and movements create the change we want to see in the world.

Are you planning an online or hybrid event? Are you building a community? Are you thinking about how professional learning is changing? 

We'd love to strategize and design with you. Don't hesitate to reach out via email (missy@modernlearners.com) or phone 608-482-1226. 

We have served state departments of public instruction, education organizations with hundreds of members, and corporate entities, and they all have one thing in common. 

They are all #focusedonlearning!

Name: APMM Association for Pennsylvania Municipal Management
Description:
APMM is a nonprofit, nonpartisan association of professional municipal
managers and administrators working in Pennsylvania local government.

Name: Togather
Description:
Access online and in-person events, peer support, knowledge sharing, accredited courses and more — all in one place. Join us as we address burnout, learn in community, and find joy in pursuit of a better, more just healthcare system.

Were on a mission to support, connect, and educate healthcare providers on the journey to health justice. Togather works to improve the entire healthcare ecosystem by centering the wellbeing and education of providers. We believe that change is best achieved by fostering a strong community that cares and evolves, together. Our community shares a collective vision of a healthcare system where we can all thrive, one based on anti-racism, liberation, and intersectionality (ALI). 

Togather offers healthcare providers and companies:

↳ A bespoke social networking app to connect healthcare providers to community, knowledge sharing, and innovation 
↳ Live healing circles to nurture wellbeing and process moral injury 
↳ CE accredited health justice education to unlearn, learn, and grow 
↳ A unique mentorship program for personalized support and professional development 

Join Togather, a conduit for building community and a catalyst for change. Because you can't build a better world if you're burnt out.

Name: fachverband biomedizinische technik  fbmt e.V.
Description:
Der fbmt (Fachverband Biomedizinische Technik e.V.) setzt sich seit seiner Gründung 1984 für die Belange von Medizintechnikern und -ingenieuren ein und trägt als Interessenverband zur Weiterentwicklung der Medizintechnik bei.

Die Mitarbeit in DIN-, DKE- und ISO-Normungsgremien zählt ebenso zu den Aktivitäten der fbmt-Experten wie themenspezifische Beratung und fachliche Unterstützung. Stellungnahmen, insbesondere in Bezug auf Gesetzesänderungen im Medizinprodukterecht sind dabei ein wichtiges Instrument, um die gemeinsamen Interessen der fbmt-Mitglieder zu vertreten.

Mit Fach- und Regionaltagungen fördert der Verband sowohl die Weiterbildung als auch die Vernetzung seiner Mitglieder und mit MTcert hat der fbmt einen verlässlichen Qualitätsstandard zur Zertifizierung von Medizintechnikern entwickelt.

Neben Ingenieuren und Technikern aus der Medizin- und Krankenhaustechnik vereint der fbmt auch andere Berufstätige, die im Gesundheits- und Sozialwesen beschäftigt sind. Die Mitglieder des Verbandes arbeiten unter anderem in Krankenhäusern, in der medizintechnischen Industrie, in Planungsbüros, Serviceunternehmen und Behörden in Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz sowie in weiteren europäischen Ländern.

Aus der Praxis für die Praxis: Werden auch Sie Teil des fbmt-Kompetenz-Netzwerks und nutzen Sie die umfassenden Möglichkeiten. 

Aktivitäten & Angebote des fbmt:

- Informationsaustausch und Fortbildung in unseren Regionalgruppen
- Beratung und Hilfestellung in fachlichen Fragen 
- Vermittlung von Referenten
- Veröffentlichung aktueller Informationen und Referate in den Fachzeitschriften „Krankenhaus Technik + Management“ (KTM) sowie „mt - Medizintechnik“ 
- Fachtagung zur angewandten Medizintechnik 
- Zertifizierungsstelle MTcert für Medizintechniker
- Aktive Teilhabe durch Vertreter in DIN-, DKE- und ISO-Normungsgremien

Name: Capitalismo Consciente Colombia
Description: Capitalismo Consciente Colombia promueve el innato potencial de los negocios para generar impacto positivo en el nuestro país.

Name: Women in Motion of High Point
Description:
Women in Motion of High Point is professional women's organization addressing the needs of professional women living in the greater High Point community, including Archdale, Trinity, Thomasville, and Jamestown.

Women in Motion’s mission is to promote leadership, professional success, personal wellness, and financial independence of women with the core values of open and respectful communication, diversity, collaboration, and a positive and measurable impact on women’s lives.

Women in Motion is a women's initiative under The United Way of Greater High Point.

Name: Phi Gamma Nu - Delta Psi
Description: Established in 2014, Phi Gamma Nu – Delta Psi is the fastest growing business fraternity at Indiana University. As a Chapter of a national organization founded on the pillars of Professionalism, Social, and Philanthropy; we are committed to fostering a diverse network of innovative members. Fueled by the passions of our individual members and united by a shared business mindset, we are shaping the industry leaders of tomorrow.

Name: Bewust Den Haag
Description:
Bewust Den Haag is een netwerk voor professionals (ondernemers) en publiek met passie voor Bewust Leven in en rondom Den Haag. Een lokaal (business) netwerk van mensen die geloven in de positieve kracht van bewustwording. Het netwerk verbindt, deelt kennis en organiseert concrete activiteiten. Deze doelen staan centraal:

1. Een Podium voor Professionals 
Professionals met elkaar verbinden, samenwerkingsvormen stimuleren en zichtbaarheid naar potentiële klanten vergroten. (denk bij 'professionals' aan coaches, artsen en therapeuten, maar ook productontwerpers en horeca-ondernemers) 

2. Een Portal voor Publiek 
Een toegangspoort naar het brede aanbod van producten en diensten ter ondersteuning van een bewuster leven.

3. Een Verbindend Vliegwiel
De bewuste energie wordt bekrachtigd door met elkaar te verbinden. Zo creëren we voor onszelf een warm en steunend netwerk van gelijkgestemden en zullen we steeds meer mensen als vanzelf inspireren met deze liefdevolle energie.

Name: Danmarks Basketball-Forbund
Description:
Danmarks Basketball Forbund (DBBF) blev stiftet i 1947 med det formål at fremme basketballsporten i Danmark.

DBBF beskæftiger sig med basketball på alle niveauer, heriblandt uddannelse, turneringer, foreningsudvikling og landshold.

DBBFs administration er placeret i Brøndby og Aarhus.

Name: ITPA - Information Technology Professionals Association
Description:
Information Technology Professionals Association (ITPA) is a not-for-profit organisation established to advance the understanding of ICT matters within the community, corporate and government sectors in Australia.

Our members are workers within the IT Industry in Australia and abroad who aim to advance the practice of Information Technology as a profession.

Our vision is for our members to deliver outcomes which enhance and enrich society through the understanding and application of technology in an increasingly online world.

Name: Bangladeshi HR
Description:
Bangladeshi HR is a premier platform dedicated to fostering a vibrant community of corporate leaders, executives, and professionals across various industries in Bangladesh. Bangladeshi HR serves as a hub for networking, knowledge sharing, and professional development, empowering members to elevate their careers and contribute to the growth of the corporate landscape in Bangladesh.

Believing in the power of collaboration and the exchange of ideas, Bangladeshi HR offers members access to exclusive events, workshops, and seminars led by industry experts. These opportunities provide valuable insights and help members stay ahead in an ever-evolving business environment. Whether an established executive or an emerging leader, Bangladesh HR offers a supportive network to help achieve professional goals.

Join us in our mission to shape the future of corporate excellence in Bangladesh. Together, we can build a stronger, more connected corporate community.

Name: EuroCham Bangladesh
Description:
European Union Chamber of Commerce in Bangladesh:

EuroCham Bangladesh connects European businesses with Bangladesh’s vibrant market, fostering growth, innovation, and collaboration. With Europe accounting for 20.7% of Bangladesh’s trade and Bangladesh ranking as the EU’s 36th largest trading partner, we bridge opportunities and drive mutual progress. 

As Bangladesh grows into a top global consumer market by 2030, EuroCham empowers businesses to thrive through advocacy, innovation, and sustainable solutions.

Name: Cardiovascular Imaging Working Group
Description:
Cardiovascular Imaging Working Group of the Hellenic Society of Cardiology is a non-profit educational and professional group dedicated  to  the advancement of education, collaboration, research and excellence in clinical practice  within all areas of advanced   cardiovascular imaging (Cardiac CT, CMR, Nuclear Imaging)

Committee 2024-2026:
President: John Palios
President Elect: Theodora Zaglavara
Nucleus Members: Ioannis Ntalas, George Benetos, Eva Nyktari.

Name: Texas A&M Economics Society (TAMES)
Description:
The Texas A&M Economics Society (TAMES) is a professional student organization for economics majors. The goal of the organization is to help prepare students for the real world by learning more about some of the career paths in economics and related fields. Throughout the semester, we have speakers visit us from a wide spectrum of industries to give presentations on their respective jobs and the companies they work for. We also try to help build relationships and networking between members by holding several social events, fundraisers, and participating in community service activities like The Big Event.

This group is for information regarding the Texas A&M Economics Society. Members of the society can join this group to receive information about upcoming events the society is hosting.

Name: Social Entrepreneur Summit
Description: Welcome to the Social Entrepreneur Summit & Ecosystem Fundraiser. We're a unique event platform dedicated to igniting change and inspiring action. Here, industry veterans, academic leaders, and passionate social entrepreneurs unite, sharing insights, forging connections, and working collectively towards a better world. Join us on this transformative journey, and let's make a difference together, one step at a time.

Name: LumoraX
Description:
LumoraX is a professional hub dedicated to unlocking leadership potential, driving personal growth, and fostering organizational resilience. In today’s dynamic world, success is not determined by resources alone, but by the ability to think differently, adapt quickly, and lead with clarity.

At LumoraX, we believe every idea has the power to inspire change. Our mission is to provide insights, strategies, and practices that empower individuals and organizations to grow with confidence. We highlight leadership excellence, professional development, innovation mindsets, and cultural transformation, equipping professionals with the tools they need to thrive in fast-changing environments.

Our platform shares expert perspectives, real-world examples, and practical frameworks on how to build strong leadership pipelines, improve decision-making, and create workplaces that value both performance and well-being. We believe coaching and training are not expenses, but investments that multiply returns over time.

LumoraX is more than a page, it is a community for visionaries, leaders, and innovators who understand that growth is a journey, not a destination. Together, we illuminate the path toward stronger leadership, smarter decisions, and lasting success.

Name: HDI Local Chapters
Description:
This organization is a not for profit company that partners with HDI for the success of HDI, HDI Local Chapters, and the Technical Support and Service Management communities. Today, we have chapters in over 30 cities across the U.S. and Canada, and are the premiere technical service and support association in the world. HDC is  a 501(c)(6) corporation.

With regular opportunities for technical support professionals to connect, share and discuss common challenges, and learn from industry innovators, HDC’s network of local chapters is a convenient and dynamic way to collaborate with like-minded professionals.

The HelpDesk Chapters Inc. organization includes and oversees the following individuals:
- Local Chapters (30+ Chapters in the United States and Canada)
- Local Chapter Officers (200+ volunteers)
- Local Chapter Members (1000+ members)
- HDC Board

Name: All Kerala Esports Federation (AKEF)
Description: All Kerala Esports Federation (AKEF), established in 2017, is a professional esports organization dedicated to developing esports in Kerala, having nurtured over 1 lakh talents.

Name: A7 Security Hunters
Description:
A7 Security Hunters Certifications provide the highest and most rigorous assurance of cyber security knowledge and skill available to industry, government, and military clients across the world.

Focus - Cybersecurity, Information Security, Software Security, Infrastructure Security
Services - Professional Certifications
Area served - Worldwide
Type - Privately held company & LLC

Name: UGT FORMACION TRABAJAMOS EN DIGITAL
Description: Desde UGT Trabajamos en Digital formamos en competencias digitales a personas trabajadoras en activo. Proyecto financiado por Ministerio de Educación y Formación Profesional.

Name: SIENCE
Description:
SIENCE – Récupérez votre budget de financement à impact et investissez dans des projets durables sans puiser dans votre trésorerie.

Chez SIENCE, nous accompagnons les collectivités, les entreprises et les associations dans la génération automatique de solutions de financement à impact, par le biais de notre outil permettant de collecter le Droit des Utilisateurs Professionnels (DUP).

FINANCEZ vos actions à impact :

	•	culturelles
	•	éducatives
	•	sanitaires et sociales 
	•	environnementales
	•	sportives

Notre outil vous permettra non seulement de financer des causes porteuses au regard des Objectifs de développement durable, mais également de valoriser votre image en devenant acteur de ces transformations positives.

Adhérer à SIENCE, c’est investir sans puiser dans votre trésorerie. 

Ne perdez pas de temps et réalisez gratuitement une estimation via notre site.

« C’est pas de la magie, c’est de la SIENCE… »

Name: Afghanistan Engineers Council
Description: Afghanistan Engineers Council as a national professional nonprofit engineering organization promote and advancing education, professional development, scientific culture, women in engineering, uniting Afghan engineers, national sustainability and developing the engineering landscape and activities by empowering national talents with professional and autonomous skills to achieve our goals in entire engineering domains.

Name: Michigan Municipal Executives
Description: MME works to provide members’ professional development, support their personal growth, and promote the municipal executive profession in Michigan. In service to its members and their communities, MME seeks to enhance management excellence, continuous improvement, and high ethical standards.

Name: UNICEM Bourgogne-Franche-Comté
Description:
L’UNICEM Bourgogne-Franche-Comté est la fédération qui regroupe les industries extractives de minéraux et les fabricants de matériaux de construction par transformation. 

Les sites dans la région :

 Près de 250 sites (carrières de granulats et sites de minéraux industriels, et plateforme de recyclage) ;
 103 unités de production de béton prêt à l’emploi ;  
 93 autres sites (usines de fabrication, argiles, etc.).

Focus Roches Ornementales : 90 carrières de roches ornementales sont actuellement exploitées dans la région. Près de 20% de la production des pierres calcaires et marbres se concentre dans notre région.


𝐃𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐨𝐢𝐬 𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐮𝐱 𝐞𝐭 𝐧𝐨𝐧 𝐝𝐞́𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞𝐬  

3 700 collaborateurs sont directement impliqués dans
l'ensemble de ces activités, installées au cœur des territoires, qui répondent aux besoins du BTP, qui emploient 49 500 salariés.

𝐃𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐚𝐠é́𝐞𝐬 𝐩𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐥'𝐞𝐧𝐯𝐢𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐞𝐭 𝐥𝐚 𝐑𝐒𝐄. 

109 sites adhérents sont engagés dans une démarche environnementale et/ou RSE animée par l’association UNICEM entreprises engagées. 

Nos actions prioritaires : 

 Soutenir nos adhérents au quotidien dans leurs activités, pour promouvoir une gestion raisonnée des ressources et des gisements. 
 Transmettre les résultats d’études de flux et de consommation des matériaux (CERC), les performances du recyclage, les projets en cours avec l’ADEME, etc.
 Développer l’attractivité de la filière auprès des jeunes ou futurs salariés, des consommateurs de nos matériaux (utilisateurs/collectivités) et des parties prenantes et administrations par la diffusion d’études validées scientifiquement (EMCAIR, Trame verte et bleue...).
 Faire connaître les actions des entreprises de la filière en matière de préservation de l’environnement et diffuser les bonnes pratiques en matière de RSE.

Name: FFCE - Fédération Francaise des Captives d'Entreprise
Description:
La Fédération Française des Captives d’Entreprise (FFCE) est une  association (Loi 1901) de personnes morales avec une représentation paritaire à l’Assemblée Générale. 
La FFCE a vocation d’être l’association professionnelle représentative des filiales captives d’assurance et de réassurance d’entreprises domiciliées en France.
Elle veillera en priorité au développement des captives domiciliées en France, en partenariat avec les acteurs du marché.
Plus largement, la FFCE aura pour objectif de renforcer l’implication de l’entreprise dans l’assurance de ses propres risques - en les mutualisant entre eux et dans le temps dans une approche « d’auto-assurance » - afin d’optimiser la gestion des risques face à la montée des périls, en complément du marché.
La FFCE contribuera au développement de l’écosystème français en fédérant également les partenaires des entreprises - courtiers, assureurs, réassureurs, actuaires, avocats, conseils, experts …- dans une logique de filière.
A ce titre, elle a vocation à devenir la voix directe des entreprises dans le débat public sur les sujets des risques et assurances des entreprises, aux côtés de l’AMRAE, en s’inscrivant dans la même vision stratégique.

Name: GeorgiaCISO
Description:
GeorgiaCISO is the preeminent peer leadership network of Georgia chief information security officers. Our membership is comprised exclusively of CISOs (or equivalent executive roles) from public and private companies, government, education, healthcare and nonprofit organizations.

Our mission is to build a strong, professional community among Georgia's information technology leaders, by providing a forum to share ideas, best practices and experiences relevant to CISOs.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Georgia CISO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
Established in 1998, the ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. This annual event honors chief information security officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

LUF tilsluttet Abelia og NHO, og er åpen for alle organisasjoner som primært jobber med utvikling av lederskap, organisasjonsutvikling eller bidrar til utvikling av dette i norsk næringsliv. Medlemskap i LUF krever også medlemskap i ABELIA og NHO. Årskontingent for medlemskap i Abelia og NHO tilkommer.

Name: Towards Customer (Kliento link)
Description:
Customer experience (CX), the overall memory we leave our customers with after them going through the whole product journey, has become the most durable competitive advantage nowadays. Companies that provide exceptional CX are being rewarded by their customers with a higher loyalty, a brand success and an accelerated growth. Because happy customers drive growth (through coming back for more and creating new customers through positive word of mouth). 

Over past years, CX has evolved to a solid discipline which covers alignment of a customer research function, a human-centered product design, organizational processes, measurement practices and of course a culture of customer-centricity. We, CX professionals working in various customer experience related roles have a responsibility to create easy, efficient and emotionally connected experiences for our customers to make their lives a bit better. 

After all, it’s quite a lonely profession, especially in the markets like Lithuania where CX profession is just emerging. Therefore, the CX enthusiasts in Lithuania unite in the association “Kliento link” (Towards Customer) under the purpose to create a space to connect, share and learn from likeminded people. People who have a desire to help their organizations to earn the right to growth through a consistent focus on customer experiences. 

In the content we are eager to share with you, we‘ll focus on local (Lithuanian) realities, however, to keep the pace with global trends, we will not limit ourselves to the local language, local speakers and local topics only. This is also the reason why we speak to you in English while you are reading this post.:) 

What you can expect from this movement:
	Vibrant conversations with subject matter experts who will share their stories and tactical examples of  their path to CX excellence. 
	Other relevant CX-centered content.
	Connect and experience a sense of togetherness with other professionals doing similar work.

Name: Związek Polskich Przetwórców Mleka
Description:
ZWIĄZEK POLSKICH PRZETWÓRCÓW MLEKA jest związkiem pracodawców i został powołany 28 maja 1999 roku w odpowiedzi na potrzebę zacieśnienia kontaktów i współpracy pomiędzy podmiotami przemysłu mleczarskiego oraz utworzenia forum wymiany doświadczeń branży mleczarskiej.

Związek zrzesza przetwórców mleka, podmioty skupujące mleko oraz firmy działające w otoczeniu przemysłu mleczarskiego.

ZPPM działa na rzecz rozwoju krajowego rynku mleka i przetworów mlecznych oraz promocji spożycia mleka i jego przetworów. Związek we współpracy z innymi organizacjami branżowymi tworzy silną reprezentację interesów mleczarstwa polskiego w kraju i za granicą. Działa również w kierunku kształtowania pozytywnego wizerunku polskiego mleczarstwa i podnoszenia prestiżu branży na rynku UE.

Związek upowszechnienia wiedzę w zakresie wymagań jakościowych i prawnych odnoszących się do sektora mleczarskiego, pozyskuje oraz rozpowszechnia informacje dotyczące rynku mleka i przetworów mlecznych w Polsce, UE i na świecie. Swoje działania Związek realizuje również poprzez udział w opracowaniu i opiniowaniu uregulowań dotyczących funkcjonowania branży, a także poprzez działalność wydawniczą i szkoleniową. 

Związek przywiązuje duże znaczenie do działań ukierunkowanych na zwiększenie poziomu spożycia mleka i jego przetworów w kraju.

Związek we współpracy z pozostałymi krajowymi organizacjami mleczarskimi przygotował długofalową strategię promocji spożycia mleka i przetworów mlecznych. Strategii przyświeca idea kreowania mody na spożywanie mleka i przetworów mlecznych poprzez kształtowanie odpowiednich nawyków żywieniowych i zachowań prozdrowotnych oraz świadomości konsumentów.

Wydaliśmy również serię broszur propagujących wśród młodzieży szkolnej walory żywieniowe, zdrowotne no i oczywiście smakowe przetworów mlecznych.  Zrealizowaliśmy też kilka kampanii promujących spożycie mleka i przetworów mlecznych.

Name: Autensa
Description:
Vill du skapa en jämlik organisation, där kultur, ledarskap, HR processer och kommunikation präglas av en genomtänkt syn på jämlikhet som bas för all verksamhet? Vi hjälper dig navigera i vad det betyder för dig och din organisation! 

Vi är ett samarbete mellan specialister inom olika områden som alla vill stötta utvecklingen av jämlika organisationer. Vi erbjuder stöd i att utveckla jämlika organisationer genom exempelvis:

- en temperaturmätare ert jämlika ledarskap - för er som redan är bra på att leda utifrån jämlikhet och vill fortsätta dialogen internt om vad det innebär
- utveckling av kommunikation - content creation inom jämlikhet
- ledarutveckling - stöd i utveckling av förmågan att vara jämlika ledare
- genomlysning och utveckling av HR processer för att jämlikhetssäkra
- genomlysning av arbetsmiljöarbetet för att säkerställa att det lever upp till lagkrav
- verktyg och mallar för modernt att jobba med jämlikhet inom HR
- föreläsningar och workshops om att utveckla jämlika organisationer
- stöd i mätning och uppföljning av hur ni jobbar med jämlikhet

Om begreppet jämlikhet
Vilka ord ska man välja? Jämställdhet, mångfald, icke-diskriminering, lika rättigheter, likabehandling eller jämlikhet? De betyder lite olika saker och kan vara intressanta var för sig eller i kombination beroende på hur ni vill arbeta. Vi har valt jämlikhet i det här samarbetet eftersom vi tycker det inkluderar alla begreppen och mer därtill eftersom vi är intresserade av hur vi kan behandla alla människor med respekt och värdighet i all enkelhet.  Vi är öppna för att du väljer de begrepp som passar bäst hos er och vi erbjuder fullt stöd oavsett vad du väljer.

Name: BNI Haven - Antwerpen
Description:
Wil je meer klanten over de vloer? Dan is BNI Haven precies wat je nodig hebt.

Als ondernemer weet je hoe moeilijk het is om je te onderscheiden in de markt. Je zoekt klanten die je vertrouwen en waarderen. Maar waar vind je die? Oude marketingtechnieken volstaan niet meer. En online reclame en sociale media leveren ook niet altijd op. BNI Haven biedt je een beter alternatief:

1/ Een ijzersterk netwerk: We zijn een hecht team van ondernemers die elkaar helpen en respecteren. We zijn meer dan zakenpartners, we zijn vrienden. Samen bouwen we aan een netwerk dat staat als een huis.

2/ Een geweldig verkoopsteam: We weten hoe we klanten moeten werven en elkaar aanbevelen. Onze medeleden zijn onze ambassadeurs en dat merk je aan onze cijfers.

Dit zijn de voordelen van lid worden van BNI Haven:

✓ Elke week ontmoet je meer dan 30 gemotiveerde ondernemers die hun netwerk met jou willen delen.
✓ Je profiteert van de beste vorm van reclame: mond-tot-mondreclame. Dat levert je echte resultaten op.
✓ Je leert van andere ondernemers en deelt je eigen kennis. Zo worden we samen sterker.
✓ Je krijgt als lid niet alleen goede aanbevelingen, maar ook meer omzet. De gemiddelde potentiële omzet per lid is €44.000.

Name: Institute of Non-Formal Education Practitioners - (INFEP)
Description:
The Institute of Non-formal Education Practitioners (INFEP) is a Nigerian organization focused on promoting and regulating non-formal education. It aims to be a center for advancing training, retraining, accreditation, certification, and the protection of non-formal education practitioners. INFEP is registered with the Nigerian government and the Federal Ministry of Education. 

Key aspects of INFEP:
Focus on Non-formal Education:
INFEP works to improve the quality and standards of non-formal education, which includes education that occurs outside the traditional formal school system. 

Training and Certification:
INFEP provides training, retraining, and certification programs for practitioners in non-formal education, particularly for those involved in training and teaching. 

Regulation and Accreditation:
The institute plays a role in regulating and accrediting non-formal education providers, ensuring quality and standards. 

Professional Body:
INFEP serves as a professional body for non-formal education practitioners, offering resources, support, and networking opportunities. 

Advancement of the Field:
INFEP strives to advance the field of non-formal education, promoting its importance and value in Nigeria and beyond. 
In essence, INFEP is a key player in the Nigerian non-formal education landscape, working to enhance the quality of education and training while supporting practitioners in the field.

Founded in 1962, ACHCA is a non-profit professional membership association that provides superior educational programming, professional certification, and career development opportunities for its members.
