Name: Centre of Expertise In the LEAD
Description:
In the LEAD (Leadership, Evidence, Advice & Data) is the centre of expertise at the University of Groningen in the field of leadership. The centre of expertise provides organisations with state-of-the-art research on the effectiveness of leadership. We also deliver tailored advice and present lectures and talks to professionals and organisations.

Leadership is crucial for the functioning of organisations and society. It is our mission to support organisations and strategic leaders by means of scientific research and education in making effective choices, based on the context in which they operate. We offer a unique, innovative approach by utilising insights from both economists and leadership and management experts and thereby providing solid, evidence-based and data-driven organizational advice and executive research.

Who are we?
Janka Stoker and Harry Garretsen are the directors and the driving force behind In the Lead. Janka Stoker has been Professor of Leadership and Organisational Change at the University of Groningen since 2003. In her work she has always combined academic research with practice. Harry Garretsen has been Professor of International Economics & Business at the University of Groningen since 2008. Alongside a long academic career, he has always been actively concerned with economic policy and policy advice.

Janka Stoker and Harry Garretsen regularly share their knowledge and insights in public. They wrote two popular-scientific books: 'Goede leiders in onzekere tijden' (2022) and 'Goede leiders zweven niet' (2018). They also have a monthly column in the Dutch financial newspaper (FD) and they started their own podcast, ‘Leiderschap in onzekere tijden’ at the end of 2022. Besides this, they offer two executive programs together with the University of Groningen Business School: a program focused on management quality in the manufacturing industry and a program focused on leadership in HR. They are also involved in the university's executive MBAs.

Name: VEM | Voor Effectieve Medezeggenschap
Description:
VEM staat Voor Effectieve | Eigentijdse | Evenwichtige Medezeggenschap en dat wensen we natuurlijk alle organisaties toe. Waarom? Omdat niets zo blijvend is als verandering. In het belang van de continuïteit en groei is het essentieel dat organisaties flexibel en voortvarend kunnen inspelen op veranderingen. 

En het mooie en verrassende is dat juist Directie en HR deze transitie van de medezeggenschap kunnen aanjagen. Natuurlijk zonder de inhoudelijke onafhankelijke rol van de OR te doorkruisen. 

Aan de hand van de 3 VEM indicatoren (Verbeteren, Verbinden en Vormgeven) ontwerp en begeleid ik praktische, creatieve en energieke maatwerktrajecten om deze transitie te realiseren. 

Nieuwsgierig naar de mogelijkheden voor jouw organisatie? Plan gerust vrijblijvend een "MZ: het kan ook anders" moment in via https://calendly.com/ikbenvem/mz-het-kan-ook-anders.

Sono condivisi temi di pubblico interesse e utilità. Non è, pertanto un canale da utilizzare per richiedere consulenze su casi specifici o esporre reclami.
I contenuti della pagina sono gestiti dall'Ufficio Comunicazione del Consiglio, che si impegna, previa visione dei messaggi proposti dagli utenti, a garantire spazi di dialogo, chiedendo alla propria audience il rispetto di alcune regole di netiquette: esporre la propria opinione con correttezza, misura ed educazione e sempre basandosi su dati di fatto; tutelare la privacy e i dati personali delle persone; rispettare il requisito essenziale della pagina, cioè l’interesse pubblico; non divulgare forme di pubblicità, spam o promozione di interessi privati o di attività illegali; non  diffondere contenuti che violino il diritto d’autore o che utilizzino marchi registrati, se non autorizzati. Ciascun utente si assume la responsabilità di quanto viene da egli proprosto per la pubblicazione. Il Consiglio si riserva di non pubblicare, e tutela se stesso o terzi anche denunciando violazioni.

Name: CEO Netweavers
Description:
CEO Netweavers brings together senior and rising leaders to build trust, share wisdom, and challenge each other forward—through curated events, candid conversations, and pay-it-forward relationships.

What Makes CEO Netweavers Different
You’ve been in rooms where everyone postures. This isn’t that. CEO Netweavers is built for senior and rising leaders who value real conversations, cross-functional insight, and trusted relationships that compound over time.

For 20 years, we’ve created space for leaders to grow their businesses, invest in others, and stay grounded in what matters—through curated gatherings, mentorship opportunities, and meaningful service that let you quickly know the real person. Click here to read more about our mission.

Looking Ahead
Today, CEO Netweavers is reestablishing its national headquarters in Atlanta, anchored by deep relationships across Georgia’s business community. While Georgia remains our home base, our vision extends beyond state lines. As members relocate or expand into new markets, we aim to create local hubs in other cities—connected by the same culture of trust, candor, and shared success that defines our community today.

We’re also building a stronger virtual presence so that whether you’re in Atlanta, Austin, or anywhere in between, you can tap into the relationships, expertise, and opportunities CEO Netweavers provides.

Our evolving programming reflects this vision:

=> Quarterly marquee events uniting established executives, high-potential leaders, and encore members for high-value, cross-functional conversations.
=> Targeted peer dinners (returning in 2026) for intimate, strategic relationship-building among senior leaders.
=> Impact programs like Inflection Point and high-touch mentorship, bridging experience with opportunity wherever our members are located.

Incorporated as a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit, the CEON Foundation is the organizational home of CEO Netweavers.

Name: Criminal Lawyers Association of the Northern Territory (CLANT)
Gifted Professionals & Communicators
Description:
In the middle of the first year of the pandemic—June 2020, Sia Papageorgiou in Melbourne, Australia, and Georgia Patrick in Texas, USA met through their mutual connections with the International Association of Business Communicators (IABC). Our discussions quickly turned to weekly calls about shared experiences and concerns for professionalism, business communication, and exceptional leaders. 
 
What we discovered over the course of many hour-long weekly chats, provided us with a cascade of realizations that fit our uniqueness and individual purpose. We are complex and curious, and we discovered that what is “wrong” with us, is exactly what is “right” with us. We are gifted adults who are among the 95% of us who never knew it until someone proved it to us. 
 
It took a while to accept the term “gifted” because that felt strange. Instead, our research led us to experts who already figured out much about gifted adults and even gave it a better name—rainforest mind. Just to clarify, “gifted” in this context doesn’t mean profoundly brilliant – we mean everyday people of unusual vision, who share a dominant trait – their ability to give progress a push forward.

Here’s a peek into the mind and world of the gifted professional and communicator, so you know what to look for: Excessively curious, sensitive, highly intelligent, and a deep desire for precision, ethics, and excellence. We feel the pressures, pleasures, and peculiarities of living inside the intense and complicated mind of a gifted professional with well-developed communication skills. 
 
Each week, we feature stories about professionals who are initiating meaningful conversations with other gifted minds and storytellers–and who they serve.

Name: Professional Historians Australia
Description:
Professional Historians Australia (PHA) represents over 500 professionally accredited historians across all Australian states and territories. 

PHA and its state and territory associations are committed to advocating historical perspectives in public debates concerning interpretations of history and the keeping of documentary, environmental and other historical records.

We are the peak body that represents six state and territory bodies of the professional historians association: PHA (Vic & Tas), PHA (NSW & ACT), PHA (QLD), PHA (NT), PHA (WA) and PHA (SA). We advocate on behalf of historians, maintain and encourage adherence to professional standards and ethics among historians, provide professional development and networking opportunities, and liaise with businesses, organisations, communities and all levels of government who seek the work of professional historians. 

Our accredited historians are academically qualified to bring historical knowledge, objectivity, and strong research and writing skills to history projects.

Under the auspices of Professional Historians Australia, state and territory associations admit members in accordance with nationally recognised accreditation criteria and standards. 

Please visit our website for further information on why employing a professional historian is vital to the success of your project.

Accelerating the Future of Sustainable Materials & Built Environments

Name: Ohio Career Development Association
Description:
Mission:

The purpose of the Ohio Career Development Association is to promote a greater understanding of the meaning of work and vocation, to foster career development over the life span, and to improve the standards of professional service in the field of career guidance and counseling in Ohio.

History:

The Ohio Career Development Association (OCDA) was founded in 1975 and is a division of the Ohio Counseling Association (OCA) and a strong state division of the National Career Development Association (NCDA), which was founded in 1913. NCDA is a division of the American Counseling Association (ACA).

Description:

Com o objetivo de conectar mentes engajadas, fomentar a produção acadêmica e compartilhar experiências práticas, nossa missão é transformar o cenário do Direito Empresarial em todo o Brasil.

Por meio de encontros mensais, verticais especializadas e eventos abertos, buscamos criar uma rede sólida de networking e impacto. Nosso compromisso vai além do estudo teórico: queremos moldar o futuro da área com ideias jovens, pesquisas de qualidade e parcerias estratégicas.

Somos uma organização sem fins lucrativos que acredita na força da colaboração.

Name: Georgia Tech Society Of Black Engineers
Description:
We are the Georgia Tech Chapter of the National Society of Black Engineers. Our organization exists to live out the NSBE Mission: “to increase the number of culturally responsible Black Engineers who excel academically, succeed professionally and positively impact the community.” We put on a number of events, programs, and initiatives in order to serve Georgia Tech and the Greater Atlanta Community.

This year, our President, Mahogany Labor, has developed a vision to ensure that everyone can U.N.I.T.E! Our organization will focus on Upholding our Legacy, Nurturing our Interpersonal Relationships, Investing in our Potential, Trusting our Community, and Embracing Change.  Représenter les producteurs auprès des instances régionales (notamment via le Comité Stratégique Fruits – CSF) pour défendre leurs intérêts et contribuer à l’élaboration des plans de filière.
 Accompagner les adhérents avec un appui technique, administratif (aides, subventions) et une veille régulière sur les actualités agricoles.

Notre ambition : soutenir une arboriculture innovante, durable et solidaire, au service des producteurs et des territoires.

Description:
The culture, tradition and history of the Indian Military are our rich heritage. Fauji Days, an oral history and military publishing project, is a unique initiative to cherish and celebrate it, beginning in our 75th year of Independence.

Fauji Days believes that our military’s oral history will prove inspiring, thought-provoking, funny at times, and highly satisfying for the curious, especially young adults in their formative years. We are recording engaging interactions between officers, men and women from our Services with young adults from schools and universities. The key is to capture the diversity of lived experiences on the one hand, and perceptions and expectations on the other.

An initiative by 99beagles.

Name: Psykologer för Hållbar Utveckling
Description:
Psykologer för hållbar utveckling är en nationell förening inom Sveriges Psykologförbund. Vi jobbar för den praktiska tillämpningen av hållbarhetspsykologi och verkar för utformning och utveckling av psykologens roll i arbetet med en hållbar utveckling. 

I och med sin yrkesmässiga kompetens har psykologer en självklar plats i den hållbara utvecklingen och kan bidra med sin unika kunskap. Psykologer har, till exempel, gedigen kunskap om effektiva förändringsprocesser, ledarskap, kommunikation, relevanta kognitiva och känslomässiga processer, mental hälsa, systematisk uppföljning av psykologiska fenomen, med mera.

Med hållbar utveckling avses de 17 hållbarhetsmål som utvecklats av FN och som antagits av världens ledare. Dessa måls syfte är en socialt, ekonomiskt och ekologiskt hållbar utveckling och ska vara uppnådda till år 2030.

PHU:s arbete utgår främst från den ekologiska hållbarhetsdimensionen, som utgör grunden för social och ekonomisk hållbarhet. Vårt arbete sker på vetenskaplig grund och baseras på forskning såsom den presenteras av bland annat andra psykologorganisationer i världen, se till exempel APA:s Task Force on the Interface Between Psychology and Global Climate Change.

El Consorcio de Industrias y Servicios del Sur nuclea empresas del sector industrial y de servicios industriales del Chubut, altamente especializadas en diferentes cadenas de valor, dotadas de las personas más calificadas y con experiencia en el trabajo con procesos estandarizados de desempeño.

La suma de capacidades individuales y el nivel de expertise de todos sus miembros, permite ofrecer al mercado más exigente una amplia cartera de servicios y soluciones integrales para las industrias del petróleo, gas y minería, así como otros sectores de la Patagonia con una fuerte impronta metal mecánica.

Misión

Ser un espacio sinérgico e innovador para acompañar los proyectos de desarrollo industriales, incrementar la productividad y rentabilidad de sus empresas, a través del diseño e implementación de estrategias conjuntas que generen valor y articulen los eslabones de bienes y servicios de la cadena que compone la industria del petróleo, gas y minería, entre otros sectores industriales.



Visión

Consolidarse como un Consorcio organizado, afianzado y reconocido como el mejor equipo de proveedores a la industria, por la confiabilidad en la calidad de sus productos y servicios, sus recursos humanos técnicos, su capacidad de innovación y su sinergia para alcanzar los objetivos establecidos de posicionamiento regional e internacional.

Name: LeaderImpact Albania
Description:
Motoja jonë: Ndiko një Udhëheqës, Ndrysho një Komunitet, Transformo një Komb.

LeaderImpact synon të ndikojë dhe fuqizojë udhëheqësit dhe influencuesit në sfera të ndryshme të shoqërisë shqiptare si në qeverisje, edukim, biznes, media dhe art, etj.
Ne synojmë fuqizimin e udhëheqësve në disa aspekte:

A. Fuqizimin në aspektin profesional
Ne ofrojmë trajnime të ndryshme mbi zhvillimin e aftësive të udhëheqjes, si dhe grupe të vogla diskutimi ku udhëheqësit mësojnë jo vetëm duke diskutuar librat me të mirë në fushën e udhëheqësisë por edhe duke shkëmbyer përvoja me njëri-tjetrin.

B. Fuqizimin në aspektin personal dhe në karakter.
Ne organizojmë trajnime e seminare mbi integritetin, etikën, duke sjellë edhe eksperiencën e udhëheqësve shqiptarë apo të huaj të cilët flasin nga përvoja personale.
Gjithashtu ofrojmë trajnime për Inteligjencën Emocionale, një aspekt që ndikon drejtpërdrejt në rritjen e efektivitetit dhe bashkëpunimit në punë mes anëtarëve të ekipit apo organizatës suaj. 

Marrëdhënia martesore e një udhëheqësi ka shumë rëndësi dhe për këtë ne ofrojmë ndihmën tonë përmes konferencave e seminareve për martesën, burimeve e materialeve të ndryshme, si dhe diskutimit në grupe të vogla me çifte. 

C. Fuqizimin në aspektin Shpirtëror. Çdo udhëheqës ka nevojë të kuptojë rolin që luan besimi tek Zoti për të njohur më mirë veten dhe të tjerët, si dhe për të siguruar paqen e brendshme në mes të sfidave dhe presionit të vazhdueshëm që hasim përditë.

Fuqizimi në aspektin profesional, personal, dhe shpirtëror në jetën e një udhëheqësi do të sjellë ndikim pozitiv tek udhëheqës të tjerë, duke sjellë një reaksion zinxhir. 

Përvec ndikimit në jetën e udhëheqësve të tjerë, ky pasurim do të sjellë një ndikim pozitiv në komunitetin ku udhëheqësi ka influencë duke sjellë një frymë pozitive drejtësie, integriteti dhe vlerash.
Ndryshimi i një komuniteti pas tjetrit ne besojmë se do të sjellë transformim të gjithë kombit.

Description:

Chair - Ir Harry Lee
Deputy Chair - Ir Ken Kwok
Honorary Secretary - Ir Michael Ko 
Honorary Treasurer - Mr Simon Leung
Immediate Past Chair - Ir Dr Michael Wan

The Officers are supported by Committee members and members co-opted onto the committee.

Ben Papé	(Past Chair), Thomas Lai (Past Chair), Francis Budge (Past Chair), David Youdan (Past Chair), Yan Zhou (Past Chair), Jo Chau (Past Chair), Jenny Kwok (Committee Member).

The UK Chapter was formed in Sep 2002 with the following officers:

Chairman – Ben Papé;  Deputy Chairman – David Youdan;  Secretary – Nick Walsh;  Treasurer – Sauming Pang.

The UK Chapter was officially inaugurated during the visit of President Ir Dr CK Lau in Jun 2003. Since then the following have served as UK Chapter Chairman – David Youdan, William Kemp, Thomas Lai, Francis Budge, Yan Zhou, Joanne Chau, Michael Wan.

Name: Numeum Normandie
Description:
Numeum est le 1er syndicat professionnel des entreprises du numérique en France. 
il regroupe plus de 2300 entreprises membres : 
- les entreprises de services du numérique (ESN), anciennement désignées “SSII”.
- les sociétés de conseil en technologies
- les éditeurs de logiciels
- les acteurs du web
Ensemble, ces entreprises représentent 85 % du chiffre d’affaires du secteur en France (soit +60 Mds d'€ de chiffre d'affaires) et 661 000 salariés.

Tous les métiers du numérique sont représentés, des infrastructures aux jeux vidéo, de l’embarqué aux objets connectés en passant par la mobilité ou la sécurité.

Nos missions :
Mener toutes les actions qui soutiennent la transformation numérique de l’industrie et des services :
- Promotion des métiers du numérique, au travers par exemple de différents programmes (Numerique Emploi Normandie, Femmes du numérique..), d’études (études RH, marché de l’emploi, dont d’autres études ciblées, telle que l’étude sur les savoirs numériques à l’école)
- Défense de la profession
- Mise en valeur du numérique et de ses usages auprès des pouvoirs publics, des acteurs économiques et du grand public

Et en Normandie  ?
Faire rayonner les métiers du numérique et ses entreprises au sein de notre belle région ! Dans tous les cas, guider nos actions en fonction des attentes des entreprises du secteur !

Name: BayAreaCISO
Description:
BayAreaCISO is the preeminent peer leadership network of Bay Area chief information security officers. Our membership is comprised exclusively of CISOs (or equivalent executive roles) from public and private companies, government, education, healthcare and nonprofit organizations.

Our mission is to build a strong, professional community among Bay Area's information technology leaders, by providing a forum to share ideas, best practices and experiences relevant to CISOs.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Bay Area CISO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
Established in 1998, the ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. This annual event honors chief information security officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: BVSK E.V.
Description: Der Bundesverband der freiberuflichen und unabhängigen Sachverständigen für das Kraftfahrzeugwesen e.V. -BVSK- steht seit seiner Gründung 1959 für Qualität, Kompetenz und Unabhängigkeit seiner Mitglieder. Als größter Zusammenschluss freiberuflich tätiger Kfz-Sachverständiger in Deutschland versteht sich der Verband heute als moderner Dienstleister nicht nur für freiberufliche Kfz-Sachverständige. Justiz, Versicherungswirtschaft, Anwaltschaft, Verbraucherschutzverbände und das Kfz-Gewerbe selbst finden bei unseren Mitgliedern unabhängigen Sachverstand. Der jährlich stattfindende Sachverständigentag ist eine herausragende Fachveranstaltung im Kfz-Sachverständigenwesen.

The University of Toronto Chapter is a student-run chapter of the national organization. The club organizes student events during the year such as professional mixers, plant tours, sector information night, PEY mentorship program, and other events relating to professional development. The club sends delegates to the annual CSChE Conference and participates in competitions, workshops, and other student programs.

We've helped hundreds of chemical engineering students better achieve their career goals by connecting them with Professors, Alumni and Industry Leaders while simultaneously giving them the networking tools they need to excel in a professional environment.

Name: SWE-TAMU
Description:
The Society of Women Engineers (SWE), founded in 1950, is a national nonprofit educational and service organization.  SWE is dedicated to help women achieve success in engineering academically, personally, and professionally.  With an active membership of over 500 students, the Texas A&M section of SWE strives to serve the student body, the community, and the College of Engineering.  Through company sponsorship, SWE is able to provide many beneficial services to our members and community.  We accomplish this through scholarships, our annual High School Conference, mentor programs like LEAP, K-12 programs like Outreach, professional development luncheons, community events, and bi-weekly meetings. 

Joining SWE is a great way to get involved at Texas A&M.  If you are a student at A&M, we encourage you to attend one of our meetings and learn what SWE has to offer you. Send an email to secretary@swetamu.org if you have any additional questions!

SWE would like to thank not only the student body that makes up the organization but also all the sponsors, the EASA Office and wonderful faculty that help SWE grow year after year.

Name: Chambre Monégasque du Numérique
Description:

Du software au hardware, de l’étude et du conseil sur mesure à la distribution, la maintenance et le dépannage de matériel informatique, de la conception à la commercialisation de logiciels, en passant par la sécurité, la certification, les solutions de GED et d’archivage, l’installation et la supervision de réseaux câblés et Wi-Fi, la mise en œuvre de solutions de gestion de crise et de services backup, l’hébergement et la réalisation de sites web, l’enregistrement de noms de domaines internet, sans oublier la formation, toutes les facettes de la profession sont représentées.

Pour finir, la Chambre Monégasque du Numérique est l'un des interlocuteurs du Gouvernement Princier pour tous les sujets relatifs à la Transition Numérique de la Principauté et des évolutions des usages du numérique : RGPD, signature électronique, fibre, téléservices, smart City  etc.

Name: Association Française des Producteurs de Films et de programmes audiovisuels (AFPF)
Description:

L’AFPF informe également sur les évolutions législatives qui réglementent la profession et partage les informations d’intérêt général concernant les marchés de l’audiovisuel et les nouvelles politiques françaises et européennes de financement.

De part son ouverture sur tous les secteurs de production, l’AFPF assure une représentativité de la diversité de la profession sur l’ensemble du territoire métropolitain et en continuité territoriale avec les Outre-Mer.

Name: Institute of Certified Sustainability Practitioners - ICSP
Description:
The ICSP is a professional association reflecting and promoting the best in sustainability practice, research and reporting – all towards creating a momentum towards development which meets the needs of those living today without jeopardizing those seeking the same in the future.

For both individual and organization members in business, academia and non-governmental areas, the ability to gain confidence among people who have a benchmarked certification along globally standard lines is a primary aim of the institute. In addition to building confidence in quality, the ICSP is aiming to set professional standards to help ensure that users and providers can be on the same page.

Within an already established network of graduates, now fulfilling roles within the National Committee on Sustainability Reporting, the Institute of Certified Sustainability Practitioners will be expanding its role in the key areas previously under the NCCR as well as establishing an Ethics Board, Professional Standards Board, Examination and Certification Board, and Members Obligations and Requirements Board.

Though the field of sustainability itself provides a powerful incentive, ICSP will be encouraging Continuous Professional Accreditation in the social, environmental, and economic as well as risk and governance areas to meet the evolving demand both from international and national business and government bodies. Once feasible, ICSP will be assuming leadership from NCSR in holding the annual Sustainability Reporting Awards, which is approaching its 10th year.

In short, the ICSP will promote disciplined and optimistic endeavors to encourage all organizations and sustainability practitioners to achieve the best in sustainability practice and reporting.

Name: AQPE - Agency for Qualification of Professional Engineers
Description:
Fundación Privada Agency for Qualification of Professional Engineers.

AQPE es una Fundación que tiene como objetivos:

- La certificación de los profesionales de la ingeniería en función de los conocimientos acreditados y la experiencia profesional en las diferentes especialidades (ámbitos de actuación), según procedimientos de certificación objetivos y estandarizados.

- La promoción de la convergencia internacional, principalmente europea, de los sistemas de cualificación utilizados y de su reconocimiento mutuo. 
 

AQPE ofrece a los profesionales de la ingeniería el certificado PEQ (Professional Engineer AQPE),  un sistema inspirado en el modelo anglosajón, en el que se diferencia la titulación académica de la capacitación  profesional, y en conformidad con la ISO 17024 de certificación de personas en proceso de certificación por ENAC.

Se trata de un sistema de certificación complejo por su rigurosidad, la evaluación de los méritos se hace ante un tribunal conformado a medida en función del ámbito profesional que se quiere certificar, que también facilitará la movilidad internacional de los profesionales de la ingeniería.

Un modelo con el mismo nivel de exigencia y rigor que el utilizado por otras entidades reconocidas internacionalmente, que certifica competencias y aptitudes demostradas para aplicar conocimientos.

Name: Egerton University Law Students Association
Description:
The Egerton University Law Students Association (EULSA) is a student-led organization dedicated to fostering legal excellence, professional growth, and social impact. Established to represent law students at Egerton University, EULSA serves as a platform for academic discourse, advocacy, and networking within the legal fraternity.

Our Mission
EULSA is committed to:
Enhancing legal education through research, publications, and academic programs.
Providing students with opportunities to engage in mooting, debates, and legal aid initiatives.
Promoting the rule of law, democracy, and human rights through advocacy and public service.
Strengthening partnerships with legal institutions, law firms, and student organizations globally.

Our Structure
EULSA operates through various councils, including:
Executive Council – Led by the President and key office bearers overseeing the association’s operations.
Mooting Council – Organizes competitions, debates, and training programs.
Social Affairs Council – Facilitates student engagement activities and networking events.
Student Welfare Council – Advocates for students’ well-being and academic support.
Representative Council – Acts as a bridge between students and faculty administration.

Get Involved
EULSA welcomes all law students of Egerton University to join and actively participate in shaping the future of legal practice. Whether through leadership, mooting, research, or advocacy, our members gain hands-on experience that prepares them for impactful legal careers.

 Connect with us to learn more about our initiatives, events, and opportunities!

Name: CNATP Nouvelle-Aquitaine
Description:
La CNATP est la Chambre Nationale des Artisans des Travaux Publics et du Paysage.
La création de la CNATP, le 17 novembre 1993, est la conséquence d’un constat et d’une réflexion politique.

Jusqu’au début des années 1990, face à l’absence de réelle représentation des entreprises artisanales des Travaux publics et du Paysage, la quasi-totalité d’entre elles n’adhéraient à aucune fédération professionnelle. Parmi les fédérations de la construction, seule la CAPEB était en mesure d’apporter le service légitime qu’attendaient ces artisans, lorsqu’ils se trouvaient à la recherche d’informations concernant l’entreprise artisanale.

Aussi, plusieurs centaines d’entreprises adhéraient à cette organisation représentative des métiers du bâtiment parmi lesquelles figuraient des militants soucieux de voir éclore une représentation adaptée aux problématiques rencontrées par leurs entreprises. Ils s’avéraient donc être particulièrement en demande d’un syndicat leur correspondant.

La création d’une organisation professionnelle distincte est alors très rapidement devenue évidente. Des métiers aux spécificités particulières, des régimes sociaux et des conventions collectives différents ont conduit les départements fondateurs à rechercher une structuration permettant de respecter la distinction entre leurs secteurs et d’en bénéficier.

Through networking events, skill development workshops, mentorship programs, and resource-sharing initiatives, the VA Ally Network fosters a culture of fellowship and support, where VAs can connect with like-minded professionals, enhance their skills, and access valuable insights and guidance from experienced peers.

TinyBit AI is a holistic wellness ecosystem built to support emotional health and simplify modern well-being. Designed for individuals, families, and youth navigating daily pressures, TinyBit combines intelligent insights with human-centered care to make wellness feel accessible, personal, and easy to maintain.

With AI-powered mood tracking, voice-guided support, sleep and food insights, habit tools, and guardian features, TinyBit helps users understand what they feel, why they feel it, and how to take small steps toward balance. From gentle emotional check-ins to daily wellness prompts, TinyBit encourages healthier habits and clearer mental space — without overwhelming the user.

Our platform focuses on real life: busy routines, silent stress, emotional load, fatigue, digital burnout, and the need for better family connection. TinyBit supports these everyday moments with intelligent nudges, personalized guidance, and a companion-like voice system that adapts to the user’s emotional state and lifestyle.

Whether someone wants to improve their sleep, maintain healthier eating patterns, understand mood trends, gain calm and clarity, or stay connected with loved ones through Guardian Mode, TinyBit delivers a warm, supportive ecosystem that fits effortlessly into daily life.

Our mission is to reshape how people experience wellness — with tools that encourage emotional understanding, mindful habits, and gentle, sustainable growth.

TinyBit AI: Your tiny daily support system for a healthier, calmer, more connected life.

Name: PMI Charleston South Carolina
Description:
At Charleston PMI, we're committed to advancing project management in South Carolina's Charleston Metro Region. Our focus is on elevating the practice and profession of project management, fostering professionalism, and serving as a hub for exchanging ideas and solutions.

We offer our members valuable meeting and educational opportunities to enhance their skills and network. Join us to benefit from these offerings and contribute to our vibrant community.

Founded in April 2000, our chapter was formed in response to the growing demand for skilled project managers in Charleston. From just 410 members at our 10-year mark, we've now grown to over 600 professionals, representing various sectors like IT, healthcare, government, and engineering.

Our collaboration with SC.GMIS began in 2005, enhancing our reach and impact. We've hosted joint leadership summits and events, allowing members to gain insights and network extensively. Our monthly meetings, virtual since 2021, offer a platform for professional growth and earning PDUs.

The success of PMI Charleston is driven by our dedicated board members and volunteers. Each event and initiative is a chance to invest in your career and network. We welcome your ideas, participation, and enthusiasm.

In the spring of 2016, six undergraduate women sought to disrupt Vanderbilt’s business community by founding Vanderbilt University’s first Women in Business organization. In the past six years, Women in Business (WiB) has expanded to an executive team of nine, a leadership team of over 40, and a community of 800 students. 

We have meticulously crafted a programming framework that aligns with our mission, encompassing committees dedicated to Mentorship, Externship, Campus Engagement, Community Outreach, Team Management, and Marketing. Within these arenas, we endeavor to foster professional growth and pave the way for our community members to thrive, extending our support not only throughout their collegiate journey but also beyond the auspicious milestone of graduation.

Organization-wide, we are committed to principles of diversity, equity, and inclusion. Our programming is intersectional in nature, elevating historically underrepresented identities. We aim to create an empowering and safe space to foster brave ideas through critical discussion. As a mission-forward organization, we uplift women and marginalized groups, advocating for a more just campus and workplace. Most of all, we set ambitious goals for progress, leading with love and openness along the way.

Name: The Regulated AI Movement
Description:
If you landed here there is a chance you are following the AI world and its ecosystem. At this point of history, it's fair to acknowledge that AI technologies will be part of our future, bringing countless exciting discoveries and horizons.

The AI landscape is evolving rapidly, and its impact on various aspects of life is becoming more significant. As we embrace the potential benefits of Artificial Intelligence, we must consider its potential challenges, such as the effects on the labor market, the educational systems, the intellectual property, the human cognitive evolution, and the environment, just to mention a few.

The Regulated AI Movement, established in early 2023, aims to address these concerns by taking practical steps to democratize AI technology control for individuals. This initiative recognizes that legal systems can be slow to adapt to innovations and seeks to ensure that AI advancements benefit everyone, rather than just a select few.

Name: Fédécomat
Description:
Créée en 2024 autour d'une dizaine de négoces représentatifs de la profession, la Fédécomat se fixe de nombreux objectifs : 

¤ Définition d'une profession: la Fédécomat œuvre à la définition précise de la profession de négoce en éco-matériaux, afin de mettre en valeur ses spécificités face aux réseaux conventionnels
¤ Charte d'engagement: les membres de la fédération s'engagent à respecter une charte de qualité cadrant leurs activités et leurs pratiques commerciales.
¤ Promotion de la profession:  la Fédécomat mettra en place des actions de communication et de sensibilisation pour faire connaître et valoriser les métiers du négoce en éco-matériaux.
¤ Défense des intérêts de la profession: la Fédécomat représente les intérêts de ses adhérents auprès des pouvoirs publics et des institutions. Elle souhaite notamment participer activement à l'élaboration des politiques publiques en matière de construction durable.
¤ Création d'un label de qualité: la Fédécomat étudie la création d'un label reconnaissant l'expertise et l'engagement des négoces en éco-matériaux. Ce label  pourrait garantir aux professionnels et aux particuliers la qualité des produits et services proposés.
¤ Promotion des valeurs écologiques: la Fédécomat travaille à la promotion des  valeurs de l'éco-construction et à accompagnera ses adhérents dans leur démarche de transition écologique.

La fédération souhaite favoriser le partage de connaissances et de savoir-faire pour une meilleure maîtrise des éco-matériaux. Ainsi, elle mettra en place un programme de formations pour ses adhérents dans le but d’améliorer leurs compétences nécessaires à l’accompagnement de leurs clients dans leurs projets de construction durable.

La fédération organise des événements réguliers pour permettre aux négociants de rester à l'avant-garde des dernières tendances du marché, d’échanger sur leurs pratiques commerciales et de mutualiser leurs activités. 

Rejoignez-nous, pour valoriser ensemble notre belle profession...

Name: Finance For Females and Friends
Description:
Finance for Females and Friends (FFF) at Virginia Tech is a student-run organization open to all majors. FFF provides a welcoming and empowering space where members gain financial knowledge, mentorship, and career development opportunities.

Through strong partnerships with industry leaders, we offer treks, company panels, workshops, and networking events, allowing our members to explore careers in finance and beyond. We also foster a sense of community. From wellness initiatives like hikes and yoga sessions to mixers and social gatherings, we create meaningful connections among peers, faculty, and professionals.

Our workshops on professional development and key financial topics like retirement planning, credit, and bonds, ensure that members are not just prepared but confident in pursuing their goals. At our core, we believe that knowledge is power, and by equipping our members with the right tools, we are shaping the next generation of leaders in finance.

Rooted in Virginia Tech’s motto, Ut Prosim (That I May Serve), we are committed to excellence, inclusion, and impact. 

 Meetings: Select Mondays, 6:30–7:30 PM 
 Location: Robeson 210 (subject to change)
 Subscribe to our newsletter & follow our Instagram for updates

Name: Society of Neuroscientists of Africa
Description:
The Society of Neuroscientists of Africa (SONA) is a non-profit organization registered in Nairobi, Kenya in 1993. It functions as the umbrella organization for the regional and national neuroscience societies and groups in Africa. SONA is a member society of the International Brain Research Organization (IBRO).

The aim of SONA is to promote research, teaching and advocacy in Neuroscience in Africa and the Society holds an international conference every two years. The 16th International Conference of the Society of Neuroscientists of Africa (SONA 2023) will bring together Neuroscientists across the African continent and beyond. These Scientists will showcase their research findings from the Basic to Clinical Neurosciences.

The Conference will provide a platform for Private and Public Companies and Organizations in the Science domain, especially the brain sciences, and in the Technology sector to interface with these neuroscientists.

It will also be an opportunity to showcase the Tourism richness of South Africa as an in-person programme is considered very vital in the planning for the conference.

– Zukunftssicherung von hauptamtlichen Trainerinnen und Trainern durch Entfristung von Arbeitsverträgen nach spätestens zwei Jahren statt der bisher gängigen Praxis von Kettenverträgen und Befristungen
– Eine angemessene, leistungsgerechte und gestaffelte Vergütung entsprechend der Tarife des öffentlichen Dienstes
– Etablierung von Regelungen hinsichtlich der Einhaltung des Arbeitszeit- und Arbeitsschutzgesetzes

Name: ANASTIC - Associação Nacional dos Servidores de TIC do PJU e MPU

Description:
Being one of the oldest families to occupy the space of royalty in a town, in the Yoruba-land of Nigeria; the ONIKOYIS have always been tasked with the protection & provision for those under their care, as well as for those around them. A Crown on their heads, and Golden Shackles on their feet.

The Onikoyi Consortium is born of a sentiment not different than the purpose found in times before, by past carriers of the name- Bridging the void between Blessings and Responsibility. Formed in August-2022; The Onikoyi Consortium aims to Provide, Protect and Project the dreams of all those within and around the entity into realities to Live and to Love through. Creating an Oasis where creatives find within themselves their passions and are aided to hone their abilities to the best possible forms- To create a haven, and a safeguarded Ecosystem, where every Artist & Artiste alike, are unbiased conduits of their own art.

Revolutions are often interpreted as malevolent- A small price to pay for the protestant modus operandi taken up by those at the causal forefronts. And though this revival and reanimation of the creative’s spirit are perceivable as acts of insurgency & anarchy, our rebellion is for the betterment of all things that exist now as they have once. Business & Brews is “business casual,” and professionals from all walks of life are welcome. Our monthly speakers leave the PowerPoints and structured speeches behind and tell their stories in a laidback and fun atmosphere. So let your hair down, take that tie off, roll up your sleeves, grab a cold one and mingle with like-minded professionals who want to rub elbows with people who care about their community and the folks who make it a great place to live.

Cheers!

Name: London Sanctions Advisors Association
Description:
Following Brexit, the United Kingdom has emerged as an independent player in the sanctions and export controls arena. Since the outbreak of the war in Ukraine alone, the British government has sanctioned more than 1,200 people and 120 businesses. But since the passage of the Sanctions and Anti-Money Laundering Act (SAMLA) in 2018, there has been only a single case involving a sanctions designation brought before the High Court. Sanctions law in the UK is still rapidly developing.  

LSAA is as an independent group of experienced sanctions professionals seeking to help shape the UK’s rapidly developing sanctions and export controls framework. Its primary aim is to ensure that sanctions are defined clearly, imposed fairly, and minimally disruptive to legitimate commercial activity. We hope to be a cooperative and productive partner with Parliament, regulators, and industry leaders to create a just and efficient sanctions regime that achieves its foreign policy goals.

Name: AORN Los Angeles 0507 Page
Description:
Welcome to AORN Los Angeles Chapter 0507.

AORN of Los Angeles held its first meeting at the then Glendale Sanitarium, currently Glendale Adventist Medical Center (GAMC) in 1952. We have come full circle, having our past few meetings at GAMC.

Mabel L. Crawford organized the group in 1952 with the same mission and vision as we have for our members in 2011.

Jerry G. Peers was active in our chapter and served as our fourth President. She was a pioneer in the formation of our current national organization. She became a National Board Member and eventually Director of AORN. Many of our members have been presented with the Jerry G. Peers Distinguished Service Award for significant contributions to the growth, progress and welfare of AORN. Our annual conference also includes a Jerry G. Peers Lectureship series providing distinguished speakers on current influential topics.

As you can see our Chapter is rich in the history of the now Association of periOperative Registered Nurses. Please view our archives to take a walk back to our founding colleagues.

You will find that our mission, vision and philosophy has not changed. We continue to be the professional organization of perioperative registered nurses whose mission is to promote quality patient care by providing its members with education standards review, services and representation. The networking and collaboration support a lifelong learning process that enhances perioperative nursing practices.

Notre Fédération sera le relais des Organismes de Formation médicale continue indépendants pour tous les professionnels de santé, afin de devenir leur porte-parole et d’être partie prenante dans les discussions et les décisions ayant un impact direct sur leur activité.

Name: FGAS
Description: FGAS a pour mission la gestion de dispositifs de prêts bancaires visant un objectif d'intérêt général : accession sociale à la propriété, rénovation énergétique des logements, transition écologique. L'objectif est de faciliter l'accès au crédit par un mécanisme de garantie ou par l'application d'un taux zéro. Nous gérons pour le compte de l'Etat le PTZ, l'Eco-PTZ, la garantie des PAS (Prêts d'Accession Sociale), le FGR (Fonds de Garantie à la Rénovation), l'Epargne Logement, ainsi que d'autres mécanismes pour des donneurs d'ordre publics comme les FGHS (Fonds de Garantie Habitat Social pour les DROM). La prestation de services de FGAS intègre un système automatisé de déclaration des prêts, le calcul actuariel de la compensation de prêts à taux zéro, une gestion complète de dispositifs de garantie, la fourniture d'une assistance juridique et technique, d'informations statistiques, le contrôle du respect des règles relatives aux dispositifs. L'Etat est le principal donneur d'ordres de FGAS, mais la société est également liée par convention avec d'autres entités pour la gestion de prêts.

Name: MedicPreneur
Description:
About MedicPreneur

Medical students often find it difficult or almost impossible to merge business activities with academic pursuits. MedicPreneur is here to bridge that gap, offering tailored support to three key groups:

1. Aspiring Entrepreneurs: For medical students who don't have any business or skills at hand and are looking to start one but are unsure how to begin. They may be scared of having to choose between academic excellence and entrepreneurial success. MedicPreneur makes it possible to merge these two pursuits and achieve both.

2. Current Entrepreneurs: For those who already have businesses and seek guidance on how to maximize their potential and reach their zenith, even as medical students.

3. Newly Graduated Doctors: Recognizing that medical schools teach medicine, not business, we provide essential entrepreneurial activities and business ideas to be incorporated into their health establishments.

Our Offerings:
- Workshops and Training: Specialized sessions covering business planning, financial management, and leadership.
- Mentorship Programs: Connecting students with experienced entrepreneurs and healthcare professionals for guidance and support.
- Networking Opportunities: Platforms for networking with industry leaders, investors, and fellow innovators.
- Project Development: Support for student-led projects addressing real-world healthcare issues.

MedicPreneur Academy:
We run an academy where students can learn essential entrepreneurial skills, ensuring they are well-equipped to innovate and lead in the healthcare sector.

Our Reach:
MedicPreneur already has members and is established in 8 African countries, including Nigeria, Rwanda, Ghana, South Africa, Tanzania, Ethiopia, Kenya, and Cameroon. 

Join Us:
If you are a medical student or professional with a passion for entrepreneurship and a desire to make a difference in healthcare, MedicPreneur is the community for you.

Name: NegoBide
Description:
Círculo Empresarial Negocios y Valores, es una organización que apoya la creación, desarrollo, crecimiento y proyección de Negocios. En Euskadi-País Vasco y Navarra, la entidad recibe el nombre de NegoBide Círculo Empresarial.

Surge en el año 2000 a través de diferentes actividades de cooperación empresarial en el Norte, (Bilbao, Burgos, Logroño, Pamplona y Zaragoza) aunque será en 2006 cuando se constituye como entidad socio-empresarial. El PROPOSITO inicial fue crear espacios de trabajo donde unir el mundo de los Negocios con el ámbito de los Valores.

Su misión se enfocó sobre el fomento de Proyectos y Empresas Responsables, en un momento en el que la coyuntura económica parecía evolucionar imparable hacia sus más altas cotas de éxito pero, acompañada de una notable falta de ética en muchas empresas; dinero fácil que accionaba malas decisiones, una desmedida competitividad que dificultaba las oportunidades de los pequeños negocios, o el escaso interés por la aplicación de buenas prácticas en materia medioambiental, entre otras, que CUESTIONABAN un sistema socioeconómico cada día más injusto que, además, dejaba -y continúa dejando- al margen a las personas y colectivos más vulnerables.

Desde entonces, la entidad fomenta el justo desarrollo económico de las empresas y profesionales a través del asesoramiento personalizado, el acompañamiento en sus procesos de consolidación y socialización, asi como la facilitación de instrumentos adecuados para estimular la Innovación y Cooperación; todo ello, con un marcado carácter de Responsabilidad Social.

Name: Water Sommelier Union
Description:
The Water Sommelier Union e.V. (WSU) is an international professional association of all certified Water Sommeliers. It was founded in October 2011 in Solingen (Germany).

Membership: Full members of the association must have completed a thorough training program with theoretical and practical examinations. The WSU also offers companies and institutions that would like to support the work and goals of the association ideally and financially the opportunity to become a sustaining member.

Aims of the association: The WSU aims to support all aspects of water sommeliers, particularly with regard to further training. Regular events are held to exchange thoughts, experiences and ideas with other members.
As an international professional association with more than 250 members from 28 countries, the WSU offers events and training seminars in both German and English.

Sensory training home-based: various mineral kits are sent out at regular intervals for the sensory training of members, which can be tasted after appropriate dilution with water.

Sensory assessments: On request, the WSU offers sensory assessments for bottlers of natural mineral water in order to provide a comprehensive, well-founded and positive description of their own mineral water and thus create opportunities for differentiation. These reports are prepared by the WSU's sensory committee with trained tasters who are experienced in describing natural mineral water.

Name: TAPTP - Texas Association of Property Tax Professionals
Description:
The mission of the Texas Association of Property Tax Professionals is to protect the rights of property taxpayers by advancing the professional practice of property tax consulting through education and high ethical standards. The Association brings together members who work in similar capacities within the field of property taxation. The benefit of the Association is that it allows participants to foster a greater degree of professionalism and to work toward specific goals agreed upon by individual members. Efforts of TAPTP serve to complement the profession of property tax management and assist in creating better understanding and cooperation among members, state agencies and the taxpayers of Texas. The objectives of TAPTP include:

To promote and support a property tax system in the State of Texas that will preserve, protect, and defend the rights of taxpayers.

To elevate the practice of property tax consulting through education, professionalism, the promotion of high standards of competence and efficiency and to establish strict standards of ethical and professional conduct.

To support constructive changes in the property tax system in order to make it more efficient and responsive to taxpayer’s needs.

An elected Board of Directors implements policy guided by the membership through written Bylaws. The Association has an established organizational structure through its standing committees and headquarters’ operation that provides its members the information to keep abreast of the fast changing property tax environment.

Name: Polish Chamber of Tourism
Description:
Polish Chamber of Tourism is the largest organisation founded by the tourism industry and operating all over the country. Our accomplishments during over 30 years of activity had strong impact on the way this business runs nowadays. The Chamber’s role became extremely important after Poland joined the European Union. Since May 2004 the Chamber is the full-fledged member of ECTAA.
Being supported by Poland’s largest tour operators and travel agencies, we not only act actively for the sake of further tourism industry development, but also take good care of the already existing business. The organisation’s structure, based on local representative offices situated in the main tourist locations like Białystok, Bydgoszcz, Katowice, Łódź, Olsztyn, Poznań, Gdańsk, Warszawa, Kraków and Wrocław, is of vital importance. The Chamber has c.a. 500 members with about 1000 offices spread through the country and representing ca. 70% of floating capital in Polish tourism.
Areas of export support
•  Representing members and the tourism business, develop the tourism industry, its competitiveness on foreign markets, access to new technologies and setting business standards among our members
•  Cooperating with many governmental institutions, linked with the tourism industry, like the Ministry of Economy, the Ministry of Finance, the Foreign Affairs Ministry, the Sports and Tourism Ministry, Border Guards as well as the Polish Chamber of Commerce, where the Polish Chamber of Tourism is an active member
•  Building the awareness of the importance of tourism business among the members of Parliament Commissions and forming strong cooperation with Polish Tourism Organization, Tourism, Hotel and Gastronomic Organization Board, Board of Regional Chambers of Tourism (where PIT is a presiding member since 2006) as well as Regional Chambers of Tourism
•  Fighting for adapting the Polish law regulations to the European policies
•  Protecting Polish travel agencies

Name: AIEM Italian Association of Museum Educators
Description:
AIEM (Italian Association of Museum Educators) is the first professional association in Italy representing both current and aspiring professionals in the heritage learning field.

AIEM’s core objectives include achieving full recognition and an up-to-date definition of the profession, as well as advocating for fair contracts and salaries. Its overarching goal is the improvement of the quality of educational services offered by public and private heritage institutions and sites to their communities.

By bringing together professionals in the field, AIEM analyses the current landscape, actively defining educational pathways and professional standards, and serves as the essential interlocutor in building relationships among institutions, cultural organizations and educational bodies.

Name: EIT Community Hub France
Description:
L’EIT Community Hub France s’adresse aux régions ultramarines françaises : Guyane, Martinique, Guadeloupe, La Réunion, Mayotte, Saint-Martin. Nous les accompagnons dans le développement de leur potentiel d’innovation et d’entrepreneuriat, en facilitant l’accès à l’ensemble des programmes d'accélération européens proposés par la communauté EIT - European Institute of Innovation & Technology.
 
Les RUP françaises présentent de nombreux avantages pour l'Union européenne. Elles assurent sa présence dans des zones géographiques stratégiques et présentent un potentiel important en termes de recherche et d'innovation dans plusieurs secteurs majeurs tels que :
- Biodiversité terrestre et marine : la Réunion a été classée par l'Union mondiale pour la nature parmi les 34 « hot spots » de biodiversité
- Pharmacologie : grâce à la présence de plantes endémiques contenant des substances actives utilisables par l'industrie
- Énergies renouvelables et aérospatial : le Centre spatial guyanais est la principale base de lancement des satellites et fusées de l'Union européenne

La mission principale de l'EIT Community Hub France est donc de contribuer au développement de ce potentiel en facilitant l'accès des acteurs de l'innovation des outre-mer aux programmes d'accélération de l'EIT et de ses communautés thématiques KIC :
- Santé avec EIT Health
- Climat avec Climate KIC
- Mobilité avec EIT Urban Mobility
- Alimentation avec EIT Food
- Digital avec EIT Digital
- Culture avec EIT Culture & Creativity
- Matières premières avec EIT Raw Materials
- Industrie avec EIT Manufacturing
- Énergie avec InnoEnergy

Nous sommes là pour vous accompagner dans le dépôt de vos candidatures aux programmes.
Contactez-nous : france@eitcommunity.eu
Abonnez-vous à notre newsletter pour recevoir nos dernières actualités : http://eepurl.com/jaXW1A

Name: Saramad Sepehran Hasti
Description:
Saramad Sepehran Hasti (SSH) Immigration Consultancy is an innovative immigration consulting firm with experience and expertise in the immigration industry, particularly in business and investment-based immigration and citizenship (second passport) programs.We have been striving to provide immigration services to clients and facilitate resettlement in their country of choice, including Canada, the US, Australia, New Zealand, the UK, and European countries.The successful result of the enterprise is given top priority, in our line of work though, the final decision is not entirely up to the consultant.
 We are proud to:
-Enforce the Code of Professional Ethics
-Accredit and audit the Immigration Practitioner Programs (IPPs) offered by post-secondary institutions.
-Administer the entry-to-practice Full Skills Exam (FSE).
-Deliver Practice Management Education (PME) courses.
-Conduct a Compliance Audit to make certain that our practice and  documentation comply with regulations.
-Credit hours of Continuing Professional Development (CPD), which ensure that  our immigration knowledge is current.
The services we provide include:
-Permanent residence
-Student visa
-Business Visa
-Citizenship
-Work permit
-Sponsorship Programmes
-Visiting Friends & Relatives (VFR) programmes
In doing so, we 
-Advise our clients on financial requirements for immigration applications.
-Assemble and submit applications to relevant government agencies.
-Assess and suggest changes to the work process, as necessary.
-Assess clients' eligibility for various immigration programs.
-Assist clients in completing immigration application forms.
-Assist clients in obtaining police clearances and medical examinations.
-Assist clients in preparing and obtaining supporting documents.
-Assist in the development and maintenance of standard office precedents and procedures.
-Collaborate with legal professionals when complex legal issues arise.
-Communicate with government agencies

Name: CareerLeap
Description:
At CareerLEAP, we believe in the transformative power of education. 
Our mission is to bridge the gap between ambition and opportunity for African students by providing them with the financial support they need to pursue their dreams of acquiring a world-class education in the United States or Canada.

Africa is a continent brimming with talent, innovation, and potential. However, limited access to quality education and financial resources often hinders the realization of these potentials. CareerLEAP is committed to changing this narrative. We envision a future where every bright and determined African student can access global educational opportunities and contribute to the growth and development of their communities and the world at large.

Our unique approach focuses on holistic growth, encompassing academic excellence, personal development, and leadership skills. By offering financial aid through our financial partners, we aim to empower African students to leap over the financial barriers that stand between them and their dreams. With our support, they can unlock doors to premier educational institutions in the United States and Canada, where they can receive top-notch education, interact with diverse cultures, and develop a global perspective.

Trabajamos en toda Cataluña y trabajamos para comunidades, empresas, fabricas, comercios, campings, ayuntamientos, ocio nocturno, centros comerciales, eventos y casas particulares, urbanizaciones, etc. 

En Guard Group, llevamos muchos años ofreciendo diferentes servicios para satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes. Es por esto por lo que ofrecemos un servicio de calidad, basándonos en las necesidades de cada momento.
Le garantizamos un servicio eficiente, óptimo y de calidad teniendo en cuenta sus necesidades y la inversión de los costes de su empresa. Ofrecemos precios muy competitivos .

Name: OFU: Online Facilitation Unconference
Description:
OFU: Online Facilitation Unconference is a grassroots, community-driven learning exchange where participants shape the agenda. This year’s events will take place November 17th-21st around the clock and around the world, on the theme of Rethinking How We Work Together in the Intelligent Age!

Join us to share your work, experiments, and case studies, hold space for big questions, learn from your peers, and explore the intersection of AI and Facilitation in a new era.

Name: BNI Vision by the Sea - Malmö
Description:
Välkommen till BNI Vision by the Sea i Malmö!

Vill du att fler ska rekommendera dig till sitt kontaktnät? Vårt team består av drivna och engagerade personer som tillsammans hjälper varandra till fler och bättre affärer. Gillar du samarbete, personlig utveckling och dessutom tror på idén att den som ger får tillbaka? Då är du någon för oss i BNI och vi är något för dig. 

Vi erbjuder ett strukturerat, mätbart och energigivande sätt att göra affärer på. Kom och besök oss! Vi vill gärna förstärka vårt team med fler professionella och drivna personer. Vi har exklusivitet inom våra respektive expertområden, så se efter vilka affärspartners som är med och se om ditt expertområde är ledigt. Tveka inte att höra av dig till någon i teamledningen så bokar vi in ett besök så att du får träffa oss! I Covid-19 tider träffas vi digitalt via Zoom.

Varför BNI? Vill du vara med i ett team som aktivt rekommenderar dig till fler affärer? BNIs grundidé kommer ifrån tanken om Givers Gain - du som ger får tillbaka - vilket präglar hela vårt koncept. Vi utbildar dig i hur du skapar affärsmöjligheter genom ett aktivt nätverkande i teamet. För att du så snabbt som möjligt ska börja kunna ge och få affärsmöjligheter utbildar vi dig i hur du stärker ditt personliga varumärke och tydliggör din kundnytta så att dina teamkollegor vill rekommendera dig. Vi fokuserar på att bygga förtroende och skapa tillit till varandra: När teamet lär känna dig och du dem, då förstår de din kundnytta och vilka kunder du söker och kan aktivt rekommendera dig vidare i sitt professionella och personliga nätverk. Du kommer att ha exklusivitet inom ditt yrkesområde. Teamet är uppbyggt av personer från olika branscher och från stora och små företag vilket skapar ett brett och starkt team.

Name: Worldwide Women's Network
Description:
Empowering Women, Inspiring Change

Welcome to the Worldwide Women's Network, a global community dedicated to the professional advancement of women everywhere. At WWN, we believe in the immense power of women to shape a more equitable and inclusive world. Our organization is built on the foundational principles of unity, empowerment, and collaboration.

Our Mission

Our mission is simple yet profound: to foster a vibrant network that amplifies women's voices, celebrates their accomplishments, and provides them with the tools and support needed to overcome professional challenges. Through a wide range of initiatives, programs, and resources, we strive to empower women to reach their full potential in every aspect of their professional life
.
Connecting Beyond Borders

In an interconnected world, the need for solidarity knows no borders. WWN brings together women from diverse cultures, backgrounds, and experiences, recognizing that our shared stories and aspirations bind us together. Through our platform, you'll have the opportunity to connect and network with like-minded individuals, form lasting professional relationships, and engage in meaningful conversations that transcend geographical boundaries.

Empowerment Through Knowledge 

We firmly believe that knowledge is a catalyst for change. Our network is designed to equip women with the information, skills, and insights they need to thrive professionally. From career development and entrepreneurship to mentorship and collaboration, our carefully curated resources cover a wide spectrum of topics that matter most to women.

Celebrating Diversity 

Diversity is not just a buzzword for us; it's a core value that shapes everything we do. We celebrate the rich tapestry of experiences, perspectives, and identities that make up our global association. By embracing diversity, we create a space where every woman's story is valued and respected, fostering a sense of belonging and authenticity.

Name: LAI San Diego
Description:
Lambda Alpha International is an honorary and selective global organization comprised of professionals working in land use..

The membership includes architects, landscape architects, engineers, real estate developers, planners, government officials, professors, bankers, attorneys, real estate consultants, and officials of organizations and national and international associations.

The San Diego Chapter of LAI connects members so they can build meaningful working relationships, share knowledge and advance best practices. The San Diego Chapter has at least 10 luncheon meetings and/or networking events each year.

We are committed to diversity in our membership and educational programs to ensure unique perspectives, breadth of knowledge and meaningful discussions.

Beyond San Diego, LAI is a worldwide network for distinguished professionals in all fields related to land-use economics and development. LAI chapters are located in major cities in the United States, Canada, Mexico, Europe, and Asia.

Name: Koninklijke Vereniging van Infrabeheerders
Description: De Koninklijke Vereniging van Infrabeheerders (KVIB) biedt haar leden al 130 jaar ervaring als netwerkvereniging. Opgericht in 1894 als beroepsvereniging van opzichters van de Rijkswaterstaat. In 2011 de keuze gemaakt om de focus te richten op de gehele sector van wegen, vaarwegen, water en rail. In 2021 is het predicaat koninklijk toegekend. Kortom een levende vereniging die haar leden een toekomstgericht kennisnetwerk binnen het assetmanagement biedt met daarbij aandacht om de onderlinge kameraadschappelijke geest te bevorderen.

Name: CalCPA San Joaquin Chapter

Welcome to the San Joaquin Chapter of CalCPA, your local hub for connecting with finance and accounting professionals. We're not just about promoting business growth and upholding integrity, we're about fostering relationships and creating a strong local community of accounting professionals. Because the future of accounting is anything, but by the numbers, we aim to redefine the image of the profession while enhancing the career experience of our members.

In our community, you have the opportunity to connect, collaborate and grow with local professionals who are driving transformation in the field. Join our chapter today, connect with local leaders and be part of a community shaping the future.

Name: Die Schauspielgewerkschaft BFFS
Description:
Der Bundesverband Schauspiel vertritt die berufsständischen sowie die gewerkschaftlichen Interessen der Schauspieler*innen in Deutschland.

Über 4.300 Mitglieder zählt der BFFS inzwischen (Stand Dezember 2024) und ist damit der mitgliederstärkste Berufsverband der deutschen Kino-, Fernseh-, Theater-, Synchron- und Sprecherlandschaft – sowie die größte Schauspielerorganisation des Landes.

Er will die kulturellen, gesellschaftlichen, politischen, rechtlichen, tariflichen und sozialen Rahmenbedingungen verbessern bzw. schaffen, die sowohl den einzigartigen Schauspielberuf schützen, bewahren und fördern als auch die besondere Lebens- und Erwerbssituation der Künstler*innen berücksichtigen, die diesen Schauspielberuf ausüben.

In dem Bewusstsein, dass Schauspieler*innen  sowohl Rückgrat als auch Gesicht unserer kulturell wichtigen aber auch sensiblen Film- und Bühnenkultur sind, pflegt der Bundesverband Schauspiel eine enge Vernetzung mit Politik, Sendern, Behörden, Filmgesellschaften sowie Theatereinrichtungen und anderen Verbänden bzw. Gewerkschaften..

Description:

Als Netzwerk der Psychodramatiker*innen bieten wir unseren Mitgliedern vielfältige Räume für Co–Creation und Austausch, Inspiration und Weiterentwicklung, Motivation und Rückhalt. Unsere Organisation lebt davon, dass sich Psychodramatiker*innen einbringen und uns durch eine Mitgliedschaft unterstützen.

Vorstandsteam:
Julia Kausch (1.Vorsitzende), Sebastian Arnoldi (2. Vorsitzender, Kassenwart), Monica Baudracco-Kastner (Schriftführerin), Konrad Schnabel (Beisitz), Dagmar von Linde-Suden (Beisitz), Tim Krumpholz-Nielitz (Beisitz)

Name: EMPRESABIOS
Description:
El mundo empresarial ya no se mide solo en cifras, velocidad ni métricas de crecimiento. Hoy, en un entorno saturado de información, hiperconectado y lleno de “expertos” de ocasión, la verdadera ventaja está en algo más profundo: la sabiduría aplicada a los negocios y a la vida.

En EmpreSabios creemos que emprender no es una aventura improvisada, sino un acto de sabiduría estratégica. Nuestro propósito es guiar a líderes, profesionales y emprendedores hacia una nueva forma de crear, crecer y trascender: diseñando primero un plan de vida sólido, que luego dé origen a un plan de negocio sostenible, humano y rentable.

Aquí no encontrarás fórmulas mágicas ni promesas vacías. Encontrarás principios probados, experiencias reales y una comunidad que entiende que el éxito sin paz interior es simplemente otra forma de fracaso.

Un EmpreSabio no solo construye empresas:

 Construye visión con propósito.
 Lidera con conciencia y humanidad.
 Transforma el ruido digital en claridad estratégica.
 Cuida de su ser, para multiplicar su hacer.

La era del “emprender por emprender” terminó. El futuro pertenece a quienes combinan inteligencia, propósito y sabiduría para generar impacto real.

Si estás listo para ir más allá del negocio y comenzar a liderar desde tu esencia, bienvenido a EmpreSabios.

Aquí no formamos emprendedores comunes. Aquí creamos líderes sabios capaces de trascender.

Description:
"Liderar no es solo dirigir, es inspirar. Este premio reconoce a altos directivos que transforman su influencia en valor para las personas".

Por iniciativa de su presidenta 𝗕𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗮 𝗠𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗼𝘀 𝗥𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗿𝗼 · Personal Branding Strategist, nace la idea de este 𝗴𝗮𝗹𝗮𝗿𝗱𝗼́𝗻 𝗱𝗶𝘀𝗲ñ𝗮𝗱𝗼 𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗮 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗼𝗻𝗼𝗰𝗲𝗿 𝗮 𝗹í𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗲𝘀 𝗰𝗼𝗿𝗽𝗼𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗼𝘀, 𝗲𝗺𝗽𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗼𝘀 𝘆 𝗮𝗹𝘁𝗼𝘀 𝗱𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗼𝘀 𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝗵𝗮𝗻 𝗱𝗲𝘀𝗮𝗿𝗿𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗮𝗱𝗼 𝘂𝗻𝗮 𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗰𝗮 𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹 𝗶𝗻𝗳𝗹𝘂𝘆𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗲 𝗲𝗻 𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗲𝘀 𝘀𝗼𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹𝗲𝘀, especialmente en LinkedIn. 

Premiamos a líderes de opinión que llevan su influencia más allá de la sala de juntas, dejando huella en la sociedad y en las empresas que representan.

No premiamos sus títulos o logros, sino como comunican su historia, sus valores y cómo los comparten con el mundo.

Patrocinadores: ISDI Business School, RRHHDigital y EVERCOM (Agencia oficial de comunicación del premio)

Name: CPME Bourgogne-Franche-Comté
Description: La CPME est le plus grand réseau de chefs d’entreprise de Bourgogne-Franche-Comté. Elle regroupe 2 000 entreprises de tous secteurs : commerce, service, industrie et artisanat. Présente dans les 8 départements de notre région, la CPME est l’interlocuteur incontournable des collectivités, de l’état, des départements et de la Région. La CPME porte la voix des chefs d’entreprises indépendants. Tout au long de l’année, la CPME, dans chaque département, accompagne les chefs d’entreprise dans leur quotidien : développement, financement, recherche de partenaires, international, accompagnement juridique, recouvrement et mise en relations … Le réseau de la CPME est performant, efficace et pragmatique. Avec plus de 900 chefs d’entreprises investis dans la représentation patronale, la CPME défend l’intérêt des TPE/PME dans de nombreux organismes : Chambres de Commerce et d’Industrie, Tribunaux de commerce, Conseils de prud’hommes, Protection sociale des indépendants, Urssaf, Caf, Cpam, Carsat, Commission des Impôts, OPCO EP, Ceser, Crefop… Ces mandataires sont les portes paroles des entrepreneurs. Du petit déjeuner aux conventions, plus de 300 évènements sont organisés par les CPME départementales de Bourgogne-Franche-Comté pour apporter à nos adhérents des informations de premier ordre pour leur entreprise, aller à la rencontre de personnalités régionales ou nationales et se créer un réseau. Ces évènements sont la marque de fabrique de la CPME.

Name: 50 Forged
Description:
At 50 Forged, we empower American-made brands by providing the resources and support they need to grow and succeed. We’re more than just a membership— we’re a community of builders, innovators, and doers dedicated to excellence and American craftsmanship.

Our mission is to help businesses unlock their full potential by offering tailored solutions in strategic growth, marketing, manufacturing, supply chain, capital, and more. Whether you're a startup or a seasoned business, we connect you with the tools, experts, and peer groups that will accelerate your success.

Our members share a common commitment to quality, doing things the right way, and supporting local industries. By leveraging American resources, we not only contribute to the success of our members but also help build a sustainable, thriving economy that benefits communities nationwide.

Join 50 Forged and become part of a growing network of leaders who believe that building a great American brand means building it right. If you’re ready to grow your business with purpose and passion, let’s forge ahead together.

Name: Memphis Chapter IIA
Description:
We are a very diverse chapter with over 430 members in more than 86 Corporations and 10 government agencies. We offer monthly training classes from August to May each year, with additional full day and half day seminars to provide many training opportunities. The Memphis Chapter also hosts an Annual Student Day meeting that features a Chief Audit Executive Roundtable to help students learn more about the profession and what employers are looking for in internal audit candidates.
 
Memphis achieved RUBY status in the 2022 program year. This notable accomplishment came after attaining GOLD status for 20 consecutive years. To achieve this goal you have to provide service to members, service to the profession and proper administration of the chapter. Congratulations to all the volunteers and members of the Memphis chapter for all their hard work.
 
We are always looking for new members, additional ways to enhance our profession and educate about our profession. Feel free to contact any of the leadership team to obtain a meeting schedule, volunteer or request educational seminars simply contact memphisiia@gmail.com.
 
We look forward to seeing you at a meeting soon.

Name: ANFAL for research and entrepreneurship
Description: Anfal for Research and Entrepreneurship is a non-profit organization that focuses on empowering individuals of any background to gain access to the resources and tools they need to reach their aspirations. Our organization connects research, education, and entrepreneurs, so that they can take advantage of practical solutions and accomplish their ambitions while also giving back to their communities. Our mission is to break down any obstacles and provide an encouraging atmosphere that motivates everyone to explore new possibilities, reach their goals, and make a difference to their communities. Our hybrid approach is designed to make this possible.

Name: The Network for Springfield's Young Professionals
Description:
The Network is the premier organization for Springfield’s professionals under 40 who are interested in connecting with other young professionals, advancing their careers, filling leadership roles in the community, and building relationships with other business leaders. Annual memberships are all-inclusive, meaning they provide free access to all of The Network’s regular events.

Our programming focuses on professional development, community engagement, and allowing members to get to know one another as well as more experienced business leaders. The event series we typically stick to are: Local Leadership Series, Living in SGF Series, Civic Engagement Series and Socials. We’ll also take behind-the-scenes tours of local gems on occasion.

Since its creation in 2007 The Network has become the go-to voice for young leaders and professionals in the Springfield community. Members are often sought out for openings on local boards and commissions and are routinely recognized in area publications for their professional and philanthropic efforts. We are also passionate about getting young professionals to share their story of why they love living in Springfield!
