VOITH or Vaidya's Organization of Industries & Trading Houses, is one of the most dynamic business houses in Nepal and is dedicated to integrity, excellence and leadership. It represents a wide range of integrated trading houses, industrial enterprises, services, consturction activities and educational academies.

VOITH is committed to the development of the country in its entirety and, therefore, supports those business activities that help shape the future of Nepal. The organisation has been given priority to industries that contribute greatly to the social upliftment of the Nepali people. Hence, labour-intensive, agro-based industries are VOITH's priority as we are convinced that such undertakings help raise the living standard of Nepal's poorest people, the bulk of whom are farmers.

Name: Superyacht Show Türkiye
Description: Superyacht Show Turkey is a prestigious event planned to be held in 2025. Our aim in our fair, which we will organize with international participants, is to introduce yachts and charter yachts produced in Turkey to the world, to emphasize our country's power and superior production quality in the maritime sector, and to closely follow the developments in the yachting sector in the world. Through this event, we aim to further strengthen Turkey's position in the global maritime arena and to introduce our local manufacturers on international platforms. Superyacht Show Turkey contributes to increasing the global recognition of the Turkish maritime sector by ensuring that our local manufacturers are more accepted internationally. Our vision is to support Turkey to become a strong brand in the maritime sector and to make our country a recognized maritime center on the global stage.

Name: Texas Pre-Law Honor Society
Description: We host weekly general meetings with guest speakers from all fields of the legal sector, LSAT prep companies, law school admissions panels, and resume workshops. We also host weekly mock trial meetings to prepare members on our mock trial team for our semesterly final competitions, which we host at UT Law School. We host 1-2 socials a month to foster a positive pre-law community and create a bond between our members and officers, including our traditional annual/semesterly events such as retreat, banquet, and barge. We also provide monthly service opportunities so all our members are philanthropically engaged in the larger Austin community. Lastly, we share membership opportunities and connections that our members can truly benefit from as they go along their journey to applying to law school.

Name: Rhode Island Society of Health-System Pharmacists
Description: A non-profit, professional association established to advance public health by promoting the professional interests of pharmacists practicing in hospitals and other organized healthcare settings.

Name: Dansk Selskab for Digital Sundhed
Description: DSDS er et videnskabeligt selskab, der har til formål at fremme et bæredygtigt digitalt støttet sundhedsvæsen.

Name: Leder-Udvikling A/S
Description:
Vi hjælper vores kunder med at nå deres mål og skabe langvarige forandringer gennem vores ekspertise og engagement. Vi tilbyder en bred vifte af ydelser og konsulenttjenester og vores fokus er at hjælpe vores kunder med at udvikle deres lederkompetencer og skabe succesfulde organisationer.

Vi tror på, at ledelse er en læringsproces, der aldrig ender, og derfor tilbyder vi en kontinuerlig læring og udvikling for vores kunder. Vores undervisere og konsulenter er erfarne ledere og eksperter inden for deres felter og er dedikerede til at hjælpe vores kunder med at nå deres mål.

Vi ønsker at skabe en positiv forandring i verden gennem god ledelse og i vores mission er intentionen at hjælpe så mange mennesker som muligt med at opnå deres fulde potentiale som ledere. Vi er glade for at have dig med ombord på vores rejse og ser frem til at hjælpe dig med at nå dine mål.

Name: Valencia Next Generation
Description: Impulsamos las conexiones profesionales entre jóvenes con visión de futuro.

Name: Ascend UCI
Description:
Ascend UCI is a student chapter of Ascend leadership, one of the largest business leadership professional membership organizations in North America. Our mission is to drive workplace and societal impact by developing and elevating all Asian and Pacific Islander (API) business leaders and empowering them to become catalysts for change.

Ascend offers impactful career lifecycle and cross-industry leadership programs and networks that foster community and engagement for API business professionals and students, corporate partners, and the community at large. Here at UCI, we host weekly events featuring guest speakers, socials, and professional workshops, in hopes of fostering personal/professional development and lifelong friendships.

Ascend has over 45+ student-led chapters and 20 professional chapters. As a whole, Ascend also supports initiatives that help students across North America through scholarships, academic and innovation program sponsorships, and community support/fundraising.

Name: CIfA Deutschland
Description: CIfA Deutschland ist der Berufsverband für die Archäologie in Deutschland. Er fokussiert sich vollständig auf die Archäologie als Beruf. Ziel ist, jenseits von Einzelanliegen eine systemische Verbesserung des Berufs zu erreichen und ihn zukunftsfähig zu machen. Dafür braucht transparentes und verlässliches Qualitätsmanagement: CIfA setzt auf vom Fach und Berufsstand selbst definierte berufliche Standards und ethische Richtlinien, und es überprüft deren Einhaltung. CIfA Deutschland vertritt sowohl Arbeitnehmer als auch Arbeitgeber und akkreditiert einschlägige Fachfirmen und Institutionen als Registrierte Organisationen (ROs). Es ist die deutsche Abteilung eines der beiden weltweit ältesten und größten Archäologie-Berufsverbände: des Chartered Institute for Archaeologists.

Name: Sustainability Award
Description: A global digital environmental award scheme spotlighting and celebrating products and services that are the most sustainable in their category.

Name: Bedrijvenvereniging Boekelermeer
Description:
De bedrijvenvereniging Boekelermeer verbindt de ondernemers die gevestigd zijn op de Boekelermeer en draagt op die manier bij aan de economische ontwikkeling van Alkmaar.

Tevens behartigen wij de belangen voor en namens onze leden door in structureel overleg met gemeente Alkmaar en Heiloo verbeterpunten te bespreken, zoals bijvoorbeeld de bereikbaarheid van het bedrijventerrein Boekelermeer.

De bedrijvenvereniging Boekelermeer zet zich actief in voor een verdere ontwikkeling van de Boekelermeer ten aanzien van onder meer veiligheid, bereikbaarheid en ondernemen.

Name: Let's Talk Women's Health & Wellness
Description: Ready to engage in some candid conversations about women’s health and wellness? Mark your calendar: Our main event will be March 29, 2025!

Name: JMU Women in Business
Description: Our mission is to provide an open and encouraging environment for businesswomen.

Name: Più Siamo Più Contiamo
Description:
L'attuale Consiglio del Nostro Ordine è a fine mandato e dovrà essere rinnovato per il prossimo quadriennio.

Per questo motivo, Carlotta Penati - Ingegnere Edile e Consigliere uscente dell’Ordine degli Ingegneri della Provincia di Milano - insieme ad una squadra coordinata e multidisciplinare di colleghi, con cui condive la stessa visione dell’Ordine, sceglie di ricandidarsi.

Tra le principali motivazioni il desiderio che la cultura e la competenza dei circa 12.000 iscritti siano un patrimonio
irrinunciabile, riconosciuto e soprattutto utile per la comunità.

Altresì il desiderio di un Ordine con una visione verso il futuro della nostra professione e fondato su solide basi.

Con questi presupposti nasce il nome della squadra e del progetto: Più Siamo Più Contiamo, perché solo grazie alla partecipazione dei più, la figura dell’ingegnere in tutte le sue accezioni e specializzazioni, e più in generale dell’INGEGNERIA
MILANESE, potrà riposizionarsi al centro del dibattito territoriale e nazionale.

Visita il nostro sito: www.piusiamopiucontiamo.it

Scrivici qui: info@piusiamopiucontiamo.it

Name: XIII Congreso de la Federación Iberoamericana de Acústica
Description:
La Sociedad Chilena de Acústica tiene el agrado de presentar el XIII Congreso Iberoamericano de Acústica, de la Federación Iberoamericana de Acústica, a realizarse en la ciudad de Santiago de Chile durante los días 2 al 4 de diciembre del 2024.

El FIA2024 tiene como objetivo promover el intercambio de experiencias entre investigadores, profesores, estudiantes y profesionales de los países iberoamericanos que actúan en los diversos campos de la Acústica y Vibraciones.

En esta oportunidad, se han definido las siguientes áreas temáticas para la presentación de trabajos:
Acústica Arquitectónica y de la Edificación
Acústica Biomédica y Bioacústica
Acústica Computacional
Paisajes Sonoros y Ecoacústica
Educación en Acústica
Acústica Musical
Audio Profesional y Electroacústica
Ruido Ambiental, Industrial y Ocupacional
Acústica Física y Ultrasonidos
Acústica Psicológica y Fisiológica
Procesado de Señales en Acústica
Acústica Estructural y Vibraciones
Acústica Subacuática
Acústica Forense
 
Actualmente, se encuentra en progreso la recepción de resúmenes, cuya apertura se inició el día 1 de marzo de 2024, esperando un cierre de recepción para el día 15 de mayo de 2024:  https://lnkd.in/epg-ncg3

Junto con el congreso se desarrollarán diversos eventos paralelos y una exposición técnica con los últimos avances en cuanto a equipamientos y productos.

Interesados en auspiciar el evento, pueden escribir a: tesoreria@socha.cl

https://www.fia2024.cl/

#socha #acustica #fia2024 #chile

Description:

Name: Latina Boss Babes, Int.
Description: Latina Boss Babes is a dynamic professional network dedicated to empowering Latina-owned businesses. We are a vibrant community driven by a shared passion for growth and success.  We believe in the power of community that's why we create professional speed networking events crafted to forge meaningful connections and build one another, recognizing the profound strength in unity and mutual support. Beyond mere networking, we are a collective force propelling each member toward success. Our cause is a celebration of diversity, resilience, and the unbeatable spirit of Latina entrepreneurship. Join us in realizing the power of community and witness firsthand how, by supporting one another. Together, we rise, thrive, and empower each other on this remarkable journey.

Name: CLA East
Description: CLA East provides advice, services and rural representation for members in the counties of Bedfordshire, Cambridgeshire, Essex, Hertfordshire, Middlesex, Norfolk, Suffolk, Northamptonshire, Lincolnshire and Nottinghamshire.

Name: School Nutrition Association of Massachusetts
Description: The SNA of Massachusetts is a state affiliate of the School Nutrition Association. We bring information, services and continuing education to school food service professionals in Massachusetts.

Name: Radiation Protection and Shielding Division (ANS RPSD)
Description: The Radiation Protection and Shielding Division of the American Nuclear Society is concerned with radiation protection and shielding aspects of nuclear science and technology — including interaction of nuclear radiation with materials and biological systems, instruments and techniques for the measurement of nuclear radiation fields, and radiation shield design and evaluation.

Name: Malta Chamber of Psychologists
Description: Welcome to Malta Chamber of Psychologists (MCP). We strive to act as a professional body for the discipline of psychology in Malta and as a representative body for psychologists practising in Malta. We advance the practice of psychology in Malta making psychology accessible to all.

Name: Creighton Entrepreneurship Club
Description: At the Creighton Entrepreneurship Club, our mission is to foster a vibrant and inclusive community of aspiring entrepreneurs within the Creighton University family. We are a grassroots organization dedicated to connecting students with opportunities to learn, collaborate, and explore the dynamic world of entrepreneurship. Our goal is to empower every student to pursue their entrepreneurial dreams and actively engage in the Omaha startup scene in ways that resonate with their unique interests and passions.

Name: Africa Bangladesh Business Forum
Description:
The Africa Bangladesh Business Forum (ABBF) is a global trade platform connecting Bangladeshi exporters with Africa through trade shows, business summits, and membership programs.

Our flagship event — the Africa Bangladesh Trade Show & Business Summit — brings together exporters, importers, and investors from over 54 African nations to explore new opportunities.

ABBF is the official partner of KINGMANSA - the first B2B marketplace linking Africa and Bangladesh for seamless trade, payments, and logistics. ABBF members enjoy exclusive benefits, including networking access, B2B matchmaking, trade facilitation, and promotional support.

Join ABBF to expand your business reach across continents. Visit our website for membership and event details.

Name: Alchemy Family
Description: Alchemy Family is a private ‘member-by-application-only’ club for fund managers, HFT firms, algorithmic traders, and allocators in the cryptocurrency space. The club hosts highly curated events that bring together founders, C-level executives, and capital allocators from the industry. From 2-6 Nov 2024, Alchemy Family organizes a special four-day immersive retreat, Magnum Opus, designed for members to learn, share, and connect on a different level through a saturated and special four-day program at the event.

Description: The mission of the APhA Academy of Student Pharmacists (APhA-ASP) is to be the collective voice of student pharmacists, to provide opportunities for professional growth, to improve patient care, and to envision and advance the future of pharmacy.

Name: Zeenab Group
Description: Zeenab Foods is into food processing and agro-commodity trading for both domestic and international customers. The company was founded in September 2011 and commenced operations the same year. Since the commencement of production, our products have received a wide range of acceptance within Nigeria and beyond. Customers have come to appreciate the quality of our services, products and packaging.

Name: Neurodivergent SLT Network
Description: We support Neurodivergent Speech & Language Therapy Professionals in the UK and Ireland. Visit our link tree to contact, view resources, and join our peer support group.

Name: CAMACOL
Description:
La Cámara de Comercio Latina de Estados Unidos (CAMACOL) fue fundada en el año de 1965 para apoyar a los negocios latinos en los Estados Unidos. La CAMACOL tiene diversas herramientas para el apoyo de los empresarios y emprendedores que buscan hacer negocios en los Estados Unidos especialmente en el sur de la Florida. Los comités que integran CAMACOL son los entes ejecutores en apoyo a sus asociados.en sus respectivas categorías. 

Uno de estos comités es el de TURISMO. Creado en el 2023, tiene como objetivo el encargarse de desarrollar iniciativas y programas que fomenten el desarrollo y contribuyan en la promoción del sector turístico en los Estados Unidos de América, Latinoamérica y el resto del mundo.

PLAN EJECUTIVO ESTRATÉGICO
* Escuela de agentes de viaje
El comité brinda asesoría para que individuos y empresas puedan registrarse legalmente en la Florida para ejercer como agentes o Sellers of Travel. Asi mismo, da la formación técnica para tener las habilidades necesarias de operación, comercialización y administración de sus respectivos negocios.

*Mejora de la movilidad del turismo
Proponer y ejecutar sugerencias clave para turistas arribando al aeropuerto Internacional de Miami MIA para que puedan tener la información oportuna para movilizarse en el transporte público de la ciudad de manera efectiva y para la compra de servicios turísticos que beneficiarán a las empresas locales del sector.

* Turismo de negocios
Tener a disposición de individuos y empresas de Estados Unidos, Latinoamérica y del mundo entero la información y formación necesaria para iniciar negocios en el Sur de la Florida por medio de reuniones, incentivos, convenciones y exhibiciones (M.I.C.E por sus siglas en inglés) que atañen a sus ramas de negocios y al mismo tiempo beneficiando a los actores de turismo en la Florida. 

* Colaboración 
Buscar la interalación con otras cámaras, grupos y empresas 
para hacer alianzas en pro del plan ejecutivo del comité.

Name: ASA Biometrics Section
Description: The Biometrics Section is for ASA members with special interests in the development and application of biostatistical and biomathematical methods and the interpretation of quantitative data in the biological sciences, including agriculture, biology, health, medicine, and related fields. The Biometrics Section will represent these interests within the ASA and cooperate with outside groups, most notably the North American region of the International Biometric Society, the Statistics Section of the American Public Health Association, Society for Clinical Trials, and Section U of the American Association for the Advancement of Science, furthering common purposes.

Name: FETRAM MG - Federação das Empresas de Transporte de Passageiros de Minas Gerais
Description:
FETRAM-MG: Desde 1987, a Federação das Empresas de Transporte de Passageiros do Estado de Minas Gerais (FETRAM) é uma entidade sindical de grau superior, dedicada a representar sindicatos e empresas do setor de transporte de passageiros, especialmente em áreas não organizadas. Nosso papel é intermediar relações com os poderes públicos e outros segmentos da sociedade civil.

A FETRAM-MG é parceira ativa do SEST SENAT, apoiando ações, campanhas e eventos que visam melhorar as condições das estradas, promover a humanização do trânsito, proteger o meio ambiente e garantir uma melhor qualidade de vida para os trabalhadores do setor. Estamos comprometidos em fortalecer a segurança e o bem-estar de todos os envolvidos, incluindo trabalhadores, seus familiares e transportadores autônomos.

Nosso compromisso é com a excelência no atendimento e o desenvolvimento contínuo do setor de transporte de passageiros em Minas Gerais. 

Junte-se a nós nessa missão de construir um futuro melhor para todos!

Name: Inner Development - by Sara Øllgaard
Description:
Can we change the world by focusing on ourselves?
Yes! Lasting change doesn’t start with new strategies – it starts with people. Research and leading change theories point to the same fundamental truth: real, sustainable change begins from within.

The Inner Development Kit turns this insight into action. Inspired by the Inner Development Goals (IDG) framework and leading thinkers like Amy Edmondson, Otto Scharmer, and Peter Senge, this research-backed toolkit provides practical facilitation tools to help leaders, HR professionals, consultants, teachers and coaches create meaningful development processes.

Name: NEOhioCIO
Description:
NEOhioCIO is the preeminent executive peer leadership development organization of Northeast Ohio chief information officers. Our membership is comprised exclusively of CIOs (or equivalent executive roles) from public and private companies, government, education, healthcare and nonprofit organizations.

Our mission is to build a strong, professional community among Northeast Ohio's information technology leaders, by providing a forum to share ideas, best practices and experiences relevant to CIOs.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Northeast Ohio CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE CIO ORBIE AWARDS 
Established in 1998, the CIO of the Year ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. This annual event honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: International Association of ESD Professionals
Description:
The International Association of ESD Professionals provides a collaborative, unaffiliated industry support space in which Empowerment Self Defense certificate programs and ESD Professionals can collaborate in the growth of the industry. The Association provides Industry and Membership support, unaffiliated continuing education, and a Credentialing Program designed to increase public awareness and trust in Empowerment Self Defense as a key to global violence prevention.

We aim to increase public safety and trust in the Self Defense Industry by setting Empowerment Self Defense-based standards, continuing education, certification, practices, and industry collaboration. In this way, members of the public seeking Self Defense training can be confident in selecting certified, capable instructors that will provide effective, trauma-informed, safety education; individuals seeking to become Self Defense Instructors can find accredited certificate training programs; and organizations in need of Empowerment Self Defense services and instruction can be assured that they are hiring a trained professional.

We are a 501(c)(6) nonprofit, mutual benefit organization incorporated in Virginia. Unlike a 501(c)(3) organization, the Association does not engage in fundraising and instead must generate revenue. Membership dues may be tax deductible as business expenses and membership does not require participation in the credentialing program.

Name: Amarillo Chamber of Commerce
Description: The Amarillo Chamber of Commerce was established in 1926 to be the leader for the improvement of the economy of Amarillo. The Mission of the Amarillo Chamber of Commerce is to enhance business and industry growth while preserving a high quality of life. The Amarillo Chamber of Commerce works as an advocate for businesses in and around Amarillo. We hold monthly networking events and have opportunities for you to help grow your business. On behalf of our staff, Board of Directors, and the Amarillo business community, we want to thank you for your continued support of the Amarillo Chamber of Commerce. We look forward to serving you now and in the future. Please let us know what we can do to help your business.

Name: NPN
Description:
Mission
NPN is dedicated to empowering the South Sudanese communities in the United States and worldwide through entrepreneurship, business skills, and career development. NPN provides comprehensive training and resources to foster self-sufficiency and economic independence. Our mission extends beyond professional growth; we strive to cultivate an environment where cultural awareness is celebrated and social issues are addressed, nurturing a supportive community that uplifts every member. Through collaborative efforts and unwavering commitment, NPN aims to equip individuals with the tools they need to succeed, while advocating for the collective advancement of our people.

Vision
We envision building thriving and resilient communities. With a steadfast focus on improving economic independence and addressing social challenges, we aim to create a world where every member of our community achieves their full potential. NPN envisions a future where the South Sudanese community flourishes, empowered by education, entrepreneurship, and a strong sense of cultural identity. We aspire to be the cornerstone of progress, connecting individuals to opportunities, resources, and each other, to build a thriving and resilient community. With a steadfast focus on improving economic independence and addressing social challenges, we aim to create a world where every member of our community can achieve their full potential. Through our dedication to excellence, inclusivity, and service, we envision a brighter tomorrow, where the legacy of our heritage enriches the lives of generations to come.

Join us in changing lives around the world.

Name: Multimedia Wireless Networks (MWN) Group
Description:
Welcome to the Multimedia Wireless Networks (MWN) Lab at IIT Kanpur. Faculty and student members of MWN are involved in carrying out research on cutting edge technologies for Next Gen Wireless Networks, with a special emphasis on 5G and 6G. The aim of the lab is to develop robust techniques and transceiver architectures for reliable signal transmission and reception in mobile cellular and WiFi systems. The projects being carried out are focused on solving high impact challenging issues related to signal coding, communication and processing, and developing solutions that can be rapidly prototyped for baseband ASIC implementation in mobile wireless devices. The current focus areas of at MWN members are listed below.

Research Areas

5G and 6G Wireless Technologies
OTFS Modulation
Terahertz Systems
Visible Light Communication (VLC)
Intelligent Reflecting Surface (IRS) Technology
Massive MIMO Technology
mmWave MIMO Systems
Non-Orthogonal Multiple Access (NOMA)
Filter-Bank Multi-Carrier (FBMC)-MIMO
Optimization and Resource Allocation for 5G/ 6GS

Name: Georgia Southern Society Of Black Engineers (NSBE GSU)
Description:
We proudly represent the National Society of Black Engineers as the collegiate chapter at Georgia Southern University, an organization that has been a beacon of excellence since its establishment in 1992. Over the past three decades, our chapter has grown and evolved, emerging stronger and more vibrant than ever before. We are dedicated to fulfilling NSBE's mission: ‘to increase the number of culturally responsible Black engineers who excel academically, succeed professionally, and positively impact the community.’ Through a variety of events, programs, and initiatives, we serve both Georgia Southern and the Statesboro community while fostering a culture of innovation, diversity, and academic achievement.

Under the leadership of our President, Jaylen Monroe, this year we are focused on growing our chapter by spreading NSBE's mission and values across campus. The theme for our chapter for the 2025-2026 school year is S.C.A.L.E:

S – Strengthen Community

C – Create Opportunities

A – Aspire Boldly

L – Lead with Vision

E – Elevate Everyone

We are committed to continuing the legacy of developing exceptional leaders, and we strive to help you do the same. Together, we aim to empower and inspire the next generation of Black engineers. Feel free to contact us with any questions or to learn more about our organization!

Name: CASSA
Description:
Our Mission

The mission of the Cardiac Arrhythmia Society of Southern Africa, an organisation of physicians, scientists and allied professionals throughout the subcontinent dedicated to the study of management of cardiac arrhythmia, is to improve the care of patients by promoting research, education and training and providing leadership towards optimal healthcare policies and standards.

Name: Behavior Genetics Association (BGA)
Description:
Founded in 1970, the Behavior Genetics Association (BGA) is an international society. Behavior genetics has a strong tradition in twin and family study designs, and more recently gene-finding studies.

The purpose of the BGA is to promote the scientific study of the interrelationship of genetic mechanisms and behavior, both human and animal; to encourage and aid the education and training of research workers in the field of behavior genetics; and to aid in the dissemination and interpretation to the general public of knowledge concerning the interrelationship of genetics and behavior, and its implications for health and human development and education.

We welcome scientists who share our interest in the interrelationships between genes and traits/behavior, both in humans and non-human animals.

Name: OPTIKSCHWEIZ
Description:
Was mit der starken Vision des Schweizerischen Optikverbands im Jahr 1905 begann, ist heute das zentrale Netzwerk für Optometrie und Augenoptik in der Schweiz.

Mit Engagement und Fachkompetenz setzen wir uns für höchste Qualitätsstandards, eine zukunftsorientierte Ausbildung und die Stärkung unserer Branche ein – für klare Sicht und eine erfolgreiche Zukunft.

Name: IAFCI Connecticut Chapter
Description:
Thank you for visiting the IAFCI Connecticut Chapter. Our organization provides a platform that connects like-minded professionals in the financial and law enforcement sector who come together and share valuable information, resources, and techniques for detecting, investigating, and preventing a variety of financial crimes. The Chapter hosts local regional training & educational seminars throughout the year. These seminars feature industry experts as speakers, who share their knowledge and experience on a variety of topics including Anti-Money Laundering, Identity Scams, Cyber Fraud, Mortgage Fraud, Retail Fraud, Retail Bust Outs, Human Trafficking, and more.

Our members come from all levels of law enforcement, the payment card industry, financial institutions, the insurance industry, the car rental industry, e-commerce, airlines, telecommunications, the petroleum industry, etc. All entities involved in the security of financial transactions are involved in IAFCI's effort to safeguard the world's economy through teamwork.

Please consider applying for membership at: www.iafci.org to take advantage of all member benefits and resources.  Members can also pursue related professional certifications including Certified Financial Crimes Investigator (CFCI), Certified Cyber Crimes Investigator (CCCI), and other.

Name: ONE X LEAGUE, INC.
Description: ONE X LEAGUE is a private social network and professional league exclusively for Black and Afro-Latina women executives and founders. Our mission is to provide an exceptional space centered around the holistic needs of Black women and how they uniquely experience the world. It’s where they are safe, seen and celebrated, while immersing collectively in amazing curated Experiences spanning our seven verticals: Arts & Entertainment, Entrepreneurship, Leadership, Luxury Travel, Philanthropy, Wealth, and Wellness.

Name: SUPPERCLUB
Description: SUPPERCLUB curates exclusive, invite-only gatherings at luxury venues, uniting elite professionals to exchange ideas, foster partnerships, and shape the future—all free from intrusive sales pitches.

Name: People Brand Collective
Description: Launching in 2026 - The People Brand Collective is a professional association for the communicators, marketers, and strategists shaping how people connect with work. Our members span employer brand, recruitment marketing, employee communications, culture, and engagement functions — the storytellers and builders of modern employee experience.

Name: The Agency Side
Description: The Agency Side is the alternative to creative industry clubs and meetups. Through Invite only, this is an informal collective of peers, competitors, and idols getting together to support one another and strengthen the greater marketing community located north of Boston.

Name: TIC Perú
Description: Este consejo tiene como objetivo representar y defender los intereses del sector de evaluación de la conformidad en nuestro país, promoviendo el desarrollo de estándares y buenas prácticas en ensayos, inspecciones y certificaciones.

Name: UKSAFC
Description:
The UK Stop Ad Fraud Coalition (UKSAFC) is a group of advertising professionals, policymakers, technology providers, and agencies, committed to tackling ad fraud 
in the United Kingdom.

Name: CARBAO Chalons-En-Champagne
Description:
CARBAO, basé à Châlons-en-Champagne, est un club professionnel dynamique qui réunit entrepreneurs et professionnels de divers secteurs. Nous favorisons les échanges, les partenariats et les opportunités d'affaires grâce à un réseau riche et des événements réguliers. Nos valeurs incluent entraide, innovation, éthique et développement durable. Nos membres bénéficient d'un accompagnement personnalisé, d'une visibilité accrue et contribuent au dynamisme économique local. Rejoignez-nous pour développer votre carrière et votre réseau en Champagne !

#CARBAO #RéseauProfessionnel #ChâlonsEnChampagne #Entrepreneurs #DéveloppementDurable #Opportunités

Name: Cuenca Juniors
Description:
CUENCA JUNIORS.

Fundado en 2024 por cuatro amigos, Cuecna Jrs es mucho más que un equipo de fútbol. Es una plataforma que conecta, que inspira y que representa la esencia de un sueño colectivo. Nos esforzamos por ser una referencia de crecimiento, superación y pasión, dentro y fuera del campo. Nuestro compromiso es claro: ser un equipo de fútbol de calibre, pero también contribuir al desarrollo de nuestra comunidad, crear empleos y mostrar que Ecuador es un lugar lleno de esperanza, visión, y orgullo.

Name: Indonesia India Business Forum
Description:
IIBF has been initiated to enhance the interaction between Indonesian and Indian business community so that new business opportunities can be explored, initiated and actioned. These mainly are; 
• Startups and established businesses that want to venture into India and Indonesia. 
• Professionals from both nations who are interested in finding new business opportunities 

IIBF plans to hosts prominent Indonesian and Indian thought leaders, business leaders and arrange business networking events. 
The objectives are Information | Collaboration | Networking Rundown 
IIBF is supported by Indonesia Economic Forum, Indoindians, Infotech Solutions & Chairos International Ventures

Name: Lancer Business Organization
Description: Lancer Business Organization is a professional Student Organization within Pasadena City College, comprised of students who are interested in a career in accounting and other business fields. Our purpose is to provide an opportunity for students to become more familiar with and involved in the accounting and business world. At PCC, the Lancer Business Organization enjoys a unique advantage resulting from the special relationship Pasadena City College has with the accounting profession.

Name: VVGE
Description:
De VVGE is hét ontmoetingsforum voor artsen met wetenschappelijke en praktijkgerichte interesse in kwaliteitsvolle zorg voor patiënten met maag-, darm- en leveraandoeningen in Vlaanderen.
Om onze doelen te bereiken, gaan we gesprekken aan met professionals in de gezondheidszorg, met wetenschappers en met onze patiënten. We werken hiervoor ook nauw samen met politici en beleidsmakers. We investeren in educatie en trainingen voor de professionals in ons vakgebied om kwaliteitsvolle zorg te bereiken. De sociale samenhorigheid onder onze leden is in dit alles een versterkende factor.

Name: AAPI Chamber
Description:
A 501(c)6 nonprofit organization, the AAPI Chamber's vision is to foster a vibrant and interconnected network that embraces cultural diversity, promotes economic equity, and cultivates the current and next generation of AANHPI (Asian American and Native Hawaiian/Pacific Islander) leaders. Through collaboration, representation, advocacy, and impactful initiatives, we aim to shape a future where AANHPI businesses are recognized and celebrated for their contributions, achievements, and lasting impact on society.

The Chamber also has a 501(c)3 nonprofit called "AAPI Chamber Foundation" as an affiliate organization.

Name: S'expatrier Mode d'emploi
Description:
S’expatrier, mode d’emploi est le seul salon qui réunit les acteurs institutionnels majeurs de l’expatriation et de la mobilité internationale 

 Rendez-vous le 𝗺𝗲𝗿𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶 𝟮𝟲 𝗺𝗮𝗿𝘀 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟱
 𝘊𝑖𝘵𝑒́ 𝑖𝘯𝑡𝘦𝑟𝘯𝑎𝘵𝑖𝘰𝑛𝘢𝑙𝘦 𝘶𝑛𝘪𝑣𝘦𝑟𝘴𝑖𝘵𝑎𝘪𝑟𝘦 𝘥𝑒 𝑃𝘢𝑟𝘪𝑠

Pour réussir son expatriation, la préparation au départ est primordiale ! Impôts, retraite, démarches juridiques, protection sociale, l’assurance chômage, emploi, etc.).

Un rendez-vous annuel incontournable, gratuit sur inscription et ouvert à toutes et à tous organisé par l'ensemble des institutionnels français de la mobilité internationale:
- Le Ministère de l'Europe et des Affaires étrangères
- L'assurance retraite (Cnav)
- Le groupe Malakoff Humanis
- Le Centre des liaisons européennes et internationales de sécurité sociale (Cleiss)
- Les Notaires de France
- La Direction des Impôts des Non Résidents (DINR)

Name: Bari Innovation Talk
Description:
Nella prima edizione dell’evento Bari Innovation Talk abbiamo affrontato tutti gli aspetti principali della transizione digitale nel nostro Paese, nello specifico le tecniche e le soluzioni per la digitalizzazione delle PMI. Abbiamo assistito ad un confronto volto ad analizzare il tema sotto punti di vista differenti con l’obiettivo di sviluppare un laboratorio di idee. La transizione digitale è stata approfondita sotto l’aspetto tecnico, economico-finanziario, legale e pubblico grazie all’intervento di esperti del settore.
Rimani sintonizzato per seguire la prossima tappa!

Name: Women's Agricultural Leadership
Description: An agricultural leadership conference focused on the integral roles women play in agriculture. Organized by a broad coalition of women and organizations held in Minnesota each spring.

Name: womeninenergy.id
Description:
Women in Energy Indonesia (WOMENINENERGY.ID) is a community that aims to inspire  more Indonesian women to be impactful leaders in the energy and STEM sector and to empower them to break the invisible glass ceiling of leadership roles for women in the energy sector.
WOMENINENERGY.ID believes that comprehensive understanding and collaboration cross-area make the the best outcome of someone’s energy career by focusing its programs for 6 energy-related career areas, which are: Research and Development, Engineering, Corporation, Consultancy, Start-up, and Policy-making. It regularly conducts several classes, mentoring sessions, and workshops featuring various influential people in the energy sector.

Name: CapitalCISO
Description:
CapitalCISO is the preeminent peer leadership network of Capital Area chief information security officers. Our membership is comprised exclusively of CISOs (or equivalent executive roles) from public and private companies, government, education, healthcare and nonprofit organizations.

Our mission is to build a strong, professional community among Capital Area's information technology leaders, by providing a forum to share ideas, best practices and experiences relevant to CISOs.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Capital Area CISO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue. Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
Established in 1998, the ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. This annual event honors chief information security officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: Gargoyle Consulting Club
Description: The University of Chicago’s Gargoyle Consulting Club  (GCC) is a Recognized Student Organization for University of Chicago students and postdocs interested in transitioning to management consulting, with a focus on advanced degree candidates (PhDs, JDs, MDs, Master’s Students), while remaining open to undergraduate participation. We aim to inform, prepare, and assist our members as they explore consulting as a career path, and connect them both to one another and to the greater consulting community.

Name: Spijkerbroekengala
Description:
Het Spijkerbroekengala is een gezamenlijk initiatief van gedreven ondernemers, die zich ieder jaar belangeloos inzetten voor goede doelen die in het teken staan van:

“Het verschil kunnen maken voor een kind”

Onze missie is om ieder jaar voor verschillende goede doelen die ANBI gecertificeerd zijn en ook gelieerd zijn aan kinderdoelen een gala te organiseren waarvan de opbrengst geheel en volledig aan hen toekomt. Zo kunnen we voor veel kinderen in Nederland “het verschil maken”. Hetzij door middel van geld dat ter beschikking wordt gesteld aan onderzoek of geld dat gebruikt wordt voor praktische zaken waarmee kinderen die dat nodig hebben geholpen worden.

Name: Thenpandiyan Group of Companies
Description:
Thenpandiyan Group of Companies is a diversified conglomerate with over 35 years of legacy in delivering innovative, sustainable, and reliable solutions across multiple industries. Established in 1989, our vision is to empower communities and industries through excellence, integrity, and forward-thinking strategies.

We operate across multiple verticals:

- Thenpandiyan Transport: Efficient logistics and supply chain solutions

- Thenpandian Spinning Mills: Premium textile and yarn manufacturing

- Thenpandiyan lpg Import terminal: Safe and reliable energy distribution solutions

- Thenpandian Energy innovations: Sustainable and smart energy solutions

We are committed to innovation, sustainability, and community impact, driving growth and building lasting partnerships across industries.

Mission Statement:
To empower industries and communities through sustainable, innovative, and reliable solutions that create lasting value.

Vision Statement:
To be recognized as a leading diversified group known for excellence, integrity, and innovation across every business vertical.

Specialties:

1. Logistics & Supply Chain Solutions
2. Textile & Yarn Manufacturing
3. LPG Infrastructure & Energy Distribution
4. Sustainable Energy Innovations
5. Corporate Social Responsibility
6. Industrial Partnerships

Description: Established as the first geographic area of The Links, Incorporated, the Eastern Area has 5,000 dynamic women (representing 82 chapters) who provide exceptional service to their communities.

Name: National Organization for Business and Engineering: Illinois Chapter
Description:
NOBE is a national society uniting business, management, and engineering organizations from universities across the nation. NOBE Illinois is one such chapter located at the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign. 

At NOBE Illinois, our highest commitment is to our members. Our organization is focused on the growth and development of our member's technical and professional skills through hands-on experiences. We offer the ability to engage and explore subjects in 3 different project committees (Consulting, Technology, and Product Development) that each take on a unique client and project each semester. We also host events such as company-sponsored workshops/panels to create opportunities for our members to network and gain professional insight.

We bridge business and engineering at the intersection of professionalism.

Name: Blue Cranes Basketball Club
Description: Blue Cranes  is an academy and club which strives to educate and help teens and adults improve their game and takes them to new heights
Location: Cape town Southern Africa , Western Province

Name: Elbåtnettverket
Description:
Vi tror Norge kan bli sentrum for en ny utslippsfri båtindustri. 

Elbåtnettverket støttes av Innovasjon Norge og har som visjon å skape vekst for utslippsfritt båtliv. 

Medlemmene skal sammen jobbe for å utvikle nye arbeidsplasser, industriell vekst, grønn teknologi og eksport av produkter og tjenester til et europeisk båtmarked.

Name: Women In Business at Stony Brook University
Description: Women In Business at Stony Brook University is an organization that will empower and inspire future women business leaders. Our community will help educate, inform, and guide business students at Stony Brook University to help achieve all of their goals- both short-term and long-term. A business organization with just women is a safe place where female leaders can feel heard in their community. We hope to become a tight-knit group during our time at Stony Brook and long thereafter.

Name: Ethiopian Dermatology and Venereology Society
Description: Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of the Ethiopian Dermatology and Venereology Society (EDVS). We are dedicated to advancing the field of dermatology and venereology in Ethiopia through education, research, and collaboration.

Name: Colegio Oficial de Psicología de Andalucía Occidental
Description:
Somos una corporación de derecho público con personalidad jurídica propia, constituida bajo el objetivo de velar por la evidencia científica, la ética y la deontología en el ejercicio de la Psicología, representando y defendiendo los intereses de profesionales colegiados y colegiadas y de la ciudadanía en las provincias de Cádiz, Córdoba, Huelva y Sevilla. 

La Psicología tiene hoy un calado muy importante en la sociedad, caracterizado por ser una disciplina científica y una profesión que ofrece servicios y acciones presentes en todos los ámbitos y sectores de la sociedad. En las últimas décadas el desarrollo de la Psicología ha ido parejo al desarrollo de la Sociedad, pudiendo afirmarse que muchos de los avances y progresos sociales han sido consecuencias de la investigación y de la práctica de la Psicología.

Desde nuestro Colegio profesional nos gusta afirmar que “la Psicología está en todo, pero no todo es Psicología”, por lo que animamos a todas las personas que se acerquen a nuestra profesión buscando cualquier tipo de intervención desde la misma, que se apoyen en psicólogas y psicólogos colegiadas/os. 

Sólo un/a profesional colegiado/a de la Psicología representa preparación y habilitación para el ejercicio, previniéndose así la mala praxis de personas intrusas que no ofrecen servicios regulados ni acordes con la evidencia científica.

Name: NR-SIG-WFNR
Description:
The NR-SIG is for clinicians and researchers in a multitude of disciplines interested in the rehabilitation of people across the lifespan with cognitive, emotional, psychosocial and behavioural deficits caused by acquired brain injury or neurological disease (both progressive and non-progressive).

The main objectives of the NR-SIG are as follows: 
1. To encourage and support multidisciplinary clinical practice and research into the rehabilitation of people with cognitive, emotional, psychosocial and behavioural deficits caused by brain injury or neurological conditions (both progressive and non-progressive) across the lifespan. 

2. To improve the care of survivors of brain injury and their families through the translation of clinically relevant research. 

3. To support the future of neuropsychological rehabilitation throughout the world and to provide a forum of communication and ongoing education for those with an interest in the area.

Name: OGFS
Description: Willkommen bei der OGFS St.Gallen - Bildung die bewegt. Netzwerk – Austausch – Weiterbildung. Lassen Sie sich beraten.

Name: CIRIP Ghana
Description:
GARIA is an association of professionals with an interest in restructuring and insolvency formed on 8th August 2006 to play a leadership role in corporate restructuring, business recovery and insolvency in Ghana. 

It is incorporated as a company limited by guarantee under the Companies  Act 1963 (Act 179) and currently a professional body under the Professional Bodies Registration Decree, 1973 (NRCD143) – July 2019.

GARIA is accredited by the Bank of Ghana to offer Corporate Governance Training to banks.

Our Core Mandate 
•	To advocate for Economic Growth and Development 
•	To promote and play a thought leadership role in connection with and in relation to business turnarounds and insolvencies;
•	To encourage restructuring of distressed entities including state-owned enterprises and other business establishments; 
•	To promote law reforms in effective business recovery measures and insolvency; 
•	To provide a forum for practitioners engaged in business recovery and insolvency practice; 
•	To promote international cooperation with respect to insolvency or business recovery and related cross border matters.



VISION
“To be the professional body leading restructuring and insolvency matters in Ghana by 2021”



MISSION
GARIA exists to set standards, preserve, restore and enhance economic value and capacity of professionals engaged in the business of restructuring and insolvency in Ghana 

CORE VALUES
•	Excellence: We succeed because our members demonstrate higher level of excellence.
•	Fairness: Our autonomy requires members to be treated fairly and equally
•	Integrity: We believe that in all our dealings with stakeholders, honesty and transparency must prevail at all times.
•	Professionalism: The competency and duties of our members speak for itself; we meet international best practices

Name: Panama Young Arbitrators
Description:
Panama Young Arbitrators (PANYARB) es una plataforma de interacción social y académica para profesionales jóvenes interesados en el arbitraje. 

Buscamos promover la práctica del arbitraje ejecutando programas y proyectos con impacto nacional e internacional.

Name: FEDBET - Federația Organizatorilor de Jocuri de Noroc
Description:
FEDBET – Federația Organizatorilor de Jocuri de Noroc din România este o organizație independentă, apolitică, nonprofit și neguvernamentală care și-a asumat rolul de reprezentare a industriei de jocuri de noroc în relația cu autoritățile naționale și europene și de colaborare cu acestea și cu alte instituții sau entități care influențează domeniul jocurilor de noroc.

Reunim sub egida noastră cei mai proeminenți operatori de jocuri de noroc tradiționale, pariuri și jocuri de noroc la distanță licențiați și autorizați de Oficiul Național pentru Jocuri de Noroc din România, membri în cadrul asociațiilor reprezentative ROMANIAN BOOKMAKERS, ROMSLOT și ROMBET, garantând astfel că interesele industriei sunt reprezentate într-o manieră coezivă și eficientă.

Name: Employers Federation of Papua New Guinea
Description:
EFPNG is an independent peak Employer Organization that provides advocacy and advisory services on Labour and Industrial Relations in Papua New Guinea, protecting the interest of its members.

Registered as an Industrial Organization on 27th August 1963, EFPNG is a key stakeholder in PNG’s tripartite labour and industrial relations policy and decision-making process.

Name: Congrès des Chefs d’Entreprise du Congo (CCEC)
ANZGG
Description:
The Australian and New Zealand Geomorphology Group (ANZGG) is an informal body established primarily to organise conferences on geomorphic themes for the benefit of the community of geomorphologists in Australia and New Zealand.


The ANZGG has organised 17 highly successful conferences since the first at Robertson NSW in 1982. The conferences are held every 1-2 years in small towns or unique locations across rural/regional Australia and New Zealand. They are well attended by geomorphologists from across globe, and others with an interest in landscapes, soils and the biophysical environment. The meetings are always characterised by wide-ranging presentations, and a relaxed and friendly atmosphere. A conference dinner featuring an entertaining address by a member of the geomorphic fraternity has become a much-enjoyed feature of the conferences. Conference locations are always selected with a view to providing interesting field trips in association with the meeting.

Name: BDK - Bund Deutscher Kriminalbeamter
Description:
BDK - Bund Deutscher Kriminalbeamter e.V.

13187 Berlin

Name: IEEE Women in Engineering Bangalore Affinity Group
Description: IEEE WIE Bangalore is an affinity group of IEEE Bangalore Section. WIE was created to support women engineers, scientists, Community of professionals, academicians, and student. We empower our members to network and build their skills and careers. With over 3000 members, we are one of the largest WIE Affinity Groups across the globe. You can find out more about us and our activities on https://wie.ieeebangalore.org/

Name: Confagricoltura Veneto
Description:
Confagricoltura è l’organizzazione di rappresentanza e tutela dell’impresa agricola italiana che riconosce nell’imprenditore agricolo il protagonista della produzione e persegue lo sviluppo economico, tecnologico e sociale dell’agricoltura e delle imprese agricole.
Confagricoltura Veneto associa circa il 45% della Superficie Agricola Utilizzata e la gran parte dei datori di lavoro agricoli della regione Veneto, presentandosi così come l’Associazione agricola più rappresentativa sotto il profilo economico e imprenditoriale.
E’ presente diffusamente su tutto il territorio con una sede regionale, sette provinciali e una settantina locali.

Name: Conselho Regional de Nutrição da 1ª Região
Description:
Cabe ao Conselho, além de defender a sociedade, impedir que ocorra o exercício ilegal da profissão, tanto por aquele que possua habilitação, mas não segue a conduta estabelecida, tanto para o leigo que exerce alguma profissão cujo exercício dependa de habilitação.

O Conselho Regional de Nutricionistas – 1ª Região (CRN/1), foi criado pela Lei Federal nº 6.583, de 20 de outubro de 1978, regulamentada pelo Decreto nº 84.444, de 30 de janeiro de 1980, com a finalidade de orientar, disciplinar e fiscalizar o exercício da profissão de nutricionista. Disciplinando e fiscalizando, não só sob o aspecto normativo, mas também punitivo, o exercício das profissões do Nutricionista e do Técnico em Nutrição e Dietética, zelando pela ética no exercício destas.

Name: Kinderärzte Schweiz
Description:
As a professional association, Kinderärzte Schweiz represents the interests of primary care specialists in pediatric and adolescent medicine in Switzerland. 
We advocate for optimal framework conditions for the comprehensive care of children and adolescents within and around the pediatric practice. 

- We represent professional policy interests of primary care pediatricians in Switzerland.
- We promote practice-specific further and advanced education and training in the field of pediatric and adolescent Medicine. 
- We promote cooperation with therapists, educators, institutions and authorities. 
- We engage in active public relations work.

Kinderärzte Schweiz is committed to the nationwide continuation of high-quality pediatric and adolescent primary care Medicine in Switzerland.

Name: Česká komora zeměměřičů
Description: ČKZ je samosprávná stavovská organizace autorizovaných zeměměřických inženýrů.

Name: Club RSE
Description:
Le Club RSE est une association de professionnels engagés dans la Responsabilité Sociétale des Entreprises à Madagascar.

Notre mission : promouvoir la RSE à travers la formation, le partage de pratiques, et la collaboration entre acteurs issus de différents secteurs.

Le Club vise à :
- Fédérer une communauté de praticiens et d’experts de la RSE,
- Valoriser et faire reconnaître les métiers liés à la RSE,
- Contribuer activement aux enjeux sociaux, environnementaux et économiques du pays.

Nous croyons en une RSE crédible, inclusive et adaptée aux réalités malgaches.

Name: ESTATE PLANNING COUNCIL OF SAN DIEGO
Description:
Who We Are:

Since its inception in 1955, the Council's primary objective has been to provide a better understanding of the services performed by attorneys, certifiied public accountants, financial planners, life insurance agents, appraisers trust officers, private professional fiduciaries, planned giving professionals, realtors, caregiving agencies and others substantially involved in estate planning and to promote cooperation among them.

What We Do:

The Estate Planning Council of San Diego holds monthly meetings that provide a medium for discussion of various, up-to-date estate planning topics of common interest.

In addition to the excellent educational information and technical content, our meetings afford our members the opportunity to network, meet old friends and make new ones within the San Diego professional community.

 The Council welcomes prospective new members and guests to attend our regular monthly meetings.

Why Join:

The Estate Planning Council offers its members the opportunity to meet and develop relationships with other professionals in the estate planning field and other experts in related disciplines.

Access to expert speakers in the estate planning field and continuing education credit if approved.

Sponsorship opportunities for members which provide high level of exposure for them and their firms.

Members get to participate in fun and interesting social events at different venues in the San Diego area.

Council members have access to the resources of the National Association of 

Estate Planners and Councils (NAEPC) including the ability to earn the Accredited Estate Planner AEP designation.

Inclusion in our annual membership directory.

Join Today: https://www.epcsd.org/members/application

Name: University of Alberta Canadian Geotechnical Society Student Chapter (UACGS)
Description: The primary motivation of our team is to further educate undergraduate students about the professions of geotechnical engineering and geosciences and help improve awareness and understanding of what the industry can offer them. Our purpose is to bridge the gap that exists between students, the industry, and the local CGS section to promote industry growth through networking opportunities.  Our vision is for a strong and sustained network of current and future geotechnical engineers, of which the UofA Student Chapter is an active part.

Name: Blount County Young Professionals
Description:
We attract and retain young, diverse talent by providing inclusive and meaningful opportunities for career development and community engagement through service, connection, mentorship. Blount County Young Professionals invites individuals ages 21-40 who work, live, or play in Blount County to join. 

A Blount County Chamber of Commerce membership is not required to participate.

Name: AI Africana Enterprise
Description:
AI African Enterprise & Africana Enterprise  is based in the vicinity of Silicon Valley within the Bay Area of San Francisco, California, USA.

AI African Enterprise & Africana Enterprise   is one of the best Hubs that produces and offers strategically analyzed articles, relevant news, operational inputs, and advice with a sense of authenticity presenting and defining their impact on the relationship between nations and businesses.

AI African Enterprise & Africana Enterprise content is driven by the mission of sharing knowledge and know-how through case studies, project plans, and events that are built to convey and enable access to Business Intelligence and Adaptable Solutions with Innovative Insights that facilitate the decision-making process and the validation of the entrepreneurial projects in Africa Atlantic Facade.

Our articles and study cases are written in English and Français, providing guidance, knowledge, and awareness of the role of artificial intelligence, technology and strategies as instruments and resources to stimulate the growth and success of entrepreneurial projects in Africa.

Africa Enterprise's focus is on sectors of the artificial intelligence, economy, finance, technology, and re·new·a·ble energy.

Dr. Said El Mansour Cherkaoui is the Executive Editor and Founder of AI African Enterprise & Africana Enterprise and his contact email is: saidcherkaoui@africanaenterprise.com

Name: BNI Élégance
Description:
Notre mission :
Aider les entrepreneurs et professions libérales à développer leurs ventes grâce à notre approche structurée, positive et incitative du marketing de recommandation.

 Notre philosophie « Qui Donne Reçoit » :
C’est l’état d’esprit que partagent les Membres BNI. Celui qui donne des recommandations en reçoit lui-même. C’est parce que tout le monde donne que tout le monde reçoit. C’est cette philosophie qui apporte de la cohésion au Groupe, constitue un véritable moteur et implique un mode de fonctionnement basé sur la solidarité, la confiance et l’entraide.

 Un accompagnement régulier :
BNI fédère 325 800 Membres à travers le monde, 18 000 en France et Belgique francophone, autour d’une méthode commune basée sur le marketing de recommandation. Son équipe de professionnels accompagne, forme et encadre les Groupes BNI pour assurer la réussite de tous les Membres.

Nous changeons la manière dont le monde fait des affaires

Name: FRSEA AURA
Description: La FRSEA Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes est un syndicat agricole professionnel régional au service d’un réseau départemental de 11 Fédérations, fortes de plus de 20 000 adhérents et de plus de 100 collaborateurs, faisant partie du réseau FNSEA.

Name: The Franco-American Cultural Fund
Description:
Fondé en 1996, le Fonds Culturel Franco-Américain est un partenariat unique entre la Directors Guild of America (DGA), la Motion Picture Association (MPA), la Société des Auteurs Compositeurs et Editeurs de Musique (Sacem) et la Writers Guild of America West (WGAW). Sa présidente est Cécile Rap-Veber, Directrice générale-Gérante de la Sacem et son président d’honneur, Costa Gavras.
Financé par les ressources de la copie privée en France, le Fonds s’investit depuis plus de 25 ans pour développer les liens culturels entre la France et les Etats-Unis. Une collaboration unique, riche, autant humaine que professionnelle, qui stimule le dialogue entre les créateurs et les industries des deux pays. Depuis 1997, le fonds organise The American French Film Festival (ex COLCOA) à Los Angeles, festival qui met en avant le meilleur de la diversité du cinéma et de l’audiovisuel français en plein cœur d’Hollywood.

Founded in 1996, the Fonds Culturel Franco-Américain is a unique partnership between the Directors Guild of America (DGA), the Motion Picture Association (MPA), the Société des Auteurs Compositeurs et Editeurs de Musique (Sacem) and the Writers Guild of America West (WGAW). Its president is Cécile Rap-Veber, Managing Director of Sacem, and its honorary president, Costa Gavras.
Financed by resources from private copying in France, the Fund has been working for over 25 years to develop cultural links between France and the United States. A unique, rich collaboration, as human as it is professional, which stimulates dialogue between creators and industries in both countries. Since 1997, the Fonds has organized The American French Film Festival (formerly COLCOA) in Los Angeles, a festival that showcases the best of French film and audiovisual diversity in the heart of Hollywood.

Name: Intilakat Draa-Tafilalet انطلاقة درعة تافيلالت
Description: Le programme « Intilakat Draa-Tafilalet » vise à accompagner 300 jeunes entrepreneurs ou porteurs de projet au niveau des provinces et préfecture de la région de Draa Tafilalet, il permet de bénéficier d’une formation, d’un accompagnement et de faciliter l’accès au financement.

Name: Het Goede Midden
Description:
Wij zijn een organisatieadviesbureau, waarbij de zoektocht naar Het Goede Midden centraal staat.
Dit doen we door het begeleiden van verander- en ontwikkelprocessen binnen teams en organisaties waar (complexe) ontwikkelprocessen moeizaam verlopen en waarbij het onduidelijk is hoe  een team of  organisatie hier een andere beweging in kan maken.

Name: World Society for Pediatric and Congenital Heart Surgery
Description: Promoting the highest quality comprehensive cardiac care to all patients with congenital heart disease, from the fetus to the adult, regardless of the patient’s economic means, with an emphasis on excellence in teaching, research and community service.

Name: Women In Crime
Description:
Women in Crime (WIC) is an association designed to connect, educate and support female lawyers practising in criminal law. We aim to ensure the longevity and prosperity of female practitioners.

WIC was established to promote our women, create exclusive networking opportunities and target specific concerns facing our area of law. Through our regular networking events and free educational seminars we are able to bond as a community and inspire each other. These collective learning opportunities enable lawyers to achieve professional goals, encourage each other and creatively deal with issues such as vicarious trauma, stress and burn-out. The benefits of our social events are widely appreciated by our members and are well attended. Our local and regional breakfast club events promote informal discussion and sharing of ideas with lawyers and Judicial members over coffee.

Our annual mentoring program directly connects our lawyers with senior solicitors, barristers and judicial staff and instils confidence and drive in our mentees. We welcome members to subscribe at no charge through our website and follow us on Instagram and LinkedIn. By subscribing you will receive update emails about our events and information on how you can be involved in our mentoring program. There are also helpful resources for lawyers in our resources tab. While our association and mentoring program is for women, our events are open to all criminal lawyers and we are based in Melbourne, Australia.

Established in 2014, we draw upon the wealth and experience of senior members of the profession and judiciary. Each year we are honoured with a Patron, Magistrate or Judge who brings with them their unique knowledge and connections that are used to further promote our cause. The 2023 Patron is Her Honour Judge Ellis of the County Court of Victoria.

The 2023 committee consists of Peta Smith, Erin Finnigan, Vivienne Jones, Rebecca Glew, Georgia Suhren, Claudia Flocke and Khushi Malhotra.

Name: Comité Régional de la Conchyliculture des Pays de la Loire
Description:
Le Comité Régional de la Conchyliculture des Pays de la Loire défend et sert les intérêts des conchyliculteurs, du Sud de la Loire à la Baie de l’Aiguillon. 
Enjeux Sanitaires et Zoosanitaires, Aide à l’installation, Communication, Qualité de l’eau, Préservation des espaces conchylicoles à terre et en mer, Projets innovants : autant de sujets sur lesquels nous travaillons au quotidien.

Name: DRCT - Regieverband für Werbefilm & Branded Content in Deutschland
Description:
DRCT ist ein Regieverband zur Vertretung der beruflichen Interessen der Regisseur*innen für Werbefilm und Branded Content in Deutschland.

DRCT tritt als dauerhafte gemeinsame Stimme für alle Regisseurinnen und Regisseure in der Branche an. 

DRCT stärkt und schützt unsere professionellen Anliegen, ermöglicht den Austausch unter unseren Mitgliedern und setzt sich für Solidarität und Chancengleichheit in unserer Branche ein.

Gegenseitiges Vertrauen und Respekt sind die Basis für eine gute und kreative Zusammenarbeit. Unser Anliegen ist es deshalb, grundlegende Werte und Regeln rundum den Pitch-Prozess für Filme im Bereich Werbung und Branded Content zu etablieren.

Wir sind 2021 mit der DRCT Pitch-Reform angetreten, um einen neuen Standard zu setzen. Viele unserer Werte und Ziele haben wir im Schulterschluss mit der Produzentenallianz tatsächlich im PITCH STANDARD 2.0 umgesetzt, welcher seit 01/2024 offiziell auf dem deutschen Markt gilt. Mehr Details auf unserer Website.

Zu den Unterstützern von DRCT gehören neben der Produzentenallianz alle großen Regie-Agenturen in Deutschland.

Name: Schweizerische Gesellschaft für Parodontologie
Description: Wir engagieren uns für die parodontale Gesundheit – weil gesundes Zahnfleisch Lebensqualität ist.

Name: La Bulle Angevine
Description:
La Bulle Angevine est un réseau professionnel local dédié aux acteurs du bâtiment, du BTP, de l’immobilier, de l’industrie et des secteurs connexes.
Notre mission :
Créer des liens solides entre les professionnels de ces univers exigeants, favoriser les synergies locales et rompre l’isolement entrepreneurial.

Nos formats :
Afterworks conviviaux pour élargir votre réseau dans une ambiance détendue
Petits-déjeuners thématiques pour des échanges de fond entre pairs
Rencontres ciblées pour connecter les bonnes compétences aux bons projets

Que vous soyez artisan, maître d’œuvre, promoteur, gestionnaire de biens, industriel ou prestataire de services spécialisés, La Bulle Angevine est votre terrain d’échanges et d’opportunités.

Un réseau à taille humaine, ancré à Angers, où les rencontres ouvrent la voie à des collaborations durables et porteuses de sens.

La Bulle Angevine — Le réseau qui fait respirer vos projets.

Name: National Federation of the Reinsurance Companies - FENABER
Description: Organized on 05th July 2007, FENABER, a not-for-profit civil association, congregates and represents the reinsurance companies operating in Brazil. With its registered office located in the city of Rio de Janeiro, the association covers the whole Country and is specifically aimed at materializing the political and institutional interests of its associates, which it legally represents before the Public Administration, as well as before any representative Entity of the Insurance Market and Civil Society.

Name: OWN Indiana
Description:
OWN Indiana is an operator-first network for people building, running, and acquiring small and medium-sized businesses across Indiana. We are intentionally focused on owner-led SMBs and the operator-led end of the lower middle market.

This is a curated, practical community for people who carry real responsibility for results. Sometimes the owner is the operator. Sometimes it is a partnership. Either way, OWN Indiana is built for those who lead teams, serve customers, manage cash flow, and make real decisions every day.

We care about durable businesses, good jobs, and long-term ownership in the communities we operate in. We believe strong owner-led companies strengthen Indiana communities through stable employment, committed leadership, and lasting impact.

What we do
  - Small dinners, happy hours, and operator roundtables
  - Shop visits and behind-the-scenes tours with Indiana business owners
  - Practical playbooks and workshops on buying, building, and operating businesses
  - Trusted connections for deal flow, hiring, capital partners, and operating support

Who belongs
  - Founders and builders actively launching or scaling a business in Indiana
  - Owner-operators and founder-owners running day-to-day operations
  - Full-time search and acquisition entrepreneurs acquiring businesses they plan to operate
  - Investor-operators (holdcos, family offices) deploying long-term capital and supporting operators
  - People committed to building companies that strengthen the communities they serve

Our differentiation
  - Operator-first
  - Curated community
  - Focused on Main Street and the operator-led lower middle market

Name: Rechtsanwalts- und Notarverein Hannover e.V.
Description: Der Rechtsanwalts- und Notarverein Hannover e.V. dient der Pflege der Kollegialität und der Wahrung beruflicher Interessen der Rechtsanwälte und Anwaltsnotare. Der Verein verfügt über mehr als 1.000 Mitglieder, er ist parteipolitisch und konfessionell neutral. Der Rechtsanwalts- und Notarverein Hannover ist Mitglied des Deutschen Anwaltsvereins.

Name: Smart Cities Council - UK & Ireland
Description:
Smart Cities Council, is the largest global member organisation championing the use of science, data, technology, and engineering to enable a safer, more activated, beautiful, sustainable world now for the future.
 
For 10 years, the Smart Cities Council has been a trusted, neutral, global advisor for people, places and projects. 
 
Join us as we work locally and globally to outline opportunities to take action and drive impact because smart isn’t just for cities, it’s for everyone.

Name: UKConsulting

Independent from Certification Bodies, UKConsulting facilitates communication between Management Consultants, Certification Bodies, Accreditation Bodies and other Interested Parties. As well as promoting and facilitating the sharing of best practices and collaboration between member Management Consultants.

Name: ReAGJIR
Description:
ReAGJIR est le Regroupement Autonome des Généralistes Jeunes Installés et Remplaçants en France. Créé en janvier 2008, ce syndicat regroupe et représente les médecins généralistes remplaçants, installés depuis moins de 5 ans (libéraux ou salariés) et les jeunes universitaires de médecine générale (chefs de clinique, maîtres de stage des universités, enseignants de médecine générale).

Fédération de syndicats régionaux, la structure accompagne et défend l’exercice du métier par ces trois types de professionnels et milite pour la construction d’un système de santé à l’image des jeunes généralistes : innovant, collaboratif, humain et solidaire.

Name: Supply Chain and Operations Excellence Club (SCOPE)
Description: The Society of Supply Chain and Operations Excellence (SCOPE) aims to be a primary resource for the educational and professional development of all students at USC interested in Global Supply Chain and Operations Management by providing a platform to gain a broader understanding of supply chain trends and current issues, creating career opportunities, and increasing USC's visibility in the professional supply chain and operations management community.

Name: Koa Counsel
Description: Koa Counsel empowers women in law to lead boldly, grow confidently, and thrive personally and professionally. Our members connect with mentors, peers, and opportunities that advance careers, strengthen leadership, and support overall well-being. Through dynamic programs, meaningful discussions, and inspiring experiences, Koa Counsel provides the tools and community women need to excel. Join us to learn, collaborate, and rise together—because when women in law thrive, the entire profession moves forward.

Description: As Atlanta’s largest product community, ProductATL helps grow the careers of product professionals and leaders in Atlanta, and is committed to building the future of Product we want to see.

Name: Association Fribourg Bike Friendly
Description:
L'association Fribourg Bike Friendly a pour but de rassembler toutes les parties prenantes qui, de près ou de loin, encouragent ou souhaitent encourager la pratique du vélo et du VTT – de quelque manière que ce soit – sur le sol fribourgeois. L’idée finale est de proposer une offre complète, attractive et digitalisée à tous les amateurs et à toutes les amatrices de 2 roues, tout en visibilisant les parties prenantes.

Pour fédérer un maximum autour du vélo et de son développement, l’association propose trois catégories de membres, avec des cotisations adaptées :
- membres prestataires et institutions
- membres associations et clubs
- membres individuels ou donateurs/donatrices

L’association offre un accompagnement à tous ses membres pour les guider dans leur développement de prestations « Bike Friendly ». Un guide pratique avec des conseils avisés a été créé dans le but de bien faciliter le mouvement d’ouverture vers le cyclotourisme par les prestataires qui restent les principaux acteurs du changement.

Grâce à un soutien de la NPR (Nouvelle Politique Régionale), un catalogue de prestations, à des tarifs avantageux, est à disposition des membres de l’association Fribourg Bike Friendly. Bornes de recharge, stations de nettoyage pour vélo, kits de réparation, passages de clôture et supports à vélos, le catalogue rassemble tout ce qui est nécessaire pour améliorer l’accueil des cyclistes sur le terrain et auprès des prestataires.

Name: EvalYouth España
Description:
@EvalYouthEspaña es una apuesta colectiva de evaluadoras y evaluadores jóvenes y emergentes vinculados/as al espacio Ibérico, que con el apoyo de la Asociación Ibérica de Profesionales por la Evaluación - APROEVAL y en alianza con EvalPartners, a través de la Red Global de Evaluadores Jóvenes y Emergentes EvalYouth, surge con la intención de generar la inclusión de evaluadores/as jóvenes y emergentes provenientes de diversas disciplinas en procesos evaluativos que impulsen la profesionalización de la evaluación y el trabajo en red dentro y fuera de España.

Quienes impulsamos el lanzamiento oficial de EvalYouth España hemos pasado por una especialización en evaluación, a través del Programa del Máster de Evaluación de Programas y Políticas Públicas de la Universidad Complutense de Madrid que este año cumple 20 años de creación. Sin embargo, EvalYouth España es un espacio que acoge a todas y todos aquellos evaluadores/as jóvenes y emergentes que estén vinculados/as al espacio ibérico sin distinción, que permita “no dejar a nadie atrás” en el campo de la evaluación.

Name: Hong Kong Designers Association
Description:
The Hong Kong Designers Association was founded in 1972. The Association is the first of its kind in Hong Kong, and is a design body to advocate public interest in design and higher professional status for practising designers in government, cultural, entertainment, commercial and industrial sectors, for full-time, part-time teachers and administrators on the academic side of designing.

 

As of 2020, HKDA has more than one thousand registered members, covering six main design categories, includes Graphics, Spatial, Product, Education, Digital Media and Fashion.

Name: EIT Community Hub Greece
Description:
The EIT Community Hub acts as a one-stop shop that gathers all EIT Knowledge and Innovation Communities (KICs) in Greece and supports and identifies synergies between the EIT Community and local actors. The hub reinforces local entrepreneurship and builds bridges between local and EU innovation networks.
The EIT strengthens Europe’s ability to innovate by powering solutions to pressing global challenges and by nurturing entrepreneurial talent to create sustainable growth and skilled jobs in Europe. The EIT is an EU body and an integral part of Horizon Europe, the EU Framework Programme for Research and Innovation.
The EIT Community Hub is funded by the EIT, a body of the European Union.

Name: WTS Michigan
Description: The Michigan Chapter is a dynamic and interdisciplinary group of professionals committed to transforming the transportation industry through the advancement of women. We pride ourselves on providing high‐quality programs and networking and leadership opportunities. In addition, our local chapter offers one of the strongest WTS scholarship and mentoring programs in the country. We actively support our future colleagues and introduce students to a broad variety of transportation‐related careers.
