Name: BVPA - Bundesverband Professioneller Bildanbieter e.V.
Description: Der BVPA wurde 1970 in Berlin als Interessenvertretung für deutsche Pressebild-Agenturen und Bildarchive gegründet. Heute ist der BVPA führende Instanz in Deutschland und dem europäischen Raum für alle Fragen rund um visuelle Inhalte und vertritt kleine und große Bildagenturen und Bildanbieter in ganz Europa. Der Verband repräsentiert außerdem die Interessen von Unternehmen, die bildagenturnahe Services anbieten, z.B. technische und juristische Dienstleistungen wie Keywording, Rechteverfolgung und Vertrieb. Derzeit hat der BVPA über 80 Mitglieder.

Name: Organization of Women Leaders Hawaii
Description: Our mission is to establish a network of contacts between the public and private sectors; to establish a professional and interpersonal support system for women professionals; to offer informational opportunities for women in management; to provide career-related ideas and information; and to share job and career advancement opportunities.

Name: Ontario Professional Hairstylist Association
Description:
OPHA is an industry driven body that is passionate about maintaining the integrity of the Ontario hairstylist trade.

OPHA is for licensed hairstylists and registered apprentices.

Name: Konferenz der Betreibungs- und Konkursbeamten der Schweiz
Description:
Als Dachorganisation der Betreibungs- und Konkursämter der Schweiz  sind wir an einer möglichst einheitlichen Amtsführung bei den Betreibungs- und Konkursämter interessiert  Wir bringen uns aktiv ein zu Entwürfen und Vorlagen über Gesetzesänderungen, Verordnungen etc. und fördern die berufliche Aus- und Weiterbildung in allen Teilen der Schweiz.
Als Herausgeberin der über 80jährigen Fachzeitschrift "Blätter SchK" sind wir nahe am Geschehen und dafür besorgt, dass interessante Entscheide aus unserem Berufsalltag publiziert werden.

Name: PÉV'Elles entrepreneures
Description:
L’idée du collectif PÉV’Elles est de rassembler des entrepreneures, habitant ou exerçant sur la Pévèle Carembault, partageant des valeurs fortes et souhaitant échanger et s’entraider. 

Ensemble, nous souhaitons :
- grandir et fortifier notre posture d’entrepreneure. 
- apprendre de soi, des autres et s’apporter mutuellement écoute, échange et solidarité. 
- contribuer au rayonnement et au développement de notre territoire.

Name: PeackHold
Description: Empowering Your Business with Cutting-Edge Technology and Creative Media Solutions.

Name: OLYMPIADES INTER-CABINETS D’AUDIT ET DE CONSEIL (OICAC)
Description: Le projet des Olympiades Inter-Cabinets d’Audit et Conseil (OICAC) qui sera à sa première édition, est une initiative à but non lucratif destinée uniquement aux cabinets d’audit et de conseil du Bénin, s’articulant principalement autour de compétitions sportives.

Name: Join The Climb
Description: The Climb is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization committed to the professional and economic advancement of women of color through fostering community, mentorship programming and professional development training.

Name: Black Sports Professionals: Phoenix Chapter
Description:
The mission of the National Society of Black Sports Professionals Phoenix is to Connect, Empower, and Advance Black Sports Professionals representing all aspects of the sports industry and sports-related fields in the state of Arizona.

Join BSP Phoenix today: https://bspphx.org/

Name: Boogie
Description:
Boogie, c’est un lieu de travail un peu différent, dans une maison remplie d’histoire et de bonnes énergies, où on parle (et on fait) beaucoup de vélo, mais pas que ;-). Coopération, inclusion, santé, transition écologique sont d’autres termes qui nous unissent et pour lesquels on œuvre au quotidien. Au Boogie, on souhaite que travail, solidarité et convivialité soient liés.
Boogie a été créé en octobre 2021 par Praxie Design.

Name: Power Professionals
Description: Power Professionals is an independent professional network and publication dedicated to providing businesses and consumers with access to top industry professionals.  We are an invitation-only platform. The Power Professionals listed in our site have been independently, and unilaterally, selected by our staff and selection committee.  An award of the "Power Professional(s)" title does not denote participation or membership in our organization. Individuals cannot pay to be included in the Power Professionals database.

Name: ONEF
Description: L’Office National de l'Emploi et de la Formation (ONEF) est un organisme étatique de production de données intégrées, relatives à la situation de l’emploi et de la formation à Madagascar. D'une part, il a pour mission de produire et diffuser régulièrement les informations nécessaires à la promotion de l’emploi et à l’insertion professionnelle. D’autre part, il produit et diffuse les outils d’aide à la prise de décision pour tous les acteurs de développement économiques.

Name: Conselho Regional de Química da 5ª Região (CRQ-V)
Description:
No dia 18 de junho de 1956, a Lei Federal n.º 2.800 de 18 de junho de 1956 criou os Conselhos Profissionais de Química em âmbito Federal e Regional. O Conselho Regional de Química da 5ª Região teve suas instalações inauguradas em 30 de julho de 1957, em Porto Alegre, RS. 

O Conselho Federal e os Conselhos Regionais formam o Sistema Nacional da Química. Assim, fica a cargo do Conselho Regional de Química da 5ª Região promover o exercício legal da atividade química no RS, registrando e fiscalizando empresas e profissionais, visando o bem-estar da sociedade.

Nossa missão é promover e fiscalizar o uso da química no Rio Grande do Sul, contribuindo para que a sociedade seja beneficiada com produtos e serviços de qualidade elevada, zelando pelo cumprimento da ética nas atividades dos profissionais da Química e incentivando o desenvolvimento tecnológico e o aperfeiçoamento profissional.

Name: NGO Forum for Public Health
Description:
At the backdrop of the grim scenario around the globe in the area of water supply and sanitation resulting in dangerously high incidences of mortality and morbidity, the United Nations General Assembly launched the International Drinking Water Supply and Sanitation Decade (IDWSSD) for the period 1981-1990. The Decade was observed with the mission to help reduce mortality and morbidity caused by water-borne diseases at the grassroots. And to implement the Decade programme in Bangladesh.

NGO Forum was established in 1982 as the brainchild of the United Nations Steering Committee in line with the International Drinking Water Supply and Sanitation Decade (IDWSSD). Following a long evolution process, the organization has evolved in the development sector with a legal entity in the year 1991. Presently, it is involved as the apex networking and service delivery body of NGOs, CBOs and private sector operators in the WASH sector of Bangladesh. In line with the multi-dimensional aspects & challenges in the WASH sector, the Forum widened its programmatic domain beyond WASH. 

Since 2011, the organization has been renamed the NGO Forum for Public Health. Thus, the NGO Forum serves as a national networking and rights-based service delivery organization.

For more, visit https://www.ngof.org/aboutus

Name: APES - Associação Paranaense dos Engenheiros de Segurança
Description:
A APES - Associação Paranaense dos Engenheiros de Segurança, fundada em 14 de outubro de 1974 e com 49 anos de história na promoção dos temas de saúde e segurança do trabalho a toda sociedade, é hoje a segunda entidade do segmento mais antiga do Brasil em atividade, reunindo em seu quadro de associados os engenheiros de segurança do trabalho do estado do Paraná. Prezamos pela capacitação e atualização profissional constantes, oferecendo diversos eventos como cursos, seminários, congressos, palestras e conferências. Buscamos elevar o nível de conhecimento e habilidade dos nossos profissionais, para que sejam incentivadores e promovam sempre a busca por ambientes laborais mais saudáveis, pela prevenção efetiva dos acidentes e doenças ocupacionais e o bem estar do trabalhador.
Venha fazer parte de nossa associação!

Name: BC Association of Social Workers
Observation Group Inc. (OBSV Group)
Description:
Observation Group Inc. is a firm built on the foundation of legacy and a freedom-fighting tradition of excellence. We are not public speaking agents simply to broker meaningless transactions for monetary gain. With a focus on our Five-Point Foundation, it is our mission as an agency to give “Agency” to individuals and communities by amplifying voices and ideas around the world. 

OBSV consistently pumps up the volume on the voices that are empowering each of us to actualize the best of what the future holds for humanity. But before any of us can effect positive change, walk in purpose, or ascertain solutions to our most pressing problems, we must first step back…look at the world objectively…and assess the true nature of the issues. To that end…everything begins with observation!

We pride ourselves on being of service to an influential roster of speakers and an esteemed book of patrons that understand the power of observation. To a painstaking degree, our clients are researchers, philosophers, advocates, business moguls, educators, content developers, and icons that have done the cultural, educational, and professional reconnaissance required to offer solutions to the world’s most intractable challenges. Some of the notable talent we represent include Dr. Cornel West, Iyanla Vanzant, Dr. Henry Louis Gates, Jr. and many more.

We pride ourselves on being of service to an influential roster of speakers and an esteemed book of patrons that understand the power of observation. To a painstaking degree, our clients are researchers, philosophers, advocates, business moguls, educators, content developers, and icons that have done the cultural, educational, and professional reconnaissance required to offer solutions to the world’s most intractable challenges. Our patrons are educational institutions, non-profit organizations, associations, and corporations that place the highest value on education, democracy, corporate social responsibility, and the public good.

Name: A*dS . Autor*innenverband der Schweiz
Description:
Der AdS versteht sich als Interessensvertretung für die Sprache und das literarische Schaffen und Übersetzen in allen Sprachregionen der Schweiz (inklusive der so genannten fünften Landessprache). Er engagiert sich für die Verbreitung der Literatur und den Austausch zwischen Autoren bzw. Übersetzerinnen, Sprachgebieten und Ländern. Darüber hinaus setzt er sich für eine vielfältige Kulturlandschaft ein.
Der AdS steht gesamtschweizerisch für optimale gesellschaftliche, kulturpolitische, rechtliche und ökonomische Rahmenbedingungen seiner Mitglieder (Schriftsteller*innen sowie literarische Übersetzer*innen) und soweit wie möglich aller Autor*innen.

Name: Foss Talent - Recruitment Partners
Description:
Welcome to Foss Talent, where recruitment isn’t just about filling positions; it’s about crafting success stories, one connection at a time.

Here, we’re not your typical suit-and-tie brigade. We’re the rebels with a cause, shaking up the recruitment game with a dash of personality and a whole lot of heart.

So, what’s our secret sauce? Well, it’s simple really. We’re matchmakers in the business world, connecting companies with their perfect fit and candidates with their dream roles.

Whether you’re a start-up looking to build your dream team or an established corporation aiming to level up, we’ve got you covered. From sourcing top talent to navigating the ever-changing recruitment landscape, consider us your partners in growth.

And for you, the talented individuals ready to conquer the career jungle, we’re your compass. Think of us as your backstage pass to exclusive opportunities, your personal career hype squad. We’ll help you unlock doors you never even knew existed and guide you towards future success.

So, whether you’re a company ready to write your next chapter or a candidate looking to make waves, buckle up. With Foss Talent, your journey to greatness is about to get a whole lot more exciting. Let’s make magic happen, together. Welcome to the revolution.

Name: MADE: Maine Ad + Design
Description:
MADE is a nonprofit professional organization that exists to celebrate, cultivate, and connect Maine’s professional creative community.

Our members are the heart of our organization, and include independent professionals, students, media organizations, in-house marketing teams, and advertising, design and marketing agencies.

For both our members and the broader community, we offer programs year-round including educational workshops, awards for students and new professionals, and our famous networking events.

Forty years before Don Draper was stirring cocktails in his corner office, one of America’s first ad clubs was conceived in a Portland hotel room.That was way back in 1923, and in the decades since we’ve done a lot of evolving (with a lot of great people). From The Portland Ad Club to The Ad Club of Maine to Maine Ad + Design, generations of us have connected, created, innovated and celebrated all that makes us tick.

Name: INTERP'AURA
COFNA
Description:
Les membres de la COFNA interviennent auprès des installateurs ou fabricants d'ascenseurs pour la mise en oeuvre des procédures d'évaluation de la conformité définies dans la directive 2014/33/UE permettant de satisfaire aux exigences essentielles de sécurité et de santé.

La directive 2014/33/UE est transposée en droit Français par le décret N° 2016-550 relatif à la mise sur le marché des ascenseurs et des composants de sécurité pour ascenseurs.

Name: Maryland Academy of Nutrition & Dietetics
Description: The Maryland Academy of Nutrition and Dietetics (MAND) is a dedicated group of about 1,000 nutrition professionals. Our mission is to empower members to be Maryland’s food and nutrition leaders. Our vision is to optimize the health and well-being of Marylanders through food and nutrition. MAND is a 501(C)(6). Membership is open to members of the Academy of Nutrition and Dietetics (AND) who reside in Maryland or choose Maryland as their affiliate.

Name: RSS Teaching Statistics Section
Description:
The Teaching Statistics Section was established in 2022 following a successful three-year run as a special interest group. The Section provides a platform to collate and disseminate ideas and best practice in the teaching of statistics.

The section will mainly target statistics educators, which includes those working in post-18 education, including higher education and professional training. They will promote teaching excellence in statistics to increase statistical literacy among students, as student involvement in the section will be necessary and beneficial in achieving the goals of the section.

Name: Federación de Empresarios de Comercio y Servicios de Zaragoza y Provincia (ECOS)
Description:
La Federación de Empresarios de Comercio y Servicios de Zaragoza y Provincia es una entidad asociativa y profesional de empresarios, con personalidad jurídica propia y sin ánimo de lucro, constituida en el año 1977 con el fin de representar, promocionar y defender los intereses de cuantas empresas desarrollan cualquier actividad de comercio en Zaragoza y provincia.

Un equipo formado por administrativos, técnicos, asesores y secretaría general, trabaja por las más de 3.000 empresas de comercio y servicios, agrupadas en las más de 83 asociaciones gremiales, de zona y comarcales, que integran, y son, nuestra Federación de Empresarios.

Nuestros objetivos son fomentar el asociacionismo empresarial, prestar servicios al asociado, mediante información, asesoramiento, convenios de colaboración; promocionar y difundir al sector comercio y servicios y fomentar la actividad empresarial a través de programas como formación, digitalización, promoción…

El asociado puede beneficiarse de nuestras asesorías jurídica, laboral, fiscal y de marketing y digitalización.

Somos la organización más representativa del sector comercio y servicios zaragozano.

“ECOS, la importancia de estar bien representados”

Name: Artifex Group
Description: Artifex is a Catholic men’s networking and fellowship event, fostering meaningful connections for personal and professional growth. Our gatherings feature engaging speakers who inspire spiritual, personal, and professional development.

Name: Ladavius | Clinical Trials, Regulatory Affairs, Management
Description:
Ladavius Academy is a global professional organisation and learning academy.

We offer professional development, industry news and certification for those, who want to excel in their career in both pharmaceutical and corporate fields.

With more than 1200 members around the world, we are responsible for the successful operations and advancement in Clinical Trials, Regulatory Affairs and Management.

Name: ACA Business Club - Olathe, KS
Description:
Welcome to the ACA Business Club! We are committed to making your visit friendly, enjoyable and productive. The ACA Business Club is a private club dedicated to serving professionals, executives and business owners. We have a passion for helping our members succeed and reach their goals in both their personal and professional life, and we believe in the power of relationships to accomplish these objectives. Our vision is to help you accomplish your vision. 

In our lightening fast society, it’s more important than ever to take time to connect with others in person – building real relationships with real people. The ACA has combined its' rich history and tradition of private clubs with today’s social media and technology explosion to create a private club for the 21st century. The result of this incredibly powerful combination is the ACA Business Club.

The ACA Business Club is committed to promoting professional development and relationships that advance business interests, and providing unique experiences and educational opportunities that assist members in connecting and collaborating in the spirit of community and trust. Business Clubs are dedicated to providing you with the vital resources and training necessary to take you and your business to the next level by focusing on the following three pillars: Relationships, Professional Development and Marketing.

Far more than simply joining an organization, membership in the ACA is a lifestyle. The ACA Business Club provides a warm venue to meet clients and colleagues, connect with fellow members, get some work done, or simply a place to relax between meetings. It’s a friendly environment to build relationships and celebrate life’s journey with fellow members committed to your success.

We look forward to serving you and your business!

ACA Board of Directors

"Our Vision is to help you accomplish your Vision!"

Name: Lab Medicine Society Of Kenya (LMSK)
Description: We are a professional consortium of Medical Laboratory Officers and Scientists in Kenya. The objective of our organization is to complement the existing entities within the profession achieve the ultimate goal of Laboratory Medicine in Kenya.

Name: Delta Sigma Pi - Theta Lambda Chapter
Description: Delta Sigma Pi is a professional fraternity organized to foster the study of business in universities; to encourage scholarship, social activity and the association of students for their mutual advancement by research and practice; to promote closer affiliation between the commercial world and students of commerce, and to further a higher standard of commercial ethics and culture and the civic and commercial welfare of the community.

Name: Landesfachverband Schreinerhandwerk Baden-Württemberg
Description:
Zentrale Organisation des baden-württembergischen Schreinerhandwerks zur Mitgestaltung politischer, gesellschaftlicher und wirtschaftlicher Rahmenbedingungen. Seine Geschichte und Tradition reichen über 100 Jahre zurück. Er vertritt dessen Interessen in der Öffentlichkeit gegenüber der Politik und Verwaltung, gegenüber Mitbewerbern, Auftraggebern, Zulieferern und allen sonstigen Gruppen.
Der Landesfachverband Schreinerhandwerk ist der zuständige Arbeitgeberverband und Sozialpartner ausgewogener Tarifverträge zur Regelung der rund 15.000 in seinen Betrieben bestehenden Arbeitsverhältnisse.
Als Dachorganisation auf Landesebene bildet er im dreistufigen Aufbau der Handwerksorganisation die mittlere Stufe zwischen Schreinerinnung und der Bundesebene (Bundesverband Tischler Schreiner Deutschland) und setzt sich vielfältig für die Belange der Betriebe ein.
Der Verband kümmert sich um die Aus- und Weiterbildung und fördert den Marktauftritt seiner Mitgliedsunternehmen durch landesweite Öffentlichkeitsarbeit und Messebeteiligungen.

Name: RK AUTOMATION
Description:
Since 2006, we are technology-oriented company incorporated with the vision of becoming the leading provider of automation solutions to industry.

R K Automation is an authorized channel partner for Schneider Electric.
Over the years we have successfully designed, implemented and, commissioned solutions for OEM's and end-customers.

We are committed for quality and excellence in the field of Automation System Integration, Which is provenance by more than 600+ installations and by 50+ satisfied customers. Our Automation enhances the productivity manifold by making the processes efficient.

Our business policy is to develop long-term relations with the clients by
providing them a comprehensive range of Engineering at reasonable price, project implementation and system integration services as per the best prevailing quality standards, duly backed up by prompt and consistent support.

We have experienced engineers’ team having expertise to deliver the complete solutions for requirements of Automation in the industry with quality & punctuality.

Name: Domaine de Saint Marcel de Félines
Description:
Le Domaine de Saint-Marcel de Félines : un écrin de 4 hectares de verdure arboré et luxuriant, où nature et patrimoine se rejoignent.

Ce lieu unique conjugue le charme authentique d’un château millénaire avec des équipements d'aujourd'hui, offrant une ambiance paisible et ressourçante, propice à la créativité et aux échanges constructifs. Idéal pour des séminaires, team-buildings, mariages, anniversaires d’entreprise ou tout autre événement privé, associatif ou professionnel, le domaine dispose de 5 salles modulables pouvant accueillir de 10 à 200 personnes, ainsi que d’un théâtre de verdure et d’autres espaces extérieurs exceptionnels.

Pour prolonger l’expérience, 5 maisons privatisées de caractère, proposent 49 couchages avec des chambres équipées de salles de bain individuelles, alliant charme et confort moderne.

Un cadre d’exception, où 1 000 ans d’histoire côtoient l’inspiration de vos projets de demain.

Name: ASPE Atlanta
Description: We are the local ASPE (American Society of Plumbing Engineers) Chapter for the Atlanta area. We hold monthly meetings during our sessions and have various other events through out the year.

Name: EHV - Edelstahlhandelsvereinigung
Description: Die EHV begleitet alle Akteure des Handels und Vertriebes von Edelstahlprodukten in Deutschland

Name: Middlebury Diversity in Business
Description:
Middlebury Diversity in Business, MiddDIB for short, is a career based club focused on increasing minority, those with disabilities and LGBTQ+ representation in the financial services industry and other related business fields. However, we are open to everyone!

MiddDIB is a resource to get connected to diverse alumni, listen to established guest speakers, and flesh out your interests.

The goals of MiddDIB are to:
-Connect Middlebury students to each other to create a supportive network
-Provide a safe space for students to learn about business discover opportunities.
-Provide a stable and knowledgeable group for companies to do recruitment at Middlebury.

Name: Index Group
Description: Index Group began as a consulting company in 2006. It is known as Index and has diversified into manufacturing, service and retail. Over the years, it has developed some strategic global partnerships, capturing new markets and discovering new business opportunities. In Bangladesh, Index Group is most often recognized as Index Power & Energy Limited. It has attracted consumer’s immense attention due to country’s demand in oil, gas and power related minerals. Under the banner of Index LP Gas ltd, it is stablishing the country’s one of the largest and most advanced LPG facilities situated in Mongla maritime port. Other Index companies, which already won great reputation throughout country is keen to achieve rapid growth following their ultra competitive business style.

Name: Associació Catalana de Ciències de l'Alimentació (filial de l'IEC)
Description:
Som una associació científica multidisciplinària, filial de l'Institut d'Estudis Catalans, integrada per persones físiques i jurídiques compromeses amb l’estudi, el desenvolupament i la difusió del coneixement en l’àmbit de les ciències de l’alimentació.

 Des de fa més de 40 anys, promovem activitats centrades en la salut i la seguretat alimentària, organitzant jornades, conferències i trobades tècniques en col·laboració amb grups de recerca, universitats i entitats del sector.

 Publiquem la revista TECA (Tecnologia i Ciència dels Aliments), una eina per fomentar el diàleg entre associats i potenciar l’intercanvi de coneixements.

 Apostem pel futur: donem suport als estudiants i joves professionals, oferint-los recursos per al seu desenvolupament acadèmic i professional, i facilitant-ne la connexió amb experts del món alimentari.

 Encara no ets soci de l'@ACCA? Descobreix tot el que podem fer per tu! 

 Networking.
 Accés gratuït a publicacions de nutrició i alimentació.
 Revista TECA directa a casa teva.
 Orientació professional. 

Jubilats i estudiants 18,03€/any, Resta 36,06€/any

Name: CANACO SERVYTUR Ensenada
Description: Somos un organismo empresarial integrado por ciudadanos comprometidos en hablar y actuar bien por el bien común de nuestra Ensenada, apoyamos el comercio, los servicios y el turismo, a la par con el desarrollo sustentable de nuestra ciudad, Viendo siempre por el bien común de nuestra sociedad!

Name: Keymakers_AZ
Description: By connecting individuals in small groups of exclusive, unique, and memorable experiences, our members – Arizona pioneers of business - enjoy direct access to other powerful decision-makers in settings where true connections occur.

Name: Lean Construction Institute - Houston Community of Practice
Description: The LCI Houston CoP is a diverse group of Designers, Owners, and Contractors dedicated to Lean Practices and Principles. Our goal is to provide collaborative and educational events to facilitate the growth of the Houston Lean community.

Name: Affluential Circles
Description:
Affluential Circles curates bespoke gatherings and trainings that help conscientious UHNW and family office professionals network, collaborate, and solve real‑world issues for their client families and society at large - while strengthening their character, inner life, and relational intelligence.

In this season, who you are and how you show up matter more than simply adding technical expertise. Every Affluential Circles gathering, therefore, includes intentional inner‑game work (from our invitation‑only monthly executive mastermind circles to our open networking and training sessions for UHNW professionals). All our gatherings are professionally facilitated and feature training from seasoned inner‑game authors and experts.

All gatherings deliberately foster:

-  A confidential, trusted environment

-  Slowing down for deep thinking and reflective pondering

-  Expert‑led inner‑game training

-  Extended, meaningful networking

-  Peer dialogue that goes beyond tactics

-  Renewed energy, purpose, and clarity

For those who commit to a 12‑month mastermind journey, monthly sessions also include:

-  Practicing collective problem‑solving on live challenges

-  Aligning personal values with professional impact and legacy

-  Navigating complex decisions together

-  Sharing candid insights in a power‑neutral space

-  Shaping bold new responses

-  Real‑time accountability and peer‑level feedback

-  Co‑creating commitments that lead to lasting impact

Name: OrthoPA Network
Description: To join our network: orthopa.ca/join  OrthoPA Network is a community of orthopaedic PAs, surgeons, collaborators & industry partners who are enthusiastic about the growth and integration of the PA profession in Canada. Our mission is to create opportunities for orthopaedic PAs and supporters to connect, learn, collaborate and contribute to a thriving orthopaedic community.

Name: Fundación Bahía Almeriport
Description: La Fundación Bahía Almeriport tiene como objeto la promoción de los servicios logístico - portuarios de los Puertos de Almería y Carboneras, tanto presentes como futuros, así como el conocimiento y estudio del mercado, que nos permita consolidar los tráficos de mercancías y de pasajeros existentes, así como el turismo de cruceros y su impulso económico para la provincia.

Name: PII Chapter Malaysia
Description: Persatuan Insinyur Indonesia

Name: IIA Nisqually Chapter
Description:
The Institute of Internal Auditors (IIA) is an international professional association with global headquarters in Lake Mary, Florida, USA. The IIA is the internal audit profession's global voice, recognized authority, acknowledged leader, chief advocate, and principal educator. Generally, members work in internal auditing, risk management, governance, internal controls, information technology audit, education, and security. Globally, The IIA has more than 200,000 members.

The IIA Nisqually Chapter was established on December 5, 1980 and is located in the seat of the Capitol in Olympia, Washington. The Nisqually chapter serves about 100 members.

Name: Express Worth World Wide
Description: Expresswoth World Wide is an online global shopping destination. We believe that every woman should embrace her unique beauty, as the concept of beauty is subjective and personal to each individual.

Name: Fédération des Médias Catholiques
Muscatine Veteran's Network
Description:
A hidden gem, nestled along the shores of the Mississippi river. Muscatine is a thriving/growing community. Our Mission statement is simple. We want to make Muscatine, Iowa a "Destination Veteran Friendly Community". With approx 4,000 Veterans and their families who already call our community home, and our close proximity to the Quad Cities; we are well on our way to realizing our goal. 

Our roots: Inspired and supported by the founders of the Quad Cities Veteran's Network (Bryan Miller and David Underwood) and at the request of the City of Muscatine, Iowa WORKS partnered with the City of Muscatine and the QCVN to launch the very first Veteran's network 10 August 2023. 

How do we intend to accomplish our mission? We look to attract and retain veteran talent to the Muscatine local area through hosting monthly networking events. Recent Department of Labor data suggest that over 85% of jobs placed in America today, is done through networking. We wish to connect our transitioning service members, veterans, and their families with employers and resources in the local area. We have a saying that the absence of a job, does not make one "job ready". Just like the absence of a mission did not make the military member "mission ready". Our goal is to help you find your new mission ready by not only creating connections with local area employers but by being a conduit of resources as well. 

Whether you are looking for employment or employees, resources or rediscovering your tribe, the Muscatine Veteran's Network has something for you.

Name: ARTEMIS Métrologie
Description:
Réseau de professionnels du pesage :

La société ARTEMIS est une société anonyme à directoire et conseil de surveillance basée à Privas (07). Elle a été créée en 1993 par plus de 50 professionnels du pesage.

L’étalonnage des poids et masses.

La réparation et la révision périodique des réfractomètres.

Name: The Institute of Innovation Management
Description:
Our Purpose: To professionalise innovation management, as a recognised and respected discipline; building expertise and systemic capability, setting professional standards, and championing responsible innovation outcomes that deliver lasting value for people, planet and productivity.

The Gap: We need to better realise more value from innovation by having better management systems in organisations and mature innovation management competencies and capabilities. Those tasked to deliver innovation do not have clear career pathways, nor a professional institute to support and connect them.

The Inflection Point: The requirements for an innovation management system (ISO 56001:2024) creates a common language foundation for standards‑aligned capability and body of knowledge development.

The Answer: The Institute of Innovation Management (IIM) is a practitioner‑led institute that brings knowledge and competencies training, accreditation, and community; together to connect, grow and professionalise innovation management.

The IIM has been built openly and together. 

The journey started with the BSI Innovation Day 2022 and ISO plenary in London, deepened through the BSI Mirror Committee strategy workshop (September 2023), and was energised at BSI Innovation Day - November 2024, where momentum from practitioners led to the creation of The Innovation Management Society of the UK LinkedIn group (circa 250 members). 

Ongoing discussions with BSI and Innovate UK’s Business Growth team, alongside the publication of ISO 56001 (Sept 2024), provided the standards-informed foundation and national relevance. 

Since the 4th April 2025, we convened a monthly IIM scoping meeting  with a group of highly experienced innovation management practitioners (~24 volunteers) to shape the Institute’s purpose, proposition and offer, business model, governance, policies and budget; supplemented by one-to-one sessions with leaders of other professional institutes to learn from best practice.

Name: NORD55
Description:
NORD 55° er udsprunget af en stor lyst til at udvide rammerne for den nationale debatkultur i de nordiske lande. Vi lever i en tid præget af kolossale forandringer, der sætter store krav til vores omstillingsparathed. Og vi lever i en verden, hvor autoritære kræfter er på fremmarch og demokratiske værdier trues. Med sådan et geopolitisk perspektiv er det indlysende, at det er i de nordiske landes interesse at opruste kulturelt og bevæge os tættere på hinanden. Vi vil værne om vores vigtige, fælles værdier, bl.a. muligheden for at tænke og udtrykke os frit og kritisk og forestille os en bedre fremtid. Forandring er under alle omstændigheder et vilkår!

NORD 55 ønsker debat på nordisk niveau ud fra en forståelse af, at hvis vi går sammen ind i denne ny tid kan vi, væbnet med kunstnerisk ytringsfrihed, men også tillid, skærpe de kritiske spørgsmål, tænke større og lettere få øje på nye muligheder.

På initiativ af JP/Politikens Hus i København bakker en række nordiske mediehuse, der i forvejen har en lang række samarbejdsrelationer, op om initiativet NORD 55°. Det involverer bl.a. et årligt topmøde, der samler Nordens fremmeste tænkere, kunstnere og meningsdannere som skal kickstarte en ny nordisk offentlighed. Et stort nedslag i vandet, hvis ringe vil sprede sig ud i hele det vidtstrakte, geografiske område og skabe nye strømninger ud i verden.

After the success of the first three events we know that this will be the annual event for the celebration of women statisticians and data scientists around the world. We are grateful to our sponsors, keynote presenters, invited speakers, volunteers, and attendees who made the 2025 conference a great success! If you would like to view sessions from the conference they will be posted on YouTube in the CWS channel.

Mark your calendar for the 2026 conference which will be held virtually on October 6, 2026 and hosted by CWS. This year’s theme will be announced in the spring. As you begin to think about your plans - to organize a session, present, or attend - consider how to engage with others in the wider statistical community to increase your impact.

Esta es una Corporación Civil que tiene por fines:

a) Mantener los sentimientos de amistad y compañerismo entre los Ex-estudiantes, académicos, funcionarios, investigadores y estudiantes del Departamento de Electrónica UTFSM
b) Brindar un canal de comunicación y apoyo permanente entre los Ex-estudiantes y el Departamento de Electrónica, refiriéndose con ello tanto a los estudiantes como a sus académicos y personal de apoyo
c) Propiciar el bienestar de sus asociados, mediante la ayuda y cooperación mutua
d) Conformar una red de contactos profesionales, en la que todos los asociados puedan ofrecer y buscar apoyo técnico para asesorías, consultorías y oportunidades de inversión
e) Apoyar el desarrollo de emprendimientos que surjan desde los estudiantes o ex estudiantes del departamento de electrónica, a través de mentorías, posicionamiento y/o financiamiento
f) Generar instancias de aporte filantrópico a la comunidad, al país y a la UTFSM
g) Implementar instancias de apoyo al desvalido meritorio
h) Contribuir al desarrollo profesional de sus asociados, a través de actividades que potencien sus capacidades y habilidades
i) Contribuir al desarrollo del país. Bajo este aspecto será un centro de divulgación y consulta, alcanzando sus beneficios no sólo a sus asociados, sino también a cualquier persona que solicite su cooperación en este sentido

Name: CRS Ocular Delivery Focus Group (OcD FG)
Description: The use of drug delivery systems to offer increased safety and utility of ocular therapeutics is a rapidly evolving and ever growing field. Controlled release systems have been employed to both reformulate existing drugs and design new drugs to meet the high potential for commercial interest and patient benefit. The Ocular Delivery Focus Group will support the mission of CRS by engaging researchers, industry representatives, and regulatory experts in the advancement of technologies designed to protect or restore vision. The members of the Focus Group are expected to be paid members of the Controlled Release Society, independent of their membership category. We will also reach out to former or inactive members of CRS and other non-members in the vision research community whose work may benefit from the Focus Group to encourage their participation. This may include notable professional societies in ophthalmology like the Association for Research in Vision and Ophthalmology (ARVO) and the International Society for Eye Research (ISER).

B&B will meet periodically from 5-7:30 p.m. at some of the State's best venues. B&B events are free admission, open to the public and all about making lasting connections in a fun, laidback atmosphere. This event is not a Town Hall, and we treat our special guest speakers with appreciation and respect - no shouting people down or "gotcha" moment attempts by disruptors. 

Business & Brews is “business casual,” and professionals from all walks of life are welcome. Our monthly speakers leave the PowerPoints and structured speeches behind and tell their stories in a laidback and fun atmosphere. So let your hair down, take that tie off, roll up your sleeves, grab a cold one and mingle with like-minded professionals who want to rub elbows with people who care about their community and the folks who make it a great place to live.

To sponsor or host an upcoming Business & Brews event, contact us at Bounds@follywood.live. Cheers!

Wenst u uw congres buiten Leuven of de gebouwen van KU Leuven te organiseren, dan kunnen we u hier vanzelfsprekend ook bij helpen. Ons team gaat graag samen met u op zoek naar de perfecte locatie voor uw congres in België.

Professioneel een congres organiseren is een hele kunst. Niet alleen is het een tijdrovend werk, het vraagt ook om een specifieke expertise. Laat u daarom ondersteunen door een team van ervaringsdeskundigen die zich onderscheiden door de combinatie van ervaring in congresorganisatie en hun specifieke kennis van de huisstijl, de gebruiken en de cultuur van KU Leuven. 
Niet alleen onze ervaring binnen en buiten de KU Leuven, maar ook de samenwerking met andere diensten en onze kennis van de gebruiken en cultuur van de universiteit zorgen ervoor dat uw initiatief de kwaliteit zal uitstralen die de KU Leuven zo hoog aanschrijft.

Description: The BeNeLux LGBTIQ+ Business Chamber (BGLBC) connects LGBTIQ+ entrepreneurs to exchange experience and information, and represent the members in relationship to both (semi-)governmental organizations and the business world.

Name: Philosophy, Politics, and Economics (PPE) Society
Description:
Welcome to the home page for The Philosophy, Politics, and Economics Society, an international organization.

The PPE Society’s mission is to encourage the interaction and cross-fertilization of three intellectual disciplines that are, in their history, deeply intertwined and that now, and going forward, have much to offer one another.

Name: The Superpower Network
Description: Providing Solutions to Social Impact Professionals and Organizations

Name: BNI Team Terre Sainte
Description:
Bienvenue au BNI Team Terre Sainte - Dynamisez votre réseau professionnel et intégrez un groupe d'entrepreneurs qui contribuera au succès de  votre business ! 

 Réunions hebdomadaires : Chaque mercredi à 6h30, rejoignez une communauté d’entrepreneurs engagés qui se rencontrent pour partager, apprendre et croître ensemble. Nos membres se réunissent au HVGGE Yotel à Chavannes de Bogis. Les séances hebdomadaires sont ouvertes aux invités, vous êtes les bienvenus si vous voulez découvrir le BNI (Business Network International) 

Les avantages exclusifs du BNI :
	• Croissance des affaires 
	• Développement professionnel continu
	• Opportunités de réseautage étendues 
	• Ressources exclusives, formation 

Découvrez comment le BNI Team Terre Sainte peut vous aider à atteindre vos objectifs commerciaux en nous rejoignant pour une séance découverte. Ensemble, atteignons de nouveaux sommets !

Name: International Association of Prompt Engineering Professionals
Description:
About:
The International Association of Prompt Engineering Professionals was founded in Los Angeles, California, in 2024. We serve both individuals and organizations in the growing Prompt Engineering Profession. 

Misson Statement:
To advance the field of prompt engineering by fostering professional growth, setting industry standards, and promoting ethical practices. We aim to support our members through education, certification, and a collaborative community that drives innovation and excellence in AI-driven communication.

Vision Statement: 
To be the leading global organization for prompt engineers, recognized for our commitment to excellence, innovation, and ethical standards in AI communication. We envision a future where prompt engineering is a cornerstone of AI development, ensuring intelligent systems are effective, inclusive, and trustworthy.

Name: International Society for Heart Research - European Section (ISHR-ES)
Description:
The ISHR is the only truly international organisation supporting and promoting the interests of cardiovascular research scientists in every part of the world.

The mission of the ISHR European Section (ISHR-ES) is to promote the discovery and dissemination of knowledge in the cardiovascular sciences on a Europe-wide basis as part of the world-wide ISHR community.

Membership is open to any individual (with or without MD or PhD) who is actively interested in any aspect of experimental or clinical research in the cardiovascular system.

The ISHR:
- Promotes exchange of ideas on a world-wide basis between scientists and clinicians interested in all aspects of cardiovascular biology and medicine
- Promotes discovery and dissemination of knowledge in all areas of cardiovascular biology and medicine
- Organises and supports national and international congresses devoted to all aspect of cardiovascular research
- Provides an international forum for discussion of problems and controversies at the cutting edge of cardiovascular research
- Publishes a world class journal devoted to advances in cardiovascular research: Journal of Molecular and Cellular Cardiology (JMCC)

Name: RAIS - Rede Articulada e Integrada de Sustentabilidade
Description:
A RAIS é uma rede de mais de 170 executivos/as de sustentabilidade, focada em promover networking e disseminação de conteúdo de qualidade.

A organização é composta apenas por pessoas convidadas e está centrada em um grupo fechado no WhatsApp.

As trocas ocorrem diariamente pelo chat da rede social, disciplinadas por uma política que não permite vendas ou outros conteúdos de autopromoção.

Mensalmente são realizados encontros presenciais e remotos de networking, além de encontros espontaneamente organizados pela rede.

Name: Enjoy Change
Description:
Enjoy Change creëert een toekomst  die anders niet had bestaan. Wij richten ons op leidinggevenden, teams en teamleden die niet in balans zijn, werkdruk, stress ervaren en op zoek zijn naar een nieuw of ander toekomstperspectief. Dit vraagt goed leiderschap. 
Wij zijn confronterend, soms oncomfortabel en brutaal eerlijk. Wij geloven niet in ‘hokjes’ of ‘stickers’, maar creëren kansen en mogelijkheden.

Name: MMC Professional Academia
Description:
MMC Professional Academia is a leading institution dedicated to training, research, and development in various fields. With a strong commitment to academic excellence and innovation, MMC Professional Academia strives to foster intellectual growth, enhance professional skills, and contribute to the advancement of knowledge.

Training is a core pillar of MMC Professional Academia's mission. The institution offers a wide range of programs and courses designed to meet the diverse needs of students and professionals. Whether individuals are looking to enhance their existing skills, acquire new knowledge, or embark on a new career path, MMC Professional Academia provides comprehensive training opportunities. The programs are designed and delivered by experienced faculty members and industry experts, ensuring that students receive relevant and up-to-date knowledge.

Research is another vital component of MMC Professional Academia's activities. The institution encourages faculty members and students to engage in cutting-edge research that addresses real-world challenges. By conducting research, MMC Professional Academia aims to contribute to the development of new theories, methodologies, and practical solutions. The institution actively promotes interdisciplinary collaboration and provides resources and support to facilitate high-quality research endeavors.

Development is an integral part of MMC Professional Academia's mandate. The institution is dedicated to fostering innovation and supporting the growth of industries and communities. Through various initiatives, MMC Professional Academia strives to bridge the gap between academia and industry, promoting knowledge transfer and collaboration. The institution partners with businesses, organizations, and government agencies to develop customized training programs, consult on research projects, and facilitate technology transfer.

Name: Cluster CEDI
Description:
El Clúster CEDI incluye en un solo Clúster a la diversa gama de empresas de la economía del conocimiento de
la zona centro-norte de la provincia de Santa Fe, con una perspectiva ampliadade negocios. Además, proyecta generar múltiples oportunidades de negocio para
sus miembros a través de alianzas estratégicas acordadas con diferentes instituciones que forman parte del ecosistema empresarial de la región.

Name: IEEE Islamabad Section
Description: IEEE Islamabad Section is part of Membership and Geographical Activities of IEEE. It has over 30+ student branches and technically sponsors over 12 conferences yearly. It has 2 affinity groups i.e. Young Professionals and Women in Engineering.

Name: AKEK DaneshBonyan
Description:
انجمن شرکت های دانش بنیان استان خراسان رضوی
با حضور 7 کمیسیون تخصصی و اعضای هیئت رئیسه

Name: ABWF - Associação Brasileira de Wood Frame
Description: ABWF - Brazilian Wood Frame Association is a non-profit entity that brings together professionals, companies, institutions and academics dedicated to the development and promotion of the Wood Frame construction system in Brazil.

Name: ROTARY DISTRIKT 2355 Stockholm-Uppland
Description:
Rotary är ett globalt och inkluderande nätverk med över 1,2 miljoner handlingskraftiga medlemmar i mer än 45.000 klubbar runtom i världen.

Gemensamt för oss alla är att vi vill mötas, utvecklas och ständigt vidga våra affärskontakter och vyer, samtidigt som vi vill göra goda insatser för samhället, både här hemma och längre bort. 

Till Sverige kom Rotary i början av 1926 genom tillkomsten av Stockholm Rotaryklubb vars charterbrev undertecknades den 20 februari 1926 genom etableringen i Sverige av Kurt Belfrage.

I Rotary Distrikt 2355 finns idag 60 Rotaryklubbar med ca 2400 medlemmar och täcker en yta från södra Stor-Stockholm och hela Uppland. 

Vill du vara med att ta ansvar för en hållbar samhällsutveckling, få nya vänner och professionell utveckling – då är Rotary något för dig!

Name: M2 Community
Description: M2 is the trusted community for forward-thinking, revenue-driven marketers. Learn from the best, connect with your peers, and unlock your potential.

Name: Penn State Wealth Management Association
Description: Offering students an immersive wealth management learning experience through diverse and unique opportunities

Name: Management Communication Club - MCC
Description:
Management Communication Club, One of the most prestigious & largest business club in the University of Chittagong which was established in 6 June, 2005. Every student of department of management are always encouraged and welcome to attend the regular sessions, seminars, workshops, Business events & competitions,  excursions to enhanced and developed soft skills ( Public Speaking, Presentation, Creative writing, Case study, Negotiations) in order to become more competent in their personal & professional life.

Mission: To provide the students of the department of management a forum to be expressive, cut out introversion, engage in learning alongside community service activities, adhere to communication as well as professionalism and to find out their latent talent in order to straighten any shaky part of their leadership development.

Vision: To become one of the top-notch business clubs by creating a community of leaders committed to professional excellence and networking opportunities that have a positive impact on the world.

Join us, To explore new opportunities & reach infinite milestones together.

Name: Delta Sigma Pi - Lambda Tau
Description:
Welcome to Delta Sigma Pi's Lambda Tau Chapter! This is the official page where alumni, collegiate members, advisors, and all other stakeholders in Lambda Tau can stay connected and up to date with current events and chapter updates.

Our chapter was established on April 4th, 1987 by 11 Bentley students revolving around the three pillars of Brotherhood, Professionalism, and Community Service. 

Brotherhood: Our brothers are a diverse group of leaders both inside and outside the classroom. Collectively, we are active members of the Bentley community who support one another in personal, academic, and professional endeavors. 

Professionalism: Our Chapter organizes professional development events throughout the semester to foster professional skills and build lasting professional relations. Our network of brothers have connections with numerous Fortune 50 companies including Apple, GE, J.P. Morgan, and the "Big Four." 

Community Service: Our brothers and alumni are active members of the local community and support one another in a variety of community service-based initiatives. As a chapter, we make giving back a priority and regularly plan events that support both local and national charities.

If you have any further questions or inquiries, please email ga_dsp@bentley.edu.

Name: Varmepumpeindustrien
Description:
I Varmepumpeindustrien (VPI) er vores mål, at danskerne får varme på den bedste, mest hensigtsmæssige, mest økonomiske og mest klimavenlige måde.  
 
Varmeforsyningen til danske hjem og virksomheder er helt afgørende for vores samfund, og varmepumpebranchen både kan og vil bidrage til den grønne omstilling ved at nedbringe CO2-udslippet. 
 
I dag er kvaliteten af varmepumper så høj, at de ofte er det oplagte valg, når det gælder energieffektive og bæredygtige løsninger. Der findes varmepumper til alle formål, hvad enten det er til opvarmning af fjernvarme, til opvarmning i industri eller til opvarmning af boliger.  
  
VPI favner branchens producenter og leverandører af kvalitetsvarmepumper, og vi arbejder målrettet på, at varmepumper får en central placering i fremtidens fossilfrie energipolitik. Vi er derfor et kompetent omdrejningspunkt for alle aktører, herunder politikere, styrelser, kommuner, teknisk udvalg, alliancepartnere, samarbejdspartnere og andre interessenter. 
 
Uanset om den rette løsning er kollektiv forsyning eller individuel løsning i form af varmepumper, er vores mål at sikre den rette varme på rette sted. 
  
#GrønEnergi #Varmepumper #FossilfriFremtid #Bæredygtighed #Energieffektivitet #VPI #rettevarmepårettested

Name: GoodVibe
Description: Goodvibe is a Saudi-based mother company that creates innovative and engaging experiences for various audiences. It has four sister companies in gaming advertisement, event management and creative agency. They offer a comprehensive range of services and solutions that cater to the needs and preferences of their clients. Goodvibe is more than just a name. It is a philosophy and a culture that reflects the values and aspirations of the company and its sister companies.

Name: الأكاديمية العالمية لعلوم التنمية - International Academy for Development Scineces
Description:
وحدة دعم تدريب بعد انتهاء الدراسة لتوفير الدعم اللازم لتقديم مستويات عالية من الأكاديمية العالمية  لعلوم التنمية مؤسسة تربوية رائدة مرخصة دوليا لتدريب و تطوير الموارد البشرية و تسعى دائما لتقديم الدعم المجتمعي الواجب حيث تتضمن الدراسة لدينا بعناصر تدريبية ذاتلف التخصصات بمستوى عالي من التعليم.

مؤسسه تربوية رائدة مرخصة دوليا لتدريب وتطوير الموارد البشرية وتسعي إلي تقديم الدعم المجتمعي الواجب حيث تتضمن الدراسة بعناصر تدريبية ونقدم افضل البرامج التدريبية المعتمده.

Name: Common Cause Collective
Description:
Bringing impact-driven creatives together to share insights, ideas, and resources.

...

The question isn’t whether or not the future will be designed, the question is by whom. So we’ve come together to shift power into the hands of people who will design systems that work for the many, not just for the few.

We pledge to…
-> Build bridges across disciplines.
-> Challenge the status quo.
-> Address complex problems.
-> Contribute to the commons.

We’ll do this by practicing and sharing transition design approaches, frameworks and methods through events and projects, highlighting important work in the community, and connecting changemakers to inspire innovation and collaboration.

Name: Aggie Club of Engineers
Description: Aggie Club of Engineers is a social, service, and leadership organization strongly rooted in academics. ACE is based on the premise that bringing together student leaders from all levels and disciplines of Engineering will promote success. It is founded on the ideal that engineers should not only develop strongly in academics but also be of strong character. The purpose of the Aggie Club of Engineers is to develop our members as successful Aggies and leaders through a primary emphasis on academic success and character development while also improving Aggieland through focusing on service.

Name: World Leaders Forum
Description: World Leaders are making significant contributions and excelling worldwide in their respective professional domains. This event aims to acknowledge individuals and organisations that have established a remarkable presence in various fields. The summit also offers a prime opportunity for high-level business networking with leaders from the US, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, the UK and Asia, facilitated by its interactive global platforms with numerous international forums and councils that connect leaders across the world.  World Leaders Summit & Awards is to honour the determined effort and achievements of Changemakers who have made their performance and innovative excellence in their respective field. It is a very special and unique set-up, it involves International Excellence awards in various categories. World Leaders Awards creates worldwide recognition and reserves its own space in the Society for the winning profiles. As such it also provides participants with an ideal opportunity to make their work visible to a wider audience.

Name: The Keystone Awards for Job Creation
Description:
The Keystone Awards are presented to the most respected business builders in Canada.

Please visit our website to learn more about upcoming Keystone events near you, or to nominate a business owner for the Keystone Award.

Name: HellasCert
Description:
Η HellasCert, είναι η Ελληνική Ένωση των Διαπιστευμένων Φορέων Επιθεώρησης και Πιστοποίησης που δραστηριοποιούνται στην χώρα μας στον προαιρετικό και υποχρεωτικό τομέα σύμφωνα με τα Ευρωπαϊκά πρότυπα ISO/IEC 17020, ISO/IEC 17021, ISO/IEC 17024, ISO/IEC 17025 και ISO/IEC 17065

Σκοπός της ίδρυσης της Ένωσης είναι:

1. η διάδοση των εννοιών «Ποιότητα», «Επιθεώρηση», «Πιστοποίηση»,
2. η βελτίωση της ποιότητας και της ασφάλειας προϊόντων και υπηρεσιών μέσα από τις διαδικασίες Επιθεώρησης- Πιστοποίησης,
3. η ενίσχυση της ανταγωνιστικότητας των Ελληνικών Επιχειρήσεων με την παροχή πιστοποιητικών με διεθνή αναγνώριση και προστιθέμενη αξία,
4. η διασφάλιση της διαφάνειας στη λειτουργία των Φορέων.

Name: UofSC AIChE
Description: AIChE at UofSC is a student-run chapter of the American Institute of Chemical Engineers at the University of South Carolina. At UofSC, we strive to connect Chemical Engineering students with various resources to advance their professional journeys. This, alongside our ChemE Car and Cube competition teams, helps prepare graduates for an ever-changing and ever-growing industry.

Name: Georgia Association for Industrial and Organizational Psychology
Description: The Georgia Association for Industrial-Organizational Psychology (GAIOP) is a professional organization created to promote sharing of ideas and information about psychology as applied to work and human resource management. We provide professional development programs, including continuing education workshops cosponsored with the Society for Industrial and Organizational Psychology (SIOP).

Name: Social Podium
Description:
𝖠𝗋𝖾 𝗒𝗈𝗎 𝖺 𝖴𝖲-𝖻𝖺𝗌𝖾𝖽 𝗉𝗋𝗈𝖿𝖾𝗌𝗌𝗂𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅 𝗂𝗇 𝖤𝖺𝗋𝗇𝖾𝖽, 𝖯𝖺𝗂𝖽 𝗈𝗋 𝖮𝗐𝗇𝖾𝖽 𝖲𝗈𝖼𝗂𝖺𝗅? 𝖣𝗈 𝗒𝗈𝗎 𝗐𝗈𝗋𝗄 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝖺 𝖼𝖺𝗍𝖾𝗀𝗈𝗋𝗒-𝗅𝖾𝖺𝖽𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖻𝗋𝖺𝗇𝖽, 𝗈𝗋 𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗁𝖺𝗉𝗌 𝖺 𝖼𝗁𝖺𝗅𝗅𝖾𝗇𝗀𝖾𝗋 𝖻𝗋𝖺𝗇𝖽? 

𝖥𝗋𝗈𝗆 𝖼𝗈𝖺𝗌𝗍 𝗍𝗈 𝖼𝗈𝖺𝗌𝗍, 𝗐𝖾'𝗋𝖾 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖼𝗈𝗆𝗆𝗎𝗇𝗂𝗍𝗒 𝗒𝗈𝗎'𝗏𝖾 𝖻𝖾𝖾𝗇 𝗐𝖺𝗂𝗍𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖿𝗈𝗋 - 𝖺 𝗉𝗅𝖺𝖼𝖾 𝗍𝗈 𝗅𝖾𝖺𝗋𝗇, 𝗀𝗋𝗈𝗐, 𝗌𝗁𝖺𝗋𝖾, 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝖼𝗈𝗇𝗍𝗋𝗂𝖻𝗎𝗍𝖾 𝗍𝗈 𝗂𝗇𝖽𝗎𝗌𝗍𝗋𝗒-𝗅𝖾𝖺𝖽𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗇𝗄𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝖻𝖾𝗌𝗍 𝗉𝗋𝖺𝖼𝗍𝗂𝖼𝖾𝗌 𝗂𝗇 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗌𝗉𝖺𝖼𝖾.  

𝖶𝖺𝗍𝖼𝗁 𝗉𝗋𝖾𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗎𝗌 𝖾𝗉𝗂𝗌𝗈𝖽𝖾𝗌. 𝖩𝗈𝗂𝗇 𝗈𝗎𝗋 𝗆𝖺𝗂𝗅𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗅𝗂𝗌𝗍. 𝖥𝗈𝗅𝗅𝗈𝗐 𝗎𝗌 𝗍𝗈𝖽𝖺𝗒 𝗍𝗈 𝗌𝗍𝖺𝗒 𝗈𝗇 𝗍𝗈𝗉 𝗈𝖿 𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗒𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗁𝖺𝗉𝗉𝖾𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗂𝗇 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗌𝗈𝖼𝗂𝖺𝗅 𝗆𝖾𝖽𝗂𝖺 𝗌𝗉𝖺𝖼𝖾: 𝗄𝖾𝗒 𝗍𝗋𝖾𝗇𝖽𝗌, 𝗂𝗇-𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗌𝗈𝗇 & 𝗈𝗇𝗅𝗂𝗇𝖾 𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗌, 𝖺 𝗉𝗅𝖺𝗍𝖿𝗈𝗋𝗆 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗒𝗈𝗎𝗋 𝗍𝗁𝗈𝗎𝗀𝗁𝗍𝗌, 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗆𝗈𝗋𝖾. 

ɴᴏᴛᴇ: ɪɴᴛᴇʀᴇsᴛᴇᴅ ɪɴ ʙᴇᴄᴏᴍɪɴɢ ᴀ sᴘᴇᴀᴋᴇʀ? ᴡᴏᴜʟᴅ ʏᴏᴜ ʟɪᴋᴇ ᴛᴏ ɴᴏᴍɪɴᴀᴛᴇ sᴏᴍᴇᴏɴᴇ? ᴡᴇ'ᴅ ʟᴏᴠᴇ ᴛᴏ ʜᴇᴀʀ ꜰʀᴏᴍ ʏᴏᴜ! sᴇɴᴅ ᴜs ᴀ ᴅᴍ ᴏʀ ᴄᴏɴᴛᴀᴄᴛ ᴜs ᴏɴ ᴏᴜʀ ᴡᴇʙsɪᴛᴇ ᴛᴏᴅᴀʏ. ᴡᴇ'ʀᴇ ᴘʟᴀɴɴɪɴɢ ᴘʟᴇɴᴛʏ ᴏꜰ ᴇᴠᴇɴᴛs ɪɴ ᴀᴅᴠᴀɴᴄᴇ, sᴏ ʜᴜʀʀʏ ɴᴏᴡ ᴛᴏ ɢᴇᴛ ᴏɴ ᴏᴜʀ ʀᴀᴅᴀʀ ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ᴛʜᴇ ᴡɪɴᴅᴏᴡ ᴄʟᴏsᴇs!

Name: Design Thinking Club
Description:
Design Thinking Club

Welcome to the epicenter of innovation – the Design Thinking Club! 

At the Design Thinking Club, we transcend traditional boundaries and redefine problem-solving through the lens of creativity and collaboration.  Our mission is simple yet powerful: to cultivate a culture of design thinking that empowers individuals to approach challenges with fresh perspectives and create meaningful, impactful solutions.

 What Sets Us Apart?
We're not just a club; we're a community of forward-thinkers, creatives, and problem solvers. Whether you're a seasoned designer or a curious novice, our inclusive environment encourages diverse perspectives and fosters a space where ideas flourish.

 Our Approach:
Design thinking is not just a methodology; it's a mindset. Through workshops, collaborative projects, and dynamic events, we equip our members with the tools and mindset needed to navigate complexities and generate innovative solutions.

 Founding Team:
Meet the visionary minds behind our success – our founding team. Their passion for innovation and dedication to nurturing a culture of creativity laid the foundation for what the Design Thinking Club is today.

 Join Us in Shaping the Future:
Ready to embark on a journey of limitless possibilities? Join the Design Thinking Club and be part of a community that believes every challenge is an opportunity for innovation. Together, let's reimagine the future through the power of design thinking!

 #DesignThinking #InnovationCommunity #ProblemSolvers #CreativeMinds #JoinTheJourney

Name: IES Colombia
Description:
Hazte miembro de IES Sección Colombia, obtienes acceso a una gran cantidad de recursos educativos, publicaciones, contenidos y normas para avanzar en tus conocimientos profesionales. Como miembro, formas parte de una comunidad basada en tus intereses y obtienes oportunidades para construir tu red profesional y enriquecer tus habilidades de liderazgo.

Te damos la bienvenida a #IESColombia.

Name: IT Professionalism Europe
Description:
IT Professionalism Europe's (ITPE) Mission is to create and maintain a network of organizations that are committed to furthering the IT profession in Europe.

ITPE has was initially started to promote the e-CF, a pan-European standard that has become the common language across Europe for IT competences and skills. As the e-CF has become the standard across Europe it is a strong component of ITPE. IT professionalism encompasses not only the development of competences, skills frameworks, and standards but also key topics such as education and training (certification, qualifications, continuous professional development), professional ethics and bodies of knowledge.

Name: 3rd Circle Professionals Club
Description:
OUR PURPOSE is to foster a vibrant and supportive community of like-minded professionals dedicated to personal and professional growth. We aim to create an environment where genuine friendships flourish, enabling high-quality business connections.

Through our unique blend of networking, social interaction, and professional development, we strive to empower our members to meet, bond, and excel in all aspects of their lives. Together, we are committed to building a positive and dynamic network that drives success and enriches our community.

We’re open to all professionals, including those in administrative or operational roles, in addition to those in sales or ownership positions.

Name: Mens Ontwikkel Bedrijf
Description:
Mens Ontwikkel Bedrijf (MOB) Landgraaf faciliteert, coacht, begeleidt en ondersteunt mensen woonachtig in Landgraaf met een afstand tot de arbeidsmarkt. Kandidaten die onder de Participatiewet vallen, worden hier ondersteund in de persoonlijke ontwikkeling van de verwachte werknemersvaardigheden. Maatwerk is hier geen loos begrip.


Wat betekenen onze kandidaten voor u als werkgever of organisatie?
De ontwikkeling van onze kandidaten is opgesplitst in 4 ontwikkelfasen. Ontwikkelfase 1 kennismaking en activering dmv sportactivering en activiteiten in de interne werkplek. In ontwikkelfase 2 gaat het vooral over arbeidsgewenning bij externe werkplekken.  De externe ontwikkelplek is veelal bij een lokale vrijwilligersorganisatie (non-profit). De kandidaat maakt in ontwikkelfase 3 de overstap naar een ontwikkelplek (ontwikkeling van specifieke arbeidsvaardigheden) in een productieomgeving bij een reguliere lokale ondernemer. 

Voor u, als werkgever of organisatie, zijn onze kandidaten interessant wanneer u maatschappelijk verantwoord wilt investeren in werk en mensen.

Description:
The Secret Sauce Society is a professional, membership-driven organization for like-minded, more giving, servant-hearted leaders. We believe that the most empowered and fulfilling way to live and lead is through service. We, therefore, provide support, host events, and facilitate monthly mastermind groups for members and guests seeking to nurture and develop this mindset and behavior within themselves and throughout their organizations. In sum, our goal is to instill a better, more sustainable way of living, leading, doing business, and scaling profit for the greater good.

Name: Skål International Germany
Description:
Skål International ist die älteste und bis heute einzige weltumspannende Vereinigung von Führungspersonen aller Sparten der Reise-, Freizeit- und Verkehrsindustrie. Die Vereinigung umfasst derzeit nahezu 12.000 Mitglieder in 95 Ländern mit knapp 400 Clubs. In Deutschland, nach den USA die zweitgrößte Skål-Nation, gehören dem Netzwerk etwa 700 Mitglieder an, die sich auf 19 lokale und regionale Clubs verteilen.

Skål International versteht sich als Vereinigung von Freunden, die sich beruflich und privat unterstützen. Unter dem Motto „Doing business among friends“ fühlen sich die Mitglieder auch geschäftlich verbunden. Weltweit setzt sich Skål für eine nachhaltige Tourismusentwicklung ein. Es besteht die Überzeugung, dass der Tourismus zum Frieden und zur Völkerverständigung beiträgt. Dazu steht den Mitgliedern die Skål-Datenbank mit rund 12.000 qualifizierten Kontakten von Führungskräften der Tourismusbranche in 95 Nationen zur Verfügung.

Neben diesem einzigartigen Netzwerk ergeben sich weitere Impulse aus den regelmäßigen Treffen der Mitglieder auf lokaler, regionaler, nationaler und internationaler Ebene. Vorträge, Besichtigungen und der Erfahrungsaustausch untereinander werden als hilfreich für die persönliche Horizonterweiterung und die Geschäftsentwicklung betrachtet. 
Skål-Mitglieder erhalten vielfache Vergünstigungen, etwa durch benefits anderer Skål-Mitglieder oder durch Partner, mit denen Skål International kooperiert. Der Skål-Mitgliedsausweis ermöglicht den Zugang zur Skål-Datenbank und bewährt sich als door opener in vielerlei Situationen.  Wie wohl jede Vereinigung, pflegt Skål International Rituale, die das Clubleben prägen und den Zusammenhalt fördern. Den vier Buchstaben des Clubnamens wurden mit der Zeit sinnstiftende Bedeutungen gegeben. Sie stehen für S = Sundhet (Gesundheit), K = Kärlek (Freundschaft), Å = Alder (langes Leben) und L für Lykka (Glück).  Schnuppermitglieder sind jederzeit herzlich willkommen. Skål !

Name: CIMA Society Asia Pacific
Description:
CIMA Society Asia Pacific is the community of practice for investment and wealth management professionals in the Asia Pacific (https://www.cimasocietyasiapacific.community). 

CIMA Society advances knowledge and collaboration among those involved in any aspect and/or giving advice ion any aspect of multi-asset, multi-manager investment portfolios. CIMA Society encourages, recognises and supports a range of investment credentials and designations amongst our members, including Certified Investment Management Analyst (CIMA) as the peak, international technical portfolio construction certification credentials for investment management analysts.    

CIMA Society Asia Pacific is the only international affiliate of the Investments and Wealth Institute (IWI), the Denver, USA-based international professional association, advanced education provider, and certification board for private wealth advisers,  investment consultants, and wealth managers., An association of 18,000 investment and wealth professionals located in 40 countries, IWI is the owner of the CIMA mark.

As IWI’s Asia Pacific international affiliate, CIMA Society provides an accredited CIMA certification education program pathway via its education partner, Portfolio Construction Forum, the specialist, independent provider of continuing education, accreditation and certification services in the Asia Pacific. 
The Forum’s academic research unit, the Investment Management Research Program is the Registered Education Provider with IWI for Asia Pacific to teach the Investment Management Analyst Certificate (IMAC) course, one of only three CIMA education programs globally and the only one tailored for candidates in the Asia Pacific region. 

The IMAC course is also the education requirement for the Investment Management Analyst (IMA) designation for CIMA Society Associate Member status.

Uniquely, IMAC graduates seamlessly integrate into becoming CIMA Society members.

Contact us and Join!

Name: Women Executives Circle (WEC)
Description:

Name: Ethiopian Environmental Health Association (EHA)
Description: The Ethiopian Environmental Health Professionals Association (EEHPA) has been operational since its legal registration by the Federal Ethiopian Charities and Civil Society's Authority under license No. 2927 on December 17, 2012. The Association is determined to the improvement of Environmental Health Services (WASH, IPC, Air Pollution Control, Waste Management, Ecosystem and Biodiversity Conservation, Occupational Health and Safety, and others) and the right of Environmental Health Professionals in Ethiopia. The association has over 700 active members and encompasses thousands of practitioners, academicians, researchers, and interested groups in all regions and cities in Ethiopia. EEHPA is determined to provide capacity building trainings, Improve the quality of WASH service in different settings, Emergency Response, WASH/IPC implementation practice improvement in HCFs, Policy document development, provide consultancy service to stakeholders, and collaborate with different organizations for proper implementation of hygiene and environmental health programs for better public health response in Ethiopia.

Name: Institute of Chartered Management Professionals (ICMP), USA
Description:
The Institute of Chartered Management Professionals (ICMP) is one of the leading professional organizations for Management Professionals. ICMP provides the leading resource for Corporate Leadership and Management positions in the Business World and Government Organizations. Both Professionals and Employers benefit from the ICMP certifications which are well recognized globally as a valid indicator of managerial competency and leadership potential.

Today’s management professionals, and aspirant professionals, require a well-rounded skill set and competency. With our mission to support anyone to become an outstanding management professional, we combine theory, application, productivity, and intuition skills into a focused, self-paced program that can be taken anytime, anywhere. We pick up where business school leaves off to teach you professional management of practical-world, on-the-job aspects related to Strategy, Operations, Finance, Human resources, Procurement, Marketing, Communication, and Quality.

ICMP provides credential of Chartered Management Professional (CMP) to lead the organization and certification of Certified Professional Manager (CPM) in various disciplines of Management to lead specific areas of Management. It’s time to make your resume stand out among other candidates, and to provide potential employers with the confidence that you can succeed in your role as a CEO or HoD.

It is mandatory for the holders of these prestigious designations to support the development of the management profession by contributing Continuing Professional Development (CPD) and abiding by the Institute Code of Ethics.

Name: InspireTORONTO
Description:
InspireTORONTO is one of 40+ chapters in the Inspire Leadership Network, a national membership organization comprised exclusively of CIOs
from public and private businesses, government, education, healthcare, and nonprofit institutions.

InspireTORONTO exists to help CIOs thrive in today’s most
challenging C-suite executive role. The chapter regularly
convenes leading CIOs and fosters meaningful relationships
by hosting non-commercial, member-led programs—helping
CIOs gain leadership advantage.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Toronto-based CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in North America. Since its inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: Club 99 - Fédération des festivals BD & arts associés

Labellisées pour l’année BD2020, nos manifestations se sont depuis réunies autour d’un projet commun soutenu par le ministère de la Culture et mis en œuvre conjointement avec le Centre National du Livre et la Sofia : la rémunération des autrices et des auteurs en dédicace dans le cadre des festivals de bande dessinée. Aujourd’hui, il est nécessaire que nous inventions notre propre outil afin de consolider, renforcer et défendre notre rôle d’acteur économique et créatif indispensable au rayonnement de nos territoires, de la bande dessinée et des arts associés. Nous faisons tous le même métier, celui de porter la voix de toutes les autrices et auteurs, artistes,  créatrices et créateurs auprès de tous les publics et de soutenir tous l’ensemble de la chaîne du livre.
Le Club 99 constitue un réseau d’échange collaboratif, de réflexions et d’actions collectives pour plus de 400 festivals en France dédiés à la bande dessinée et aux arts associés.

Name: Confagricoltura Lombardia
Description:
Confagricoltura Lombardia è una delle diciannove Federazioni Regionali afferenti a Confagricoltura (Confederazione Generale dell'Agricoltura Italiana delle piccole e medie imprese agricole) che, con oltre un secolo di storia, è il più rappresentativo sindacato di imprenditori agricoli a livello nazionale. L'esigenza di costituire una Federazione Regionale fu avvertita dalle Unioni Provinciali Agricoltori (di seguito U.P.A.) nel corso del 1970, anno in cui furono istituite le Regioni e fu loro trasferita gran parte delle funzioni amministrative in ambito agricolo, precedentemente esercitate dallo Stato. I Presidenti delle U.P.A. della Lombardia diedero quindi vita nel 1972, attraverso un atto pubblico, a "Federlombarda Agricoltori" (successivamente denominata Confagricoltura Lombardia) assegnando a quest'ultima la funzione di rappresentare e tutelare le U.P.A. stesse nei confronti della Regione e degli altri Enti o Amministrazioni a livello regionale.

Confagricoltura Lombardia oggi rappresenta, a livello regionale, le Unioni Provinciali Agricoltori della Lombardia (Bergamo, Brescia, Como e Lecco, Cremona, Mantova, Milano-Lodi-Monza Brianza, Pavia, Sondrio, Varese), nonché i loro soci e le categorie professionali, sindacali ed economiche, inquadrate al loro interno.

Description:
The Association has a vision that Outdoor Therapy is recognised as an accessible and credible approach that benefits individuals, society, and our planet.

The objectives of the Association will be are: 
a)	 To develop and support safe, ethical, and sustainable approaches to outdoor therapy and build capability in the field.  
 b)	To build a thriving community of practice in outdoor therapy in UK and Ireland.
 c)	To promote knowledge and develop understanding across diverse applications of outdoor therapy. 

Membership of the Association will be open to anyone over the age of 18 years who supports the objectives of the Association.

Name: The Black Executive Director’s Network (BLK ED Network)
Description:
The Black Executive Director's Network (BLK ED Network) is a national membership-based community designed to address the systemic issues and inequities faced by Black Executive Directors in the nonprofit sector by equipping them with resources to thrive in their leadership roles. Our vision is to narrow the racial leadership gap, ultimately driving inclusion, diversity, and solution-based models to eliminate cultural biases, and reshaping the philanthropic landscape. 

Our mission is to empower Black Executive Directors as they navigate the systemic challenges in the nonprofit sector by providing access to the community, capital, and equitable development growth opportunities. 

Isolated, Inadequate Salary, Lack of Relationship with Funding Sources, and Called to Represent an Entire Community according to the 2019 Race to Lead Survey are some of the challenges faced by people of color in the nonprofit sector. According to the National Center for Charitable Statistics, there are more than 1.5 million registered nonprofits in the United States; however, only 150,000 of those organizations are led by people of color. Through our community, we seek to address the disparities in nonprofit leadership by creating mentorship, professional development, and the collective sharing of thoughts and ideas in culturally safe spaces where black leaders are affirmed in their identity. 

The BLK ED Network offers three programmatic components: Community, Capital, and Cultivation.

Name: Camara de Comercio Paraguayo Uruguaya
Description:
