Nuestra misión es ser el puente entre empresarios, inversores y emprendedores de ambos países, creando un entorno favorable para el intercambio comercial y la cooperación económica.

A través de nuestras iniciativas, brindamos oportunidades de networking, capacitaciones, asistencia técnica y facilitamos el acceso a información clave para hacer negocios. Fomentamos el desarrollo de nuevos proyectos, inversiones y alianzas estratégicas que impulsen el crecimiento económico y el bienestar de ambos países.

Si estás interesado en explorar oportunidades de negocio, expandir tu red de contactos o profundizar en el comercio bilateral, comunicate con nosotros!

Name: Comité régional de conchyliculture de Méditerranée (CRCM)
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page du Comité régional de conchyliculture de Méditerranée ! 

Nous sommes en charge de représenter les professionnels de la façade méditerranéenne qui se livrent aux activités de production, de distribution et de transformation des produits de la conchyliculture dans les circonscriptions conchylicoles de Leucate (11), Gruissan (11), Vendres (34), Marseillan (34), Mèze (34), Loupian (34), Bouzigues (34), Sète (34), Frontignan (34), Port St Louis du Rhône (13), La Seyne Sur Mer (83) et la Corse. 
Soit 560 entreprises, pour une production annuelle de 11 000 tonnes d’huitre et 5 500 tonnes de moules.  

La conchyliculture en Méditerranée est hors du commun, c’est ce qui en fait notre fierté. Chacun de nous par son expérience, ses affinités et ses secrets d’élevage, apporte sa touche personnelle à sa production. Une chose nous rassemble toutefois, cette passion d’élever, jour après jour, nos coquillages par la méthode unique de l’élevage sur cordes.   

Cet élevage, sur cordes et sur tables, est bel est bien l’ADN de la conchyliculture sous nos latitudes.

Name: Bundesverband der Berufsbetreuer*innen e.V. (BdB)
Description:
Der Bundesverband der Berufsbetreuer*innen wurde 1994 gegründet – nur zwei Jahre, nachdem mit dem Betreuungsgesetz Konzepte wie „Entmündigung“ und „Vormundschaft“ für Erwachsene abgelöst wurden. 

Bereits damals leitete uns der Gedanke, Menschen mit Betreuungsbedarf in Deutschland professionell zu unterstützen, so dass sie ein möglichst selbstbestimmtes Leben führen können. Mit unserer fachlichen Expertise und viel Idealismus setzten wir uns bereits frühzeitig für mehr gesellschaftliche Teilhabe betreuter Personen ein, wie sie erst später gesetzlich verankert wurde.

Gleichzeitig konnten wir immer erleben, wie sehr uns eine große, fachlich versierte Gemeinschaft stärkt.

Unser Handeln und unsere Entscheidungen basieren auf demselben humanistischen Menschenbild, das auch der UN-Menschenrechtskonvention von 1948 und der UN-Behindertenrechtskonvention von 2006 zugrunde liegt.

Name: BNI CHARENTE 16
Description:
BNI (Business Network International) est le premier réseau d’affaires en France, en Europe et dans le Monde.
BNI est devenu un réseau de fait, mais c'est avant tout une méthode, structurée, éprouvée, et améliorée depuis plus de 37 ans dans le Monde et plus de 15 ans en France.

La mission de BNI est d’aider les entrepreneurs et professions libérales à développer leurs ventes grâce à notre approche structurée, positive et incitative du marketing de recommandation. Son objectif est de leur permettre de structurer leur réseau en développant leurs affaires grâce à la recommandation.

« Qui donne reçoit »
C’est l’état d’esprit que partagent les Membres BNI. Celui qui donne des recommandations en reçoit lui-même et c’est parce que tout le monde donne que tout le monde reçoit. C’est un état d’esprit qui apporte de la cohésion au Groupe et constitue un véritable moteur, car il implique un mode de fonctionnement basé sur la solidarité, la confiance et l’entraide.

Un accompagnement régulier
BNI fédère plus de 300 000 Membres dans plus de 70 régions du monde, dont 20 000 en France et en Belgique francophone, autour d’une méthode commune basée sur le marketing de recommandation. Son équipe de professionnels accompagne, forme et encadre les Groupes BNI pour assurer le succès de tous les Membres.

Name: Byen Vår Drammen AS
Description: Byen Vår Drammen AS eies av Drammen kommune og 130 næringsvirksomheter. Staben består av 5 personer som står på for å utvikle et levende og attraktivt bysentrum i Drammen. Våre virkemidler er aktiviteter, tiltak og markedsføring som styrker bylivet og gjennom det bidrar til utvikling av næringslivet. Våre aksjonærer og oppdragsgivere er butikker, sentrumsnære kjøpesentre, tjenesteleverandører, byens hoteller, serveringsvirksomheter, eiendomsselskaper samt kultur- og opplevelsesaktører. Byen Vår Drammen er arrangør av Elvefestivalen og Globusfestivalen og er medarrangør av World Cup Drammen. For tiden leder Byen Vår Drammen prosjektet «Attraktive Drammen» som har som fokus å styrke Drammens attraktivitet overfor innbyggere og besøkende. Selskapet har også bygget opp virksomhetsområdet Destinasjon Drammen som destinasjonsselskap for Drammen og regionen.

Name: OKC Latino Young Professionals
Description:
OKC Latino Young Professionals Association (OKCLYP) is dedicated to developing, connecting, and empowering Oklahoma’s fastest-growing demographic. OKCLYP exists to provide a culturally supportive environment for young professionals to access mentoring, networking, professional development opportunities, and resources to thrive personally and professionally.

Our organization is built on four key pillars: Mentoring, Networking, Professional Development, and Resources & Community. We are fulfilling our mission to advance opportunities for Latinos and Hispanics in Oklahoma by identifying gaps in representation and connecting qualified, passionate leaders to opportunities that position them to be change makers and decision drivers. Through our partnerships, we prioritize sharing information that will benefit the OKCLYP network and the larger Latino and Hispanic communities in our city, such as career and educational opportunities, funding sources, board service, professional recognition, civic engagement, and business opportunities. 

History
Oklahoma City is the 20th largest city in the United States and the Latino and Hispanic population is growing rapidly, yet, as of 2020, there was not an organization focused on comprehensively developing Latino and Hispanic leaders. Recognizing this leadership gap, our Founder and President, Miriam Campos, founded OKC Latino Young Professionals  (OKCLYP) to connect existing leaders and develop a pipeline of new leaders in our community. Formally established as a non-profit association in 2022, OKC Latino Young Professionals (OKCLYP) is led by an engaged Board of Directors who are dedicated to serving our community, driving positive change in our city, and advancing opportunities for Latinos and Hispanics in Oklahoma.

Name: DFJV Deutscher Fachjournalisten-Verband

Unser Leistungsangebot umfasst individuelle und kostenfreie Beratungen in den verschiedensten Bereichen, einen Honorarfactoring-Service, Weiterbildungsangebote, ein fachjournalistisches Onlinemagazin sowie zahlreiche weitere Publikationen zu wichtigen journalistischen Themenfeldern, Regionaltreffen für Mitglieder, die Ausstellung des Presseausweises sowie optional der Bezug einer JournalistenCard (Visa) sowie die Absicherung gegen verschiedene Berufsrisiken.

Mit der Tochtergesellschaft DFJV Bildungsgesellschaft mbH betreibt der DFJV eigene Journalistenschulen – die Deutsche Journalisten-Akademie und das Deutsche Journalistenkolleg.

Name: WOW!HR Global
Description:
WOW!HR is a large international event in the field of human resources management. It has been hosted HR specialists from Russia, Armenia, Central Asia and GCC regions since 2015. The event includes an Award Ceremony to honor HR excellence, enlightening Conference Sessions featuring industry leaders, an Expo showcasing HR solutions, valuable Partnership & Networking Opportunities for hands-on learning and a platform for Inspiration & Recognition of HR achievements.

Upcoming WOW!HR events:
- WOW!HR Central Asia - October 21, Almaty
- WOW!HR Armenia - November 22, Yerevan
- WOW!HR GCC - December 12, Abu Dhabi

What is WOW!HR?
1. Celebration of Excellence:
Through prestigious awards, we celebrate the outstanding achievements of HR professionals, shining a spotlight on innovation and excellence.

2. Continuous Improvement:
WOW!HR is a catalyst for improvement, offering a space for learning, knowledge exchange, and the exploration of cutting-edge HR practices.

3. Global Impact:
With a global reach, we aim to influence HR practices worldwide, creating a positive impact on economy, businesses and professionals across borders.

4. Innovation Showcase:
The expo component serves as a stage for businesses to showcase innovative HR solutions, fostering an environment of creativity and advancement.

5. Community Building:
WOW!HR is a vibrant community hub where HR professionals, thought leaders, and industry experts connect, collaborate, and contribute to the collective growth of the field.

6. Partnership Opportunities:
We provide diverse partnership opportunities, allowing organizations to align with a community dedicated to advancing HR and driving positive change.

Name: Loire Estuaire Decarbonation
Description:
La démarche Loire Estuaire Décarbonation, portée par un collectif d’acteurs industriels et publics, vise la transformation du territoire industrialo-portuaire en un hub d’énergies décarbonées pour atteindre la neutralité carbone à horizon 2050. 
Lauréat de l’Appel à Projet Zones Industrielles Bas Carbone (ZIBaC) de l’ADEME et France 2030, Loire Estuaire Décarbonation s’appuie sur une vingtaine de projets visant à accélérer la transformation de cet espace de 28 500 emplois. 

Cette démarche est portée par l'association ADELE (Association DEcarbonation Loire Estuaire), créée en 2023. L'association regroupe des industriels du territoire Loire Estuaire, Saint Nazaire Agglomération, la Communauté de Communes Estuaire et Sillon, la Région Pays de la Loire et le Grand Port Maritime Nantes Saint Nazaire.

L’ADELE orchestre cette dynamique collective et son programme pour accélérer la transition énergétique du territoire.

Au delà des membres fondateurs, la démarche Loire Estuaire Décarbonation est ouverte à tout entité (entreprises, organismes de formation, acteur du développement local, etc.) souhaitant contribuer à cette dynamique de décarbonation du territoire.

Name: The IIA Cincinnati Chapter
Description:
The Cincinnati Chapter of the Institute of Internal Auditors (IIA) was established in 1949 and currently has over 500 members encompassing the Greater Cincinnati, Northern Kentucky, and Southeast Indiana areas.

The chapter has achieved Platinum status since 2010 and was upgraded to a Ruby Chapter in 2020. The chapter provides training, education, and networking opportunities to internal audit professionals via our monthly meetings which are typically held once a month between September and May. Event venues may be held in downtown Cincinnati, one of areas the many suburbs, or at a sponsoring corporation. Beginning in 2020 the chapter began offering virtual events and plans to continue offering them into the future, Additionally, the chapter holds a multi-day seminar where members have the opportunity to earn anywhere from 8 to 24 CPE hours.

Besides continuing your professional education with the chapter, our meetings are casual so that you can meet and network with other local internal audit professionals. There are also ample ways to volunteer with the Cincinnati Chapter which will heighten your leadership skills and give you the opportunity to work with many Chapter members as well as the local community.

Name: YSEALI PFP | Young Southeast Asian Leaders Initiative Professional Fellows Program
Description: The Young Southeast Asian Leaders Initiative Professional Fellows Program (YSEALI PFP) is a two-way U.S. Department of State exchange program designed to strengthen people-to-people ties between young leaders from Brunei, Burma, Cambodia, Indonesia, Laos, Malaysia, Philippines, Singapore, Thailand,  Timor-Leste, Vietnam, and the United States. Through virtual activities and intensive fellowships designed to broaden their professional expertise and enhance their leadership capabilities, YSEALI PFP provides emerging Southeast Asian leaders with the opportunity to gain first-hand experiences in, and exposure to, U.S. public and private sector offices working on a variety of issues related to Civic Engagement; Innovation, Entrepreneurship, and Economic Empowerment; Society and Governance; and Sustainability and the Environment. Follow-on reciprocal exchanges provide select American professionals the opportunity to visit Southeast Asia to further enhance two-way exchange, support, and knowledge sharing with YSEALI PFP alumni in their home communities.

Name: Florida Puerto Rico District of ITE
Description: The Florida Puerto Rico District of ITE (FLPRITE) serves as an extension of ITE who's mission is to provide the global community of transportation professionals with the knowledge, practices, skills and connections to serve the needs of their communities and help shape the future of the profession and transportation in the societal context.

Name: Chartered Institute of Management Specialists
Description:
CIMS is dedicated to providing unparalleled quality in management education, guided by the following principles.

CIMS has been granted official recognition under the guidance of the distinguished Secretary of State, Michael G. Adams. This acknowledgement is more than just a stamp of approval; it is a symbol of our institute’s credibility and adherence to the highest standards in the field of management education.

Our accreditation by the Commonwealth of Kentucky signifies that CIMS stands out as a paragon of professionalism and quality. We have undergone rigorous scrutiny and have been found to meet and exceed the stringent criteria set forth by the accrediting body.

Being registered and accredited isn’t just a formality for us; it’s a commitment to maintaining the highest standards of professionalism. We believe in providing our members with an educational experience that not only meets industry benchmarks but sets new ones.

CIMS is dedicated to delivering top-notch management education that empowers professionals to excel in their careers. Our programs are designed to be cutting-edge, relevant, and aligned with the evolving demands of the global business landscape.
When you choose CIMS, you choose an institution that has been officially recognized for its commitment to excellence. Our accreditation by the Commonwealth of Kentucky serves as your assurance that you are part of an institute that values quality, professionalism, and the continuous pursuit of knowledge.
In every facet of our operation, from curriculum development to faculty selection, we strive for excellence. Join us at CIMS, where the gold standard in management education is not just a goal but a reality.

Name: Jharkhand Government Tool Room, Ranchi
Description:
Jharkhand Government Tool Room (JGTR) was established in 2007 with state of art technology by the Govt. of Jharkhand with the support of Ministry of MSME, Govt. of India under the supervision of MECON. It is working under Department of Industries, Govt. of Jharkhand. The Chairman of the centre is Secretary Industries, G.O.J and Vice Chairman is Director of Industries, Govt. of Jharkhand. The institute is being governed by a Governing Council having the members VC, BIT Mesra, Ranchi, Director NIFFT, Ranchi, CMD CMPDI, CMD HEC, Ranchi, CMD C.C.L, Ranchi, Plant Head, TATA Motors, Jamshedpur, Director MSME-DI, Ranchi, President JSIA, SLBC etc. Apart from conducting AICTE approved 4 years Diploma in Tool & Die Making (Equivalent to Diploma in Mechanical Engineering), centre is also having full fledged production department equipped with latest Hi-Tech machines.

Jharkhand Government Tool Room, Ranchi on its part always has been trying to help the industries, students and the society by way of providing technical know-how and up gradation through various skill development training programmes on CNC, CAD/CAM, TQM, TPM,5S, Six Sigma, Design & Mfg. of Jigs & Fixtures, Moulds, Dies, welder, electrician, fitter, plumber, machinist, turner, etc.

Our Activities

    Industry based long-term training for Tool & Die makers.
    Short term training for Managers/Supervisors to upgrade their knowledge & skills.
    Medium Term Course for Need based technical training for Skilled workers / Tool makers / Machinist etc.
    Training for inspection, quality control and maintenance.
    Training in CNC technology & CAD / CAM / CAE , Reverse Engineering.
    Having full-fledged production department engaged in design and manufacturing of Jigs, Fixture, Mould, Gauges, Die Casting Dies and precision machining

Name: XPX - Charlotte - Exit Planning Exchange
Description:
Charlotte chapter of XPX (Exit Planning Exchange) is a multi-disciplinary community of professional advisors who work collaboratively to help owners of lower/middle-market companies build valuable businesses and assist them in preparing and executing a successful transition. 

XPX Charlotte members:
> Embrace a shared responsibility for educating each other on the many disciplines of exit planning, 
> Work to develop trusted relationships enabling client collaboration, and 
> Take ownership for sharing the importance and urgency of effective exit planning with business owners in our community. 

XPX Charlotte’s success is continually measured by optimal outcomes of business value growth, business value transfer and owner life and legacy.

Name: European Cooperation System
Description:
We are an independent non-governmental diplomacy body, working in economic affairs and institutional relations.
We observe, among other things, the economic cooperation between Europe and all the countries where it has diplomatic representation.
Our fields of expertise are in development and security, neighborhood policy strategies within Europe, crisis management in the world and the promotion of democracy.

Description: We are a networking group for young professionals in the Southern Tier NY area. We host monthly networking events to connect young professionals. Please like and attend one of our monthly events if interested!

Name: National Speakers Association - Philadelphia Chapter
Description: NSA-PHL is a home for premier professional speakers in the Philadelphia area, and additionally serves as an encouraging platform for emerging speakers. We foster a community united by the power of the spoken word. Our members range from enterprising individuals to corporate employees, each contributing to the diversity and dynamism of our community. We are dedicated to excellence in speaking and business, offering educational opportunities through industry-leading professionals. Our members, both established and new speakers, benefit from monthly networking events, visibility through our online directory, promotional opportunities, expert coaching, members-only pricing for our dynamic programs, and the chance to participate in our Speakers Academy. At NSA-PHL, we celebrate diversity and the exchange of ideas, making our community stronger, more dynamic, and inclusive.

Name: History Teachers' Association of NSW
Description:
The History Teachers' Association of NSW (HTANSW) seeks to promote the study and teaching of History and to provide professional support for those working in the area of History Education. 

Formed in 1954 by Renée Fauvette Erdos (1911-1997), HTANSW grew quickly, evolving our operations to reflect changes in pedagogy, teaching and learning and the use of technology. A proud volunteer organisation, HTANSW’s Board of Directors and dedicated employees engage in a variety of activities to support the discipline of History, its teachers and their students including:
- Providing face-to-face and online professional development opportunities for History Teachers 
- Sharing articles, reviews and teaching and learning activities via our journal, Teaching History
- Developing publications, videos and podcasts designed to support students and teachers of History
- Organising competitions for History students and sponsoring an annual NSW Premier’s Teacher Scholarship
- Consulting with government bodies, schools, universities and cultural institutions to support the discipline of History
- Advocating on behalf of students and teachers of History in NSW and supporting them through the implementation of new curricula

For more information on HTANSW, visit our website or find us on Facebook, Instagram and Twitter.

Name: Space Coast FPRA
Description: Since 1984, the Space Coast Chapter of the Florida Public Relations Association has been promoting and developing the public relations profession. Its membership is one of the most diverse in the state with multiple levels of experience and differing areas of expertise. From non-profits to high-tech companies, the Space Coast Chapter offers a wide array of professional networking opportunities, professional development programs, and community service projects.

Name: Chief Mama Officer
Description:
Chief Mama Officer is a leadership coaching and training company that helps women leaders succeed without sacrificing their souls.

Through executive coaching, career guidance, workshops for employers, and curated experiences, we help leaders and organizations shift from depletion-based achievement to care-centered leadership—where presence, fulfillment, and sustainable impact are non-negotiable.

We believe care is not a soft skill—it's the operating system for sustainable leadership.

Name: Ontario Dental Assistants Association
Description:
The ODAA recognizes and advances the professional standing of Certified Dental Assistants, Certified Dental Receptionists, and Certified Dental Treatment Coordinators. We support our members as essential and valued professionals integral to the oral health care team, fostering respect and pride through advocacy, leadership, quality continuing education, and recognized credentials.

As the leading voice in enhancing the profession and empowering Dental Assistants in Ontario, the ODAA is an inclusive organization dedicated to advocating for formally trained oral health professionals. The ODAA prioritizes public safety through the maintenance of rigorous certification standards, high-quality continuing education, and collaboration with other oral health professional organizations to further the respect and value of recognized credentials. The ODAA envisions a future where Dental Assistants in Ontario have a robust and respected voice within the sector. We strive for a future where dental assisting is viewed as a rewarding career within the oral health team and where our profession is recognized for its vital role in oral health care.

Name: IACOA
Description:
The Independent Armored Car Operators Association, Inc. (IACOA) was founded in 1971 to provide an association for the growing number of privately owned armored car companies and to promote high standards of operation.

Our members work together within IACOA in a number of areas, including education, legislative issues, transportation, and technological advances.

Over the years, the organization has grown to include companies throughout the United States and the world.

Name: SIFIMBANK
Description:
La première édition du Salon International de la Finance, de la Monétique, des Banques et de l’Assurance de Guinée en abrégé SIFIMBANK se tiendra les 03 et 04 JUIN 2022 au Primus Hôtel Kaloum de Conakry et s’inscrit dans le cadre de la contribution de la profession dans la mise en place de programme d’amélioration de la qualité des services bancaires érigée en obligation légale, et ce en vue de la hisser au niveau des normes internationales.

Le SIFIMBANK ambitionne de présenter au grand public guinéen et aux professionnels les mutations qualitatives du secteur bancaire, de la finance, de l’assurance et de la monétique à travers les innovations spectaculaires opérées pour accélérer le taux de bancarisation au niveau national, promouvoir le développement et l’expansion du e-banking, la mesofinance et la microfinance digitale, les moyens de payements électroniques, l’assurance digitale etc…

Le salon poussera les nouvelles autorités à réfléchir avec les professionnels du domaine pour faire évoluer la législation de manière attractive et le mouvement de restructuration qu’il y’a à mener visant à faire de Conakry, une place financière de premier plan en Afrique de l’Ouest. 

Il mettra également en exergue le développement des moyens de paiements modernes, notamment la monétique, comme signe d’adhésion à l’économie numérique.

Le SIFIMBANK constitue une opportunité pour tisser une relation d’affaires entre les acteurs de la finance, de la monétique, des Banques, de l’Assurance et des Etablissements Financiers et les exposants prestataires de services. Ces relations d’affaires auront une portée nationale et Ouest-africaine, compte tenu de la participation de la quasi-totalité des acteurs nationaux de la finance, de la monétique, de la banque et de l’assurance en Guinée et  de certains pays de la sous-région.

Name: Tide Talks Wealth
Description: Women Talk Wealth is a University of Alabama finance organization! WTW will provide a one-year program consisting of weekly educational seminars covering four key tenets: Industry Landscape, Market Knowledge, Financial Literacy and Personal Branding. Upon completion of the program, members will leave with a deeper interest in a specific career path, the ability to market themselves professionally, confidence to speak on market concepts and current events, and knowledge of personal and professional finance.

Name: Inn Laws
Description:
Something happened to legal networking.

It used to happen in the real world — in courthouses, in hallways, over dinner after a rough file. You traded war stories, picked up hard-earned lessons, and found people you could actually trust.

Now? It’s stiff events, LinkedIn humblebrags, and cluttered mailing lists. Most lawyers are stuck with the narrow perspectives inside their firm's walls — or worse, they go it alone.

That’s why Dylan Gibbs built Inn Laws, a private community for Canadian lawyers who care about their craft.

Inside, our members don’t have to posture, impress, or pretend they’ve got it all figured out. 
Instead we offer:
   •  Curated peer groups → real advice from like-minded lawyers.
   •  Intimate in-person events → connection without the schmoozing.
   •  An online forum → candid conversations you won’t find on LinkedIn.
   •  Accredited CPD → the kind members call “actually useful.”

Our members are 60+ lawyers from across Canada. They’re ambitious, collaborative, and not afraid to question the old model of practice.

Dylan clerked at the Supreme Court of Canada, litigated at top firms, and served as a Crown prosecutor. Now he combines both skillsets to help lawyers grow their practice and enjoy their work.

If you’re a Canadian lawyer who wants sharper practice and a saner career, join us.
 Apply at innlaws.ca

Name: De Noorderbron
Description:
Locatie in de natuur voor vergaderingen en bijeenkomsten 
Voedselbos
Lezingen en workshops
Bloemenplukweide
www.denoorderbron.nl

LOCATIE IN DE NATUUR
Haal maar eens diep adem en laat de tijd even los. Steeds meer mensen willen weer de verbinding voelen met alles wat de natuur, de bron, ons te bieden heeft. Bij de Noorderbron hebben we een unieke plek gecreëerd waar dit kan.

Een locatie aan de rand van het dorp, middenin een voedselbos in aanleg, met uitzicht over de weilanden en een bloemenweide in de zomerperiode. Je wordt uitgenodigd om te genieten met al je zintuigen; van een vergadering of training met een lunch van streekproducten tot een interessante lezing. Van een workshop of huiskamerconcert tot een heerlijke wandeling door de bloemenweide.

Ervaar de magie van de natuur.
Je bent van harte welkom bij de Noorderbron.

Name: Secret Women's Collab
Description:
Secret Women’s Collab 
Conversation. Connection. Community

Feeling isolated? Tired of awkward networking events that feel more like sales pitches than real conversations? So were we. That’s why we created Secret Women’s Collab, a calm, welcoming space where working women can show up exactly as they are - messy, brilliant, busy, dreaming, and connected.

If you’re looking for stiff name tags, awkward ice breaker intros, forced small talk, showing up just for insta, and people pretending they have it all figured out - you’re in the wrong place.

We’re here for women:
building businesses
chasing dreams
working remotely or part time/casual
climbing career ladders
and craving a genuine community along the way 

No pitches. No pressure. No pretending. Just real conversations, dorky laughs, and the magic of connection.

Our events are low-pressure, high-connection spaces where you can breathe out, be yourself, and know you’ll leave with more than just a handful of business cards you’ll throw out later. You’ll leave with new friendships, fresh ideas, and a reminder that you’re not doing this alone. Through casual catch-ups, workshops, and community events, we create the kind of connection that sticks - long after the coffee cups are empty and the mimosa buzz has worn off.

Come as you are. Leave feeling like you've found your people.

Find our events here: https://secret-womens-collab-gqvqel.mailerpage.io/ 
Contact us here: hello@secretwomenscollab.com.au

Ash & Em

Name: Australia and New Zealand Sleep Science Association (ANZSSA)
Description:
Australia and New Zealand Sleep Science Association (ANZSSA) is the representative professional body for Scientists, Nurses and Clinical Physiologists working in the fields of sleep medicine and/or sleep research

As the primary multidisciplinary body in sleep physiology, technology and research, ANZSSA's aims are to:

•	Serve as a professional representative body
•	Encourage and facilitate communication among individuals working in the fields of sleep medicine and sleep research and other interested parties
•	Promote and continually develop best practice and optimal minimum standards of practice and patient care
•	Play a key role in the field's development, in collaboration with other relevant bodies

Name: Premier Group
Description:
About Us
Founded in the United Kingdom in 1950, Premier Group of Companies has grown from a single enterprise into a globally recognized business group with a strong and diverse presence across multiple industries. With a legacy spanning over 70 years, we continue to build on our values of innovation, trust, and excellence.

Global Presence
Today, Premier Group of Companies operates across key international markets, with a well-established footprint in:
United Kingdom – 6 companies

Pakistan – 6 companies

China – 4 companies

Dubai – 2 companies

Hong Kong – 2 companies

This extensive global reach enables us to leverage international expertise, local insights, and strong partnerships to deliver exceptional value to our stakeholders.

Our Mission
To create sustainable businesses that contribute positively to the global economy while maintaining the highest standards of quality, ethics, and customer satisfaction.

Our Vision
To be a leading multinational group known for resilience, adaptability, and forward-thinking strategies, empowering growth and innovation across industries and geographies.

Core Values
Integrity – Conducting business with honesty and transparency.

Innovation – Driving progress through creativity and adaptability.

Excellence – Delivering quality and reliability across all our ventures.

Sustainability – Building businesses with a long-term positive impact.

Description:

Through the support of our sponsors - Prosper Portland, GRAYBOX, Big Commerce, and Great Notion Brewing - we host events that help professionals learn from industry leaders, connect with local peers, and stay on top of the latest ecommerce trends and tools.

This group is an extension of the Ecommerce Portland organization which started in 2015!

Name: ALCO - Association des Laiteries Coopératives
Description:
L’Association des Laiteries Coopératives (ALCO) fondée en 1893, est un acteur majeur de la filière laitière, patrimoine de la région Charentes-Poitou, basée à Surgères. 

Elle est composée de 4 entités :
 
- ALCO : a pour missions de défendre les intérêts et les valeurs des coopératives membres, de représenter et promouvoir la coopération agricole dans les instances régionales et nationales, et enfin de mettre en œuvre des actions permettant à ses coopératives adhérentes de se développer.

- le LILCO : Laboratoire Interprofessionnel Laitier du Centre Ouest a pour missions principales de réaliser des analyses pour le paiement du lait, des analyses de santé animale et sanitaire et également des analyses de contrôles laitiers. 
Le LILCO analyse uniquement le lait issu directement des exploitations (avant transformation).

- le LABCO :  Laboratoire du Centre-Ouest réalise des analyses bactériologiques et de composition, il est spécialiste de l'hygiène, de la sécurité des aliments et de la maîtrise des environnements. Acteur majeur de l'industrie alimentaire sur son secteur, le LABCO dispose d'un service de consulting et d'un parc analytique doté des meilleures technologies actuelles. 

- le Syndicat des Laiteries : Organisme de Défense et de Gestion (ODG) dont la principale mission est de promouvoir et de défendre le label AOP Beurre Charentes Poitou au profit de 8 marques (La Conviette, Echiré, Grand Fermage, Lescure, Maison Lescure, Montaigu, Pamplie et Surgères).

Name: IEEE Women in Engineering University of Ibadan Student Branch

Name: VESL
Description:
Experts in Digital Transformation of manufacturing facilities through: Data Analytics, Simulation, and Automation.

We have over 65 years of experience in manufacturing. We enjoy working with customers to virtually contain their problems, and ship working solutions. 

There are many software providers for Modeling, Simulation, and Data Science.  Each user license adds to your annual expenses, and you must higher trained professionals just to operate the software. The alternative is to hire a consultant to run the software for you.  This leaves product developers in a lurch when they need to run a new set of conditions.  Leaving customers with a fresh bill each time they want to innovate and expand analysis.  

VESL develops and distributes software for our customers, maintains that program, and tailors it drectly to our customers needs.  They login and use it. No IT team, and No simulation specialists required. 

We provide virtual resources for modeling, data, analytics, and software to reduce waste, streamline workflows, designed to supporting manufacturing, scientists, and researchers. 

We build that into your software, and you get the information needed to drive innovation.

Description:
Depuis 1981, la CSFC est un syndicat professionnel qui défend les intérêts des formateurs indépendants et consultants. Engagé dans une démarche d’amélioration continue des pratiques pédagogiques et technologiques, la Chambre Syndicale des Formateurs Consultants propose 3 types de services : 
Veille pédagogique, technologique et réglementaire des actions de formation
Événements en présentiel par les CSFC régionales et visio par la Fédération
Journées de formations, transversales où propre à l’activité de formateur. 

Pour promouvoir ses membres auprès des organismes de formation, la CSFC met à disposition de ses adhérents un annuaire des talents. Son objectif est de référencer tous nos adhérents pour qu’ils soient visibles des organismes de formations, écoles et entreprises.

Name: GOLDDIAMOND PI CLUB
Description:
GoldDiamond PI Club is an award-winning, nationwide Personal Injury Club connecting PI attorneys, non-PI attorneys who collaborate with PI firms, medical doctors, chiropractors, physical therapists, MRI centers, funding companies, and other accident-related industry professionals. Founded by Dr. Tannaz Modaresi, our mission is to elevate the personal injury field through education, networking, leadership, and business growth.

As the only dedicated Personal Injury Club of its kind, we bring together professionals who directly serve PI clients or partner with PI law firms—including employment lawyers, family law attorneys, immigration lawyers, criminal defense attorneys, bankruptcy attorneys, business lawyers, and other legal professionals who share referrals with the PI community.

Members gain access to high-value PI referrals, cross-practice collaborations, CLE educational programs, attorney–doctor partnerships, PI Power Series conferences, and exclusive business development opportunities. As a private, member-based organization, we host 11 major events each year, featuring advanced workshops and premium networking gatherings at upscale venues.

We prioritize quality over quantity, cultivating a trusted and collaborative environment where lawyers, medical providers, and industry specialists build meaningful relationships, deepen their knowledge, and grow their practices through strategic connections.

Members of GoldDiamond PI Club receive:
• Premium PI networking with attorneys & medical providers
• Cross-referral opportunities for PI & non-PI lawyers
• CLE educational workshops
• Attorney–doctor collaboration
• Business development and marketing support
• Exclusive speaking opportunities
• National visibility through GoldDiamond PI Magazine

GoldDiamond PI Club is the leading hub for personal injury growth, cross-practice collaboration, and industry leadership—uniting driven professionals who want to scale, connect, and stand out nationwide.

Name: CAPEB NOUVELLE AQUITAINE
Description:
La CAPEB régionale est une structure de représentation, d’action et de mise en commun de moyens, mise en place par les CAPEB départementales. Elle agit en leur nom et assure la défense et la représentation des intérêts des entreprises artisanales dans les instances régionales de décision. Indépendante de la puissance publique, la CAPEB régionale mène des missions d’intérêt général.
La CAPEB se mobilise pour promouvoir, défendre, représenter les intérêts économiques, sociaux et moraux des entreprises artisanales dans la région. Elle assure la défense des adhérents de la CAPEB et représente l’artisanat du bâtiment face aux pouvoirs publics.
La CAPEB, au niveau régional, assure un suivi des dossiers législatifs, juridiques, fiscaux, économiques, professionnels et sociaux et contribue au développement économique des entreprises de la région.

Name: Assemblée des Professeurs de l'INAGHEI

Notre mandat principal est d'assurer une formation de pointe, fondée sur des curricula rigoureux et une pédagogie innovante, afin de préparer nos étudiants à relever les défis complexes du leadership et de la gouvernance à l'échelle nationale et internationale.

Nous vous invitons à suivre cette page pour rester informé de nos initiatives stratégiques, de nos publications scientifiques et des contributions significatives que nous apportons au paysage de l'enseignement supérieur en Haïti.

Name: QUATEST 3
Description:
Quality Assurance and Testing Center 3 (QUATEST 3) is a Science – Technological organization under the Directorate for Standards, Metrology and Quality (STAMEQ) – Ministry of Science and Technology (MOST) - Vietnam.

With over 45 years of operation and development, QUATEST 3 is one of the leading organizations in Vietnam to provide services in the fields of standards, metrology, quality and conformity assessment.

QUATEST 3 has accumulated experience and technical capabilities in the fields of conformity assessment, training on quality and productivity, and developed to be one of the leading organizations in Vietnam, specialized in providing integrated solutions to assist organizations and businesses in order to improve the competitiveness of products and services.

QUATEST 3 has also strengthened continuously international cooperation with the prestigious conformity assessment organizations in the region and worldwide (US UL, CQC, JQA, NEMKO, TUV SUD PSB, K-Petro, KTL…). QUATEST 3 has become official member of the Asia Network Forum (ANF) since 2010.

Name: The Institution of Engineers, Bangladesh (IEB)

It is registered under the Societies Registration Act of the country. IEB includes all disciplines of engineering. Currently, it has in its roll more than 54,000 engineers with about 30% in the category of Fellows, 60% Members and the rest as Associate Members. In addition there are a good number of Student Members. Since its establishments, IEB has been promoting and disseminating knowledge and practice of engineering and science. On of the major goal of IEB is to ensure the professional excellence and continuous professional development of the engineers in the country. It has also been working relentlessly to establish close and cooperation with the other professional bodies both in Bangladesh and outside the country.

a. Persoonlijke ontwikkeling: Wie ben ik, wat wil ik, wat kan ik, wat kan ik nog meer?
b. Leiderschap ontwikkeling: Hoe kan ik een goede leidinggevende zijn?
c. Team of hele organisatie ontwikkeling: Hoe kunnen we als gehele organisatie 
     succesvol zijn door niet alleen te kijken naar gedrag maar vooral naar het 
     samenspel van klantbediening, processen, samenwerking als team, efficient met 
     tijd omgaan. strategische keuzes maken en nog veel meer.
Als team van professionals bekijken we steeds de klantbehoefte in ontwikkeling en bepalen we welke professional daar het meest geschikt voor is om mee aan de slag te gaan.
Onze diensten bestaan uit: assessments, testen, coaching, trainingen en hele organisatie ontwikkel programma's.

Name: Coop Portage, le portage salarial en coopérative
Description:
Coop Portage, le portage salarial en coopérative 

Parce que nous défendons le principe fondamental du partage de la valeur pour amener un changement du modèle d’entreprendre, nous avons créé la première coopérative de portage salarial alliant la souplesse du portage salarial aux valeurs coopératives. 

Le portage salarial, qu’est-ce que c’est? 
C’est la solution pour être en freelance et en CDI ou CDD.  

Comment? 
Le portage salarial est une relation tripartite entre une structure de portage, une personne en freelance et l’entreprise cliente. Dans ce cadre, Coop Portage est votre employeuse et assure votre rémunération ainsi que toutes les déclarations sociales et fiscales qui découlent de vos activités tandis qu’aux yeux de vos clients, vous agissez comme des travailleurs et travailleuses indépendants. 

Les bénéfices sont simples et efficaces : vous êtes salarié.es et protégé.e grâce au salariat tout en restant indépendant.e.  

Vous croyez que c’est tout? 
Nous sommes bien plus qu’une entreprise de portage salarial: nous sommes organisés en coopérative ce qui nous permet d’être évolutif en fonction du besoin commun, le nôtre, c'est à dire celui de tous les membres qui composent notre organisation.  

C’est donc nous tous.tes qui votons les choix stratégiques de la coopérative. C’est ça, une société de personnes et non de capitaux.  

C'est aussi un partage de valeurs communes qui fondent le socle de notre structure: la solidarité, la transparence et la coopération. 

Rejoignez le mouvement!

Name: ASIS International Northwest Arkansas Chapter
Description:
With more than 38,000 members, ASIS International (formerly the American Society for Industrial Security), founded in 1955, is the preeminent organization for security professionals. ASIS International is dedicated to increasing the effectiveness and productivity of security professionals by developing educational programs and materials that address broad security interests. There are currently 232 ASIS International Chapters around the globe.

The Northwest Arkansas Chapter is centered in a key geographical area which borders several states and includes the cities of Bentonville, Rogers, Springdale, and Fayetteville, Arkansas. Some of the areas largest employers in include the University of Arkansas, Walmart, Tyson Foods, J.B. Hunt, as well as several healthcare facilities. 
Our chapter represents a diverse group of professionals in every area of security, crisis management, and resiliency operations. Please follow the chapter on here and join us for monthly meetings whether in person or through our virtual option.

Name: Deutscher Markscheider-Verein e.V. (DMV)
Description:
The Deutscher Markscheider-Verein e.V. (German Association of Mine Surveyors) is a professional association that mainly represents German, but also foreign mine surveyors and engineers in related geosciences.

The profession of mine surveyor is one of the oldest and most traditional in German mining. The range of tasks of a mine surveyor is unusually diverse: it includes, among other things, involvement in the planning and implementation of exploration measures for a deposit, the environmentally friendly operational planning based on this, the implementation of approval procedures, the establishment of extraction or storage operations, ongoing extraction planning through to decommissioning and further utilisation and, last but not least, documentation in the mine work. At all times, these tasks require close interdisciplinary co-operation with geologists, mining engineers, geotechnical engineers and other specialist engineers. Coordination with representatives of the authorities, politicians and the public is also necessary. This communication is always based on data, analyses and information from mine surveying. The complexity of the information and the requirements of the users demand constant further development of the technical possibilities and continue to expand the areas of responsibility of the mine surveyor.

The German Mine Surveyors' Association has the following aims:

- Promotion of science, research and practice in mine surveying
- To contribute to the development of mining and geotechnical engineering, the mining industry and mining law
- Participation in training and further education in mine surveying
- Representing the interests and concerns of the profession 
- Maintaining the reputation of the profession

Name: SanDiegoCIO
Description:
SanDiegoCIO is one of 30 chapters in the Inspire Leadership Network, a national membership organization comprised exclusively of CIOs
from public and private businesses, government, education, healthcare, and nonprofit institutions.

SanDiegoCIO exists to help CIOs thrive in today’s most
challenging C-suite executive role. The chapter regularly

by hosting non-commercial, member-led programs—helping
CIOs gain leadership advantage.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a San Diego-based CIO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
The ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. Since inception in 1998, over 500 technology leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. The ORBIE honors chief information officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Name: RM3 Consulting
Description:
RM3 Consulting was founded on a simple belief: social impact program leaders deserve results measurement, learning, and reporting tools and processes – aka monitoring and evaluation (M&E/MEL) systems – that serve their strategic objectives, not just meet compliance requirements.

Too many mission-driven leaders struggle with M&E/MEL systems that fail to credibly capture and effectively communicate the most meaningful impact…and/or fail to do so in ways that everyone can feel good about.

That’s why we take an integrative approach to M&E.

We help results-oriented social impact program leaders gain increased clarity on their program’s ambition and strategy and generate credible, meaningful, and actionable insights into their program’s effectiveness – the kind of evidence they can actually use to make confident decisions, tell credible and compelling program stories, attract and qualify for aligned funding, and, ultimately, deepen program impact.

Whether through consulting, advisory, or capacity-strengthening services or through our flagship Results Measurement Mastery course program, we collaborate with leaders of international development or nonprofit programs who want M&E/MEL systems that propel them forward, not hold them back.

Founded by M&E/MEL specialist Kandi Shejavali, our expertise spans multiple sectors. We have conducted M&E for projects implemented in Africa, Asia, Eurasia, Latin America and the Caribbean, North America, and the Pacific. 

Ready to go from frustration to focus, deepen program impact, and stand out to funders and other partners? Get in touch and let’s collaborate to demonstrate how your program is making the world a better place!

 Get in touch: contact@rm3consulting.com
 Book a connection call: https://calendly.com/kshejavali/connect

Selain itu, Nalar Institute juga membuat video-video edukasi di kanal Youtube untuk masyarakat luas.

Nalar Institute didirikan oleh Yanuar Nugroho, seorang akademisi, peneliti, konsultan, dan aktivis yang juga memiliki pengalaman luas di berbagai jabatan publik.

Name: Legal Diversity (DK)
Description:
Legal Diversity er en studenterforening med fokus på at øge diversitet, ligestilling, inklusion, mangfoldighed og tryghed i erhvervslivet og  studielivet. 
 
Foreningen tilbyder et fagligt forum og netværk for studerende, der ønsker at forbedre diskursen, diversiteten og et sundere miljø i erhvervslivet. Konkret ønsker foreningen at fremme tolerance og øge fokus på “Det hele menneske”, både på studiet og i karrieren. Vores fokus på øget diversitet indebærer et ønske om en bred repræsentation af køn, race, etnicitet, alder og religion med udgangspunkt i erhvervslivet generelt, heriblandt juramiljøet. Vi ønsker derudover at fremme afstigmatiseringen af at være tilknyttet psykiatrien samt udvidelse af kendskabet til introvertisme hhv. ekstrovertisme. 
 
Legal Diversity ønsker at opnå dette gennem afholdelse af interne, såvel som eksterne arrangementer, foredrag og virksomhedsbesøg. 

Alle fysiske personer, studerende såvel som ikke-studerende, og juridiske personer, foreninger såvel som virksomheder/selskaber kan blive medlem af Legal Diversity og bidrage til kampen om et sundt/(ere), trygt/(ere) og ikke mindst (mere) mangfoldigt erhvervsliv og studieliv.

Name: New Mexico Association of Emergency Management Professionals
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of the New Mexico Association of Emergency Management Professionals (NMAEMP), the leading network for emergency management experts in New Mexico. Our association is committed to elevating the field of emergency management across the state through dedicated collaboration, education, and advocacy.

At NMAEMP, we recognize the vital importance of preparedness, response, recovery, and mitigation in the face of diverse emergencies and disasters. Our mission is to provide a vibrant platform for professionals to share insights, exchange innovative ideas, and foster effective solutions to the unique challenges in our field.

We offer our members a wealth of resources, including professional development opportunities, access to the latest research, industry insights, and networking events. Our annual conferences, workshops, and training sessions are meticulously designed to keep our members at the cutting edge of emergency management trends and best practices.

Our community is a diverse mix of experienced practitioners, emerging leaders, and allied professionals, all united in their commitment to enhancing the safety and resilience of communities across New Mexico. Through our collective efforts, we strive to influence impactful policies, develop skilled leaders, and promote a culture of comprehensive preparedness and proactive response.

Join us in our journey to build a more resilient New Mexico. Follow our page for updates on our activities, industry news, and opportunities to connect with fellow emergency management professionals across the state.

Name: IGU Transport and Geography Commission
Description:
Our mission is to share and disseminate transport geography research at a global level in conjunction with a wide range of national transport geography research groups and other IGU Commissions.

The Commission’s research focuses on transport, mobilities and spatial change and relates to geographic theory with specific attention paid to the interrelationships between spaces and places and flows and infrastructures.

It involves the analysis of transport policies, processes and behaviours that influence the movement of people, goods and information. This research includes all modes of transport, at local, regional and global scales. Environmental, welfare and energy questions, and social, economic and governance dimensions are also investigated.  

We encourage a wide array of quantitative and qualitative approaches, support cooperation with other fields and disciplines and make a large scale and growing contribution to IGU and other transport geography meetings and conferences.

The dissemination of the Commission’s work includes publication of books, research journal papers and journal Special Issues.

Der SVAN ist auch der Schweizer Berufsverband für Unternehmen, die Fach- und Führungskräfte mit einem naturwissenschaftlichen Fachhochschulabschluss beschäftigen oder beschäftigen wollen.

Der SVAN ist ausserdem der Schweizer Berufsverband für alle Studentinnen und Studenten, die sich noch in einem naturwissenschaftlichen Studiengang an einer Fachhochschule befinden.

Der SVAN ist Mitglied von FH SCHWEIZ, dem Dachverband für alle Absolventinnen und Absolventen eines Studienganges an einer Fachhochschule.

Der Verbandssitz des SVAN ist der Basel-Stadt. Der SVAN ist parteipolitisch und konfessionell neutral.

Name: Africa Smart City Forum
Description:
Africa Smart Cities Forum is an innovative event organized by the School of Architecture, Planning & Design at the University Mohammed VI Polytechnic, Benguerir. 
It showcases pioneering solutions for smart urban development under the theme "Africa Smart City: A Vector of Sustainable Territorial and Cultural Development."

This Forum will be taking place at Mohammed VI Polytechnic University (UM6P), the cornerstone of the emerging green city of Benguerir, which serves as a hub for smart city experimentation and research-action focused on knowledge and know-how. 
It draws its relevance from this innovative ecosystem. Benguerir's ambitious project as a Smart City centered around the university is a true experimentation ground. With UM6P's Living Labs, the city provides an ideal platform for testing and learning urban and territorial solutions. Africa Smart City Forum - Benguerir, aligns with the current momentum of Benguerir city, the nucleus of an emerging and smart Moroccan territory centered on knowledge.

Urban transition in Africa is now, more than ever, called to be a major catalyst for social innovation, environmental protection, and cultural resilience. African cities must, consequently, shift the paradigm of conventional urbanism by embracing Smart urbanism, incorporating both low and high technology tailored to the specificities of the African terrain. The theme chosen for the inaugural edition of this Forum at UM6P, "Smart City: A Driver of Sustainable Territorial Development", will explore Smart City concepts (drawing upon local ingenuity and technological knowledge). The objective is to explore intelligent mechanisms for territorial planning and management, steering emerging urbanization towards inclusive, resilient, and sustainable African cities.

Pourquoi nous choisir ?

- Expertise pluridisciplinaire alliant santé, leadership et communication

In 2013, the first ELLSA Conference was held at NIST with 6 more conferences following that in schools around Asia. Name: EUROSAI - European Organisation of Supreme Audit Institutions
Description:
EUROSAI represents the regional organisation of supreme audit institutions in Europe, serving as the primary platform for cooperation and professional development of 51 members' SAIs. The organisation promotes excellence in public sector auditing through the exchange of experiences, methodologies and best practices, while contributing to the strengthening of democratic governance and public accountability.

Mission and Objectives
EUROSAI promotes excellence in public sector auditing through enhanced cooperation among its member institutions. The organisation facilitates the exchange of audit experiences, methodologies, and best practices while supporting capacity building initiatives across the European region. EUROSAI contributes to strengthening democratic governance and public accountability by advancing professional standards and fostering innovation in government auditing.

Membership and Scope
Comprising 51 member institutions from across Europe, EUROSAI represents a diverse community of supreme audit institutions operating under various constitutional frameworks and audit mandates. The organisation encompasses both EU member states and non-EU European countries, reflecting the broader European commitment to transparency and accountability in public administration.

Strategic Activities
EUROSAI coordinates thematic working groups addressing contemporary audit challenges, organises capacity building programmes, and facilitates peer review mechanisms. The organisation maintains active partnerships with EU institutions, international organisations, and other INTOSAI regional groups to promote global audit standards and cross-regional cooperation.

Name: I-PAL - Heritage Interpretation Latin America and the Caribbean
Description:
We are a network of organizations, students, experts and professionals working in correlation to strengthen and support to the Interpretation of Heritage in Latin America and the Caribbean.

Initiative
We believe that the interpretation of natural and cultural heritage enriches our lives by promoting thought-provoking experiences that help transmit knowledge, deepen understanding and establish an intellectual and emotional connection between visitors and their environment.

As a profession focused on communication processes, interpretation reveals the meaning and value of heritage. It encourages actions to benefit the enormous reservoir of natural and cultural resources representing our legacy.

I-PAL aims to promote that the interpretation of natural and cultural heritage is a profession that requires research, standards and organizational representation.

Commitment
Maintain the highest standards in the performance of our services as interpreters based on diligence, responsibility, humility, respect, honesty and inclusion.  

Encourage growth and continuous education for all, respecting the diversity of cultures, traditions and opinions, and maintaining the unity and neutrality characterising heritage interpreters' work.

Provide support tools to promote best practices in "Planning and Designing Programs for Personal and Non-Personal Interpretation of Natural and Cultural Heritage".

Mission
"Promote collaboration to contribute to the professional development of Heritage Interpretation in Latin America and the Caribbean."

I-PAL proposes goals aimed at inducing the development of collaboration strategies and promoting organisational structures where efforts are coordinated for the progress of the interpretation of natural and cultural heritage in Latin America and the Caribbean.

Name: CPCECH Consejo Profesional de Ciencias Económicas de Chubut
Western States Corrosion Seminar
Description:
History of Western States Corrosion Seminar (WSCS)

Few Corrosion engineers from the west coast were fortunate enough to attend the courses conducted in the mid-west and east coast areas during the 1960's. As a result, plans were initiated for a West Coast Seminar during the November 1965 NACE Western Region Conference meeting in Honolulu, Hawaii. 

Don Reedy (Metropolitan Water District of Southern California), Kent Wachtel (Duriron Company), and Darrel Byerley (Tinker & Rasor) approached Roy Dean, who was Chairman of the Western Region.  Enthusiasm was great at the meeting and it was decided to shoot for the first Short Course during the Spring of 1967.

In 1972, the Seminar was moved to the new Center for Continuing Education in Pomona, California. The Center is presently called Kellogg West and has continued to be the Seminar site for the last 39 years.

Today, courses offered consist of:
     - Corrosion Fundamentals
     - Intermediate Corrosion
     - Advanced Corrosion
     - CP (Cathodic Protection) Tester Recognition Course
     - Operator Qualification Tutorials #1 to #13 

In 2006, the Western States Rectifier Course was added.

All seminars have been successful from both an attendance and financial standpoint. Judging from the Seminar critiques, both the speakers and students have learned and benefitted from attending. Total registration for the 49 Seminars, 17 CP Tester Courses, and 10 Rectifier Courses has exceeded 6400 students.

See you in May!

Our Vision is that Faced With Grace will inspire a ripple effect of meaningful change towards positive, healthy, and inclusive workplace cultures that transcend and eliminate pervasive toxicity for the benefit and sustainability of the future workforce.
 
The Faced With Grace Values will serve as the foundation of the organization, guiding decision-making and inspiring to achieve greatness together.

Positivity
Faced With Grace believes in finding the lesson and the silver lining in all adversity. By maintaining a positive outlook, we transform challenges into opportunities for growth.

People
Our community is our greatest asset. We strive to be authentic and to foster a supportive environment where everyone feels valued and connected.

Power
Inner strength and resiliency are at the core of our ethos. We encourage finding power in overcoming obstacles and emerging stronger than before.

Peace
Mental wellness and serenity are essential for both personal and professional success. We prioritize achieving peace through mindful practices and balanced lifestyles.

Purpose
We listen for and trust in our calling, recognizing the blessing of intuition. Our purpose-driven approach
ensures that every action aligns with our core values and greater mission.

Name: Chartered Secretaries Institute Of Singapore
Description:
Chartered Secretaries Institute of Singapore (CSIS) is a non-profit professional institute registered with the Registry of Societies. We promote effective governance and administration of organizations in the corporate and not-for-profit sectors. As such, we set the professional standards for Singapore Chartered Secretaries and governance professionals. We provide training and ensure that our members observe our code of ethics and professional conduct.

CSIS advocates timely compliance and good governance in the corporate and not-for-profit sectors. It strongly advocates good practices and thought leadership through guidance and education to create awareness and high standards of governance in the above-mentioned sectors.

Its membership comprises principally of chartered secretaries; and interest groups namely company secretaries, governance professionals, and business executives in governance, ethics, and compliance functions at public, private, and not-for-profit organizations.

Name: ABRALE
Description:
A ABRALE – Associação Brasileira dos Autores de Livros Educativos – é uma associação civil sem fins lucrativos que tem, entre outras, as seguintes finalidades estatutárias:

- contribuir para a elevação da qualidade do ensino brasileiro;
- defender a dignidade profissional dos autores-educadores;
- promover a integração dos autores de livros didáticos e paradidáticos representando-lhes os interesses junto às editoras, órgãos governamentais e entidades congêneres.

A ABRALE tem se firmado como interlocutora de órgãos governamentais em relação aos programas de compra de livro didático e, em particular, ao processo de avaliação conduzido pelo MEC. Tem rebatido as críticas generalizadoras da mídia sobre a má qualidade do livro educativo, ao mesmo tempo em que discute as condições para sua melhoria. A ABRALE ainda apresentou sugestões para a elaboração da nova Lei do Direito Autoral e elaborou o seu Código de Ética. Tornou-se também interlocutora da ABRELIVROS, representante das editoras, e da ABDR (Associação Brasileira de Direitos Reprográficos). Oferece aos associados um serviço de consulta jurídica para o encaminhamento inicial das dúvidas dos autores sobre contratos.

A ABRALE tem assumido o desafio de apresentar propostas que ampliem a discussão sobre a metodologia de ensino das diversas disciplinas. Tem ainda buscado novas formas de avaliação de livros educativos que sejam mais diversificadas e plurais do que aquelas que vêm sendo praticadas.

Para aperfeiçoar sua atuação, a ABRALE necessita da ampliação do seu quadro de associados, cuja participação nas assembleias é importante para o enriquecimento dos debates e busca de soluções para os problemas enfrentados pela categoria.

Name: Atelier del Orden
Description:
Soy fundadora y CEO de Atelier del Orden. Trabajo con personas que quieren recuperar el control de sus espacios, su agenda o su vida cotidiana, y con empresas que buscan entornos de trabajo que favorezcan el bienestar y la eficiencia de sus equipos.

Organizo espacios físicos (viviendas, despachos, trasteros, empresas) y también el tiempo, las rutinas y los hábitos. Porque el desorden no se resuelve solo colocando: muchas veces surge por la falta de procesos bien diseñados. A veces basta con un lugar claro para dejar las llaves o con la definición de un protocolo tras una reunión para que el orden se mantenga.

Soy conferenciante en temas de orden, organización y bienestar. He impartido charlas para empresas como Montblanc, Porsche, Mapfre o Remax, adaptando cada intervención al público y al contexto: desde hogares hasta equipos empresariales o entornos educativos.

Soy profesora del Máster de Bienestar en Entornos Corporativos de la Fundación Mundial de la Felicidad. Creo que el orden —físico y mental— es una herramienta poderosa para reducir el estrés, incrementar nuestro valor personal y profesional y vivir con más claridad.

 Si quieres saber cómo puedo ayudarte, estaré encantada de hablar contigo. Puedes escribirme a hola@atelierdelorden.com o llamarme al 630 739 698.

Name: Cocoon Cultural Centre
Description: Cocoon is situated in the heart of downtown Cairo in the Immobilia Building. The Immobilia was built in 1940 and since then has been home to some of the greatest Egyptian artists including Abdel Halim Hafez, Farid Al-Atrash, Omar Al Sharif, Mohammed Abdel Wahab, Naguib El-Rihani and Leila Mourad. The building’s geographical, historical and creative context make it the perfect hub for cocooning culture. Cocoon aims to promote and grow the holistic, prolific and creative Egyptian community through critical thinking, interdisciplinary artistic practice, cross-cultural collaboration, community building, wellness and environmental awareness. Come to cocoon as a caterpillar and leave as a butterfly with wings coloured by you.  Cocoon includes a Gallery space showcasing and selling paintings, moving image, sculptures and handmade jewellery. We also offer workshops in painting, calligraphy, collage, screenwriting, fashion, creative writing, spiritual practices, wellness and handmade crafts. We aspire to add to this list and invite participants to request and suggest workshops in holistic and creative subjects they are interested in exploring.

Name: Moot Court Society, CHRIST (Deemed to be University), Delhi NCR Campus
Description:
The Moot Court Society (MCS) at Christ (Deemed to be University), Delhi NCR, is a dedicated student-run committee entrusted with the responsibility of overseeing and enhancing the mooting activities within the institution. Committed to upholding the highest standards of excellence that Christ (Deemed to be University) has set for itself, the MCS plays a pivotal role in fostering the culture of mooting among the student body.

The primary mission of the MCS is to facilitate and regulate the mooting activities within the university. This includes planning, organizing, and executing various moot court competitions that are hosted by Christ (Deemed to be University), Delhi NCR. These competitions serve as invaluable platforms for students to hone their advocacy skills, engage in legal research, and gain practical exposure to the intricacies of law.

One of the MCS' significant responsibilities is the constitution of the University Moot Team. This process typically spans over two months and involves two rounds of rigorous mooting. The culmination of this process results in the selection and ranking of students who will represent the university at both national and international moot court competitions.

In addition to its competitive endeavors, the MCS is dedicated to promoting an active interest in mooting as an integral part of law school life. To achieve this goal, the society organizes extensive workshops and demonstrations. These initiatives provide students with valuable opportunities to learn the intricate art of mooting, improve their advocacy skills, and gain a deeper understanding of the legal profession.

In essence, the Moot Court Society at Christ (Deemed to be University), Delhi NCR, stands as a pillar of legal education, fostering excellence in mooting, and nurturing the future advocates and legal scholars of tomorrow.

Name: Filipino American Society of Architects and Engineers of Southern California (FASAE-SoCal)

The Filipino American Society of Architects and Engineers is a professional organization of individuals of Filipino descent who have been educated and trained as Architects and Engineers, or in any related fields of academic study. Membership in the organization is open to all other individuals who are not of Filipino ethnicity.





FASAE SoCal was established in late 1994 by 21 founding members as a non-profit, non-partisan, non-sectarian organization. The collective efforts of the founding members enabled the FASAE SoCal Chapter to become the third chapter, after the Guam and Sacramento/Reno chapters, to receive accreditation from FASAE, the national organization.





FASAE SoCal is also registered as 501(c)(6) corporation with the IRS. FASAE SoCal Education Foundation is the official scholarship foundation for FASAE SoCal and is registered as 501(c)(3) with the IRS.





Today, the FASAE SoCal chapter continues to grow and serve its members, with thanks to the many dedicated individuals who have worked hard and sacrificially to promote the goals and mission statement of the Chapter.





FASAE SoCal's Mission Statement is "To advocate and promote the advancement and professional growth of the Filipino American Architects and Engineers for the public good."

Her vision is “Philanthropy that works and Civil Society that thrives” while the mission is “To harness the potential of civil society in Africa through building strength, shaping narratives and influencing the practice of philanthropy”. CivSource Africa provides advisory services to philanthropists, does grant-making, promotes local philanthropy and provides several leadership-strengthening offerings.

 Sustainable growth in fiscal hosting and resource support

 Empowering young leaders as future givers and change agents

#Philanthropy #Leadership #AfricanGiving #CivSourceSouthAfrica

Name: SindiRefeições SP - Sindicato dos Trabalhadores em Refeições Coletivas de São Paulo
Description:
O Sindicato dos Trabalhadores em Refeições Coletivas de São Paulo, entidade jurídica de direito privado, foi criado no dia 12 de abril de 1989. 

Os trabalhadores de refeições eram até então representados pelo sindicato dos hoteleiros que por força de decisão judicial deixou de representá-los. 

Assim, a partir de abril de 1989 citados trabalhadores passaram a ser representado pelo Sindicato dos Trabalhadores em Refeições de São Paulo, primeira entidade da categoria constituída no país, hoje abrangendo o município de São Paulo. Posteriormente criaram-se novas entidades no Estado de São Paulo bem como em outros cidades e estados formando-se uma gigantesca categoria a nível nacional. 

Em seu quadro social atual constata-se a existência de 20 mil pessoas entre associados e dependentes que se utilizam das conquistas salariais e sociais adquiridas pelo Sindicato em todo seu tempo de existência. Além das conquistas econômicas, a entidade vem oferecendo aos seus representados e dependentes uma série de benefícios tais como: Sede Própria; Colônia de Férias; Odontologia; Bolsa de Emprego; Eventos Variados; Corpo Jurídico; Seguro de Vida; Convênios Diversos; Cursos; Órgão Informativo; Convenção Coletiva; Cálculo Trabalhista; Contagem para Aposentadoria; Conciliação Prévia.

Suas conquistas contam com o apoio de 100% dos trabalhadores e de uma Diretoria composta por membros experientes na área de Refeições, resultando-se assim num alto nível de salários e benefícios.

Description: IRWA Chapter 10 was created in 1955 and was named the Crossroads of America Chapter of the then American Right of Way Association. The Chapter started with 39 members and has grown to over 150 members and growing. Chapter 10 has been awarded Newsletter of the Year from IRWA three times in 2008, 2014 and 2018. It won the 2013 Project of the Year and in 2021, a Chapter member firm won Employer of the Year for less than 20 employees. Name: Society of Women Engineers at UVA
Description:
The Society of Women Engineers is a national professional organization that aims to support and promote women in achieving their full potential in engineering careers. National SWE awards scholarships and holds the world's largest conference and career fair for women engineers each year. The SWE section at UVA has three areas of focus: outreach, professional development, and community building.

SWE at UVA has outreach programs for girls at the elementary, middle, and high school levels, all of which aim to inspire interest in engineering fields through hands-on activities, design challenges, tours, and speakers.

We support the professional development of our members through a variety of events including interviewing workshops, resume reviews, major advising, company information sessions, and the national and regional SWE conferences.

We aim to foster a strong sense of community for our members through our mentorship family program, which encourages involvement and cross-class interaction. Additionally, we host many fun social events throughout the year, including pumpkin painting, apple picking, hiking, and stress-busting exercise classes. These events provide opportunities for our members to get to know each other and build long-lasting networks in an environment beyond the classroom.

Name: Australian Christian Business Awards
Description:
