Join 150 Christian Men and Women in Sydney on 4th October 2025 for a powerful evening of honour, connection, and celebration at the Australian Christian Business Awards – a prestigious event recognising the extraordinary achievements of Christian men and women in business.

This inspiring Awards Dinner will shine a spotlight on faith-driven entrepreneurs, leaders, and change makers who are making a significant impact locally and globally. From those shaping culture through innovation to those creating meaningful employment and leading with integrity, we believe business is more than profit and performance. It is a platform for purpose. Founded with a vision to honour Christian entrepreneurs, leaders and creatives who boldly live out their faith in the marketplace, glorifying God in all they do.

Originally birthed from the KWE Academy Awards – which honours the courage and calling of Christian women in business – this expanded national platform now recognises all Kingdom entrepreneurs who are advancing God’s work through the marketplace.

We know that Business, when led with a strong foundation of faith, partnering with the goodness and faithfulness of God, can change the world.

Name: fkks Fachverband Kathodischer Korrosionsschutz e.V.
Description:
Der fkks ist ein gemeinnütziger technisch-wissenschaftlicher Verein und hat den Zweck, den kathodischen Korrosionsschutz (KKS) in technischer und technisch-wissenschaftlicher Hinsicht unter besonderer Berücksichtigung der Sicherheit und des Umweltschutzes zu fördern.
Der fkks ist in allen wesentlichen Gremien und Vereinigungen des In- und Auslandes, die sich mit dem KKS beschäftigen, vertreten bzw. ist deren Mitglied. Bei seiner Arbeit und Beschlußfassung ist er unabhängig. Bei der Aufstellung des Regelwerkes und der Normen richtet sich die Tätigkeit des fkks nach technisch-wissenschaftlichen Notwendigkeiten.
Der fkks ist der deutsche Fachverband für Korrosion und Korrosionsschutz. Als Interessensvertretung, der die technische Führerschaft inne hat, repräsentiert der fkks im deutschsprachigen Raum die Mitglieder, die im kathodischen Korrosionsschutz oder in anderen Bereichen der Korrosionsschutzes tätig sind. Er ist der einzige Verband dessen Mitglieder in allen Gewerken des kathodischen Korrosionsschutzes tätig sind.
Der Fachverband versteht sich als Plattform für den Informations- und Erfahrungsaustausch, fördert die Aus- und Weiterbildung sowie die Professionalisierung seiner Mitglieder. Er vertritt die Interessen seiner Mitglieder in allen wesentlichen Normausschüssen und Interessensvertretungen. 
Der fkks hat mit Jahresbeginn 2008 eine unabhängige Zertifizierungsstelle, die fkks cert gmbh, mit Sitz in Esslingen am Neckar, eingerichtet. Die fkks cert gmbh bietet als einzige Zertifizierungsstelle in Deutschland vollumfänglich ein eigenes Zertifizierungsverfahren u.a. auf Grundlage der DIN EN ISO 15257:2017 an.

Name: Canadian Jewish Law Association
Description:
The Canadian Jewish Law Association is a vital organization uniting legal professionals in the pursuit of justice, equality, and the eradication of hate. We are committed to creating a Canada where antisemitism, discrimination, and all forms of hatred have no place. By leveraging our legal expertise, we advocate for the civil rights of Jewish communities and other marginalized groups, striving to foster a society rooted in inclusion and respect.

Through legal representation, strategic litigation, and active participation in policy development, we defend the principles of justice at every level — from the courts to government institutions. We also prioritize education and respectful dialogue, believing these are critical in addressing the complex challenges posed by modern antisemitism and discrimination.

At the core of our work is the belief that legal advocacy can be a powerful tool for change. We are driven by a deep sense of responsibility to protect Jewish communities and to champion the values of fairness and inclusivity for all Canadians.

**OUR MISSION**

NJTESOL/NJBE, Inc. is a not-for-profit professional and educational organization whose purposes are:

-To actively support the development of bilingual education and the teaching of English as a Second Language;
-To strengthen instruction at all levels;
-To disseminate educational information as related to professional development;
-To provide educational services such as workshops, conferences, and consulting assistance;
-To promote scholarship and foster research in first and second language acquisition and bilingual/bicultural studies; and
-To cooperate in appropriate ways with other groups having similar interests and concerns.

Name: Wir Haus- und Fachärzte
Description: Unter "Wir Haus und Fachärzte" kommuniziert die Bundeskurie niedergelassene Ärzte, das Vertretungsorgan der in Österreich niedergelassenen Ärztinnen und Ärzte. Als solches verfolgt sie das Ziel der Wahrnehmung und Förderung aller beruflichen, wirtschaftlichen und sozialen Interessen ihrer Mitglieder.

Name: Philadelphia Trial Lawyers Association
Description: The Philadelphia Trial Lawyers Association is an active professional organization comprised of civil and criminal litigation attorneys.  PTLA has been in existence for 66 years and is the oldest trial lawyer organization in Pennsylvania.  Our members are dedicated to the preservation of the American legal system and the protection of the evolution of the common law through the efforts of individual lawyers who are pledged to achieving common goals.

Name: AIChE Mid-Michigan Local Section
Description: We are the Mid-Michigan local section of the American Institute of Chemical Engineers. We are centered in Midland, MI, but have virtual events and outreach to many Michigan universities.

Name: SHIFT Work + Play
Description: SHIFT Work + Play is a modern coworking space for busy professionals, entrepreneurs and their families. Featuring a beautiful playroom with onsite babysitting services, SHIFT is Frederick’s premier workspace for parents and caregivers trying to balance it all.

Name: Architects' Registration Council
Description: The Architects’ Registration Council (Council) is established by Act of Parliament-Cap.61:08, to provide for the registration of architectural professionals, regulation of the conduct of registered persons, regulation of the practice of architecture, qualifications and training of architectural professionals and for matters incidental thereto.  The main objective of the ARC is to protect the interests of members of the public in any dealings which such members of the public may have with registered architectural professionals

Name: Association Confiance Renov'
Description: L'association Confiance Rénov représente les bureaux de contrôle spécialisés dans la rénovation énergétique, tierces parties indépendantes accréditées par le Cofrac.

Name: OSU Phi Alpha Delta
Description:
Phi Alpha Delta (PAD) is an international law fraternity. Here at OSU, our chapter works to support our 250+ members throughout the entire law school application process. PAD serves the pre-law community with professional development workshops, free LSAT prep, networking events, essential application tips, and a vibrant social network.

We help pre-law students prepare for law school throughout their undergraduate studies. It’s never too early to begin thinking about law school, so we encourage underclassmen to join.

Name: Urban & Regional Planning Alumni (University of Lagos)
Description:
This platform meant to engender progress for the department of Urban & Regional Planning, University of Lagos, its products (Students and Graduates) and the University at large.
The association was inaugurated on the 16th of December 2021 with an interim executive committee lead by TPL. Tolu Adeusi and Dr. Omoayena Odunbaku.

Name: European Institute of Professional Intelligence Officers
Description:
EIPIO (EU Institute of Professional Intelligence Officers) is Europe’s leading center for intelligence education, research and professional networking. Founded to elevate analytical standards across public and private sectors, we prepare today’s and tomorrow’s intelligence professionals to confront complex, fast-moving threats with confidence, rigor and integrity.

Core Offerings

Comprehensive Training & Certification: From foundational courses in intelligence analysis and open-source investigation to advanced programs in cyber-intelligence, strategic forecasting and counter-terrorism, our curriculum is co-developed with top universities, law-enforcement bodies and industry experts.

Applied Research & Insights: We produce peer-reviewed studies, case analyses and best-practice guides that inform policymakers, corporate security teams and investigative units across Europe.

Networking & Community Building: Through annual conferences, targeted workshops and a dynamic online forum, EIPIO enables intelligence officers, security analysts and investigative professionals to exchange tradecraft, explore emerging tools and forge trusted partnerships.

Our Mission
To strengthen Europe’s security ecosystem by fusing academic excellence with operational know-how, underpinned by the highest ethical and legal standards. We believe that effective intelligence requires not only technical skill, but also critical thinking, collaborative spirit and an unwavering commitment to human rights.

Why Connect with EIPIO

Gain exclusive access to cutting-edge methodologies and analytic frameworks.

Participate in hands-on exercises and live simulations led by seasoned practitioners.

Expand your professional network with peers from government, corporate and non-profit sectors.

Stay ahead of evolving regulatory landscapes and emerging threat vectors.

Whether you’re an early-career analyst seeking foundational certification or a veteran officer pursuing specialized expertise, EIPIO empowers

Name: Icon Dynamic Objects Group
Description: The Icon (The Institute of Conservation ) Group supports the conservation of all objects that have a dynamic element, ranging from books to bicycles, kinetic art to clocks of all sizes. The Group aims to promote an integrated view on conserving the dynamic nature of cultural objects.

Name: The Association of Medicine and Psychiatry
Description:
The Association of Medicine and Psychiatry (AMP) was founded in 1991 by physicians concerned about the care of patients at the interface of medicine and psychiatry. The Association is an interdisciplinary clinical and scientific group which promotes high quality patient care for those with combined illness, develops guidelines for services and training experiences specifically designed to address the problems of these patients, and fosters basic and clinical research in this area.

The principal objective of the Association is to enhance the care of patients with concurrent physical and neuropsychiatric disorders through teaching, the development of clinical services and research. This objective shall be achieved: 1) by the development of educational programs consisting of scientific and applied information about problems commonly encountered in patients with concurrent medical and psychiatric difficulties; 2) by the development of curricula and teaching materials for students, residents and fellows in the primary specialties; 3) by the development of guidelines for residencies in “Medical/Psychiatry”, fellowships in “Psychiatry in the Medically Ill” for primary physicians, Medical/Psychiatry Units, and Medical/Psychiatry Clinics; 4) by setting priorities and fostering basic and applied research in the care of patients with both physical and psychiatric problems; 5) by participation in national forums related to the assessment, treatment and research funding of projects pertinent to the care of patients with combined illness.

Name: American Marketing Association University of Illinois Chapter
Delta Sigma Pi | Gamma Lambda
Description: Delta Sigma Pi is a co-ed professional fraternity organized to foster the study of business in universities; to encourage scholarship, social activity and the association of students for their mutual advancement by research and practice; to promote closer affiliation between the commercial world and students of commerce, and to further a higher standard of commercial ethics and culture and the civic and commercial welfare of the community.

Name: Connected Worlds
Description:
Onze naam onthult onze ware aard; wij creëren verbinding. Verbinding tussen mensen om samen tot integrale oplossingen te komen. En ook verbinding tussen onze fysieke leefomgeving en technologische mogelijkheden om de leefomgeving te verbeteren. Digitalisering vormt hierbij de sleutel. Technologie krijgt meerwaarde voor iedereen doordat we het simpel en toegankelijk maken. Zo dragen we bij aan belangrijke transformaties, die positieve veranderingen in de wereld brengen.

Deze visie zie je ook op onze eigen werkplek. Hier zijn we één, bereid om elkaar bij te staan en de connectie met elkaar aan te gaan. Wat drijft jou? Dat is wat telt. Voor ons zijn intrinsieke motivatie en authenticiteit van onschatbare waarde. Verleg je eigen grenzen en ontdek je creatieve potentieel. Wij reiken je alle mogelijkheden aan om je te blijven ontwikkelen. We putten ook uit elkaars wijsheid door openhartig te zijn over onze ervaringen, vragen en uitdagingen. Op vrijdagen komen we graag samen op ons kantoor in Vianen, zodat we persoonlijk onze inzichten kunnen delen.

We willen vernieuwende en grensverleggende oplossingen creëren, die een succesvol antwoord zijn op de vragen van onze klanten. In dit proces nemen we vaak de rol van orchestrator op ons; wij koppelen de verschillende taken en processen aan elkaar en faciliteren daarmee optimale co- creatie en boeken vooruitgang voor onze klant bij het oplossen/doorgronden van het vraagstuk. Onze oplossingen dragen bij aan een leefbare samenleving, waar dagelijks veel mensen van profiteren. Denk aan een applicatie waarmee mensen met een beperking direct toegang hebben tot informatie over toegankelijke toiletten en parkeerplekken. Of aan ons werk in de energietransitie, waardoor meer huishoudens kunnen profiteren van het warmtenet, wat de overgang voor bewoners betaalbaarder maakt.

Wij dagen je uit om de wereld te verkennen en te ontdekken hoe jij haar kunt verrijken. Verken nieuwe horizonten, betreed onbekend terrein en deel jouw ideeën en in

Name: ISACA Virginia Chapter
Description: ISACA VA Chapter is a non-profit organization dedicated to the continued development and enhancement of the information systems audit and control profession by providing benefits to its members and to the professional community-at-large. Additionally, “to help VA Chapter members realize the positive potential of technology throughout the Commonwealth of Virginia.”

Name: ASHRAE Louisville
Description:
ASHRAE, founded in 1894, is a global society advancing human well-being through sustainable technology for the built environment. The Society and its members focus on building systems, energy efficiency, indoor air quality, refrigeration and sustainability within the industry. Our Mission  is to serve humanity by advancing the arts and sciences of heating, ventilation, air conditioning, refrigeration and their allied fields.

The Louisville Chapter was chartered in 1954 and is a part of Region VII.  Our Chapter is run by our BOG, which can be found in the about us section of our website. We are a group of volunteers that are passionate about helping the community and providing benefits for our members.

Name: BNK e.V.
Description: Der BNK vertritt die Interessen seiner Mitglieder gegenüber der Politik und anderen Standesorganisationen. Als Subspezialisten stellt die Berufsgruppe der Kardiologen eine absolute Minderheit innerhalb der Vielzahl niedergelassener Ärzte dar. Die effektive Vertretung unserer Verbandsziele begreifen wir daher als eine besondere Verpflichtung.

Name: WTS Colorado Young Professionals
Description:
Co-Chairs: Caitlin Sheridan, Colorado Department of Public Health and Environment and Emily Kleinfelter, City of Littleton. 

The WTS CO Young Professionals Committee supports networking opportunities for young professionals pursuing careers in the transportation sector to build new and strengthen existing relationships. The Young Professionals Committee promotes social connectedness by hosting a wide variety of member-initiated events throughout the year, including fun and engaging activities such as picnics, sporting events, happy hours, book swaps, and trivia nights. 

If you are interested in learning more or becoming involved in the Young Professionals Committee, please reach out to Caitlin Sheridan and Emily Kleinfelter at wtsyoungprofessionals@gmail.com.

Name: National Drama
Description: The UK’s leading professional subject association for all teachers, educators and theatre practitioners in drama and theatre educational contexts and community settings

Name: IET on Campus - University of Sheffield
Description:
IET On Campus – University of Sheffield is a student-led professional organisation affiliated with the Institution of Engineering and Technology (IET). Our goal is to empower future engineers through industry engagement, knowledge sharing, and professional development.

We organise guest lectures, technical talks, and networking events that connect students with engineers, researchers, and professionals from across disciplines, including both IET and non-IET members. By bridging academia and industry, we provide opportunities for students to explore emerging technologies, develop practical insights, and strengthen their professional networks.

Join us to connect, collaborate, and grow within Sheffield’s engineering and technology community.

Name: ASCLS-IA
Description:
ASCLS-IA is the state of Iowa constituent society of the American Society for Clinical Laboratory Science (ASCLS).

Our mission is to promote the profession of Clinical Laboratory Science, provide services to people practicing in this field and to enable members to provide quality services with continued excellence.

Name: CZEMP
Description: Hlavní činností platformy je propagace a popularizace membránových procesů, vzdělávání laické i odborné veřejnosti, vydávání odborných publikací a studií. Důležitou činností je organizace seminářů, workshopů a národních i mezinárodních konferencí. Významná je spolupráce se subjekty využívajícími membránové procesy ve výzkumu, vývoji a konkrétních aplikacích s důrazem na inovace, transfer technologií a spolupráci mezi průmyslovou a akademickou sférou v České republice i v zahraničí.

Name: Owner Dentists of Quebec (DPQ)
Description: Join Quebec's Dentist Owners Association to benefit from a strong support network for your entrepreneurial needs. As a member, you'll have access to exclusive resources, professional training, discounts on essential services in the dental industry, and representation with decision-making bodies. Together, we strengthen our voice and support our profession!

Name: Society for Endocrinology and Metabolism of Ethiopia
Description:
The Society for Endocrinology and Metabolism of Ethiopia (SEME) is a national medical society of physicians registered to practice in Ethiopia. It has a diverse community of specialists and sub-specialists in the discipline of nutrition, diabetes, endocrinology, and metabolism. 
Mission: to promote excellence in the field of Endocrinology in Ethiopia through research, education, clinical service and advocacy.
Vision: to be recognized as the leader in promoting quality clinical care, advocacy, education and research in Endocrinology and Metabolism in Ethiopia and beyond.
Core Values:
Excellence: maintain the highest ethical and professional standards
Professionalism: maintain professional competency, integrity and compassion.
Collaboration: work together with all stakeholders
Leadership: be the leader in patient care, medical education, policy development and advocacy
Evidence-based medicine: generate local evidences for best practice
Patient-centered care: putting the patient and the public at the heart of care

Name: Vereinigung Schweizerischer Assetmanagement- und Vermögensverwaltungsbanken
Description: Die Vereinigung Schweizerischer Assetmanagement- und Vermögensverwaltungsbanken wurde am 30. Januar 1981 gegründet. Die Vereinigung versteht sich als Interessenvertreterin. Sie umfasst 23 Banken, die ihren Hauptsitz in der Schweiz haben und hauptsächlich in der Vermögensverwaltung für private und institutionelle Kunden tätig sind. Die Mitglieder der Vereinigung sind mit ihren Niederlassungen in 15 von 23 Kantonen präsent. Unsere Mitglieder verwalten Vermögen von rund 1‘200 Mia. CHF und beschäftigen über 20'000 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter.

Name: Corecon GO
Description:
Perfil oficial do Conselho Regional de Economia de Goiás
Autarquia federal responsável pelo registro e fiscalização da profissão dos economistas.

Name: Cardiac Electrophysiology Society
Description: The Cardiac Electrophysiology Society is an international society of basic and clinical scientists and physicians interested in cardiac electrophysiology and arrhythmias. The mission of the Society is to foster collegial interaction and scientific exchange among its members to promote the translation of basic research into the clinical care of patients with heart rhythm disorders.

Name: Kaimac
Description:
Aotearoa New Zealand's only organisation catering to both media and communications professionals. Kaimac is a not-for-profit organisation supporting and growing Kiwi-Asian talent in news-making and news-shaping industries.

This is a page for professionals, employers, supporters or generally anyone who is interested in better understanding Kiwi-Asian talent in newsmaking and news-shaping roles like journalism, PR & comms, and public commentary.

Name: RÉSEAU CONCORDE
Description:
RÉSEAU CONCORDE est un club d’affaires qui réunit des professionnels partageant les mêmes valeurs : l’excellence, la confiance, l’intégrité et l’engagement.
Nous mettons l’accent sur des relations humaines authentiques et sur des opportunités d’affaires concrètes.

Notre objectif est simple : créer des synergies locales solides et soutenir la croissance de chaque membre, dans un cadre structuré et bienveillant.

Notre règle d’or : un membre, une profession. Ainsi, nous offrons une exclusivité propice à des échanges de qualité et à une visibilité renforcée.

Matinales, dîners, événements premium : chaque rencontre est pensée pour favoriser des connexions utiles et durables.

Ici, pas de superficialité.
Juste un réseau qui avance ensemble, avec sérieux et ambition.

Name: Defence UK
Description:
WE NEED YOUR SUPPORT
Defence UK is a small organisation but we punch above our weight! We have been campaigning since 2007 (originally as the UKNDA) to educate the public about defence and to persuade the politicians and policy-makers to give our Armed Forces a fairer deal. Through our publications, conferences and campaigns we have taken the message of strong defence to a wider audience. But we do this on a shoestring.

That’s why we need your support, so join up on our website as a member or regular donor to Defence UK, to enable us to continue our work on behalf of the hard-pressed and overstretched personnel of the Royal Navy, the British Army and the Royal Air Force.

Name: Spot 6 Management Inc.
Description: Spot 6 is Canada's Best full service boutique modeling and management agency located in the heart of Toronto (the 6ix), representing Women and Men for High Fashion Editorial, Advertising, Runway, Catalogue and Commercial Print. We are constantly scouting the streets for the next SPOT6ZER to add to our NewSpots model army. Check out our SpotMe page or @spotmemodelsearch to learn more and get SPOTTED. Established in 2009, by industry expert Cynthia Cully. Our models receive the best training, management, advice and personal attention to their careers. We make supermodels!

Name: Your Next BIG
Description:
Your next big was developed to create events & conferences surrounding the growth of our entrepreneurs within our state’s ecosystem.  We focus on the “how’ by providing the right people, tools, and resources from starting a company to A SUCCESSFUL exit, and everything in between.  We are bringing those together to create your next big (insert dream) entrepreneurial success! 

June 19th & 20th event is all about what is a MICROPRENEUR? SOMEONE WHO HAS started THEIR NEXT BIG ENTREPRENEURIAL SUCCESS without a big team or a big budget. We're here to show you how!

Our 2-day schedule includes 50+ speakers from founders, investors, and business experts. Join us for panel discussions, expo hall with 30 booths, virtual job fair, and networking with old & new business friends.

KEY:  FIND YOUR EMPLOYEES, TECH, AND PARTNERS FOR RAPID GROWTH

LEARN HOW YOU CAN BOOTSTRAP TECH & OTHER COMPANY FORMATION AND GROWTH WITHOUT WAITING ON BIG INVESTMENT!

IS THIS EVENT FOR YOU?
YOUR NEXT BIG MICROPRENEUR was created specifically for:
Early-stage founders looking to scale efficiently without massive investment
Side-hustle entrepreneurs ready to transform passion projects into primary income
Corporate innovators seeking to bring entrepreneurial approaches to established organizations
Aspiring business owners who want to avoid costly mistakes from day one

WHAT YOU’LL EXPERIENCE
TACTICAL WORKSHOPS: Hands-on sessions that develop specific skills and systems
MICROPRENEUR SHOWCASES: Case studies from successful ENTREPRENEURS WHO STARTED SMALL
TOOL DEMONSTRATIONS: See exactly what works for streamlined operations
FUNDING ALTERNATIVES: Discover capital strategies beyond traditional venture funding
CONNECTION SESSIONS: Build relationships with like-minded builders and potential collaborators

REGISTRATION INCLUDES FULL ACCESS TO OUR EVENT APP TO CONNECT WITH SPEAKERS, SPONSORS, COMPANIES HIRING, and NETWORK.

June 19th & 20th
OCLC Conference Center

Description:
The IOM3 Composites Group is a professional community dedicated to advancing composite materials through research, innovation, and collaboration. This is a volunteer-led, unofficial page for the IOM3 Composites Group and thoughts. A professional community committed to advancing composite materials through research, innovation and collaboration.

Originally founded as the British Composites Society (BCS), we are now an integral part of the Institute of Materials, Minerals and Mining (IOM3), continuing a proud tradition of promoting excellence in composite science, technology, and sustainable development.

We connect academia, industry, and research organisations to drive progress across all areas of composites — from design and manufacturing to applications and recycling — fostering cross-sector knowledge exchange and supporting the next generation of materials professionals.

Join us as we lead the conversation on the future of composites and champion the role of materials innovation in creating a more sustainable world.

Name: ClimateToo by Wodinna
Description:
At Wodinna, we firmly believe that women play a vital role in shaping a sustainable and inclusive world. We have created a supportive and inclusive space where women can come together, connect, learn, and inspire each other to take action. Through empowering stories, educational resources, and networking opportunities, our goal is to amplify the voices of women driving positive change in the circular economy and working towards a better future.

To support our mission, we have introduced "ClimateToo by Wodinna" - a sustainable clothing brand. Our aim is to address climate change by initiating the #ClimateToo" movement and promoting global cooperation and actions. Our products are thoughtfully crafted using a blend of organic and recycled cotton. We believe in designing clothes that can be remade into new ones once they are worn out, contributing to a circular fashion system. We prioritize high quality while ensuring that our clothes have a minimal impact on the environment. Currently, only 1% of clothes are recycled into new garments, and our "ClimateToo by Wodinna" brand is committed to increasing that percentage.

To further our commitment to making a positive difference, we focus on supporting those in need. One significant area where support is crucial is in providing menstrual protection for school-aged girls in developing countries. We understand that lack of supplies and the stigma surrounding menstruation can hinder girls from completing their education. We firmly believe that menstruation should never be a reason for discrimination or exclusion.

To actively address this issue, the ClimateToo by Wodinna brand has pledged to dedicate 5% of all profits to support Flow Girl, a non-profit association dedicated to helping girls in Kenya. Through this partnership, we aim to empower these girls and ensure they have access to the necessary resources and support to pursue their education without any obstacles. Learn more at www.flowgirl.se
Join "ClimateToo".

Name: JIHO - Junta Iberoamericana de Higiene Ocupacional
Description:
The Iberoamerican Board of Occupational Hygiene (JIHO) is a nonprofit organization created to promote, expand, and ensure the quality of occupational hygiene professionals in the practice of protecting and enhancing the health, safety, and environment of people at work and in their communities.

The primary means by which this is achieved is through the development and implementation of the Certified Occupational Hygienist (HOC) designation that is the global standard for the certification of occupational hygiene professionals who primarily practice in Spanish-speaking countries.

The credentialing system analyzes an individual’s education, experience, and technical knowledge through a written exam entirely in Spanish to determine that the candidates possess minimum competencies in the anticipation, recognition, evaluation and control or chemical, physical, psychosocial, and biological hazards in the work context.

Name: Canadian Scientific and Christian Affiliation
Description: The Canadian Scientific and Christian Affiliation (CSCA) is a fellowship of scientists and those interested in science, who want to understand how science should best interact with the life-giving Christian tradition. Science serves widely, while the Christian faith remains the world’s largest global movement. Where these two cross is fascinating, fruitful, and worthy of our best attention. Our interdisciplinary discussions range, for example, through fields including cosmology, mathematics, ethics, the environment, medicine, genetics, geology, origin studies, engineering, science education, the history of science, epistemology, proofs for the existence of God, biblical interpretation, and the understanding of humanity through the social sciences. CSCA members come to these challenges as researchers in academia and industry, as professors, theologians, philosophers, administrators from dean to provincial university president, and as students just getting started.

Our mission is to build a strong, professional community among Pacific Northwest's information technology leaders, by providing a forum to share ideas, best practices and experiences relevant to CISOs.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Pacific Northwest CISO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

Name: Israeli Association for Compliance, Administrative Enforcement & Audit
Description:
The Israeli Association for Compliance, Administrative Enforcement & Audit is a platform established to be a professional body representing the compliance profession and those who practice it in Israel, which sets the curriculum for compliance and runs a program for certification of compliance officers (CCO).
The Israeli Association for Compliance, Administrative Enforcement and Audit is working to develop professional standards for the compliance profession; the Association has established a code of ethics that helps compliance officers to deal with ethical dilemmas in their working life.
The Association also works to make knowledge in the field of compliance accessible, including publishing articles on compliance from the United States and Europe, where the field of compliance is more mature.
The purpose of the association is to be the leading professional authority in the field of compliance in Israel, and to serve as a professional framework for those engaged in the field of compliance as well as for those interested in this field. The Association works to promote the following goals:
• To constitute a professional framework for representing the profession of compliance and those who practice this profession before government, public and other bodies in Israel and abroad.
• To promote the profession by running a professional certification course, professional training, etc. to raise the professional level of compliance officers.
• To promote the study of the profession of compliance, including in institutions of higher education.
• To promote legislation regarding compliance officers.
• To work to achieve recognition of the status of the profession of compliance officers and the status of the Association.
• Collaborate with various parties, in Israel and around the world, to strengthen the status of compliance officers and to increase awareness of the contribution and importance of the profession.
• Determine the norms to guide the profession

Name: AAPEC - Asociación Argentina para el Estudio del Climaterio
Description:
La Asociación Argentina para el Estudio del Climaterio AAPEC fue fundada el 15 de Octubre de 1987. Por aquel entonces los Dres/as Guillermo Di Paola, Pedro Figueroa Casas, Néstor Siseles,Luis Bosch, Leonor Lugones, Roberto Bocanera, Arturo Arrighi, Dante Calandra, Jorge Itala, Carlos Mautalen, Haydee Benencia, Bautista Perez Ballester, Luis Cebollero, Carlos Lamattina, Héctor Guixa, Antonio Foix, Carlos Gurucharri y, Antonio Tempone, Fernández Collazo, Nidia Gómez Rueda, Mario Camparato, Néstor Dron, Carlos López, Luciano Debeljuk y Edgardo Yung se reunieron en el 5to. piso del Hospital de Clínicas y fundan una Asociación sin fines de lucro destinada a promover el estudio del Climaterio, tanto en sus aspectos normales como en los patológicos.

Este acto es la consecuencia de la toma de conciencia de todos los problemas que aquejaban a la mujer que se acercaba a esta etapa y posterior a la misma, el inminente aumento de información, las nuevas conductas terapéuticas, la necesidad de compartir la experiencia con otros especialistas del mundo derivan en formalizar esta Asociación y orientar los esfuerzos hacia el mejoramiento de la calidad de vida de la mujer.

Hoy con sus más de 500 miembros en las especialidades de ginecología, clínica médica, endocrinología, expertos científicos e investigadores, sociología, nutrición, antropología y de la educación nos permiten decir que AAPEC es la Asociación de referencia más calificada en la Argentina para promover y difundir información exacta e imparcial, ni a favor u en contra de cualquier punto de vista, sino del resultado de la investigación científica, del intercambio de conocimiento y de la propia evaluación.

Estamos satisfechos de ser reconocidos por otras Sociedades u Organizaciones, por la Industria Farmacéutica, por la comunidad científica y la comunidad en general de ser los principales proveedores y a su vez clientes, de todos los aspectos relacionados con el Climaterio y la Menopausia.

•	Primary Objective: To bring together Indian entrepreneurs and professionals to form a cohesive, growth-oriented community that shares knowledge, resources, and opportunities for mutual growth.

o	Provide a platform for learning, mentorship, and unlearning.

o	Organize high-value business events, networking sessions, and workshops.


Curated by leaders, for leaders, EngageX offers a distinguished platform to:

Name: Bundesverband der Lebensmittelchemiker/-innen im öffentlichen Dienst e.V.
Description:
Der BLC ist eine freie, unabhängige, politisch und konfessionell nicht gebundene, gemeinnützige Vereinigung. 

Der BLC hat sich die Beratung und Information von Bürgern, Organisationen, Verbänden, Behörden und Regierungen über Lebensmittel, Kosmetika und Bedarfsgegenstände sowie zu Fragen des Verbraucher- und des Umweltschutzes zum Ziel gesetzt. Des Weiteren möchte der BLC den Erfahrungsaustausch, die Abstimmung und die Zusammenarbeit mit den auf dem Gebiet der Lebensmittel, Kosmetika und Bedarfsgegenstände, des Umwelt- und Verbraucherschutzes sowie des öffentlichen Gesundheitswesens tätigen nationalen und internationalen Organisationen, Verbänden, Behörden und Regierungen fördern und pflegen. Weitere Aufgaben des BLC sind die Aus- und Weiterbildung seiner Mitglieder und die Vertretung und Förderung der rechtlichen, wirtschaftlichen, sozialen und ideellen Berufsinteressen der Lebensmittelchemiker/-innen in Deutschland.

Die Gründungsversammlung des Bundesverbandes der Lebensmittelchemiker/-innen im öffentlichen Dienst e.V. fand am 08. Dezember 1990 in Kassel statt.

Name: The Kansas Chapter, American Academy of Pediatrics (KAAP)
Description:
The Kansas Chapter, American Academy of Pediatrics (KAAP) is a professional organization with more than 500 members throughout the state who work to make lives better for children in Kansas. KAAP has won the AAP Outstanding Medium Chapter award multiple times, is involved in several statewide committees and task forces, active in legislative issues, and manages several programs to help pediatricians promote child literacy, breastfeeding, immunizations and more.
 
Mission: The attainment by all infants, children, adolescents, and young adults of their full potential for physical, mental, emotional, and social health. Together with those who share this purpose, the Kansas Chapter pledges its efforts and expertise to a fundamental goal-that all children and youth have the opportunity to grow up safe and strong, with faith in the future and in themselves.

Name: human as usual
Description:
human as usual is a scaling studio and insulator embedded within growth-stage companies who are starting to realize:

Fast growth doesn’t guarantee sustained performance. 

70% of post-Series A failures aren’t due to product-market fit. They happen because the human infrastructure never evolved.

• Founders stretch beyond capacity.
• Teams operate on duct tape and urgency.
• And investors track dashboards that don't catch cultural erosion until it's too late.

I built human as usual to solve for this invisible fault line; what we call the Scaling Maturity Chasm: 

The hidden breakdown between funder, founder, and team where execution stalls. Not from lack of ambition or talent, but from early-stage playbooks that collapse under scaling complexity.

Our propietary model, ROI² (Return on Investment × Integrity), asks a sharper question:

Is your capital compounding with operational integrity? 
That’s what acts as scalability insurance inside a company’s DNA.

At this stage, scaling intelligence is no longer enough. 

What matters is what the company becomes, the quality of what scale produces, and whether it can truly hold what growth demands.

𝗪𝗵𝘆 𝗪𝗲 𝗘𝘅𝗶𝘀𝘁

There’s an entire economy built on teaching companies how to scale, yet none equip them to hold the weight of scale without breaking apart.

Scaling is more than a KPI challenge. It’s an act of human expansion. Embodying self-reliance, building systems that adapt, and leading with integrity (especially under pressure.)

At its best, scaling is about raising the bar for an entire industry and proving that ambition and humanity don’t have to be at odds.

𝗪𝗲 𝗪𝗼𝗿𝗸 𝗪𝗶𝘁𝗵

• VCs, PE firms, and ecosystem builders seeking a new kind of ROI: Return on Integrity.
• Founders and executive teams in post-Series A and growth-stage companies.
• Post-acquisition operators stabilizing after a capital event.
• Designers of AI-enabled systems who want to build responsibly, with humans at the center.

Name: Bundesverband der Durchgangsärzte e. V.
Description:
Seit 1926 existiert der Bundesverband der für Berufsgenossenschaften tätigen Ärzte e.V. und ist die einzige berufsständige Interessenvertretung der für Berufsgenossenschaften tätigen Ärzte.

Unser Hauptanliegen gilt allen Bestrebungen, die die Durchführung des BG-Heilverfahrens betreffen und dem Unfallverletzten dienen. Insbesondere vertritt unser Verband auch die wirtschaftlichen Interessen der für Berufsgenossenschaften und Unfallkassen tätigen Ärzte. Gemäß der besonderen Verantwortung, Pflichten und der erweiterten Arbeitszeiten sowie der geforderten umfassenderen Qualifikation der D-Ärzte soll auch in Zukunft eine angemessene Vergütung der ärztlichen Leistungen im Vergleich zur gesetzlichen Krankenversicherung gewahrt werden.

Im Laufe der Jahrzehnte hat sich eine vertrauensvolle und enge Zusammenarbeit zwischen den ehrenamtlich tätigen Vertretern des Verbandes und den Verantwortlichen der Unfallversicherungsträger entwickelt. Der Vorstand pflegt enge Kontakte zu den Vertretern des Hauptverbandes der gewerblichen Berufsgenossenschaften, während die Bezirksvorsitzenden eng mit den Berufsgenossenschaften auf Landesebene zusammenarbeiten.

Wir informieren alle Mitglieder kontinuierlich über wesentliche Vorgänge in den Verfahren, im Einzelfall auch alle D-Ärzte in Deutschland, im Besonderen über das Abkommen zwischen Ärzten und Unfallversicherungsträger.

Wir arbeiten mir den Berufsverbänden der wissenschaftlichen Fachgemeinschaften der Unfallchirurgie, Orthopädie und Chirurgie und dem Kassenärztlichen Bundesverband zusammen in gemeinsamer Kommission.

Jeder Beitritt stärkt nicht nur unseren Verband und lässt uns unsere Ziele nachhaltiger verfolgen, sondern gibt uns auch die Möglichkeit Ihre Interessen besser zu vertreten.

Helfen auch Sie durch Ihre Mitgliedschaft unsere Verbandsarbeit so effizient wie möglich zu gestalten und melden Sie sich auf dieser Seite an.

Name: Colorado Groundwater Association
Description:
The purpose of CGWA is to advance the understanding of groundwater hydrology among its membership and the residents of Colorado. CGWA organizes monthly speaker presentations, field trips, community volunteer opportunities, social/networking events and publishes a quarterly newsletter. We are committed to facilitating the wise use of the State's groundwater resources by providing a forum to examine the scientific, technical and policy-making issues related to groundwater. 



From its inception in 1981, CGWA has been a positive and proactive organization. Because of the voluntary efforts of its members, the Association has played an active role in shaping the use and protection of groundwater in Colorado. CGWA leverages the diverse areas of expertise of its members and expands the scope of the profession of groundwater hydrology often cooperating with other related organizations to sponsor conferences.

Today it stands as a tool for the integration of knowledge and the harmonization of responses to the problems of prevention and safety at work.
CIIP represents about 15,000 operators and experts in the sector; possesses all the best skills and experiences to be made available to associated professionals, all workers, as well as consumers, the world of companies and institutions.

Name: Ubuntu Society
Description:
In een wereld waarin digitalisering, protocollering en de dagelijkse praktijk van targets en competitie doelen op zich kunnen worden, zoekt Ubuntu Society met behulp van de Afrikaanse filosofie Ubuntu naar nieuwe wegen. Wegen waar medemenselijkheid, dialoog, tussenruimte, compassie en duurzaamheid sleutelbegrippen zijn. En waar de vraag ‘Hoe draag ik (of: hoe dragen wij) bij aan een rechtvaardige, inclusieve samenleving en een duurzame aarde?’’ centraal staat.

Waarom Ubuntu?
I am because we are and we are because the planet is. Vanuit dat diepgewortelde mens- en wereldbeeld is ieder van ons, ongeacht de sector waarin je werkt of de maatschappelijke functie of rol die je vervult, (mede)verantwoordelijk voor het leveren van een constructieve bijdrage aan die inclusieve, rechtvaardige samenleving en een duurzame aarde. Voor onszelf én onze nog niet geborenen.

De wereldwijde, fundamentele crises waarmee we te maken hebben, zoals economische ongelijkheid, discriminatie en racisme, klimaat, biodiversiteit, vluchtelingen, woningtekorten en ‘code zwart’ in de zorg, krijgen we niet meer opgelost met ons individuele denken en handelen. We zullen samen, via de weg van solidariteit en het pad van gedeelde menselijkheid, op zoek moeten gaan naar een nieuwe (inter)nationale samenlevingsethiek. 

Ubuntu kan ons daarbij helpen. Kijken we vanuit die filosofie naar de zorg, dan leert zij ons: It takes a village to raise a child. Dus hoe kunnen we naar een samenleving bewegen waarin het weer een morele plicht is om voor elkaar te zorgen in plaats van het recht op zorg te claimen? De ‘polariserende’ kloven in alle sectoren kunnen we volgens Ubuntu overbruggen door elkaar allereerst écht te zien (Sawubona: ik zie jou!). Daardoor ervaren mensen de fundamentele behoefte van meaning and belonging weer. En vanuit die basis kunnen we werken met de Ubuntu-wijsheid Indaba, betrokken besluitvorming, wat neerkomt op: If you want to go fast go alone, if you want to go far go together.

Name: EventTeaming

We also support the delivery of event preparedness and contingency plans to ensure success. 

Our bespoke strategies deliver a structure and create habits that enable exceptional results – all managed by inspired and enthusiastic employees who always go the extra mile. 

The EventTeaming mission is simple. We unite teams and stakeholders, foster an exceptional work environment and culture, and support sustainable high performance – the foundations to deliver an outstanding event.

#CICH #EstudiosInternacionales #NetworkingGlobal #DesarrolloProfesional

Name: Sector de La Industria Química y Paraquímica - Canacintra
Description:
La Cámara Nacional de la Industria de Transformación (CANACINTRA) está integrada por dos perfiles, uno geográfico (Delegaciones) y el segundo por sectores industriales (Sectores) donde el Sector de la Industria Química y Paraquímica es uno de los 15 sectores que integran a la CANACINTRA.

En promedio cada sector se integra de por lo menos 8 ramas industriales. En el Sector de la Industria Química y Paraquímica contamos con 13 ramas industriales y en cada rama se agrupan las empresas que la representan.

El sector químico por relevancia económica dentro de la industria, es uno de los principales, por cantidad asociada de valor del PIB (Producto Interno Bruto) del país, así como por ser un sector que se conecta y es esencial para el correcto funcionamiento y cumplimiento de los diferentes procesos en otros sectores.
Location: Ciudad de México, Ciudadd de México

Name: Eastside Ventures

WELCOME TO EASTSIDE VENTURES: WHERE INNOVATION MEETS IMPACT.

Rooted in a deep sense of community and cultural pride, Eastside Ventures is dedicated to driving economic growth, fostering talent, and preserving the rich heritage of the Igbo community.

empowers the Igbo community, fosters entrepreneurship, and showcases the region's potential on a global scale. We envision a future where innovation flourishes, economic prosperity is widespread, and Igbo culture is celebrated worldwide.

These are more than just words to us; they are the guiding principles that shape everything we do at Eastside Ventures.
We are committed to conducting ourselves with the highest ethical standards, embracing innovation as a catalyst for change, and fostering inclusivity in all aspects of our work.

Une de ses missions concerne la coordination d’une stratégie nationale visant à accompagner les éleveurs dans la mise en place des mesures nécessaires pour protéger leur élevage du point de vue sanitaire et à collecter l’ensemble des données permettant d’avoir un état des lieux précis du niveau de biosécurité dans les exploitations porcines.

Our aim is to champion innovation, harness technology, drive positive change, and contribute to the growth of finance professionals, organizations and ultimately the Zimbabwean economy.

Name: The Society of Fellows (SoF) at Scripps Research
Description:
The Society of Fellows (SoF) is a nonprofit, all-volunteer organization designed to encourage professional development and social exchange among postdocs at Scripps Research, and with peers across the San Diego research community. Founded in 1962 by Dr. Frank Dixon, SoF has always valued the spirit of collaboration, community and interaction to enhance the trainee experience. 

We are committed to:
- Promoting the education and exposure of our trainees to diverse Ph.D. career prospects
- Supporting trainees in their professional and career development
- Fostering a vibrant social environment that enhances research training and well-being
- Encouraging collaboration and communication within Scripps Research and with external institutions

SoF organizes a wide range of academic, professional, and social initiatives, including:

 Distinguished Lecturer Series (DLS)
Brings leaders in science and technology to the La Jolla, CA campus 

 Annual Lightning Talk Competition
Encourages postdocs to present their research in a dynamic, concise format to a broad scientific audience

 Industry Bridge Program
Connects trainees with San Diego-area biotech, pharma, and medtech companies through site visits and networking events

 Travel Awards & Course Reimbursement
Provides financial support for conference travel and professional training opportunities

 Collaboration with the Career and Professional Development Office
Co-hosts postdoc seminar series, workshops, and panels on topics like grant writing, job search and funding opportunities

 Collaborative Events with Other Trainee Groups
Co-hosts networking and social events with trainee organizations like NWiS, SDA, GSC, The Biotech Club, and The Outdoors Club to build a strong trainee community

 Social Events 
Builds community through outings such as ski trips, whale watching, Padres games, and mixers with neighboring institutions.

The South Sudan Medical Students' Association is to serve as a platform focusing on welfare, research and mentorship for medical students and early career doctors.

Name: The Pivot Group Network
Description:
Manufacturing recruiting for West Michigan. Trades to executive.

A decade on the plant floor means we understand how manufacturing actually runs - not just the roles, but how they connect. Quality, engineering, operations, skilled trades, leadership. We've worked alongside all of them.

Name: Office Products Depot Australia
Description:
Who we are
We are your office supply heroes. As a network of independently owned and operated local office supply stores we’re different to the big, impersonal chains. We might have the same branding, but each store has its own personality. By coming together we have can offer you the perks of great prices and a broad product range but still retain our flexibility and the familiarity of being part of your local community.

Our products
You’ll find everything you need to run your business here. Our catalogue includes all the best and most popular business supplies from the brands you know and trust. We can supply everything from pens, paper and printers, to furniture, workwear, and kitchen and cleaning supplies. Our diverse range includes our own Officeware private label products that offer great value without compromising on quality. 

What we can do for you
We are your local source for office supplies and anything you need for the workplace. We guarantee to go above and beyond the catalogue for you because we know your life’s easier when you can order everything in one place. Seriously, name it and we’ll source it! And we don’t just mean stationery. If what you want isn’t in our catalogue, we’ll go to the ends of the earth to get exactly what you’re after. It feels great when someone has gone above and beyond for you. As our customer, it’s something we want you to experience every day.

Our partnership with you
Our goal is to understand your business. That way we can offer powerful insights and ideas for your business to take advantage of. We don’t want quick wins. That’s not us. We’re committed to building lasting partnerships built on trust. We’ll deliver long term, cost saving, ambition realising outcomes for your business. Our eyes are fixed on the bigger picture: your business success. We’ll help you achieve it.

Name: Central 100
Description:
This group was established in 2021 with the aim of enhancing the decision-making capabilities of senior management in Hong Kong's core strategic industries. It encourages cross-disciplinary exchange, sharing of management experiences, and the development of analytical and macro-management skills to prepare members for future challenges in higher-level management positions. The goal is for members to achieve greater success in their careers, contribute to Hong Kong's economic development, give back to society, and utilize social resources to improve the quality of life for Hong Kong citizens.

Members of the group typically have a minimum of 13 years of work experience and hold degrees or professional qualifications from top global universities. They possess exceptional leadership potential, management experience, and professional knowledge. The group comprises individuals from various backgrounds, including specialist doctors, judges, university professors, and government honorees (MH, JP, BBS).

Previous guest speakers have included C-level executives from corporations, board members of government agencies (including universities, the Hospital Authority, and the Airport Authority), scholars, former senior government officials, business leaders, and outstanding contributors to society.

Name: Colegio de Abogados y Notarios de Guatemala
Description: El Colegio de Abogados y Notarios de Guatemala, es una asociación gremial, constituida con fundamento en los artículos 34 y 90 de la Constitución Política de la República, con más de 200 años de existencia en la vida nacional.  Tiene como función primordial la superación moral, científica, técnica y material de las profesiones universitarias de abogado, notario y carreras afines, reconocidas por la Asamblea de Presidentes de los Colegios Profesionales, así como el control de su ejercicio, que debe realizarse en forma leal, eficiente, honorable, como auxiliar de la administración de justicia o realizando el derecho en la sociedad, debiendo ser un paradigma de honestidad.

Name: Association of Northern California Oncologists (ANCO)
Description:
ANCO (Association of Northern California Oncologists) was founded in 1990 to advocate, educate, and inform the practicing hematologist/oncologist to ensure delivery of the highest quality care to people living with cancer.

We represent an expanding number of hematologists/oncologists throughout Northern California who practice in the community as well as at the regional academic centers—Stanford University, UC Davis, UC San Francisco—and The Permanente Medical Group.

ANCO serves the interests of a wide range of healthcare professionals including physician members, nurses and practice managers, and people living with cancer. ANCO is a state/regional affiliate of the American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO). ANCO is also a member of the Association of Community Cancer Centers (ACCC), and serves as the specialty delegation representative for hematology/oncology at the California Medical Association (CMA) in tandem with the Medical Oncology Association of Southern California (MOASC).

Name: Florida Coaches Coalition
Description:
The Florida Coaches Coalition was founded in January 2022 by Dr. Andrew Ramjit in an effort to help promote the coaching profession in Florida. The main goals of the FCC are to help promote awareness of coaching salaries across Florida, provide professional learning opportunities for coaches, provide coaches a platform to grow in the profession, and serve as the premier coaching organization in the state.

For the past year, the FCC has asked... and most importantly, listened to the Coaches of Florida. The findings inspired a new and exciting initiative to support Florida coaches on a variety of platforms which include, professional development, brand recognition, compensation, mental health counseling, and networking. We are confident that providing such platforms of support will enhance the quality of coaches and their programs, on all levels, for all sports in Florida.

At the FCC we are providing not only new platforms/resources for the development of coaches and their programs, but also providing new opportunities for Partners to expand their company/brand through this initiative.  We want our Members to be invested in the Partners who are supporting the FCC... and we want our Partners to have access to those coaches, related entities, and resources. 

Given the FCC supports all coaches at all levels and all sports, we will capitalize on our relationships with school districts, private/specialized groups, and municipalities.  We will also work with sport specific conventions/trade shows/events, sport governing entities, and related coaches' organizations throughout the US. 

The FCC Partnerships Program offers a variety of Sponsorship Levels which can be customized to meet the needs of your Marketing/Branding goals and desired footprint in the sports industry.

Name: Eurohaptics Society
Description:
The Eurohaptics Society (EHS) is an international association dedicated to advancing the science and technology of haptics – the research and applications of touch, force, and tactile interaction.

EHS fosters collaboration among researchers, engineers, designers, and practitioners from academia and industry, with a special focus on Europe while maintaining a strong global outlook. We promote scientific exchange, encourage innovation, and support the growth of the haptics community worldwide.

Our main activities include:
- Conferences: Co-organizing the Eurohaptics Conference and contributing to the World Haptics Conference, the two leading international venues for haptics research and applications.
- Networking: Building connections across disciplines and strengthening relationships with other professional associations in related fields.
- Community Support: Providing a platform for scientists, students, and professionals to share knowledge, discover opportunities, and advance their careers.

Whether your interests lie in fundamental haptics research, applied technologies, or cross-disciplinary innovation, the Eurohaptics Society offers a vibrant community to exchange ideas, present research, and shape the future of touch interaction.

 Learn more about our activities, join our events, and connect with the growing haptics community in Europe and beyond.

Name: Entreprendre en Vallée Vézère

Description:
The WERC Mentorship Program connects emerging leaders with established executives in the global mobility industry, fostering professional growth and driving industry innovation.

Our structured program pairs mentees with senior-level mentors and experienced alumni advisors, creating a powerful knowledge exchange ecosystem. Through workshops, speaking engagements, collaborative projects, and networking opportunities, participants develop essential leadership skills while addressing real-world challenges in global mobility.

Led by industry veterans and organized through dedicated committees spanning content development, recruitment, communications, global engagement, and philanthropy, our program offers:

- Access to exclusive industry insights and best practices
- Meaningful connections with C-level executives and thought leaders
- Opportunities to contribute to industry advancement
- Professional development through structured learning experiences
- Community impact through our partnership with the WERC Foundation

Whether you're an aspiring leader seeking guidance or an experienced executive looking to share your knowledge, the WERC Mentorship Program provides a platform to elevate your career while strengthening the global mobility community.

Join us in shaping the future of global mobility leadership.

Description:
El Colegio de Economistas de Lima es una entidad autónoma de derecho público interno, con personería jurídica reconocida por el Estado, que agrupa y representa a los economistas de Lima.

Su misión es fortalecer la profesión del economista, garantizando un ejercicio ético, promoviendo la capacitación continua y contribuyendo al desarrollo económico y social del Perú.

El CEL impulsa a sus colegiados mediante programas de formación, foros, talleres y comités especializados, a la vez que proyecta la voz técnica de la profesión en la sociedad y el Estado.

En esencia, el CEL es la institución oficial y gremial que respalda la carrera de los economistas y potencia su impacto en el país.

Name: Mahmoud Elbagoury
Description:
Mahmoud Elbagoury is a globally recognized Chief Audit Executive and Governance, Risk & Compliance (GRC) Strategist with over 18 years of international experience across Saudi Arabia, Egypt, UAE, and Jordan.

He has led transformational programs in Internal Audit, Governance, and Anti-Fraud, shaping the assurance and integrity landscape for multi-sector organizations and IPO-driven entities.

As a keynote speaker, trainer, and mentor, Mahmoud empowers professionals and boards to elevate corporate integrity, strengthen internal controls, and embed ethical governance in decision-making.

He has shared his insights at leading regional and global forums, including the GRC Summit Egypt, Saudi GRC Conference, PIF Governance Knowledge Exchange Events, Risk Beyond Conference, and IIA Conferences.

Through this page, Mahmoud shares thought leadership on:

- Internal Audit (IA).
- Corporate Governance (CG).
- Governance, Risk & Compliance (GRC).
- Enterprise Risk Management (ERM).
- Fraud Risk Management (FRM).
- Ethics & Complaince (E&C).
- Internal Control (IC).

With almost 25 years of experience, our chapter has consistently ranked as the #1 BNI chapter in Miami-Dade, driven by the Givers Gain philosophy. Description:
Som medlem af HK Ungdom Hovedstaden kan du få råd og vejledning om løn, ansættelseskontrakt/uddannelsesaftale, sygdom m.m. Derudover får du som medlem mulighed for at deltage i HK Ungdom Hovedstadens ungenetværksmøder, arrangementer, fester, kurser og meget mere.

Name: FEBA - Femmes Entrepreneures du Bassin d'Arcachon
Description: La mission du réseau FEBA est de promouvoir l'entrepreneuriat féminin sur le Bassin d'Arcachon et dans le Val de l’Eyre. Notre objectif est de créer un cadre propice à l'entraide, au mentorat et aux opportunités de réseautage, dans une atmosphère bienveillante et ambitieuse, pour permettre aux femmes de s'épanouir dans le milieu économique. Notre réseau FEBA peut aussi mettre en place divers événements tels que des ateliers, des rencontres, des conférences ou des fêtes, selon les besoins, afin de valoriser les initiatives de ses membres.

Name: Circle
Description:
A Circle é um espaço altamente selecionado de executivas de áreas e indústrias diferentes, cujo objetivo é ampliar o repertório para elevar a qualidade da tomada de decisão de mulheres C-Level, VPs e Diretoras. 

Além dessa diversidade intelectual, o propósito da Circle é proporcionar pertencimento para que mulheres não apenas alcancem o topo, mas principalmente, permaneçam nele com força e voz ativa.

Não é “mais um grupo de networking”. É uma jornada no Core Group: Um Peer Advisory Board de mulheres que já chegaram lá, e que querem ir além.

Nossos grupos são pequenos e limitados, formados apenas algumas vezes por ano, para garantir intimidade, profundidade e dedicação.

Nossas membras são as mulheres mais ocupadas do mundo. Cada segundo delas importa. 

Por isso, cada encontro é estruturado e conduzido por uma facilitadora, para que os objetivos particulares e coletivos das executivas sejam atingidos ao final da nossa Jornada no Core Group.

Description:
At Manifold Leadership, we believe the foundation of every thriving organization is a strong, visionary leader. Our mission is to empower CEOs, organization leaders, division leaders, Unit heads and upcoming leaders to develop the skills necessary for driving both personal and organizational success. Under the leadership of Dr. Timi Adepoju, Physician-Entrepreneur & John Maxwell Leadership Executive Program Team Member, we offer tailored leadership programs that focus on leadership development, building effective communication, enhancing team collaboration, and driving innovation to achieve personal and organizational goals.
With over 20 years of experience in the healthcare industry and three decades of personal development, Dr. Adepoju has spearheaded initiatives that prioritize leadership growth and well-being. Whether through leadership workshops or personalized coaching, Manifold Leadership provides the strategies leaders need to inspire their teams, navigate challenges, and achieve long-term success.

Description: Welcome to the London Osteopathic Society, an organisation exclusively managed by and for osteopaths. Description:

We partner with education entities who value professional training to fuel faster technology adoption, better utilization, and resilient employees. Continuous education is a must have for the sports technology field.

Candidates seeking skill recognition for highly competitive jobs are encouraged to complete an application. Get a "Verified ID"  Coming Fall 2025

Name: Alexandria Area Young Professionals
Description:
The Alexandria Area Young Professionals (AAYP) is an organization formed from the Alexandria Lakes Area Chamber of Commerce to represent Alexandria area professionals in their 20s and 30s. Meet other professionals in your age demographic with similar goals, develop your professional career and establish long-lasting friendships.

We host monthly luncheons the first Thursday of each month where you have the opportunity to network, learn more about the Alexandria area and explore new ways to get involved in the community. Luncheons include great food, a variety of networking activities, educational speakers, prizes and business announcements.

We also host quarterly social events at a variety of locations. Socials include Adopt-A-Highway ditch clean-ups, BARGO, Coat Drives, Trivia Nights, Escape Rooms, Paint-and-Sips and more. All of these allow you the opportunity to meet fellow young professionals in a more social setting. 

Inclement Weather Cancellation Policy: 
The Alexandria Area Young Professionals organization follows School District #206 Inclement Weather Policy. If school is cancelled or closes early, luncheons and/or socials will be cancelled.
Communication: 
As a member of AAYP, you can expect an email notifying you of the cancellation. If you are not a current member, you can check our Facebook page for updates or call 320-763-3161 or email ypalexandria@gmail.com.

Name: Better Skills, Better Jobs Fair - Pitt County
Description:
The Better Skills, Better Jobs Fair is the largest career fair of its kind in eastern North Carolina where hundreds of jobseekers connect with more than 100 employers and educational resources.

Sponsored by the John M. Belk Endowment, Pitt Community College, Greenville-Pitt County Chamber of Commerce, Greenville ENC Alliance, Pitt County Economic Development, IBX Media, and Koinonia Community Solutions, the event will take place on Thursday, October 5, 2023 at the Greenville Convention Center. 

Community partners include East Carolina University – Office of Continuing and Professional Education, Pitt County Schools, Greenville Utilities, Tradesformers, NC Coastal Society for Human Resource Management, NCWorks, ECU Health, and NC East Alliance.

Name: CEAS Guidance, Navigation, and Control
Description:
The CEAS Conference on Guidance, Navigation and Control or “EuroGNC” an applied conference with strong aeronautics and space orientation. Please see the full scope of the conference on the topics page.

Non-aerospace applications with similar challenges and modeling approaches are welcome (e.g. automotive, robotics, wind energy, underwater vehicles). Theoretical works that are applicable to the aeronautics and space problems within the scope of EuroGNC are also welcome. 

EuroGNC conferences have typically between 100 and 150 participants and provide excellent value for money for the participants with lunches, dinner, etc. being included in the reasonable registration price. With everything happening on-site, participants do not disperse at lunch time, but can continue their technical discussions and networking instead.

Since 2024, a best paper award named after and in honour of Marc Pélegrin is awarded at each edition of the conference. The prize money is co-funded by ONERA and ISAE-SUPAERO.

EuroGNC 2026 in Madrid: The 2026 conference will be hosted from May 5th to 7th, 2026 at the University Carlos III de Madrid.

Madrid is a vibrant European capital with rich history, famous architecture, and 3.5 million residents. It is well connected to the world through its international airport (15th busiest worldwide) and to other parts of Spain via a network of high-speed railway lines. The weather in Madrid is usually very nice in the spring.

The conference venue is located in the city center, at the Campus Puerta de Toledo of the University Carlos III de Madrid. From there, attendants can reach the main square, Plaza Mayor, in a 10-15-minute (1.2 km) walk. Several hotels are in the direct vicinity (< 5-min walk) of the conference venue.

Name: GeorgiaCMO
Description:
GeorgiaCMO is one of 45 local chapters in the Inspire Leadership Network, a national membership organization comprised of CMOs from public and private businesses, government, education, healthcare, and nonprofit institutions.

GeorgiaCMO exists to help marketing executives thrive in challenging C-suite roles. The chapter regularly convenes leading CMOs and fosters meaningful relationships by hosting non-commercial, member-led programs—helping CMOs gain leadership advantage.

Successful CMOs understand the ‘superpower’ of trusted relationships with other leading marketing executives. The answer is in the room. GeorgiaCMO members share ideas, best practices, and experiences to inform, influence and create marketing excellence. Confidentiality is assured under Chatham House rules.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATIONS
Members must be the ‘CMO’ (top marketing executive, regardless of title) of an organization or division with over $100 million in annual revenue. Organizations over $1B may enroll additional qualified CMO members, provided the primary CMO is a member in good standing.

THE GEORGIA CMO ORBIE AWARDS
GeorgiaCMO presents the annual peer-adjudicated, CMO of the Year ORBIE Awards, promoting outstanding marketing leaders to the business community, building relationships between CMOs and their trusted business partners, and inspiring the next generation of marketing leaders. Since 1998, over 800 technology, security, and marketing leaders have received the prestigious ORBIE Award. More at orbie.org.

Name: Bluegrass ASHRAE
Description: ASHRAE, founded in 1894, is a global society advancing human well-being through sustainable technology for the built environment. The Society and its members focus on building systems, energy efficiency, indoor air quality, refrigeration and sustainability within the industry. Through research, standards writing, publishing and continuing education, ASHRAE shapes tomorrow’s built environment today. ASHRAE was formed as the American Society of Heating, Refrigerating and Air-Conditioning Engineers by the merger in 1959 of American Society of Heating and Air-Conditioning Engineers (ASHAE) founded in 1894 and The American Society of Refrigerating Engineers (ASRE) founded in 1904.

TSPE's mission is to promote the ethical and competent practice of engineering and advocates licensure to enhance the engineering profession and to protect the health, safety and welfare of the public.

The Tennessee Society of Professional Engineers is organized geographically into 7 local chapters; Chattanooga, Knoxville, Lakeway, Memphis, Nashville, Tullahoma, and Upper East (Tri-Cities). An elected Board of Directors conducts the business of the society with support from the TSPE Staff .

Name: Next Mountain
Description:
You’ve reached the summit. Now what?

At Next Mountain, we guide accomplished founders and leaders through the transition that follows a major milestone, whether an exit, career peak, or personal turning point.

Success often brings freedom, but also restlessness and uncertainty. Old metrics lose their meaning. What comes next isn’t another hustle, but a deeper journey: from achievement to alignment, from success to stewardship, from solo striving to collective impact.

What We Do:

 Post-Exit Integration — 1:1 guided journeys for leaders navigating life after a major achievement.

 Base Camp Forum — A 10-week online peer program to grow your capacity for stewardship and impact.

 Private Impact Community — A curated network of leaders dedicated to creating systemic change together.

Why We Exist

Our world faces complex, interconnected challenges—climate, social unrest, institutional breakdown—that demand wiser forms of leadership. We believe exited founders and seasoned executives are uniquely positioned to answer this call. With perspective, resources, and influence, you can turn your achievements into a legacy of meaningful contribution.

If you need specific qualifications to get that dream job, then look no further than Skills360. 

Whether you’re just starting your journey or are looking to move your career forward Skills360 can help. We have unrivalled access to a great network of sector partners who can offer you further training and development, access to qualifications and fantastic opportunities to both volunteer and get paid work. 

Don’t think the Sport and Physical Activity sector is for you? Maybe you should think again! The sector offers careers in marketing, finance, administration, hospitality, mental wellbeing, Information Technology, youth-work and education; as well as amazing opportunities to work and volunteer in similar roles in both national and international events like the Commonwealth Games.

Name: SheResolves
Description:
SheResolves is not a mediation or arbitration firm. We are an invitation-only network of the top women commercial mediators and arbitrators in each state who are selected after passing a rigorous set of objective criteria and peer-review. Our members offer a broad range of subject matter expertise in most areas of commercial dispute mediations or arbitrations. Users of our online member directory can locate a vetted and highly respected ADR professional using a variety of searchable fields to fit specific ADR needs. And there is no cost to use the SheResolves online directory to locate a mediator or arbitrator.

We make it easy to find quality women mediators and arbitrators.

In 2018, the American Bar Association adopted Resolution 105 to raise public awareness and to address data showing that diversity in ADR significantly trails diversity within the legal profession.

Which is the reason we created SheResolves℠.

We understand the true value of women’s diverse skills and accomplishments as arbitrators and mediators, and we ask others to value us too. SheResolves targets our message to litigators, general counsel, C-suite executives, and other decision makers. We highlight the problem, and we spotlight the solution. Our mission is to connect, support, and promote women mediators and arbitrators.

Name: Warmi Circle
Description:
Warmi Circle es más que un club para mujeres líderes; es un movimiento inspirado por el ecosistema Web3. No importa si sabes mucho o poco de este ecosistema, te ofrecemos un espacio seguro y empoderador donde mujeres líderes se unen para aprender y crecer juntas desde la consciencia.

Nuestro compromiso es fomentar tu crecimiento personal abarcando cuatro áreas esenciales: social, mental, espiritual y física, preparándote para liderar con confianza y éxito en un mundo tecnológicamente avanzado.

En Warmi Circle, no solo compartimos historias de éxito, sino que también abrazamos y superamos los desafíos en comunidad, construyendo un futuro donde el liderazgo femenino brille con fuerza.

Name: Business Whanganui - Chamber of Commerce

We provide support, learning, networking and promotional opportunities for business of all sizes, ages, and stages, and help business to connect, grow and advance. 

Our community is vital, energetic, creative,connected, and well informed. Join us today!

Name: União dos Profissionais do Audiovisual, Televisão e Multimédia
Description:
A União dos Profissionais do Audiovisual, Televisão e Multimédia - Upatm, foi criada no dia 27 de Fevereiro de 2023 com o objectivo de defender os interesses dos profissionais de audiovisual.

Esta Associação formou-se após surgirem alguns movimentos de união para exigir melhores condições de trabalho na televisão e de se fazer sentir a necessidade de encontrar um espaço de encontro e comunicação entre todos os departamentos onde fosse possível reunir, trocar ideias e tomar decisões em conjunto.

A associação correspondeu ao desejo de muitos profissionais de televisão, ela está agora pronta para avançar, mas precisa do envolvimento de todos nós.
Tornarmo-nos associados é fundamental para que ela cresça.

A força que queremos que ela venha a ter vem da representatividade que todos lhe dermos.

A missão da União dos Profissionais do Audiovisual, Televisão e Multimédia - Upatm, passa por criar um espaço de encontro e comunicação entre todos os departamentos que constituem o trabalho audiovisual.
Acreditamos que facilitando a união entre os profissionais, o diálogo e a proximidade, conseguiremos cumprir o nosso desígnio de defender os interesses dos profissionais de audiovisual.
