Name: Geyseco
Description:
Grupo Geyseco es una compañía con 30 años de actividad en el sector de la Gestión de Congresos Científicos y Sociedades Médicas.
 
La experiencia es uno de nuestros principales avales, ya que superamos el millar de Congresos Nacionales e Internacionales, manteniendo una media de 50 congresos anuales y gestionando más de 25 Sociedades Científicas. 

Para el equipo humano que formamos Grupo Geyseco nuestro compromiso diario con los profesionales es aportar parámetros de tranquilidad, seguridad, confianza, recursos humanos y técnicos, asumiendo sus proyectos y prestándoles soluciones basadas en la rentabilidad y en la calidad de la gestión. 

Nuestro objetivo es el éxito de su proyecto, y para ello ponemos a su disposición experiencia, conocimiento y profesionalidad. 

Grupo Geyseco asume su responsabilidad de seguir avanzando en las nuevas tecnologías al servicio de una gestión profesional, así como dinamizar las sociedades y los congresos, dotándolas de unas herramientas de trabajo que respondan a unos parámetros de experiencia y solvencia.

Name: Massachusetts Association of Public Purchasing Officials (MAPPO)
Description:
Welcome to the Massachusetts Association of Public Purchasing Officials' (MAPPO) Linkedin page. We're an organization dedicated to the education, professional development, and representation of public procurement professionals across the Commonwealth. This page will be used to communicate with members and followers on the activities of the organization, including meetings and other initiatives of general interest.  

For its members, MAPPO sponsors seminars, offers the shared resources of supportive colleagues through our forum, and meetings with speakers on various topics in procurement, with CEU credits towards MCPPO redesignation.  Membership in MAPPO is open to all public employees whose duties include responsibility for public contracting, including construction and purchasing of goods and services. Guests are always welcome to attend meetings on topics of interest.

Please do not post procurement solicitations or ask for advice on procurement-related issues on this page. A membership will allow for access to a network of supportive peers who are always willing to offer their advice and experience.

Your Officers for 2025-2027 are:

Jordan T. Remy, President, City of Somerville
Daniel Doucette, Vice President, City of Peabody
Meredith Tarr, Treasurer, City of Leominster
April Lanni, Secretary, Town of Stoneham

Name: III Congreso Iberoamericano de Esterilización 2026
Description:
El III Congreso Iberoamericano de Esterilización 2026 se consolida como el evento científico más relevante en esterilización, control y prevención de infecciones en Iberoamérica. Esta edición reunirá a más de 27 speakers internacionales de Norteamérica, Europa, Asia, África y América Latina, en un espacio diseñado para el intercambio de conocimiento, innovación tecnológica y formación de alto nivel.

Durante tres días, profesionales del sector salud, líderes institucionales, investigadores y actores clave del ecosistema hospitalario compartirán experiencias, avances científicos y buenas prácticas que están transformando los estándares de bioseguridad en el mundo.

CIBE 2026 no es solo un congreso: es una plataforma de impacto regional, donde se crean conexiones estratégicas, se generan oportunidades de colaboración y se definen los nuevos retos de la seguridad del paciente.

Haz parte de esta experiencia transformadora!
Te invitamos a ser protagonista del cambio en la región.

INSCRIPCIONES ABIERTAS

Name: The Bibliographical Society of America
Description: The Bibliographical Society of America (BSA) is the oldest scholarly society in North America dedicated to the study of books and manuscripts as physical objects. It was organized in 1904 and incorporated in 1927 with the principal objectives of promoting bibliographical research and issuing bibliographical publications. These objectives have been and continue to be accomplished through a broad array of activities, including meetings, lectures, and fellowship programs, as well as the publishing of books and the Papers of the Bibliographical Society of America (PBSA), North America’s leading bibliographical journal. The Society is open to all those interested in bibliographical problems and projects, and its membership includes bibliographers, librarians, professors, students, booksellers, and collectors worldwide.

Name: Federação Angolana de Golfe
Description: Consolidar o golfe como uma modalidade estruturada e sustentável em Angola, através de formação, regulamentação, competições, comunicação e boas práticas de governança, a FAGOLFE pretende posicionar Angola no cenário do golfe nacional e internacional, garantindo um futuro promissor para o desporto no país.

Name: The Fashion Group International of Saint Louis
Description:
The Fashion Group International of Saint Louis was established in 1936 as a local region of The Fashion Group International and has been serving our local fashion, beauty and home industry for 86 years! Founded in 1928, The Fashion Group International is a global, membership organization of professionals in fashion and related industries providing resources and education for career advancement while creating a forum for discussion and connection across all industries such as fashion, beauty, home, retail, textiles, designers, publishers, marketers, brands, content creators and more.

The FGI mission is to provide our member network with a forum for discussion and connection across all sectors through programming focused on the industry’s most current and crucial topics, recognition of emerging talent and trends at the zeitgeist of innovation. To open access to industry leaders by offering a platform of resources for business development and career advancement at all levels.  We believe that providing a forum for professional development and career advancement unleashes creativity, innovation and advances the business of fashion.

The Fashion Group International of Saint Louis is led and operated by a volunteer board of dedicated community members.

Description: O Conselho Regional de Química da 16ª Região, conforme Lei 2.800/56 e demais dispositivos legais relativos ao Sistema CFQ-CRQ´s, realiza a fiscalização do exercício profissional, no âmbito das empresas que têm atividade na área da Química e com relação aos Profissionais da Química das diversas categorias, no estado de Mato Grosso, desenvolvendo as atividades e executando os serviços necessários para o cumprimento de sua ação fiscalizadora.

Name: Association of Procurement Professionals (APP)
Description: The Association of the Procurement Professionals in Rwanda (APP) was established by an Act of Parliament: Law N°011/2016 of 02/05/2016 Establishing the Association of Procurement Professionals and Determining its Organization and Functioning. Its major aim is to promote Procurement Professionalism and Best Practices in Rwanda. The Association, like any other entity in Rwanda, seeks to contribute towards the on-going efforts of transforming the country into a Knowledge Based and Service Driven Economy. It is against this brief background therefore that the Association works tirelessly to ensure that the Procurement Profession in Rwanda is practiced with utmost due diligence, with emphasis on Professional Ethics and Internationally Accepted Best Practices.

Name: UC San Diego Delta Sigma Pi
Description:
Delta Sigma Pi is one of the largest co-ed professional business fraternities in the nation and has over 300 active chapters and over 250,000 initiated members. Our Fraternity provides great opportunities for students looking for a head start in the business world.

The Omicron Sigma Chapter is based in sunny La Jolla, California at the University of California, San Diego. Founded in May of 2004, our chapter has seen brothers thrive and grow in brotherhood, leadership, service, and professionalism. Our Alumni network extends from marketing departments to financial planning, and from Disney Pixar to Deloitte.

Since its founding in 1907, Delta Sigma Pi aims to be America’s preeminent professional business fraternity. Part of that founding was to form a brotherhood of people from diverse walks of life, at a time when other organizations excluded certain groups from membership. A great strength of our Fraternity is a membership as diverse as the business world, for which we are preparing our members. We are a mixture of different voices from different backgrounds that challenge fixed ways of thinking and lead us to excellent ideas at both the chapter level and in the business world.

Name: Asociația Avocaților Penaliști din România
Description:
Asociația Avocaților Penaliști din România a dobândit personalitate juridică prin încheierea din 27 septembrie 2021, pronunțată de Judecătoria Sectorului 1 București, fiind înscrisă în Registrul Asociaților și Fundaților, aflat la grefa judecătoriei, la poziția 1/4 ianuarie 2022. Membrii fondatori sunt: Av. dr. Bogdan Buneci – Președinte, Av. drd. Eduard Constantin – Vicepreședinte, Av. Viorica Biță – Secretar General, Av. drd. Vasile Băiculescu și Av. drd. Șandru Adrian.

Asociația Avocaților Penaliști din România își propune două direcții de acțiune: apărarea avocaților penaliști împotriva abuzurilor individuale și instituționale, în cadrul unor proceduri judiciare sau administrative (apărarea apărării); pregătirea profesională inițială și continuă prin organizarea de dezbateri, cursuri, seminarii, conferințe, simpozioane, congrese. Toate demersurile asociației vor fi realizate în strânsă colaborare cu Uniunea Națională a Barourilor din România, Baroul București și celelalte barouri din țară, dar și cu Institutul Național pentru Pregătirea și Perfecționarea Avocaților.

Name: Nepal Tunnelling Association
Description:
Nepal Tunnelling Association (NTA) was established in the year 2011 with the intention of promoting use, research and knowledge dissemination of underground space for safe, sustainable and eco- friendly infrastructure development in the country. It is to be incorporated under this Statute shall be a non-profit seeking non-governmental organization. NTA is associated with International Tunneling and Underground Association.

One of its main purposes is to act as a link between the private sector and government organizations involved in developing underground space in the country so that Nepalese citizens can get the maximum benefit from the development effort.

Besides this, the organization also helps exchange technology, expertise, knowledge, financial and management information among the independent power producers in the country.

NTA is primarily a membership organization. The General Assembly comprises both institutional and individual members. The General Assembly elects the Board of Directors, which then formulates the plans and policies of the organization. NTA Registered with DAO, Kathmandu.

Name: Bangladesh Society for Corporate Professionals - BSCP
Description:
Bangladesh Society for Corporate Professionals (BSCP) is a premier platform dedicated to fostering a vibrant community of corporate leaders, executives, and professionals across various industries in Bangladesh. BSCP serves as a hub for networking, knowledge sharing, and professional development, empowering members to elevate their careers and contribute to the growth of the corporate landscape in Bangladesh.

Believing in the power of collaboration and the exchange of ideas, BSCP offers members access to exclusive events, workshops, and seminars led by industry experts. These opportunities provide valuable insights and help members stay ahead in an ever-evolving business environment. Whether an established executive or an emerging leader, BSCP offers a supportive network to help achieve professional goals.

Join us in our mission to shape the future of corporate excellence in Bangladesh. Together, we can build a stronger, more connected corporate community.

Name: DSTH DK
Description:
Dansk Selskab for Trombose og Hæmostase (DSTH) arbejder for at øge kendskabet til trombose- og hæmostasesygdomme.
DSTH er i hastig vækst og har mere end 300 aktive medlemmer fra hele landet.

Formål:
At øge kendskabet til trombose- og hæmostase-sygdomme og styrke danske lægers uddannelse inden for dette område.

At fremme den teoretiske og kliniske forskning inden for trombose og hæmostase

At skabe kontakt mellem de forskellige grene inden for trombose- og hæmostaseforskning i Danmark

At etablere samarbejde med tilsvarende selskaber i andre lande

At yde sagkyndig rådgivning til myndigheder og retsvæsen i Danmark.

Selskabets formål fremmes ved afholdelse af videnskabelige møder, symposier og undervisning, ved nedsættelse af udvalg og arbejdsgrupper til varetagelse af særlige opgaver, ved deltagelse i nationalt og internationalt samarbejde samt ved udarbejdelse af trykt materiale.

Name: PROTO Horizon
Description: The PROTO consortium gathers experts and institutions from different sectors, from academia to SMEs and patient organizations. Members of PROTO aim to collaboratively advance the research in chronic inflammation in OA, elucidate the mechanisms and identify the factors responsible for health to disease transition. PROTO aims to create a reliable, sustainable and evidence-based concept for tackling inflammation in pre- and early-stage OA, which can be used in future therapeutic interventions to prevent OA development and progression.

Name: GRPA - Georgia Rotary Professional Alliance
Description:
The Georgia Rotary Professional Alliance (GRPA) is a satellite club of the Johns Creek North Fulton Rotary Club.

Our mission is to cultivate a vibrant and supportive network of successful professionals, fostering meaningful relationships through collaboration, professional development, and public service. By leveraging our collective expertise, we aim to create positive change within our community, while ensuring that our journey together is both impactful and enjoyable.

WHY JOIN GRPA
- Promote professional growth and development through networking, education, and shared experiences.
- Provide opportunities for members to collaborate and exchange expertise in a supportive, inclusive environment.
- Serve the community through meaningful initiatives that address local needs and create lasting positive change.
- Foster global connections by linking our members with Rotary’s vast international network.

Name: RISE Hub CIC

RISE Hub CIC is a UK-based community supporting people to grow in work and business. We bring together founders, professionals, and allies through events, mentoring, and practical workshops.

You get access to connections, skills support, and trusted signposting on topics that matter, from confidence and leadership to finance, safeguarding, and wellbeing. We focus on real outcomes. Clear next steps, stronger networks, and visible progress.

RISE Hub CIC works with partners, local organisations, and sponsors to create safe, inclusive spaces where the community can learn, collaborate, and lead.

Name: Punt van Inspiratie
Description:
Punt van Inspiratie is hét Punt om werkgeluk en energie in jouw organisatie een boost te geven!

Punt van inspiratie brengt de talenten en drijfveren van iedere medewerker in beeld en brengt medewerkers samen om inzicht te krijgen in elkaars talenten en drijfveren. Dit zorgt ervoor dat er betere samenwerking ontstaat. Samen creëren we een werkomgeving waarin iedereen van en met elkaar leert en blijft leren. 

We zorgen ervoor dat elkaar helpen en adviseren  de ‘normaalste zaak van de wereld’ wordt en dat iedereen daarbij het organisatiebelang goed op het netvlies heeft. Zo wordt samenwerken inspirerend en worden als vanzelfsprekend de beste resultaten geboekt!

Wil je weten wat Punt van Inspiratie voor jouw organisatie kan betekenen? Maak dan een afspraak voor een inspirerende kennismaking!

Diensten van Punt van Inspiratie
Voor individuen    - Persoonlijk leiderschap vanuit passie.
Voor organisaties  - De kunst van het leren samenwerken.

Punt van Inspiratie levert altijd maatwerk voor jouw vraagstuk. Met een warm netwerk van gespecialiseerde samenwerkingspartners wordt altijd de juiste oplossing gevonden.

Description:
The EIT Community is a collaborative network comprising the European Institute of Innovation and Technology's (EIT) long-term partnerships, known as Knowledge and Innovation Communities (KICs). 

These KICs are dedicated to driving systemic change in Europe and beyond, focusing on key areas such as climate change, energy, health, food, manufacturing, raw materials, digitalisation, urban mobility, culture and creativity. By harnessing the collective expertise of the KICs, the EIT Community initiatives power innovation, entrepreneurship and creativity in Europe. We believe that together we can foster a competitive, inclusive, and sustainable European economy for generations to come. 

"The EIT Community RIS Hub is funded by the EIT, a body of the European Union".

PBEH awards professional designations to practitioners who meet the criteria, which include holding a recognized qualification, having a specified number of years experience in the cleaning industry, or through Recognition of Prior Learning (RPL). RPL allows individuals to gain recognition for skills and knowledge acquired through work experience, even if they do not have formal qualifications.

Name: ShapeYourLiving by Annamária Petőfi
Description:
2015-ben alapítottam kreatív szenvedélyem professzionális megvalósulási formájaként a Zsannadesign.hu belsőépítészeti vállalkozásomat. Már ekkor hitem fontos alapját képezte, hogy komplex szolgáltatás keretében ügyfeleimnek valós értéket teremtsek, ötvöztem az egyes fázisokat, biztosítva teljes körű szolgáltatást a tervezéstől egészen a kivitelezésig. A múltbéli tapasztalaimmal felvértezve ezen életfeladatokat, élethelyzeteket szemlélve realiztáltam, milyen érték, ha idő és pénz optimalizálás szempontjából új értelembe vett komplex szolgáltatásokat nyújtok, megkönnyítve ezzel az ügyfelek mindennapjait, HIDAT képezve a területek működésében.
Vállalkozásom sikerének kiemelt eredménye, hogy üzleti modellem elnyerte ügyfeleim bizalmát és elégedettségét. Amire a legbüszkébb vagyok, hogy 8 év alatt kizárólag ajánlás útján támogattam új vagy visszatérő ügyfeleimet álomotthonuk vagy munkaterük megalkotásában.

Összekapcsoltam egy szolgáltatási rendszerben a SZEMLÉLETMÓD, SZERVEZÉS és KIVITELEZÉS folyamatát a hatékonyabb eredmény elérésére és teljesítmény javítására.
Ahogy cégek igénybe vesznek adott feladat elvégzéséhez külső segítséget, úgy miért ne vehetnél te is életed egyes területeinek szervezéséhez igénybe professzionális segítséget?
Meggyőződésem, hogy a SIKER a közös munkával elérhető, fontos, hogy a vissza nem térő pillanatokat egészségben és boldogságban éljük meg!
A sikereim legfontosabb alappillérei a sokszínű üzleti hátterem kombinálása a coaching és gyakorlati készségeimmel, tanulmányaimmal és tudásommal. Ezek kombinációja személyiségjegyeimmel és skilljeimmel biztosítják számomra ezt egyedi működést és eszköztárat.
Életünk számos szférájában a kényelem, hatékonyság és harmónia megteremtése válik egyre fontosabbá. Szolgáltatásaink egyedi kombinációja ezen értékek kifinomult összehangolását kínálja, miközben teljes körű megoldást teremtünk a gondolkodásmód, az élettér és munkakörnyezet különböző aspektusaira.

Name: New Zealand Security Sector Network
Description:
The New Zealand Security Sector Network (NZSSN) is a security sector-wide network promoting interdisciplinary information sharing, collaboration, and research between government, industry, and academia. Its aim is to raise awareness, promote professionalism, and champion good practice in relation to the protection of New Zealanders from emerging threats to their security.

The NZSSN was the founding organising body of the Women in Security Awards Aotearoa (WiSAA), which since 2020 has played an important role in recognising excellence among female Defence, Law Enforcement, and Security professionals - areas in which women are significantly under-represented. While responsibility for organising the Awards has passed to Defsec New Zealand, the NZSSN remains a support partner.

The NZSSN is also an official support partner of the New Zealand Outstanding Security Performance Awards (OSPAs), which is an internationally recognised award program for security professionals hosted annually by the UK-based World Excellence Awards and ASIS International's New Zealand Chapter.

The NZSSN champions the following principles:

1. A sector that reflects the principles of the Treaty of Waitangi
2. Evidence-based approaches to understanding security problems
3. Security-by-design approaches to the design of goods, services and systems
4. Legal and ethical security practices that safeguard individual rights and liberty
5. Practices that reflect international standards and/or world-leading practice
6. A non-government security sector working in the national interest
7. The value of public-private partnership in enhancing national security
8. Security as a visible and attractive career option for all
9. Promoting professionalism and celebrating success across the sector
10. Raising the profile of the role of under-represented genders and groups in security.

The NZSSN is an independent, non-commercial cooperative network.

Name: Eco2Wine
Description: The Eco2Wine project, "NATURAL MICROBIAL INTERACTIONS IN WINEMAKING-ASSOCIATED ECOSYSTEMS AS A TOOL TO FOSTER WINE INNOVATION," is a collaborative initiative involving eight academic institutions from across the globe. Supported by the EU Horizon Europe Program with approximately €2.4 million in funding over four years, the project aims to advance research, doctoral training, and public communication in vine-growing and winemaking. Name: EuroChalk
Description: EUROCHALK is a collaborative working group that brings together geologists, hydrogeologists, and geophysicists from leading geological surveys (such as BRGM, BGS, and TNO), research institutes, and universities to advance the understanding of chalk formations across Europe. The consortium focuses on the challenges of representing chalk heterogeneities—such as fracturing, karstification, and permeability variations—within geological and hydrogeological models. By leveraging diverse expertise and research, participants contribute to advancements in subsurface characterization, with applications in groundwater management, CO₂ storage, geothermal energy, and engineering challenges such as tunneling, foundation stability, and coastal erosion. Through this network, EUROCHALK fosters knowledge exchange and drives innovation in the study and sustainable management of chalk landscapes.

We help link students with employers, working professionals to like-minded peers, business to business and vendors to buyers – all with the goal of enhancing member careers, business and overall success in this field. NOT A POPULARITY CONTEST

AAF Tri-Cities provides an environment where members (including students and working professionals alike) can embrace learning and growth that builds personal and professional confidence. Name: Australian Migration Co
Description:
Australian Migration Co is a Perth-based Australian migration consultancy providing professional, compliant, and strategic migration services to individuals, families, skilled professionals, employers, and business owners.

The firm is led by Adam (Gürkan) Kocoglu, a Registered Migration Agent (MARN 2418576), and operates in accordance with Australian migration law and OMARA regulatory standards. Australian Migration Co supports both onshore and offshore clients, with extensive experience assisting applicants from Türkiye and onshore international applicants.

Australian Migration Co provides migration assistance across a wide range of visa pathways, including employer-sponsored visas (482, 186, 494), skilled migration visas (189, 190, 491), partner visas (300, 309/100, 820/801), student visas (500), visitor visas (600), as well as business and Australian citizenship applications.

The firm adopts a structured, evidence-based approach focused on risk identification, compliance management, and long-term migration planning, particularly in complex matters involving prior refusals, sponsorship obligations, and pathway strategy.

 Perth, Western Australia
 Services available in English and Turkish

Name: The Black Tech Initiative
Description:
The Black Tech Initiative (BTI)
Community. Impact. Culture.

We’re not just another tech program.

At BTI, we’re building a future-forward, culturally-rooted ecosystem where Black talent is seen, supported, and sustained in tech. Whether you're a career shifter, an emerging founder, or a seasoned professional seeking your next breakthrough.

The Gaps We Fill:
We exist to address what most tech training programs overlook:the human side of tech career transitions; the lack of community, mentorship, and cultural alignment, the systemic barriers Black professionals face — even after earning certifications, the absence of real-world guidance and sustainable pathways to thrive

At the heart of it all is our commitment to authenticity and safe spaces.
BTI is a place where you don’t have to shrink, code-switch, or prove your worth.
Here, you show up as your full self — and know you’ll be seen, supported, and celebrated.

Our Holistic Model:
We bridge the gap between access and real opportunity by integrating:
hands-on, future-ready tech training, career coaching and job placement pipelines, intentional mentorship and peer support, founder ecosystem strategy
Mental wellness and culturally-affirming community care.

Our dual-track programs are built to meet people where they are:career Shifter Program: for those breaking into tech from nontraditional backgrounds. Tech Climber Program: For professionals advancing in high-demand fields like AI, data engineering, and cybersecurity

Our Events & Experiences:
We activate our mission through powerful, community-driven events like:The State of Black Tech, The Blend (co-working + connection), Creator vs Consumer workshop, and Tech Thursday Sync-Up.

Strategic Partnerships & Local Roots:
We proudly partner with national platforms like DataCamp, Google Grow, and  Saylor Academy.

We’re here to change the narrative — and the numbers.
BTI is creating a new blueprint for workforce development rooted in transformation, not transactions.

Name: SCPC - Supply Chain Practitioners' Council
Description:
At SCPC, we’re dedicated to uniting industry supply chain practitioners for collaborative growth and innovation. This forum serves as a vibrant platform where leading professionals can showcase achievements, share best practices, and collaboratively tackle pressing challenges in the supply chain sector.

SCPC is a unique community characterized by its voluntary participation, regular gatherings, and rotating hosting responsibilities with no enrolment fees or hosting financial burden. 
SCPC facilitates knowledge-sharing sessions that are accessible and enriching. 

Over the past 10 years, SCPC has hosted events at J&J, Godrej, Henkel, Dell, Cisco, IIM Mumbai (previously known as NITIE), SPJMIR, IIT Mumbai and more.

SCPC structured as:
•	Voluntary Participation - SCPC operates on the principle of voluntary participation, allowing members to engage at their own discretion.
•	Regular Gatherings- Meetings are convened once every three months, providing a consistent forum for members to come together, exchange ideas, and collaborate on various initiatives.
•	Rotating Hosting Responsibilities - Hosting responsibilities for SCPC meetings are assigned on a rotating basis among members which ensures that all members have an equal opportunity to contribute to the organization's functioning and share the responsibility of organizing and facilitating meetings.
•	No Enrolment Fee - SCPC membership does not require any enrolment fee. 
•	Knowledge Sharing Sessions - Each SCPC meeting typically consists of 3 to 4-hour knowledge-sharing sessions. These sessions are designed to facilitate in-depth discussions, knowledge exchange, and learning experiences among members.
•	No Financial Burden for Hosting - Hosting organizations and participants do not incur any expenses for hosting or participating in SCPC meetings.

Name: Plejefamiliernes Landsforening
Description:
En fagforening for og af plejefamilier.
Vi arbejder for at sikre vores medlemmer de bedste arbejdsbetingelser, som forhåbentligt på sigt kan føre til at forbedre de arbejdsretlige forhold
Vores medlemmer kan få hjælp og støtte i fagforeningen, hvis der er spørgsmål eller tvister. Jo før du/I tager kontakt til os, jo bedre mulighed har vi for at hjælpe.
PLF har fast aftale med 5-6 socialrådgivere, som træder til, når der er et medlem, der har brug for hjælp.
PLF hjælper bl.a. med børnesager, kontrakter, vederlag og lignende.
PLF samarbejder med Min A-kasse, som har et godt kendskab til plejefamiliers forskellige lønaftaler.
Vi er høringberettiget part og i konstant kommunikation med kommuner, kommunalpolitikere, KL, Socialstyrelsen, Socialministeriet, socialministeren, landspolitikere, meningsdannere og journalister.
Derfor er vi ofte i medierne og taler plejefamiliernes sag.
PLF er altid på plejefamiliernes side og vil loyalt og konstruktivt deltage i ethvert tiltag for at fremme plejefamiliernes vilkår.

Name: Coaching, training & adviesbureau Mathilda van den Hof
Description:
Er is steeds meer belangstelling om systemisch naar een probleem en gedoe te kijken zowel in privésituaties als in organisaties. En het is hard nodig! Mijn missie is dan ook:

Alles wat aandacht krijgt groeit en alles wat gezegd, gehoord, gezien en gevoeld mag worden geeft Rust én Beweging!

Rust
Veel mensen zijn druk en komen in het dagelijkse leven niet toe om stil te staan bij voelen hoe het werkelijk met ze gaat. Altijd druk zijn en bezig blijven is een traumareactie waarmee je je onverwerkte gevoelens kunt blijven onderdrukken. Vertragen en verstillen zijn dé sleutels om ruimte te maken voor voelen.

Beweging
Mensen zijn altijd in ontwikkeling. Met elkaar, zonder elkaar. In families, in teams, in organisaties. Het systemisch bewustzijn geeft inzicht in het waarom van ons zijn en doen. Door het aan te kijken en aan te gaan ontstaat er ruimte voor beweging. Zo draag ik bij aan de ontwikkeling van mens, organisatie en maatschappij.

Systeem
Elke organisatie en familie kan worden gezien als een systeem. Een systeem waarin de verschillende individuen die hier deel van uitmaken onderling met elkaar verbonden zijn. Wat is de plek die jij in neemt in het systeem? Welke informatie uit jouw familie- of organisatiesysteem heb je onbewust of ongewild met jezelf geïdentificeerd? Hoe wordt je gestuurd door ongekende en ongewilde systemische dynamieken en hoe ontworstelt je jezelf daaraan? Hoe kan je vrij worden van oude dynamieken?

    •    Partnerships with universities and athletic departments — creating a direct line of communication between current athletes and business professionals, and helping re-engage alumni

⸻

Whether you’re exploring a new industry, looking for clients, needing guidance, or reconnecting with former athletes, your first stop should be the Locker Room 2 Boardroom community.

This is where former athletes get lifted up, plugged in, and put in position to win again.

The jersey comes off, but the team stays!

Name: The DEN (Digital Executive Network)
Description:
The DEN --Digital Executive Network-- is an exclusive community of retail and e-commerce business leaders from early-stage startups to large-scale enterprises. The network bridges the gap between the retail industry and the venture capital ecosystem. Members exchange learnings, discover innovative technologies, and gain access to interesting opportunities to help them build a world class organization. 

Our members include executives from some of the world's most known brands including Fossil, Sephora, Levi's and more.

Membership is free, but it is invite-only. To qualify, you are a Founder, C-suite, SVP, VP, or Director level leader working within consumer-facing industries across categories such as consumer apparel, home goods, marketplaces, mass market retailers, beauty, health and wellness, accessories and jewelry, and travel or hospitality. Your business must be generating $3M+ in revenue and have an online commerce presence.

If you're interested in applying, or know someone who would a good fit, please complete the application here: https://theden.co/apply-now

Name: MinnesotaCISO
Description:
MinnesotaCISO is the preeminent peer leadership network of Minnesota chief information security officers. Our membership is comprised exclusively of CISOs (or equivalent executive roles) from public and private companies, government, education, healthcare and nonprofit organizations.

Our mission is to build a strong, professional community among Minnesota's information technology leaders, by providing a forum to share ideas, best practices and experiences relevant to CISOs.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a Minnesota CISO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
Established in 1998, the ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. This annual event honors chief information security officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

With expert guides, luxurious accommodations, and personalized services, we ensure an immersive experience that brings Salalah’s charm to life. Our mission is to create extraordinary journeys that connect people with nature, culture, and the most stunning destinations. Let us turn your trip into a lifelong memory!

Name: Trial Attorneys of New Jersey
Description:
President's Message,

The Trial Attorneys of New Jersey (“TANJ”) is a statewide attorney organization with a mission of promoting the litigation interests of the public, the bench, and the bar.  TANJ members include trial attorneys who litigate in the state and federal courts of the State of New Jersey, as well as former members of the judiciary.  Our trial attorneys have diverse practice areas, including public sector, plaintiff, and defense attorneys from the civil and criminal bars.

 

We share a passion for courtroom advocacy.  We share a drive to hone our litigation skills.  We share an understanding about the rigorous demands of trial work.  We know that when the attorneys – on both sides of the case – are skilled, prepared, and ethical, then our clients and the judicial system benefit. 

 

To strengthen our shared values, TANJ presents trial skills training programs for young attorneys, attorneys preparing for certification exams, and seasoned attorneys.  TANJ nurtures the relationship among trial attorneys through networking events.  TANJ files amicus briefs and position statements regarding rules impacting litigation, appeals, and the attorney-client relationship.  TANJ has been actively fortifying these shared values for nearly 60 years.

 

As a testament to our shared values, TANJ has been recognizing a small number of attorneys who demonstrate trial excellence by awarding the Trial Bar Awards since 1968.  These elite attorneys also teach and mentor the next generation of New Jersey trial attorneys through TANJ’s programming.

 

We want your help to continue TANJ’s mission.  Your membership matters.  We welcome you to join TANJ.

 

Regards,

Sheila Raftery Wiggins
President

Name: LEVA
Description:
First of all about LEVA, Leaderships and Entrepreneurats African Vision is a platform for companies and entrepreneurs whose vocation is to undertake, to be trained, to have a complement in leadership and development to complete their intellectual background.

Created more than 2 years ago, today LEVA has 7 countries in its assets including the Ivory Coast founder country, the Benin co-founder country and Cameroon, as for Burkina Faso, Mali, Niger and Nigeria their accessions were effective that in mid-MayJuly 2020.
To get into the point of the subject, let’s take a good entrepreneur, an entrepreneur who forms a circle and knows how to surround himself with the right people. That’s why you should never neglect networking!

You cannot succeed in entrepreneurship alone. There are necessarily partners, friends, collaborators and each person brings a plus in his own way. And every time you meet someone who can bring you more, you grow your business a little bit more.

But it’s not enough to say I have networked but it does not work! There are some keys to know and master in order to acquire good partnerships, but also to make them fruitful. We would like to guide you on the techniques to use in order to avoid the main errors but also to provide you with the best solution for an even more efficient networking through our LEVA network.

Networking definition, explanations and importance:

The purpose of networking is not to talk to everyone and have hundreds of business cards to know what to do with it. It is often a misconception that can be had and that can block some of you from going to other entrepreneurs or to go to entrepreneur circles, meetings concerning your activity or events.

• Défendre les intérêts de la profession auprès des pouvoirs publics et des instances institutionnelles,
• Accompagner les entreprises adhérentes face aux évolutions réglementaires, techniques, économiques et environnementales,
• Promouvoir les métiers de la filière,
• Contribuer activement à la transition énergétique, en soutenant le développement de solutions plus performantes, durables et innovantes.
Forte de son expertise et de son ancrage local, le syndicat FF3C contribue à garantir la disponibilité de l’énergie pour tous et sur tout le territoire.

Description:
Is your money working as hard as you are?

Are your resources protected for both today and the future?

Do you have a strategy to diversify and safeguard your wealth?

What if you could achieve this alongside other driven women with similar goals?

Chelsea Garber, a nationally recognized commercial real estate investor with a keen market sense, is an expert in passive investing, having generated millions for savvy investors.

With this in mind, she created ConnectHER, an exclusive, invite-only network dedicated to enriching the financial repertoire of the women of Park City and Salt Lake City.

We distilled the information that helped our founder go from 0 to 430+ apartment units (a $44 million portfolio) in three years.

Some of our past events include: 
→ The Fundamentals of Wealth Management with Edmund Chien
→ Leveraging Retirement Funds with Kaaren Hall
→ The Wim Hof Experience: Shifting Mindsets with Jeremy Wilstein

Here’s what our community has to say:
“The most useful takeaway I gained from this experience was exposure to being educated on alternative investing strategies. For example, the ability to borrow from a 401K!” - Valerie K., Software Sales Leader

“[I enjoyed being surrounded by] powerful women from all different backgrounds coming together to learn, grow, and share financially (as well as in many other areas)!” - Dana S., Co-founder, owner

Name: Klima- og Energiretsforeningen
Description:
Dansk Forening for Klima- og Energiret blev stiftet den 21. november 1984 og har til formål at fremme interessen for og kendskabet til de retlige spørgsmål, der knytter sig til produktionen, transporten og anvendelsen af energi – i Danmark såvel som i den øvrige del af verden.

Energiretten og energireguleringen udvikler sig med stor hast, fordi der er stor fokus på energi i samfundet i dag. Det indebærer, at energiområdet i dag er underlagt komplekse retsregler, der påvirker og er påvirket af formueretlige og offentligretlige regler på nationalt, EU-retligt og folkeretligt grundlag.

Foreningen er vært for foredrag og diskussioner med henblik på at øge interessen for området og debattere aktuelle juridiske spørgsmål og på den måde bidrage til udviklingen på retsområdet. Foreningen afholder 3-4 møder om året.

Foreningen har sekretariat hos Horten Advokatpartnerselskab. Kontaktperson er Nina Friis på ncf@horten.dk

Name: Mid-Atlantic Pipe Trades Association
Description:
The Mid Atlantic Pipe Trades Association is a collaboration of seven Local Unions, 400 Union contractors and over 8500 skilled tradesmen who live and work in MD, DC, and VA.  This workforce is part of the United Association (UA) and performs the following types of work:  Plumbing, Pipe fitting, Sprinkler fitting, Pipe Welding, HVACR, service work and other related services.  We have developed a three-tier market share recovery program through organizing, marketing and legislative channels.  This program is was created to:

increase job opportunities for current and new members and contractors
raise the standard for safety and training in the piping industry ensuring a superior work product for end-users and the general public
provide the opportunity for workers to gain a voice in their workplace and earn higher wages and benefits
provide a highly-trained, skilled, safe, drug-free workforce for contractors and end-users
Why join the Union? Are you looking for a career that provides you with good wages, healthcare and retirement security?  Are you an experienced professional looking for greater opportunities in your field?  As members of the United Association, we build and keep America running every day.  Our members work in a wide variety of industries—residential markets, commercial buildings, large and small industrial projects, pipeline and shipyards—and pursue many different career paths, including roles such as Foreman and Superintendent, Project Manager, and even Contractor Owner.

Members of the United Association have the opportunity to obtain an Associate's or Bachelor's degree, along with industry-recognized certifications, by taking advantage of the ongoing training opportunities provided by the UA—at little or no cost to you. Earn while you learn—there is no limit to what you can achieve!

Name: Egeda Brasil
Description:
Sua obra audiovisual pode continuar gerando receita por muito mais tempo — a EGEDA te ajuda a garantir isso.

Somos a entidade de gestão coletiva que representa os titulares de obras audiovisuais no país. Sem fins lucrativos e habilitada pelo Governo Federal, atuamos na arrecadação dos direitos de exibição pública e retransmissão de filmes, séries, documentários, animações e outras produções.

Nosso papel é garantir que produtores e titulares de direitos recebam o que é justo pelo uso de suas obras — no Brasil e em outros países – em ambientes além das salas de cinema e das plataformas, onde negociam diretamente.

A adesão é gratuita e aberta a todos os titulares de direitos sobre obras audiovisuais, nacionais ou estrangeiros, pessoas físicas ou jurídicas. Além da gestão de direitos, oferecemos apoio e orientação para fortalecer a relação entre criadores e o mercado audiovisual.

Name: GPMA
Description:
The Groupement Professionnel du Management, an association affiliated with Swiss Engineering, stands out as the first professional network bringing together the most brilliant engineers and architects in Switzerland. Since its creation in 1987, the GPMA has been the essential meeting point for engineering managers.

In 2016, the association undertook a major transformation. Initially known as GPIG (Groupement of Management Engineers), it redefined its development strategy by adopting new statutes and choosing a new name, thus becoming the GPMA Group of Manager Engineers.

Our fundamental mission is to stimulate innovation, thus guaranteeing the sustainability of Swiss engineering excellence. The GPMA aspires to be the reference network, offering its members the dual technical and managerial skills necessary to fuel innovation in Switzerland.

Our values are anchored in expertise, aiming to promote and improve technical and commercial know-how. We encourage sharing and networking, thereby facilitating intergenerational and cross-sectoral exchange of experiences and knowledge. Furthermore, passion is at the heart of our approach, providing all members with the opportunity to grow both professionally and personally.

Join us at GPMA, where technical and managerial excellence intertwine, forming the foundation of a community of innovators determined to shape the future of Swiss engineering.

Kako izgleda naše okupljanje?
Nema predavanja. Nema globalnih primera. Nema panela za samopromociju. Samo osnivači, koji rade sa drugim osnivačima na rešavanju realnih problema. Ne izazova, problema.

Name: Black Women New Jersey
Description:
Black Women New Jersey (BWNJ), a thriving community dedicated to championing the brilliance, resilience, and contributions of Black women across the vibrant landscapes of New Jersey. With a membership exceeding 8,000 and growing, BWNJ stands as a beacon of empowerment and celebration, committed to fostering a culture of inclusivity, support, and advocacy.

Founded less than a year ago, BWNJ has swiftly emerged as a dynamic force, catalyzing change and uplifting Black women through a multifaceted approach. Our mission is anchored in the belief that by creating spaces for connection, collaboration, and growth, we can empower Black women to unlock their fullest potential and thrive in every aspect of their lives.

In a state where African Americans constitute 15.4% of the population and Black women represent only 6.7%, the imperative to address disparities and champion equity is paramount. Through our unwavering commitment to educational, empowering, and barrier-breaking initiatives, BWNJ endeavors to dismantle systemic barriers and create pathways to success for Black women in New Jersey and beyond.
We aim to: 

•Bring awareness to all the amazing things Black Women are doing Local and Statewide
•We will create opportunities for women to advance and develop strategies that will increase theirs and others sphere of influence.
•Highlight Black Women Making an impact in their lanes of influence.
•Support and help Minority women in areas of need.

Beyond empowerment, BWNJ is deeply committed to amplifying the voices of Black women and advocating for systemic change. From addressing disparities in voting rights, education, employment, and healthcare to advocating for criminal justice reform and economic empowerment, we work tirelessly to elevate the issues that matter most to our community and drive meaningful change.

Join us in celebrating Black women's achievements and advancing equity for all. Visit our website to learn more.

Name: Association of the Circular Economists of the Balkans (ACEB)
Description:
The Association of Circular Economists of the Balkans (ACEB) is a non-profit, non-governmental, and expert professional association founded to lead the transition towards a circular economy in Serbia and the Balkan region. Our headquarters are in Serbia.

Our Mission:
Our core mission is to develop and apply the principles of the circular economy, foster sustainable economic development, and enhance the regional ecosystem of knowledge and innovation. We are a community of experts dedicated to creating a prosperous and resilient future.

What We Do:
We connect economists, managers, engineers, lawyers, and other specialists to provide an interdisciplinary approach to sustainability. Our key activities are focused on building capacity and driving change:



Education & Certification: We create and deliver accredited educational programs, workshops, and courses for lifelong learning. We have established a professional certification and licensing system to guarantee the competence of experts in the field.

Research & Innovation: We stimulate research and the development of new, circular business models through studies and analyses. We foster strong collaboration between the academic community and the business sector to put innovation into practice.

Networking & Events: We organize scientific and professional conferences, forums, and panel discussions to facilitate the exchange of knowledge, experience, and best practices.

Advocacy & Policy: We represent and protect the professional interests of our members in dialogue with state institutions. We actively participate in the creation of public policies by providing expert opinions and proposing changes to strategic documents.

We forge strategic partnerships with universities, institutions, and business support organizations to implement joint projects and achieve shared goals.

Join us in shaping a more sustainable, innovative, and economically robust future for the Balkans.

Name: CXO Leading Change @ Work
Description:
The CXO Leading Change @ Work international community is a Chatham House Rule, vendor-free environment for senior corporate real estate and workplace professionals. 

Whether you represent an international business or operate in one country, the shared sense of ownership and openness has helped our members navigate through four challenging years that have shaken the workplace industry. As we start our 5th year, we are growing our membership organically to become the CXO100. 

Representing nearly 50 different companies spread across 11 different industry sectors and over 2,500 global offices, we provide an unrivalled level of networking experience in a trusted, confidential community representing Financial Services (21%), Insurance (15%), Legal (21%), Manufacturing (5%), Media (8%), Pharma (10%), Public Sector (5%), Technology (10%), and Other (5%) (as of October 2023).  

Here are just some of the thoughts of our members as to why they’re part of the CXO Leading Change @ Work international community:
• A good touch point to understand how others are approaching similar challenges.
• Helping to develop the strategic importance of the workplace in an organisation. 
• The CXO network helps me develop new ideas and gives me some thoughts that haven’t come forward in my organisation. It’s beneficial to look at the situation from another perspective.
• Provides exposure to various regional/global points of view from multiple industry sectors. 
• Understanding that many other CXO colleagues are experiencing similar circumstances and helping solve similar issues.  
• Being part of a network of like-minded individuals at a senior level looking to improve their understanding and positively enhance the workplace.  
• It helps keep me sane, knowing others are going through similar situations.

Membership is by invitation only. If you would like to join one of our weekly calls for either the European or North American Chapters as our guest, please get in touch. Thank you.

Name: Secretaría de Seguridad Pública Municipal de Querétaro
Syndicat ALTERNATIVE Police CFDT
Description:
ALTERNATIVE Police CFDT : Une nouvelle ère pour le syndicalisme policier

Lors du second congrès ordinaire du 29 octobre 2024, Sylvain Durante a été élu Secrétaire Général, succédant à Denis Jacob, fondateur d’ALTERNATIVE Police en 2015. Avec un nouveau bureau, marqué par l’arrivée d’une jeune génération de syndicalistes, le syndicat affirme une démarche de renouveau et de modernité au service de tous les policiers.

ALTERNATIVE Police CFDT représente :

    •    Les gardiens de la paix, gradés, policiers adjoints (ex-ADS), et Cadets de la République.
    •    Les personnels administratifs, techniques, scientifiques et spécialisés (PATS).
    •    Les réservistes, qui jouent un rôle clé dans l’appui des missions quotidiennes.

Un syndicat indépendant et collectif

Fidèle à ses valeurs, ALTERNATIVE Police CFDT garantit :
    •    Une indépendance totale vis-à-vis des alternances politiques.
    •    Une défense des conditions de travail, des carrières et des acquis sociaux pour tous les personnels.
    •    Une action syndicale tournée vers le collectif, avec une attention particulière aux revendications des policiers et des acteurs du service public.

Une dynamique tournée vers l’avenir

Avec une équipe jeune et dynamique, ALTERNATIVE Police CFDT poursuit son engagement pour apporter des solutions concrètes aux défis modernes de la Police nationale, tout en restant au plus près des préoccupations de chacun.

Rejoindre ALTERNATIVE Police CFDT, c’est intégrer un syndicat en pleine transformation, résolument tourné vers l’avenir et porté par une équipe engagée.

Name: VAZ e.V.
Description:
The long-term safeguarding of the business field of conformity assessment is in the primary interest of all members of the VAZ. The credibility/reputation of the national and international conformity assessment system is an indispensable prerequisite for this. Both the conformity assessment bodies and the accreditation bodies must contribute to this through credible certificates and accreditations. The members of the VAZ are committed to this.

Our field of work is characterized by a large number of international and national regulations. The members of VAZ e.V. are committed to ensuring that the conformity assessment system remains operational in the interests of their customers and in their own interests.

The VAZ e.V. is involved in the design of the conformity assessment system. To this end, it actively supports all key committees of the national accreditation system in setting regulations. Membership of EFAC ensures participation in all important international regulatory bodies.

Through the exchange and cooperation with other interest groups and the involvement of all members, the demand for up-to-date and practical information is ensured. The VAZ e.V. sees it as its task to sift through this information, process it and distribute it to its members as far as permissible.

The equal treatment of all participants is an essential aspect of building trust in the conformity assessment system. The VAZ e.V. is committed to ensuring that this is guaranteed both nationally and internationally.

Description:
Há 36 anos no mercado, a Magalhães Demolições é especialista em demolições residenciais, comerciais e industriais, além de atuar na venda de resíduos sólidos da construção civil. Em seu portifólio a empresa já soma 1.037 obras em todo o país. Em Fortaleza, ganhou destaque com a demolição do Edifício São Pedro, na Praia de Iracema, loja Bom de Vera, na Parquelândia, Gonzaguinha da Messejana, demolição de 77 imóveis na Av. Sargento Hermínio, 332 edificações no Vila do Mar, no bairro Pirambu, além de outras diversas obras públicas e particulares.

Para desempenhar suas atividades, a empresa conta com serviços manuais controlados ou automatizados, realizados por um time de especialistas, além de maquinários modernos e equipamentos de segurança, a fim de manter qualidade e a agilidade em todas as etapas do processo, desde as obras de demolição até o transporte e a destinação dos resíduos sólidos gerados pelas demolições.

Name: Warisan TC_Careers
Description:
Warisan TC Holdings Bhd is a prominent investment holding company based in Malaysia, serving as a strategic player in various sectors. With a diversified portfolio, the company operates across multiple business segments, including Travel and Car Rental, Machinery, Automotive, and Others.

The machinery division of the company specializes in providing a wide range of equipment solutions. This includes material handling equipment such as forklifts, factory scrubbers, and sweepers. Additionally, they offer construction equipment for roadworks, earthwork, quarrying, and mining. Furthermore, the division caters to agricultural needs by offering tractors, golf and turf equipment, as well as engines, generators, and air compressors.

As part of its commitment to serving diverse customer demands, Warisan TC Holdings’ automotive division provides a comprehensive range of vehicles. These include light commercial trucks, heavy commercial trucks, and pickup trucks, ensuring clients have access to suitable transportation solutions for various purposes.

Its travel and car rental division provides an inbound tour, outbound tour, corporate travel, airline ticketing, and car and coach rental services. Its machinery division provides material handling equipment, forklift, factory scrubber and sweeper; construction equipment (road, earthwork, quarry, and mining); agricultural tractor, golf and turf equipment; engine and generators, and air compressors.

In addition to these core divisions, the company’s portfolio extends to various other sectors. The others division encompasses areas such as cosmetics, haircare products, and property investment, further diversifying the company’s revenue streams and creating opportunities for growth and expansion.

Overall, Warisan TC Holdings Bhd stands as a respected investment holding company in Malaysia, leveraging its diversified business segments to offer comprehensive services, drive innovation, and create value for its stakeholders.

Name: The Fluid Network
Description:
Further By Fellowship.

As a development initiative, FLUID aims to equip the next generation of business professionals with the guidance, insights, and resources to be well-prepared for a successful entry and career in the industry.

Achieved through FLUID Fellows & the FLUID Network, we unite future leaders in development.

Name: Women in Christian Leadership
Description: Women in Christian Leadership wants to come alongside you with unique resources designed to help you grow closer to God - to enlighten and encourage. As part of our mission, we want to lead individuals not only to grow as an entrepreneur, or professionally and personally, but in a relationship with Jesus Christ. - Jeanne Porter, Founder, and Steward.

Name: Bayerischer Anwaltverband e.V. (BAV)
Description: Der Bayerische Anwaltverband e.V. (BAV) ist ein Berufsverband der Bayerischen Anwaltschaft. Er verbindet die 36 lokalen Anwaltvereine in Bayern mit dem Deutschen Anwaltverein e.V. (DAV).

Name: Reno Bundesverband e.V.
Description:
Die Vereinigung wurde 1954 in Hamburg gegründet und versteht sich als Interessenvertretung der Rechtsanwalts- und Notarfachangestellten auf Bundesebene und koordiniert hier die Interessen der einzelnen Ortsvereine.

Aufgabe des Vereins ist die Wahrung, Vertretung und Förderung der beruflichen Interessen seiner Mitglieder sowie der Angestellten und Auszubildenden der Rechtsanwälte, Patentanwälte und Notare. Die Vereinigung ist eine Arbeitnehmervereinigung im Sinne des Tarifvertragsgesetzes und des Arbeits- und Berufsbildungs- gesetzes. Mitglieder aller Ortsvereine nehmen Aufgaben in den örtlichen Berufsbildungsausschüssen sowie den Prüfungskommissionen und Schlichtungsausschüssen der örtlichen Rechtsanwaltskammern wahr, unterrichten an Berufsfachschulen und garantieren in den einzelnen Ortsvereinen im Wesentlichen die Weiterbildung des Berufsstandes.

Wir haben maßgeblich am Zustandekommen der Fachwirtausbildung mitgewirkt und uns mehr als 10 Jahre für die bundeseinheitliche Ausbildung des Rechtsfachwirtes eingesetzt. In der Zeit von 2011 – 2014 haben wir aktiv an der Novellierung der ReNoPat Ausbildungsordnung mitgewirkt.

Name: Peruvians of USA
Description: Our mission is to unite the Peruvian diaspora, to create opportunities and share resources that promote professional and personal development, and to have a positive impact in our local communities and in communities in our motherland, Peru.

Name: AASTIQ - Association des administrateur(trice)s systèmes en technologies de l'information du Québec

Nous propageons les standards de bonne gestion des technologies au Québec et fournissons un cadre de référence aux praticiens et praticiens de l’administration des systèmes d’information de la province.

Name: Great Lakes Relocation Council - GLRC

Name: IEEE Boston Section
Description:
IEEE Boston Section serves more than 8,500 members of the IEEE. There are 29 chapters and affinity groups covering topics of interest from Aerospace & Electronic Systems, to Entrepreneur Network to Women in Engineering to Young Professionals. The chapters and affinity groups organize more than 100 meetings a year.

The Boston Section organizes and sponsors up to seven conferences in any given year, as well as more than 45 short courses. The Boston Section publishes a bi-weekly newsletter and, currently, a print newspaper eight times per year included in IEEE membership.

The IEEE Boston Section also offers social programs such as the section annual meeting, Milestone events, and other non-technical professional activities to round out the local events. The Section also hosts one of the largest and longest running entrepreneurial support groups in IEEE.

The IEEE Boston Section website, www.ieeeboston.org lists all our local events. If you want subscribe to our local electronic newsletter distribution list, please send an email to sec.boston@ieee.org.

Name: Afmont - Fournisseurs Montagne
Description: Association des Fournisseurs de Matériels et Services à la Montagne | L'Afmont rassemble et fédère les entreprises fournissant matériels, services et prestations intellectuelles aux stations de montagne en France.

Description:
OUR MISSION
To promote a high level of professionalism among practitioners who treat individuals with eating disorders by promoting ethical and professional standards, offering education and training in the field, certifying those who have met prescribed requirements, promoting professional awareness of eating disorders and assisting in prevention efforts.

Name: Female Leaders Of Austin
Description:
If you're in corporate launching your side gig, or are a new-to-austin entrepreneur, or a creative founder, or a mom making a comeback, or {insert passionate woman on a mission} you've landed in the right place. Female Leaders of Austin is an authentic community of women in Austin connecting on business, life and everything in between.

Name: Eesti Mentorite Koda
Description:
Eesti Mentorite Koda (EMK) põhieesmärk on aidata kaasa mentorite professionaalsele arengule ning arendada Eesti juhtimiskultuuri. Usume, et igaühel on õigus heale juhtimisele.

EMK on mittetulundusühing, mis ühendab mentorlusvaldkonnaga seotud juriidilisi ja füüsilisi isikuid. Koda põhineb vabatahtlikul panustamisel.

Käesoleval LinkedIn lehel jagame infot mentorlusest maailmas, anname teavet eelseisvate ürituste kohta ning kutsume üles algatama mentorlusega seotud arutelusid. 

Siia jõuab ka info erinevatest küsitlustest mentorluse kohta, koolitusprogrammidest ja sertifikaatõppest, mida mentorluse vallas pakutakse. 

Tegutseme parema juhtimiskultuuri nimel Eestimaal!
Südamega, sügavuti, sütitades.

Name: Indicação e Recolocação Voluntária
Description:
O projeto Indicação e Recolocação Voluntária tem a missão de apoiar os profissionais na recolocação de trabalho na região de Rio Preto. 
A luta e o debate a favor da diversidade vêm tomando cada vez mais força e a expectativa é de que traga grandes mudanças, não só no meio corporativo, mas para o dia a dia das minorias. 
A esperança é o aumento da qualidade de vida dessas pessoas, onde não haja medo para sair na rua ou para mostrar quem elas são de verdade.

O projeto Recolocação Voluntária tem a seguinte missão:
 • Receber o currículo do candidato e analisar as experiências.
• Encaminhar as indicações com o perfil/currículo dentro dos requisitos específicos da vaga divulgada pelas empresas/recrutadores.
• Comunicamos todas as etapas para o profissional.
Location: São José do Rio Preto, SP

Name: Columbus Dinner Club
Description:
The dinner table has a larger meaning in our lives. Something we look forward to at the end of the day. A place where we join friends, family and colleagues to talk about all aspects of life.

In business it's become the ideal place for deal-making, relationship building and peer-to-peer problem solving. Small groups making things happen while breaking bread is often what moves companies and ideas forward.

The Columbus Dinner Club is an invite-only group that offers senior business professionals in similar verticals the opportunity to build valuable networks through authentic connections outside of work.
 
Join us for exclusive networking dinners designed to facilitate problem-solving, relationship building, and the creation of long-lasting professional networks. This is a unique opportunity to meet and connect with other leaders in your field in a relaxed and inviting setting.

Name: The Arab and Middle Eastern Journalists Association (AMEJA)
Description: AMEJA was founded in 2005 in New York City by a small number of people working for various media organizations, who recognized a commonality of interests and issues facing journalists in the US of Middle Eastern and North African (MENA) heritage. The organization’s mission is to provide peer support for members as they advance in their careers, to offer a forum to discuss professional issues, encourage young people of MENA heritage to pursue careers in journalism, and to improve and provide nuanced coverage of the MENA region and its peoples, as well as its heritage communities in different parts of the world.

Name: USC GEMS
Description:
Guiding Exceptional Minds to Success (GEMS) is a highly selective early career development program that each year offers exceptional students in accounting, finance, and business first–hand exposure and networking with professionals in leading industries, customized mentoring, and unparalleled professional presence and leadership training. Selected students spend a year participating in trips to meet management and executives in multinational companies, roundtable discussions with professionals at varying levels of the organization, and learning about potential internships and employment roles in these organizations. Each GEM is paired with a USC mentor, who is an expert in the student’s declared field or industry of choice, to facilitate their growth, both as individuals and young professionals. The purpose of the GEMS program is to provide gifted and highly motivated business students with the resources to harness their leadership potential and assist them in creating a uniquely purposeful and authentic career.

Feel free to reach out with any opportunities or networking opportunities for our cohorts.

Name: AI Meets Africa - Summit
Description:
𝐀𝐟𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐚 𝐈𝐓 𝐒𝐮𝐦𝐦𝐢𝐭 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟓 is a premier international event dedicated to accelerating Africa’s digital transformation across multiple sectors, including AI, fintech, digital infrastructure, cybersecurity, digital health, e-commerce, smart cities, and emerging technologies.

Bringing together global tech leaders, policymakers, investors, and industry pioneers, the summit will serve as a platform for strategic discussions, high-level networking, and transformative collaborations that will shape the future of Africa’s digital economy.

𝐖𝐡𝐲 𝐀𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐝?
	•	Explore cutting-edge innovations in digital health, fintech, smart infrastructure, and AI-driven industries.
	•	Connect with governments, global corporations, and startups driving Africa’s digital future.
	•	Discover investment and partnership opportunities with industry leaders and decision-makers.
	•	Engage in expert-led panels, exhibitions, and networking sessions.

 Mauritius | December 2025 – Positioning Africa as a global tech and innovation hub.

Let’s build the future of Africa’s digital revolution together!

 www.africaITsummit.com

Name: Union Marnaise des Architectes (Unsfa Marne)
Description:
L'Union Marnaise des Architectes, Syndicat adhérent à l'Unsfa, a pour vocation de valoriser et de promouvoir localement le rôle des architectes, de défendre leurs intérêts et de participer à l’évolution de notre métier.
En adhérant à l’Unsfa, vous êtes soutenu, accompagné, informé et vous développez votre réseau.
L’Unsfa est là pour vous, rejoignez nous !

Name: Notarkammer Baden-Württemberg
Description:
Wir sind die Selbstverwaltung der Notarinnen und Notare in den Oberlandesgerichtsbezirken Stuttgart und Karlsruhe. Dabei wahren wir das Ansehen des Berufsstands, unterstützen die Aufsichtsbehörden, erlassen Richtlinien zur Berufsausübung und wirken an der Fortentwicklung des notariellen Berufsrechts mit.

Zu unseren Aufgaben zählen Nachwuchsförderung, berufliche Fortbildung, standesrechtliche Fragen sowie die Entgegennahme von Beschwerden.

Als Körperschaft des öffentlichen Rechts sind wir Ansprechpartner für Bürger:innen, Justiz, Politik, Verwaltung und Fachöffentlichkeit.

Name: HERA Female Executives
Description:
HERA is a members-only organization for female leaders to socialize and collaborate with each other. Managers, Directors, VP's Presidents, CEO's, Founders, and more are all welcome and encouraged to support each other long-term.

Our members enjoy a private app & platform, exclusive event invitations and discounts, content, resources, and more.

Inspired by Hera, the queen and greek goddess of protection over women - HERA's mission is to connect female professionals, provide more resources for success, and ultimately protect the future of women. 

Founded by a Female Executive who, throughout her career, constantly witnessed the unstoppable achievements by groups of women who came together under one goal.

Name: Vocational Mental Health Practitioners Association of Australia (VMHPAA)
Description:
The Vocational Mental Health Practitioners Association of Australia (VMHPAA) is the national peak body dedicated to supporting, empowering, and advocating for mental health professionals with vocational qualifications — including counsellors, mental health workers, peer support workers, AOD specialists, and others with qualifications from Certificate IV to Advanced Diploma.

As the only association specifically for vocationally trained practitioners in this space, VMHPAA is committed to raising the profile and standards of practice for our members across all settings - from community-based services to private practice, rural outreach, and beyond.

What We Offer:

Professional Development – Access to cutting-edge training, CPD opportunities, and masterclasses to ensure members remain skilled and confident.

Supervision & Accreditation – Structured, standards-based clinical supervision and peer support programs to promote reflective, ethical practice.

Insurance & Recognition – Member access to professional indemnity insurance and a growing platform for national recognition.

Networking & Influence – A supportive professional network and opportunities to contribute to sector-wide policy advocacy and reform.

Community Impact – A strong voice for accessibility, inclusion, and diversity in mental health care, particularly in rural and underserved communities.

Registered under the Associations Incorporation Reform Act 2012, VMHPAA is proud to be driving a movement that places vocational practice at the centre of Australia’s evolving mental health landscape.

Name: GIFAP
Description:
Créé au début des années 50, le GIFAP est l'unique syndicat professionnel des entreprises de la pêche de loisir en France. 
Il rassemble les fabricants/importateurs, détaillants/distributeurs et quelques médias.
Son objet est de défendre, représenter et soutenir les entreprises et les emplois de cette filière...

Name: Asociación Española de Cirugía de Mínima Incisión del Pie
Description:
The Spanish Association of Minimally Invasive Foot Surgery was created with the aim of bringing together podiatrists interested in MIS (Minimally Invasive Surgery) and disseminating and teaching the techniques of this discipline.

AEMIS regularly organizes courses, workshops, seminars, conferences, and congresses in which national and international experts in the field participate, offering structured and high-quality education.

We have succeeded in establishing ourselves as a reference in the field of minimally invasive foot surgery, thanks to our commitment to education, research, and collaboration with other entities and authorities.

By participating in training, following us, and/or becoming a member of AEMIS, you not only boost your professional growth but also support the dissemination and development of MIS.

The future is promising and depends on our members. Will you join us?

Name: North Carolina Water Resources Association
Description:
NCWRA is the North Carolina state section of the American Water Resources Association (AWRA). We hold regular events to connect water resources professionals in government, academia, and private practice, and provide a forum for discussion of emerging issues in water resources.

Objectives:
1. To provide a common forum in which to meet, discuss, and exchange ideas, relating to water resources, with emphasis on water resources research, development and management in North Carolina.

2. To cooperate with Federal, State, and local agencies, educational institutions, foundations, private companies, organizations, and others concerned with water resources, to achieve the objective stated above.

Name: AQAADI - Association québécoise des avocats et avocates en droit de l'immigration

Name: Society of Women Engineers - UCF
Description: The Society of Women Engineers aims to empower women to aspire, advance, and succeed as engineers and leaders. Our section hosts various events each month to encourage members to develop themselves professionally and academically, while also meeting other important women in engineering

Name: UST History Society
Description: The UST History Society, officially recognized by the UST Office for Student Affairs in 2015, is an organization that caters to the needs of students taking up the History program offered by the University of Santo Tomas- Faculty of Arts and Letters. Embodied with the University’s values of compassion, competence, and commitment, along with the Faculty’s passion for wisdom and beauty, the Society commits itself to bringing awareness in the field of History through different activities and interest guilds that will gear its members towards holistic development. Moreover, the Society promotes glory, pride, and honor within its members as they endeavor to be globally competitive professionals in the near future.

Name: Community for DEI Pathways
Description: At Community for DEI Pathways, we are dedicated to fostering a supportive community for advocates of diversity, equity, and inclusion. Through strategic partnerships with organizations and educational institutions, we provide a platform for individuals to connect, learn, and grow. Our collaborative approach bridges, informs, and empowers advocates to drive meaningful change and build a more inclusive workplace and society. Join us on this transformative path towards a more fair future.

The organization actively advocates for mental health awareness and fosters a culture of help-seeking and support.

Name: Connecticut Psychological Association
Description:
Connecticut Psychological Association (CPA) is the voice of Psychology and of Psychologists in our state.

As the voice of all psychologists in the state, we are your partner in advancing psychology as a science and scholarly profession. In the ever-changing landscape of the healthcare industry, CPA works to enhance the professional lives of psychologists and to monitor, communicate, and advocate for crucial issues that directly affect the profession.

Name: LeClub.Paris
Description:
LeClub.Paris est une véritable plateforme d'échanges pour entrepreneurs.

Dynamique et convivial, LeClub.Paris offre à ses membres :
- Un réseau dynamique : des entrepreneurs à succès composent cet écosystème riche et connecté
- Des soirées de rencontre : pour tisser des liens professionnels solides et fructueux et signer de nouvelles affaires
- Des sessions de partage : pour résoudre les problématiques rencontrées et saisir ensemble de nouvelles opportunités
- Des séances de pitch : pour trouver des relais de croissance et des solutions de financement
- Des séances de coaching : pour accompagner créateurs et repreneurs d’entreprises, leur permettant de mener à bien leurs projets

Porté par Grégoire Fournel et Jacques de Pluvié, eux-mêmes entrepreneurs à succès, ce club est un concentré d’énergie et de synergies pour les dirigeants, créateurs et repreneurs d’entreprises de tous secteurs.

LeClub.Paris croit fermement à la co-création de valeur et à l'innovation collaborative. C’est pourquoi sont organisées des soirées de rencontres pour échanger autour des enjeux de chacun, identifier les pistes de collaboration et avancer ensemble. La mission du club est claire : créer de nouvelles opportunités, faire grandir les membres du club et dynamiser l’écosystème entrepreneurial parisien.

Stichting Dienstverlening Cuijk

Name: Association of Fundraising Professionals California Capital Chapter
Description:
The Association of Fundraising Professionals empowers individuals and organizations to practice ethical fundraising through professional education, networking, research and advocacy.

AFP California Capital Chapter (AFPCCC) delivers on this mission by serving as a thought leader in service to fundraising professionals who live in California's capital and the surrounding area.  We provide access to relevant education and training, professional development resources, and networking opportunities.  AFPCCC brings together diverse professionals from across sectors, career levels, and specialties.  AFPCCC works to foster dialogue, inspire innovative thinking, and share knowledge and best practices towards effective and ethical fundraising in Sacramento and surrounding communities.

Name: QUETHEB - Deutsche Gesellschaft der qualifizierten Ernährungstherapeuten und Ernährungsberater e.V.
Description:
Seit seiner Gründung engagiert sich QUETHEB e. V. erfolgreich für die Qualitätssicherung in der Ernährungstherapie und -beratung. Ziel ist es, eine klare Abgrenzung zwischen qualifizierten Ernährungsfachkräften und unseriösen Anbietern zu schaffen.  

Der gemeinnützige Verein verfolgt den Zweck, in Gesellschaft und Politik ein stärkeres Bewusstsein für die Bedeutung einer qualifizierten Ernährungstherapie und -beratung zu fördern. Dadurch soll diese langfristig im Gesundheitswesen etabliert und verankert werden.
