Name: Marketers’ Institute Bangladesh
Description:
On July 01, 2018, marketing professionals of Bangladesh started the task of finding the address of hope that struck the pulse of their lives by celebrating the first Bangladesh Marketing Day with great enthusiasm. All the parties concerned, including educational institutions, and business organizations, are involved in this program simultaneously across the country. The people of the marketing profession of Bangladesh have created an example of how lively and participatory an event can be in a short period of time. Bangladesh Marketing Day, which is the first nationwide event of the marketing community to be celebrated across the country, has been celebrated at Dhaka University TSC. In this case, Bangladesh has set a new example in the marketing world.  Where students- teachers, professionals of all levels of the marketing profession, and businessmen were present. Online registration of 26700 professionals and students and about 10 lakh people attended online events at home and abroad to celebrate Marketing Day.

On the eve of the 2nd Bangladesh Marketing Day in 2019, The Marketers’ Institute, Bangladesh was unanimously formed. This organization, consisting of academicians and practitioners, started its journey to create an international standard through the development, welfare, and overall collaborative work of the marketing profession and professionals of the country. Name: Aries Media Project
Description:
Aries Media Project is an initiative that aims to accelerate media and entertainment startups in emerging markets by connecting them to resources in global media hubs. This objective is rooted in three core beliefs:

1) Media plays a critical role in advancing societies through information and entertainment, and when the media reflects the societies it serves, those societies flourish, both socially and economically. 

2) The global media and entertainment market is inefficient because the resources required to build best-in-class content businesses are overwhelmingly concentrated in a handful of cities. 

3) There is an opportunity to accelerate media and entertainment startups in emerging markets by bridging the gap between the entrepreneurs who build them, and the networks that sit outside those markets. 

Aries serves as an intermediary between media startups in emerging markets, and professionals with a vested interest in those businesses. It achieves this by managing an international network of founders, operators, advisors and investors, connecting them to one another when they present mutually beneficial goals. 

Joining the network is completely free. By joining Aries, you are joining a multi-sided network that connects when goals are mutually aligned. 

To learn more, email us at outreach@ariesmediaproject.com.

Dan kunnen er tijdelijke andere kwaliteiten nodig zijn dan u als ondernemer in huis hebt.

Uiteindelijk willen die alle drie hetzelfde, een gezonde toekomst voor het bedrijf. 

Raad van Drie bestaat uit 3 ondernemers met een lange staat van dienst in leiderschap, organisatiekunde, advocatuur en financieel management.  We staan u als driemanschap vanaf dag één maximaal bij. Met raad en daad en wanneer nodig externe financiering.

Name: Bijnor Group
Description:
About Bijnor Group

Bijnor Group was created with a simple yet powerful mission: to uplift and support people in need by sharing valuable information, connecting local businesses, and fostering growth across the region. Whether you're an entrepreneur, student, job seeker, or community leader, this page serves as a hub for opportunity and collaboration.

We believe that knowledge is the first step toward progress. From promoting local services to spotlighting inspiring stories, Bijnor Group is here to make sure no one is left behind.

 About Bijnor City

Located in northwestern Uttar Pradesh, Bijnor is a district known for its cultural depth, agricultural strength, and growing urban landscape. With a population of over 3.6 million, the city is the administrative headquarters of the district and plays a vital role in the region’s development.

Bijnor is famous for:

 Sugarcane production and housing two of India’s top five sugar mills
 Historical landmarks like Sahanpur Fort and Ghantaghar
 Madhya Ganga Barrage, a scenic spot along the Ganges
 Local markets and businesses that reflect the entrepreneurial spirit of the city

The government has even proposed Bijnor’s inclusion in the National Capital Region (NCR), recognizing its strategic proximity to Delhi and its potential for growth.

 What Makes Bijnor Group Special

# Community-first mindset: We prioritize helping those who need it most.
# Business support: From local startups to established vendors, we promote and connect businesses across Bijnor.
# Information sharing: Job alerts, educational resources, and local news—all in one place.
# Celebrating Bijnor: We highlight the best of the city—its people, places, and progress.

Whether you're from Bijnor or simply inspired by its energy, Bijnor Group is your space to connect, contribute, and grow.

Name: Usot - Unione Sammarinese Operatori Del Turismo

Description:
We, as experts in the field of Hydrographic Surveying and Hydrography, specialize in the intricate science of mapping and measuring underwater landscapes. Our primary mission involves meticulously collecting data related to water depths, ocean currents, and seafloor features. This information serves as the foundation for creating precise and up-to-date nautical charts that are indispensable for safe and efficient maritime navigation. 

Moreover, our work extends beyond navigational aid – we also contribute to supporting coastal development projects and safeguarding the fragile ecosystems of our oceans and waterways. Our role plays a pivotal part in ensuring the safety of maritime activities, and our expertise finds applications in various industries critical to the economic and environmental welfare of our planet. 

As dedicated professionals, we take pride in the significance of our contributions to society, emphasizing the importance of accurate hydrographic data in a world where water bodies are vital arteries of transportation and commerce.

Name: UConn Black Law Students Association
Description:
Our primary objective as the Black Law Students Association at the University of Connecticut School of Law (BLSA) is to articulate and promote the professional and academic needs and goals of all Black law students. We pursue this mission with the understanding that when Black law students are sufficiently supported, they can most effectively assist their various communities and promote the success of people of color in the legal system and all sectors of society.

In addition to tending to the well-being of Black law students, our organization works to instill in Black law students a greater awareness of their role as lawyers in the Black community. BLSA is committed to fostering and encouraging professional excellence among Black attorneys and the American legal profession as a whole. Members also work to encourage law schools, legal fraternities, and associations to use their expertise and influence to bring about change in the legal system in order to make it responsive to the needs of the Black community.

BLSA emphasizes community service for all members because we possess a unique understanding of our civic duties as law students and future legal professionals, and we believe it is imperative to utilize our collective talents, skills, and knowledge to inform others of their civic duties so that they may be empowered to interact with and influence their legal and political landscapes.

Name: IoCR
Description:

Businesses must assess and manage risk, plan and mitigate the unexpected with robust continuity planning and make organisational resilience an essential element of their governance.

Name: NewYorkCISO
Description:
NewYorkCISO is the preeminent peer leadership network of New York chief information security officers. Our membership is comprised exclusively of CISOs (or equivalent executive roles) from public and private companies, government, education, healthcare and nonprofit organizations.

Our mission is to build a strong, professional community among New York's information technology leaders, by providing a forum to share ideas, best practices and experiences relevant to CISOs.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be a New York CISO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue.  Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
Established in 1998, the ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. This annual event honors chief information security officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

CAFS is a non-profit organization that promotes interdisciplinary research, teaching, and outreach related to food systems. As a community, CAFS facilitates partnerships between researchers, practitioners and other stakeholders in the food industry to address pressing food-related issues in ways that enhance and support equity, diversity, inclusion and decolonization. CAFS works to promote innovative approaches to food systems research and practice, including participatory and community-based research. 

Our Mission: CAFS promotes critical, interdisciplinary scholarship, community-based work and related-action in areas of food, food cultures, and food systems. CAFS scholarship examines the ways food is theorized, practiced, and governed. We support the exploration of the complex and relational processes that highlight historical and emergent power structures embedded in food systems, as well as the ways in which food intersects with other social, political, economic, and ecological systems. We support diverse epistemic approaches to broaden the scope and plurality of food knowledge, inform policy making, and illuminate the impacts of local and global changes that affect agroecological systems. Membership is open to all those interested in food systems and food studies. Foregrounding equity, inclusivity, diversity, and decolonization, CAFS embraces an ethos of collaboration, creativity, exchange, respect, and care in research and practice.

Name: DRB NRW - Bund der Richterinnen und Richter, Staatsanwältinnen und Staatsanwälte e.V.
Description:
Unter dem Dach des Deutschen Richterbundes mit seinem Sitz in Berlin haben sich 25 Landes- und Fachverbände als Vereine zusammengeschlossen. Das einzelne Mitglied ist bei einem Landesverband oder einem Fachverband der Arbeits-, Sozial- und Finanzgerichtsbarkeit organisiert.

Der Landesverband Nordrhein-Westfalen, der seit 1949 besteht, setzt sich wiederum zusammen aus den Fachgerichtsvereinigungen und den Bezirksgruppen, die in jedem LG-Bezirk und beim OLG Hamm eingerichtet sind und jeweils die Richterinnen und Richter der ordentlichen Gerichtsbarkeit sowie die Staatsanwältinnen und Staatsanwälte umfassen.

Der Landesverband Nordrhein-Westfalen ist mit mehr als 4.300 Mitgliedern die mit Abstand zahlenmäßig größte Interessenvertretung unseres Berufsstandes auf Landesebene. Bundesweit sind im Deutschen Richterbund sogar mehr als 17.000 Mitglieder organisiert. Damit sind wir anders als die anderen Vertretungen rechtlich eine Spitzenorganisation, d. h. die Politik muss uns an allen relevanten Veränderungen beteiligen. Das bringt zahlreiche Vorteile mit sich. Unser Verband ist der Hauptansprechpartner der Politik auf Landes- und Bundesebene, soweit es um die Belange der Kolleginnen und Kollegen in der Richterschaft und bei den Staatsanwaltschaften geht. Hierdurch bündeln wir Ihre Anliegen, Probleme und Wünsche bei uns. Genau dies ist die erste und wichtigste Voraussetzung für eine gute Interessenvertretung.

Es ist uns sehr wichtig, die Justiz als Ganzes zu sehen. Deshalb vertreten wird ganz bewusst die Interessen aller Kolleginnen und Kollegen in der Richterschaft und bei den Staatsanwaltschaften, ganz unabhängig von ihrer aktuellen, konkreten Tätigkeit. Wir setzen uns gemeinsam für eine starke Justiz insgesamt ein und nicht nur für Kolleginnen und Kollegen einzelner Gerichtszweige.

Vartannat eller vart tredje år arrangerar förbundet konferenser där ett tema behandlas i föreläsningar, seminarier och exkursioner. Värdskapet för konferenserna roterar.  

(FIN)
Pohjoismainen museoliitto toimii pohjoismaisten maiden kulttuuri-, taide- ja luonnontieteellisten museoiden sekä näiden museoiden työntekijöiden verkostona. Liiton yleisenä tavoitteena on tuoda esiin pohjoismainen näkökulma museomaailmassa ja luoda yhteyksiä museoiden ja ammattilaisten verkostojen välille.Joka toinen tai kolmas vuosi liitto järjestää konferensseja, joissa käsitellään tiettyä teemaa luentojen, seminaarien ja opintomatkojen muodossa. Suomen osasto on järjestäytynyt yhdistyksenä – Pohjoismainen museoliitto Suomi ry.

Name: AIChE Separations Division
Description:
The SEP Division provides technical programs for meetings with coverage of a variety of currently used and novel methods of separation. Division members can exchange knowledge of technical publications, computer programs, databases, separation research centers, networks and programs. SEP keeps members informed of future separations meetings and plans exchanges with other groups. In addition, the group encourages chemical engineering educators to place emphasis on the field of separations and on the development of appropriate course materials through research, development, and application.

The objectives of the Division are to:
1. Provide the focal point for AIChE members with interests in separations.
2. Develop technical program for meetings. Seek balanced coverage of a variety of currently used and novel methods of separation.
3. Exchange knowledge of technical publications, computer programs, databases, separation research centers, networks, and programs.
4. Keep members informed of future separations meetings.
5. Coordinate exchanges with other groups, such as the ACS Separations Science and Technology Subdivision.
6. Recognize achievements of members through awards.
7. Encourage chemical engineering educators to place suitable emphasis on the field of separations and on the development of appropriate curricular material.
8. Foster research, development, and the application of chemical engineering knowledge to separations technologies.

Name: The CEO Council

Thought-provoking discussions about how to best tackle the ongoing challenges every chief executive faces: strategy, talent, governance, operations, and unexpected local & global disruptions.
Actionable insights that improve business performance.
Unique Value:
EXCLUSIVE—Chief Executives Only: Chief Executive Officer, President, Executive Director, Managing Director, Managing Partner, Owner, or the top executive of an out-of-state company with P&L responsibility for a -area workforce. No substitutes, no staff permitted.
CONFIDENTIAL—All meetings and events provide a uniquely safe, off the record and confidential environment for chief executives, where peers can candidly discuss their strategic challenges and share what is working, what is not, and potential solutions.
PEER CEOs—Members are always seated with their peers—those with similar-sized workforces and deal with similar leadership-level challenges. Peer groups range from owners of small businesses to CEOs of large companies leading thousands of employees.
LOCAL & NATIONAL—CEO Council members come together with locally-based chief executives to discuss and address the unique and common challenges of leading an organization based in their state and share ways to best navigate those challenges and achieve better results. All CEO Council members have access to meetings and members of all other CEO Council chapters.
OPTIONS—Choose the level of engagement best tailored to your needs:  • Local/in-person CEO Wisdom Exchanges,  • Remote/online CEO Wisdom Exchanges,  • Accel Advisory Board Membership,  • Leadership Mastery Coaching Services,  • Peer Introductions,  • Other Members Services & Benefits, etc.

Name: Parc Frontalier Geer et Meuse / Grenspark Jeker en Maas
Description:
Bien avant que Ie Geer et la Meuse n'apparaissent dans cette région, un monde sous-marin exotique a formé Ie sol que nous y trouvons encore aujourd'hui. Les squelettes des mosasaures et des tortues géantes qui peuplaient ces eaux ont contribué à la composition géologique unique de la Formation dite de Maastricht. La richesse de cette couche calcaire n'est pas enfouie dans les profondeurs. mais remonte littéralement à la surface dans ce bassin versant du Geer et de la Meuse. 

Cette richesse géologique et cette histoire unique constituent la base d'une nouvelle transition de cette zone vers un Pare Frontalier, ou l'offre récréative et touristique va de pair avec Ie développement de la nature et une exploitation économique durable. Partant du principe d'un réseau géotouristique nous voulons offrir un cadre pour le développement d'une forme spécifique de nature, de tourisme, de loisirs et d'économie durable, dans laquelle le sol, et en particulier la Formation de Maastricht, joue un rôle central.

-----------------

Lang voordat de Jeker en de Maas door dit gebied stroomden, vormde een exotische onderwaterwereld de bodem die we nu nog aantreffen. De skeletten van de Mosasaurussen en reuzenschilpadden die hier ooit rondzwommen hebben bijgedragen aan de unieke geologische samenstelling van de zogenaamde Formatie van Maastricht. De rijkdom van deze kalklaag zit niet verstopt in de diepte, maar komt in dit stroomgebied van de Jeker en de Maas letterlijk aan de oppervlakte. 

Deze unieke geologische rijkdom en geschiedenis vormen de basis voor een verdere transitie van dit gebied naar een Grenspark waar het recreatief en toeristisch aanbod gekoppeld wordt aan natuurontwikkeling en duurzame economische ontginning. Met het principe van een geotoeristisch netwerk willen we een kader aanbieden voor de verdere ontwikkeling van een gebiedseigen vorm van natuur, toerisme, recreatie en duurzame economie waarbij de bodem, met name de Formatie van Maastricht, een centrale rol krijgt.
Location: Visé, Oupeye en Bassenge (Wallonië), Maastricht, Eijsden-Margraten (Nederland), Riemst (Vlaanderen)

We equip lawyers with the tools, resources, and knowledge they need to combat antisemitism head-on.

Vision Statement: A world where the legal profession unites to eliminate antisemitism in all its forms, fostering a global society grounded in justice, equality, and mutual respect.

Mission Statement:
Lawyers Combating Antisemitism unites lawyers, law students, and related professionals in the fight against antisemitism through legal strategies, legislative advocacy, and the application of international human rights law.

By sharing knowledge, resources, and successful case studies, and collaborating on actionable strategies, we harness the power of the legal profession to confront antisemitism directly while fostering greater understanding, fairness, and dignity for all individuals and communities.

Description:

Una visita ad una riunione strutturata di BNI Emilia Ovest - La Spezia e sempre "senza impegno", per professionisti, manager o oimprenditori di ogni settore.

Name: Orchestrate Sales
Description:
The Revenue Enablement #Orchestrator. The evolution of the function originally envisioned by Scott Santucci. Founder of the global Sales (now Revenue) Enablement Society. Key characteristics:
● On a mission to remove friction from the sales ENVIRONMENT not "fix" the sales PEOPLE. 
● Guide the narrative by confronting reality, unafraid to ask the hard questions thoughtfully. 
● Operate in the in the gap between strategy and tactics and blend them together in execution.
● Drive results emphasizing design over effort. Informed action over excess activity.
● Prioritize the right goals in the right moments with the right people. 
● Identify and tap into others' unconscious competence to unlock energy and create momentum. 
● Gain gravitas by experiencing genuine empathy with every executive function. Learn by doing!
● Catalyze positive change via cross-functional collaboration. Orchestration!

OrchestrateSales.com (OSC) is a resource for strategic enterprise Revenue / Sales Enablement leaders and practitioners including:
- All episodes of and resources for Inside:Sales Enablement (#1 SE podcast globally 2019-2020)
- State of Sales Enablement Blended Research Study (2020)
- Commercial Enablement Webinar Series
- Sales Enablement Society History

At our core, OSC is committed to building upon, in community, the three founding (2016) positions of the ~100 SES Fore-founders and applying them to modern selling...

Position ONE: Enablement is not single threaded. Rather there are multiple "flavors" aligned with specific functions.
> Sales Talent Management (HR + Sales)
> Sales Messaging  (Marketing + Sales)
> Demand Management (Marketing, Ops, HR and Sales)
> Sales Administration (Sales Ops, Finance, Legal and Sales)

Position TWO: Enablement should be run (Orchestrated!) as a cross-functional business within a business.

Position THREE: Just as CIO evolved from Data Processing and CFO from Bookkeeping, the SE function should have an evolution: CPO - Chief Productivity Officer.

Name: Ghana Statistical Association (GSA)
Description: This is the official LinkedIn page for the Ghana Statistical Association.

Name: Réseau Quartier d'Affaires Alpilles
Description:
Quartier d'Affaires est créateur de moments à vous pour rencontrer d'autres chefs d'entreprise dans un cadre convivial.

Official LinkedIn for the Society of Women Engineers at the University of Minnesota.

Originally founded by women engineers, SWE UMN now prides itself on welcoming students of all identities into a supportive network of members and allies who share diverse experiences in STEM.

Name: Irish Society for Archives
Description:
The Irish Society for Archives was founded in December 1970 in response to the lack of a forum for the discussion of archival matters in Ireland. Its first meeting was held in the Physics Theatre, UCD, Earlsfort Terrace and those present elected Professor Robert Dudley Edwards as its first chair.

It published the Irish Archives Bulletin which later grew into Irish Archives, which remains Ireland’s only dedicated archives journal.

The Irish Society for Archives exists to promote the place of archives in Irish society. It publishes Irish Archives annually, a twice-annual newsletter and organizes lectures on topics of interest and concern to archivists, the users of archives and the wider public.

Name: SKILL UP!
Description:
SKILL UP! 

Willkommen bei SKILL UP! – Ihre Plattform für dynamische Lehr- und Karrierechancen im Mostviertel und Oberösterreich. Wir spezialisieren uns darauf, führende Unternehmen mit hochmotivierten Lehrlingen zu verbinden. Für Geschäftsführer und Unternehmer: Erweitern Sie Ihr Team mit gut ausgebildeten Fachkräften, die frisches Know-how und innovative Ideen in Ihr Unternehmen bringen.

#SkillUp #Lehre #Innovation #Karriere #Mostviertel #Oberösterreich

Schließen Sie sich uns an, um Fachkräftemangel entgegenzuwirken und die Zukunft Ihrer Branche mitzugestalten!

Name: NetworkBee
Description:
Create a buzz about your business with Network Bee. A friendly, informal, non-membership women's networking group, meeting on a monthly basis.

NetworkBee is designed to bring female business owners together to network, collaborate and promote themselves, in a supportive environment – the HIVE!
Our monthly networking meetings offer the opportunity for BEE’s to meet - A time out to not only promote but also to learn, develop and have fun.

15 local businesses networking
Tea, coffee and pastries
Guest speaker 20-minute talk – theme each month

Our networking is “formally informal”, non-membership based, open to all, with opportunities to present throughout the year. Our events are monthly so very flexible.

Excellent Venue – Great coffee– Flexible – Easy to book online – Fun 
For more details contact us at hive@networkbee.uk

Name: SSO beider Basel
Description:
Die SSO Basel-Stadt und die SSO Baselland sind die kantonalen Berufsverbände der Zahnärztinnen und Zahnärzte und Sektionen der Schweizerischen Zahnärzte-Gesellschaft SSO. 
 
Unser Ziel ist es, die orale Gesundheit der Bevölkerung zu fördern und eine qualitativ hochstehende Zahnmedizin zu gewährleisten. In beiden Basel gehört eine überwiegende Mehrheit der praktizierenden Zahnärztinnen und Zahnärzte den SSO-Sektionen an. 
 
Die SSO ist eine Berufs- und Standesorganisation, die sich der Vertretung unserer Mitglieder gegenüber Behörden und Tarifpartnern widmet. Ausserdem sind wir die allgemeine wissenschaftliche Gesellschaft für Zahnmedizin in der Schweiz. 
 
Mit unseren hohen Qualitätsstandards, einem umfassenden Aus- und Weiterbildungsangebot und Präventionsarbeit fördern wir die orale Gesundheit der Schweizer Bevölkerung und stellen eine optimale zahnmedizinische Versorgung sicher – von klein auf bis ins hohe Alter.
 
Fachpersonen, die in die Standesorganisation SSO aufgenommen werden wollen, müssen nachweisen, dass sie zahlreiche und teilweise anspruchsvolle Kriterien erfüllen können. Die Zahnärztinnen und Zahnärzte SSO verpflichten sich, ihre Kenntnisse auf dem neusten Stand der Wissenschaft zu halten und jederzeit ihre Praxis nach modernsten Qualitätsstandards zu führen.

Name: Kappa Eta Phi
Description:
Kappa Eta Phi is a professional international business fraternity dedicated to fostering professional, academic, and social excellence within the University community. Through enriching networking opportunities and the cultivation of enduring bonds among members, both professionally and socially, Kappa Eta Phi elevates the collegiate experience. Additionally, KEP is committed to advancing cultural and ethical standards within the university environment, ensuring our members are prepared to make meaningful contributions to society.

As of 2025, the Alpha Chapter of Kappa Eta Phi includes 110 active Brothers, with our members and alumni hailing from countries all around the globe. We are proud to have members from countries such as Thailand, the Philippines, Hong Kong, Singapore, China, the United States, India, South Korea, Russia, Israel, Japan, and more! 

Our members embody all the qualities it takes to become successful leaders. Since KEP’s founding back in 2011, our brothers have secured full-time and internship positions in industries ranging from audit to consulting to banking, with some of our members taking the entrepreneurship route to start their own businesses.

Name: vCISO Catalyst
Description: Dedicated to increasing awareness of the vCISO role and building a support system for cybersecurity specialists focused on safeguarding small to mid-sized businesses, the vCISO Catalyst provides members with the opportunity to cooperate to define best practices and share expertise in a vendor-neutral space. While establishing industry awareness, the vCISO Catalyst is committed to providing professional guidance to those pursuing a cybersecurity career.

Name: Ghana Society of Agribusiness Scientists - GSAS
Description:
The Ghana Society of Agribusiness Scientists (GSAS) aims to promote studies and research in agribusiness and its related business sciences and disseminate the acquired knowledge and technology for the benefit of Ghana by influencing policy actions. By so doing, the GSAS shall contribute to promoting agripreneurship along agricultural commodity value chains, development and sustainability of Micro, Small, and Medium scale agribusinesses in Ghana and most especially seek to influence policies in the Agricultural ecosystem in Ghana and beyond.

MEMBERSHIP:

1. Regular Membership:

Regular Members shall be individuals with the right to attend all organized GSAS meetings and conferences and receive all GSAS official publications/newsletters.

a. Regular Members shall remit monthly dues payable to the Treasurer or through zonal representatives of the GSAS.

b.Regular Members shall have the right to vote in any organized elections, contest in any executive position, and/or serve in any commitee.

2. Associate Membership:

Associate Members shall be individuals interested in agribusiness-related business sciences but not necessarily Agribusiness Scientists.

3. Student Membership:

These shall be individuals enrolled as full-time or part-time postgraduate degree students of Agribusiness or related programs in an accredited University/College.

a. Postgraduate Student Members shall pay annual dues as defined in the bye-laws.

b. Postgraduate Student members shall have voting rights in all matters about GSAS and receive publications/communications of GSAS.

c. Agribusiness Students Association of Ghana (ABSAG) shall remain the undergraduate student affiliate of the Society.

Name: Aprofem
Description:
Sindicato dos Professores e Funcionários Municipais de São Paulo.

A APROFEM é uma entidade sindical que atua na defesa e representação dos profissionais da educação e funcionários municipais de São Paulo.
Nosso principal objetivo é garantir os direitos e benefícios dos servidores, promovendo a valorização das profissões e a melhoria das condições de trabalho no setor público.

Com uma atuação focada na negociação coletiva, suporte jurídico e promoção de ações voltadas para o desenvolvimento profissional, buscamos contribuir com o crescimento e bem-estar dos educadores e funcionários municipais.

Estamos ao lado dos nossos filiados, lutando por condições de trabalho dignas, igualdade de direitos e uma educação mais justa para todos. Acreditamos que a união e a participação ativa dos profissionais são fundamentais para a construção de um ambiente que inspire e transforme.

Junte-se à APROFEM e fortaleça a nossa voz na busca por melhorias contínuas para todos os servidores municipais de São Paulo

Name: One Army
Description:
One Army is a Texas A&M Men's Organization, comprised of 81 members that uniquely contribute to the culture of the organization. Everything we do here in One Army is built upon the three pillars of Brotherhood, Leadership, and Service. Throughout the year, we host several brotherhood events such as our semester Brotherhood retreats and as well as events planned during the week. Our Leadership pillar is displayed at our weekly meetings, headlined by outside speakers and leadership segments. We excel in Service through our philanthropy Still Creek Ranch, where we serve as mentors to young boys in crises. Through our philanthropic mud-run Gladiator Dash, we are able to donate and support the boys and their organization, as well as raise awareness of their mission and cause.

Lastly, The One Army Mission Statement is as follows, "The One Army mission is to develop its members as Aggies and leaders by serving the campus and community and promoting unity in Aggieland."

This group is an extension of the Ecommerce Portland organization which started in 2015 and now includes over 1000 members!

Name: StayAlliance
Description:

Representamos los intereses de los principales actores de la cadena de valor del sector alojativo flexible y a todos los inmuebles extrahoteleros, al tiempo que consolidamos un modelo alojativo profesionalizado que combina dinamismo económico y responsabilidad.

Todo ello bajo una visión de futuro del sector profesionalizado, inclusivo y orientado al bien común.

Name: PIA of Kentucky
Description:
The Professional Insurance Agents (PIA) of Kentucky represents professional independent insurance agencies across the state and their owners and employees. PIA members provide the highest level of customer service to insurance consumers through the use of highly trained and knowledgeable insurance staff. 

Professional Insurance Agents provide all types of property and casualty and life and health insurance, including home, auto and business. PIA believes in protecting consumers and supports measures to ensure that professional insurance agents are properly educated about the important insurance products they sell. 

Members of PIA of Kentucky have access to many valuable benefits and resources, including management and technical assistance, business development programs and group insurance products.

Name: AMIPA
Description:
Pautada no associativismo, a Associação Mineira dos Produtores de Alho (AMIPA), luta diariamente para representar a produção do melhor alho do mundo, focada no trabalho junto à Associação Nacional dos Produtores de Alho (ANAPA), entidade máxima de representação dos produtores de alho do Brasil, visamos a realização de ações para a melhoria contínua dos processos de cultivo do alho.

Com um modelo de colaboração entre produtores com interesses em comum, os colaboradores e associados defendem juntos a causa em prol da defesa e valorização do Alho Brasileiro.

O resultado dessa cooperação, é ter seu produto como referência mundial, nominado por “O Melhor Alho do Mundo”!

Name: Federal Association of Emigration Consulting & Foreign Trade Promotion e.V.
Description:
About BVAA

The Federal Association for Emigration Consulting & and Foreign Trade Promotion (BVAA) is Germany’s leading network of qualified expatriate consultants and international business experts. Our mission is to enhance the quality and structure of expatriate advisory services in Germany, serving as a strong bridge for German companies and individuals moving abroad. At the same time, we foster ties with the domestic market and advocate for German business interests worldwide.

What We Offer Our Members

BVAA provides comprehensive support and concrete benefits for successful ventures abroad and growth in foreign markets. Members gain access to exclusive business trips to key international markets, offering direct connections to valuable networks and investment opportunities. Additionally, we offer a variety of services to effectively help you prepare, launch, and scale your international projects.

We see ourselves as active partners for our members, aiming to deliver both economic and intellectual benefits while making our work enjoyable. BVAA is where you experience the value of a community built on expertise and dedication.

Name: Journal of Pediatric Psychology
Description:
The Journal of Pediatric Psychology is the scientific publication of the Society of Pediatric Psychology (SPP), Division 54 of the American Psychological Association. Its mission is to promote the health and psychological well-being of children, youth, and their families through science and an evidence-based approach to practice, education, training, advocacy, and consultation. As such, the journal publishes articles related to theory, research, and professional practice in pediatric psychology.

Pediatric psychology is an interdisciplinary field addressing physical, cognitive, social, and emotional functioning and development as they relate to health and illness issues in children, adolescents, and families. The journal publishes papers on a wide variety of topics exploring the interrelationship between psychological and physical well-being of children, adolescents, and families including: psychosocial and developmental factors contributing to the etiology, course, treatment, and outcome of pediatric conditions; assessment and treatment of behavioral and emotional concomitants of disease, illness, and developmental disorders; the role of psychology in healthcare settings; behavioral aspects of pediatric medicine; the promotions of health and health-related behaviors; the prevention of illness and injury among children and youth; and issues related to the training of pediatric psychologists.

Name: Copper Turtle

By taking steps to make a change , you can leave a long-lasting legacy. It all starts with a series of simple, yet effective steps. Our expert team will take your organisation on a deep dive where we identify what areas of your organisation require improvement.

From company culture to restructures, and everything in-between, no stone is left unturned and we will work with you to find a dedicated solution that actively improves your business.

Helping you achieve your desired outcome is why we do what we do. We take pride in our tailored approach which meets your needs and will encourage you to challenge the status quo and not settle for what everyone else is doing.

Think more of us as an extension of your team, we are more than just a partner and will be with you every step of the way to make the impossible possible and to make your plans a reality

Name: AACEi Southern California Section
Description:
The Southern California Section of AACE International has been meeting in various locations across Southern California since 1960. Our section includes members from the central California coast to San Bernardino, Riverside, Imperial and San Diego. For those who are unable to attend our regular meetings, this site is intended to improve communications and outreach with all section members and others interested in total cost management.

We welcome you to join our group to help facilitate our membership drive, participate in discussion of our profession and to benefit by networking with us at the AACEI-Southern California Section

AACE International is a 501(c)(3) non-profit professional association.  Since 1956, AACE International has been the leading-edge professional society for cost estimators, cost engineers, schedulers, project managers and project control specialists. With over 7,500 members worldwide, AACE International is the largest organization serving the entire spectrum of cost management professionals. AACE International is industry independent, and has members in 87 countries and 80 local sections.  AACE International seeks to provide its members with the resources needed to enhance their performance and promote continued growth and success in their professional careers.

Name: New Jersey Association of Forensic Scientists (NJAFS)
Description:
NJAFS is an organization that is dedicated to the furtherance of the forensic sciences in the state of New Jersey. Our membership consists of practicing forensic scientists, academics, students, & associates from numerous different institutions from around the state as well as from other states within the adjoining regions.

David Fisher
NJAFS President

The New Jersey Association of Forensic Scientists, Inc. (NJAFS) is a private, not-for-profit, professional association. Any views & opinions expressed by NJAFS members on this Web site are their own & do not necessarily reflect the views of NJAFS or the members’ employer/agency or any agency of government. NJAFS is not responsible for the opinions or accuracy of information advanced by its contributors.

Name: Society for Biomaterials and Artificial Organs (India)
Description: The society was founded in 1986 as a non-profit professional organization. The primary objective of SBAOI is to cultivate an ecosystem nationwide for the growth of fundamental and technology-oriented research in Biomaterials and Artificial Organs. Another mandate is to serve as a platform for the stakeholders, like clinicians, and industry professionals, and researchers from academia and national labs. This, we believe, can accelerate translational research in the emerging field of significant societal relevance.

Name: Peer Advisory Group
Description:
Women already know how to lead. The challenge isn’t capability. It’s access, support, and sustained momentum.

Peer Advisory Group is an experiential, peer-led community for high-achieving women in leadership, designed to create space for real conversation, shared perspective, and growth through different career seasons.

Founded in 2018, PAG brings together women across industries and geographies who value clarity over hustle, connection over performance, and progress that’s sustainable, not performative.

Rather than a traditional membership model, PAG is structured around participation and experience. Members can engage at their own pace - dropping into conversations, events, and sessions when it’s useful, without pressure to be “on” all the time.

Through Peer Advisory Group, you’ll find:
→ Thoughtful connection
→ A diverse, industry-agnostic community of women leaders
→ Live, virtual conversations in our 'Lounge' 
→ Roundtables centered on leadership, growth, and transition
→ Guest-led workshops grounded in real-world experience
→ Access to past discussions & resources

For those who want deeper involvement, we offer an all-in annual pass, which provides access to all events for the year and preferred pricing on future programming. Participation naturally unlocks additional benefits over time, without rigid tiers or ongoing subscriptions.

Peer Advisory Group exists to support women who are already doing meaningful work and want a place to think, connect, and grow alongside others who understand the weight and nuance of leadership.

Name: bėVE
Description:
¿Sabes cómo orientar tu carrera profesional para que sea satisfactoria? bėVE surge de una idea: CREAS MÁS VALOR CUANDO PUEDES SER TÚ MISMO. Y cuando hablamos de crear valor hablamos de tener más que aportar a los demás y a ti mismo. En resumen, hablamos de ser más FELICES en tu vida profesional.

Por eso, funcionamos como una comunidad de apoyo a las PERSONAS en el ámbito profesional para ayudarte a crear TU carrera. Esa carrera en el que puedas DIVERTIRTE al DESCUBRIR quién eres y en el que aprendas a QUERERTE y valorar lo importante que es CUIDARTE. 

PONTE EN CONTACTO CON NOSOTROS! Porque nuestro único objetivo es convertir el trabajo en un medio. Un medio para que podamos disfrutar de nuestra vida profesional y personal tanto como nos merecemos.

Name: Delta Sigma Pi - Kappa Lambda Chapter
Description:
Binghamton University is home to the Kappa Lambda Chapter of Delta Sigma Pi. We are the first business fraternity on campus and have proudly represented the University for 41 years, beginning in 1981. Since then, we have had over 1000 members join and contribute to our extensive network of professionals and an everlasting brotherhood.

We believe that the primary purpose of a business fraternity is to prepare students to be ethical leaders in their careers, but membership in Delta Sigma Pi extends far beyond the undergraduate experience. Name: Alaska SHRM State Council
Description:
We represent the Alaska SHRM State Council, a distinguished affiliate of the esteemed Society for Human Resource Management (SHRM). Our purpose is to serve as a conduit for communication among the SHRM organization, its members, affiliated chapters, and fellow organizations within the SHRM network. Annually, we orchestrate a state HR conference and extend our support to numerous Alaskan HR professionals, HR students, and business leaders. 

At the heart of our mission is the commitment to fostering synergies among the Northwest Human Resources Management Association (NHRMA), all SHRM-affiliated chapters throughout the state, and all SHRM-affiliated Student Chapters in Alaska. This collaborative approach aims to enhance our ability to cater to the diverse needs of over 900 HR professionals within the State. Whether you find yourself at the inception of your HR career or possess a wealth of experience, our council stands as a valuable resource, offering networking opportunities, crucial information, avenues for professional development, and steadfast support in the pursuit of excellence in Human Resources.

On behalf of your State Council, we thank you for your ongoing support. We invite you to bookmark our LinkedIn page and our State Council website: https://alaska.shrm.org/

Name: Chartered Institute of Business Administration and Knowledge Management
Description:
CIBAKM - Chartered Institute of Business Administration and Knowledge Management, established with the statutory mandate of the Institute of Business Administration and Knowledge Management (IBAKM) in accordance with the Laws of the Federation of Nigeria promotes the Chartered Certified Business Administrator (CBA) and Chartered Certified Knowledge Manager (CKM) professional certifications as well as the Chartered Certified Business Administration Practitioner (CBAP), Chartered Certified Knowledge Management Practitioner (CKMP), Certified Business Administration Practicing Organizations (CBAPO) and Certified Knowledge Management Practicing Organizations (CKMPO) professional public practice licences.

CIBAKM Professional Certifications include:

a) Fellow Certifications (FIBAKM, FCBA, FCKM) - 289 Cumulative Credit Units
b) Full Member Certifications (MIBAKM, MCBA, MCKM) - 250 Cumulative Credit Units
c) Associate Certifications (AIBAKM, ACBA, ACKM) - 212 Cumulative Credit Units
d) Graduate Certifications (GIBAKM, Grad.BA, Grad.KM) - 168 Cumulative Credit Units
e) Licentiate Certifications (LIBAKM, LMBA, LMKM) - 121 Cumulative Credit Units
f) Affiliate Certifications (AfIBAKM, AfMBA, AfMKM) - 81 Cumulative Credit Units
g) Foundation Certificate - 38 Cumulative Credit Units

Candidates will also be awarded the Professional Post Graduate Certificate (PGCert.), Graduate Diploma (GDip.), Higher/Advanced Diploma (HDip./ADip.), Diploma (Dip.) and Certificate (Cert.) in Business Administration and Knowledge Management after successful completion of the Professional Level Examinations III (PLEIII), Professional Level Examinations II (PLEII), Professional Level Examinations I (PLEI), Skills Level Examinations (SLE), Knowledge Level Examinations (KLE), Foundation Level Examinations II (FLEII) and Foundation Level Examinations I (FLEI) respectively.

Our partner Universities offers candidates opportunity to obtain Academic and Professional Degrees/Diploma in record time.

Nous finançons les stocks de médicaments et disposons du savoir-faire, de l’infrastructure et de la logistique nécessaires pour stocker une grande diversité de médicaments dans des conditions optimales.



Grâce à nos camionnettes bien reconnaissables, nous assurons une distribution quotidienne et équilibrée des médicaments vers les 4.700 pharmacies belges — et donc aussi vers les millions de personnes qui comptent sur un accès rapide à des soins de qualité.

NVGV (Nationale Vereniging van Groothandelaars-Verdelers van Geneesmiddelen) zet zich dagelijks in om de geneesmiddelenverdeling in België veilig en betrouwbaar te houden. 



Wij financieren de stock van geneesmiddelen en beschikken over de nodige kennis, logistiek en infrastructuur om de vele diverse geneesmiddelen op een veilige manier te bewaren.

 

Dankzij de welbekende bestelwagens garanderen we een dagelijkse en evenwichtige verdeling van de geneesmiddelen over de 4.700 Belgische apotheken, en daarmee ook over de miljoenen mensen die rekenen op een toegankelijke en kwaliteitsvolle gezondheidszorg.

Name: PMI Savannah Chapter
Description:
At PMI Savannah, we're committed to advancing project management in Svannah, Georgia and the surrounding Lowcountry. Our focus is on elevating the practice and profession of project management, fostering professionalism, and serving as a hub for exchanging ideas and solutions.

Founded in September 1999, originally chartered as the "Coastal Empire Chapter"  by Amy Corps Engineer Dennis Lindemeier, the chapter had 49 members and met monthly at the Pirate House in downtown Savannah. Since then, it's undergone several transformations and now boasts nearly 300 members and continues to grow. 

Our meetings and events offer a platform for networking, professional growth and earning PDUs towards your credentials. We welcome your feedback and engagement to help us foster excellence in project management in the Lowcountry.

Name: SFPE Kentucky
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page for the Kentucky Chapter of the Society of Fire Protection Engineers! As an affiliate of the International SFPE organization, our mission is to foster growth in the fire safety community, promote technical advancements in our industry, and educate the public in order to mitigate the risk of fire catastrophes. We are a local organization whose membership spans across the fire protection industry including but not limited to: code consulting, system design, manufacturing, research and testing, insurance, and the fire service.

SFPE is the world’s oldest and largest society dedicated to strengthening the fire protection engineering profession and advancing the science of fire protection. It was established in 1950 and incorporated as a not-for-profit membership organization in 1971. Today the Society has nearly 5000 members and over 100 chapters worldwide, including more than 20 student chapters. SFPE also encourages a comprehensive education for fire protection engineers and continuing on-the-job training. SFPE offers an all-embracing benefit package, including free member series webinars, technical publications, numerous discounts, and so much more.

The Kentucky Chapter of SFPE provides a means of information exchange and a mechanism for education on various topics related to fire protection and life safety. Discussions relevant to modern fire safety design range from basic code requirements to the application of sophisticated computer modeling. This Chapter accomplishes its objectives by holding monthly lunch meetings and offering occasional seminars, as well email information exchange via membership.

Name: BuckeyeDAMA (DAMA Ohio)
Description:
Buckeye DAMA's vision is to be the top data management professional organization in Central Ohio.  

We aim to be the top data management professional organization in Central Ohio, empowering data professionals to excel in their roles and drive business success at their organizations through effective data management. We aim to provide valuable resources and a strong network that accelerates professional growth. 

Our members bring the knowledge they’ve acquired through networking and seminars back to their organizations, equipping them with the insights needed to thrive in a rapidly evolving world. Additionally, we’re dedicated to assisting professionals to successfully pass Certified Data Management Professional (CDMP) exams, further enhancing their career prospects and the capabilities of their organizations. 

We aspire to be the go-to source for corporate talent acquisition in the data management sector, connecting companies with top-tier professionals who can enhance their data strategies.

Description: Friends of Good Software Conference (FroGS Conf) is an online unconference (open space) and lean coffee. It's a participant-driven meeting for and by people with an interest in software and quality. The organizers provide a basic structure; the rest is up to all of us, the participants.

Name: Työelämän tutkimusyhdistys
Description:
Työelämän tutkimusyhdistys ry on ammatillinen ja tieteellinen yhdistys, joka perustettiin 2003 jatkamaan ja uudistamaan Työpoliittisen yhdistyksen toimintaa.

Työelämän tutkimusyhdistyksen tarkoituksena on kehittää työelämän tutkijoiden ja työelämäammattilaisten osaamista ja käytännön työtä, tehdä tunnetuksi työelämän tutkimusta ja kehittämistä, kohentaa tutkimuksen ja kehittämisen tasoa edistämällä kriittistä tieteellistä keskustelua, parantaa tutkimuksen tulosten käyttökelpoisuutta ja levittää hyviä työelämäkäytäntöjä.

Yhdistys julkaisee monitieteistä Työelämän tutkimus – Arbetslivsforskning -lehteä, joka julkaisee sekä referee-artikkeleita, puheenvuoroja, tutkimushankkeiden keskeisiä tuloksia ja kirja-arvosteluja.

Yhdistys järjestää vuosittain marraskuussa Työelämän tutkimuspäivät (Work Research Days/WRD) yhteistyössä Tampereen yliopiston Työelämän tutkimuskeskuksen kanssa. Tutkimuspäivillä on vuodesta 2015 lähtien jaettu  yhdistyksen myöntämä HYVÄ TYÖ! -tunnustuspalkinto.

Yhdistys on työelämän tutkimuksen kansainvälisen kattojärjestön International Labour and Employment Relations Associationin jäsen ja Tieteellisten seurain valtuuskunnan jäsenseura. Lisäksi yhdistys on mukana yhteispohjoismaisen Nordic Journal of Working Life Studies -lehden julkaisemisessa.

Name: West Michigan Air and Waste Management Association
Description: The West Michigan Chapter of AWMA exists to promote understanding and awareness of the challenges that exist in air pollution control, waste processing and control, and environmental management programs among representatives of industry, government agencies, research personnel, educators, attorneys and consultants within the geographic area of the Chapter. The Chapter works toward promoting closer professional and personal relations among members of the Chapter and to further the mission and objectives of the Association.

Name: JMU Industrial Design
Description:
The Bachelor of Science in Industrial Design at JMU equips students with the creative problem solving skills necessary to become innovative design leaders. It empowers students to become positive social, environmental, and economic forces in their communities and within the design professions. The program emphasizes experimentation and investigation utilizing a rigorous human-centered, studio-based practice. The curriculum addresses the interaction between humans, objects and their environment through an empathy-based “design thinking” approach to problem solving. ID students study sculpture and form, drawing, making, material science, sociological and anthropological research methods, systems thinking, history, writing, and design theory. ID students also receive exposure to basic engineering, advanced manufacturing & fabrication processes, and common marketing, business, and entrepreneurship practices.

The intrinsic interdisciplinary nature of the field of Industrial Design requires students to develop both a depth of design-specific knowledge and technical skills as well as a breadth of knowledge in a variety of associated fields like business and engineering. The JMU ID program is designed to offer many opportunities for students to directly experience a collaborative, applied approach through connection with industry and community partners, internships, study abroad programs and professional critique.

Name: NAFPP
Description:
The Association supports members in growing a sustainable and trusted funeral planning market for consumers by combining and sharing market insights. Almost all FCA authorised providers are members of the NAFPP.
We ensure all members’ voices are heard, by presenting a representative industry voice when engaging with regulators and external stakeholders.
By fostering collaboration and networking opportunities for members through seminars, and forums where industry professionals share insights, exchange ideas, and work together we enable the development of initiatives that benefit the consumer and the entire sector. With the input of the FCA we assist members to create innovative models that improve customer experiences and deliver the benefits and protections of a regulated market. 
Our remit is to build productive working relationships with key agencies including the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA), the Financial Ombudsman Service (FOS) and the Financial Services Compensation Scheme (FSCS).
The Association publishes aggregated market figures and shares combined sector performance data to raise awareness of areas of risk or potential consumer detriment in the market.
Our website www.nafpp.org provides relevant resources to allow customers to access industry information, trace a plan or contact a member company.
Through interaction with the media we raise public awareness of the sector ensuring consumers understand all the funeral planning options available to them and can recognise the unique advantages that differentiate pre-paid funeral plans from other forms of financial product used fund future funerals.

Unsere Leitidee
Als  innovativer Pionier der schweizerischen Gartenbau-Regionalverbände stellen wir uns täglich mit grossem Engagement der Herausforderung, unserem Berufsstand Stärke und Ansehen zu sichern. Unsere Mitglieder identifizieren sich mit dem hohen Qualitätsanspruch, den wir als aktive Gemeinschaft verfolgen und tragen ihren Teil dazu bei, den Lebensraum Garten als Kulturgut im Bewusstsein der Öffentlichkeit zu verankern.

Unsere Vision
Wir sind das regional etablierte und überregional bekannte Qualitätslabel des hiesigen Gärtnereigewerbes. Die vier Grundpfeiler unserer Aktivitäten sind Aus- und Weiterbildung, Netzwerk, Mitgliederdienste und Öffentlichkeitsarbeit. Durch sie optimieren wir konsequent und kontinuierlich die Kompetenz unserer Mitglieder und damit die Qualität der durch sie ausgeführten Arbeiten. So steigern wir den Berufsstolz der Mitglieder und prägen ihre Aussenwahrnehmung nachhaltig und positiv. Durch die Zusammenarbeit mit dem Dachverband JardinSuisse und dem Dialog mit Vertreterinnen und Vertretern der Arbeitnehmerschaft sowie mit Dritten schaffen wir dafür notwendigen, idealen Rahmenbedingungen.

Unsere Werte
Wir begegnen uns in Kameradschaft und Respekt und bilden ein Netzwerk für konstruktiven Austausch und optimierte Wertschöpfung für alle Mitglieder. Uns verbindet die Liebe zum Beruf, zur Arbeit und zur Natur. Unsere Leidenschaft ist die Basis für Kreativität und die Weiterentwicklung der Fachkompetenz. Wir setzen uns für Nachhaltigkeit in Beruf und Verband ein und legen Wert auf Fortschritt, Innovation und Weiterentwicklung. Aus all unseren Tätigkeiten sollen konkrete Dienste und Mehrwert für unsere Mitglieder entstehen.

Name: Interstate Medical Licensure Compact Commission
Description:
The Interstate Medical Licensure Compact is an agreement among participating U.S. states and territories to significantly streamline the licensing process for physicians. It offers a voluntary, expedited pathway to licensure for physicians who qualify.

Our mission is to increase access to health care – particularly for patients in underserved or rural areas. The Compact makes it possible to extend the reach of physicians, improve access to medical specialists, and leverage the use of new medical technologies, such as telemedicine. While making it easier for physicians to obtain licenses to practice in multiple states, the Compact also strengthens public protection by enhancing the ability of states to share investigative and disciplinary information.

Name: GIE OVIN DU CENTRE OUEST
Description:
Les premières traces écrites prouvant l’existence de l’agneau dans le Centre Ouest de la France remontent au Moyen-Age. Élevé dans un premier temps pour sa production de laine, il est, au cours des siècles, de plus en plus apprécié pour sa chair savoureuse.

Face à une notoriété croissante de cette production, les groupements de producteurs de la zone créent en 1970 un Groupement d’Intérêt Economique (le GIE Ovin du Centre Ouest) dans l’optique de favoriser sa valorisation et sa structuration.

Pour faire face aux importations massives des années 1980, le GIE Ovin est le premier à déposer une marque commerciale avec origine pour identifier la viande d’agneau. Pour répondre à la segmentation de marché, l’Agneau Le Diamandin sera associé à la démarche Label Rouge puis marque Agneau du Poitou-Charentes, certifiée par CCP (Certification de Conformité Produit) puis sous IGP (Indication Géographique Protégée).

Depuis ces deux filières se sont développées et sont devenues incontournables sur le marché français de la viande ovine sous signes de qualité.

Name: LENS Networking Group
Description:
L.E.N.S. was founded to bring professionals together in a space where leadership, growth, and community thrive side by side. From the very beginning, our goal has been to create a culture where members don’t just exchange information — they invest in one another’s success.

We live by our name: Lead. Elevate. Network. Support. These four words are more than a tagline; they are the foundation of who we are.

Our Four Pillars:

Lead – Every member has the opportunity to step forward, share expertise, and develop leadership skills that influence their careers and communities.
Elevate – Growth is multiplied when we rise together. At L.E.N.S., members are encouraged to lift each other by sharing resources, offering encouragement, and celebrating achievements.
Network – Our connections are purposeful and personal. By taking time to understand each other’s goals, industries, and challenges, members build bonds that create real opportunity.
Support – Beyond business, L.E.N.S. is about being there for one another. From professional collaboration to community service, support is the thread that ties us together.

Met onze no-nonsense aanpak en diepgaande expertise in duurzaam ondernemen, duurzame mobiliteit en gedragsverandering helpen we onze klanten om structureel impact te maken. We ontwikkelen strategieën die niet alleen voldoen aan de regels, maar ook een concurrentievoordeel opleveren. Ons advies is pragmatisch, onze oplossingen tastbaar en onze kernwaarde is ‘eigenzinnigheid’ – altijd met focus op resultaat.

a) Versammlungen

b) Veröffentlichungen

Name: TennesseeCISO
Description:
TennesseeCISO is the preeminent peer leadership network of Tennessee chief information security officers. Our membership is comprised exclusively of CISOs (or equivalent executive roles) from public and private companies, government, education, healthcare and nonprofit organizations.

Our mission is to build a strong, professional community among Tennessee's information technology leaders, by providing a forum to share ideas, best practices and experiences relevant to CISOs.

We create opportunities for technology leaders to engage in substantive, issues-based discussion related to their industries and profession.  Members benefit by collaborating with others, building meaningful relationships, and promoting professional development through executive events that facilitate valuable interaction among senior-level experts.

MEMBERSHIP QUALIFICATION 
Members must be an Tennessee CISO or equivalent senior technology leader for an organization with at least $100 million annual revenue. Organizations over $1 billion qualify for a second membership and organizations over $5 billion may enroll a third member – provided the organization’s primary technology leader is a member in good standing.

ABOUT THE ORBIE AWARDS 
Established in 1998, the ORBIE Awards is the premier technology executive recognition program in the United States. This annual event honors chief information security officers who have demonstrated excellence in technology leadership.

Description:
La Stratégie bioalimentaire Montérégie vise à concerter, mobiliser et outiller les acteurs du secteur bioalimentaire montérégien en accompagnant, finançant ou élaborant des projets structurants qui contribuent à assurer la pérennité, la résilience et la prospérité du territoire, ainsi que la santé environnementale, économique et sociale de sa collectivité.

La Stratégie bioalimentaire Montérégie est issue de l'Entente sectorielle de développement du secteur bioalimentaire en Montérégie 2021-2025, une concertation rassemblant les 12 MRC de la Montérégie, l’Agglomération de Longueuil, le MAPAQ, le MAMH, Expansion PME, Tourisme Montérégie, l'UPA de la Montérégie, le CISSS-MC et Loisirs et Sports Montérégie, afin de mutualiser des ressources et offrir un soutien financier pour des projets porteurs dans le secteur bioalimentaire. 

Cette entente représente une somme de 2 850 000 $ destinée à soutenir la mise en oeuvre de la Stratégie bioalimentaire Montérégie, ainsi que la stratégie de promotion La Montérégie, le Garde-Manger du Québec jusqu’en 2025.

L’Entente est le lien administratif qui unit les partenaires signataires. Elle fournit les ressources financières et humaines qui permettent à la Stratégie bioalimentaire de se déployer, en concertant, mobilisant et outillant les acteurs du milieu afin d’opérer une transition vers un système alimentaire durable, sain et équitable en Montérégie.

Name: Shapeshifters Group
Description:
In organisations and professional ecosystems, a number of people specialise in doing the liminal work – what tends to fall between the cracks. They drive continuous improvement, catalyse change, absorb shocks, and build more coherent cultures. They manage stakeholders, align strategy, and operationalise processes. They juggle emotions, mental models, protocols, incentives and technological systems. They weave together teams, organisations, sectors, communities and ecosystems. They work as strategic project lead, chief culture and improvement officer, business transformation manager, head of innovation, chief of staff, and in many middle management roles – interim or in-house, and often de facto. We call them shapeshifters. 

Shapeshifters are present in most organisations and professional environments. However, there is no consistent discourse or models around their role: no standard position descriptions or KPIs, no recognisable job titles and career pathways, no specific training opportunities, no unified industry forums or advocacy bodies. 

As a result, shapeshifting is often experienced as shapelessness, leading to invisibility. Shapeshifters tend to experience loneliness and self-doubt. They feel undervalued, under-recognised, or confusing to those around them, even themselves. This affects shapeshifters’ capacity to get things done, access resources, and sustain their work.

We created Shapeshifters Group to give shapeshifters voice and visibility. 


(Shapeshifters Group Inc. is now an official Incorporated Association)

What We Do:

• Culinary Innovation: By collaborating with local chefs and culinary experts, we bring innovative recipes and sustainable practices to the table.
• Cultural Celebration: Each event is a celebration of regional flavors and traditions, fostering multicultural understanding and unity.

Our Impact:
Through our dynamic initiatives, we’ve created hundreds of opportunities for networking and community growth. Our members enjoy not only a shared meal but also the chance to contribute to a larger movement that values in person connections and collective well-being.

At Community Dining, we are excited to connect with community leaders, local businesses, and supporters who share our passion for food and fellowship. Let's collaborate to make our neighborhoods stronger, one meal at a time.

Name: STEP HUNGARY EGYESÜLET
Description:
A több, mint 30 éve londoni székhellyel megalakult Society of Trust and Estate Practitioners (STEP) egy globális szakmai szervezet, amely közel 100 ország több, mint 21.000 olyan szakemberét tömöríti, akik a családi vagyonok felhalmozásának, azok generációkon keresztül történő megóvásának és gyarapításának előmozdítását, valamint azok kezelését tekintik fő feladatuknak és hivatásuknak. Ezek a szakemberek – jogászok, vagyonkezelők, pénzügyi- és adótanácsadók, könyvelők és könyvvizsgálók – a vagyonkezelési szakma komplexitásából fakadó sajátos működési szabályok és etikai normák kidolgozásával, a megfelelő oktatási és továbbképzési programok működtetésével, ismeretterjesztéssel, valamint kormányzati kapcsolatok kialakításával és szakmai lobbizással a legjobb gyakorlat (best practice) kidolgozását és folyamatos karbantartását tartják szem előtt.

A szervezetnek jelenleg 12 aktív magyar tagja van, akik közül néhányan még 2013-ban létrehozták a STEP magyarországi fiókszervezetét STEP HUNGARY – Magyarországi Bizalmi Vagyonkezelők és Örökléssel Foglalkozó Szakemberek Egyesülete (röviden: STEP HUNGARY EGYESÜLET) név alatt. Az Egyesület célja, hogy a bizalmi vagyonkezelés magyarországi sajátosságainak megfelelően folyamatosan monitorozza a tevékenységre vonatkozó jogszabályokat, és javaslataival segítse elő a megfelelő kormányzati döntések meghozatalát, illetve az esetleges hibák kiküszöbölését vagy hiányok pótlását. Emellett kitüntetett figyelmet kíván fordítani a bizalmi vagyonkezeléssel foglalkozó szakemberek képzésére és a közvélemény megfelelő tájékoztatására. 

Az egyesületi tagságnak nem előfeltétele a STEP Internationalben viselt tagság, de az elvárás, hogy a tagok úgy a STEP, mint a STEP HUNGARY által megfogalmazott szakmai elvárásokat megismerjék, azokat elsajátítsák és gyakorlatukat ahhoz igazítsák.

Name: California Association of Crime Laboratory Directors
Description:

The founders of the organization believed that the growing managerial complexity of criminalistics and forensic science required a different skill set than was used as a practicing bench-level criminalist.

The growth and sophistication of the CMA grew into the California Association of Crime Laboratory Directors.

Regular membership is offered to all those who manage forensic laboratories or supervise forensic scientists. Others who support the objectives of the CACLD are urged to join as affiliate members.

The current membership includes all the public and most of the private forensic science laboratories in California.

Description:
Le Syndicat des Cinémas de Proximité est l’un des 25 syndicats professionnels de la Fédération Nationale des cinémas français (FNCF). Créé en 1946, ce syndicat compte à présent plus de 220 écrans adhérents, dans 22 départements en régions Occitanie, Nouvelle Aquitaine et Auvergne Rhône-Alpes.

Le syndicat des cinémas de proximité est une organisation composée de salles de cinéma indépendantes, souvent classées Art et Essai, en zones rurales, montagnardes, périurbaines et urbaines, dans un souci de diversité et de représentativité de toutes les exploitations au cœur des territoires.

Le syndicat défend au mieux les spécificités de ses adhérents pour être 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗰𝗲 𝗱𝗲 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗽𝗼𝘀𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 face aux enjeux nationaux relatifs au secteur de l’exploitation.
Le syndicat siège au sein de différentes 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗺𝗶𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 de la FNCF (commission de branche Petite Exploitation et de la Moyenne Exploitation, Commission de l'Écologie des cinémas et Commission Art et Essai), ainsi qu’à la Commission de classement Art et Essai du Centre National du Cinéma et de l’Image animée.

Le syndicat agit au profit de ses adhérents dans l’𝗶𝗻𝘁é𝗿ê𝘁 𝗰𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗳 pour la profession et accompagne les salles dans leurs démarches auprès des pouvoirs publics.

Name: DIJV – Deutsch-Italienische Juristenvereinigung e.V.
Description:
Mitglied werden: https://www.dijv.org/portrait/mitglied-werden/


Jeder Rechtsvergleicher weiß, dass es kein anderes Beispiel auf der Welt gibt, in dem sich zwei aus verschiedenen Rechtskreisen stammenden Rechtsordnungen gegenseitig so intensiv und nachhaltig befruchtet haben wie das deutsche und das italienische Recht. Deshalb lag es nahe, die vielfältigen Verbindungen zwischen Wissenschaft und Praxis unter einem Dach zusammenzufassen: die Deutsch-Italienische Juristenvereinigung (DIJV). 1964 (u.a.) vom damaligen BGH-Präsidenten Bruno Heusinger gegründet, zählt die Vereinigung heute zu einer der größten bilateralen Vereinigungen Europas. Präsidentin der DIJV ist die amtierende Präsidentin des Bundesgerichtshofes, Bettina Limperg. Prof. Dr. Dr. h.c. Peter Kindler ist seit 1999 Generalsekretär der Vereinigung. Die Schwestervereinigung der DIJV ist die Associazione per gli scambi culturali tra giuristi italiani e tedeschi. Alle zwei Jahre veranstalten beide Vereinigungen gemeinsam einen großen Kongress und zwar abwechselnd in Italien und Deutschland. Für den ersten wurde 1964 in Rom die Engelsburg geräumt.
Mitglied werden: https://www.dijv.org/portrait/mitglied-werden/
Beitrag für Berufstätige (und ehemalige Berufstätige): 80,00 € jährlich
Beitrag für Studenten und Referendare: 30,00 € jährlich

Name: Holistic Systems Cooperative
Description:
We are a collective of Independent Contractors, Freelancers, and Entrepreneurs whose mission is to support each other in meeting our needs while collaboratively forging a new model of working together and exchanging value.  

We’re joining together around the shared mission of transitioning to new collaborative models of doing business that allow all involved to thrive in a way not possible in our current system. It’s based on the idea that working in isolation from, and against each other, simply does not work to enable us all to get our basic needs met, or utilize the real value we all have.

By sharing our talents and resources with each other, we create a space to collectively meet our needs and up-level our abilities and endeavors. By utilizing our Community Economy framework and Member Portal platform we unleash and synergize all the resources we bring.  

Each of us brings so many valuable offerings that can help each other meet our needs.  This includes the basic need for a thriving livelihood.  But so much of that value is lost because of the way our exchange and resource distribution systems are set up.  Our community economy aims to turn that dynamic on it's head.
