Description:
Als je weet wat jou van nature energie geeft dan kun je keuzes maken die bij je passen. Daarmee haal jij het maximale uit jezelf. Als alle werknemers in je organisatie dit inzicht hebben, haal jij het maximale uit je organisatie.

Vragen waarmee wij vaak en graag aan de slag gaan, liggen op het gebied van leiderschapsontwikkeling, effectieve communicatie, vitaliteit, het maken van keuzes, burn- en bore-out . 

In onze aanpak starten wij altijd met een kerntalentenanalyse. Inzicht in kerntalenten geeft een gedetailleerd én praktisch inzicht in 'aard, potentieel en intrinsieke motivatie'. 

Een analyse geeft vele handvatten voor het beantwoorden van de vragen. We kunnen hierdoor heel gericht aan de slag met een team en/of een individuele medewerker. Trajecten kennen daardoor ook vooral korte interventies en/of korte doorlooptijden. Een analyse geeft ook concrete inzichten bij vragen die leven rondom werving en selectie.

Brenda Grifhorst en Ingeborg de Keizer zijn Organiseer je Kerntalenten gestart. Zij hebben jarenlange (management)ervaring met mensen binnen organisaties. Ook hebben zij vele verandertrajecten begeleid. Zij zijn zo overtuigd van de kracht van de kerntalentenmethode dat zij met Organiseer je Kerntalenten zoveel mogelijk organisaties in Nederland willen laten ervaren wat de impact kan zijn.

Name: Kappa Theta Pi - Sigma Chapter
Description: Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of the Sigma Chapter of Kappa Theta Pi. As a distinguished chapter in the realm of technology, we are dedicated to fostering leadership, promoting professional development, and championing community service. Our chapter prides itself on cultivating an environment where members collaborate, innovate, and excel. Through our diverse range of events, workshops, and networking sessions, we aim to bridge the gap between academia and the professional world, preparing our members for success in their chosen fields. We believe in the power of unity, integrity, and continuous learning. Follow us to stay updated on our latest initiatives and opportunities for collaboration.

Name: Masyarakat Geologi Ekonomi Indonesia
Description: Forum of Indonesian geologists in the field of economic geology and mineral resource development, to achieve increased professionalism and be able to compete at the international level, who play an active role in the development and utilization of mineral resources in Indonesia.

Name: MUN IEEE Student Branch
Description: IEEE is the world’s largest technical professional organization dedicated to advancing technology for the benefit of humanity. IEEE and its members inspire a global community through its highly cited publications, conferences, technology standards, and professional and educational activities.

Name: Bar Council of the Maldives
Description:
The Bar Council of the Maldives is a unified, self-regulating institution, established on 27 June 2019 under the Legal Profession Act (Law No. 5/2019). The Bar Council of the Maldives is statutorily mandated to regulate the legal profession.

In order to ensure that the legal profession is able to carry out their duties effectively and efficiently, the Bar Council of the Maldives aims to ensure the freedom to practice, prevent unfair disciplinary action against lawyers, ensure access to legal services in both central and outer-lying areas of the Maldives, and enhance public trust in the legal and justice system. 

Through ensuring that all Maldivian lawyers, including private lawyers, state attorneys, and public prosecutors are competent and capable of carrying out their fundamental professional duties of serving the administration of justice and upholding the rule of law, the Bar Council of the Maldives also protects the general public and plays a key role in access to justice.

Name: Delta Sigma Pi - Dallas Area Alumni Chapter
Description:
Delta Sigma Pi is a professional fraternity organized to foster the study of business in universities; to encourage scholarship, social activity and the association of students for their mutual advancement by research and practice; to promote closer affiliation between the commercial world and students of commerce, and to further a higher standard of commercial ethics and culture and the civic and commercial welfare of the community.

The Dallas Area Alumni Chapter of Delta Sigma Pi focuses on maintaining the fraternal bonds of fraternity members.

Name: Médecins secteur 3
Description:
La première campagne d’adhésion est en ligne! 
Ensemble, nous serons plus forts pour défendre notre indépendance, notre mode d'exercice dans toutes ses dimensions et pour faire entendre notre voix au niveau législatif et institutionnel.

Name: YHS Brazil
Description:
The Young Hydrologic Society (YHS) is a bottom-up initiative to stimulate the interaction and active participation of young hydrologists within the hydrological community. 

Established in Europe in 2012, the YHS has since expanded to include chapters in several countries. The Brazilian chapter was founded in 2024 and is currently in its first biennium.

Name: YCSMS.org
Description: yCSMS is an association of young enthusiasts in the field of microscopy within the Czechoslovak Microscopy Society.

Name: Suomen Vastuullinen Urheilu Ry - Sustainable Sport Finland
Description:
Suomen Vastuullinen Urheilu Ry on vuonna 2023 perustettu avoin yhdistys, joka on omistautunut urheilu- ja liikunta-alan vastuullisuuden edistämiseen. Yhdistys on tarkoitettu kaikille, jotka ovat kiinnostuneita liikunnan ja urheilun vastuullisuudesta ja kestävästä kehityksestä. Yhdistyksen toiminnan painopistealueita ovat ympäristö ja ilmasto, yhdenvertaisuus ja tasa-arvo sekä turvallinen toimintaympäristö.

Yhdistys toimii liikunnan ja urheilun vastuullisuuden äänenkannattajana ja sen tavoitteena on edistää reilua, turvallista, yhdenvertaista, ympäristöystävällistä sekä puhdasta liikuntaa ja urheilua. Yhdistys haluaa myös edistää liikunnan ja urheilun positiivisia vaikutuksia yksilöille, yhteiskunnalle ja luonnolle.

Yhdistys nostaa esiin vastuullisuuteen liittyviä haasteita ja epäkohtia sekä konkreettisia toimenpiteitä niiden taklaamiseen. Se tarjoaa jäsenilleen työkaluja ja ratkaisuja kuten asiantuntijakonsultaatioita ja -puheenvuoroja sekä verkostoitumistapahtumia.

Tavoitat meidät osoitteella info@vastuullinenurheilu.fi

In English

Sustainable Sports Finland is a registered association which promotes sustainability in all levels of sport industry. We welcome all who are interested in sustainable development and sustainability of sports. Our core areas of interest are environment, climate, equity and equality, along with safe operating environment. 

We rise the voices for sustainable sports. Our mission is to contribute fair, safe, equal, environmentally friendly, and clean sports. We also aim to promote the positive influence that sport has for individuals, society and environment.

The association brings up the challenges and issues considering the sustainability but offers also concrete actions to tackle them. For our members, we provide tools and solutions, including professional consultation, keynote speeches, and network events.

For more information, please reach us from info@vastuullinenurheilu.fi

Name: R'obuit
Description:
R'obuit helpt organisaties hun doelgroep te vergroten, hun imago te verbeteren en hierdoor de omzet te laten stijgen. Want toegankelijkheid loont.

Voor mensen met een beperking gaat dit leiden tot een toegankelijkere maatschappij. Hierdoor kunnen zij volwaardig(er) deelnemen. Win-win. 

Waarvoor kun je als organisatie terecht bij R'obuit:
• Toetsen van organisaties (focus op de recreatiesector) op fysieke toegankelijkheid d.m.v. technische scans en het inzetten van ervaringsdeskundigen. Inhoudsdeskundigheid aangevuld met ervaringsdeskundigheid.
• Leveren van deskundig en praktisch advies aan organisaties om de toegankelijkheid voor mensen met een (fysieke) beperking stap voor stap te verbeteren. Geen dikke technische rapporten, maar begrijpelijke en direct toepasbare adviezen.
• Organiseren van workshops over sociale en fysieke toegankelijkheid om het bewustzijn bij mensen te vergroten.
• Bijdragen aan het realiseren van een toegankelijker Nederland, met de focus op de recreatiesector, door samen te werken met verschillende belanghebbenden. Samenwerken en kennisdelen om meer impact te kunnen maken.

Name: Smart Cities Council - Türkiye
Description: Smart Cities Council is the largest global member organisation championing the use of science, data, technology, and engineering to enable a safer, more activated, beautiful, sustainable world now for the future.

Name: Scholars of Finance at USF
Description:

Name: Alicante Film Office
Description: Alicante Film Office ofrece gratuitamente sus servicios de información, asesoramiento y tramitación administrativa a todos los profesionales del sector audiovisual que deseen rodar en Alicante. Nuestra oficina ofrece una gran variedad de servicios diseñados para ahorrar a las empreas audiovisuales, tiempo, dinero y esfuerzo.

Name: Purdue IEEE Remotely Operated Underwater Vehicle (ROV) Team
Description: Founded in 2008 as a committee within the Purdue IEEE Student Organization with just five members, Purdue ROV has grown significantly in the past fifteen years. Today, the team's mission is to foster its members' technical and professional skills by designing, constructing, and testing an innovative underwater vehicle to compete in the MATE ROV International Championship.

Name: Chefärzte und Leitende Spitalärzte Schweiz
Description:
Der Verein der Leitenden Spitalärztinnen und -ärzte der Schweiz VLSS vertritt die Interessen von ca. 1'000 in der Schweiz tätigen Kaderärztinnen und Kaderärzte (Chefärzte und Leitende ÄrztInnen). Seit 2006 ist der VLSS Basisorganisation der FMH.

Wir bearbeiten gesundheitspolitische Fragen, nehmen in Vernehmlassungsverfahren Stellung zu Gesetzes- und Verordnungsentwürfen.

Wir setzen uns ein für eine hochstehende ärztliche Versorgung in den Spitälern, wollen zur Qualitätssicherung beitragen und mithelfen, die wirtschaftlichen und sozialen Bedingungen unserer Mitglieder zu verbessern.

Und wir treiben die berufliche Förderung der Leitenden Spitalärzte voran, insbesondere über die Durchsetzung der Weiterbildungs- und Fortbildungsordnung der FMH.

Name: SM-IAGI UB
Description: SM-IAGI UB atau Seksi Mahasiswa Ikatan Ahli Geologi Indonesia Universitas Brawijaya merupakan salah satu student chapter di Teknik Geofisika Universitas Brawijaya. SM-IAGI UB memiliki induk organisasi yaitu IAGI (Ikatan Ahli Geologi Indonesia) yang merupakan organisasi non-profit yang bergerak di bidang ilmu kebumian, SM-IAGI UB sendiri dinaungi oleh FGMI (Forum Geosaintis Muda Indonesia) yang merupakan anak organisasi dari IAGI.

Name: Philippine Space Biosciences Society (PSBios)
Description:
Vision:
PSBios is a society of individuals with shared interests in space biosciences and its allied fields.

PSBios, by 2030, will be a pioneering source of knowledge and expertise in the field of space biosciences in the Philippines.

Mission:
PSBios aims to promote space biosciences and related fields, establish scientific consortiums to inspire future generations, forge partnerships across diverse fields of space sciences, and pioneer projects and programs to advance space research and lobby the inclusion of space bioscience in the Philippines.

I: Innovative

S: Sustainable
P: Passionate
I: Inclusive
R: Responsible
E: Excellence
S: Scientific

Name: RRefresHH
Description:
Las empresas son personas, y su talento, el poder transformador

Bienvenidos a RRefresHH!

Somos Lucía Mir, Alicia Flores y Claudia Velásquez, tres apasionadas por el mundo de las organizaciones y las personas. Nos une una gran pregunta: ¿Es el mundo consciente del impacto transformador que puede tener una gestión del talento efectiva en una organización? Esa pregunta nos inspiró a lanzar RRefresHH.

¿Qué es RRefresHH?

Es un espacio de colaboración, co-creación e innovación donde compartiremos, aprenderemos y desarrollaremos herramientas para gestionar el talento de manera efectiva. Aprovecharemos nuestra experiencia en consultoría, liderazgo, desarrollo de talento, coaching y comunicación, junto con la de otros profesionales y CEOs que buscan poner a las personas en el centro de su estrategia.

Nuestro objetivo es REFRESCAR el mundo de las organizaciones en Baleares, introduciendo un modelo de gestión de talento verdaderamente INNOVADOR. Las empresas deben tomar consciencia del valor estratégico de sus empleados y de su capacidad para contribuir al éxito y a la innovación, sin descuidar su bienestar.

En RRefresHH, ofrecemos un espacio para compartir ideas, enfrentar desafíos, participar en actividades guiadas por expertos y construir una comunidad dispuesta a innovar y experimentar nuevas soluciones.

¿Es RRefresHH para ti?

Si te apasiona transformar el entorno laboral, valoras la autenticidad y el bienestar, y crees que la experiencia del empleado es clave para un entorno positivo; si eres un agente de cambio, innovador y estratégico, y buscas un espacio para conectar con profesionales afines…sin duda RRefresHH es tu comunidad.

Name: Arpen-SC
Description: A ARPEN-SC, é uma entidade de classe que representa e atua em prol dos Registradores Civis das Pessoas Naturais de Santa Catarina.

Name: ATEM - the Tunisian Society of Microbial Ecology
Description: Welcome to ATEM - the Tunisian Society of Microbial Ecology, a pioneering organization committed to advancing the frontiers of scientific discovery. At ATEM, we drive progress by fostering national and international research collaboration, facilitating interdisciplinary networks in microbial ecology across universities, and organizing impactful seminars and conferences. Our dedication extends to establishing cutting-edge technological platforms for scientific research and providing invaluable training courses and workshops, fostering the talents of young researchers. Join us in our mission to enhance scientific knowledge, promote innovation, and empower the next generation of microbial scientists.

Name: Citron Consulting Australia
Description:
Citron Consulting is a boutique Australian coaching psychology practice working with individuals, teams, and organisations. 

Coaching psychology integrates evidence based clinical, sport and organisational psychology into programs designed to assist people to overcome barriers, achieve balance, manage burnout, and build high performance and positive environments. Coaching psychologists support mentally healthy people who want to master demanding professional or personal challenges in their life. We work with clients who want to determine and achieve their goals.

We provide individual and team coaching programs, advise executives/CEO and Boards,  organisational development interventions, design leadership and behavioural change management, facilitate workshops, align capability and assist with functional reviews. We assist leaders to develop capability through talent and succession.

Name: Holina
Description:
Holina – Transforming Lives Through Trauma & Addiction Recovery

At Holina, we transform lives through an innovative, evidence-based approach to recovery. Nestled in the healing environments of Koh Phangan, Thailand, and Caesarea, Israel, we create optimal conditions for deep healing and lasting transformation.

Trauma Recovery:
Our trauma recovery programs integrate cutting-edge therapies with proven holistic practices. Through somatic experiencing, mindfulness, and trauma-focused psychotherapy, we provide the safe, nurturing environment needed for profound healing.

Addiction Recovery:
We understand that addiction recovery requires more than abstinence—it demands a complete life transformation. Our programs address the core issues underlying addiction, combining clinical excellence with holistic healing methods to build sustainable recovery.

Why Choose Holina?
Expert Clinical Team
Our international team of trauma and addiction specialists brings decades of combined experience in therapeutic healing.
World-Class Therapeutic Environments

From the serene beaches of Koh Phangan to the historic Mediterranean coast of Caesarea, our centers provide unique healing environments where nature becomes part of the therapeutic process.

Personalized Treatment Plans
Each client receives a customized treatment plan that adapts to their progress and specific needs.

Comprehensive Care Model
Our integrated approach combines evidence-based treatments with holistic healing practices addressing mind, body, and spirit.

Ongoing Support & Luxury Amenities
Recovery continues through our aftercare programs and global alumni network. Private beaches, wellness facilities, and thoughtfully designed accommodations create an environment where comfort meets therapeutic purpose.

Begin your transformative journey with Holina. Contact us to learn how we can support your path to healing.


Licensed and accredited by international healthcare authorities. Member of NAATP.
Location: Srithanu, Ko Pha-ngan District, Surat Thani 8

A community connecting South Asian founders, professionals, and creators worldwide. We help our members grow through mentorship, collaboration, and access. 

Follow us to stay updated on events, resources, and opportunities!

Name: EmpowerLab

EmpowerLab :
Empower your skills... Unleash your potential.
EmpowerLab is a hub where skills are made and futures are built.

Name: National Sales Society
Description: National Sales Society (NSS) is a premier student organization dedicated to shaping ambitious individuals across Canadian universities into confident, high-performing sales leaders. Through elite training, real-world competitions, and national events, NSS equips members with the skills, experience, and mentorship needed to thrive in today’s competitive business world.

Name: Rotary Club de Monção
Description:
O Rotary Club de Monção é uma organização local do Rotary International, uma das maiores e mais antigas organizações de serviço humanitário do mundo. O Rotary Club de Monção faz parte de uma rede global de clubes que se dedicam a servir suas comunidades, promover a paz e combater problemas como a pobreza, a fome, as doenças e a falta de educação.

Os Rotary Clubs são compostos por profissionais e líderes empresariais que se reúnem regularmente para planejar e implementar projetos locais e internacionais. Esses projetos abrangem áreas como saúde, educação, desenvolvimento econômico, e proteção ao meio ambiente, entre outras.

Em Monção, o Rotary Club realiza diversas iniciativas que beneficiam a comunidade local, incluindo programas de bolsas de estudo, campanhas de saúde pública, apoio a instituições de caridade e participação em projetos internacionais do Rotary International.

Além disso, os membros do Rotary Club de Monção também participam ativamente em atividades sociais e culturais, promovendo o companheirismo entre os membros e fortalecendo os laços de amizade e colaboração na comunidade.

Name: SAIMechE UCT Student Chapter
Description:
The SAIMechE UCT Student Chapter is the official student branch of the South African Institution of Mechanical Engineering at the University of Cape Town. We are a dynamic, student-led organization dedicated to bridging the gap between academic learning and real-world engineering practice.

Our mission is to empower mechanical and mechatronic engineering students with the tools, networks, and experiences they need to thrive in the engineering industry. Through industry talks, site visits, technical workshops, and networking events, we expose students to the latest trends, technologies, and career opportunities in mechanical engineering, right from campus.

We collaborate closely with industry leaders, alumni, and professionals to offer our members hands-on exposure and meaningful connections. Whether you're looking to level up your technical knowledge, grow your professional network, or get a head start in your career; this is the place to do it.

We are student-run, industry-backed, and passion-powered.

Name: International Organisation for Biological Control (IOBC-Global)
Description:
The International organisation for Biological Control (IOBC) was established in 1955 as a global organisation affiliated to the International Council of Scientific Unions (ICSU). IOBC promotes environmentally safe and sustainable methods of pest, weed and disease control. It is a voluntary, not-for-profit organisation of biological-control workers.

Membership in IOBC gives individuals and organisations the opportunity to participate in biological control activities beyond their specific jobs and workplaces, to step outside their bureaucracies, and to contribute to the promotion of biological control worldwide.

Specifically, IOBC
- Promotes the development of the science of biological control and its applications
- Collects, evaluates and disseminates information about biological control
- Promotes national/international action including research, training and outreach on the economic, environmental and social importance of biological control
- Arranges conferences/meetings/symposia, and takes other action to implement the general objectives of the organisation
- Advocates for biological control through providing evidence-based guidance for policy makers and Governments
- Fosters communication among biological-control workers, through the IOBC Newsletter
- Publishes a peer-reviewed scientific journal (BioControl, published by Springer; https://www.springer.com/life+sci/entomology/journal/10526) for basic and applied research on biological control of invertebrate, vertebrate and weed pests, and diseases

Name: CSI AI100K - World's Largest AI Readiness Initiative
Description:
CSI AI100K is World's largest AI Readiness Mission, launched by the Computer Society of India – Hyderabad Chapter. Our goal is to empower 1,00,000 students with AI awareness, AI confidence, and foundational skills in AI, ML, GenAI, and Responsible AI, supported by real industry use cases and a clear AI Career Journey Map.

The initiative delivers a standardized 2-hour AI Awareness Session designed to make students AI-ready by simplifying complex concepts, demonstrating practical AI applications across industries, and guiding them through structured pathways to build their AI careers.

Led by the CSI AI100K Team, the mission brings together industry leaders, academic experts, and certified AI Knowledge Leaders to deliver high-quality AI learning sessions across colleges and institutions.

CSI AI100K stands for accessible, ethical, inclusive, and future-ready AI education for all.

Name: Nordix Esport AS
Description:
A Rising force in Nordic Esports

Welcome to Nordix Esport, a force in the dynamic world of esports. Established in 2021, Nordix Esport has rapidly evolved into a prominent team within the competitive gaming sphere.

Competing Globally
Our main objective is to reach the pinnacle of of global esports. The Nordix Esport leadership is confident in the potential of our exceptional team.

Explore the world of Nordix Esport and stay tuned for the next chapter in our exhilarating journey!

Name: SNPAMI - Syndicat National des Plantes Aromatiques, Médicinales et Industrielles
Description:
Créé pour défendre et représenter les intérêts des acteurs de la filière des plantes aromatiques, médicinales et industrielles, le Syndicat National des Plantes Aromatiques, Médicinales et Industrielles (SNPAMI) réunit des producteurs, transformateurs, et autres professionnels engagés pour la valorisation de plantes qui contribuent au bien-être, à la santé et aux industries naturelles en France.



Depuis sa création initiale en 2002, puis sa reprise en 2020, le SNPAMI est devenu un acteur incontournable de cette filière en pleine croissance, offrant un soutien et une représentation auprès des institutions publiques et privées.



Le SNPAMI est un syndicat régi par la loi du 21 mars 1884, codifiée aux articles L.2111-1 et suivants du Code du travail.

Name: Alfaro Consulting
Description: Proven coaching and consulting for individuals and groups.

Name: Eastern African Association for Radiation Protection (EAARP)
Description:
EAARP is a network of former and currently-serving professionals working with nuclear and radiation sources in human health, agriculture (both crop and animal), hydrology, industrial applications, education, and research across the Eastern Africa Region.
EAARP provides a medium whereby those engaged in radiation protection activities in Eastern Africa region may communicate more readily with each other and through this process advance radiation protection.

Name: Poornima University Alumni Society
Description:
Poornima University Alumni Society (PUAS) is an organization, composed of PU alumni and alumni groups and student coordinators organized across the world, with a view to preserve and carry forward the fine traditions of Poornima, to strengthen the connection between the alumni at home and abroad and college.

We are an engaged alumni society with vibrant communication that actively reaches out, participates fully, and welcomes and shares new ideas and fresh thinking. As alumni society let us stand together in advancing the goal of PU, to be the leading University of Rajasthan, offering recognised education and leadership.

We seek to bring the alumni of Poornima University together to foster mutual relationships while stimulating & strengthening an old network. Poornima University’s alumni meet “Dharohar” is conducted every year in order to reconnect with ex-students, recognize their success and various achievements.

Name: C Neptune Darby Consulting Services Inc
Description:
At CND, we are passionate about workplace wellness and wellbeing. We empower organizational leadership to connect with their employees and cultivate emotional safety and change. Our purpose is to help guide in the acknowledgment of negative work spaces , and cultures that contribute to  organizational productivity and overall performance. The application of Trauma-Informed Care will allow your organization to implement best practices the align with policies and operational norms.

We invite you to collaborate with us to   learn how to recognize signs and symptoms of stress and trauma as well as potential hazards that threathen your organizational stability. We provide an array of program plans, workshops, and professional development trainings. Our goal is to develop plans that last a lifetime. We strive to meet your vision and nurture the growth that takes place.

Name: Dansk El-Forbund Nordjylland
Description: Dansk El-Forbund Nordjylland samler alle nordjyder på det el-tekniske område. Fra Skagen i nord til Hobro i syd. Vi har mere end 3000 medlemmer i det nordjyske.

Name: Greater Kansas City Chapter of the ACFE
Description:
The Greater Kansas City Chapter was organized in February 1994 when twenty Kansas City area CFE's petitioned the Association for recognition of local chapter status.  In May 1994 the Association officially recognized the organization as a chapter.

Since its first year of existence, the Chapter has grown to include over 100 active members representing both government and private industry.  All members are actively involved in the detection, investigation, prosecution and/or deterrence of fraud, particularly white-collar crime.

The Kansas City Chapter conducts approximately 20 hours of continuing professional education (CPE) on a variety of anti-fraud topics each year at area facilities.  The workshops generally range from 4 to 8 CPE per session.

The Association of Certified Fraud Examiners is the professional organization for fraud examiners. The mission of the Association is to reduce the incidence of fraud and white-collar crime, and to assist the Membership in its detection and deterrence.

Name: IEEE Winnipeg Section
Description: The Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE) is an international organization promoting technological advancement. We are a non-profit organization that strives to provide continuing education, conferences, and special electrical, electronics, and computing meetings.

Name: Alpha Cell - MIT School of Food Technology
Description: Alpha Cell is the official student-led club associated with the Training and Placement Cell, at MIT School of Food Technology which aims at polishing the existing skills, imparting effective communication, and improving soft skills through various multi-disciplinary events. We are committed to offering professional development to Food Technology students, so they can confidently take on any challenge they face and work towards having a fruitful career.

Name: CCIPP -LSP AHLI KOROSI NASIONAL
Description:
CCIPP, formerly called as IPCII, Ikatan Profesi Sertifikasi Coating Inspector dan Praktisi Pengecatan Indonesia or The Professional Society of Indonesian Certified Coating Inspectors & Painting Practitioner was initiated by Mr. Lindung Silalahi, a founder father for Coating Inspector Indonesia, He is a NACE International Certified Coating Inspector #3841, Penguji ahli korosi Nasional Depnaker R.I. No. 00/041/070.364/IX/1997 ID# 089609 and a person who cares and concerns on the development of Indonesia Coating Inspectors whose aim is to encourage for local expertise as to make this profession not just as a skill but to be a profession with a "Prestigious Recognition & conform to International Qualification".

Memperjuangkan rekan satu profesi untuk menjadi lebih baik, menjunjung tinggi nilai luhur untuk memajukan SDM INDONESIA yang handal yang dapat bersaing dalam era globalisasi, aktif membantu Pemerintah Indonesia dalam memerangi dampak kerugian akibat korosi dengan penerapan Penanggulangan Korosi secara tepat. Aplikasi, pengawasan, adalah mata rantai proses yang memerlukan keahlian personil. Untuk itulah CCIPP mendidik, melatih, dan mensertifikasi anggota anggotanya menjadi seorang tenaga kerja dengan jenjang keahlian yang diakui oleh pemerintah, masyarakat dan industri.

Anggota anggota CCIPP berasal dari: Coating Inspector, Painting Inspector, Blaster, Painter, Foreman, Supervisor, Manager, Specifier, paint Supplier, Fabricator, User, Consultant, Corrosion Engineer, Facility Owner, Plant Maintenance division, Consultant, Painting and Coating Contractor.

"Boost Indonesian Expertise to confront Globalization, and Proud as a National(Local) Expert".

Name: Thrive! Dale Carnegie Success Network
Description: Thrive is a dedicated and exclusive community, driven by an unwavering passion to empower individuals throughout Ontario and the Maritimes. Our mission is to guide and support you on your journey towards success, helping you conquer obstacles and thrive in every facet of life. Through a carefully curated series of themed workshops and events, we provide the tools and inspiration you need to unlock your full potential and achieve lasting personal and professional growth. Discover the transformative power of Thrive as we work together to create a brighter, more fulfilling future. Join us on this extraordinary path to success, and let's flourish together. Explore more about Thrive at https://thrivesuccess.ca/

Name: IREM Nashville
Description: IREM Nashville is the middle Tennessee chapter of the Institute of Real Estate Management, an international force of 20,000 individuals united to advance the profession of real estate management. Through training, professional development, and collaboration, IREM supports our members and others in the industry through every stage of their career.

Name: FEETS-FO
Description:
FEETS-FO : La Fédération FO de l’Équipement, de l’Environnement, des Transports et des Services

La FEETS-FO est une organisation syndicale qui représente les salariés de nombreux secteurs stratégiques de l’économie française. Engagée pour la défense des droits des travailleurs, elle agit au quotidien pour garantir des conditions de travail dignes, des rémunérations justes et le respect des acquis sociaux.

 Qui sommes-nous ?
La FEETS-FO, affiliée à la Confédération Générale du Travail FORCE OUVRIÈRE, fédère les travailleurs des secteurs de :
 L’équipement et des infrastructures : routes, ouvrages d’art, autoroutes concédées, transports publics.
 L’environnement et de la transition écologique : agences de l’eau, parcs naturels, Office Français de la Biodiversité, prévention des risques.
 Les transports et la mobilité : transport maritime, fluvial, ferroviaire, aérien (personnels au sol et navigants).
 Les services et la propreté : entreprises de nettoyage, blanchisserie, dératisation, sécurité privée.
 Les opérateurs et les services publics : Voies Navigables de France, Météo-France, CEREMA, IGN, ADEME, et bien d’autres.

 Nos engagements
 Défense des salaires et du pouvoir d’achat : lutte contre la précarité et pour des hausses salariales.
 Amélioration des conditions de travail : refus des suppressions de postes, protection contre la sous-traitance abusive.
 Protection des services publics et de l’environnement : garantir des moyens suffisants pour assurer des missions essentielles.
 Un syndicat à l’écoute : soutien aux salariés face aux employeurs et aux pouvoirs publics.

 Pourquoi nous rejoindre ?
 Être adhérent, c’est défendre ses droits, bénéficier d’un accompagnement syndical, et se mobiliser collectivement pour obtenir des avancées concrètes.

 Rejoignez-nous pour un syndicalisme fort et indépendant !

#ForceOuvrière #Syndicalisme #DroitsDesTravailleurs #ServicePublic #JusticeSociale #Écologie #Transport

Name: Associação de Engenheiros e Arquitetos de Santos
Description:
A sua história começa em 29 de outubro de 1937, com o registro da ata da assembleia de fundação, realizada no prédio da Repartição de Saneamento de Santos, que hoje abriga a Sabesp, na Rua São Francisco, no Centro.

Não eram tempos tranquilos. Afinal, o ano de 1937 foi marcado, desde o seu início pelo clima de conspiração política. Getúlio Vargas, apoiado por lideranças civis e militares, preparava o terreno para garantir a sua permanência no poder por meio da implantação do regime ditatorial do Estado Novo. Coincidindo com as experiências nazifascistas que ganhavam força na Europa.

A época não parecia propícia, mas foi justamente nesse confuso final de 1937 que um pequeno grupo de engenheiros decidiu formar uma associação. A ideia, porém, havia nascido bem antes. Um dos fundadores da AEAS, o engenheiro Ismael Coelho de Souza, foi personagem fundamental. Inspetor-geral da então toda-poderosa Codesp, ele era o homem mais importante da Cidade e mandava mais do que o prefeito.

Sua casa, na Avenida Vicente de Carvalho, na praia do Boqueirão, foi palco de inúmeras reuniões entre alguns dos poucos engenheiros santistas. O sonho de formar uma associação começava a se tornar realidade.

E o primeiro passo começava a tomar corpo. Dizia o Artigo Primeiro do Estatuto:

“A Associação de Engenheiros de Santos, fundada em 29 de outubro de 1937, constitui uma sociedade civil com personalidade jurídica, tendo por fim incentivar o progresso da Engenharia, congregar os seus profissionais dos diversos ramos, defender os interesses da classe e tomar toda e qualquer iniciativa de interesse geral de seus associados”. Definidos há mais de sete décadas, esses objetivos continuam representando fielmente o caminho seguido até hoje pela entidade.

This objective is supported by the Tom Peters Memorial Mine Reclamation Student Award for graduate students.

We also recognize the mining industry and individuals who have shown outstanding achievement in the practice of mine reclamation through the Tom Peters Memorial Mine Reclamation Industry Award. Both awards are presented at the joint CLRA-OMA workshop annually and are graciously supported by Vale.

Beyond mining reclamation, the Ontario Chapter has good linkages with the aggregate community and many Ontario members represent this interest. The Ontario Chapter welcomes new members from all sectors.

Name: South African Guild of Actors
Description:
SAGA (South African Guild of Actors) is a leading advocate for the rights, interests, and professional well-being of actors in South Africa. Guided by its constitution, the Guild works to regulate and enhance relationships between actors and producers across the film, television, theatre, and commercials sectors. SAGA’s primary mission is to protect and promote the creative and professional interests of its members, ensuring fair treatment, better pay, and addressing the unique challenges actors face in the entertainment industry.

SAGA actively collaborates with both local and international organizations that align with its goals. The Guild takes a proactive stance in supporting or opposing legislative measures that could affect the acting profession, ensuring its members' voices are heard and their rights defended.

The Guild also offers critical legal assistance to members, particularly in areas related to contracts with producers. SAGA encourages the resolution of disputes between actors and producers through conciliation, mediation, or arbitration, helping to maintain a fair and healthy industry environment. In addition, SAGA plays a central role in collective bargaining to improve working conditions and ensure that actors’ concerns are addressed.

To further support its members, SAGA engages in a range of lawful actions, including financial strategies like borrowing, investing, lending, and donating funds to advance its objectives. The Guild is also committed to establishing educational, social, and charitable initiatives that enhance the welfare and professional growth of its members.

On the global stage, SAGA works within international networks such as the International Federation of Actors (FIA) and the International Committee for Artistic Freedom. By partnering with sister organizations worldwide, SAGA amplifies the voices of South African actors and contributes to the global conversation on artistic freedom and labor rights in the entertainment industry.

Name: Southern Criminal Justice Association
Description:
The Southern Criminal Justice Association is a regional organization affiliated with the Academy of Criminal Justice Sciences.

SCJA is a professional association serving criminal justice educators, researchers, practitioners, and students committed to the ongoing development of criminal justice science and practice.

Member states include Alabama, Georgia, Florida, Tennessee, South Carolina, North Carolina, Mississippi, Louisiana, Kentucky, Virginia, West Virginia, Puerto Rico and the Virgin Islands.

Membership in SCJA facilitates professional development and interaction.

Each year is highlighted by the annual conference which rotates to a different location within the region. The conference provides opportunities to access the most current research findings on a wide range of criminal justice related topics. Members participate by presenting papers in panels and in roundtable discussions. Social receptions and activities provide members an opportunity for professional fellowship and the friendly atmosphere welcomes student participation.

Annual dues include a subscription to the official journal of SCJA, the American Journal of Criminal Justice. This journal publishes article length manuscripts and research notes on a broad range of current criminal justice topics. The Journal is multi-disciplinary and serves both an academic and practitioner audience. Each issue also includes reviews of new books of criminal justice interest.

SCJA is governed by officers and a Board of Directors elected by the membership. The work of the organization is performed in committees and several opportunities to serve exist.

Name: Erhvervsantropologerne
Description:
OM ERHVERVSANTROPOLOGERNE

Erhvervsantropologerne er en forening af antropologer og andre med en kulturanalytisk baggrund, der har det til fælles, at vi interesserer os for krydsfeltet mellem kulturvidenskab og erhvervsliv. 

Foreningen holder 3-4 årlige arrangementer, der på forskellig vis belyser dette krydsfelt. Alle der deler denne interesse er velkomne hos Erhvervsantropologerne. Deltagelse i arrangementerne forudsætter medlemskab af foreningen. Erhvervsantropologernes arrangementer er omdrejningspunktet for foreningens arbejde. Vi tilstræber et højt videns- og inspirationsniveau kombineret med en uhøjtidelig form, der skaber rum for gensidig udveksling og netværk mellem foreningens medlemmer. Arrangementerne varer ca. 2 timer og afholdes typisk på hverdage efter almindelig arbejdstid.

Hvad er Erhvervsantropologerne?
Erhvervsantropologerne er først og fremmest et netværk. Vor mission er at fungere som netværk og etablere et fagligt udfordrende, socialt rum for medlemmerne. Derudover ønsker vi – blandt virksomheder og i det offentlige – at udbrede og udvide forståelsen for og anerkendelsen af kvalitative metoder til at løse problemer og problemstillinger, der berører og involverer mennesker.

Name: Masonic Services
Description:
Masonic Services Pty Ltd is registered with ASIC and is a company limited by shares. Masonic Services referred as “MS” hereon was first registered in November 2021. It commenced operations in Adelaide, South Australia as an option for the Freemasons of South Australia and the Northern Territory to maximise its charitable benevolence with their organisations and entities through a streamlined shared services model.  

The prime function of Masonic Services has been to provide quality services to its clients, the majority of which come from the brand of Freemasonry. A strategic review of the masonic organisations operating within South Australia and the Northern Territory demonstrated, duplication, leaking of funds, services and time constraints for delivery of services.

Services that can be shared among the various business units of a company include finance, purchasing, inventory, payroll, hiring, and information technology

MS’s conception has been a slow process over a period of many years with many boards and heads of orders, considering the options and ways to move forward with such a concept. The rollout of shared services will be intentionally moderate to ensure that the capacity to deliver and assess is constant. This paced approach is made possible by a heavy start year tapering down each year therein to the agreement to maximise the shared services.

Name: MTMedicGroup
Description:
MTMedicGroup heeft als visie: een zorgzame samenleving. Hoe beperkt je ook bent, je kunt mee participeren zoals jij dat wilt, volgens alle dimensies van positieve gezondheid.
De missie is om zorgprofessionals, mantelzorgers en hulpbehoevenden plezier, vertrouwen en zelfredzaamheid te bieden. Zij zijn de sleutelfiguren voor een zorgzame samenleving en diegene die de steun van MTMedicGroup, een vrijwilliger of andere organisaties kunnen gebruiken. Plezier, vertrouwen en zelfredzaamheid zijn de fundering van een zorgzame samenleving. 

De missie wordt voltooid door de manier waarop MTMedicGroup de zorgprofessionals, mantelzorgers en hulpbehoevenden ondersteund, verbind en inspireert. Dit doen we op positieve en zorgzame wijze, oftewel: “Met zorg voor de zorg!” 

Kernwaarden: inlevend, verbindend, inspirerend en onderscheidend.
MTMedicGroup is opgericht vanuit verpleegkundig inzicht en doet het net even anders.

Er is een eigen concept ontwikkeld: het Zuster Kayleigh concept. Hiermee:
-Krijgt de zorgprofessional weer plezier in het werken met de benodigde veranderingen.
-Krijgt de zorgprofessional vertrouwen in het implementatieproces en in elkaar.
-Ontwikkelt de zorgprofessional zelfredzaamheid om implementaties positief te laten verlopen.

Ik bied de volgende diensten en producten aan:
- Innovaties: Er kan meegekeken worden naar het inzetten van zorgtechnologie voor de cliënt of zorgprofessional. Daarnaast ontwikkelen we zelf ook innovaties welke aangekocht kunnen worden.
- Trainingen: eigen ontworpen training volgens het Zuster Kayleigh concept welke dynamisch mee kan bewegen binnen de behoeften van de zorgorganisatie. 
- Procesbegeleiding bij praktijkonderzoek, innovaties en implementaties. Er wordt gewerkt vanuit de bedoeling en Evidence Based Practice: de combinatie van de behoefte van de klant, de eigen expertise en ondersteuning van wetenschappelijke literatuur. Hierbij wordt er een bottom-up benadering gehanteerd waarbij de eindgebruiker centraal staat.

Name: Systeemdenken
Description:
It's not personal, it's the system!

Loopt het niet lekker in jouw team of afdeling? Krijg je er de vinger maar niet achter? En wat je ook adviseert of zelf probeert, het lijkt muurvast te zitten. ‘Maar als je doet wat je deed krijg je wat je altijd kreeg’. Einstein zei het al. Tijd om kennis te maken met een andere manier van kijken, tijd voor het leren en werken systeemdenken voor teams en organisaties. 

Wat is systeemdenken? 
Bij systeemdenken leer je met de systeembril naar het hele systeem te kijken in plaats van naar een geïsoleerd deel. Met behulp van de basisprincipes van het systeemdenken onderzoek je de vastgelopen situatie. Wij zijn van nature vaak sterk gefocust om direct te kijken naar de beste oplossing voor dit probleem of de beste interventie in deze situatie. Maar in het systeemdenken moeten we die neiging juist een beetje temperen om te voorkomen dat we oplossingen bedenken die vervolgens het probleem versterken. Immers als je niet goed hebt begrepen welke dynamiek er in het systeem is en welke patronen iedereen in zijn greep houden, is de valkuil dat je oplossingen gaat bedenken die ‘meer van hetzelfde zijn’.

Description: Saleyards Australia is the peak representative body for the saleyard and lairage industry, dedicated to promoting and advancing the interests of saleyard and lairage owners and operators. In short, we are the industry's unified voice in government and stakeholder engagements at all levels. As the only truly national entity representing the industry, Saleyards Australia brings together the majority of industry participants across New South Wales, the Northern Territory, Queensland, South Australia, Victoria, and Western Australia. Our members provide livestock exchanges to around 1,200 stock and station agents and tens of thousands of livestock producers nationwide. Many members are local government entities, but Saleyards Australia also supports private operators, from small businesses to large-scale facilities. In total, annual transactions through our members' facilities exceed $5 billion. Founded in 2024, Saleyards Australia was formed through the historic amalgamation of the Australian Livestock Markets Association and the Australian Livestock Saleyards Association, uniting both associations under a single banner for the first time.

Description:
Welcome to the Connecticut Cannabis Small Business Alliance (CCSBA), where we are more than just an organization; we are a thriving community dedicated to fostering growth and success in the CT Cannabis industry.
At CCSBA, we understand the unique challenges and opportunities that come with being part of the CT Cannabis Business Support network. That’s why we’ve made it our mission to ignite the spark that fuels Connecticut’s cannabis business, providing the resources, networking opportunities, and advocacy needed to shape this exciting industry. We are a network of local growers, processors, sellers, and related product businesses with the goal of keeping our budding industry personal and local.
Our focus on small business support for the cannabis Industry is not just about business growth; it’s about building a prosperous environment that catalyzes industry growth and facilitates equitable opportunities for all participants in the Connecticut cannabis market. We believe in fair and equal chances for everyone, and through education, support, and collaboration, we’re opening doors and breaking down barriers to success.
Connecticut’s cannabis market is bursting with potential, and we are here to support the entrepreneurs and businesses that make this industry thrive. Whether you’re a newcomer navigating the complex legal landscape or a seasoned veteran looking to maximize growth, CCSBA is your go-to source for CT cannabis business support.
Why join CCSBA? Because here, you can connect with industry leaders who share your passion for the cannabis business in Connecticut. You can stay informed with up-to-date information, insights, and guidance from industry experts. You can grow your business by leveraging resources, workshops, and events designed to take your cannabis venture to the next level in Connecticut. We will provide you with digital learning mediums, connections to local business leaders, networking events, and advocacy groups.

Name: De Studerendes Råd, IBA Erhvervsakademi Kolding
Description:
De Studerendes Råd er en organisation for de studerende på IBA Erhvervsakademiet Kolding, som ønsker, at arbejde målrettet på, at repræsentere og fremme de interesser og behov som vores medstuderende har.

Som medlem af rådet bidrager man til at skabe et positiv studiemiljø, der styrker samarbejde, engagement og forandring på vores uddannelsesinstitution.

Vi arbejder tæt sammen med både de studerende og studieledelsen for at adressere udfordringer, forbedre studieprogrammer og facilitere kommunikationen mellem alle parter.
Vi søger at forbedre studiemiljøet med diverse workshops, events og arrangementer, hvor vi kan skabe en inkluderende og berigende studieoplevelse for alle studerende.

DSR er passioneret omkring at gøre en positiv forskel i vores studiemiljø, og vi tror på, at samarbejde og engagement er nøglen til succes.
Da vi er en blanding af mange forskellige studieretninger, håber vi at kunne skabe en bred forbedring af studielivet på hele IBA.

Name: UF Alpha Kappa Psi | Alpha Phi Chapter
Description:
Alpha Kappa Psi is the oldest and largest co-ed professional business fraternity in the United States. AKPsi has more than 260 collegiate and alumni chapters with over 200,000 members from the United States, United Kingdom, Canada, and Hong Kong. Notable alumni include former U.S. presidents Ronald Reagan and Richard Nixon, founder of Marriott International J. Willard Marriott, Hallmark Cards creator Joyce C. Hall, and more.

The Alpha Phi chapter at the University of Florida was founded on January 22, 1926. Although AKPsi is known as a business fraternity, our 100 members represent a diverse assembly of talented leaders encompassing all 16 colleges. We prepare our leaders personally and professionally to create meaningful relationships that will ameliorate their career endeavors.

Name: Innexora
Description:
Innexora is een innovatief platform voor leren, reflecteren en duurzame groei.

Wij ontwikkelen digitale tools die teams én individuen helpen om van inzicht naar beweging te komen, stap voor stap, vanuit de praktijk.

Onze tools zijn opgebouwd volgens één herkenbare structuur:
reflectie, gevolgd door een opdracht, een afspraak en een verslag waaruit automatisch een plan van aanpak ontstaat.
Zo maken we ontwikkeling concreet en direct toepasbaar.

De Zuster Kayleigh-kwaliteitscyclus vormt hierbij de basis.
Deze methode – gebouwd op vier wetenschappelijke theorieën – is verwerkt in alle vragen en fasen van de tools, zodat reflectie niet alleen gestructureerd, maar ook mensgericht en inclusief wordt.

Binnen Innexora vind je verschillende onderdelen met één gezamenlijke visie:

Innexora Kwaliteitstool: voor teams: gezamenlijke reflectie, afspraken en verbeteracties binnen één overzichtelijk proces.
Innexora Persoonlijke Tool: voor individuen: persoonlijke groei en zelfinzicht volgens dezelfde structuur en cyclus.
Jusave: een slim kennis-zakboek waarmee gebruikers zelf bepalen welke kennis ze bewaren, delen of later teruglezen – zonder dat waardevolle inzichten verdwijnen in rapporten of inboxen.

Met alles wat we ontwikkelen bouwen we bruggen tussen werkvloer en beleid, tussen gedrag en cultuur, en tussen willen en durven.

Zo wordt reflectie geen methode op zich, maar een gewoonte die leidt tot vertrouwen, zelfredzaamheid en duurzame inzetbaarheid.

Innexora: samen sterker, menselijker, future-proof.

 Meer informatie op www.innexora.nl

Name: HipHop International Portugal
Description:
A Hip Hop International Portugal é a representante nacional do “World Hip Hop Dance Championship”, o maior e o mais respeitado evento de street dance mundial, que ocorre anualmente nos Estados Unidos, com a presença de representantes dos cinco continentes. 

Fundado em 2002 e sediado em Los Angeles, este conceito de campeonato-festival chega a Portugal em 2014 pela mão de Jorge Pereira, João Marques e Vitor Fontes, tendo-se juntando mais tarde Alexandre Monteiro.

O HHI Portugal  abrange diferentes vertentes: Cultural, Formativa e Competitiva, sendo que mais de 400 crews e de 9.000 bailarinos já pisaram o palco nos últimos 8 anos, tornando este evento numa referência nacional e internacional na área da dança.

Focada nos bailarinos, a organização procura garantir as melhores condições para a valorização e reconhecimento de cada
pessoa que “pisa” o palco HHI, ao mesmo tempo que visa proporcionar um espetáculo de entretenimento aos milhares de pessoas que assistem ao vivo e via livestreaming, para
que a experiência HHI seja inesquecível!

Name: St. Louis PDMA - Product Development and Management Association
Description:
About the Metropolitan St. Louis Chapter
Are you involved in any aspect of Product Management in Metro St. Louis? Are you searching for product development networking events or job opportunities? Are you seeking educational opportunities to learn best practices and share knowledge? Are you looking for new ideas and fresh perspectives from world-class product development organizations?  You have come to the right place! We are a professional global association aiming to host regular networking and educational events, about all aspects of Product Management, which will help you develop new skills, learn best practices, and network with your peers

Our Mission
We strive to build a diverse and inclusive community of practitioners, academics, researchers, and service providers that share experiences and knowledge of the principles, practices, and processes of effective product innovation and product life cycle. Participation in this community will result in professional growth for individuals, an innovation related competitive advantage for their organizations, and the continued economic growth and talent development of the Metropolitan St. Louis Region.

Name: SINDICONT JOINVILLE E REGIÃO
Description:
Em 22 de agosto de 1946, no Clube Joinville um grupo de contabilistas uniram-se e fundaram a Sociedade Joinvilense de Contabilistas. O ato solene de fundação foi presidido pela contabilista e professora Ana Maria Harger, diretora do Colégio Bom Jesus e da Escola Técnica do Comércio. A decisão teve por objetivo a congregação da classe e da consecução do Conselho Regional de Contabilidade, almejando uma Delegacia em Joinville.

Foram aclamados como presidentes de honra Ana Maria Harger e João Adolfo Bauer e como presidente da Associação o contador João Martins Véras que permaneceu no cargo até o ano de 1951 passando a presidência em 1952 para Theodoro Harger.

Em 1954 toma posse como presidente o contador Arlindo Borowsky, que mediante as disposições da Portaria Ministerial nº. 39 de 02/08/1944 e da necessidade de obter-se força e maior representatividade na defesa dos interesses da classe, reuniu a Associação em 3 de setembro e por Assembléia Geral Extraordinária aprovou o processo de investidura sindical. A então Associação Profissional, mediante reconhecimento do Ministério do Trabalho e da obtenção de sua carta sindical em 20 de abril de 1955, transformou-se em Sindicato dos Contabilistas de Joinville.

Desde o primeiro presidente, contador João Martins Véras a entidade vem defendendo a valorização do profissional de contabilidade implantando serviços de assistência, buscando parceiros e convênios, incentivando o aperfeiçoamento profissional contínuo e confraternizando os profissionais da classe contábil através de eventos e ações sociais da região.

Hoje a entidade abrange em sua base territorial as cidades: Joinville, Araquari, Balneário Barra do Sul, Barra Velha, São João do Itaperiú, Garuva, Itapoá e São Francisco do Sul.

Name: MAGMA - Mostra Alimentare Gastronomica della Mozzarella e dell'Agricoltura
Description:
Il MAGMA - Mostra Alimentare Gastronomica della Mozzarella e dell'Agricoltura è il salone fieristico-espositivo che si tiene nel cuore di Capaccio Paestum (SA), presso il NEXT, dal 5 al 7 Aprile 2024.

L'evento si propone come contenitore multidisciplinare di eventi per tutte le aziende delle filiere di acquisto e produzione del Made in Italy, per i protagonisti ed addetti del settore e per i consumatori del Centro-Sud Italia interessati ad una vasta offerta di prodotti dedicati e destinati al settore agroalimentare. 

Il Salone si propone di presentare le eccellenze del settore agroalimentare italiano attraverso le seguenti aree tematiche espositive:
- Salone della Mozzarella
- Agricoltura
- Enogastronomia
- Turismo Enogastronomico
- Consorzi
- Aziende Agricole
- Tecnologie & Forniture

Queste aree saranno caratterizzate ed arricchite da postazioni gastronomiche, masterclass, show cooking ed eventi vari di grande appeal.

Il MAGMA Expo, inoltre, si candida come promotore di cultura e tradizione alimentare. Convegni scientifici ed ordinari, workshop, conferenze e altri appuntamenti pedagogici/informativi sono i protagonisti delle attività di formazione del Salone, in collaborazione con numerose istituzioni pubbliche ed associazioni di categoria.

È possibile informarsi sugli orari, le modalità di partecipazione e su molto altro ancora visitando il sito https://www.magmaexpo.it/, il portale ufficiale del MAGMA - Mostra Alimentare Gastronomica della Mozzarella e dell'Agricoltura.

Description: The Irish Association of Professional Historians (IAPH) represents a community of professional and graduate historians operating inside and outside the academy, encompassing a range of historical disciplines. Name: Mines TPED
Description: The Theme Park Engineering and Design (TPED) Group at Colorado School of Mines is an organization open to all students interested in and/or aspiring to work in the niche industry of amusement attraction design, engineering, and operation/management. The organization offers chances to grow as a young professional and network with others that share the same passion.

Name: Ordine Dottori Agronomi e Forestali di Milano Lodi Monza Brianza e Pavia
Description:
Benvenuto nella Pagina Ufficiale dell’Ordine dei Dottori Agronomi e Dottori Forestali delle province di Milano, Lodi, Monza Brianza e Pavia. 
Siamo un ordine di professionisti che si occupano di ottimizzare le produzioni agricole e animali, e contemporaneamente, di tutelare le attività umane e le risorse ambientali.
La nostra professione ha radici antiche che con l’industrializzazione e l’avvento tecnologico ha catturato sempre meno l’attenzione del grande pubblico rimanendo però alla base della nostra sopravvivenza.
Seguici anche tu per scoprire le competenze primarie che portano il cibo sulla tua tavola, la carta sulla tua scrivania e la biodiversità nelle nostre città.

Name: Australian Food Engineering Association (AFEA)
Description: Australian Food Engineering Association (AFEA) was incorporated in 2000. It represents and supports food engineers across Australia through activities including running workshops and events, with a highlight being the successful bid to host the 13th International Congress on Engineering and Food (ICEF13) in Melbourne in 2019.

Name: CIC Energy Division
Description: The Energy Division has grown into a large group of industry professionals & academics working together to bring you content and events related to the energy industry in Canada. Our goal is to help establish and strengthen professional relationships, through publishing the latest energy-related news, innovations, interviews in the CIC’s newsletter and much more. There are many events to come, so make sure to keep an eye out for our Energy events, seminars, and exhibitions.

Name: Danske Æg
Description:

Description: Notre but : Faire connaître, valoriser et représenter le métier de travel planner

Name: Pengespillerforeningen
Description:
Pengespillerforeningen er en ideell, uavhengig og nasjonal organisasjon for alle som er opptatt av og har glede av pengespill som en hobby. 

Foreningens formål er definert slik: 

Pengespillerforeningen vil arbeide for å ivareta og beskytte norske pengespilleres rettigheter i møte med myndigheter, spillselskaper og andre relevante aktører; samt for å øke spilleglede, spre kunnskap om og minske fordommer rundt ansvarlig pengespill. 

Pengespillerforeningen er en forening for alle som deltar i pengespill, sjelden eller ofte, for egen fornøyelses del, og ikke som del av et problem eller for å leve av det. Det er millioner av oss som deltar i lovlige pengespill i Noge, men ingen er vår stemme i møter med spillselskaper, myndigheter, presse eller i samfunnet generelt.

Name: gippi-wereld
Description:
Welkom op de pagina van het Groene Inspiratie Plein (GIP) 
Benieuwd naar wat Duurzaam Ondernemen écht betekent? Het GIP is dé plek waar je ontdekt hoe je met jouw organisatie of project toekomstbestendige keuzes maakt voor mens, planeet en winst. We brengen inspirerende partners, innovatieve producten en diensten samen om te laten zien hoe duurzaamheid in de praktijk wordt gebracht.
De eerste fysieke editie van het Groene Inspiratie Plein (GIP'24) vindt plaats op 14 oktober tijdens de Horeca Xperience Groningen in de Martinikerk. Dit is slechts het begin! Want na deze primeur zetten we direct de volgende stap met de lancering van het digitale Groene Inspiratie Plein. Hier kunnen organisaties zich het hele jaar door presenteren, netwerken en samenwerken binnen onze acht Duurzame Pijlers.
Via diverse tools zoals de #GIPCard en ons #PositieveImpactHandelshuis krijg je binnenkort de kans om duurzame impact verder te versterken – van strategie tot uitvoering.
Wil je meer weten over hoe jij jouw organisatie kunt laten groeien via duurzame samenwerking en innovatie? Kijk op www.hetgroeneinspiratieplein.nl en blijf op de hoogte van alle toekomstige activiteiten!
 Tip: Tot en met 14 oktober stellen we alle standhouders van GIP'24 kort aan je voor, zodat je alvast een voorproefje krijgt van de inspirerende bedrijven en initiatieven die aanwezig zijn op het Groene Inspiratie Plein. Mis het niet!
Samen bouwen wij aan een toekomstbestendige wereld door te beseffen dat je het niet alleen hoeft te doen. Het gezamenlijk oppakken van uitdagingen is enorm waardevol en zal je rendement versterken, omdat de markt transparanter georganiseerd wordt om obstakels, dilemma’s en uitdagingen aan te pakken.

Nieuwsgierig hoe? Start vandaag nog met het volgen van het GIP en/of lever actief een bijdrage op het platform, zodat jouw organisatie op de juiste wijze wordt geïnformeerd en de juiste beslissingen voor de toekomst kan nemen.

Name: Landesverband für Energieeffizienz e.V.
Description:
Wir sind der Landesverband für Energieeffizienz e.V. – ein Zusammenschluss von Sachverständigen, die im Bereich der Energieeffizienz tätig sind.

Im Sinne einer langfristigen Daseinsvorsorge mit ökonomischer wie ökologischer Verantwortung für die Gesellschaft verfolgen wir folgende Ziele:

Energie und Ressourcen nachhaltig und intelligent einzusetzen
Energieeffizienz sektorenübergreifend weiterzuentwickeln – in den Bereichen Gebäude, Industrie, Landwirtschaft, Verkehr/Mobilität sowie Energieerzeugung und -verteilung
Technologietransfer neutral und technikoffen zu bewerten und zu fördern
Das Berufsbild „Sachverständige*r für Energieeffizienz“ zu stärken und öffentlich-rechtlich zu schützen

Der LFE arbeitet fachübergreifend und interdisziplinär. In Sektorengruppen gegliedert teilen die Expert*innen in den Fachbeiräten ihre Expertise untereinander.

Wir fördern die unabhängige Energieeffizienzberatung, den nachhaltigen Einsatz von Rohstoffen sowie angrenzende Tätigkeitsfelder. Dabei möchten wir Unternehmen, öffentliche Träger und Bürger gleichermaßen sensibilisieren. Unser Ziel ist es, eine verbrauchsreduzierende, vorausschauende und umweltschonende Energiepolitik in Deutschland aktiv zu unterstützen.

Ein zentraler Bestandteil unserer Arbeit ist es, Erkenntnisse aus den Sektorengruppen und Fachbeiräten zu vertiefen, systematisch aufzubereiten und für die Öffentlichkeit zugänglich zu machen. So leisten die Mitglieder des LFE einen konkreten Beitrag zur Senkung energiebedingter Emissionen – zum Schutz unserer Umwelt und zur Schonung der Energie-Ressourcen.

Hier finden Sie unser Impressum und Informationen zum Datenschutz: https://lfe-energieberater.de/impressum/
https://lfe-energieberater.de/privacy-policy/

Name: Music & Entertainment Business Association (MEBA)
Description: Student-run organization at the University of Pittsburgh focusing on professional development and networking opportunities for future leaders of the music and entertainment industry.

Name: World Halalpreneur Council
Description:
The World Halalpreneur Council (WHC Global) is a leading global organization dedicated to empowering, supporting, and promoting the Halal business ecosystem worldwide. Founded with the mission to foster sustainable development in the Halal sector, WHC serves as a bridge connecting businesses, entrepreneurs, governments, and stakeholders from various industries within the Halal industry, including food and beverages, finance, fashion, wellness, technology, tourism, and beyond.
We aim to create an environment that supports and facilitates global Halalpreneurs by encouraging cross-border collaborations, knowledge exchange, and innovation in the Halal industry. With a focus on elevating the Halal business community, WHC provides platforms, networking opportunities, and resources to help businesses scale, thrive, and contribute to global economies.
 
Our Mission
•	Empowering Halal Businesses Globally: To provide a platform for Halal businesses worldwide to access markets, establish partnerships, and scale their operations.
•	Fostering Halal Innovation: To encourage innovation and technological advancements in Halal-related industries, from food and wellness to fintech and tourism.
•	Supporting Halal-Entrepreneurship: To assist in the growth and development of emerging Halal entrepreneurs and SMEs through capacity-building programs, mentorship, and resources.
•	Strengthening International Collaboration: To create a network of strategic partners, including businesses, government agencies, and industry leaders, working together to build a robust and interconnected global Halal ecosystem.
 
Our Vision
To be the leading global platform for Halal entrepreneurs, facilitating sustainable growth and development within the Halal business ecosystem, while positioning Halal as a universal standard of quality, sustainability, and ethical business practices.

Name: Joy Matters
Description: Joy Matters creates a perfect team day for you. We will have a lot of laughter, but also the possibility to learn new skills and get to know each other on a more personal level. We tailor and create the team building day to fit your needs.

Name: FUF - FEF Under Fem
Description:
FUF - FEF Under Fem er netværksforening for advokatfuldmægtige og yngre advokater, som er medlemmer af Foreningen for Erstatnings- og Forsikringsret, FEF. 

Foreningen arbejder på at facilitere faglige og sociale arrangementer, med henblik på at fordre vidensdeling, karrieremuligheder og netværksdannelse. Samtidigt sigtes efter at kunne tilbyde arrangementer, som kan medgå i den obligatorisk efteruddannelse. Foreningen sig specifikt til den yngre del af branchen. 

Foreningen er under stiftelse og der vil i den kommende tid ske løbende opdatering om foreningens aktiviteter, herunder foreningens første arrangement. 

Ved forespørgsler om foreningen, kan disse med fordel rettes til Advokat Julie Harder, Elmer Advokater, advokatfuldmægtig Alexandra Malou Wiese, Birch Advokatfirma, eller advokatfuldmægtig Asbjørn Storm Graversen, LIND Advokataktieselskab.

Name: Turquois X
Description: Working with ocean science, industry, investors and start-ups, we focus on maritime mobility & logistics, decarbonisation, ocean renewables & marine technology

Name: Thuditssia
Description:
uticorin District Tiny and Small Scale Industries Association (THUDITSSIA), is the apex body for the small scale industries in Tuticorin district. THUDITSSIA is a member in various district level committees, formed by the Government.

THUDITSSIA is dedicated to the development of industries in Tuticorin district, for the last 25 years. THUDITSSIA provides marketing support, credit support and technology support to small and medium Enterprises.

Name: SEP at UCLA
Description:
Sigma Eta Pi, founded in 2010 at UCLA, is the premier co-ed entrepreneurship fraternity on campus. Sigma Eta Pi come from a wide variety of majors and backgrounds, and have started over 60 different ventures. 

At its core, our mission at SEP is to transform individuals into starters who follow their passions, develop lasting meaningful relationships, and create value through innovative pursuits. With our talented, close-knit and diverse network, educational and skills-based workshops, and strong influence and involvement in the college and greater entrepreneurial community, we enable our brothers to turn ideas into startups, pursue creative projects, build networks for life, and learn valuable professional skills.

This mission has lead us to create impact at UCLA and beyond. These include multiple VC backed companies with millions in funding, the creation of LAHacks and BruinTank, a Shark Tank deal, and companies that have gone on to be acquired for combined over $100 million.

Name: Texas Association of School Psychologists
Description: The Texas Association of School Psychologists is a professional organization that supports and advocates for school psychologists having a positive impact on school systems to improve academic skills, social-emotional functioning, and mental-behavioral health for all students.

Name: Barreau du Bas-St-Laurent-Gaspésie-Îles-de-la-Madeleine
Description: Le Barreau du Bas-Saint-Laurent-Gaspésie-Îles-de-la-Madeleine est l’un des 15 barreaux de sections qui représentent les régions du Québec. Bien qu’ils délèguent des représentants au Conseil général du Barreau du Québec et qu’ils y ont droit de vote, les barreaux de section sont indépendants du Barreau du Québec. Tous les avocats du Québec sont membres à la fois du Barreau du Québec et du barreau de section de la région où ils exercent leur profession.

Name: Colegio Oficial de Psicología de Cantabria
Description:
El COPCA es una organización profesional en la que se integran de manera obligatoria todos los profesionales de la psicología que desarrollan su actividad dentro de la Comunidad de Cantabria.  Actualmente, cuenta con más de 570 colegiados.

El Colegio, por su parte, ejerce la representación colectiva y oficial del ejercicio de la profesión.

El objetivo principal del Colegio es promocionar el desarrollo de la Psicología defendiendo los intereses profesionales y sociales de sus miembros. Con el propósito de representar a todos los profesionales, fomentando la solidaridad y promocionando la formación y la participación como pilares necesarios para un mayor desarrollo técnico y científico que desemboque en la mejora de la actividad profesional y velando por el cumplimiento de las normas éticas y deontológicas de la profesión en beneficio de la sociedad.

Name: Professional Association for Trans Health Ireland (PATHI)
Description:
The Professional Association for Trans Health Ireland (PATHI) is an all-island multidisciplinary organisation representing, supporting, and connecting those working to strengthen the health, rights, and wellbeing of all trans and gender diverse people across Ireland.

Our vision:

PATHI envisions a future where all trans and gender diverse people in Ireland have full access to appropriate healthcare and all healthcare providers have access to information and resources which enable them to provide appropriate healthcare.

By appropriate healthcare, we mean care that is free, safe, timely, person-centred, accessible in community and primary care settings, based on informed consent, and self-determined — following the needs of the community and international best practice.

Our aims:

Educate
Educate professionals on the health, rights and wellbeing of trans and gender diverse people and develop and promote research, knowledge exchange and high-quality, evidence-based care.

Collaborate
Facilitate networking, communication and collaboration, and create supportive environments for professionals working with trans and gender diverse people.

Promote
Promote healthcare based on co-production with and leadership of the trans community, including: depathologisation, decentralisation, the informed consent model and community-based care.

Advocate
Advocate for institutional, policy, and legislative reform to advance trans and gender diverse people’s health using our collective knowledge and expertise.

Name: When She Speaks
Description: A platform dedicated to uplifting young black girls and women. Through our podcast, career development, coaching, mentoring, empowerment and events. We want to help them get to the next level in their personal and professional lives and we believe that will build a better community.

Name: The BOSS Network, Inc
Description:
BOSS stands for "Bringing Out Successful Sisters," our mission is to promote and encourage the small business spirit and career development of women of color. The BOSS Network is an online community of professional and entrepreneurial women who support each other through digital content, programs, and event-based networking.

As a collective, The BOSS Network supports women on their journey to become independent and successful in their career or entrepreneurial endeavors. Working towards one simple goal, BOSS is “Bringing Out Successful Sisters” to build relationships and networks to structure a foundation where women feel supported in their holistic lives. The BOSS Network aims to grow through networking by providing its members with education, information, and resources.

The BOSS Network is changing how enterprising women are viewed among the masses and becoming a resource for companies seeking female minority influencers as their target market. The BOSS Network, as a community of women, cultivates entrepreneurial spirits and encourages successful women to develop, promote, and support the next generation of young women looking to enhance their professional lives. The BOSS Network develops live events, virtual seminars, and networking opportunities to give our members and business partners optimum brand exposure.

Description: The Texas District and County Attorneys Association (TDCAA) is a non-profit organization dedicated to serving Texas prosecutors and their employees.
