Name: Let's Fail
Description:
This page is dedicated to professionals who want to learn from failures. Failures are inevitable. 

Failing is a true Leadership Trait that leads to success. We will burst the myth about the Badness of Failures and help you create a winning mindset using simple and practical strategies.

Join Lets Fail and help everyone learn from Failures!

Name: Réseau Toucom
Description:
Découvrez Toucom, le réseau qui révolutionne les industries graphiques depuis 2010 ! 

Depuis sa fondation, Toucom s'est imposé comme un pilier de collaboration et de partage dans le secteur de la communication graphique. Notre communauté, initialement composée d'une vingtaine de membres visionnaires, s'est épanouie pour devenir une force collective dans les domaines de l'imprimerie et de la sérigraphie. Artisans, TPE, PME, et professionnels indépendants trouvent chez Toucom un terrain fertile pour croître et innover ensemble.

Au cœur de Toucom, c'est l'esprit de communauté qui prévaut. Chaque membre, qu'il soit un artisan expérimenté ou une start-up innovante, joue un rôle crucial dans notre épopée collective. Nous partageons plus que des ressources et des compétences ; nous partageons une vision commune de croissance et de réussite mutuelle. Nos alliances stratégiques avec des fournisseurs de premier plan offrent à nos membres des conditions préférentielles, renforçant ainsi leur compétitivité sur le marché.

 Rejoignez Toucom pour faire partie de cette aventure exceptionnelle. Profitez de notre plateforme intranet pour une veille technologique constante, participez à nos événements exclusifs et bénéficiez d'un réseau solide pour propulser votre entreprise vers de nouveaux sommets. Ensemble, continuons à écrire les chapitres de cette saga où chaque membre est acteur et bénéficiaire d'un succès partagé. 

Contactez-nous pour en savoir plus sur l'adhésion à Toucom !

Name: HRD- en L&D-congres Liefde voor Leren
Description:
Ook in 2026 is hét HRD- en L&D-congres van Nederland de plek waar HRD’ers, L&D’ers, coaches en organisatieadviseurs elkaar ontmoeten en leren van inspirerende sprekers.

Dit jaar zoomen we in op Connect.
Leren doe je nooit alleen. In een wereld die razendsnel verandert, is verbinding de sleutel tot groei tussen mensen, ideeën en organisaties. Ontdek hoe we leren kunnen versterken door écht contact te maken.

Laat u inspireren door keynotes van Frank van Pamelen en Artie Ramsodit, en verdiep u in workshops van Fer van den Boomen, Martin Reekers, Karin Walthuis, Jacquiline van Onzenoort, Emmy de Vries, Davy Caelen en Jan de Dreu. Zij bieden actuele inzichten, praktische tools en vernieuwende perspectieven om leren en ontwikkelen met meer hart, hoofd en verbinding vorm te geven.

Tijdens het congres wordt ook het nieuwe platform TVO.nu gelanceerd. Het Tijdschrift voor Ontwikkeling in Organisaties (TvOO) transformeert tot TvO – Trefpunt voor Organisatieontwikkeling, een eigentijds digitaal kennisplatform voor Advies | HRD | L&D.

kortom: Liefde voor Leren 2026 is niet te missen voor iedere HRD-, L&D-, coach- en organisatieprofessional.

Name: Aash Creations
Description:
Ash Creations is a wellness-focused initiative dedicated to enhancing employee well-being and behavioral skills using the power of creative, experiential tools.

We work at the intersection of mental health, emotional intelligence, and workplace performance, offering programs that go beyond conventional training.

Our niche lies in integrating expressive arts, reflective practices, and psychology-informed methods to support:
 Emotional resilience
 Self-awareness & mindset shifts
 Interpersonal and communication skills
 Stress management & coping strategies
 Leadership presence & team dynamics

Whether it’s through group workshops, one-on-one coaching, or customized well-being interventions, we help professionals reconnect with themselves — and grow in ways that are both practical and meaningful.

At Ash Creations, we believe creativity isn’t just about art — it’s a catalyst for insight, connection, and change.

Name: Australian Local Government Women's Association (ALGWA) - Queensland Branch
Description:
The Australian Local Government Women's Association (ALGWA) was founded in 1951 during the Jubilee Year of the Commonwealth of Australia. ALGWA was formed as a non party political organisation to support women's participation in Local Government.
A National Board was elected following the first National Convention which was held in Canberra in October 1966.

Councillor Violet Lambert of Fern Tree Gully Shire, Victoria called the inaugural meeting and a provisional committee was elected, consisting of local government members from South Australia, New South Wales, Victoria and Queensland.

The First branch of the ALGWA was opened in Sydney in 1952. A constitution any by-laws were formally adopted at the 2nd National Conference held in Adelaide in August 1978.

All branches of the ALGWA are autonomous, however, their aims and objectives are based on those of the National Association. Branches hold conferences, seminars and special meetings to advertise their work and educate women in Local Government. National Conferences are held biennially.


Goals & Objectives
- To assist in further knowledge and understanding of the function of local government.
- To encourage all to participate in local government, in particular women.
- To encourage all to make a career in local government, in particular attracting and retaining women.
- To watch over and protect the interests and rights of women in local government.
- To take action in relation to any subject or activity affecting local government legislation
- To act in advisory capacity to intending women candidates for local government election.

Name: Columbia Nursing Pathways Collective Club
Description:
The Columbia Nursing Pathways Collective is a student-led initiative dedicated to expanding what’s possible for nurses. We create opportunities for nursing students and professionals to explore nontraditional career pathways—spanning entrepreneurship, consulting, digital health, venture capital, pharma, and technology—while staying grounded in the values of nursing leadership and patient advocacy.
Through panels, workshops, mentorship, and networking with industry leaders, we empower nurses to bring their clinical expertise to new frontiers, bridging health, innovation, and equity.

At CNPCC, we believe nurses are not only caregivers, but also strategists, innovators, and change-makers shaping the future of healthcare and beyond.

Name: SGRP

Name: Organisation for Psychological Research Into Stroke (OPSYRIS)
Description:
OPSYRIS is a Special Interest Group (SIG) of the World Federation for NeuroRehabilitation (WFNR). The aim of the group is to facilitate conduct and dissemination of research into psychological aspects of stroke, inform evidence-based clinical practice in stroke psychology services, and promote consideration of psychological factors in stroke research and clinical settings. We also encourage links between research and clinical practice.

At the heart of our group’s activity are annual meetings. This is an opportunity for researchers and clinicians at all career stages to come together to share and discuss their work in a friendly and open environment. Each meeting features a keynote lecture, designed to celebrate the very best in stroke psychology research and inspire the next generation of researchers. In 2018, we also initiated awarding a Rising Star Prize to an outstanding early career researcher or clinician, to promote widespread recognition of individual novel contributions to our field.

Throughout the year we circulate news and updates on relevant job openings, training, conferences and ongoing studies. We promote a supportive community and encourage dialogue between members.

Name: Association of Medical School Pediatric Department Chairs, Inc. (AMSPDC)
Description: The Association of Medical School Pediatric Department Chairs, Inc. (AMSPDC) was begun informally by Charles Janeway in 1960 at an APS-SPR meeting. The group adopted a constitution and bylaws in 1964 and was officially incorporated in 1967 with its purpose being to foster education and research in the field of child health and human development. The membership of AMSPDC consists of the chair or acting chair or academic administrative head of the department of pediatrics of each accredited medical school in the United States and Canada.

Name: Nona (Norwegian Online News Association)
Description:
Nona er et sterkt og aktivt mediefellesskap for innovasjon og utvikling i digitale medier.

Vi samler mediebransjen til erfaringsdeling og diskusjon året rundt gjennom fysiske og digitale arrangementer, og hjelper medlemmer over hele landet med å holde seg oppdatert på de viktigste trendene og mulighetene akkurat nå.

Eksempler på tema kan være kunstig intelligens, datajournalistikk, digital historiefortelling og nye formater.

Følgende mediehus er medlem i Nona: TV 2, Fredriksstad Blad, iTromsø, Dagsavisen, Gaula, Stavanger Aftenblad, E24, Nidaros, Adresseavisen, Vårt Land, Tønsbergs Blad, Fædrelandsvennen, Medier24, Teknisk Ukeblad Media, Nettavisen, Amedia Utvikling, NRK, Dagbladet, LO Media, Aftenposten, Bergensavisen, Tun Media, ABC Startsiden, Verdens Gang, NTB, Scandinavia Online, Dagens Næringsliv og Sunnmørsposten.

Nona ble stiftet i 2008 under navnet Netthoder, og drives av et frivillig styre med deltakere fra åtte ulike mediehus.

Vil du eller ditt mediehus bli medlem? Skriv til oss her: styret@nona.no

Name: ANAJUS - Associação Nacional dos Analistas do Poder Judiciário e do MPU
Description:
A Associação Nacional dos Analistas do Poder Judiciário da União e do Ministério Público da União é entidade de classe que tem por objetivo a promoção do reconhecimento, da valorização e da defesa da Carreira de Analista, em sintonia com a Estratégia Nacional do Poder Judiciário.

As atribuições dos Analistas do Judiciário e do MPU são descritas pelas leis n. 11.416/2006 e n. 11.415/2006 e compreendem as atividades de planejamento; organização; coordenação; supervisão técnica; assessoramento; estudo; pesquisa; elaboração de laudos, pareceres ou informações e execução de tarefas de elevado grau de complexidade.

Associe-se: www.anajus.org.br

Name: National Federation of Entrepreneurs of the DRC
Description:
the National Federation of Entrepreneurs of the Democratic Republic of Congo (FENAE-RDC), is a Professional Organization of Job Creators, its mission is to promote, represent and defend the interests of entrepreneurs and businesses operating in the DRC, to encourage an environment conducive to sustainable and responsible entrepreneurship, and to actively contribute to the economic, social and environmental development of the Democratic Republic of Congo."

We aim to build a dynamic, ethical and prosperous entrepreneurial community in the Democratic Republic of Congo and internationally, where innovation, competitiveness and social responsibility are valued, and where job creators play a key role in growth. effective and sustainable economic and improvement of social well-being.

Name: The IIA Nashville Chapter
Description:
The Nashville chapter chartered on May 9, 1975, and achieved Ruby Status in 2018. The Nashville Chapter serves Nashville and surrounding areas and is home to approximately 500 members. Our members represent a variety of industries including banking, healthcare, government, education, consulting, retail, and manufacturing. In order to help our members continue to enhance their skillset within the Internal Audit profession, our Chapter provides professional development, roundtables, and networking events. The Chapter advocates and supports the profession through academic engagement and scholarship programs.

If you are new to the area, or currently are not a member, and would like more information about joining our chapter, getting involved by volunteering with one of our committees, or want a listing of upcoming events, email us at chapter119@iiachaptercommunications.org.

Name: Women In Power
Description:
Women In Power is a leadership development initiative that equips women to navigate systemic inequities, deepen their emotional intelligence, and cultivate authentic, inclusive leadership. 

We offer programs tailored to different career stages—from emerging professionals to seasoned leaders—focusing on allyship, self-reflection, and practical strategies for career advancement. Through a blend of community-driven learning, proven frameworks, and real-world application, our participants gain the confidence and skills they need to thrive in today’s complex workplaces. 

Join us in creating a supportive network of women who lead with empathy, vision, and unwavering commitment to meaningful change.

Name: Het Echte Goud
Description:
Het Echte Goud

Wij laten organisaties weer kloppen, van binnenuit. 

Elke organisatie heeft goud in handen. Soms zichtbaar, soms verborgen onder systemen en patronen. Het Echte Goud helpt dit potentieel te vinden en te benutten. Wij zijn Tess en Sarah, ervaren adviseurs die een resultaat en mensgerichte aanpak combineren. We helpen non-profit organisaties helderheid te krijgen, slimme strategieën te maken en sterke teams te bouwen.

Wat we doen
We helpen groeien in focus, resultaat en werkplezier. Dit doen we door strategie, structuur en samenwerking te versterken met o.a.:

- Strategische (her)positionering
- Leiderschaps- en teamontwikkeling
- Organisatieontwikkeling en veranderbegeleiding
- Financieel management en groeistrategie
- Projectuitvoering en begeleiding
- Fondsenwerving, sponsoring en business development
- Procesoptimalisatie en efficiënt werken

Hoe we werken
We beginnen met helderheid: waar wil je naartoe en wat staat er in de weg? Vervolgens maken we een praktisch plan met meetbare resultaten. We werken naast je, samen met de mensen en steken zelf de handen uit de mouwen. 
Onze aanpak:
- Analyse & strategie: scherpe blik op cijfers, processen en doelen
- Mens & team: energie, eigenaarschap en samenwerking versterken
- Uitvoering & borging: veranderingen vertalen naar gedrag en processen

Wat je mag verwachten
- Een koers die richting geeft en breed gedragen wordt
- Meer focus en minder verspilling van tijd, energie en geld
- Sterker leiderschap en teams die elkaar versterken
- Groeistrategieën passend bij je missie
- Meer financiële rust en toekomstbestendigheid

Voor wie
Wij werken met betekenisvolle organisaties die willen bijdragen aan mensen, publiek of samenleving en daarin willen groeien. Of je nu in verandering bent, nieuwe inkomsten zoekt, of je basis versterkt: wij zorgen dat je goud gaat glanzen.

Nieuwsgierig?
Ontdek waar het goud in jouw organisatie zit. Stuur ons een bericht of bel ons 

Tess en Sarah

Name: Society of Experimental and Clinical Anatomists of Nigeria (SECAN)
Description: The Society of Experimental and Clinical Anatomists of Nigeria (SECAN) is dedicated to advancing anatomical sciences in Nigeria and beyond, fostering synergy among basic scientists, clinical anatomists, educators, and industry professionals. We promote interdisciplinary collaboration and excellence in anatomical research, education, and clinical applications, driving innovation in health and related sciences through cutting-edge experimental and clinical approaches.

Name: Canadian Association for Information Science (CAIS)
Description:
CAIS was incorporated in 1970 to promote the advancement of information science in Canada, and encourage and facilitate the exchange of information relating to the use, access, retrieval, organization, management, and dissemination of information.

À propos de L'ACSI
L’ACSI est créée en 1970, afin de promouvoir l’avancement des sciences de l’information au Canada, d’encourager et de faciliter les échanges académiques, relatifs aux problématiques d’usages, d’accès, de repérage, d’organisation, de gestion et de diffusion de l’information.

L’ACSI atteint ses objectifs à travers sa revue bilingue La Revue canadienne des sciences de l’information et de bibliothéconomie, qui bénéficie d’une réputation internationale, et son congrès annuel.

L’ACSI compte parmi ses membres autant des chercheurs que des praticiens et professionnels de l’information : chercheurs et enseignants-chercheurs en sciences de l’information, archivistes, conservateurs et bibliothécaires, documentalistes, économistes, journalistes, psychologues. Elle rassemble également d’autres chercheurs venant d’autres disciplines s’intéressant aux questions touchant l’objet « information » et partageant ses objectifs.

Conformément à la mission de l’ACSI qui est de soutenir et de promouvoir la recherche canadienne en bibliothéconomie et en sciences de l’information, la plateforme communautaire de l’ACSI vise à fournir aux membres un espace et du support pour l’organisation d’événements virtuels tels que des conférences, des ateliers et des webinaires. Elle vise aussi à permettre aux membres de partager leur recherche au sein et au-delà de la communauté canad

CAIS achieves these goals through its internationally recognized journal, the Canadian Journal of Information and Library Science, and its annual conference.

CAIS members include information scientists and archivists, librarians, computer scientists, documentalists, economists, educators, journalists, psychologists, and others who support its objectives.

Name: TotalBen
Description:
Com 16 anos de atuação no mercado, a Total Clube é uma Associação de Benefícios e Proteção Veicular dedicada a oferecer segurança e tranquilidade para nossos associados. Além da proteção veicular completa, nosso modelo de socorro mútuo proporciona amparo coletivo em momentos de necessidade, garantindo que você esteja sempre protegido contra imprevistos como roubos, furtos e acidentes.

Nossa associação vai além da proteção veicular. Oferecemos uma rede de benefícios exclusivos em diversos estabelecimentos parceiros, incluindo descontos em serviços automotivos, lojas e muito mais.

Estamos comprometidos em entregar um atendimento humano, ágil e eficiente, sempre colocando os interesses dos nossos associados em primeiro lugar.

Com coberturas que incluem Responsabilidade Civil Facultativa de Veículos (RCFv), Acidentes Pessoais de Passageiros (APP) e Assistência 24h, somos sua melhor escolha para proteção veicular. Segurança, confiança e benefícios exclusivos — essa é a Total Clube.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Danske Scenografer
Description:
Danske Scenografer er en fagforening for scenografer, productiondesignere, lys – og lyddesignere, udstillingsscenografer, kostumierer og spildesignere. 

Danske Scenografer arbejder for at sikre bedst mulige arbejds- og lønvilkår på området samt generelt at varetage medlemmernes interesser, rettigheder og højne fagligheden.

Name: The Center for Mindful Eating
Description:
Our relationship to food is a central one that reflects our attitudes toward our environment and ourselves. As a practice, mindful eating can bring us awareness of our own actions, thoughts, feelings, and motivations, and insight into the roots of health and contentment.

The Center for Mindful Eating is a US-based 501(c)3 non-profit, established in May 2006. Our desire is to be a place of conversation, networking, and learning for professionals and individuals to explore and learn how to apply mindfulness practices to their relationships with food and eating.

Our Vision
We envision a world where all persons are treated with dignity and compassion and have the freedom, support, and resources to cultivate a peaceful relationship with food and body through the practice of mindful eating.

Our Mission
We are a global organization focused on mindful eating offering high-quality training and programs to diverse and interdisciplinary populations, based on scientific research and ancient wisdom. TCME is committed to building an equitable, inclusive, compassionate community supporting professionals practicing and teaching mindful eating.

Our ValuesLiberation
Compassion
Inner Wisdom
Nourishment
Belonging

Name: New England Tech SAM Chapter
Description: nterested in being part of an organization that takes business, challenge, teamwork, and success to the next level? New England Tech’s SAM Club focuses on management innovation and significant, meaningful opportunities for members to enhance their management skills. Through participation in programs and services designed to improve the professional quality of your knowledge, performance, and leadership ability, prepare to WIN while traveling nationally to compete against other university teams. The SAM team is open to all NEIT students, regardless of major. We’re ready. Are you?

Name: Entreprendre Ensemble Quimperlé
Description:
Entreprendre Ensemble est une association formée à l’initiative d’une vingtaine d’entrepreneurs et de chefs d’entreprise désireux de constituer un réseau professionnel solide au service de notre territoire.

Nous sommes convaincus qu’en mutualisant nos savoir-faire, en partageant nos expériences et en nous accompagnant mutuellement dans nos problématiques, nous renforçons non seulement nos activités, mais également celles de l’ensemble des acteurs économiques du Pays de Quimperlé.

NOS VALEURS : la collaboration, l’ouverture, des décisions collégiales
NOS OBJECTIFS : Favoriser les échanges, le partage et agir localement dans le Pays de Quimperlé
NOS ACTIONS : des réunions hebdomadaires, des tête-à-tête, des recommandations entre membres du goupe, des groupes de soutien
De nouveaux membres et partenaires nous rejoignent chaque semaine pour soutenir notre démarche et œuvrer à nos deux buts communs : renforcer le poids du Pays de Quimperlé dans le paysage régional, offrir aux habitants et aux entreprises locales des solutions de proximité dans un cadre de confiance.

Name: CONNECT Norfolk
Description:
Building Stronger Connections in Norfolk

The mission of CONNECT is to unite individuals to foster professional growth, encourage social interactions, and promote community involvement to improve the Norfolk area. 

Our emphasis centers on Empowering, Engaging, and Entertaining. We connect people to share ideas and information instantly, without barriers. We provide a platform for meaningful conversations.

Name: CEI - Club des Entrepreneurs et Industriels نادي المقاولين والصناعيين
Description:
Fondé en 1998, en qualité d’association locale, le CEI (ex CEIMI) a évolué vers le national en 2002.
La création du CEI (ex CEIMI) a été rendue possible, grâce à l’esprit d’initiative, d’une poignée d'opérateurs économiques de la région de la Mitidja, activant tous dans les différents secteurs de la production et convaincus que l'entreprise privée a un important rôle à jouer dans la création d'emplois et de valeur ajoutée en Algérie, qui, profitant de l’opportunité offerte par l’évolution vers une plus grande ouverture à l’initiative associative multiforme des lois algérienne régissant le champ associatif, au tout début des années 90, ont fondé "le Club des Entrepreneurs et Industriels de la Mitidja".
Constituer une force de dialogue et de concertation avec les pouvoirs publics pour apporter une contribution au développement économique de l’Algérie, fut la motivation à la création des membres fondateurs.
Aujourd’hui, le CEI (ex CEIMI) agit à incarner une Algérie qui tient à se développer et à s’ouvrir, pour se forger une place respectable, au sein de la grande sphère de l’économie mondiale.
La volonté de ses membres est de symboliser une Algérie qui bouge, qui évolue au même rythme que le monde développé, et qui œuvre à la densification de ses relations.

Name: TCR Europe
Description: TCR Europe is one of the leading touring car championships on the continent, offering thrilling, high-level competition across iconic circuits. Since 2016, the series has provided a platform for top teams and talented drivers to showcase their skills and passion. With strong manufacturer support, competitive grids, and international visibility, TCR Europe continues to grow as a key player in the world of motorsport.

Name: FAU Global Business Association
Description: FAU’s Global Business Association is a student-run organization that promotes undergraduate education in cross-cultural business issues and opportunities. By actively engaging in learning about international business, students are expected to become proficient in being cultural and economic citizens of the world. This is primarily achieved by engaging South Florida multinational organizations both in their own facilities and here at FAU. Activities include site visits to local multinational organizations, networking opportunities, cross-cultural presentations, and the opportunity to join in business case competitions. Since 2016 the organization has hosted numerous speakers from local organizations, as well as cross-cultural events with leading researchers from our own faculty here at FAU.

Name: Steuerberaterverband Sachsen e.V.
Description:
Sind Sie Berufsangehörige und benötigen Unterstützung bei aktuellen zukunftsentscheidenden Herausforderungen? Melden Sie sich bei uns: Wir beraten Sie gerne!

 Zusammen mit 14 weiteren deutschen Kollegialverbänden und mit über 1100 Mitgliedern (darunter Steuerberater, Steuerbevollmächtigte, Wirtschaftsprüfer, vereidigte Buchprüfer und Berufsgesellschaften) repräsentieren wir eine breite Palette von Berufsangehörigen in den steuerberatenden und wirtschaftsprüfenden Berufen.

 Unser Ziel ist die persönliche wie unternehmerische Entscheidungsfreiheit des Berufsstandes.

Wir setzen uns intensiv für die Interessen unserer Mitglieder ein und mit unserer engagierten Arbeit schaffen wir eine solide Grundlage für eine freie, wirtschaftlich gefestigte und zukunftssichere Berufsausübung für unsere Mitglieder.

Überzeugen Sie sich von der Qualität unserer Argumente und der Intensität unserer Interessenvertretung. Der Steuerberaterverband Sachsen unterstützt die Entscheidungsfreiheit der Steuerberater bei der kontinuierlichen Weiterbildung.

Als anerkannte Steuerberater-Fortbildungsinstanz fördern wir die Beratungsqualität im steuerberatenden Beruf mit umfassenden Bildungs- und Qualifizierungsprogrammen.

Das Fortbildungsprogramm wurde mit unserem im Jahr 1992 gegründeten Steuerberaterinstitut realisiert.

Name: KCL Luxury Industry Society
Description:
Welcome to the King's College London's Luxury Industry Society!

We are dedicated to fostering an understanding of the global luxury industry and providing students with unique networking opportunities. The society's mission is to offer a platform where students can engage with the intricate world of luxury, encompassing sectors such as jewelery, hospitality, fashion, fine arts, and high-end consumer goods. Through a series of educational events, workshops, and speaker sessions, the society seeks to enhance students' knowledge of key trends, challenges, and innovations within the luxury market.

By inviting distinguished professionals from renowned luxury brands and businesses, the society facilitates direct interaction between students and industry leaders. These events serve not only as learning experiences but also as networking opportunities, helping students build valuable connections that can contribute to their future careers.

The King's College London's Luxury Industry Society is committed to creating an environment where students from various academic backgrounds can explore their interest in luxury and gain insights into its complex dynamics. Whether aspiring to work within the industry or simply seeking a broader understanding of luxury as a global economic force, members are provided with the knowledge and resources to better navigate this exclusive and ever-evolving sector.

Name: Grant Professionals Association - Arizona Founding Chapter
Description: GPA is a nonprofit membership group that builds and supports an international community of grant professionals committed to serving the greater public good by practicing the highest ethical and professional standards. The Arizona Founding Chapter strives to implement these ideals throughout Arizona by providing opportunities for professional development, networking, and mentoring for our members and the greater community. The GPA follows a strict Code of Ethics in dealing with the grant profession. All grant professionals are held to these standards and agree to follow the Code of Ethics as members of the GPA.

Name: Gymnasieskolernes Lederforening - GymLF
Description:
Gymnasieskolernes Lederforening (GymLF) er en forening for ledere i gymnasiet. GymLF er en underafdeling af Djøf, så GymLF-medlemmer er også medlemmer af Djøf.

Vores medlemmer er rektorer, vicerektorer, uddannelsesledere og pædagogiske ledere i gymnasieskolens STX og 2-årige HF samt medarbejdere i ledende stillinger på gymnasieområdet i Børne- og Undervisningsministeriet. 

GymLF varetager medlemmernes interesser, når det handler om karriere, efteruddannelse, administration, arbejdsforhold, arbejdsmiljø samt løn og pension. GymLF arbejder for at sikre vores medlemmer de bedste mulige vilkår på alle de nævnte felter. 

Bestyrelsen i Djøf består af rektorer, vicerektorer og udannelsesledere fra hele landet. Se mere på gymlf.dk

Name: Centrul European de Informare și Dezvoltare
Description:
INSTITUTIE DE INTERES PUBLIC 

Suntem una dintre cele mai dinamice institutii de interes public, ne-am castigat aceasta reputatie inca din primii ani de la infiintare. Am reusit aceasta performata datorita unei echipe extraordinare, cu o capacitate de intelegere profunda a intereselor clientilor.    

VIZIUNEA NOASTRA 

Centrul European de Informare si Dezvoltare, prin serviciile de informare, consiliere, consultanta, analiza, redactare, organizare, implementare, reprezentare si asistare, sprijina persoanele fizice, companiile publice si private in demersurile acestora de a obtine o dezvoltare sustenabila.      

Anticipam nevoile clientilor nostri si le indeplinim asteptarile, fiind un partener de incredere  pe termen lung, tintand excelenta in serviciile juridice si mediere, eventimentelor, managementului si resurselor umane, carierei, dobandirea si redobandirea cetateniei, actelor si documentelor si traducerilor autorizate, tipizate si legalizate, prin profesionalim, dedicare si autodepasire.  

VALORILE NOASTRE  

Consideram ca valorile puternice reprezinta cheie unui parteneriat pe termen lung. Astefel alaturi de un cod de conduita  riguros, valorile noastre  se afla in centrul fiecarei decizii pe care o luam. Echipa Centrului European de Informare si Dezvoltare  pune in practica aceasta filozofie in activitatea de zi cu zi, construita in primul rand prin  respectarea a celor mai importante valori fundamentale: Excelenta, Integritatea, Respectarea partenerului, Satisfactia clientului si Implicarea sociala. 

PARTENERII NOSTRI

Tintand excelenta in serviciile juridice si mediere, eventimentelor, managementului si resurselor umane, carierei, dobandirea si redobandirea cetateniei, actelor si documentelor si traducerilor autorizate, tipizate si legalizate, prin profesionalim, dedicare si autodepasire. consideram ca in decursul timpului ne-am adaptat permanent activitatea si serviciile, venind in intampinarea nevoilor dumneavoastra.

Name: HumanaMente | Comunidad de Pensamiento
Description:
¿Cansados de "líderes" que hablan bonito pero no han pisado el terreno?
Nosotros también.

Por eso creamos HumanaMente. No somos una consultora con slides llenos de teorías. Somos diez personas que hemos liderado equipos reales, cometido errores reales, y aprendido a base de golpes.

Aquí no te vendemos fórmulas mágicas. Te invitamos a conversar con quien entiende que liderar duele, que la vulnerabilidad no es debilidad, y que los mejores equipos nacen cuando dejas de controlar y empiezas a confiar.

En nuestros CoffeeBreaks Virtuales compartimos lo que funciona, lo que no, y esas cosas que nadie cuenta en LinkedIn pero todos vivimos.

Si lideras desde la coherencia en lugar de la imagen, este es tu lugar.

Primera comunidad hispanohablante donde el liderazgo vuelve a ser humano.

Bienvenidos a HumanaMente: El poder que lo transforma todo.

Name: Fluxdock
Description:
Fluxdock is a collaborative competence network for cross-company collaboration and provides in-depth expertise in agile process management.

It enables its members to work effectively together in projects with shared principles, methods and tools. Through mutual exchanges our members empower themselves to innovate. Fluxdock provides the network, suitable methods, tools and excellent infrastructure for collaborative innovation - with a digital platform and office space in the Transitlager in Basel.

We believe that agile methods and methods of design thinking are best suited to promote collaboration and thereby innovation. An iterative approach, transparency, flexibility and trust are essential and can be lived by agile methods. Scrum provides a suitable framework for successful collaboration and innovation between companies. Fluxdock will therefore provide regular information, events, and offers on these methods in order to promote collaboration and innovation.

Name: Finance Régénérative Région Sud : ReFi PACA
Description:
ReFi PACA is a community where ecology, social innovation, and blockchain converge to create a regenerative future in Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur. Our strength lies in connection: we are a network of networks that catalyzes synergies between committed actors.

Our network addresses regional challenges: environmental degradation, Mediterranean issues, and social divides. We believe in the power of collaboration between blockchain experts, environmental project leaders, and social innovators to create sustainable solutions.
Our community life revolves around various events: networking events, training sessions, thematic conferences, afterworks, collective field actions, masterminds, webinars, festivals, etc.

Members engage according to their aspirations and expertise, particularly as:
*Impact project leaders (environmental or social)
*Tech & innovation experts (blockchain, AI, development)
*Mentors & advisors
*Territorial ambassadors
*Facilitators & coordinators
*Partners & investors
... and many other roles that naturally emerge according to community needs and individual talents.

Being part of ReFi PACA means joining an ever-evolving ecosystem where each member enriches and benefits from collective intelligence: new collaboration opportunities, resource and expertise sharing, access to a qualified network, skills development, increased project visibility. Our community is co-created by its members: its structure and activities continuously adapt to meet everyone's needs and aspirations.

Our collaborative approach relies on short action-reflection cycles, allowing us to experiment and learn together. Through collective power, we are building an ecosystem of social and environmental innovation, anchored in the realities of our region.

The Society was founded in 1953 and today has approximately 700 members. The Society represents Swedish gastroenterology at home and abroad.

Name: Kickstart Networking (Lancashire)
Description:
Kickstart Networking was established in early 2022 with the aim of running events for young or new professionals, a few years into their careers, who are looking to make business connections with others at a similar stage in their careers. It was born out of the feeling that many networking opportunities for junior professionals had been stunted by the pandemic and the rise of zoom networking so we committed to creating a new face to face networking group.

We're a friendly bunch who host down to earth events across Lancashire offering a platform to 'kickstart' your network over an activity or a few drinks. We try to take away the daunting feeling of having to stand in a crowded room and strike up a conversation - with our activities, chatting is easy.

These events are brought to you by the team at Farleys Solicitors alongside our event sponsors (if you are interested in sponsoring an upcoming event please let us know). For more information about Kickstart Networking, please contact Sophie Henrys on Sophie.Henrys@farleys.com.

Name: International Association for Official Statistics - IAOS
Description:
Founded in 1985, the International Association for Official Statistics (IAOS) is an esteemed international non-governmental organization and a specialized section of the International Statistical Institute (ISI). We are a vibrant community of both individuals and institutions with a deep-seated interest in the realm of official statistics.

At IAOS, we bridge the gap between the producers and users of official statistics, fostering a collaborative environment that promotes the understanding, advancement, and development of official statistics on a global scale. Our Executive Committee, elected biennially, steers us towards innovation and effectiveness in statistical services, with a keen focus on empowering developing nations.

Our Mission:
- Understanding and Advancement: We are dedicated to elevating the comprehension and progression of official statistics and related fields.
- Development and Internationality: We champion the growth of proficient official statistical services through our international network, encompassing users, researchers, and institutions.

Name: Century Men's Society
Description:
The Century Men's Society at Texas A&M is an organization consisting of 88 members. Guided by our four core pillars—Humility, Loyalty, Service, and Tradition—we are committed to fostering personal growth, mutual learning, and meaningful contributions. Our mission is to create a lasting impact both within the university community and beyond, preparing our members to lead with purpose throughout their lives.

At the heart of our organization lies a deep commitment to our philanthropy, Camp Kesem. Camp Kesem provides a transformative summer camp experience for children of all ages whose parents have been impacted by cancer—a cause that resonates profoundly with all of our members. To support this mission, our officers oversee Watermelon Bash, a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit that hosts an annual field-day-style event, with all proceeds benefiting Camp Kesem. Additionally, we organize individual fundraising campaigns and various events throughout the year to further contribute to the cause.

Beyond philanthropy, we enrich our members’ experiences by hosting several guest speakers each semester. These speakers share insights on diverse topics, inspiring members to embrace new ideas and continue exemplifying our pillars—Humility, Loyalty, Service, and Tradition—throughout their lives.

Name: Value Australia - a regional Capitals Coalition hub
ForestMe
Description:
Wij zijn geëvolueerd uit bos, aldus de Canadese hoogleraar bosecologie Suzanne Simard. Maar liefst 50% van ons DNA is hetzelfde als dat van een boom. Daarnaast zijn de fysieke structuur, de chemische stoffen en het neurale netwerk die betrokken zijn bij onze intelligentie ook te vinden in het ondergrondse myceliumnetwerk van een bos. Kortom: de natuurlijke intelligentie van het bos zit in ons. We moeten die kennis alleen weer ophalen door ons te verbinden met de natuur in onszelf. 

De inheemse volkeren hebben die kennis over hoe de wereld in elkaar zit vaak nog wel paraat. Als we die inheemse filosofie, die is gebaseerd op respect en wederkerigheid, combineren met onze Westerse wetenschappelijke feitenkennis van natuurlijke processen, kan het bos op een prachtige manier model staan voor hoe wij op een constructieve, duurzame manier kunnen samenleven met onze omgeving. 

ForestMe nodigt je uit om je weer te verbinden met “het bos in jezelf”, met je natuurlijke intelligentie. We inspireren je met verhalen over mensen die hun natuur volgen en daarmee het verschil maken. En we bieden ervaringen, inzichten en concrete handvatten vanuit de natuur en natuurlijke processen die je helpen om vanuit jouw essentie te leven én te handelen.

Name: LeSS Singapore
Description:
We’re a practitioner-led group exploring how to build better products and stronger organisations through the principles and practices of Large-Scale Scrum (LeSS).

Whether you're a product leader, agile coach, org designer, or team member navigating complexity at scale, LeSS Singapore offers a space to:
- Learn and share real-world experiences related to product and organisation development
- Connect with others shaping change in large-scale environments

Join us to challenge assumptions, spark new ideas, and co-create ways of working that are fit for humans while building for scale.

Name: Finance Régénérative Région Sud : ReFi PACA
Description:
ReFi PACA is a community where ecology, social innovation, and blockchain converge to create a regenerative future in Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur. Our strength lies in connection: we are a network of networks that catalyzes synergies between committed actors.

Our network addresses regional challenges: environmental degradation, Mediterranean issues, and social divides. We believe in the power of collaboration between blockchain experts, environmental project leaders, and social innovators to create sustainable solutions.
Our community life revolves around various events: networking events, training sessions, thematic conferences, afterworks, collective field actions, masterminds, webinars, festivals, etc.

Members engage according to their aspirations and expertise, particularly as:
*Impact project leaders (environmental or social)
*Tech & innovation experts (blockchain, AI, development)
*Mentors & advisors
*Territorial ambassadors
*Facilitators & coordinators
*Partners & investors
... and many other roles that naturally emerge according to community needs and individual talents.

Being part of ReFi PACA means joining an ever-evolving ecosystem where each member enriches and benefits from collective intelligence: new collaboration opportunities, resource and expertise sharing, access to a qualified network, skills development, increased project visibility. Our community is co-created by its members: its structure and activities continuously adapt to meet everyone's needs and aspirations.

Our collaborative approach relies on short action-reflection cycles, allowing us to experiment and learn together. Through collective power, we are building an ecosystem of social and environmental innovation, anchored in the realities of our region.

Name: National Association of Professional Organizers
Description:
The National Association of Productivity and Organizing Professionals (NAPO), formerly known as the National Association of Professional Organizers, is a non-profit professional organization that supports individuals and businesses in the organizing and productivity industry. Founded in 1985, NAPO serves as the leading voice of the industry, advocating for industry standards and ethics, education and certification, and networking and professional development opportunities.

With over 3,500 members worldwide, NAPO provides a platform for professional organizers, productivity consultants, and related professionals to connect, learn, and grow. NAPO also offers a variety of educational programs, conferences, and publications to help members stay informed and engaged in their profession.

As the leading advocate for the organizing and productivity industry, NAPO works to promote the importance of professional organizing and productivity consulting, and the impact these services can have on individuals and businesses. NAPO also serves as a resource for individuals and organizations seeking assistance with organizing and productivity-related issues, providing information, referrals, and guidance on best practices and industry standards.

Whether you're a professional organizer, productivity consultant, or related professional, NAPO offers a supportive community and a wealth of resources and opportunities to help you succeed in your profession. Join us today and become a part of the dynamic community of organizing and productivity professionals.

Name: IAF Italia
Description:
Promuoviamo in Italia la cultura della partecipazione e la pratica della facilitazione, promuovendo la crescita della comunità italiana dei facilitatori.

Siamo una comunità aperta a tutte le persone curiose o appassionate di facilitazione, sia che lo facciano di mestiere o che ne stiano solo iniziando a scoprire il potenziale. Riuniamo professionistə, ricercatorə, innovatorə, amministratorə pubblicə e chiunque senta il desiderio di condividere pratiche, apprendere insieme, e contribuire alla diffusione della facilitazione in Italia.

Facciamo parte di un network internazionale che valorizza il confronto tra contesti e culture diverse, offrendo spazi di crescita, scambio e collaborazione. Se credi che facilitare sia anche un modo per servire la società, sei nel posto giusto.

Per conoscere meglio la nostra comunità e scoprire come partecipare, siamo sempre felici di fare due chiacchiere.

Il Chapter italiano dell’Associazione Internazionale Facilitatori (IAF) è nato nel 2013 su iniziativa di Gian Carlo Manzoni e Gerardo de Luzenberger. Il Capitolo è attualmente coordinato da Rachel Malek e Stefano Di Maria.

Name: French Events Club
Description:
French Events Club – Créateur de réseau d’affaires 
Depuis plusieurs années, le French Events Club rassemble des entrepreneurs, dirigeants, indépendants et professionnels qui souhaitent développer leur business dans un cadre humain, structuré et dynamique.
Notre mission : créer des connexions puissantes, des opportunités concrètes et un écosystème dans lequel chaque membre peut progresser, collaborer et faire grandir son activité.

 Cap sur 2026 : une nouvelle étape
Le French Events Club se déploie désormais dans le Vaucluse et les Bouches-du-Rhône, avec l’ouverture de plusieurs clubs business adaptés aux besoins de chaque professionnel. Notre ambition est simple : offrir un réseau accessible, performant et fondé sur l’entraide, la visibilité et la croissance collective.

 Nos réseaux
Pour répondre aux différents styles de développement commercial, nous avons créé trois formats complémentaires :

 Lunch Network – un club convivial, sans engagement, alliant networking et déjeuner business.
 Business Connect – un réseau structuré, en partenariat avec WinOrWin, favorisant recommandations, outils digitaux et suivi d’activités.
 Business Compétition – un club élite avec classement, engagement fort, performance mesurée et dynamique de challenge.

 Des rencontres qui comptent
Chaque réunion combine : networking, échanges, actualités, partage d’expérience, gratitude, conférences et opportunités business.
À cela s’ajoutent :
 un afterwork mensuel dans les réseaux business
 un mega-afterwork trimestriel réunissant l’ensemble des clubs
 des événements thématiques pour créer toujours plus de synergies

 En développement :
 Club Alternance
 Club Business Sport
 Club 100% Femmes
 Club 100% Hommes

 Pourquoi rejoindre le French Events Club ?
Parce qu’ici, le réseau n’est pas seulement un lieu : c’est une vraie dynamique.
C’est un environnement où la confiance se construit, où les rencontres deviennent des opportunités, et où chacun peut trouver sa

Description: The California Indian Law Association, Inc. (“CILA”) is dedicated to enhancing the legal profession and Tribal jurisprudence in California. CILA promotes the study of Tribal jurisprudence and provides support to Indigenous students in their pursuit of the legal profession. CILA is dedicated to helping Tribes in California exercise self-determination, self-sufficiency, and to protect sovereignty.

Name: Marketing Club Bochum e.V.
Description:
Strategien, Instrumente, Erfahrungen

Der Marketing-Club Bochum wurde im Jahr 2000 von engagierten Bochumer Unternehmern und Unternehmen gegründet. Mittlerweile haben wir rund 130 Mitglieder aus Unternehmen unterschiedlichster Branchen.

Unser vorrangiges Ziel ist es, das Marketing-Management unserer Mitglieder zu fördern. Wir möchten stetig neue Impulse für eine nachhaltige, erfolgsorientierte Verbesserung des Marketings sowie der Dienstleistungs- und Produktgestaltung setzen. Dabei haben wir die Bedürfnisse der Kundinnen und Kunden unserer Mitgliedsunternehmen im Blick und legen vor allem großen Wert auf eine prosperierende Entwicklung der Region, aus der wir kommen.

Mit unserer ehrenamtlichen Arbeit wollen wir die Wettbewerbsfähigkeit des Standortes “Mittleres Ruhrgebiet” verbessern und sichtbar machen. Daher vergeben wir einmal im Jahr auch den Marketing Award sowie den Kreativ Award für herausragende Marketingarbeit und maßgebende Kreativleistungen

Es geht uns vor allem um Marketing!
Aber was heisst das genau? Was macht eigentlich der Marketing-Club? Fragen, die wir immer wieder hören und deshalb gerne hier zusammengefasst beantworten wollen.

Grundsätzlich ist der Marketing-Club Bochum zwar ein eigenständiger Verein, jedoch über den Deutschen Marketing-Verband in ein Netzwerk anderer Clubs deutschlandweit eingebunden. In der direkten Umgebung sind es die Nachbarclubs in Dortmund, Essen und Duisburg bzw. Südwestfalen und Bergisch Land. In einem Radius von 80 Kilometern kann man auch Düsseldorf, Köln/Bonn, Münster-Onsabrück und Krefeld noch nennen. Insgesamt gibt es damit in unserem direkten Umfeld eine Dichte an Clubs, die ihresgleichen sucht. Das Schöne daran ist die Gemeinschaft.

Name: Global Institute of Organisational Neuroscience (GION).
Description:
The Global Institute for Organisational Neuroscience’s (GION) chief aim is to provide a rigorous, relevant, and integrative translation of neuroscience into Industrial psychology, and Human Capital practice.
By bringing together experts from various fields, GION aims to develop a robust and evidence-based approach to applied organisational neuroscience. This approach will help professionals understand how the brain functions in relation to organisational behavior, decision-making, leadership, and employee well-being.
Through its research initiatives, educational programs, and collaborations with industry leaders, GION is dedicated to advancing the field of applied organizational neuroscience. By providing professionals with the necessary tools and knowledge, GION aims to empower them to leverage the insights from neuroscience to drive organisational success.
Talks about: #appliedorganisational neuroscience #wellness # neuroscience research #flourishing #leadership #mental health #RigourandRelevance

Name: ABEA - Associação Brasileira de Engenheiros de Alimentos
Description:
A ABEA é uma entidade civil, sem fins lucrativos, focada na valorização dos profissionais da área. Nossa missão é promover e apoiar o desenvolvimento dos engenheiros de alimentos, contribuir para a melhoria da qualidade de vida dos profissionais e defender seus interesses junto aos setores produtivos e à sociedade. Trabalhamos para fortalecer a profissão e proporcionar um ambiente que estimule o crescimento dos nossos associados.

Nossa visão é ser a principal referência para engenheiros de alimentos e estudantes da área, tanto no Brasil quanto internacionalmente. Buscamos sempre criar condições que incentivem a inovação e o desenvolvimento contínuo dos profissionais, conectando-os às necessidades do mercado e promovendo sua inserção nas mais diversas áreas de atuação.

Agimos com ética e transparência em todas as nossas relações, mantendo sempre o respeito e o diálogo aberto com membros, parceiros e a sociedade em geral. A ABEA acredita que a cooperação e a comunicação são fundamentais para o avanço da Engenharia de Alimentos e para o fortalecimento de seus profissionais.

Com uma trajetória de dedicação à área, seguimos comprometidos com a evolução da Engenharia de Alimentos e com o reconhecimento da importância dessa profissão para o desenvolvimento tecnológico, a inovação e a segurança alimentar.

Name: Gulf Coast Eval Network
Description:
GCEval is a community that champions high quality evaluation through capacity building, peer learning, professional development, and networking.

Our vision is that high quality, evaluation and systematic learning systems contribute to a sustainable, equitable and thriving Gulf Coast region.

Our Values:

1. Inspire growth
- Ask meaningful questions of ourselves and of those with whom we work
- Build institutional self-awareness & cultural competence 
- Reflect about whether our actions are improving the lives of people around us


2. Nurture Partnership
- Promote an atmosphere of partnership and encourage connections
- Value shared knowledge, mutual learning opportunities, and collaborative problem solving
- Appreciate and respect the strengths and diverse approaches of all members


3. Choose Integrity
- Elevate and amplify marginalized experiences to tell stories
- Advance decision-making that is clear and informed by evidence as well as lived experiences, and inspires action to do what is just 
- Further the knowledge to break from the confines of harmful routine

Name: Her Voice Project
Description:
Her Voice Project is a compassionate community dedicated to amplifying the voices of women living with chronic illnesses. We provide a safe, inclusive space where women can connect, share their stories, and find strength through mutual understanding.

Our Mission
We aim to break the isolation often associated with chronic illness by fostering meaningful connections and empowering women to express their unique experiences. By raising awareness, advocating for change, and cultivating support, we create a platform for women to thrive together.

What We Offer
Connection: Build relationships with women who truly understand your journey.
Support: Access resources, discussions, and encouragement to navigate chronic illness.
Empowerment: Share your voice, inspire others, and be part of a movement that prioritizes inclusivity and understanding.


Join Us
Whether you're here to share your story, seek support, or build awareness, Her Voice welcomes you. Together, we can amplify our voices and create a world where no woman feels alone in her journey with chronic illness.

Name: Fort Worth A&M Club
Description:
Howdy!
The Fort Worth/Tarrant County A&M Club is considered one of the largest A&M clubs in the world by the Association of Former Students. This status results from the number of Aggies in Tarrant County (over 14,000), as well as the level of support our Club provides to the Association and to Texas A&M University. Our Club works closely with the Association in promoting the Aggie Network, supporting Texas A&M and providing scholarships to deserving students. We hold one of the largest off-campus Musters, and ever year at Coach's Night conduct what to our knowledge is the largest Silent Auction of any A&M club worldwide. Proceeds of the Silent Auction and our other events benefit the Club's scholarship fund and other Club endeavors.
Our primary goal is to raise scholarship funds for area students to attend Texas A&M, as well as to foster the Aggie Spirit within Tarrant County through networking, activities and events, and community service. Over the last ten years, the Club has provided over $110,000 in academic scholarships. The Club also financially supports numerous organizations on the Texas A&M campus.
The Club was officially chartered by the Association in 1931 and is a non-profit/tax-exempt 501(c)(3) organization.

Believing in the power of collaboration and the exchange of ideas, Bangladesh HR offers members access to exclusive events, workshops, and seminars led by industry experts. Whether an established executive or an emerging leader, Bangladesh HR offers a supportive network to help achieve professional goals.

Join us in our mission to shape the future of corporate excellence in Bangladesh. Together, we can build a stronger, more connected corporate community.

Name: Epsilon Nu Tau Professional Entrepreneurship Fraternity - Alpha Chapter | University of Dayton

In early 2008, a group of eight undergraduate students from the University of Dayton set out to bring entrepreneurial brotherhood to the collegiate level. The founding fathers wanted to create a network of entrepreneurs that would be connected by the ideals of brotherhood and would live by the four ideals of the fraternity. Later that year on April 18, 2008, Epsilon Nu Tau, the Nation's First Entrepreneurial Fraternity was established. ENT is based upon a professional and entrepreneurial mindset, with fellowship and community as its backbone.

The Alpha Chapter of Epsilon Nu Tau is a dynamically diverse group of undergraduate students at the University of Dayton who are united by a common entrepreneurial approach in all aspects of life. By creating opportunities to enhance personal strengths in a professional setting, members embrace entrepreneurship in order to challenge business and societal norms and set themselves apart as leaders in the community.

Name: Santa Barbara Barristers
Description:
Since 1923, the Santa Barbara Barristers (also Barristers Club of Santa Barbara) is a county-wide, professional, nonprofit association comprised of attorneys in their first six years of practice. It's a great way to create community within the Santa Barbara County legal community, meet your local legal neighbors, and share in the start of our legal careers with other newer attorneys.

Our mission is to foster fellowship and professional development among newly admitted lawyers, often by providing networking opportunities, educational events, and social activities. SBB's mission is to also promote diversity and inclusion in the legal profession by welcoming students, newly admitted lawyers, and long-practicing lawyers. Santa Barbara Barristers also promotes and participates in activities benefiting other non-profit organizations and our local community as a whole.

Law students, first-year attorneys, and all other practicing attorneys are invited to join. If you have any ideas, news, or information to share please contact us.

Name: SHH Resources Holdings Berhad
Description:
SHH Group began its journey as a furniture manufacturer, specializing in high-quality solid wood furniture for over 40 years. From our humble beginnings in 1981, we steadily grew step by step into a powerhouse corporation and proudly listed on the Main Board of Bursa Malaysia. Our furniture, particularly for bedrooms and dining rooms, is now sold to international markets, including the United States and the Middle East. Over time, our commitment to quality and innovation has helped us evolve into a company with a diverse range of business interests.

As time goes by, SHH Group is proud to be a multi-business conglomerate, with a presence in food manufacturing, property development, and plantation, in addition to our furniture business. Our expansion into these sectors allows us to diversify our portfolio and create new opportunities for growth. With a strong foundation in manufacturing, we are leveraging our expertise to make a significant impact in the food industry, develop valuable properties, and contribute to sustainable plantation practices. This growth reflects our vision for a future where SHH Group continues to thrive and lead in multiple industries.

In line with our vision for long-term success, we are actively working to meet the criteria for the FTSE4Good. This reflects our commitment to adopting global sustainability and governance standards in our business practices. Through this approach, we aim to foster responsible growth across industries while making a positive impact on the community and the environment.

Name: EthicsCOM
Description:
EthicsCOM è una start up innovativa di consulenti e comunicatori della sostenibilità ambientale economica e sociale.
EthicsCOM nasce come fondazione per l’etica della comunicazione già nel 2015 in risposta alla crescente esigenza di tutela delle imprese e dei consumatori dalle varie forme di pubblicità ingannevoli e di greenwashing presenti quotidianamente sui media nazionali ed internazionali. Offre il primo e unico servizio integrato e multidisciplinare di analisi della comunicazione pubblicitaria, con competenza legale, scientifica, marketing, semiotico-semantica, linguistica, sociopsicologica, etica e sostenibile. Operando in cinque settori, con particolare esperienza e competenza in quelli del Food and Beverage e del Consumer Goods.
PERCHÉ ETHICSCOM?
•	Per contrastare le fake news e il greenwashing
•	Per tutelare imprese e consumatori
•	Per aiutare le imprese a raggiungere i loro obiettivi di sostenibilità ambientale, economica e sociale nella comunicazione
•	Per contribuire al raggiungimento degli Obiettivi dell'Agenda ONU 2030
COME LAVORIAMO
EthicsCOM opera seguendo il certiCOM, lo schema di analisi attraverso il quale ogni impresa è in grado di individuare, in relazione alla categoria merceologica di appartenenza, i parametri di prodotto/sistema/mercato realmente vantabili e comunicabili nell’ambito dell’etica e della sostenibilità per raggiungere gli Obiettivi dell’Agenda ONU 2030 e di richiedere un attestato di conformità di quanto vantato.
COSA OFFRE ETHICSCOM
•	Pareri multidisciplinari. Essi verificano l'ammissibilità, veridicità, conformità, efficacia ed eticità dei parametri degli alberi vantabili e/o vantati e comunicabili e/o comunicati su ogni forma e media di comunicazione.
•	Progetti multisciplinari. Esso consistono nell’ideazione, creazione e realizzazione ex novo di CLAIM, messaggi e testi informativo-pubblicitari che si differenziano con quelli concorrenti.

Name: QRC e.V., Qualitätsring Coaching und Beratung e.V.
Description:
Über uns - das ist der Berufsverband QRC e.V.
Dem Qualitätsring Coaching und Beratung e.V. ist die Coaching-Haltung wesentlich für die Profession Coach. Wir setzen uns unter anderem dafür ein, dass Coaching und Beratung sowohl von Empathie, Arbeit auf Augenhöhe, wie auch von einem Grundverständnis für Ethik, Kompetenzerwerb und Aufgabe im gesellschaftlichen Kontext gekennzeichnet sind. 

Der Zweck des Vereins ist die Förderung, das Etablieren und der Erhalt von Qualitätsstandards für Coaching als wissenschaftlich fundierte und psychologisch basierte Methode sowie die Professionalisierung des Coachings als eine Form der psychologischen Beratung. 

Der Verein hat in diesem Zusammenhang die Aufgabe, in den Berufsfeldern Coaching und Beratung die Aus-, Fort- und Weiterbildung in Praxis, Forschung und Lehre zu fördern und weiterzuentwickeln.

QRC-Historie: 
Bereits seit 2005 engagieren wir uns zur Profession Coaching im RTC (Roundtable der Coachingverbände). Am 1. März 2009 gründeten wir den QRC als eingetragenen Verein. Der QRC e.V. ist Gründungsmitglied und Mitglied im März 2020 gegründeten Dachverband RTC e.V. 

Im Jahr 2021 wurde der QRC e.V. als Berufsverband anerkannt und seit 2022 sind wir auch Mitglied im FWW, Forum Werteorientierung in der Weiterbildung e.V.

Heute sind wir stolz darauf, dass seit Oktober 2023 alle unsere zertifizierten Coaches ab Status Coach QRC, neben den eigenen Qualitätsstandards, auch die hohen Qualitätsstandards des Dachverbandes RTC e.V. erfüllen und damit das Siegel "Zertifizierter Coach RTC", "Certified Coach RTC" oder "Coach RTC" nutzen dürfen. 

Coachfinder für die Zertifizierten Coaches des QRC:

https://qrc-verband.de/qrc-coachfinder

Mitglied/ Zertifizierter Coach werden, als Interessent dabei sein oder Peergroups besuchen? 

Oder als Fort- und Weiterbildungsinstitut eigene Angebote zertifizieren lassen durch unsere CCE-Kommission? Wir freuen uns auf Dich!

www.qrc-verband.de

Name: Antoniem
Description:
Antoniem was born in 1948 as Ton Voortman in Rotterdam, where he graduated from the Academy of Visual Arts. After a career as an independent graphic designer and illustrator, he fully focused on sculpting in 2005. He works alternately in his studios in The Netherlands and France. 

The woman, her clothes and their symbiosis have a crucial place in his work. He exhibits regularly and his sculptures are included in various corporate and private collections, both nationally and internationally. In 2019 he starts experimenting with elementary shapes under the name Antoniem. The result is unique sculptures and installations, executed in various materials.

Name: PM4NGOs - Hub Portugal
Description:
Elaboração e gestão de projetos de impacto socioambiental - ensino, boas práticas e certificações.

PM4NGOs é uma organização global, presente em 176 países, que atua com formação e certificação em gestão de projetos para o desenvolvimento sustentável e impacto socioambiental. Ajuda profissionais e empresas a aplicarem boas práticas para elaboração, planeamento e gestão desses projetos. 
Iniciado em 2022, Portugal é o primeiro Hub da Europa. A Profª Drª Irene Ciccarino representa o Hub, que tem a missão de apoiar alunos e profissionais no desenvolvimento de suas carreiras para contribuir para o desenvolvimento de padrões que moldam o futuro da profissão. Esse processo é realizado por meio da partilha de experiências e feedbacks de organizações locais, profissionais, universidades e estudantes. O Hub também auxilia o processo de autorização de novos formadores com o intuito de ampliar a rede e fortalecer as boas práticas de gestão de projetos desenvolvimento sustentável e impacto socioambiental.

Conheça as certificações e baixe os manuais em português diretamente no site www.pm4ngos.org

- Project Dpro: Fundamentos da elaboração e gestão de projetos de impacto, adotados por muitas organizações sociais pelo mundo.

- Project DPro+ practiotioner: certificação prática de formação continuada que consiste em 3 seções de aprendizagem: Desenvolvimento Profissional, Aprendizagem Informal e Retribuição. Duração máxima de 1 (um) ano. Pré-requisito: certificação project Dpro e acesso à comunidade Dpro+.

- Program Dpro: relaciona-se com a estratégia das organizações sociais e a maneira de atingir os seus objetivos, de maneira coordenada, a partir de seus projetos.

- MEAL Dpro: padrão de controlo da gestão e aprendizagem para uma gestão de projetos mais efetiva.

- Finance Dpro: padrão para melhorar as finanças das organizações, tornar prestações de conta mais efetivas e promover a sustentabilidade de seus resultados.

Faça parte e ajude a mudar o mundo, um projeto por vez.

Missão

Visão

Name: CFDT - Syndicat Chimie Energie Provence Corse
Description:
Syndicat Chimie Énergie Provence Corse – CFDT 
 Provence - Corse | Syndicalisme reformiste|  Engagement pour les salariés

Nous sommes le premier syndicat interprofessionnel en France, engagés auprès des salariés des secteurs de la chimie, de l’énergie et de leurs industries connexes en Provence et en Corse.

 Qui représentons-nous ?
 Les travailleurs de l'industrie chimique, pétrochimique, de l'énergie, du gaz, de l'électricité, des industries pharcieutiques et cosmétiques, du caoutchouc, de la plasturgie, du verre, du papier-carton et de la navigation de plaisance.
 Les salariés en CDI, CDD, alternance, intérim et toutes les formes d'emploi.
 Tous ceux qui veulent être écoutés, défendus et accompagnés dans leur quotidien professionnel.

 Nos missions ?
 Défendre vos droits : conditions de travail, salaires, temps de travail.
 Peser dans les décisions : négociations d’entreprise, accords collectifs, CSE, commissions.
 Accompagner et former : soutien juridique, formation syndicale, montée en compétences.
 Préparer l’avenir : transition énergétique, avenir du travail, évolution des métiers.

 Un syndicalisme de terrain et d’avenir
Nous allons là où sont les salariés : dans les entreprises, sur le terrain, dans les festivals, les écoles, les associations… Parce que le syndicalisme ne se limite pas aux murs de l’entreprise, nous portons la voix des jeunes, des travailleurs précaires et de ceux qui veulent un monde du travail plus juste et plus durable.

 Envie de rejoindre le mouvement ?
 Contacte-nous pour échanger, adhérer ou simplement en savoir plus !
 Suis-nous pour ne rien rater de notre action !

Name: FS3D
Description:
La FS3D est un organisme qui représente toutes les entreprises de 3D. Nous avons pour objectif d’accompagner, d’encadrer et de faire monter en compétences les professionnels. Pour parvenir à encadrer la profession, la FS3D met en place un label.

La FS3D souhaite mettre en relation les clients particuliers et les clients professionnels avec les prestataires 3D. En effet, nous référençons de manière claire et pratique les entreprises de lutte antiparasitaire qui sont à la fois sérieuses et agréés (Certibiocide).

De cette façon, la FS3D se porte garante des entreprises prestation de services qui interviennent chez vous. Ainsi, si une entreprise ne répond plus, ou n’arrive pas à régler votre problème, la FS3D vous envoie un technicien pour finir l’intervention. De même, si vous avez un différend avec un professionnel référencés par nos soins, la FS3D interviendra pour régler le problème et défendre votre situation.

Name: BDB - Bund Deutscher Baumeister, Architekten und Ingenieure | Landesverband Hamburg
Description:
Der BDB vertritt mit seinen rund 8.000 Mitgliedern die Interessen von Architekt:innen und Ingenieur:innen.
Er ist der größte Zusammenschluss dieser Berufsgruppen in Deutschland. Der BDB steht für das integrale, digitale und klimagerechte Planen und Bauen und damit für einen kreativen, innovativen und ganzheitlichen Ansatz des Bauens unter Mitwirkung aller am Planungsprozess beteiligten Fachdisziplinen.

Name: EPMN Alumni

* Het verbinden van bedrijven en onderwijsinstellingen
* Project- en programmamanagement
* Advies over opleiding en ontwikkeling aan organisaties
* Advies over duurzame inzetbaarheid aan organisaties
* Loopbaan coaching

Name: Pamplin Student Collective
Description:
Founded in 2005 and formerly known as PMDC, we are a student-led organization committed to cultivating future leaders in professional spaces. We equip students with the cultural awareness, adaptability, and leadership skills needed to excel in an increasingly interconnected and global workforce. Through collaborative initiatives, professional development, and community engagement, we prepare our members to lead with confidence, integrity, and purpose.

Each year, we host the Annual Pamplin Conference and Case Competition, where top corporations lead workshops and share workplace insights. We aim to create opportunities, encourage collaboration, and spotlight a wide range of perspectives within the Pamplin College of Business and beyond. The Pamplin Student Collective works to ensure every student feels connected and valued in both local and global communities.

Name: TCR UK
Description: Providing the perfect platform in the UK Motorsport market for drivers and teams  looking to make the step up in Touring Car Racing and the exciting world of TCR Competition

Name: Red Empresarial de Jaén
Description:
La “Red Empresarial de Jaén” nace con la clara

empresarial diferente.

Sus integrantes buscan:
