Name: AI Pioneers Club
Description: Founded in 2024, AI Pioneers Club is a trusted community of AI thinkers and builders across Denver and Boulder. We're not just another tech meetup—we're a curated mix of practitioners, entrepreneurs, educators, and product leaders shaping the future of AI through real-world experimentation and shared learning.

Name: Manitoba Association of Home Economists
Description:
The Manitoba Association of Home Economists (MAHE) represents over 180 home economists throughout the province of Manitoba in Canada.  Members work in all areas of the public, non-profit and private sectors to assist people in improving their quality of life.

MAHE is governed by a 12 member Board of Directors that sets the strategic direction of the association and administers The Professional Home Economists Act.

The Professional Home Economists Act, passed in 1990, recognizes the right of qualified members to use the Professional Home Economist (PHEc) designation. This registered status provides for self-regulation via an established code of professional conduct.

Name: Canadian Jewish Law Students Association
Description: We are a group of Jewish law students from law schools across Canada with the aim of connecting Jews in the legal field and representing Jewish law students nationwide.

Name: WiseMD
Description:
WiseMD biedt workshops, externe begeleiding en interim management ter ontzorging en versterking van vakgroepen en andere medische teams.

Wat maakt WiseMD anders?

-Het schort vaak niet aan goede ideeën, helaas blijft het vaak steken in de uitvoering. Wij vertellen niet hoe het moet, maar faciliteren het team waardoor het wél lukt. Sneller en met minder inspanning. 

-Wij kijken naar wat er al goed gaat en helpen daarop voort te bouwen. En we maken dingen graag eenvoudiger, niet ingewikkelder (Safety II).
 Wij spreken de taal van medisch specialisten en begrijpen de dynamiek binnen en tussen vakgroepen.

-Wij zien de menselijke en bedrijfsmatige kant als één onlosmakelijk geheel.  En onze begeleiding en adviezen sluiten direct aan bij de praktijk.

-Wij weten wat er speelt in de ziekenhuiswereld.

- Wij hebben een groot netwerk aan specialisten, die we naar behoefte kunnen inzetten.

Name: OneChiropractic
Description:
At ONEchiropractic.org, we are on a mission to revolutionize the world of wellness through the transformative power of chiropractic care. With a commitment to holistic health and a global vision, we bring together a community dedicated to elevating lives and fostering well-being.

About Us:

 Empowering Health: Our passion lies in empowering individuals to embrace optimal health and well-being through chiropractic practices. We believe that a holistic approach to wellness leads to a life of vitality and balance.

 Global Impact: Operating on a global scale, ONEchiropractic.org is a hub for chiropractors, wellness professionals, and enthusiasts worldwide. We strive to create a network that transcends borders, fostering collaboration and knowledge-sharing on a global platform.

What Sets Us Apart:

 Community-Centric Approach: We believe in the strength of community. Our platform facilitates connections, collaboration, and the exchange of ideas, creating a supportive environment for personal and professional growth within the chiropractic community.

 Innovation in Wellness: ONEchiropractic.org is at the forefront of innovation in the wellness industry. We embrace cutting-edge practices, share insightful knowledge, and champion advancements that contribute to the evolution of chiropractic care.

Why Connect With Us:

 Educational Resources: Access a wealth of educational resources, from the latest industry trends to in-depth articles and research. Stay informed and inspired as we navigate the evolving landscape of chiropractic wellness.

 Networking Opportunities: Join a thriving community of like-minded individuals, from seasoned chiropractors to aspiring wellness advocates. Our platform provides networking opportunities, fostering connections that span the globe.

 Collaborate for Impact: ONEchiropractic.org is more than a platform; it's a movement. Collaborate with us to make a meaningful impact on the world of wellness. Together, we can shape a healt

Name: Unalome Project
Description:
Unalome Project is dedicated to guiding individuals who are ready to break free from the conventional path and reconnect with their true selves. We offer a range of transformative experiences—including workshops, retreats, coaching, and online programs—that go beyond typical self-help. Our approach is rooted in confronting the deeper truths, unraveling the layers of expectation, and empowering you to lead with authenticity.

For those seeking meaningful change, Unalome Project provides the tools, support, and space to rediscover what truly matters, without the noise of the superficial.

Name: UP Business La Rochelle
Description:
Tu es entrepreneur(se), directeur(trice), commercial(e) et tu veux te créer un réseau pro, échanger, partager et développer ton business : rejoins nous !

Nous nous réunissons toutes les deux semaines, dans un lieu différent, pour pouvoir échanger ensemble. Le Club organise également des évènements ponctuels au cours de l'année. 

 Vous souhaitez nous rejoindre ? Participer à une réunion ? Plus d’infos en MP ou par email : upbusinesslr@gmail.com

Name: DinRevisor
Description: DinRevisor er et faglig samarbejde blandt flere mindre revisionsvirksomheder, rundt om i landet. Vi er et fællesskab, der arbejder på at sikre, at de små revisionsvirksomheder også kan eksistere, i en branche med høje krav til etik, faglighed, kontroller mv. DinRevisor samler viden og sikrer at kvalitetsstyring sker efter høje standarder.

Name: Corporate Law and Financial Regulation Organization at USC
Description: Corporate Law and Financial Regulation Association (CLFRA) is a student-led organization at the University of Southern California. CLFRA offers opportunities for students to explore the intersections between business and law through speaker events, networking, and workshops.

Name: Cardozo Fashion Law Society
Description: Cardozo Fashion Law Society is a student-run organization at Cardozo School of Law dedicated to exploring the intersection of law and fashion. The society offers a platform for students to engage with the dynamic and evolving field of fashion law through lectures, panels, and networking events with industry professionals. It aims to foster a deeper understanding of legal issues related to fashion, including intellectual property, trademark protection, and contract negotiations while providing valuable opportunities for career development and industry connections.

Name: Federation of Canada's Professional Chemists
Description: The Federation of Canada’s Professional Chemists/Fédération des chimistes professionnels du Canada (FCPC) was established at an inaugural annual general meeting held in Vancouver on June 1, 2014. The founding members were six provincial organizations, the associations of the chemical profession of Ontario, Alberta, Saskatchewan, British Columbia, l’Ordre des chimistes du Québec and the Nova Scotia Chemical Society. Together they represent the interests of over 4,200 chemists across Canada.

Name: ITE Northern California
Description:
The Institute of Transportation Engineers (ITE) is an international organization with nearly 17,000 members in 92 countries who are focused on transportation and traffic engineering and planning. Members come from public agencies, private firms, academia, and transportation-equipment manufacturers and suppliers.

ITE helps with research, planning, design, implementation, operation, policy development and management for all modes of ground transportation. Through its products and services, ITE promotes professional development of its members, supports and encourages education, stimulates research, develops public awareness programs and serves as a conduit for exchange of professional information.

The ITE NorCal Section is part of the ITE’s Western District, and includes public-sector, private-sector and student members from the Sacramento area north to the Oregon border. It is the “go to” resource when Northern California is looking for contacts and information to address transportation issues and challenges.

Name: FIOPA
Description:
La FIOPA è la Federazione Interregionale degli Ordini degli Ingegneri del Piemonte e della Valle d'Aosta.
Attualmente gli Ordini aderenti sono Alessandria, Asti, Biella, Cuneo, Torino, Verbano Cusio Ossola e Aosta.

Name: Podiatry Association (Singapore)
Description:
Podiatry Association (Singapore) was first established in 1994 as Singapore Podiatry Group with the aim to be the platform for local podiatrists to share ideas, and establish minimum standards of practice and a common code of conduct. 

On 21 April 1997, PA(S) was formally registered as a society. Today, we are the professional association for podiatrists recognised by the Ministry of Health in Singapore.

Name: Asociace mladých chemiků
Description:
Asociace mladých chemiků (AMCH) je organizací zaměřující se na propagaci chemie, její rozvoj a navazování nových kontaktů mezi mladými vědci ve všech chemických oblastech. 

AMCH je divizí mladých České společnosti chemické a spojujeme chemické vědce mladší 35 let z celého Česka. 

Věříme, že mladí chemici jsou budoucností vědy. Pojďme ji budovat společně. 

1) snažíme se být aktivní na sociálních sítích
2) pořádáme setkání spojení s prohlídkou laboratoří na různých VŠ
3) spolupracujeme s Zeptej se vědce
4) jsme hlavní organizátoři konference s názvem CoNFeReNCe: Rosteme s chemií, jejíž 2. ročník se bude konat v červnu 2024 na Přírodovědecké fakultě Univerzity Karlovy

Name: World Association for Positive and Transcultural Psychotherapy
Description: This is the official page of Positive Psychotherapy (PPT after N. Peseschkian, since 1977), and of the World Association for Positive and Transcultural Psychotherapy (WAPP) - an international NGO - with 2,900 members in 64 countries, founded in 1996.

Name: Network For Success Online
Description:
Welcome to Network For Success, was created for entrepreneurs, by entrepreneurs. Our community is designed to serve, support and help others succeed. We accomplish this in a variety of ways. We host a  monthly Zoom business networking event --- which I know, sounds BORING but it's not I promise! Our format is unique and includes introductions, break-out rooms for more intimate connecting, hand-picked guest speakers that touch on topics relevant to every business, spotlight sponsors, door prizes and more! 

Whether you are a new entrepreneur or a seasoned veteran we welcome you and are excited to have you attend one of our rents and engage with our community!

Name: V-ABI – Verband für Arbeit, Bildung und Integration
Description: Als Berufsverband unterstützen wir arbeitsmarktliche Organisationen, Bildungsunternehmen und Sozialbetriebe in Berlin und Brandenburg durch Interessenvertretung, Vernetzung sowie interessante Projekte. Unsere rund 50 Mitglieder machen breit gefächerte Angebote für arbeitslose Menschen mit dem Ziel, soziale Teilhabe zu ermöglichen und die Integration in den ersten Arbeitsmarkt zu erleichtern.

Name: Brussels Creative Workers
Description:
Brussels Creative Workers is a collective for creative workers in Brussels. We want to look after each other as we live and work in the city.

We are a network for anybody working on creative things who wants to improve our collective working conditions.

So far we've hosted networking events and held trainings on how to get set up as a freelancer in Belgium. We have even bigger plans for 2024!

If you want to get involved, get in touch at info@brusselscreativeworkers.com

Name: SUCOS BR - Associação Brasileira Das Indústrias de Suco Integral
Description:
A Associação Brasileira das Indústrias de Suco Integral, foi criada em 20 de Novembro de 2020, com o objetivo de valorizar o suco de laranja puro, sem adição de absolutamente nada que não seja apenas a fruta.

A missão da Associação e seus filiados é garantir que os consumidores recebam um produto com alta qualidade, sem adição de açúcar e conservantes.

Name: NAWBO - STL | National Association of Women Business Owners St. Louis Chapter
Description:
Get a seat at the table or build your own table, and make sure to include other women

Founded in 1975, the National Association of Women Business Owners (NAWBO) is the unified voice of over 11.6 million women-owned businesses in the United States representing the fastest growing segment of the economy.

NAWBO is the only dues-based organization representing the interests of all women entrepreneurs across all industries, and with chapters across the country. With far-reaching clout and impact, NAWBO is a one-stop resource, propelling women business owners into greater economic, social, and political spheres of power worldwide. 

Respected with elected officials in Washington, D.C., and state capitals across the country, recognized in the media as a thought leader on women’s business issues, and joined with corporate partners and other non-profit organizations who share our mission and expand our influence, NAWBO is the country’s premier women’s business organization.

NAWBO’s many milestones and awards over the decades exemplify the rich history of success the organization and its thousands of members have enjoyed.

WOMEN MEAN BUSINESS!

Name: BNI - Portland Business Advantage
Description: We are a network of business professionals in Portland, Oregon. With over 50+ members working in 40+ industries, our members offer both residential and commercial services. All of our members are thoroughly reviewed for dependability, trustworthiness, and quality of service during their application process to ensure we only bring the best to the community.

Name: C3 Esports League
Description: The go-to esports league for the Carolinas. We strive to build the collegiate esports community in North and South Carolina to offer opportunities for the student body to learn and grow in the field, both competitively and through work experience.

Name: AIS Marketing Society
Description: The AIS Marketing Society is a dynamic, student-led organisation based at the Auckland Institute of Studies (AIS). Founded in 2025, our mission is to provide a collaborative platform for students to build and refine their marketing skills through real-world exposure, industry connections, and hands-on experiences.

Name: RETHINK EVERYTHING You Know About Networking
Description:
Launching October 2025 – Rethink Everything You Know About Networking

Networking isn’t about collecting contacts or handing out stacks of business cards. It’s about people—real stories, shared experiences, and connections that can change the course of a career or a life.

Our book, written by Lindsey Meyer & Liz Short with contributions from 28 incredible voices, blends practical strategies with authentic stories to help you:
 Build genuine, lasting relationships
 See everyday interactions in a new light
 Create opportunities that feel natural, not forced

We believe networking is a human skill every organization can nurture. That’s why we’re opening pre-orders for teams, companies, and events—so you can share this conversation with the people who matter most in your world.

 Launching October 2025
 DM us if you’d like to explore pre-order packages, signed copies, or ways to integrate the book into your next event.

Click on our website to stay connected.

 What’s one relationship you’ve built in your career that completely changed your business trajectory?

Name: Phi Delta Epsilon - FL Gamma
Description:
Phi Delta Epsilon - Florida Gamma Chapter is the official pre-medical chapter at the University of Miami. Phi Delta Epsilon aims to create physicians of integrity with a lifelong commitment to our guiding principles:

Philanthropy - We belive in giving back to our community. Our international philanthropic partner is Children's Miracle Network Hospitals, with our local partner being Nicklaus Children's Hospital. 
Deity - In medicine, there is a greater power in healing, which is a force that reaches beyond our ability to treat a patient's symptoms.
Equity and Education - Our chapters represent the diveristy in medicine, and we treat patients with respect and kindness. We never stop learning; we are students for life. 

Vision: To create physicians who positively impact the world, inspire others to greatness, and lead by example.

Selbstverständlich vertreten wir die Interessen unserer Mitglieder auf allen politischen Ebenen.

HML believes that public education should be free and provide educational opportunities for all children, regardless of race, class, sex/gender, religion

Name: Kompels
Description:
Visie
Bij Kompels geloven we in het creëren van een werkcultuur waarin elke medewerker zijn unieke talenten kan benutten om zo een positieve en productieve omgeving te bevorderen. Onze visie is om binnen vijf jaar erkend te worden als de leidende organisatie die bedrijven helpt hun potentieel te maximaliseren door middel van op sterke punten gebaseerde leiderschapsontwikkeling.

Missie
Onze missie is om organisaties te transformeren door het integreren van CliftonStrengths in alle lagen, van recruitment tot teamontwikkeling. Door middel van individuele coaching, leiderschapsprogramma's en teamsessies, streven wij ernaar om zowel prestaties als welzijn te verbeteren en duurzame groei te realiseren.

Waarden
Wij hechten waarde aan persoonlijke ontwikkeling, wederzijds respect en continue verbetering. We geloven in het potentieel van elk individu en richten ons op het creëren van een waarderende cultuur waarin iedereen kan floreren. Transparantie, integriteit en samenwerking vormen de kern van al onze activiteiten.

Producten
Kompels biedt een breed scala aan diensten, waaronder CliftonStrengths assessments, Medewerkerstevredenheid onderzoek, individuele coaching, en maatwerk leiderschapsprogramma's. Onze teamsessies bevorderen onderlinge samenwerking en versterken de relaties binnen organisaties. Met data-gedreven inzichten en bewezen methodologieën zorgen wij voor meetbare resultaten die leiden tot betere prestaties, verhoogd welzijn en sterkere teams.

Declutter Home, Office, Garage, Before/After Loss of a Loved One, Prior to a Home Sale; Paper Clutter; Senior Move Management; Move In/Out; Hoarding; Cleaning; Downsizing. Let me help to have a more peaceful environment so you can spend more time doing the things you enjoy with the people you love! Free Consultations and Gift Certificates Available!

Description: Somos uma estrutura funcional do Conselho Geral da Ordem dos Advogados dedicado a questões importantes para os advogados que exercem a profissão há dez anos ou menos, em qualquer modalidade do exercício da profissão, com particular atenção aos advogados que iniciem a vida profissional.

Description: Our Vision: Our vision is to transform healthcare delivery for people of color and underserved communities throughout Texas.

Name: Alpha Delta Pi- Eta Chapter
Description: The Eta Chapter was installed as the second sorority at The University of Alabama in 1907. Since then, we have grown into the third largest ADPi chapter internationally.

Name: SWFL Business Alliance
Description: A professional alliance of vetted, trusted, performance-oriented business people that seeks to highlight and promote what’s best about doing business in Southwest Florida. We focus on top talent with an outlook towards solutions for quality growth and continuous improvement. Our philanthropic arm leans towards assistance and support for fixes only. Southwest Florida Business Alliance is a place where the best and the brightest are supported and where progress has a new home.

Name: Provisors Santa Rosa 2
Description:
Welcome to the ProVisors Santa Rosa 2 group!

This page is meant to keep you in the know: What we plan to learn, spotlight our speakers so you can plan to be in the room, highlight attendees that can support you/your clients and more.  

We welcome ProVisors members to join our group's community online and to guest in person on the third Friday of each month.  

Interested in joining ProVisors? We'd love to speak with you if you have more than 10 years in your field, and a 7 am coffee meeting (monthly attendance requirement) is valuable to your goals. We have a membership vetting/selection process, and it starts with you raising your hand in interest.  Set up a quick chat with a current member to see if this is right for you to pursue.

Name: SIAMO Esercito
Description:
CHI SIAMO
S.I.A.M.O. ESERCITO – Sindacato Italiano Autonomo Militare Organizzato Esercito

Il Sindacato Italiano Autonomo Militare Organizzato Esercito nasce il 3 luglio 2019 ed è la prima associazione professionale a carattere sindacale militare dell'Esercito Italiano iscritta all'albo ministeriale dal 15.11.2022 e costituita per rappresentare e difendere i diritti e gli interessi del personale dell’Esercito Italiano. Il Sindacato interviene su tutti gli aspetti che incidono sulla vita del personale con le stellette: dal quadro economico a quello giuridico, quello professionale, previdenziale ed assistenziale, quello sanitario, familiare, morale e sociale.

GLI OBIETTIVI DEL SINDACATO S.I.A.M.O. Esercito 
- Migliorare le condizioni di lavoro del personale militare dell’Esercito Italiano;
- Perseguire costantemente la tutela professionale, giuridica, economica e normativa di tutto il personale in servizio ed in ausiliaria, valorizzandone la specificità;
- Creare un legame positivo con le istituzioni e con la società civile, per garantire una maggiore sinergia e un conseguente incremento del benessere dei militari e dei loro familiari.

Name: Theta Omicron - Alpha Kappa Psi
Description: Boise State University Chapter of Alpha Kappa Psi

Name: SIB2023 Congresso Nazionale Società Italiana Biomateriali - Camerino
Description:
The aim of the SIB 2023 congress is to focus and enhance the development of innovative platforms based on biomaterials derived from innovative and sustainable resources. All the aspects of the biomaterial science are covered ranging from novel production methodologies, complex assembly, biomaterial derivatization, pharmaceutical and clinical application. Specific sessions will be dedicated to the biomaterials and their technology transfer challenges.

The Organizing and Scientific Committees invites those who are interested in participating, to present contributions for oral presentation, poster presentation and 5 minuets pitch PhD student competition, in the following topics: 
• Additive Manufacturing
• Scaffold-based tissue engineering
• Drug and gene delivery
• Nanocarrier systems
• Wound healing
• Cell-material interactions
• Bioceramics
• 3D-Printing Technology
• Tissue and organ models
• Biomaterials for antibiotic-resistance
• Biomaterials for tissue regeneration
• Pre-clinical and clinical applications

Name: BDB.Dortmund
Description: Der BDB ist der Berufsverband, der ArchitektInnen UND IngenieurInnen eine berufspolitische Heimat bietet. Wir vertreten Angestellte, Beamte und freischaffend tätige Planerinnen und Planer – ab dem Beginn des Studiums. In unseren Reihen finden sich Solo-Selbständige, kleinere und mittlere Büros – und das ein oder andere große Büro ist auch dabei. Diese Vielfalt hat uns gelehrt, einander zuzuhören und gute Lösungen zu verhandeln. Das ist unsere Stärke! Und gut vernetzt zu sein – was unseren Mitgliedern gemeinsame Projekte ermöglicht.

Name: InfoSec Alliance (Under IEEE CUSB)
Description:
IEEE CUSB Computer Society's newly formed cybersecurity group provides a platform for students interested in developing skills in cybersecurity and networking. It offers an opportunity to learn, share knowledge and expertise, and stay updated with the latest trends in the field.

As a student-led cybersecurity group, we aim to create a community of like-minded individuals who are passionate about cybersecurity and networking. Our goal is to enhance your knowledge and skills in this field and make a positive impact on the industry. Through workshops, events, and training sessions, we strive to create a platform where members can learn from each other and stay updated with the latest developments in the field. We believe that by working together, we can build a strong network of cybersecurity professionals who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.

Name: Canadian Hellenic Medical Society
Description: The purpose of the Canadian Hellenic Medical Society is to connect physicians, residents and medical students living in Canada of Greek heritage with the intention of sharing knowledge through CME events, providing networking opportunities, and awarding scholarships to medical students.

Name: Indonesian Theologians Association
Description: Asosiasi Teolog Indonesia (ATI), or Indonesian Theologians Association, is a non-profit organization that creates spaces to empower young theologians by organizing conferences, grant projects, and publications.

Name: Visionary Research Association Inc.
Description:
VRA Inc. is committed to provide top-notch training, conferences, and collaboration with researchers.

Our Mission
- Foster Collaboration: We believe that groundbreaking discoveries are born from collaboration. We foster an environment that brings together great minds from various fields to share knowledge and tackle complex problems.
- Push Boundaries: We don’t just contribute to the existing body of knowledge; we stretch its limits. Through our research initiatives, we explore new territories, looking for the answers that lie just beyond the current state of understanding.
- Empower Decision-Making: Our research serves as a foundation for informed decisions. We provide organizations and individuals with the insights they need to make choices that are not only successful but also beneficial for society.
- Cultivate Thought Leadership: We are committed to nurturing thought leaders who are not only experts in their fields but also visionaries that can guide the way to a better tomorrow.
- Engage with Communities: We engage with communities to ensure that our research is grounded in real-world challenges and that the solutions we develop are both applicable and beneficial.
- Champion Sustainable Development: Through our research, we aim to address key issues facing society, and contribute to the sustainable development of our planet for the present and future generations.

Our Vision
At Visionary Research Association Inc. (VRA Inc.) we envisage a world where the bounds of what is possible are constantly being expanded. Through our rigorous research and innovative thinking, we aim to unlock new potentials that shape the future, foster sustainable development, and cultivate knowledge for the betterment of society.

Name: Schildknegt & Partners

Dat doen wij zowel op operationeel, tactisch als strategisch niveau.

Wij zijn uitvoerende adviseurs. Wij staan niet langs de zijlijn maar zijn betrokken en werken actief binnen de organisatie mee aan het vraagstuk. We ondersteunen tijdens het implementeren van de methodiek. Hierin adviseren wij op bestuurlijk, strategisch en operationeel niveau o.a. op het gebied van verander- en ontwikkelopgaven, interne en externe werkprocessen in samenwerking met betrokken partners en projectregie. De rode draad van onze advieswerkzaamheden is duurzaamheid. Een belangrijk onderdeel van onze advieswerkzaamheden is daarom ook coaching on thejob. Tijdens de implementatie van de methodiek coachen wij de betrokken professional in de uitvoering van hun werkzaamheden.

Elle compte plus des deux tiers des entreprises adhérentes à une organisation professionnelle du transport routier en France.

La FNTR a un double objectif : 

• Répondre aux attentes à court terme des entreprises du secteur 
• Anticiper et accompagner les évolutions de la profession
 
Notre mission repose sur des valeurs fortes et de nombreux atouts : 

• Un ancrage territorial unique, grâce à un réseau dense d’unions régionales et départementales, en prise directe avec les réalités du terrain. 
• Une proximité locale avec chacun de nos adhérents. 
• Une influence reconnue auprès des pouvoirs politiques, tant en France qu’à l’échelle européenne, avec une représentativité multisectorielle.
• Des expertises variées et pointues : techniques, économiques, juridiques, sociales et environnementales.

Name: California Housing Collective
Description:
The California Housing Collective is a professional community built for the people who power California’s housing industry.

Our members include real estate agents, brokers, contractors, lenders, property managers, designers, consultants, and other trusted professionals working together to make housing better across the state.

We believe success in this industry comes from connection — not competition. That’s why we’ve built a place where housing professionals can share referrals, find reliable partners, learn from one another, and grow stronger together.

Inside the Collective, you’ll find:
Networking & Collaboration – Build real relationships with agents, contractors, and lenders who are serious about working together.
Resources & Education – Access guides, training, and insights to help you grow your business and serve clients better.
Community Spotlights – Celebrate wins, discover new opportunities, and learn from peers through stories and interviews.
Discussions & Groups – Join topic-based conversations that help you solve real problems and find new solutions.

Membership is free to start — so you can join, explore, and connect at your own pace.
For professionals who want deeper connections and more opportunities, we also offer paid tiers that include advanced resources, private groups, and facilitated partnerships.

Whether you’re helping clients buy homes, build them, or finance them — this is your community. Together, we’re creating a stronger, more connected housing ecosystem in California.

Join the movement. Connect. Collaborate. Grow.

Through customized programs in culturally responsive practices, social-emotional learning, and project-based training, we support educational institutions and organizations in co-creating spaces where students, staff, and leaders feel empowered. Our services—ranging from cultivating positive cultures and listening sessions to student-focused GOAT (Greatest of All Time) training and our Disrupter University Train the Trainer model—are designed to amplify voices, foster agency, and build lasting relationships.

Name: International Medical College Hospital (IMCH)
Description: Bangladesh is vulnerable to disasters induced by climate change, such as floods and high tidal waves leading to loss of livelihood and suffering from environmental pollutions, while vulnerable groups are disproportionately affected by the disasters and environmental degradation. The Global Climate Risk Index ranks Bangladesh as the world’s seventh most affected country over the period 1999-2018. Rising temperatures leading to more intense and unpredictable rainfalls during the monsoon season and a higher probability of catastrophic cyclones are expected to result in increased tidal inundation. It is estimated that a one-meter rise in sea levels would submerge 18 percent of arable land in coastal areas. Recent studies estimate that by 2050 Bangladesh could have 13.3 million internal climate migrants. Additional rural-urban migration would have significant consequences for air and water pollution and unsustainable consumption of natural resources while putting additional pressure on urban labor markets. Addressing climate risks is increasingly urgent to ensure the sustainable economic development of the country.

Not exclusive to film studies majors, DKA welcomes men and women, undergraduates and graduates, who are dedicated to fostering lifelong character, collaborative and creative storytelling, ethical and productive business practices, philanthropic action, and fraternal bonds by and between students of the cinematic arts.

Description: The mission of the Indiana Orthopaedic Society is to enhance career-long enrichment of the practices of Indiana's orthopaedic surgeons through the encouragement of collegiality, educational opportunities, and legislative advocacy.  With these, we promote and safeguard high quality orthopaedic care to all Hoosiers.

Name: Sri Lanka College of Pulmonologists
Description: Sri Lanka College of Pulmonologists is a gathering of all respiratory physicians and thoracic surgeons in Sri Lanka. Its purpose is to keep abreast with most advanced developments in pulmonology and help disseminate its expertise throughout the country

Name: INFORMS at UM
Description: The INFORMS (Institute for Operations Research and Management Sciences) Student Chapter at University of Michigan is an organization for students interested in using mathematical modeling, statistical analysis, mathematical optimization, and other analytical methods to find better solutions to complex decision-making problems. We welcome students from any department related to operations research and management science to join us!

Name: BNI Big Tsunami
Description:
Meet BNI Big Tsunami: Canada’s top-performing BNI chapter!

We’re more than just a referral network. Based in Vancouver, BNI Big Tsunami is one of the highest revenue-generating chapters in the country, and we’re proud to set the pace for business growth, connection, and community impact.

Each week, over 50 local business owners, entrepreneurs, and professionals come together with one goal in mind: helping each other succeed. Whether it’s through referrals, collaboration, or mentorship, our members show up ready to support one another’s growth, and the results speak for themselves.

We’re known for our high energy, strong relationships, and culture of accountability. Our success is built on trust, commitment, and a belief that when we grow together, everyone wins.

Thinking of joining a chapter that goes beyond just networking? Come visit one of our Wednesday morning meetings and experience the wave for yourself.  Click the button below to register for a meeting and experience BNI Big Tsunami for yourself.

Name: Portsmouth Safeguarding Childrens Partnership
Description:
If you are worried about a child, or are concerned about an on-going issue involving a child, please contact the Multi-Agency Safeguarding Hub (MASH) directly on:

0845 671 0271 / 02392 688793

Name: Women in Web3 African Chapter
Description:
Women in Web3 Africa is a chapter of the Global WiW3 organisation founded in Switzerland as  featured in Forbes and presented at the World Economic Forum. A pioneering global community WiW3 aims to empower and unite women from diverse backgrounds in shaping the future of Web3 & AI.

We envision a world where women are leading innovators, creators, and thought leaders in the Web3 space, contributing to a more inclusive, decentralized, and transformative digital landscape.

Our mission is to foster a transdisciplinary platform for women passionate about Web3, enabling them to connect, learn, and grow both professionally and personally.

We aim to:

- Cultivate Transdisciplinary Exchange: Encourage knowledge sharing and collaboration across various fields to enrich the understanding and application of Web3 technologies.

- Build a Powerful, Like-Minded Network: Unite women from around the world who share a passion for Web3, creating a supportive and empowering community.

- Promote Professional Development: Support women in launching and advancing their careers in Web3, with a focus on expanding the presence and influence of women in this space globally.

- Drive Change and Freedom: Harness the collective power of women to advocate for and implement changes that make the digital world more open, equitable, and free.

- Enhance Understanding of Web3: Elevate the comprehension of how Web3 technologies can represent and benefit a broad spectrum of stakeholders.

- Learn from Trailblazers: Facilitate opportunities for members to learn from successful women in the field, sharing insights, experiences, and best practices.

Name: RGVHIMA
Description: Welcome to RGVHIMA! We are Region 11/Local Chapter 5 of the Texas Health Information Management Association (TxHIMA). TxHIMA, in turn, is a Component State Association (CSA) of the American Health Information Management Association (AHIMA).

Name: Biological Science Student Association
Description: A student-run organization devoted to providing students at the University of Massachusetts Amherst in the natural sciences (or students with an interest in the natural sciences) with the opportunity to interact with colleagues, professors, and professionals in an academic and social environment.

Name: European Illustrators Forum
Description: The European Illustrators Forum - EIF - is a network of national associations of illustrators in European countries.

Name: Yngre Genetikere
Description:
Yngre Genetikere (YG) varetager medlemmernes faglige interesser i relation til specialet, hvilket betyder, at Yngre Genetikere bl.a. arbejder for at styrke uddannelsen i klinisk genetik.

Derudover arbejder Yngre Genetikere for at udbrede kendskabet til klinisk genetik og for at styrke det gode samarbejde i klinisk genetik på tværs af landet.

Alle medlemmer i Yngre Genetikere mødes årligt i forbindelse med generalforsamlingen i DSMG (som regel i april), hvor der er valg til bestyrelsen og vi diskuterer uddannelse, politik mv.

Bestyrelsen mødes ca. én gang om måneden, og arrangerer fyraftensmøder for Yngre Genetikeres medlemmer ca. fire gange om året.

Yngre Genetikere arrangerer og stiller gerne op til undervisning, fyraftensmøder o.l. i genetik og kliniske emner relateret til genetik i andre specialer.

Name: The RIC
Description:
The Regional Interdisciplinary Collaborative ("The RIC") is a diverse, interconnected network of stakeholders collaborating across state boundaries to disrupt human trafficking and amplify survivor leadership.

The RIC advances its mission of sustaining this regional network by:
- Facilitating regular forms for member organizations to connect and exchange best practices
- Building collaborative capacity through educational events and resources; and
- Reducing barriers to supporting survivors by leveraging out-of-state services and referral pathways. 

Free membership to the RIC is open to any individual, organization, or entity in the region involved in anti-trafficking work and/or survivor empowerment.

Member jurisdictions correspond with U.S. Health and Human Services Region III and include Delaware, Maryland, Pennsylvania, Virginia, West Virginia, and the District of Columbia.

Name: Consell de Col·legis Farmacèutics de Catalunya
Description:
El Consell de Col·legis Farmacèutics de Catalunya (CCFC), constituït el 12 de febrer de 1985 i de conformitat amb el que disposa la Llei 7/2006 de 31 de maig, és una corporació de dret públic amb personalitat jurídica i plena capacitat que constitueix l’òrgan suprem representatiu de la totalitat dels col·legis de farmacèutics existents a Catalunya, és a dir, els de Barcelona, Girona, Lleida i Tarragona. Té per objecte la representació de la professió farmacèutica davant la Generalitat de Catalunya i l’Administració General de l’Estat, complint les finalitats i exercint totes les funcions que li assignin la legislació vigent i els presents estatuts, i qualsevol de les altres disposicions legals que li siguin d’aplicació.

Per altra banda, el Consell de Col·legis Farmacèutics de Catalunya manté les relacions necessàries amb el Consejo General de Colegios Oficiales de Farmacéuticos de España , òrgan de representació, coordinació i cooperació de tots els col·legis oficials de farmacèutics i dels consells de col·legis de l’Estat espanyol de les diferents comunitats autònomes.

Name: The Shine Community
Description:
The Shine Community is the place to celebrate the recruiters and talent acquisition leaders that are at the top of their game.

It's a free, invite-only community for talent acquisition professionals can connect with their peers, solve hiring challenges, up-level their skills, and access exclusive member events.

Name: ASME Milwaukee Section
Description: The Milwaukee Section of the ASME gathers together Mechanical Engineers who wish to discuss among themselves their art and issues of interest both within and without the profession.

Name: Victorian Association of Catholic Primary School Principals (VACPSP)
Description:
The VACPSP is the professional Catholic, Victorian, Principal voice. We serve this interest through advocacy and action, supporting Principal members and Catholic primary education. This includes National Catholic and Commonwealth partnerships.

The VACPSP is the trusted and influential professional Catholic, Victorian, Primary Principal voice. Informed by the Principal Council Members (currently serving Principals from across the dioceses), the VACPSP is consulted on matters of importance by key stakeholders including governing bodies and government statewide and nationally.

By joining, your experience forms part of the knowledge base and together we form a unified and informed position to take to discussions.

Name: San Luis Obispo EAC
Description: The San Luis Obispo EAC commitment is to assist local businesses by providing educational seminars about relevant employment issues and increase employer knowledge of EDD programs and services. In partnership with the Employment Development Department (EDD), the SLO EAC helps strengthen communication between EDD and employers. Our membership represents a cross section of employer volunteers from business and organizations throughout San Luis Obispo County. We help educate employers, especially small employers, about relevant employment issues and related legal concerns. We offer quarterly seminars where well-respected attorneys and other human resource experts provide “nuts and bolts” information and education.

Name: East Canada Zone NSBE
Description: NSBE East Canada Zone is a regional extension of the National Society of Black Engineers (NSBE), dedicated to empowering and supporting Black engineers and students across Eastern Canada. Our mission is to increase the number of culturally responsible Black engineers who excel academically, succeed professionally, and positively impact the community. We provide members with resources, networking opportunities, and professional development programs that foster academic excellence and career growth. Through various events, workshops, and outreach initiatives, we strive to inspire and nurture the next generation of engineers, ensuring a diverse and inclusive engineering community. Join us in building a strong network of professionals and students who are passionate about innovation, leadership, and making a difference.

Name: PMDC
Description:
Founded in 2005, the PMDC is a student-led organization dedicated to advancing leadership in professional spaces. Our mission is to prepare students for the workplace by developing cultural competencies and leadership skills to thrive.

Each year, PMDC hosts an Annual Pamplin Conference and Case Competition, where top corporations lead workshops and share insights on in the workplace. We strive to create opportunities, foster inclusivity, and elevate underrepresented voices within the Pamplin College of Business and beyond. As a leader in Virginia Tech’s initiatives, PMDC ensures that all students feel a sense of belonging while recognizing the value of belonging in both local and global communities.

Name: NAHREP Houston
Description: Our NAHREP Houston Chapter provides community outreach, industry educational and business networking events thanks to the gracious contributions of our Houston Chapter Board of Directors, members and NAHREP Houston sponsors.

Name: SOPHRENZEN
Description: Sophrenzen est un institut de formation en Thérapies Brèves (Hypnose, Programmation Neuro-Linguistique, Coaching).

Name: Ondernemend Ten Boer
Description:
Ondernemend Ten Boer (OTB) is dé dynamische bedrijvenvereniging die de lokale ondernemers van regio Ten Boer e.o. verenigt, versterkt en vertegenwoordigt. Wij zijn een bruisend netwerk van gepassioneerde ondernemers die geloven in de kracht van samenwerking, innovatie en groei.

Onze missie is om een gunstig ondernemersklimaat te creëren en de economische ontwikkeling van de regio Ten Boer e.0o. te bevorderen. We bieden een platform waar ondernemers elkaar kunnen ontmoeten, inspireren en van elkaar kunnen leren. We gaan er na toe werken om regelmatige netwerkevenementen, workshops en trainingen te organiseren, stimuleren we de uitwisseling van kennis en ervaring, waardoor ondernemers kunnen groeien en hun bedrijven kunnen optimaliseren.

Als belangenbehartiger staan we klaar om de stem van de ondernemers te vertegenwoordigen en op te komen voor hun belangen bij lokale en regionale overheden. We streven ernaar om de juiste voorwaarden te creëren voor een gezond en bloeiend ondernemersklimaat, waarin ondernemers de ruimte krijgen om te innoveren en te floreren.

Ondernemend Ten Boer is een diverse gemeenschap van bedrijven, variërend van kleine lokale ondernemingen tot grote boeren bedrijven. We geloven in de kracht van verbinding en samenwerking tussen deze bedrijven, en we bevorderen actief de synergie en samenwerking binnen ons netwerk. Door gezamenlijke projecten en initiatieven te ontplooien, streven we naar collectieve groei en het versterken van de economische positie van Ten Boer.

Word lid van Ondernemend Ten Boer en maak deel uit van een dynamisch netwerk dat uw bedrijf zal helpen groeien, uw kennis zal vergroten en uw stem zal versterken. Samen bouwen we aan een bloeiende en ondernemende toekomst voor Ten Boer!

Name: Insulators LMCT
Description: The Mechanical Insulators Labor Management Cooperative Trust (LMCT) is the Labor Management organization of The International Association of Heat and Frost Insulators and Allied Workers and their signatory contractors. Established in 2007, the Insulators LMCT advocates for the mechanical insulation and firestopping industries.

Name: Inovar Sustentabilidade do Amazonas
Description:
Nosso compromisso:
A Inovar Sustentabilidade do Amazonas está comprometida em promover o desenvolvimento profissional e técnico dos engenheiros, geólogos e tecnólogos do Estado do Amazonas, visando o avanço das ciências, legislações e tecnologias, contribuindo para o progresso socioeconômico e ambiental da região, sempre fornecendo serviços e atividades de alta qualidade.

Nossa missão:
Promover o desenvolvimento profissional, científico e técnico dos engenheiros, geólogos e tecnólogos, representando seus interesses e contribuindo para o avanço da engenharia, geologia e tecnologia no Estado do Amazonas.

Nossa visão:
Ser reconhecida como uma entidade de referência no Estado do Amazonas, agregando valor aos seus membros por meio de oportunidades de aprendizado, networking e defesa de interesses profissionais.

Nossos valores: 
Ética, Excelência, Colaboração, Valorização profissional, Desenvolvimento sustentável, Representatividade e 	Aprendizado contínuo

Grupos de trabalho (GT):
Desenvolvimento Profissional
Inovação, Sustentabilidade, Tecnologia, Pesquisa e Desenvolvimento
Relações Institucionais
ESG
Infraestrutura

Name: Professional Moms Network
Description: We are sisterhood of women dedicated to supporting one another personally and professionally, with an others-first mindset. We welcome ALL women who believe in family before profits, and we are much more than any traditional networking organization. What makes us unique is that there are no forced referrals, no annual dues and no drama! We are business-builders and kindness-spreaders. Our tribe is committed to Encouragement, Education and Service. We believe in the value of human connection which means we’re all about building relationships, not just faking follows. Together, we learn, grow, succeed. Our sisterhood is a movement, and you belong here!

Name: Global Trade Marketing Association
Description:
The Global Trade Marketing Association (GTMA) unites professionals and companies advancing excellence from strategy to shelf.
It offers certifications, best-practice frameworks, benchmarking tools, and case-driven learning platforms.
Members gain access to global insights, curated resources, and peer-to-peer knowledge exchanges through events and publications.
GTMA champions the elevation of trade marketing as a strategic discipline across FMCG, retail, and distribution industries worldwide.

Name: Gracious Organization
Description: We are providing a platform for people to come together, share their experiences, and celebrate their cultural activities with the fusion of fun.

Name: Chicago SGNA
Description: The Chicago SGNA is a professional organization of nurses and associates dedicated to the safe and effective practice of gastroenterology and endoscopy nursing.

Name: Argentinian Association of Quaternary and Geomorphology
Description: The Argentine Association of Quaternary and Geomorphology (AACG) aims to promote knowledge and applications of Earth sciences in the Quaternary and Geomorphology fields. It provides scientific and educational advisory services to requesting institutions. AACG collaborates with similar scientific organizations (AGA, AAS, APA, among others) and international institutions (INQUA, IAG, IUGS, among others) dedicated to the study of Quaternary and Geomorphology and their applications. It represents the Argentine community of geomorphologists and Quaternary scientists in the international sphere. AACG organizes meetings, courses, and conferences for scientists to present and discuss their work and projects. It publishes scientific advancements, establishes committees and working groups to foster collaboration among researchers.

Name: Retirement Income Taskforce
Description: Established to give and support consumers' confidence in finding safe and reliable sources of financial information, guidance and / or advice when considering income in retirement. Enabling them to better understand the choices available to them, and to ensure they plan and make informed decisions to meet their needs for a living income in retirement. Chaired by Margaret Snowdon OBE. The Retirement Income Taskforce's (RIT) was previously known as the Pensions Advice Taskforce and sits as part of the Consumer Duty Alliance.

Name: Eesti Väike- ja Keskmiste Ettevõtjate Assotsiatsioon EVEA I Estonian Association of SME´s
Description:
Eesti Väike- ja Keskmiste Ettevõtete Liit (EVEA) on Eesti ainus väikeste ja keskmise suurusega ettevõtete sektoriteülene esindusorganisatsioon.
Meie tähtsaim ülesanne on väikeettevõtjate huvide esindamine riigi ees, väljendades selgelt ja jõuliselt väikeettevõtjate seisukohti.
Ühendus seisab väljaspool riigistruktuure ja erakonnapoliitikat, EVEA loomist ja ülalpidamist on täielikult finantseerinud ja finantseerivad jätkuvalt väikeettevõtjad liikmemaksu abil.
EVEA on olnud Eesti ettevõtjate teenistuses alates 1988. aastast.

Name: BenefitsBeyondSelf.org
Description:
The Business Benefits Club Network is for Impact-Driven Business Owners, Conscious & Awakened Entrepreneurs, Creative & Authentic Leaders, and Heart-Centered Changemakers, focused on making positive changes and creating value beyond themselves for clients, communities, and loved ones they serve.

Open to all Conscious Business Owners & Entrepreneurs, including Side Giggers, Artists, Solopreneurs and Aspiring Entrepreneurs.

Name: International Society for Heart Research North American Section
Description:
Our mission is to promote the discovery and dissemination of knowledge in the cardiovascular sciences on a world-wide basis through publications, congresses and other media. Our goals are:

-To promote and foster the exchange and diffusion of concepts and information throughout the Americas relating to metabolism, structure, and function of the cardiovascular system in health and disease.

-To advance knowledge in the scientific disciplines relating to cardiovascular function and disease.

-To hold regular scientific meetings dealing with heart research.

-To provide a suitable forum for the discussion of problems relating to cardiovascular function and disease.

Name: Ladies Executive Golf Society of Houston
Justice administrative collective et indépendante
Omaha emPower Breakfast
Description:
The Omaha Empower Breakfast is a 20-year tradition, offering a unique networking experience for professionals in the Greater Omaha area.

Our breakfast events are held on the first Friday of each month. Please visit our website for more information or to register for our next breakfast.

Name: Alabama Chapter of the Air & Waste Management Association
Description:
Founded in 1907, the Air & Waste Management Association (A&WMA) is a nonprofit, nonpartisan professional organization enhancing knowledge and expertise by providing a neutral forum for information exchange, professional development, networking opportunities, public education, and outreach to more than 5,000 environmental professionals, 34 Sections, and 65 Chapters worldwide. 

The Association is deeply rooted in local communities. A&WMA’s Sections and Chapters provide members with environmental leadership, region-specific programming, and networking opportunities close to home, fostering a sense of connection and community among our members. 

With the rapidly changing environmental industry, there's no better way to stay up-to-date and involved than to become a member of the Alabama Chapter of the Air & Waste Management Association. 

Visit our website to join the Chapter, sign up for newsletters, and learn about upcoming events near you.

Name: Les Pépites du Golfe
Description:
Les pépites du golfe est une association dédiée à la convivialité et au partage,
rassemblant les entrepreneurs des communes proches de Baden.

Name: Phi Gamma Nu -Alpha Chapter
Description:
Under the leadership of Sylvia Pekar Arnold, six devoted women initiated PGN at Northwestern University in Chicago, Illinois. Since then, PGN has evolved into a national organization dedicated to cultivating leaders of exceptional value, committed to professionalism, service, and brotherhood.

As the Alpha chapter at Northwestern University, PGN endeavors to cultivate a diverse community focused on the professional and personal growth of its members, dedicated to each other's success. Our goal is to nurture well-rounded leaders who positively impact their communities and the lives of others.

Name: Society of Indiana Archivists
Description:
The Society of Indiana Archivists (SIA) is an organization of archivists, researchers, and others who are actively concerned with establishing, developing, preserving, promoting, and using archival collections. 

SIA provides a forum for the exchange of information and ideas related to archival collections and best practices, and it serves as a liaison among individuals and institutions working with archival collections in the state.

Name: AQHSST Association québécoise pour l'hygiène, la santé et la sécurité du travail
Description:
L’AQHSST est un organisme à but non lucratif qui a pour mission d’accompagner les professionnels et les organisations à améliorer les milieux de travail afin d’assurer la santé, la sécurité et l’intégrité physique et psychologique des travailleurs et travailleurs.

En misant sur la force de notre réseau, nous organisons diverses activités de maillage et de mobilisation des connaissances en plus de développer des outils pour fournir des références, des informations de pointe en hygiène, santé et sécurité du travail et en ergonomie. Nous visons ainsi à soutenir un réseautage continu entre les professionnels du Québec. Par exemple, notre congrès annuel réunissant des experts des milieux pratiques et scientifiques ainsi que de diverses disciplines liées à la prévention en milieu de travail constitue une occasion privilégiée pour échanger sur les dernières connaissances et pratiques en HSST.

Name: ChiefPricingOfficer.com
Description:
Elevate and Celebrate Pricing Leadership
Pricing leadership has arrived in the C-suite conversation. ChiefPricingOfficer.com exists to give it a voice, a standard, and a community. We represent the senior executives, rising leaders, and stakeholders who recognize that price is the most powerful lever of enterprise value.

Membership is open to individuals who identify with one of three groups within the pricing community:

•	Chief Pricing Officers — Executives who have carried enterprise-wide accountability for pricing strategy and outcomes, regardless of title. While participation is voluntary, individuals recognized in this category are vetted by their peers to ensure the credibility of the designation.

•	Aspirational Members — Professionals building their careers in pricing and commercial excellence who seek mentorship, leadership development, and a blueprint for advancing toward C-suite responsibility.

•	General Interest Members — Executives, investors, academics, and others with a stake in pricing leadership who wish to follow the conversation.

What is a Chief Pricing Officer?
An executive accountable for pricing as a strategic, enterprise discipline. While the formal title is still rare, the role already exists — carried by leaders with:

•	20+ years of pricing and commercial leadership experience across industries and corporations.
•	Senior executive presence — capable of operating at board and C-suite level, influencing strategy and enterprise outcomes.
•	Cross-functional authority — bridging finance, sales, marketing, supply chain, and operations.
•	Accountability for results — ensuring pricing decisions translate directly into EBITDA impact, competitive advantage, and shareholder value.
 
How We Are Organized
ChiefPricingOfficer.com is guided by a Board of Directors — executives with decades of leadership experience in pricing, strategy, and commercial excellence.

Name: PAZ - Psicologia in AZione
Description:
PAZ, Psicologia in AZione, è un gruppo composto da Psicologhe e Psicologi unito dal desiderio di valorizzare e tutelare la professione psicologica. 

PAZ si propone di costruire processi istituzionali di legittimazione e riconoscimento attraverso l'impegno attivo nella politica professionale.

Crediamo che le idee siano la nostra forza!

Name: EXPO Mariano R. Alonso
Description: Somos la Feria Internacional de Ganadería, Industria, Agricultura, Comercio y Servicios organizada por la Asociación Rural del Paraguay (ARP) y la Unión Industrial Paraguaya (UIP), nos convertimos en la mayor exposición del trabajo en el Paraguay.

Name: Chichi Lion Global Impact Hub
Description: The Chichi Lion Global Impact Hub (CLI Hub) is a transformative global initiative dedicated to empowering individuals, fostering sustainable development, and driving systemic change. Led by Dr. Chichi Lion, the Hub catalyzes collaboration and innovation to address the world’s most urgent challenges. At its core is the Rise 1 Billion Movement, an ambitious campaign to empower 1 billion leaders, particularly from marginalized communities, to tackle global issues such as poverty, inequality, climate change, and health crises. Through the Chichi Lion Leadership Legacy Hub, CLI Hub creates impactful solutions that advance the United Nations’ Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), with a strong focus on Africa and global communities. Together, these efforts aim to create a future where leadership, innovation, and empowerment are the foundations for lasting, positive change across borders and generations.

Name: TCTLE
Description: TCTLE (pronounced “tac•tile”) creates space & provide opportunities for women of color creators to profit from their craft through networking, sharing insights, & more.

Name: Fortuna's Club
Description:
Unite the professional women of Denver who work in finance, accounting, legal, insurance, entrepreneurship, and other business leaders from traditionally male dominated industries.
AuthenticityFemininityCommunity

Name: Girls in White Coats
Description: Girls in White Coats is a global community that provides support and guidance for young women who are passionate about becoming health care leaders in the future. Our mission is to help girls find their passions, provide leadership and volunteer opportunities, host events to recognize professional health care workers, and spread awareness about health.

Name: PNAA California Capital City
Description: A chapter of the Philippine Nurses' Association of America

Name: Columbia Multicultural Business Association
Description: The Multicultural Business Association is an undergraduate pre-professional organization that strives to bridge the gap between Columbia’s  student body and large businesses by providing students with the opportunities and resources necessary to achieve their professional career goals.

Name: Burma Crafts
Description:
Myanmar is home to an abundance of rattan, bamboo and lacquer tree sap, which our experienced local artisans skillfully handcraft into beautiful home products. The combination of renewable materials, traditional techniques and ethical employment makes us your ideal sustainable partner.

Why Buy From Myanmar?
1. Experienced co-creators: Our producers have been developing products with buyers in >40 countries, for >10 years.
2. Abundant materials: Myanmar has a great untapped supply of renewable high-density rattan and bamboo and the high durability of lacquer sap.
3. Skilled craftspeople: 70% of our artisans are women, specializing in unique traditional weaving styles and patterns.
4. Local communities: Our business directly benefits our rural communities, where capacity is vastly expandable.

Burma Crafts is joined by two sectors - Rattan & Bamboo and Lacquerware. The Rattan & Bamboo Sector of Myanmar is represented by Myanmar Rattan and Bamboo Entrepreneurs' Association (MRBEA). MRBEA is the association of rattan and bamboo SMEs and entrepreneurs from Myanmar. The Lacquerware Sector is represented by Myanmar Lacquerware Association (MLA). MLA is the association that unites all of Myanmar’s lacquerware artists and entrepreneurs. Both associations are well-versed in their respective sector’s practices and we are here to offer a useful roadmap to all potential partners and clients. We are here to help.

Burma Crafts provides the following Red Carpet Services to our international buyers who wish to choose Myanmar as their ideal sustainable partner - 
1. Supplier Matching Service
2. Export Procedure Guideline
3. Production Collaboration and Consolidation
4. Virtual Factory Tour
5. Third-party Factory Visit
6. Dedicated Account Management

Name: New England Society of Gastroenterology Nurses and Associates
Description:
About NESGNA

New England Society of Gastroenterology Nurse's and Associates is Region 28 of the Society of Gastroenterology Nurses and Associates. It encompasses members from Massachusetts, Rhode Island and New Hampshire.

NESGNA was founded in 1977 with the vision of providing educational opportunities to our regional members and maintaining a strong commitment to the national organization, the SGNA. Our mission is to provide the highest quality educational and informational programs. NESGNA has been the recipient of many accolades and prestigious awards and honors. Region of the Year in 2012 and 2022, Certified Region of the Year in 2015 and 2022, Gabriele Schindler Awards, and Distinguished Service Award.

Many New England members have continued their professional development by serving on the national board as a committee member, the national president, speaker of the house…Our region continues to strengthen and grow over the years.

Name: CLEO: Cultivating Leadership and Economic Opportunities
Description: CLEO is an emerging student organization dedicated to empowering women in the field of economics. We strive to provide a supportive environment for female students pursuing economics degrees and those interested in exploring the field of economics.

Name: Sigma Pi - Epsilon Eta Chapter (Illinois State)
Description: Welcome to the official page of the Sigma Pi - Epsilon Eta Chapter at Illinois State University! Here you can keep up with everything that our chapter is currently doing!

Name: Commission Santé du Dirigeant – CPME Normandie
Description: La Commission Santé du Dirigeant de la CPME Normandie accompagne les dirigeants de TPE/PME pour préserver leur équilibre, leur bien-être et leur santé au travail. Parce qu’un dirigeant en bonne santé est un atout pour son entreprise et son territoire, nous proposons écoute, ressources, ateliers et réseau d’entraide. Rejoignez-nous !

Name: KADIN Surabaya - Surabaya Chamber of Commerce and Industry
Description:
KADIN Surabaya, officially known as Kamar Dagang dan Industri Surabaya or the Chamber of Commerce and Industry in Surabaya, East Java, Indonesia, serves as the central organization for business chambers and associations within the city. Since 2019, it has been led by Chairman H.M. Ali Affandi L.N.M., who commenced a new term from 2024 to 2029.

Focusing on trade, industry, and services, KADIN Surabaya is dedicated to harnessing the economic potential of Surabaya, East Java, and the broader national economy. The organization provides strategic forums, matchmaking events, seminars, and workshops tailored for Surabaya entrepreneurs, facilitating growth and collaboration. As a privately financed entity, KADIN Surabaya operates independently, representing the interests of the private sector without external influence.

Under the mandate of Law No. 1/1987, KADIN is the sole nationwide business organization authorized to represent private businesses, maintaining privileged liaisons with government officials across all relevant sectors. ￼To nurture and develop the capabilities, activities, and interests of Indonesian entrepreneurs, as well as to harmonize the interconnections between national economic potentials across state-owned enterprises, cooperatives, and private businesses, between sectors and scales, in order to create a healthy and orderly national economy and business environment based on Article 33 of the 1945 Constitution.

Name: Indigenous Friends of Israel International
Description: The co-founders of the Indigenous Friends of Israel are Norman and Barbara Miller. Norman is Aboriginal and is of the Jirrbal, Bar-Barrum and Tableland Yidinji tribes. While the Indigenous Friends of Israel was founded in 2017, the Millers have been proactive in support of Israel for nearly 30 years. Norman’s Aboriginal name is Munganbana which means Mountain Water in the Jirrbal language. He is a pastor and artist (www.munganbana.com.au) and has been active in Indigenous affairs for over 30 years. In particular, he has been involved in campaigns for the constitutional recognition of First Nations people and the removal of racism from the constitution. He has also been involved in working for the return of stolen wages to First Nations people, Closing the Gap initiatives and hosting events for Reconciliation Week and NAIDOC (National Aborigines and Islanders Week). The Millers speak at many conferences in Australia and overseas and were blessed to take part in the World Christian Gathering on Indigenous People in New Zealand in 1996. The Millers spoke at the Sacred Assembly in Sagkeeng, a First Nations reserve in Manitoba Canada in 1997.

Nació a finales de 2018 en la ciudad de Guadalajara, México, y fue fundada por los hermanos Marisol y Carlos Silva, y el esposo de Marisol, Josué Velázquez. 

Hasta septiembre del 2022 han realizado más de 8 mil cápsulas de voz que contienen más de 35 mil voces grabadas y que han sido entregadas o escuchadas en más de 20 países de los 5 continentes, tales como Estados Unidos, Canadá, Colombia, Perú, Chile, Cuba, Alemania, España, Reino Unido, Bulgaria, Turquía, Egipto, Ghana, India, China, Malasia, Hong Kong, Nueva Zelanda y Australia, entre otros.
 
Actualmente en Piel Chinita trabajan más de 20 personas basadas en distintas ciudades como Guadalajara, Ciudad de México, Monterrey, Morelia y Cancún, las cuales realizan funciones administrativas y creativas, como de diseño de audio, escritura, edición y acompañamiento de la experiencia completa.
 
Piel Chinita ha ayudado a miles de personas a expresar su amor en situaciones muy felices como aniversarios, cumpleaños, pedidas de mano o matrimonios, pero también ha acompañado a mucha gente en momentos muy difíciles como despedidas, muertes, enfermedades terminales o divorcios.
 
Desde el liderazgo de Piel Chinita nos hemos dado cuenta de que lo que hacemos se vuelve un tesoro que va adquiriendo mayor valor a través del tiempo. 

Gracias a la comunicación le ayudamos a nuestros clientes a expresar en voz alta, a consciencia y a tiempo, el gran amor que tienen por sus seres queridos, y a conservarlo.

Safety is the best policy!

Name: منتدى صيدلانيات الأردن
Description:
مظلة تمثل الصيدلانيات في مهنة الصيدلة في الأردن من كافة قطاعات المهنة همهن الأول و الأخير المصلحة العامة لمهنة الصيدلة والارتقاء بها وبمنتسبيها وتفعيل دور الصيدلانيات في جميع المجالات وتوحيد كلمتهن.
يهدف المنتدى لتحقيق الأهداف التالية:
1. تمكين الصيدلانيات في كافة قطاعات المهنة.
2. تشبيك الصيدلانيات اجتماعياً ومهنياً ونقابياً وتبادل الخبرات.
3. تطوير الكفاءات المهنية والمهارات الشخصية وتنشيط طاقات الصيدلانيات في كافة المجالات.
4. دعم وتسليط الضوء على القياديات ذوات الأثر المحوري في العملية الإدارية والاقتصادية والمهنية وإبرازهن.
5. تفعيل دور الذكاء الاصطناعي وتكنولوجبا المعلومات لتطور المهنة.
6. المساهمة في حل قضايا الصيدلانيات في القطاعات المختلفة.
7. تفعيل دور الصيدلانيات في الهيئة العامة للنقابة.
8. نشر الوعي المهني والتعريف بالحقوق والواجبات للجميع.
9. العمل على إيجاد بيئة آمنة لعمل الصيدلانيات.
وسائل تحقيق اهداف المنتدى:
1. عمل قاعدة بيانات شاملة للصيدلانيات.
2. تأسيس منصات الكترونية للتواصل.
3. توحيد الجهود لزيادة مشاركة الصيدلانيات في مراكز صنع القرار.
4. عقد حلقات وورشات عمل لدعم الصيدلانيات مهنياً وتمكينهن في مختلف المجالات.
5. تطوير الشراكات وتبادل الخبرات لإيجاد فرص عمل جديدة.
6. تقديم مقترحات لتعديل القوانين والتشريعات الناظمة بما يحقق المصلحة العامة للصيدلانيات.
7. عقد نشاطات وفعاليات لاكتشاف ودعم مواهب وإبداعات ومهارات الصيدلانيات.
8. عمل مدونة سلوكيات واتخاذ كافة الوسائل لإيجاد بيئة عمل آمنة.
9. محاولة تحديد المشاكل والحلول والتوعية بالحقوق والواجبات.
10. تطوير فرص ابتكارية لدعم مسيرة الصيدلانيات.
شروط الانتساب:
1- أن تكون حاصلة على شهادة بكالوريس في الصيدله أو دكتور صيدلي كحد أدنى.
2- أن تحصل على موافقة الهيئة الإدارية أو اللجنة التأسيسة في المدة الأولى.

Name: Interactief Snoezelen
Description:
Waar traditioneel snoezelen vaak een passieve bezigheid is, zoeken we bij interactief snoezelen altijd naar mogelijkheden om de cliënt zélf actief invloed te laten uitoefenen op de activiteit. Dit stimuleert en activeert de motorische, cognitieve, emotionele, sociale en communicatieve vaardigheden van de cliënt. Interactief snoezelen biedt cliënten de mogelijkheid zich te ontwikkelen, vergroot het gevoel van zelfstandigheid, zorgt voor rust en ontspanning en brengt vooral veel plezier!

rdgKompagne heeft een reeks unieke interactieve materialen, die het voor vrijwel iedereen mogelijk maken een interactie te hebben met de omgeving. Dat kan al met minimale bewegingen van welk lichaamsdeel dan ook, zelfs met alleen de ogen. De afgelopen jaren zijn onze materialen al op veel instellingen met succes in gebruik genomen. Niet alleen bieden ze een zinvolle dagbesteding, maar bovenal zien wij cliënten spelenderwijs een ontwikkeling doormaken die ouders, therapeuten en begeleiders voorheen niet voor mogelijk hadden gehouden. rdgKompagne heeft een apart adviesteam, Team UP, dat gespecialiseerd is in interactief snoezelen.

Name: Colegio de Graduados Sociales de Córdoba
Description:
Los graduados sociales orientan su formación universitaria y reciclaje continuo  al asesoramiento en materias laborales y de Seguridad Social, representación de los trabajadores, empresas y particulares ante los Juzgados de lo Social y Tribunales Superiores de Justicia, y también en los Tribunales de lo Mercantil, en todas aquellas materias que guardan relación con el mundo socio-laboral.
Además, estos profesionales están volcados en la función docente en facultades y escuelas universitarias. 
Otros campos profesionales es el mundo de los Recursos Humanos y Organización  en empresas, la realización de auditorías socio-laborales, o la mediación en conflictos.
El Graduado Social es, tras su paso por las facultades de Ciencias del Trabajo, el único profesional legalmente facultado para la confección y liquidación de los seguros sociales y prestaciones de la Seguridad Social. Entre otras parcelas, los graduados sociales representan a sus clientes ante la Inspección de Trabajo y Seguridad Social y Hacienda.
Y actúan ante los juzgados de lo Social y  Mercantil como auténticos operadores jurídicos, en vistas y juicios, desde juzgados locales hasta los de más alto rango.
La asesoría empresarial es otro gran campo de actuación de estos profesionales, como consultores en materia de contratación, negociación, gestión de incentivos para el empleo, selección de personal, creación de cooperativas y sociedades laborales, prevención de riesgos y todas las funciones que se encuadran en la gestión de la parcela humana de una organización.
Un graduado social es un profesional multidisciplinar con una formación universitaria de primer nivel y, gracias al Colegio Profesional, en constante reciclaje de conocimientos.
