Wir vertreten Angestellte, Beamte und freischaffend tätige Planerinnen und Planer – ab dem Beginn des Studiums. In unseren Reihen finden sich Solo-Selbständige, kleinere und mittlere Büros – und das ein oder andere große Büro ist auch dabei. Diese Vielfalt hat uns gelehrt, einander zuzuhören und gute Lösungen zu verhandeln. Das ist unsere Stärke! Und gut vernetzt zu sein – was unseren Mitgliedern gemeinsame Projekte ermöglicht.

Name: IEEE PES Women in Power South Africa
Description: IEEE PES WiP has the mission to advance the world through creativity and innovation of diverse leadership. Our aim is to encourage the careers, connections, and talent of women in the power industry in order to achieve their full potential to become the leaders of the future.

Name: Svaz dopravy ČR
Description:
Svaz vznikl jako nezávislá dobrovolná, nepolitická a otevřená zájmová organizace, která sdružuje zaměstnavatelské a podnikatelské subjekty, působící ve všech základních i příbuzných oborech dopravy.

Celkově sdružuje Svaz dopravy České republiky 84 podnikatelských subjektů dopravního zaměření, které poskytují zaměstnání více než 70 tisícům zaměstnanců.

Svaz dopravy ČR je připomínkovým místem legislativy prostřednictvím Svazu průmyslu a dopravy.

Name: National Pro Cheerleading & Dance Association (NPCDA)
Description: We provide personal and business development while fostering connections, prioritizing wellness and providing unwavering support to current and former professional sports cheerleaders. We are the champion for cheerleaders: supplying untapped resources and championing their well-being, growth, and success both on and off the field or court.

Name: SúdwestWerkt
Description: Wij zijn er voor mensen en organisaties die iets met werk willen. Onze regio kent heel veel mogelijkheden en initiatieven op het gebied van werk en via Súdwest Werkt heb je ze snel gevonden. Ons doel is faciliteren en stimuleren. Samen gaan we voor een bruisend werkklimaat in onze regio!

Name: Union des Compagnies d'Experts près la Cour d'Appel de Paris (UCECAP)
Description:
L’UCECAP a créé en 1997 une nouvelle association.
le Centre de Formation continue des Compagnies d’Experts près la Cour d’Appel de Paris (CFCECAP), dont les chefs de Cours sont membres fondateurs, a été créée afin d’améliorer encore les connaissances procédurales et déontologiques des experts. Le Conseil d’Administration est constitué des Membres du Bureau et des Présidents des Compagnies affiliées.

Name: The Women's Bar Association of Maryland
Chartered Institute of Management and Leadership (CIML)
Description:
The Chartered Institute of Management and Leadership is an American professional body that seeks to develop managerial skills in employers and employees alike as we commit ourselves to help managers achieve qualifications that would meet managerial standards all over the world.

The Chartered Institute of Management and Leadership is an initiative to instil a driving force that equips individuals with prospects, wealth and ideas directed towards the proper handling of societal values; salvaging the diminishing properties of the economy via the inculcation of management skills and Leadership cues. 

More so, information in circulation in the Institute is garnished with such subjects that broaden the horizon of the individual and enlarge his scope in such fields as noteworthy in the realization of a better and workable economy in underdeveloped, developing and developed nations of the world.

The standards here are a function of the quintessence of constructive dynamism and variability, objectiveness and most importantly, phenomenal enthusiasm in the course so pursued by individuals.

Name: WeSearch
Description:
Somos área de research da Weever, dedicada a decodificar o mercado cripto com inteligência coletiva e visão estratégica.

Na WeSearchDAO, acreditamos que a nova era do research em cripto é colaborativa, acessível e profundamente conectada aos dados. Unimos especialistas em macroeconomia, análise on-chain e geopolítica para gerar insights exclusivos que ajudam investidores, comunidades e organizações a tomarem decisões mais inteligentes e bem-informadas.

 Produzimos relatórios estratégicos, análises fundamentadas e curadorias de dados sobre:
- Tendências macroeconômicas
- Atividades on-chain e comportamento de mercado
- Contextos políticos e geopolíticos que impactam o ecossistema cripto
- Projetos Web3, DAOs e tokens com potencial de impacto

Nossos conteúdos são distribuídos semanalmente por meio de newsletters, reports especiais e colaborações com protocolos, comunidades e plataformas descentralizadas.

 We Search. We Decode.

Name: Black Women in MedTech
Description: Black Women in MedTech is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit membership organization committed to providing Black & Brown women with the tools they need to excel in MedTech. Through a powerful network of women at every level within the MedTech industry, BWMT aims to empower, educate and elevate the careers of its members.

Name: Business in Women Collective
Description:
Become the woman you were meant to be — with a community that grows with you.

Leadership. Clarity. Confidence. Accountability.
All in one empowering, uplifting, high-impact community.

Name: MGP Conference 2027
Description: This conference is designed to stimulate knowledge exchange through strong technical presentations, experienced technical panels, and interesting poster topics. Participants will explore the key issues of MGP site management, provide expertise, and illustrate what works and what does not work based on lessons learned. Representatives from over 50 companies will be available to discuss their services and technologies in an adjacent exhibit hall which will remain open throughout the duration of the entire conference. The main sessions and the poster sessions will also be held in separate rooms on the same floor. Our MGP Conference 2027 Program provides the latest lessons learned, case studies, and strategies from the MGP industry including insights from utilities, consultants, contractors, and vendors.  There are plenty of networking breaks and opportunities to build relationships to maximize your conference time.  Conference proceedings will be available for all attendees shortly after the conference. Attendees will also be provided a Conference certificate that can be used to apply for CEUs for professional licenses, based on state requirements.

Name: Philippine Institute of Chemical Engineers - Metro Manila East Chapter
Description:
The Philippine Institute of Chemical Engineers – Metro Manila East Chapter (PIChE-MME) is a professional organization composed of industry-based Chemical Engineers. Most of our members are located in Metro Manila, and we also cater for some outside Metro Manila, such as Rizal Province.

The Chapter’s first General Assembly held on 25 May 2011 at the PCAPI Office in Mandaluyong City was attended by its 25 charter members who approved the Chapter By-Laws. Formal recognition of PIChE-MME as a chapter of PIChE was conferred on 18 September 2011 during the ChE Week Opening Program held at the PNP Hall of Camp Crame, Quezon City.

PIChE-MME is a duly recognized chapter under the Philippine Institute of Chemical Engineers.

Name: Indian Institute of Welding- Saintgits Student Chapter
Description: The Indian Institute of Welding(IIW) -Saintgits Branch is a student lead chapter promoting welding technology, training, and research. It aims to connect  students with industry experts, workshops, and certification opportunities.

Name: Networking @ Night
Description: We’re a networking group based in Saratoga Springs, NY, designed for professionals of all ages who are ready to level up their careers without the awkwardness of traditional networking. Our monthly events, including happy hours and fundraisers, provide a fun and relaxed environment to meet like-minded individuals, build meaningful connections, and grow professionally. Whether you’re looking to expand your circle, collaborate on new ideas, get a lead on a new lead, or simply connect with others who understand the hustle, we’re here to make networking feel natural—and maybe even enjoyable. Join us and see what a strong network can do for you!

Name: "WINGS" Women Inspiring New Growth for Success
Description: Empowering women through knowledge sharing and networking related to personal development that leads to professional growth

Name: SAIS Southeast Asia League of Students
Description:
Bridging SAIS and Southeast Asia 

Hopkins Bloomberg Center

Name: bir umut dedik.. | we choose hope..
Description:
Become aware, raise awareness
Because we believe! 'One photo can change a life'...
We aimed to draw attention to violence against women, abuse and bad acts that we do not want to count. Because we believe that a photograph can change a life… We want to draw attention to women's intelligence, elegance, elegance and aesthetics with photographs….

Name: Smart Cities Council - Schweiz
Description: Smart Cities Council Switzerland

Name: Pakistan Chamber of Commerce - USA
Description: Pakistan Chamber of Commerce USA (PCC-USA) is an organization that aims to promote bilateral trade and investment between Pakistan and the United States. The organization represents Pakistani-American entrepreneurs, professionals, and businesses across the United States.

Name: Suffolk Networking Professionals
Description:
Whether you’re looking to buy a house, plan for retirement, update the look of your home, or build your business brand, we are your one-stop-shop to an interconnected network of professionals within the local community.

Having an interwoven network means you don’t have to think about the gaps that need to be filled when making big life decisions. Everyone within SNP works closely together so you never have to worry about the legitimacy of your other service professionals. Move forward through life with confidence.

Name: The Business Zone
Description:
The Business Zone is a new, locally rooted initiative created to support SMEs across Northern Ireland. Designed as an open, flexible business support network, it brings together entrepreneurs and business owners at every stage of their journey from start-up to scale-up.

As an EMEEN initiative, The Business Zone removes barriers to support. There are no membership fees, no complex entry requirements, and no heavy commitments. Instead, it creates a practical space where businesses can connect, learn, collaborate, and access guidance that helps them become stronger, more sustainable enterprises.

Working closely with key agencies and the wider enterprise ecosystem, The Business Zone focuses on real-world support strengthening local businesses to strengthen the local economy.

Name: Black Male Leadership Society
Description: The Black Male Leadership Society (BMLS) at the University of Georgia is a student-led organization committed to the personal and professional development of Black male students. Through mentorship, community service, and leadership training, BMLS fosters a supportive environment that encourages academic excellence, civic engagement, and career readiness. The organization seeks to empower its members to become influential leaders on campus and in their communities, while also addressing challenges faced by Black men in higher education and beyond.

Name: ECE Undergrad Student Council @ UC San Diego
Description: The ECE Undergraduate Student Council (ECE USC) is the voice of Electrical and Computer Engineering (ECE) students at UC San Diego. Through community building, networking, and leadership, the council strives to effect change within the department and campus at large though various events and programs.

Name: jurecOfficiel
Description: La vision de JUREC est de créer un monde où l’environnement et les ressources naturelles sont gérés de façon durable, sans compromettre le respect des droits humains, spécifiquement les droits des Communautés Locales et Peuples Autochtones riveraines et de contribuer à la lutte contre la pauvreté en milieu rural.

Name: NEXUS JSOM
Description:
NEXUS is a student-led JSOM organization here to serve and connect Comets to JSOM! 

As students, we know how tricky it can be to find resources when you need them. That's why NEXUS is here to bridge the gap between Comets and JSOM. 
Check out our list of services and what we can offer YOU.

 Connecting Comets to JSOM
 UG student organization, @jindal_utdallas
 Get to know fun events, student resources, and all things JSOM
 Turn post notifications on!

Make sure to follow our page to never miss an update, and reach out with any questions about NEXUS:
 JSOMNexus@utdallas.edu.

Follow us on Instagram (@nexus_jsom) and DM for urgent response to queries

Name: Criminology, Law and Society Club at UC Irvine
Description: The Criminology, Law, and Society Club aims to create a professional and collaborative environment for students pursuing similar academic and career interests in the legal or criminolological fields. Our mission is to foster networking opportunities among peers with shared aspirations, provide academic support, and offer resources to help students succeed in their studies and future careers. Through guest speaker events, workshops, and collaborative activities, we strive to offer valuable insights into career opportunities and real-world experiences in the field. A fresh and original space for Criminology majors, this club was established to address the need for a dedicated space where Criminology students can connect, share knowledge, and support one another in achieving their goals, here at UC Irvine.

Name: Northland Society of Toxicology
Description: We serve toxicologists in Minnesota, North and South Dakota, and Montana to support the development and application of sound science in the field of toxicology.

Name: IEEE SRMIST Trichy Student Branch
Description:
IEEE Student Branch – SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Tiruchirappalli
Advancing technology and innovation through workshops, hackathons, research, and industry collaboration. We empower students with skills, mentorship, and opportunities to innovate, publish, and lead — shaping the next generation of engineers and technologists.

Name: LeTip Midtown NYC Virtual
Description: We are a group of professionals who meet Wednesdays @ 10AM on zoom to network.

Name: VertrouwensAcademie
Description:
De VertrouwensAcademie ondersteunt organisaties bij het versterken van een veilige werkomgeving door:

* Coördinator vertrouwenspersonen

* Deskundig advies

Name: Women in Green
Description:
Bienvenue dans la communauté Women in Green !

 Qu'est-ce que Women in Green?

Ce club a pour ambition de créer une communauté de femmes actrices de la transition environnementale et sociale. 

Notre objectif aujourd'hui ?

 Rassembler des femmes leaders dans le domaine du développement durable autour d’évènements (conférences, salons, networking, fresques, ateliers) pour développer l’entraide.

 Créer un environnement sûr, bienveillant pour créer des liens qui ont du sens et partager ses connaissances.

 Qui peut nous rejoindre ?

Tu es engagée professionnellement sur des sujets de Stratégie Climat / RSE, Transition Environnementale, Innovation Responsable, Inclusion Sociale & co, .
Tu souhaites te former, échanger avec tes paires et développer ton réseau professionnel.
Tu partages nos valeurs : entraide, bienveillance, émulation et innovation.

Partante ? 
Rejoins nous ! womeningreen.contact@gmail.com

Name: Overland Park Rotary Club
Description:
Welcome to the Overland Park (KS) Rotary Club!  Rotary International was the world’s first volunteer service organization.  Rotary is a global network of 1.4 million neighbors, friends, leaders, and problem-solvers who see a world where people unite and take action to create lasting change – across the globe, in our communities, and in ourselves.  

Overland Park Rotary Club members meet weekly to plan service projects, discuss community and international issues, hear interesting speakers on a variety of topics, and enjoy the friendship of fellow Rotarians.

The Rotary Four Way Test for the things we think, say or do is:
1. Is it the TRUTH? 
2. Will it build GOOD WILL and BETTER FRIENDSHIPS?
3. Is it FAIR to all concerned? 
4. Will it be BENEFICIAL to all concerned?

Rotary’s Commitment to Diversity As a global network that strives to build a world where people unite and take action to create lasting change, Rotary values diversity and celebrates the contributions of people of all backgrounds.

Name: Colegio de Dentistas de Sevilla
Description: El Colegio Oficial de Dentistas de Sevilla (CODS) es la organización que agrupa a todos los dentistas de la provincia de Sevilla. Entre nuestros fines destaca el representar, de forma institucional, la profesión de dentista y defender sus intereses; velar por el adecuado nivel de calidad de las prestaciones profesionales de los colegiados y que éstas cumplan con las normas deontológicas de la profesión; proteger los intereses de los pacientes, teniendo además la potestad de organizar aquellas actividades y servicios comunes de interés para los colegiados y la sociedad en general, entre otros.

Name: Paige Michele & Co.
Description: Paige Michele & Co. is built on the idea that organizing isn’t just about “stuff"  but rather how your space makes you feel. With a background in psychology and training in social work, I help clients sort through clutter, set up systems that work for their lifestyle, and navigate the emotions that come up along the way. My focus is creating calm, functional spaces that support people’s well-being and make everyday life easier.

Name: The Glitterati
Description: We are an invitation-only membership club where influential and accomplished individuals converge. Our community is a unique blend of leaders, innovators, and visionaries from diverse industries, including business, technology, arts, and philanthropy.

Name: Leaders in Family Education at UNT
Description: We are a new student org at UNT for students who have an interest in Family Education.

Name: Adelphi University Student Nurses Association
Description: The goal of Adelphi University Student Nurses Association (AUSNA) is to provide students with experiences that they would not normally receive in the classroom. AUSNA allows students to come together and network with faculty, outside institutions, and other nursing students. AUSNA also provides numerous volunteer opportunities throughout the semester, as well as gives students exposure to job opportunities and information. The hope is to assist nursing students in their individual growth and the development of their career!

Name: Women in Interiors
Description:
A community championing and celebrating positivity, skill and expertise, uniting all the fabulous women in Interiors.

Whether interior designers, architects, developers, appliance specialists, construction, makers, marketeers, fitters, sales representatives, designers, specialists in a craft, or experts in an area, WIIN is an open network to ask questions, share ideas and support each other - helping us all to grow and encourage us to WIIN more business.

Quarterly events, social media presence and conversation forum.

A space to share passion, knowledge and information, a place to network to create a hub of creativity. If you’re looking for advice we want to use this platform to have the best women on speed dial and create a network of support and knowledge to help interior design, architecture and the KBB industry.

We hope this network grows and flourishes with events, round table talks and community collabs

Name: 100 Young Professionals for Des Moines
Description:
Mission Statement: To unite young professionals in the Des Moines metro through quarterly giving, building meaningful connections and making a direct impact on local nonprofits—one $50 donation at a time.

Vision Statement: To create a lasting culture of generosity in Greater Des Moines, led by the next generation of leaders who give selflessly, connect deeply, and serve unconditionally.

Goal: Our goal is simple with 100 members giving $50 each quarter, we will direct $5,000 of collective impact to a deserving nonprofit serving the Greater Des Moines area—every quarter. This is how we turn generosity into action, relationships into purpose, and young professionals into a force for local good.

Name: Electrical Summit
Description: O Electrical Summit é um evento de networking exclusivo, voltado para profissionais de diversas áreas do setor elétrico e de iluminação. Criado inicialmente como um encontro restrito a um pequeno grupo de especialistas, rapidamente ganhou notoriedade e, na sua segunda edição, já reuniu mais de 50 participantes. A iniciativa tem como principal objetivo fortalecer conexões, promover a troca de conhecimentos e impulsionar novas oportunidades de colaboração e negócios no setor.

Name: IBO
Description: Infinite Business Opportunities (iBO) is a Business platform created by business people for business people. This is an online platform which enables members to showcase their business and connect with other business people PAN India. The platform is set up not only for business growth but also to educate businesses on various strategies and latest tools for increasing their visibility. You need to be here to experience the amount of fun we have!

Name: P3JPH UIN Syarif Hidayatullah Jakarta
Description: Pusat Pengkajian dan Pengembangan Jaminan Produk Halal UIN Syarif Hidayatullah Jakarta

Name: ANIA DFW Chapter
Description:
The American Nursing Informatics Association (ANIA) emerged from the merger of two pioneering organizations: CARING (Capital Area Roundtable on Informatics in Nursing), founded in 1982 to advance automated healthcare information systems, and ANIA (American Nursing Informatics Association), established in 1992 in Southern California to support nurses in informatics. This merger began in 2005 and was officially completed in 2010, uniting both organizations under the name ANIA.

Today, ANIA proudly represents approximately 3,000 members, including nurses and healthcare professionals in various informatics roles. Our membership is diverse, welcoming both individual and corporate members committed to the advancement of nursing informatics.
Location: Dallas-Fort Worth Metroplex and surrounding areas

Name: Suomen Osteopaattiliitto
Description:
The Finnish Osteopathic Association (Suomen Osteopaattiliitto Ry- Finlands Osteopatförbund Rf) has 140 full members and 30 student members.

The title of an osteopath is protected occupational title since 1994. Currently we are working on being licensed, which would mean a better protection for the profession and would also allow us to be a part of the public health care system in the future.

Professionals entitled to use a protected occupational title will be entered into the central register of health care professionals maintained by the National Supervisory Authority for Welfare and Health, Valvira. In addition, each clinic or practice has to be registered at one of the six Regional State Administrative Agencies in Finland. The aim of the Agency is to make sure that high-quality health care services are available for the citizens.

Patients can self refer, as the osteopaths only work in the private sector. Some work places and one private insurance policy include osteopathy in their health care plan, and therefore accept referrals from doctors.

The CEN- standard is implemented in Finland. There are two schools of osteopathy in Finland that have been audited following the requirements of the CEN- standard. Roughly 40 students graduate from these school every spring.

Name: Green Drumming by BEAT'ABOX
Description:
Started as the first recycled drumming group in 2019, Green Drumming by BEAT’ABOX has evolved into Singapore's leading creative service provider specialising in performances, workshops, installations and special collaborative projects.

We make rhythm out of everyday items.
We turn waste into drums, junk into art.
We ignite limitless creative ideas through music, arts and sustainability.

Name: Gateway NAMA Chapter
Description:
Gateway NAMA is the greater St. Louis area chapter of the National Agri-Marketing Association. Our members span all disciplines from sales to communications to business executives and include anyone working in the eastern Missouri or western Illinois area. Network and learn from your peers!

NAMA is the premier organization for agri-marketing professionals. For over 60 years, we’ve provided education and insights that position NAMA members for success ... and equip them to deliver greater value for their companies and employers in a rapidly changing world.

More than 3,500 college students and professional members in the food and fiber industry trust NAMA to give them access to solutions and opportunities. And with 23 chapters in six regions across the country, NAMA helps members grow their agribusiness careers locally and nationally.

Name: Comunidade Secretariado Bahia
Description:
A Comunidade Secretariado Bahia nasceu em 2024 com o objetivo de conectar, apoiar e fortalecer os profissionais de secretariado executivo na Bahia. Criada para ser um espaço de troca de experiências, aprendizado e networking, a comunidade rapidamente se consolidou como um ambiente de referência para a categoria. Em 2024, com a crescente adesão de membros, expandiu-se significativamente, promovendo eventos, capacitações e discussões essenciais para o futuro da profissão.
Atualmente, contamos com cerca de 300 membros ativos e uma equipe de 4 administradoras dedicadas a manter a comunidade dinâmica, colaborativa e enriquecedora para todos.

Name: Associação Brasileira de Estudos em Energia (AB3E)
Description: The Brazilian Association for Energy Studies (AB3E) is a non-profit organization dedicated to advancing knowledge and innovation in Brazil's energy sector. Comprising experts, academics, and professionals in the field, AB3E stands out as a central platform for discussion, research, and dissemination of energy-related information.

Name: OPEN Imperative
Description: OPEN Imperative (Organizations for Pay Equity Now) is a coalition of high-growth founders, CEOs, HR leaders, and investors who are committed to end gender pay disparity in their organizations. Together, we commit to ending gender pay disparity in our organizations by 2027 via data-driven action.

Name: UCD PhD Society
Description: PhD society is an interactive space for all graduate researchers in UCD to network and connect. Our aim is to provide a platform of support to all PhD students where we can share our personal experiences as academics in different fields and learn from one another. We host a lot of fun events and activities throughout the academic year such as Brown bag talks, PhD tea meetings, social lunch events and much more to give you a much needed break from your desk. Joining the society will be a brilliant opportunity for you to meet other early career researchers and get peer support.

Name: University of Wisconsin Law School Vis Moot
Description: The University of Wisconsin Law School's Willem C. Vis Moot Arbitration Team is a prestigious group of law students dedicated to honing their skills in international commercial arbitration. We represent the Law School at the annual Willem C. Vis International Commercial Arbitration Moot in Vienna and the Vis East Moot in Hong Kong, two globally recognized competitions that simulate real-world international disputes. Through rigorous training and intense competition, our team members develop exceptional legal analysis, research, writing, and oral advocacy abilities. Join us as we strive to be leaders in the field of international dispute resolution.

Name: Save A Memory - Photo Management
Description: Get professional in-person or remote help to digitize, organize, and save your prints, negatives, and slides. Organize, dedupe your current digital photo libraries wherever they reside (Mac or PC). Convert family movies from VHS, MiniDV, Hi-8 tapes or other sizes. We have over 40 years working with photos and technology. Let us take the stress away so you can enjoy your family memories again and again.

Name: COCREATIVE Women
Description:
A powerful community of women co-creating the world they want to live in—transforming industries, uplifting communities, and thriving in alignment with their true selves.

We aim to unite, inspire, and empower a dynamic community of women who transform ideas into impact, champion creativity as a tool for empowerment, and drive innovation across industries while prioritizing holistic well-being.

Name: CONAPPED
Description:
Le Comité National de la Pêche Professionnelle en Eau Douce (CONAPPED), créé par la loi sur l’eau et les milieux aquatiques, a pour mission la représentation et la promotion des activités de pêche professionnelle en eau douce, la contribution à la gestion équilibrée des ressources ainsi qu’à l’amélioration des conditions de production, ou la participation à la préservation du milieu aquatique.
Le CONAPPED regroupe 330 pêcheurs professionnels en eau douce membres de dix associations agréées départementales ou interdépartementales (AA(i)PPED) couvrant l’ensemble du territoire métropolitain.
Titulaires de droits de pêche, les pêcheurs professionnels en eau douce sont les seuls autorisés à commercialiser le poisson, dans un cadre réglementaire défini par le Code de l’environnement. 

La pêche professionnelle en eau douce contribue à la conservation des écosystèmes aquatiques et de leurs ressources indispensables au bien-être de notre société et au maintien d’un lien vital avec la nature. 
- Lanceuse d’alerte, elle assure une veille environnementale, permettant une mise en lumière des dysfonctionnements provoqués par les différents usages des milieux impactant la biodiversité (aménagements des cours d’eau, pollutions, barrages, etc).
- Acteur responsable engagé dans les sciences participatives, elle appuie les services gestionnaires par l’apport de connaissances, contribue à des études spécifiques et des plans de gestion de grande ampleur. 
- Fournisseurs exclusifs de poissons sauvages pour l’alimentation et acteurs essentiels du patrimoine gastronomique et culturel de nos terroirs, les pêcheurs professionnels privilégient les circuits courts et la vente directe en proposant des produits locaux de qualité recherchés par les restaurateurs, dont certains chefs étoilés.

Name: Shimantik HRDC
Description:
Shimantik, a national non-government organization in Bangladesh, established in 1979. Shimantik is dully registered with the Social Service Department [Syl-7(221)/84, dated 16 May 1984] and NGO Affairs Bureau (Registration no.298 dated 28 May 1989), Directorate General of
Health Services (DGHS), and Technology

Name: Syracuse Pulp & Paper Foundation
Description:
The Syracuse Pulp & Paper Foundation (SPPF) prepares students to lead the pulp, paper, and allied industries—essential sectors that support everything from packaging and medical supplies to sustainable materials and renewable resources. In partnership with State University of New York College of Environmental Science and Forestry (SUNY ESF), we remove financial barriers and provide the scholarships, mentorship, and hands-on experience students need to launch rewarding careers.

Our graduates enjoy 100% job placement, entering the workforce debt-free and ready to design smarter, more sustainable solutions that benefit companies, communities, and the environment we all share.

Name: ECD Group/EISA
Description: The Early Career Development (ECD) group was established as part of the overall professional development support and activities that the European International Studies Association provides to its members. Its aim is to build a network of early career scholars in International Studies and related disciplines, to enhance collaboration among early career researchers, and to promote leadership within early career researchers.

Name: Nebraska Nurse Practitioners
Description: Empowering all Nebraska Nurse Practitioners to advance the profession through exceptional patient care, innovation and engagement.

Name: İş Dünyası Dönüşüm Zirvesi
Description:
İş Dünyası Dönüşüm Zirvesi, dijital dönüşüm, ekonomi, inovasyon, tasarım odaklı düşünme ve sürdürülebilir iş modellerini bir araya getiren sektörler arası bir etkinliktir. 
8 Kasım 2025'te Pamukkale Üniversitesi Prof. Dr. Hüseyin Yılmaz Kongre ve Kültür Merkezi — Denizli'de gerçekleşecek zirvede; lider konuşmaları ve panellerle katılımcılara hemen uygulanabilir yöntemler sunuyoruz.

Programımız; dijital strateji, ürün ve süreç tasarımı, insan kaynakları ve liderlik yaklaşımları ile şirket içi dönüşümlerin nasıl hızlandırılacağına odaklanır. Zirvede yer alan konuşmacılar, hem teori hem pratik deneyimlerini paylaşarak katılımcıların somut aksiyon planları çıkarmasını sağlayacak.

El Colegio defiende el concepto de profesionalismo médico, entendiéndolo como el conjunto de principios éticos y deontológicos, valores y conductas que sustentan el compromiso de los y las profesionales de la medicina con el servicio a la ciudadanía.

El compromiso con la mejora continua y con calidad en la atención a sus clientes, la gestión de los servicios adaptados a sus necesidades, y el cumplimiento de la legislación aplicable en todas sus actividades, es una constante en el funcionamiento del Colegio de Médicos de Bizkaia.

Name: Family Office Mastermind Group
Description:
The Family Office Mastermind Group is an invitation-only educational community where family office professionals connect with leading domain experts across geopolitics, national security, technology, philanthropy, and other critical domains impacting family legacy and operations.

We believe family offices need more than service providers—they need trusted advisors who bring world-class expertise without transactional agendas. FOMG creates the environment where those relationships develop naturally through education and authentic connection.

What Sets FOMG Apart:

- Education Over Transactions - Monthly forums focus on substantive learning, not prospecting. Members who attempt to solicit business are removed.

- Verified Trust - Every member undergoes comprehensive background checks, reference verification, and interviews with former intelligence professionals. All sign our ethics agreement ensuring confidentiality and transparency.

- Domain Expert Access - Direct connection to experts who brief members on critical topics—from congressional testimony on geopolitical threats to wealth preservation strategies.

- True Confidentiality - Beyond NDAs, we foster discretion where family offices can discuss real challenges under Chatham House Rules.

- Multigenerational Perspective - We think in decades, focusing on family legacy and long-term prosperity.

Part of a Larger Ecosystem:

FOMG is one pillar cultivating an ecosystem to support multigenerational thriving families:

- Bespoke Private Service connects families with exceptional talent
- Family Office Mastermind Group connects family office professionals with world-class domain experts
- The Greenhouse cultivates next-generation family office leaders

Founded on mutuality, kindness, and excellence—where meaningful relationships create lasting value across generations.

Name: Borrelmakers
Description:
Wij zijn Borrelmakers. We hebben een passie voor de menselijke kant van verandering en de dynamieken die daarin plaatsvinden. 

We zijn er voor ondernemers en leiders die voelen dat er iets anders moet.  
Bijvoorbeeld in de samenwerking, het resultaat, bedrijfscultuur, werkgeluk of ziekteverzuim. Maar niet weten hoe ze dit samen met hun mensen kunnen bereiken.  

We bieden training, coaching en begeleiding aan leiders en teams die samen aan het roer van hun verandering willen staan.  

Wat ons naast onze scherpte, pragmatische inslag, kennis en humor anders maakt, is de ontspannen setting en het ervarend leren. Dit zorgt voor de juiste veiligheid en echte gesprekken. Verandering is  gegarandeerd en duurzaam. 

Paul heeft 20 ervaring als ondernemer. Weet hoe het is om een bedrijf op te bouwen, teams te laten groeien en samen te werken in een managementteam. Weet alles van team- en leiderschapscoaching, ACT, Deep Democracy en trainen. Houdt van BBQ-en, spelletjesavonden en gezelligheid met familie en vrienden. 

Mischa heeft 17 ervaring bij ING. Als relatiemanager voor ondernemers weet hij wat er gebeurt aan de andere kant van de keukentafel. En als Agile Coach heeft hij aan het roer gestaan van grote veranderingen. Weet alles van team- en leiderschapcoaching, systemisch veranderen, psychologische veiligheid, Agile en trainen. Houdt van muziek, gezellige avonden aan de keukentafel en sluit graag aan bij spelletjesavonden.

Soms moet het eerst borrelen voordat het weer kan bruisen in je bedrijf. Wij maken dat het werkt.

We aver that our certifications are top-notch, world-class, innovative and industry-based with focus on international standards and best practices. Our curricula is a blend of theory and practice giving our certified professionals and practitioners competitive career advantage.

Name: Caja de Seguridad Social de Abogados y Procuradores de Santa Fe
Description:
El objetivo primordial de la Caja es asegurar los beneficios de la seguridad social al universo de sus afiliados, activos y pasivos, dentro de los recaudos previstos en la normativa vigente.

Este objetivo se fundamenta en el indispensable principio de solidaridad con equidad.

La Caja de Seguridad Social fue creada por Ley 3187 del año 1948, la que tuvo sus modificaciones, rigiendo en la actualidad la Ley 10.727. 

Teniendo en cuenta que los beneficios de la seguridad social deben ser garantizados tanto a los actuales beneficiarios como a los jóvenes profesionales, conforme indica el principio de solidaridad generacional que rige en esta materia, la Caja debe ejercer una eficiente administración de sus ingresos y el resguardo seguro de sus fondos de reserva.

Todo esto sobre la base de la autogestión por parte de sus afiliados, mediante sus representantes en el Directorio y con la fiscalización de una Sindicatura conjunta (interna y provincial); conforme se encuentra previsto en la ley vigente...

Name: PEARLS Community
Description:
The P.E.A.R.L. Executive Business Club is an exclusive membership platform that provides a wide range of resources and support to help business owners run their businesses successfully. The club offers four main components to its members, aimed at providing comprehensive assistance across various aspects of business operations. 

Firstly, the club provides a powerful advertising platform through the Strictly Social Communities social media platform. This platform is designed to help members promote their business and reach their target audience effectively. Members can leverage the platform's advanced targeting and analytics tools to optimize their marketing campaigns and maximize their return on investment. 

Secondly, business education is a critical aspect of the club's offerings. The P.E.A.R.L. Business Education Society provides members with access to a variety of courses, workshops, and seminars aimed at enhancing their business knowledge and skills. Members can choose from a wide range of topics, including marketing, finance, human resources, and operations, to improve their expertise and stay ahead of the curve. 

Thirdly, business funding is another crucial component of the club's offerings. The P.E.A.R.L. Business Financing Institute provides members with access to a range of funding options, including loans, grants, and investment opportunities, to assist them in expanding their businesses. The club's expert advisors can help members navigate the complex world of finance and identify the best funding options that align with their business goals. 

Lastly, technology procurement is essential for running a modern business. The P.E.A.R.L. Techubator is a platform that offers members access to the latest technology and tools to help them stay ahead of the competition. Members can leverage the platform's cutting-edge software and hardware solutions to streamline their operations, enhance their productivity, and improve their customer experience.

For membership inquiries and chapter formation, please email: gspnrimembership@gmail.com

Name: Heartland Chapter, Association of Certified Fraud Examiners (ACFE)
Description:
The Heartland Chapter of the Association of Certified Fraud Examiners, the 2025 and 2016 ACFE Global Chapter of the Year, is dedicated to the detection and deterrence of fraud. We are a non-profit professional organization comprised of fraud investigators, internal and external auditors, law enforcement, accountants, and finance professionals that is dedicated to the education and training of anti-fraud measures.

The Heartland Chapter has approximately 300 members from various companies, organizations, law enforcement agencies, and other public or private firms throughout our territory of the states of Nebraska, Iowa and South Dakota. The Heartland Chapter has a rich history with much of the success driven by the vision of our board of directors and officers.

Name: A.I.R. - Association International Relations
Description: A new reality designed to bridge the gap between university students and the professional world of international relations. We aim to bring forward a variety of projects and initiatives that can help master's students to better understand what to do after completing their studies in the field of International Relations, and also facilitate them to follow the path they might choose

Description: ALPFA is dedicated to empowering Latino men and women as leaders of character for the nation, across all sectors of the global economy. Join us to connect with a diverse community, access professional development resources, and make a meaningful impact on diversity, equity, and inclusion. Whether you're a student seeking scholarships and internships or a professional looking to advance your career, ALPFA offers opportunities for growth and networking. Partner with us to recruit top Latino talent and shape the future of leadership. Join ALPFA and be part of a dynamic movement driving positive change worldwide.

Description: The Undergraduate Chapter of Sigma Iota Rho at the University of Michigan is part of the National Honor Society for International Studies, dedicated to recognizing and promoting academic excellence in international affairs. Through this organization, students engage in scholarly activities, leadership development, and collaborative opportunities that foster a deep understanding of global issues. The chapter provides a platform for students to connect with peers, faculty, and professionals in the field, encouraging the exploration of international security, diplomacy, human rights, and cross-cultural cooperation.

Name: Maranello Hospitality

Maranello Hospitality è il brand che racchiude tutte le attività del nostro gruppo dedicate all’ospitalità.

Name: Business Law Society
Description: The Business Law Society (BLS) was formed and recognized by the Student Bar Association in 2003 to fill a much-needed gap in the available student organizations. BLS provides networking, educational, and career opportunities in an encouraging environment, allowing University of Maryland law students to gain practical knowledge of areas of business law, to meet other students with similar interests, and to gain insight from practicing lawyers in all areas of business law.

ASYP connects innovators, entrepreneurs, and visionaries who strive for excellence in every field. Our members gain access to nationwide events, meaningful connections, and opportunities that define the next generation of leadership.

Description:
ACORDJOC es una asociación profesional que representa a las micro y pequeñas empresas catalanas del sector del juego.

El objetivo prioritario de Acordjoc es defender los intereses de nuestros asociados, informando sobre las normativas y las constantes actualizaciones, promoviendo acciones y haciéndolos partícipes en los procesos reguladores sectoriales con el fin de establecer el marco legal más eficiente, actualizado y competitivo.

Acordjoc es una asociación responsable y transparente, orientada a crear y ofrecer servicios que aporten un valor añadido para mejorar la posición competitiva de nuestros asociados en el sector del juego.

Description: The Washington College of Law Space Law Society connects students with an interest in space law and provides related educational, professional, and recreational activities.

Name: Opportunity Fund Club
Description:
The UConn Opportunity Fund Club (OFC), founded by Sophomore Marketing Major Isabella Garcia, aims to extend the mission and impact of the University of Connecticut’s Opportunity Fund project by creating a student-driven organization focused on providing resources, mentorship, and professional development opportunities to UConn students from diverse and underrepresented backgrounds. The club will serve as a platform for students to engage in philanthropic efforts, access financial literacy education, and create pathways to internships, scholarships, and other career development opportunities.

The OFC Club will partner with corporations, alumni, local businesses, and university organizations to enhance students' academic and career success. Through workshops, speaker events, networking sessions, and fundraising, the club will build a supportive network that addresses the unique challenges faced by students from historically underrepresented groups in the world of finance.

Much like the Opportunity Fund Project courses, the mission of the UConn Opportunity Fund Club is to empower students from diverse backgrounds by expanding access to opportunities, promoting financial literacy, and facilitating community engagement. Through mentorship, resources, and collaborative initiatives, creating a younger and more diverse cohort to train as investors, as it is open to all students.The organization aims to prepare students to understand what it takes to become investment managers, venture capitalists, consultants, commercial bankers, private equity investors, and investment bankers.

Name: SixBase Experiential Marketing
Description: As a business leader, you know how important a focus or niche is. You know exactly how to make the best product and offer the best experience. Anything else can become a distraction to your core vision. That’s why allowing an agency to focus on your marketing, while you focus on the business, makes a world of difference for growth.

ESLS hosts various speaker events, networking events, a mentorship program, and other opportunities in the areas of film, television, talent, music, fashion, digital media, and sports.

Name: The Second Circle Institute
Description:
The Second Circle Institute serves leaders in a unique spot — directors, VPs, and other senior managers who drive strategy but don’t yet sit in the top seat. They’re often overlooked by executive networks and underserved by traditional leadership programs.

2CI bridges that gap with an immersive Accelerator for rapid growth, and a sustained peer network for ongoing connection and accountability — a program built exclusively for the “second circle” of leadership.

Description: Les objectifs de l'APNB sont de promouvoir la neuropsychologie (auprès du grand public, des professionnels et des instances), de participer au développement professionnel, de développer le réseau local, de promouvoir la recherche et la formation initiale, ainsi que de contribuer à la dynamique associative avec notamment les liens inter-associatifs régionaux et nationaux.

Name: Young Professionals of Stillwater
Description:
If you are looking for networking, leadership, and social opportunities for young working adults in Stillwater, Oklahoma, you have come to the right place! YPS is a diverse group of working adults in our 20s-40s who want to explore educational, social, and community-oriented opportunities together.

Young Professionals of Stillwater's goal is to organize cultural and educational options locally that are fun and inspiring, including monthly networking opportunities, volunteer events, and other special activities. As our organization is continuing to grow with new members, YPS constantly strives to bring programs that will help you grow both personally and professionally.

Name: EDEC AUTOMOBILE
Description: L'industrie automobile est en pleine mutation, confrontée à des défis majeurs mais aussi à des opportunités passionnantes. C'est dans ce contexte que l'EDEC Automobile (Engagement de Développement de l’Emploi et des Compétences) se positionne comme un acteur clé pour soutenir et guider ce secteur vital à travers une transition inédite.

Name: BEM FK Unud
Description:
Badan Eksekutif Mahasiswa (BEM) Fakultas Kedokteran UNUD pertama kali terbentuk pada tahun 1964 yang saat itu dikenal dengan Senat Mahasiswa FK UNUD. Tujuan pendirian saat itu yaitu untuk menampung aspirasi mahasiswa dan juga meningkatkan citra FK UNUD melalui kegiatan-kegiatannya.
Seiring dengan perkembangan dinamika organisasi kemahasiswaan, maka pada tanggal 28 April 2002 berdirilah Lembaga Mahasiswa Fakultas Kedokteran Universitas Udayana (LMFK UNUD) dengan BEM FK UNUD sebagai lembaga eksekutifnya dan Badan Perwakilan Mahasiswa (BPM) FK UNUD sebagai lembaga legislatifnya. Lembaga lainnya yaitu Badan Pekerja LMFK (BP-LMFK) , dan juga Badan Semi Otonom (BSO) , yang terdiri dari TBM, KIH, dan KMPA. Anggota LMFK ini adalah seluruh mahasiswa FK UNUD.

Pemilihan Ketua BEM FK UNUD dilaksanakan melalui Pemilihan Umum Raya (Pemira) yang melibatkan seluruh mahasiswa FK. Masa jabatannya adalah selama satu periode kepengurusan dan selanjutnya dapat dipilih kembali untuk satu kali masa jabatan. Pada akhir kepengurusannya, ketua BEM menyampaikan laporan pertanggungjawabannya dalam Musyawarah Mahasiswa (MUSMA) yang merupakan forum pemegang kedaulatan tertinggi dalam LMFK.

Name: Women's Undergraduate Law Society
Description: It can be intimidating navigating the "pre-law" journey alone. Established in 2022, the Women's Undergraduate Law Society is a supportive environment for aspiring attorneys to connect with other women, learn about resources pertaining to the LSAT and law school admissions, and much more.

Name: Energy & Infrastructure Professional Association - EIPA
Description: EIPA - Energy & Infrastructure Professional Association is a not for profit, online open platform for Industry professionals to share market insights, networking and business connect.

Name: International Salmon Farmers Association
Description:
The International Salmon Farmers Association is an umbrella organization comprised of national and regional associations from around the world.

ISFA members share a common vision and dedication to helping our farmers and industry professionals produce healthy food, revitalize coastal communities and build vibrant businesses.

The farmers and industry professionals we represent produce healthy food in an economically, socially and environmentally sustainable manner. They create work in remote areas of the world and strive to be a forward looking industry, learning through research and innovation.

The ISFA is led by an Executive Committee: President – Jon Arne Grøttum, Norway.

Name: DareToShift

Nurturing the entrepreneurial spirit…because building a business isn't easy—you don't have to build alone. We curate events, community, programs, trips, & resources for founders, executives, & investors. Learn more or join us at www.DareToShift.com by Paradigm

Name: Network4Her
Description:
Comunidade de networking feminino estratégico voltada para mulheres no mercado financeiro, com foco em criar conexões qualificadas, trocas de alto nível e oportunidades reais de crescimento
profissional, liderança e visibilidade no setor.

A Network4her se diferencia por oferecer um ambiente de networking feminino no mercado financeiro que vai além das relações profissionais. A comunidade promove conexões humanas genuínas,
baseadas em confiança, valores e troca real, criando um espaço seguro onde mulheres se sentem à vontade para compartilhar experiências, construir relações duradouras e crescer juntas. Com
foco em conexões estratégicas e intencionais, a Network4her fortalece a liderança feminina, amplia a visibilidade profissional e gera oportunidades concretas, unindo desenvolvimento de carreira, pertencimento e crescimento coletivo.

Name: WEDSTRIJDFIT
Description: Wie bekend is met de topsport weet: vorm is bepalend. En topvorm is geen toeval. Topvorm is het resultaat van fit zijn. Niet zomaar fit, maar wedstrijdfit. The goal is for every member to cultivate her story throughout her career whilst gaining a community in the process. We aim to provide support through endless networking opportunities, corporate exposure, and promoting continuous professional development. Above all, we are committed to advocating for Black Women professionally.

Name: TerMaatWerkt
Description:
TerMaatWerkt helpt organisaties bij het ontwikkelen van naar een duurzame organisatie, namelijk een mensgerichte organisatie. Door vanuit het uitgangspunt van gezamenlijke verantwoordelijkheid, talent en authenticiteit en integriteit, menszijn met elkaar te verbinden. Dit biedt vervolgens basis om als mens en of organisatie tot een strategie te komen met een visie en een handelwijze vanuit de menselijke maat. Door samen te werken te komen tot het ontwikkelen we de samenleving Ondernemerschap op basis van, door en voor de gemeenschap. 

Talentvol: Talenten ontwikkelen en opleiden
Menszijn: Authenticiteit en Integriteit is gezondheid en vitaliteit
Werksamen: De menselijke maat, ondernemerschap en gemeenschap biedt ruimte voor ontwikkeling van mens en organisatie

Name: Instituto Iberoamericano de Derecho Concursal - Hon. Gerardo Carlo Altieri, Capítulo de Puerto Rico
Description:
El Instituto Iberoamericano de Derecho Concursal (IIDC) es una asociación internacional de profesionales del campo de insolvencia de Latinoamérica y Europa. 

Esta es la página del Capítulo de Puerto Rico del Instituto Iberoamericano de Derecho Concursal. Este Capítulo fue creado por el Hon. Gerardo Carlo Altieri (QEPD), y lleva su nombre para continuar su legado de unir profesionales de insolvencia de Puerto Rico con Latinoamérica y Europa. 

El IIDC fue fundado en Barranquilla, Colombia en el 2005, y se enfoca en crear una comunidad de profesionales de insolvencia para compartir ideas, prácticas, y experiencias dentro de sus respectivas jurisdicciones, y desarrollar la investigación de asuntos de insolvencia. El IIDC cuenta con profesionales y académicos de diversos países (entre ellos Argentina, Brasil, Chile, Colombia, México, Perú, Puerto Rico, Uruguay, Venezuela, España, Italia y Portugal), y con distintos capítulos nacionales que forman parte del IIDC. 

En esta página, puedes seguir y obtener más información del IIDC y del Capítulo de Puerto Rico. 

Bienvenido!

Name: ADELE - Association Décarbonation Loire Estuaire
Description:
La démarche Loire Estuaire Décarbonation, portée par un collectif d’acteurs industriels et publics, vise la transformation du territoire industrialo-portuaire en un hub d’énergies décarbonées pour atteindre la neutralité carbone à horizon 2050. 
Lauréat de l’Appel à Projet Zones Industrielles Bas Carbone (ZIBaC) de l’ADEME et France 2030, Loire Estuaire Décarbonation s’appuie sur une vingtaine de projets visant à accélérer la transformation de cet espace de 28 500 emplois. 

Cette démarche est portée par l'association ADELE (Association DEcarbonation Loire Estuaire), créée en 2023. L'association regroupe des industriels du territoire Loire Estuaire, Saint Nazaire Agglomération, la Communauté de Communes Estuaire et Sillon, la Région Pays de la Loire et le Grand Port Maritime Nantes Saint Nazaire.

L’ADELE orchestre cette dynamique collective et son programme pour accélérer la transition énergétique du territoire.

Au delà des membres fondateurs, la démarche Loire Estuaire Décarbonation est ouverte à tout entité (entreprises, organismes de formation, acteur du développement local, etc.) souhaitant contribuer à cette dynamique de décarbonation du territoire.

Name: FREIA
Description:
We are a working space on gender, ethics, and transparency for the private sector (start-ups, SMEs, and law firms in different areas of the labor field) in Latin America. 
We educate future leaders through training and workshops, we advise on the generation of data with a gender perspective, and we build follow-up, monitoring, and evaluation strategies. 
In an attempt to reduce existing inequalities, we seek to empower and educate future leaders through workshops and theoretical courses, in accordance with international human rights standards and with a view to acquiring best practices in the areas of gender, ethics, and transparency. 

In addition, we customize our services to the LATAM context, in Spanish, and with cutting-edge practices, acquiring expertise in the matter that goes hand in hand with advocacy.

Name: Lederne Østsjælland
Description:
I Lederne Østsjælland har vi  ca. 7.000 ledere som medlemmer i kommunerne Lejre, Greve, Stevns, Roskilde, Solrød og Køge.
På landsplan er vi ca. 135.000 ledere organiseret i 19 lokalbestyrelser.

Vi arbejder med Lederne centralt omkring de mærkesager, der er udvalgt, og for vores lokale medlemmer ved at skabe øget engagement lokalt omkring lokale prioriteter og aktiviteter. 

Følg med på siden her for at høre mere om vores lokale arrangementer, og hvad der sker i Lederne og hos ledere lokalt og nationalt.
Location: Roskilde, Køge, Greve, Solrød og Ringsted, Østsjælland

Name: Equilibrium

Equilibrium notebooks are carefully crafted to help you stay organized and efficient, whether you are documenting sessions with clients or planning your professional development.

Client Equilibrium can become your best ally in tracking progress, recording important information, and setting goals with clients.

Personal Equilibrium includes sections for note-taking, self-care and mental health, as well as notes for professional growth and development. By recording your goals, tasks, and progress, you can efficiently plan your time and improve productivity.

Description: We are reaching out to you to introduce Seena Project, Consulting and Management Company. Seena Project has established in 2019. We perform projects, build PR campaigns, including creating and managing social media, blog content, web design, and newsletters. So far, we have supported many non-governmental organizations in their work. Lately, we have been studying non-governmental organizations working in Syria for some time. We have seen that they have a significant number of problems with work permits that will allow them to operate in Turkey. Name: Albert en André Bedrijfsregisseurs
Description:
Je wilt je (familie)bedrijf laten groeien, of je (intern) laten overnemen, maar je weet niet waar je moet beginnen. Er is zoveel te plannen en te bespreken: organisatiemanagement, verwachtingsmanagement, financiële planningen, HRM, etc.

COMMERCIEEL EN FINANCIEEL STERK
Wij, Albert & André, hebben veel ervaring op allerlei commercieel en financieel gebied. Wij lopen, als gewone jongens, jouw bedrijf binnen en gaan als bedrijfsregisseurs aan de slag. We praten, zoeken, helpen en plannen.

NIET ALLEEN EEN GOED PLAN, MAAR OOK IMPLEMENTATIE
We laten je niet zitten met een dik, duur en nutteloos plan waarvan je uiteindelijk de achterkant maar gebruikt als notieblok, of het bij het oud papier gooit. Daar kunnen we namelijk niet tegen. We willen wel dat er ook echt iets gebeurt of verandert, en helpen je daarbij. We komen niet alleen maar op de koffie, snap je?
