Name: Her Long Island Influence
Description:
“Her Long Island Influence” (HLII) – a dynamic women’s networking group poised to redefine collaboration and empowerment on Long Island. 

Our mission? To cultivate a vibrant community where women from all walks of life come together to share insights, forge meaningful connections, and amplify each other’s voices. Through regular meetings, we provide a platform for personal and professional growth, fostering a supportive environment where members can thrive and make their mark. 

Join us as we embark on a journey to unleash the collective power of women across Long Island and beyond. Your influence matters – let’s shape the future together.

Name: Enterprise Connect Nigeria
Description: An Information Services Enterprise helping professionals and entrepreneurs accomplish sustainable success

Name: The Womanist Collective
Description: A community membership for Black female therapists: Equipping Black female therapists with the tools to persist and flourish in the field of mental health

Name: FoU-nettverket i Virke Rehab
Description: FoU-nettverket består av 22 private rehabiliteringsinstitusjoner i Norge. Initialtomfattetdettemedlemsinstitusjoneri VirkeRehab, mendethar siden blitt åpnet forTSR bedriftermed ulik arbeidsgivertilknytning. Vi skal være en drivkraft til å etablere og gjennomføre forsknings-, utviklings- og innovasjonsarbeid ved private rehabiliteringsinstitusjoner. Nettverkskoordinator er Tarja Kvalheim (forskningsleder ved Røde Kors Haugland Rehabiliteringssenter).

Name: Pod Circles
Description:
Pod Circles is where internationally-minded executives have real conversations about leadership, growth — and life.

Six confidential dinners a year. Curated peer groups. No small talk, no posturing — just bold, honest leadership reflection.

Every member brings global experience. Every Pod is diverse by design.
Because real leadership growth doesn’t stop at the boardroom door.

Name: ACAMS Singapore Chapter
Description: The mission of the ACAMS Singapore Chapter is to establish and develop a forum for training and a support network in Singapore for AML/Financial Crime industry practitioners who are interested in sharing best practice know-how and expertise with their peers for the common goal of achieving a more effective AML/Financial Crime environment.

Name: Keystone Species
Description:
Mensen en organisaties verbinden en bewegen om vanuit bezieling een positieve bijdrage te leveren aan de wereld van vandaag én morgen. Dat is onze missie.
 
Met ons werk geven we een antwoord op de zorgwekkende ontwikkelingen in klimaat, biodiversiteit en groeiende ongelijkheid in de wereld. Juist daarom begeleiden wij organisaties die echt impact willen maken. Die duurzaamheid naar een hoger niveau willen trekken en voorloper willen worden in hun sector.  
 
‘Daar waar mensen zich gezamenlijk durven te verbinden met wie ze diep van binnen zijn en wat ze de wereld te bieden hebben, komt een enorme positieve en collectieve kracht vrij. Het is juist díe kracht die we nodig hebben om de wereld van vandaag te veranderen in de wereld van morgen.’

Name: Guilds with Benefits
Description: A Pacific Northwest Membership Association, supporting a community of business owners and independent workers. Connect with the Guild community, get discovered on our directory, and participate in a retirement plan today. Group health insurance plans coming early 2026.

Name: Scandinavian Seafood Export
Description:
Nestled in the heart of the North Atlantic, our fish factory is dedicated to bringing you the finest, freshest catches that the seas have to offer.

We take immense pride in our rich maritime heritage and sustainable fishing practices. With a legacy that spans generations, our skilled fishermen navigate the challenging waters of the north atlantic ocean, employing traditional techniques and embracing modern technology to ensure the highest quality catches.

Name: Ingenieur-Geometer Schweiz (IGS)
Description: Die Ingenieur-Geometer-Schweiz (IGS) ist die gesamtschweizerische Unternehmer- und Arbeitgeber-Organisation der Ingenieur-Geometer. Wir engagieren uns für die Weiterentwicklung unseres Berufsstandes - in der Geomatik, im Landmanagement und in der Unternehmungsführung.

Name: Texas Corrections Association (TCA)
Description: TEXAS CORRECTIONS ASSOCIATION is dedicated to providing a forum for promoting quality correctional practices through professional growth, leadership, mentorship and education. TCA is organized to anticipate and respond to the needs of our members, clients and the general public.

Name: SheepAndGo
Description: Nous proposons des activités de team building uniques en pleine nature avec des moutons, idéales pour renforcer la cohésion d'équipe de façon originale. En plus, nous offrons des services d’éco-pâturage avec des moutons pour l'entretien écologique des terrains, ainsi que des prestations de débroussaillage et de défrichage mécanique. Une solution complète pour allier bien-être des équipes et gestion durable de vos espaces.

Name: Eden Vert 3D
Description:
Nos équipes luttent contre vos nuisibles, depuis 1976 ! 
Que vous ayez besoin d'une dératisation, d'une désinfection ou d'une désinsectisation, nous sommes là.

Name: Society of Research Fellows
Description: The Purdue Institute for Cancer Research-Society of Research Fellows (PICR-SRF) is a group comprised of graduate and postdoctoral trainees. The goal of the PICR-SRF is to foster a sense of community among the researchers at the Purdue Institute for Cancer Research and provide opportunities for personal and professional development.

Name: DLSU POLISCY
Description: The Political Science Society is the oldest political organization in De La Salle University - Manila and it was established in 1984 for those individuals who are interested in learning more about the socio-political and economic structures in our society. Its vision and mission is grounded upon the role of uplifting student awareness and involvement towards meaningful, effective and progressive political participation. It aims to advance political awareness and critical thinking in order to empower individuals to be catalysts for social change. In response to its goal, the organization continuously develops a broad range of activities that enables individuals to both raise awareness and engage in community development.

Name: Delegação Distrital Santarém - Ordem dos Engenheiros
Description:
A Ordem dos Engenheiros - Região Sul (OERS) é uma das cinco regiões da Ordem dos Engenheiros (OE), associação pública profissional, sem fins lucrativos, representativa daqueles que exercem a profissão de engenheiro.

A atividade da Região Sul tem por objetivo contribuir para a missão da OE, que passa por promover o progresso da engenharia, estimular os esforços dos seus Membros nos domínios científico, profissional e social e defender o cumprimento das regras de ética profissional.

A OERS conta com cerca de 30 mil membros, mais de metade do total nacional, e engloba o território dos distritos de Beja, Évora, Faro, Lisboa, Portalegre, Santarém e Setúbal. Tem sede na capital portuguesa e dispõe de quatro delegações distritais: Évora, Faro, Portalegre e Santarém.

A estrutura da OERS compreende, entre outros, o Conselho Diretivo, o qual é constituído pelo Presidente, o Vice-Presidente, o Tesoureiro, o Secretário e três Vogais.

Entre outros benefícios, os Membros usufruem de condições vantajosas para participação nas atividades técnico-profissionais, ações de formação, conferências, seminários, eventos culturais e outras iniciativas da OERS, organizadas pela Área de Formação, Comunicação e Cultura.

A OERS disponibiliza ainda aos seus Membros serviços tais como Secretaria, Quotização, Tesouraria, Biblioteca e Jurídico, bem como o Restaurante Panorâmico e o Auditório, no edifício da avenida António Augusto de Aguiar.

Name: UMIH 63
Description: Syndicat patronale

Name: IEEE WIE Boise Section
Description: Welcome to IEEE WIE Boise Section! We're a community of engineers, researchers, and tech enthusiasts passionate about supporting and empowering women in STEM. Through networking, mentorship, and skill-building events, we create opportunities to grow, connect, and inspire the next generation of innovators. Whether you're a student, professional, or ally, join us in making engineering more inclusive and impactful

Name: Phi Alpha Delta Pre-Law Fraternity University of Illinois
Ethical AI Alliance
Description:
Ethical AI Alliance 

Navigating AI with Integrity | Responsible Innovation for Business & Society 

About Us 

Ethical AI Alliance provides business leaders, IT professionals, and decision makers with the necessary knowledge, tools and support to address the ethical issues of artificial intelligence. Because AI is now impacting all industries, it is therefore important to use responsible, understandable and fair AI in deployment. 

Founded by a 30-year veteran in cybersecurity, IT, business operations and philosophy, we fill the gap between what is technically possible and what is ethically right. We aim to lead the way in discussing the ethical implications of AI, so that executives can understand the risks and opportunities and learn how to develop effective strategies to mitigate risks, create trustworthy AI systems and foster a culture of responsible innovation. 

What We Do 
o	Ethical AI Insights – Our insights on bias mitigation, data privacy, algorithmic transparency, and AI governance. 
o	Executive Guidance – Frameworks for business leaders to navigate the ethical and regulatory risks of AI. 
o	Emerging Issues – Explorations of the medical digital twins, AI surveillance, autonomous systems, and data ownership. 
o	Industry Collaboration – Bringing together policymakers, technologists, and business leaders to discuss meaningful AI ethics. 


Why Follow Us? 

AI is changing the world: will your company be a part of ethical innovation or a part of the problem? Stay ahead of the risks, regulatory changes and best practices by following Ethical AI Alliance. Let’s create the future of AI – responsibly, transparently and ethically.

Name: Currency: A Collective
Description: Currency was formed to create intentional connections for the new vanguard—those shaping what’s next. We leverage a curated network of multi-hyphenated leaders to foster community, unlock opportunities for collaboration, and drive business objectives that promote collective growth for the community.

Name: Loyola Pre-Law Society
Description:
The Pre-Law Society is composed of individuals who share a common interest in the field of law. The Pre-Law Society is open to all students interested in the study of law, even if they are not "pre-law" and do not plan on going to law school. The organization meets several times a semester and in the past has had speakers (lawyers, judges, law students, Loyola alums, etc.), field trips (local courts, D.C.), movie nights, and workshops (LSAT Preparation, Personal Statement, Applying to Law School, etc.).

The majority of correspondence with our members is done through the Pre-Law Society Facebook Group.  For questions, comments, recommendations, or concerns, feel free to contribute to the discussion board or email prelawsociety@loyola.edu.

Name: Polycert
Description:
Polycert, entreprise accréditée par le Cofrac qui délivre des certifications depuis 15 ans. Elle est un expert de la certification dans le management de la qualité avec l’ISO 9001 et pour le domaine des dispositifs médicaux avec l’ISO 13485.
Polycert vous accompagne pour vous apporter une prestation adaptée aux besoins de votre entreprise avec des professionnels du domaine. Nos auditeurs expérimentés vous font tendre vers un progrès continu. 
L’intégrité, rigueur et réactivité sont au centre de la politique de Polycert dont le but premier est votre satisfaction.

Name: J&F Activities
Description: At J&F Activities, we specialize in organizing unforgettable sports experiences. Our focus lies in creating professional training camps and dynamic sports tournaments tailored to teams and athletes of all levels. With our passion for sports and eye for detail, we provide the perfect setting for growth, competition, and team spirit.

Name: WEADS Women Entrepreneurs Abu Dhabi
Description:
WEADS is Abu Dhabi's largest group of women entrepreneurs. With over 5,000 members, we aim to guide our women into flourishing Abu Dhabi businesses.
WEMarket community pop-up markets supports the businesses of WEADS.

Name: Pakistan National Young Lawyers Association
Description: The Pakistan National Young Lawyers Association (PNYLA) is a national community for law students and young legal professionals. We provide mentorship, practical training, internship support, networking opportunities, and leadership development, while offering guidance and support at every stage of the legal journey. Our aim is to help young lawyers grow with confidence, professionalism, and purpose.

Name: Campsites
Description: Campsite is a community of forward-thinking accounting & finance leaders at mid-size tech companies sharing collective knowledge, building community, and growing together. Each major city is its own Campsite with its own local events and digital hub via a Slack channel. Each local Campsite is a member of the broader Campground with national events held virtually and in-person. Campsites is hosted by Campfire, learn more at meetcampfire.com/campsites

Name: YPO Next Generation (YNG) Dallas
Description:
A global network for YPO-connected young adults, nurturing leadership and success in Dallas. YNG Dallas serves as a source for all members in the DFW area to participate in only-in-YNG experiences. 

If you are a YNG Community member and new to Dallas or just in the area please reach out, we would love to hear from you! 

Instagram: @yngdallas 
Email: yng.dallas@gmail.com 
 

 At YNG, we connect you with peers to forge enduring professional relationships and deep personal friendships. Our platform offers a multitude of opportunities through local and global events, along with exclusive benefits. Experience the YNG Digital Platform and Directory for networking, enhance your skills with our Learning Programs, and engage with diverse, international groups in our Local and Global Communities. Participate in high-calibre YPO Network Events and gain specialized knowledge through Forum Training and MicroForum. 

 YNG's partnerships provide you access to executive learning programs and direct links to the expertise of YPO members for mentorship, job, and internship opportunities worldwide. Elevate your professional capabilities with our Executive Learning Opportunities, find global career opportunities through our Jobs and Internship Portal, and receive personal guidance from seasoned leaders via YPO Mentoring. 

 Develop your leadership skills with YNG and prepare to shape the future. Take on roles that allow you to influence and contribute actively to the YNG community. Lead and innovate in event planning as an Event Champion, share your insights and stories as a YNG Speaker, and be at the forefront of decision-making in Executive Committee Roles. Additionally, access a wealth of information and support with our Resources for YPO Networks. 

 Join YNG and embark on a journey that enhances your professional path and personal growth,all while being part of a vibrant and supportive community.

Name: PharmConnect Network, Pune
Description:
PharmConnect Network (PCN) is a dynamic, student-driven initiative created to bring together pharmacy students from across institutions and backgrounds. Built on the pillars of networking, collaboration, and professional growth, PCN provides a platform where aspiring pharmacists can connect, learn, and grow beyond the walls of their classrooms.

Our vision is to create a vibrant community of pharmacy students who exchange knowledge, build meaningful relationships, and contribute to the future of healthcare. By bridging gaps between students, professionals, and opportunities, PCN aims to empower young minds to become confident leaders and innovators in the pharmaceutical field.

 What We Do:
Networking: Creating opportunities for pharmacy students to connect and share experiences across colleges and cities.
Skill Development: Organizing events, workshops, and discussions that focus on personal, professional, and leadership growth.
Knowledge Sharing: Encouraging exchange of ideas, updates, and insights from academia, industry, and clinical practice.
Community Engagement: Fostering a culture of teamwork, inclusivity, and collaboration through both online and offline initiatives.

 Our Motto:
"Connecting Pharmacy Students for Growth, Learning, and Impact."

Whether you’re a pharmacy student, healthcare enthusiast, or professional looking to engage with the next generation of pharmacists, PCN is your place to INNOVATE I CONNECT I SUCCEED

Name: CFTC Taxis
Description:
La CFTC Taxis, première organisation syndicale de la branche Taxis, est un syndicat composé de femmes et d'hommes, résolus à préserver les acquis du taxi tout en travaillant avec les pouvoirs publics pour obtenir des avancées concrètes. Notre approche repose sur un dialogue social fort et constructif, en étroite collaboration avec les chauffeurs. Nous restons à l’écoute de leurs préoccupations et déterminés à agir pour faire évoluer notre métier avec son époque dans l'intérêt de nos clients. 
La transparence, l’information et la détermination sont les principaux piliers de notre nouvelle vision.

Name: Senalba Minas Gerais
Description: Sindicato dos Empregados Em Entidades de Assistência Social de Orientação e Formação Profissional no Estado de Minas Gerais

Name: Echelle
Description:
Echelle is a community connecting current students and alumnae from the top MBA programs. Our mission is to build authentic community, help our members achieve their unique potential, and change the status quo of decision-makers.

We have local chapters with in-person events, ongoing facilitated small group circles to problem solve challenges, destination retreats, and an online platform. Apply to join at our website.

Name: U2P Rhône et Métropole de Lyon
Description:
Les artisans, commerçants et professionnels libéraux partagent des valeurs similaires, parmi lesquelles : indépendance, esprit d’entreprendre, excellence, proximité, transmission des savoir-faire, innovation.

Pour représenter et défendre les travailleurs indépendants et les TPE-PME, l’U2P (Union des entreprises de proximité) fédère cinq organisations membres (CAPEB, CGAD, CNAMS, UNAPL, CNATP) et regroupe 120 organisations professionnelles.

Dans le Rhône et la Métropole de Lyon, les 118 242 entreprises artisanales, commerciales et libérales constituent l’économie de proximité, soit près de 400 métiers, les deux tiers des entreprises et 35 % des apprentis et contrats de professionnalisation. L’U2P Rhône et Métropole les accompagne au quotidien.

Name: Opening the Box
Description:
“opening the box" invites you to delve into the realms of systems thinking, by exploring four layers of ‘systems’: parts and wholes, nascent development, coherence, and metamorphosis. 
This book is for those who may not believe that they use systems thinking, but already consider relationships and connections in situations, those who wish to learn who are seeking a place to start, or those already practicing systems thinking looking for a different ‘take’ on the discipline. Our story uncovers the power of critical and systemic thinking, as Pandora and her grandmother challenge surface-level solutions, and advocate for deeper exploration.
You can learn through their dialogue how we can challenge assumptions, embrace interconnectedness, and harness the power of action, to create positive change.…

Name: Reforcia ID
Description: In 2021, nearly 80% of Indonesian students worked in fields unrelated to their majors, highlighting the need for better education-to-workforce support. At Reforcia, we aim to bridge this gap by creating a supportive community where members can grow, connect, and find their ideal career paths.

Name: Marketing Field House
Description:
Marketing Field House helps CMOs win their first 1,000 days at a new organization so they build early momentum, earn confidence fast, and set the tone for everything that follows.

Being a CMO today isn’t just about leading marketing, it’s about leading the company. Our core belief is that the CMO should be the most important person on the leadership team, the one most critical for the future success of the company. 

It’s about earning success fast: aligning with the CEO, proving impact to the CFO, sharpening the story, and getting your team focused on what actually moves the business. All while maximizing performance-based incentives.

Marketing Field House is a private, peer-powered experience built for action, so you leave each month with decisions, not just ideas.

Inside Marketing Field House: 
•	Field Guide Sessions: expert-led deep dives with the people who shape modern marketing.
•	The CMO Leading Beyond Marketing Masterclass: exclusive to our members, this ongoing practical series elevates leadership and influence skills for the C-suite.
•	Friday Fix: bring a pressing problem; leave with a plan you can put in motion by Monday.
•	Field Ops: practical follow-ups that turn insight into execution.
•	An amazing peer community: candid conversations with other CMOs to find what’s working where and soundboard ideas before you put them into action.
 
And uniquely to the Marketing Field House CMO community: no vendor pitches or ads, ever. 

Go to our website to learn more and join.

Name: Ocularists Association of Australia
Description:
The Ocularists Association of Australia was founded on the 20th October 2001 as a way to ensure a high standard of service and care for artificial eye wearers in Australia.

The members of the association agree to abide by the Code of Ethics in their everyday business, and work together with a common focus, as defined by the Mission Statement.

As an official body whose purpose is to raise the standing of Ocularists and create a better awareness of their role, the association helps define and ensure the standards of its members through peer review and interaction.

Members of the Ocularists Association of Australia attend short courses to continue their professional development and training.

Mission Statement

To define and promote standards of service of its members to clients and professionals with whom they work.
To promote excellence in quality of manufacture and fitting of artificial eyes.
To promote a forum for the exchange of information, reporting of recent developments and exploration of improved techniques and materials.
As an official body to communicate opinions of its members to ocularists, clients, professionals and the public as required.
Ocularists Association Officers
President: Peter Knowles (SA)
Vice President: Roseanna-Zoe Knowles (SA)
Secretary: Emily Geelen (WA)
Treasurer: Patrick Loyer (VIC)

Name: Green Social Club
Description: Green Social Club is a community for sustainability-minded professionals to connect, collaborate, and spark new ideas—without the pressure of traditional networking. Through curated events in a relaxed, welcoming atmosphere, we bring together eco-conscious individuals to share insights, inspire action, and build lasting relationships. Whether you're in the industry or simply passionate about a greener future, you’ll find your people here.

Name: HIPMI PT ITB
Description: HIPMI PT ITB (Himpunan Pengusaha Muda Indonesia Perguruan Tinggi ITB) is an organization that involved ITB students with an interest in entrepreneurship. Its main focus is to grows entrepreneurial mindset through training, networking, and mentorship from successful entrepreneurs. HIPMI PT ITB also create a supportive ecosystem for the growth of student startups and businesses, bridging collaboration between students, alumni, and industry professionals.

Name: The SustainablePeople
Description: Sustainable People is a dynamic platform dedicated to fostering personal and professional growth through a commitment to sustainability and social responsibility. The group empower its member from diverse fields to learn, share, and make a meaningful impact on the world. Our community thrives on the principles of care, accountability, service, and humility, which guide our actions and define our purpose. At Sustainable People, we believe in creating active learners who contribute to the greater good by continuously evolving and sharing their knowledge.

Name: Ordem dos Arquitectos de Cabo Verde
Description: A Ordem dos Arquitectos de Cabo Verde, abreviadamente por OAC, é uma associação pública com personalidade jurídica, representativa dos licenciados em arquitectura e em urbanismo que, de acordo com os presentes Estatutos e as demais disposições legais aplicáveis, exercem, em Cabo Verde, no todo ou em parte, actividade proﬁssional especíﬁca e exclusiva da respectiva classe, nos termos deﬁnidos nos presentes Estatutos.

Name: NYASP - New York Association of School Psychologists
Description:
The New York Association of School Psychologists, Inc. is a not-for-profit (501.c.3) organization incorporated under the laws of the State of New York. The purpose of NYASP is to do the following through research and education: 
A. Serve the mental health and educational needs of all children and youth. 
B. To encourage and provide opportunities for the professional growth of individual members. 
C. To actively promote the interest of school psychology. 
D. To inform the public about the services and practice of psychology in the schools. 
E. To help secure conditions necessary to promote the greatest effectiveness in the practice of psychology in the schools. 
F. To advance the standards of the profession of school psychology. 
G. To encourage research.

Name: Colorado Criminal Defense Bar
Description:
The Colorado Criminal Defense Bar (CCDB) is dedicated to protecting the rights of the accused and is unalterably opposed to the death penalty. CCDB is the only statewide professional membership association devoted solely to those who represent persons accused of having committed crimes, including private criminal defense practitioners, public defenders, paralegals, social workers, and investigators. CCDB provides training and support to this criminal defense community in an effort to promote zealous advocacy for clients at every stage of representation.

Our state and federal constitutions are magnificent documents. They guarantee that the law recognizes the inherent dignity and value of individuals and protect a person's life, liberty, and property. By protecting constitutional rights one client at a time, CCDB protects YOUR constitutional rights so that YOU have them when you need them.

CCDB is affiliated with the National Association of Criminal Defense Lawyers (NACDL) in mission, function, and goals.

Name: EO APAC Bridge
Description: The APAC Bridge chapter of EO, an organization for entrepreneurs to experience peer-to-peer learning, real conversations and grow past your personal limits.

Name: Illinois Economic Insights
Description:
Illinois Economic Insights (IEI) is a student-led organization focused on applying economic theory to real-world challenges. We provide a platform for students to analyze current economic trends, discuss their impact, and contribute meaningful insights. Through student collaboration, IEI helps bridge the gap between academic learning and practical application in the field of economics.

Join us Spring 2025 here: https://forms.gle/8FQ1iAovBcG6ELyL7

Name: RENO Bremen e.V.
Description:
RENO BREMEN, Verein der Angestellten der Rechtsanwälte und Notare in Bremen e.V. stellt sich vor wendet sich an alle MitarbeiterInnen bei Rechtsanwaltskanzleien und Notariaten sowie an alle interessierten MitarbeiterInnen von Rechtsabteilungen, Verbänden und Unternehmen. 

Wir sind eine Arbeitnehmervereinigung im Sinne des Tarifvertrags- und des Berufsbildungsgesetzes.

Name: Engineers Australia Illawarra, Sutherland and Shoalhaven Regional Committee
Description: The Illawarra Sutherland Shoalhaven Regional Committee represents Engineers Australia and its members across a region with established and growing industries. We run events, deliver workshops, and engage in outreach to support professional growth, celebrate engineering achievements, and show the broader community the contributions of engineering.

Name: WSU Accounting Club & IMA Student Chapter
Description: Welcome to the Worcester State University Accounting Club & IMA (Institute of Management Accountants) Student Chapter! Our mission is to cultivate a community of passionate accounting, finance, and business students who are dedicated to both professional and personal growth. Through our affiliation with the IMA, we aim to bridge the gap between classroom learning and real-world applications, providing our members with opportunities for networking, skill-building, and industry insights.

Name: Economics Club, Michigan State University
Description: The economics club is an organization that brings together students who have an interest in economics. The club's main goal is to foster a greater understanding of economic principles and how they relate to real-world issues. The club's membership is open to all students, regardless of their major or academic background, who have an interest in economics.

Name: LIITA Co
Description:
At LIITA, based in Košice, Slovakia, we bring together talented artists and light designers, helping them connect with top organizers of art and design festivals, events, and exhibitions.

We’re all about collaboration – whether it’s managing creative projects, fostering partnerships, or building a strong network within the industry. Our goal is to create unforgettable experiences and shine a spotlight on innovative ideas.

If you’re looking to collaborate or explore new opportunities, let’s talk!

Name: DESIGN at UT
Description:
Design at UT is a student organization fostering a community for 
product designers at UT. We host workshops, provide learning opportunities, and organize an annual Design-A-Thon to help students learn, grow, and connect in this field.

Name: CAOP-RJ
Description:
A Comissão de Apoio Acadêmico e Oprotunidades Profissionais tem como objetivo facilitar o elo entre a comunidade acadêmica e o mercado de trabalho jurídico, promovendo a preparação e o desenvolvimento profissional dos estudantes de Direito de forma estratégica e eficiente, com encontros, eventos e mentorias com foco no exercício da advocacia.

O nosso compromisso é aproximar ainda mais a OAB/RJ da comunidade acadêmica, para que, juntos, possamos fazer a diferença!

Name: Leap Afrique Ltd
Description: We are an organisational development and wellness firm, offering tailor-made solutions that enable teams and individuals achieve optimised performance through all seasons of the business’s life cycle.

Name: Thibstas
Description: We Are in Different Sectors Helping Businesses In Process Outsourcing & Execution As Well As Solving Customized Needs

Name: DJV Duisburg
Description:
Der Deutsche Journalisten-Verband (DJV) ist die Gewerkschaft und Berufsverband für Journalisten in Deutschland. In Duisburg ist der DJV durch den "Presseverein Niederrhein-Ruhr e.V." vertreten, der als Ortsverband Mitglied im DJV ist. Dieser Verein wurde 1963 gegründet und zählt etwa 160 Journalisten in Duisburg zu seinen Mitgliedern. 

Der DJV ist einer der Tarifpartner bei Gehaltsverhandlungen zwischen Verlagen und Redaktionen. Er bietet seinen Mitgliedern eine breite Palette an Leistungen und unterstützt sie in ihrem beruflichen Alltag. 

Der DJV-Duisburg hat auch einen Vorstand, der sich um die Belange der Mitglieder kümmert. Der aktuelle Vorstand wurde im Juni 2025 gewählt und besteht aus Sabine Ring (Vorsitzende), Oliver Kühn (Stellvertreter), Jan Skrynecki (Schriftführer), Jörg Schäfer (Schatzmeister) und Ali Osman Yayla (Beisitzer). Der Unterstützungsverein des DJV-Duisburg wird von Annette Kalscheur (Vorsitzende) und Oliver Kühn (Stellvertreter) geleitet.

Name: HBAP | STARTUPS
Description:
Our mission is to foster and fortify an Innovation and Entrepreneur Community coming out of the Harvard Business Analytics Program.

Our goal is to provide our members with the Tools, Knowledge, Leadership, and Confidence necessary to create and grow their businesses from the ground up.

Name: Graduate Women In Business - Purdue University
Description:
Graduate Women in Business - Purdue University

As part of a university that champions innovation and diversity, Graduate Women in Business (GWIB) at Purdue University is dedicated to empowering women to excel in both their professional and personal journeys.

Our mission is to:

Foster a supportive community that encourages growth, leadership, and collaboration.
Provide valuable resources, mentorship, and networking opportunities to help members build meaningful careers.
Host events and workshops that promote inclusivity, personal development, and skill-building.
Whether you're seeking career guidance, leadership experience, or a network of driven individuals, GWIB is here to support you every step of the way.

Name: Virginia Association of Notaries
Description: The Virginia Association of Notaries' mission is to educate, empower, and support Virginia notaries by guiding them in executing duties following the Virginia Notary laws. We represent Virginia notaries at the local and state levels. We are a trustworthy resource for notaries to learn the best practices and enhance their knowledge as credible public officials.

Name: Whole-Chain International Standard
Description: Whole-Chain.org is committed to shaping the future of business by providing world-class certification services in supply chain management, sustainability, innovation, and traceability. Our objective is to help companies create resilient, ethical, and forward-thinking supply chains that provide outstanding value to all stakeholders while respecting our planet and communities.

Name: 50más1
Description:
Quiénes somos:
Un grupo mujeres políticas, académicas, activistas y especialistas con una amplia trayectoria y experiencia, a fin de generar, apoyar e impulsar mecanismos de empoderamiento a las mujeres que participan activamente en los espacios de decisión.

Nuestra finalidad es que se cumpla el respeto a los derechos de las mujeres, libres de todo tipo de violencia y alcanzar la igualdad sustantiva en todos los niveles de la vida pública de nuestro país.


Misión:
Sumar más esfuerzos de mujeres de la sociedad civil organizada y profesionistas que quieran ser agentes de cambio para lograr la igualdad.


Visión:
Generar redes de mujeres de todos los ámbitos políticos, académicos y activistas, para empoderarlas y así lograr impulsar los procesos de igualdad sustantiva en todos los niveles donde las mujeres estemos participando.


Acciones:
- Mantener identidad de marca como integrantes de 50+1.
- Presentar proyectos de iniciativas para reformar o crear leyes.
- Realizar pronunciamientos en temas de interés que involucren los derechos de las mujeres.
- Establecer presencia en mesas de trabajo en el poder ejecutivo, legislativo, judicial e iniciativa privada.
- Generar actividades en los Capítulos Estatales acorde a las necesidades de cada entidad federativa involucrando a todo el colectivo.

Name: VZGroups
Description:
VZGroups es un conglomerado empresarial innovador y diversificado que engloba tres empresas especializadas, cada una líder en su campo:

1. Vetclean: Esta división se centra en ofrecer servicios de limpieza de alta calidad para una variedad de entornos, incluyendo comerciales, industriales y residenciales. Vetclean se distingue por su enfoque en la higiene impecable y la satisfacción del cliente, utilizando técnicas y productos eficaces para garantizar resultados excepcionales. Sus servicios abarcan desde limpieza diaria y mantenimiento hasta limpiezas especiales para situaciones específicas como post-obra o sanitización profunda.

2. Vetlain: Especializada en el control integral de plagas, Vetlain proporciona soluciones efectivas para proteger hogares, negocios y entornos industriales contra insectos, roedores y otras plagas molestas. Utilizando métodos seguros y sostenibles, Vetlain no solo erradica las plagas existentes, sino que también implementa medidas preventivas para evitar futuras infestaciones. Su enfoque se basa en la seguridad ambiental y la salud pública, asegurando espacios libres de amenazas para la salud y la seguridad.

3. VZModular: La tercera pata de VZGroups se dedica a la formación y capacitación profesional. VZModular ofrece programas educativos diseñados para mejorar las habilidades y competencias de individuos en diversos campos profesionales. Desde cursos técnicos especializados hasta programas de desarrollo ejecutivo, VZModular se compromete a preparar a los profesionales para enfrentar los desafíos actuales del mercado laboral. Su enfoque educativo se centra en la excelencia académica y la aplicación práctica de conocimientos, proporcionando a los estudiantes las herramientas necesarias para avanzar en sus carreras.

En conjunto, VZGroups se distingue por su compromiso con la excelencia en servicio al cliente, la sostenibilidad ambiental y el desarrollo profesional

Description:

With a plethora of workshops, competitions, lectures, conferences, exhibitions, performances, concerts and various other events, Techfest is not just a college festival, it is an experience that you will cherish forever!

About Techfest WorldMUN : 
Techfest World Model United Nations is back, on the grounds of IIT Bombay. It acts as a benchmark platform for advanced debate on the social, political and economic facets of the world at large. Through its forum of excellence, Techfest World Model United Nations has created an unparalleled legacy of robust debate involving members of the youth from across the world. Name: Delta Omicron Zeta - USC
Description:
Delta Omicron Zeta, founded at the University of Southern California in 2008, is a co-educational professional collegiate society organized to foster personal growth in a diverse community of leaders through self-understanding and the collective observation and practice of leadership.

 

The purpose of Delta Omicron Zeta is to provide a space on college campuses for leaders to utilize each other as resources, therefore becoming more effective student leaders. The society aims to enhance the personal leadership of members so they may further develop skills that will ultimately benefit the group(s) in which they are involved.

 

While many social programs encourage leadership development as a means to an end, leadership is the focus of our society, not a byproduct. To do this, we create the time and space in our chapter meetings and events to cultivate self-reflection, inspire relationship building, and demand action in leadership. DOZ Active and Journeymen programming challenge USC's top student leaders to refine their perspectives, strengths, and leadership strategies by understanding how their own tactics relate to those of others.

Name: ISPOR Student Chapter at Auburn University
Description:
This ISPOR Student Chapter at Auburn University (ISPOR-AU) aims to promote student's interest and knowledge in health economics and outcomes research. ISPOR-AU is part of the ISPOR Student Network (ISPOR - The Professional Society for Health Economics and Outcomes Research). 

The ISPOR Student Chapter at Auburn University meets on a monthly basis and offers educational enriching programs that are relevant to health economics and outcomes research. Apart from educational activities, ISPOR-AU also has extracurricular activities such as game nights, escape room, and outdoor fun activities. Pharm.D. and graduate students are welcome to join.

ISPOR-AU Mission Statement:
1. Provide an environment where students can share knowledge and discuss current issues in pharmacoeconomics and health outcomes research.
2. Serve as a bridge in bringing together students interested in pharmacoeconomics and members of the pharmaceutical industry, health-related organizations, and academia.
3. Act as a resource for new students interested in pharmacoeconomics and outcomes research.
4. Provide an opportunity for student chapter members to become familiar with the affairs of ISPOR as well as have representation in its affairs.

Name: Section of the Clinical Pharmacy of the Slovak Pharmaceutical Society
Description:
The clinical pharmacy in Slovakia has been developing since 1990, with the aim for clinical pharmacists to contribute to the rational use of medicines in cooperation with physicians.

- in the prevention and treatment of patients during hospitalization and outpatient care,
- through continuing education and the exchange of mutual theoretical and practical experience,
- through patient education about issues related to prescription and over-the-counter medicines, and through advisory services in the treatment of selected diseases.

Main goals:
To participate in ensuring effective and safe treatment of patients through the following main activities of clinical pharmacists:
- monitoring adverse drug reactions,
- monitoring interactions with concomitant therapy and food,
- therapeutic drug level monitoring,
- ensuring treatment safety during pregnancy, lactation, in children and elderly patients,
- addressing and providing counseling in cases of intoxication.

Name: Chartered Institute of Development Studies and Administration of Nigeria
Description:
The Chartered Institute of Development Studies and Administration of Nigeria (CIDSAN) was established by an Act of Parliament in May 2023. The Institute is a professional organization which was formed by Administrators from strong multi-disciplinary background with the aim of promoting and advancing the study and practice of Development Studies and Development Administration in Nigeria.

Development studies and administration are interdisciplinary fields that encompass various aspects of social, economic, and political development. These fields aim to understand and address the challenges of development and promote sustainable growth and improvement in societies.

It is rather true that poor management of our development effort in Nigeria can be retraced to among other factors, paucity of professionally equipped development experts that facilitate the nations development Journey, Programmes, Projects and Interventions in a structured manner.

Nations are rethinking development approach to be in tandem with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals, and Nigeria is yet to come to terms with this reality. This can only be undertaken comfortably by experts in development studies and administration.

The multidisciplinary nature of Development Studies and Administration, make the establishment of CIDSAN a necessary Organisation to Advance the study, Training and Determination of what standard of knowledge and skills to be attained by Development Experts, who are to manage and administer our development efforts in Nigeria.

Name: We WHISTLE Global
Description:
WHISTLE is a private membership organization and the first coordinated leadership hub for global executives of Caribbean heritage and their strategic partners. 

Built to strengthen wealth, community, and legacy, WHISTLE provides a structured ecosystem where leaders move with alignment, access, and purpose.

The platform connects senior operators across sectors and countries through confidential peer councils, quarterly capital forums, curated leadership gatherings, and year-round access to a global network. 
Members gain a high-trust environment to sharpen decisions, unlock cross-border opportunities, and accelerate long-term outcomes.

WHISTLE also offers a clear value pathway for partners. By connecting directly with one of the most influential but historically under-reached segments of the global market, partners gain access to investors, decision-makers, deal flow, new markets, and a storytelling engine that amplifies their presence across a growing international footprint. 

The organization integrates responsibility into its model through We WHISTLE With Love, supporting communities across the Caribbean, and WHISTLE Next Gen, which strengthens the pipeline of emerging leaders.

Co-founded by Denise Williams and Stacey Luces, whose combined leadership spans multi-country operations, public systems, membership communities, and philanthropic initiatives across more than 30 countries, WHISTLE is a central institution where Caribbean-rooted leaders and partners align influence and shape long-term impact across the diaspora and the region.

For more information visit us @ www.WeWhistleGlobal.com
Follow us on IG @WeWhistleGlobal

Name: Bundesvereinigung der Prüfingenieure für Bautechnik e.V.
Description:
Die Bundesvereinigung der Prüfingenieure für Bautechnik e.V. (BVPI) ist die Dachorganisation der 16 vpi-Landesverbände. Mitglieder sind Prüfingenieure für Bautechnik (Standsicherheit und für Brandschutz) und alle vom Eisenbahn-Bundesamt (EBA) anerkannten Prüfsachverständigen, die Mitglieder der vpi-EBA sind.

Prüfingenieure helfen durch fachliche Begleitung und Kontrolle, Risiken im Zusammenhang mit der Standsicherheit und dem Brandschutz von Gebäuden zu vermeiden.  Im Sinne der Gefahrenabwehr prüft der Prüfingenieur die bautechnischen Unterlagen (i.d.R. statische Berechnungen und Ausführungspläne) von Bauwerken und überwacht stichprobenartig die Bauausführung. Prüfingenieure vermindern Gefahren für Leib und Leben Einzelner, senken ernsthafte gesellschaftliche Risiken und dienen im Ergebnis dem Verbraucherschutz.

Prüfingenieure sind qualifizierte Bauingenieure, die im Rahmen eines staatlichen Verfahrens von den Obersten Bauaufsichten der Bundesländer anerkannt werden und erfüllen im Auftrag des Staates die hoheitliche Aufgabe der Risikoprävention.

Diese Aufgabe ergibt sich aus dem Grundgesetz der Bundesrepublik Deutschland, Artikel 2, in dem das Grundrecht auf Leben und körperliche Unversehrtheit festgeschrieben ist mit der Verpflichtung des Staates zur vorbeugenden Abwehr von Gefahren, so auch die Abwehr der Gefahren, die von baulichen Anlagen ausgehen können.

Name: SKAL INTERNATIONAL JAPAN
Description:
Skål is a professional organization of tourism leaders around the world, promoting global tourism and friendship. It is the only international group uniting all branches of the travel and tourism industry. Its members, the industry’s managers and executives, meet at local, national, regional and international levels to discuss and pursue topics of common interest.   

The first Club was founded in 1932 in Paris by travel managers, following an educational tour of Scandinavia. The idea of international goodwill and friendship grew and, in 1934, the “Association Internationale des Skål Clubs” was formed with Florimond Volckaert as its first President, who is considered the “Father of Skål”.

Skål International today has approximately 17,000 members in 400 Clubs throughout 80 nations. Most activities occur at local level, moving up through National Committees, under the umbrella of Skål International, headquartered at the General Secretariat in Torremolinos, Spain.

Skål International Tokyo founded in 1964, Osaka in 1967 and Nagoya in 1988 are now united as Skål INTERNATIONAL JAPAN.

Name: Associação dos Funcionários do Sistema FIEPE - AFUSFI
Description:
Fundada em 1990 como AFUSPE, a nossa associação nasceu com o propósito de fortalecer laços e promover o bem-estar dos colaboradores do SENAI Pernambuco. Desde então, evoluímos e crescemos, tornando-nos a AFUSFI, uma entidade integrada ao Sistema FIEPE (CIEPE, SESI, SENAI, IEL e FIEPE), ampliando nosso alcance e impacto.

Nossa missão é garantir assistência social, integração e qualidade de vida para aqueles que fazem parte do Sistema FIEPE, fomentando a solidariedade e a cooperação entre os associados. Por meio de atividades recreativas, esportivas, culturais e sociais, criamos um ambiente de pertencimento, fortalecimento da comunidade e valorização de cada colaborador.

A AFUSFI é feita por e para os colaboradores! Entre nossos associados estão tanto os colaboradores ativos do quadro permanente quanto os aposentados, que dedicaram anos de suas vidas ao Sistema FIEPE. Além disso, nossos benefícios se estendem também aos dependentes legais, reforçando nosso compromisso com o bem-estar das famílias que fazem parte dessa grande comunidade.

Aqui, cada associado encontra apoio, lazer e uma rede de amizade e colaboração. Juntos, somos mais fortes!

Name: Society of Polish Philharmonics
Description:
The Society of Polish Philharmonics was established in 2011. It is an employers' organisation representing the interests of 39 Polish philharmonics and professional orchestras. It actively participates in consulting and shaping cultural policies of local and national authorities, supports efforts to reform the legal environment of arts organisations, sits on the jurys selecting CEOs of music institutions and holds advisory functions, among others at the Council of Artistic Institutions for the Minister of Culture and National Heritage, in addition to co-authoring and consulting programmes implemented by the National Institute of Music and Dance. The Society organises workshops on topics related to culture management and collects and analyses data on the activities of Polish music institutions.
Since 2012, the Society of Polish Philharmonics has been a member of Pearle* Live Performance Europe representing through its member associations and trade federations over 10,000 orchestras, opera houses, dramatic theaters, dance theaters, festivals and other live performance organisations from all over the Europe. As a member of Pearle*, SPP participates in consulting EU policies regulating the live performance sector.

Głównymi zadaniami Unii jest promocja i ochrona praw i interesów jej członków oraz dbałość o jej wspólnotę. Niezwykle istotny jest tu szacunek do wspólnych cech jakimi są autonomia zarządzania teatrem, której towarzyszy niezmiennie ryzyko finansowe, i wolność artystyczna z poszanowaniem ich różnorodności.
Unia powstała z prawdziwej potrzeby solidarności wobec faktycznego kryzysu, który nastąpił w związku z pandemią w 2020 roku. Jej celem jest przetrwanie i bycie gwarantem bezpieczeństwa oraz trwałości teatrów w niej zrzeszonych. 
Serdecznie zapraszamy wszystkich chętnych do dołączania do Unii Teatrów Niezależnych. Może to zrobić każda spółka, fundacja czy stowarzyszenie lub inny podmiot prawny, który prowadzi działalność teatralną i artystyczną na terenie Polski.  Wspólnie możemy zdziałać dużo więcej!

Name: The Colloquium (CISSE)
Description:
The Colloquium for Information Systems Security Education (CISSE) is the nation’s first and longest-running professional organization dedicated to advancing cybersecurity education. Founded in 1996, CISSE brings together educators, researchers, practitioners, and government stakeholders to shape the future of cybersecurity through collaboration, innovation, and thought leadership.

Our mission is to foster the development of a robust and adaptive cybersecurity workforce by promoting excellence in curriculum design, academic research, and professional practice. As a nonprofit organization, CISSE champions emerging trends in cybersecurity, supports academic-industry partnerships, and provides a platform for sharing best practices and groundbreaking ideas.

Each year, CISSE hosts a flagship conference—The Colloquium—featuring peer-reviewed papers, keynotes, workshops, and student-led sessions that explore the evolving landscape of cybersecurity education. The event serves as a dynamic forum for the exchange of ideas and solutions that address the challenges of an increasingly complex digital world.

Join us in advancing cybersecurity education!

Name: Asociación Ecuatoriana de Musicoterapia - AEM
Description:
Bienvenidos AEM donde la música se convierte en una fuerza transformadora para la salud y el bienestar! La Asociación Ecuatoriana de Musicoterapia (AEM) lidera el camino en la promoción y aplicación de la musicoterapia en Ecuador, llevando la armonía a vidas de todas las edades.

Nuestra Misión:
En AEM, estamos comprometidos con la misión de difundir la conciencia sobre los beneficios terapéuticos de la música. Creemos en la capacidad única de la musicoterapia para promover la salud física, emocional y mental. Trabajamos incansablemente para educar, inspirar y conectar a personas interesadas en explorar el potencial curativo de la musicoterapia.

Lo Que Ofrecemos:
Comunidad: Nos enorgullece ser un espacio inclusivo que reúne a profesionales, estudiantes y entusiastas de la musocterapia. Aquí, encontrarás un ambiente colaborativo donde las mentes creativas se unen para compartir conocimientos y experiencias.

Recursos Educativos: Mantente actualizado con las últimas investigaciones, estudios y tendencias en el campo de la musicoterapia en Ecuador. Publicamos contenido educativo que profundiza en la teoría y práctica, brindándote información valiosa para tu crecimiento profesional o personal.

Eventos: Anunciamos conferencias, talleres y eventos que destacan las innovaciones y avances en la musicoterapia. Estas oportunidades te permitirán conectarte con expertos, aprender nuevas técnicas y ampliar tu red profesional.

Guia para pacientes y familias: Si el término musicoterapia es nuevo para ti, nosotros te ofrecemos acompañamiento para que conozcas a profundidad sobre los profesionales, los beneficios, procesos, limitaciones y contraindicaciones de la musicoterapia.  

Participa y Conéctate:
Te invitamos a unirte a nuestra comunidad activa en la Asociación Ecuatoriana de Musicoterapia. Comparte tus experiencias, haz preguntas y contribuye al diálogo sobre la musicoterapia en el Ecuador. #musicoterapia.ec #musicoterapia #ecuador

Name: Nola
Description:
We spend our days on Slack, Teams, and LinkedIn…
but we barely have real conversations with peers anymore.

Nola fixes that.

We hand-select six professionals from the same world who have a real reason to meet. We bring them together around a table. And we spark the kind of conversations no algorithm will ever create.

We’re starting with Product People (Product, Design, Tech).

Nola isn’t about “growing your network.”
It’s about building one that matters:

→ solid professional relationships,
→ real opportunities,
→ natural collaborations,
→ and a community that comes back.

LinkedIn gives you 500+ connections.
Nola gives you 5 that count.

Nola isn’t a network.
It’s a place where professionals remember what it feels like to be… truly connected.

Name: الجمعية المصرية للتسويق
Description:
الجمعية المصرية للتسويق هي مؤسسة مهنية تهدف إلى وضع المعايير والإرشادات للأفراد والمؤسسات العاملة في مجال التسويق، إضافة إلى دعم المؤسسات التعليمية التي تقدم مناهج تسويق في مصر. نسعى إلى بناء مجتمع مهني متكامل يضمن جودة الممارسات التسويقية ويرفع كفاءة العاملين في هذا المجال.
تهدف الجمعية إلى بناء مجتمع مهني يضمن جودة الممارسات التسويقية ويرفع كفاءة العاملين في القطاع، من خلال:
– وضع معايير مهنية واضحة
– اعتماد المسوقين والجهات التسويقية
– دعم المؤسسات التعليمية التي تقدم مناهج تسويق
– تقديم برامج تدريبية متخصصة
– نشر الميثاق الأخلاقي للممارسة التسويقية
– إصدار الإرشادات العامة للممارسات المهنية في مصر

ترتكز الجمعية في عملها على قيم: التطوير المستمر، النزاهة، المهنية، الابتكار، والمسؤولية، بما يعزّز تنافسية السوق والاقتصاد الوطني.

Name: Programa de Análisis y Dirección de Empresa Familiar
Description:
El PADEF tiene como objetivo ayudar a los miembros de los 
órganos de gobierno de Empresas Familiares aragonesas a 
formarse en cuanto a los aspectos propios de la Empresa 
Familiar, dotando al participante de las herramientas 
necesarias para la gestión de la dirección de su empresa, 
y potenciando las capacidades directivas personales, en 
base a ejemplos y experiencias de las principales Empresas 
Familiares de Aragón y miembros de la AEFA, facilitando el 
networking entre todos los asistentes. 
En definitiva, potenciar 4 pilares fundamentales:
1.- Obtener una mayor comprensión de la idiosincrasia 
propia de la Empresa Familiar, dotando al participante de 
estrategias de éxito en entornos de incertidumbre.
2.- Actualizar y profundizar en nuevos conceptos, modelos y 
metodologías para mejorar la eficiencia en la gestión de su 
Empresa Familiar, con las referencias y buenas prácticas de 
empresas destacadas.
3.- Profundizar en el régimen fiscal propio de la Empresa Familiar y los medios para facilitar su continuidad.
4.- Potenciar las capacidades de liderazgo de los participantes en el programa.

Name: Fund Managers Association of the Philippines
Description:
The Fund Managers Association of the Philippines (FMAP) is an organization composed of local equity and fixed income fund managers with the primary mission of helping uplift the investing public economically through the practice of professional fund management that adheres to ethical standards and recognized practices globally.

It is also envisioned as a catalyst of change through the continuous education of its members and efforts to foster solidarity among the different investment sectors, in order to uphold the best interests of the investing public.

FMAP was established in April 1997 to foster the development of capital and financial markets, specifically the fund management industry. It also aims to (1) contribute in the formulation of policies and guidelines of regulatory agencies such as the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP) and Insurance Commission (IC) aimed at increasing efficiency and effectiveness of the fund management industry, (2) collaborate with government agencies and other organizations in the consideration or amendment of laws affecting the industry, and (3) educate by way of seminars and other forms of propagating information in the interest of members and the general public.

Mission:
To execute and measure initiatives focused on the following Key Areas: MARKET REFORM, MEMBER ENGAGEMENT, MARKETING, and MONEY MANAGEMENT

2023 Vision:
To continue to be the pre-eminent financial markets industry organization in the Philippines.

Name: SVBS
Description:
Die Schweizerische Vereinigung für Betriebssanität (SVBS) wurde im Jahr 1986 gegründet und ist eine wichtige Berufsorganisation für Betriebssanitäter. Ihnen bietet sie viele Hilfsmittel und Hilfestellungen. Aber auch gegen aussen bringt die SVBS ihr Gewicht ein und vertritt die Anliegen der Ersten Hilfe.

In erster Linie setzt sich die SVBS natürlich für ihre Mitglieder und deren Anliegen ein. Ihnen bietet sie beispielsweise kompetente Kurz-Beratungen rund um Fragen der Betriebssanität und in Bezug auf Aus- und Weiterbildungen für Betriebssanitäter. Sie organisiert Fortbildungen, Symposien und Führungen und unterstützt so den Erfahrungsaustausch. Sie erarbeitet Checklisten, Argumentarien und verschiedenste Dokumente, die im Arbeitsalltag von Betriebssanitätern helfen können. Sie informiert ihre Mitglieder mit wichtigen Nachrichten und Fachartikeln rund um die Erste Hilfe, betreibt ein Online-Forum und vermittelt diverse Mehrwerte und Rabatte auf verschiedenste Produkte und Dienstleistungen rund um die Betriebssanität.

Eine gewichtige Rolle nimmt die SVBS aber auch gegen aussen wahr. So bringt sie sich aktiv in den verschiedensten Gremien und Organisationen ein. Sie sitzt beispielsweise in der Kommission FIRST AID des Interverbandes für Rettungswesen (IVR), die für die Rahmenbedingungen und die Qualitätssicherung rund um die Ausbildungen für Betriebssanitäter zuständig ist. Sie arbeitet mit dem Staatssekretariat für Wirtschaft (Seco) zusammen und bringt die Anliegen und Bedürfnisse der Betriebssanitäterinnen und Betriebssanitäter beispielsweise rund um die Wegleitung zum Artikel 36 der Verordnung 3 des Arbeitsgesetzes (Erste Hilfe) ein. Auch arbeitet sie in verschiedenen Fragen mit der Schweizerischen Zulassungs- und Aufsichtsbehörde für Arzneimittel und Medizinprodukte (Swissmedic) zusammen und liefert Anregungen und Inputs an die Schweizerische Konferenz der kantonalen Gesundheitsdirektorinnen und -direktoren (GDK).

Name: NEXA
Description:
Welcome to NEXA. My name is Silvia Slater, and I am the founder.

NEXA grew organically out of my personal journey rather than from a premeditated plan. I grew up in a religious home, where questions of meaning, purpose, and morality were present early in my life. As I moved into adulthood, I began to lose resonance with the more dogmatic elements of faith not because those questions stopped mattering, but because the answers no longer felt alive or sufficient.

For a long time, that tension remained in the background while I built a demanding career in big law. My days were full and my attention occupied, leaving little space to sit quietly with what I believed or did not believe.

Over time, I began to feel increasingly disconnected not only from religion, but from a deeper sense of coherence and meaning in my own life. Eventually, I made the decision to leave big law and begin my own legal practice.

During that transition, my husband and I spent extended time traveling and moving slowly through places that demanded presence rather than productivity. Immersed in nature and far from constant input, the quiet that first felt soothing eventually became loud.

Without distraction, the questions I had postponed came fully into view. I had stepped away from a religious framework, but had not yet articulated what had replaced it. Through reflection, reading, conversation, and lived experience, I began to articulate a worldview that felt internally coherent to me one that treats awareness as foundational, values growth and integration, and holds individuality and connection as equally real.

NEXA emerged from that process.

It is not a belief system or a doctrine, and it is not an attempt to provide answers for others. NEXA exists to create a space for thoughtful exploration a place where people can slow down, ask deeper questions, and begin articulating their own understanding of reality, meaning, and purpose.

If you feel drawn to these questions, you are welcome here.

By bringing together like-minded and accomplished people across various dimensions of our city’s socio-economic construct, the centre hopes to provide thought-leadership by acting a catalyst for unconventional solutions to longstanding problems.

Name: Grafisk bransjeforening | Trykt i Norge
Description:
Trykt i Norge er en merkeordning som er utviklet og drevet av Grafisk bransjeforening. Formålet med merket er å vise at en trykksak er laget i Norge, og dermed av en seriøs bedrift med omtanke for lokalsamfunnet og miljøet. Merket symboliserer stoltheten ved å produsere og benytte norsk kvalitetstrykk.

Visste du at norske leverandører konkurrerer med en omfattende import av trykkeritjenester? Faktisk snakker vi om en samlet verdi på nær fire milliarder kroner. Å velge et norsk trykkeri når du kjøper grafiske tjenester er derfor et verdifullt bidrag til ditt lokale næringsliv.

Så neste gang du skal kjøpe en trykksak: husk å velge et norsk trykkeri, og sørg for å få med Trykt i Norge-merket!

Name: The Medic Today
Description:
What does it mean to be a Medic today?

Far too often we define ourselves through our job titles and we forget that we are human beings first - multifaceted human beings. 

As such, wouldn't life be great if every single day was a holistic reflection of our individuality... And not just our job? 

The Medic Today is all about re-igniting your spark so you can show up powerfully for your career and your life with alignment and inspiration.

Name: Advent SCTCE

Advent 24, the fifth edition of SCTCE's renowned technical fest, returns with excitement and innovation. This dynamic event promises a blend of interdisciplinary workshops, expos, competitions, and engaging talks, fostering a culture of continuous learning and exploration.

Name: Vanderbilt Black Law Students Association
Description:
Since Black students were first admitted to Vanderbilt Law School in 1956, Vanderbilt’s Black Law Students Association has worked tirelessly to cultivate talented Black attorneys who endeavor to positively impact the community.

The mission of Vanderbilt’s Black Law Students Association is to utilize the collective resources of its members, advisors, and alumni community to:
- Articulate and promote the professional needs, goals, and development of Black law students
- Foster and encourage academic success and professional competence
- Focus upon the relationship of Black attorneys with the legal structure of the United States
- Instill in the Black attorney and law student a greater awareness of commitment to the needs of the Black community and the diaspora
- Influence the legal community to bring about meaningful change to meet the needs of the Black community
- Facilitate the professional needs and development of all students of color and allies

Name: Sindicato Rural de Não-Me-Toque
Description:
Acreditar na força e na evolução do agronegócio, reconhecer sua importância para o desenvolvimento econômico e acompanhar o trabalho diário do homem do campo no compromisso de gerar alimentos para o mundo.

É isso que move o Sindicato Rural de Não-Me-Toque, entidade que há mais de cinco décadas é parceira do produtor rural, defendendo seus interesses e lutando pela valorização do agro.

O ano de 1956 marca a origem desta entidade, graças à liderança e protagonismo de Antenor Graeff e Elinor Kirinus, que fundaram em 14 de janeiro a Associação Rural de Não-Me-Toque para alavancar o desenvolvimento agrícola da região. Mais produtores foram se somando à iniciativa, que culminou posteriormente com a fundação do Sindicato Rural de Não-Me-Toque, em 05 de setembro de 1967.

Hoje abrange também produtores de Victor Graeff e Lagoa dos Três Cantos e oferece aos seus associados atendimento e suporte diversos, estando ao lado do produtor rural em todos os momentos, especialmente diante das adversidades e situações críticas, como as estiagens, sempre trabalhando juntos para colher resultados. 

A entidade faz parte da Federação da Agricultura do Rio Grande do Sul (Farsul) e integra a comissão organizadora do Congresso Sul-Americano de Agricultura de Precisão e Máquinas Precisas (APSul América). Em parceria com o Senar e Sebrae, desenvolve cursos e programas de formação rural, além de promoções sociais para toda comunidade. 

O Sindicato Rural de Não-Me-Toque sente-se honrado pela história de sucesso construída e agradece todos que fazem parte dessa trajetória.
 
Completando 55 anos, a entidade sabe que sua missão de representar o produtor rural ganha ainda mais importância. É por isso que reafirma seu compromisso em sempre defender o campo e quem vive dele.
 
Somos produtores, somos a força que vem do campo, somos o Sindicato Rural de Não-Me-Toque...orgulho em ser do agro!

Name: Health Policy and Management Association (HPMA)
Description: The Health Policy and Management Association (HPMA)  is a professional organization for dedicated graduate students pursuing a Master's degree in Health Policy Management at the University of Pittsburgh. Name: Bluebird Organizing
Description:
Bluebird Organizing helps individuals, families, and teams create clarity, confidence, and calm by organizing their spaces, schedules, and digital lives. Clutter isn’t just physical. It shows up in our calendars, inboxes, expectations, and emotional load. Bluebird Organizing blends organizing, coaching, and psychology-informed systems to help people move out of overwhelm and into alignment.

The process begins with understanding rather than assuming or boxing you in. We take time to learn how you think, what’s weighing on you, and what habits naturally shape your day. From there, we design systems that honor your capacity, your routines, and your long-term goals. 

Bluebird Organizing works with a wide range of clients who are tired of feeling like they’re drowning. Some are in a major life transition, such as moving into a new home and want systems set up from day one. Others have been living with chronic clutter for years and feel embarrassed, stuck, or unsure how to begin. We also regularly support people or corporate teams whose schedules feel like overstuffed storage units and they can’t seem to find breathing room no matter how hard they try.

Across all of the offerings the goal is always the same: to create systems that support the real you, not a hypothetical perfect version of you. Clients often tell us that after a session, they feel lighter, motivated, and finally “back in the driver’s seat” of their lives. If you're ready for help transforming the way you live and work, click the link in our bio to book your free consultation.

People Professionals Network International (PPNI) brings together HR professionals, business leaders, people-oriented and change-makers from across the globe to collaborate, support each other and grow beyond boundaries.

Name: HEAT 35
Description: Many district heating systems in central Europe still rely heavily on fossil fuels. New approaches utilize various heat sources but are complex to implement. The HEAT 35 project supports eight regions and cities in the transition process to run their district heating systems on 50% of renewables and waste heat by 2035. The partners involve district heating operators and experts to design new solutions. They also prepare guidelines and tools for the operators to implement these solutions, supported by a quality management system that helps to ensure that emission standards are respected.

Name: De Hofnar Present BV
Description:
De Hofnar Present helpt leiders en organisaties helderheid en eigenaarschap te versterken.

We begeleiden strategie, leiderschap en samenwerking op momenten dat richting, vertrouwen of verbinding onder druk staan.
Niet met standaardmodellen, maar met bestuurlijke scherpte en menselijkheid.

We luisteren, duiden en benoemen wat vaak onbesproken blijft — zodat beleid weer voelbaar wordt in gedrag.

Onze kracht ligt in institutionele zelfredzaamheid: organisaties helpen zichzelf begrijpen, herstellen en vernieuwen.
Zo wordt strategie zichtbaar, leiderschap gedragen en samenwerking menselijk.

Name: Mid-Continent Regional Science Association
Description: The Mid-Continent Regional Science Association (MCRSA) is an organization consisting of an interdisciplinary membership from academics and other public and private organizations. We are interested in using the tools of regional science to help solve applied problems in rural and urban areas at the local, state, and national levels.

Name: INCOSE Seattle Metro Chapter
Description:
The Seattle Metropolitan Chapter (SMC) of the International Council on Systems Engineering (INCOSE) seeks to advance the state of the art and practice of systems engineering in industry, academia, and government by promoting interdisciplinary, scalable approaches to produce technologically appropriate solutions that meet the needs of the greater Seattle area by:
- Providing a regular forum for Systems Engineering (SE) topics and 
   professional networking
- Fostering the mission and goals of INCOSE, through active support of local 
   science, technology, engineering and mathematics (STEM) events
- Providing an established, integrated SE training program (including tutorials)
- Maintaining a web-site for international, regional, and local information 
   dissemination and interactive discussion

Name: ALPN - Associação Alojamento Local Porto e Norte
Description:
A ALPN – Associação Alojamento Local Porto e Norte foi oficialmente formalizada no dia 3 de julho de 2023, surgindo da vontade agregadora de um grupo de titulares de Alojamento Local e de Atividades Conexas com objetivo de representar, defender e projetar o setor.

A ALPN pretende ser uma comunidade unida pela vontade de fazer a diferença, com uma visão integradora do Alojamento Local e das Atividades Conexas enquanto ecossistema potenciador da economia local, regional e nacional.

É uma Associação privada sem fins lucrativos que pretende atuar junto das entidades públicas e privadas, locais, regionais, nacionais e estrangeiras, promover a concorrência leal e transparente entre todos os agentes do mercado, bem como apoiar a profissionalização, disponibilizar formação e fomentar a competitividade do setor assente em pilares de sustentabilidade e numa oferta turística de qualidade e verdadeiramente diferenciadora.

A ALPN deseja ser um parceiro de negócio do Alojamento Local e das Atividades Conexas, oferecendo aos Associados informação, aconselhamento e apoio necessários para gerir o negócio, contando para isso com equipas técnicas especializadas nas diversas vertentes, tal como a área jurídica, económica, financeira, fiscal, etc., bem como com parcerias complementares à atividade.

Name: OPTICA Student Chapter at The Ohio State University
Description: The Optica student chapter provides its members with professional networking, career development and technical programming. The chapter works to raise awareness of optics and photonics through participation in events at The Ohio State University and in the local community through youth education outreach activities such as science fairs, lab tours and classroom demonstrations. Meetings are hosted by graduate students to discuss current progress and trends in the field of optical science.

Name: Connecticut Academy of Audiology
Description: The mission of the Academy is to enhance the ability of our members to achieve career and practice objectives through professional development, education, advocacy, research, and increased public awareness of hearing and balance disorders and audiologic services.

Name: Instituto Avalia
Description:
O Instituto Avalia é uma associação civil sem fins lucrativos, especializada na organização, planejamento e execução de concursos públicos, processos seletivos, processos seletivos simplificados (PSS), vestibulares, residências médicas, certificações e avaliações educacionais em todo o território nacional.

Atuamos com excelência técnica, segurança jurídica, inovação tecnológica e rigor metodológico, apoiando órgãos públicos federais, estaduais e municipais, além de universidades públicas e privadas, autarquias, fundações, conselhos profissionais e entidades do terceiro setor.

Nossa equipe é formada por profissionais com mais de 27 anos de experiência no setor de concursos públicos, responsáveis por mais de 300 certames realizados e mais de 4 milhões de candidatos avaliados, garantindo credibilidade, transparência e confiabilidade em todas as etapas dos processos.

O Instituto Avalia opera em plena conformidade com a Lei nº 14.133/2021, estando legalmente habilitado para contratação por dispensa de licitação, conforme o art. 75, inciso XV, sendo uma solução estratégica para gestores públicos que buscam segurança, eficiência e economia.

Contamos com:
 Infraestrutura própria e segura
 Parque gráfico próprio para impressão de provas
 Sistemas de tecnologia da informação robustos e escaláveis
 Ambientes controlados e sigilosos
 Assessoria jurídica especializada em concursos públicos
 Gestão completa do edital ao resultado final

Além da atuação tradicional em concursos, desenvolvemos soluções inovadoras como o Avalia Fácil, uma plataforma digital para gestão e execução de Processos Seletivos Simplificados, reforçando nosso compromisso com a modernização da administração pública.

O Instituto Avalia existe para fortalecer instituições, garantir processos seletivos justos e promover impacto social positivo, transformando conhecimento em desenvolvimento, oportunidades em realizações e seleções em confiança institucional.

Name: The Young Professionals Club
Description:
The Young Professional Club (YPC) aims to bring young professionals together from a diverse array of sectors and industries for the ultimate goal of corporate evangelism and networking. 


Our vision is to build a dynamic club of young professionals as a network that fosters innovation, collaboration, continuous professional growth, and development across sectors and industry practices.

Name: Creative Labs SC
Description:
Creative Labs SC is a student organization, community, and resource for visionaries to build their ideas into reality.

We believe creativity cannot be defined by one single idea, product, or service. Instead, we push you to define creativity yourself in the form of disruptive innovation, effectively bypassing all personal limitations. Rather than labeling yourself as a specialist in art, technology, or nothing at all (a generalist, if you will), we encourage you to embrace aspects of all perspectives to pioneer worlds you would have never confronted otherwise.

In order to foster our innovative mission, our values are built upon the four pillars of Creative Labs: challenge, curiosity, cooperation, and community. This allows us to develop accessible and diverse opportunities for driven individuals who are confident in their ability to experiment, learn, and evolve. Learn more about our growing team, objectives, and projects on our website.

Name: ABTER - Associação Brasileira de Tecnólogos em Radiologia
Description:

Name: Sanket C. Shah & Company
Description:
For over a decade, Sanket C. Shah & Company has been a trusted Chartered Accountancy firm based in Andheri West, Mumbai. Established 12 years ago, the firm combines deep technical expertise with personalized service to support businesses and individuals in navigating India’s complex tax and audit landscape.

What We Do

Direct Taxation
From corporate tax, personal income tax, assessments and appeals, to tax planning & structuring, we provide comprehensive direct tax services. Our work helps clients maximize tax efficiency while ensuring strict compliance with evolving laws and regulations.

Indirect Taxation
We assist clients in all aspects of indirect taxes—GST registration, compliance, advisory, claim of input tax credits, and managing indirect tax disputes. Our team stays well-versed with latest changes, ensuring that clients are both compliant and optimizing costs.

Audits & Assurance
Audit services include statutory audits under the Companies Act, LLP audits, tax audits under the Income-Tax Act, internal audits, and other assurance engagements. We aim not just to fulfil regulatory requirements, but also to identify risks, improve internal controls, and enhance financial transparency.

Name: Phi Chi Theta Business Fraternity - Eta Delta
Description: Eta Delta Chapter

Through curated events focused on intentional networking and workforce development, we offer valuable connections, mentorship, and unique opportunities to elevate your creative practice and visibility.
