Description: Just Creatives is a digital collective of professional creators around the world. JC members collaborate with each other to exhibit our skills though hosting public events and gallery showcases. JC helps each other to navigate and network within the new age art world of WEB 3 through meaningful conversation, art education, and conceptualization.

Name: Leadership San Antonio Alumni Association
Description:
The Leadership San Antonio Alumni Association is lead by a 100% volunteer board of past LSA class members, steering committee members, and chairs. We are passionate about the mission of LSA and are driven to give back to our community and foster enduring change in our community.

Leadership San Antonio (LSA) was created in 1975 by The Greater San Antonio Chamber of Commerce and is the premier program for existing and emerging leaders in the Bexar County and surrounding areas. The program, one of the first of its kind in Texas, has graduated more than 2,000 participants.  In 1992, The San Antonio Hispanic Chamber joined to be a co-host to the program, enhancing the involvement and diversity of future classes.

Name: Polli-Nation
Description:
We are dedicated to helping Pollinators, both human and "more-than-human" thrive. 

How we shine a light on the essential role Pollinators play:

 Pollinator Incubator: each season, we work closely with three promising Pollinators from around the world to help them scale the impact of their initiatives

 Pollination Accelerator: we invest in one bridge building projects each season that has the potential to change perspectives on a global scale

 Human Hive: a community for human pollinators with a curated calendar of experiences that are intentionally designed to facilitate human pollination

 Education & Advocacy: we regularly publish resources and guides to ensure pollinators get the respect they deserve

Name: The Executive Round Table
Description:
The Executive Round Table is a collaborative network of private practice medical leaders committed to sharing expertise, strategies, and support in an ever-evolving healthcare landscape. Our focus spans critical areas such as billing, CMS regulations, recruiting, ModMed EMR optimization, growth strategies, and practice expansion—all with the goal of fostering sustainable, independent practices outside of private equity influence.

Why reinvent the wheel when we can build a better road together? The Executive Round Table offers a space where leaders can share wins, challenges, and solutions, ensuring no one has to navigate the complexities of practice management alone. It’s about the people, the patients, and delivering exceptional care.

Name: AAPT Student Chapter at Auburn University
Description:
The AAPT Auburn Student Chapter is the official student branch of the Association of Asphalt Paving Technologists (AAPT) at Auburn University. We are a student-led organization committed to advancing knowledge, innovation, and professional development in asphalt pavement engineering. Through technical workshops, research engagement, industry networking, and outreach, we empower students to become the next generation of leaders in pavement technology.

Our chapter provides a collaborative platform for civil engineering students to explore real-world challenges in asphalt materials, connect with professionals across academia and industry, and contribute to meaningful dialogue on sustainable and resilient pavement systems.

Whether you are an undergraduate, graduate student, or industry partner, AAPT Auburn is your gateway to excellence in asphalt research and professional growth.

Name: Stowarzyszenie Kartografów Polskich
Description:
Celem działania Stowarzyszenia Kartografów Polskich jest podejmowanie wszelkiej działalności prowadzącej do zapewnienia najwyższej jakości standardów i aktualności produkcji kartograficznej w Polsce, w tym także baz danych i map urzędowych przekazywanych do zasobu geodezyjnego i kartograficznego. Współpracujemy z przedsiębiorstwami geodezyjnymi, wydawnictwami kartograficznymi,  jednostkami administracji państwowej i samorządowej oraz stowarzyszeniami. Dbamy o jakość profesjonalnej produkcji kartograficznej: baz danych topograficznych, tradycyjnych i cyfrowych map topograficznych i tematycznych. 
Reprezentujemy interesy specjalistów wykonujących zawód kartografa w kraju i za granicą, ale w zakreszie działalności jest także popularyzacja w społeczeństwie zagadnień naukowych, technicznych i ekonomicznych związanych z kartografią, systemami informacji geograficznej i wykorzystaniem geoinformacji.

Name: ABTRAN Associação
Description: A ABTRAN é uma associação civil organizada para exercer atividades de fins não econômicos dotada de personalidade jurídica própria, sem objetivo de aferir lucro. Reúne pessoas físicas e jurídicas que exerçam funções ligadas à atividade de transporte rodoviário de cargas e pessoas com objetivos e fins comuns, não se confundindo, em nenhuma hipótese, com sociedades empresariais as quais possuem legislação especial de funcionamento.

Our events provide a platform for you to communicate with experts in your industry, exchange experiences, and network in a supportive environment. Join us to share your thoughts and gain valuable insights into your business.
 
هي شركة تنظيم فعاليات بتساعدك تفهم مجالك من ناحية التسويق وتساعدك تكبر وتتنافس بطريقة أفضل وتخلي بصمتك الإلكترونية.
احنا بنوفرلك منصة تواصل مع خبراء في مجالك وتبادل خبرات وتوسيع علاقاتك في مكان آمن لنشر أفكارك وتتواصل مع بعض.

Name: ACLL Asociación de Cumplimiento Legal y Laboral
Description: Ofrecemos membresias para el cumplimiento normativo, consultorías personalizadas en formalización empresarial, publicación y venta de libros técnicos y guías legales,  implementamos el sello de cumplimiento legal y laboral de buenas prácticas laborales y tenemos una comunidad de gestores de cumplimiento.

Description: Alleanza per la Psicologia è un’associazione di psicologi che nasce con l’intento di occuparsi di politica professionale.

Monthly Networking event in the Philly Burbs - https://lu.ma/cohesion

Name: United Founders
Description:
United Founders is a private community of Indonesia based founders and leaders.

Whose purpose is to help leaders gain better access to qualified advice, peer support & executive education -- all while forging genuine friendships and growing your respective businesses.

We achieve this by giving members access to a vibrant online business community, holding weekly business events & helping leaders form peer groups of like-minded leaders.

Name: International Alumni Alliance (INAA) - Central Michigan University
Description: The International Alumni Alliance in Central Michigan University is a global network dedicated to fostering lifelong connections, career growth, and collaboration among CMU students and alumni. Our mission is to support professional development, mentorship, and community engagement, empowering members to leverage a strong international network. Whether you’re a student, a recent graduate or an experienced professional, this alliance provides opportunities to stay connected with the CMU family worldwide.

Name: CSGE Berkeley
Description: The CSGE (Computer Science Graduate Entrepreneurs) is a student organization for graduate students and alumni of the Computer Science department at UC Berkeley. Our vision is a thriving culture of entrepreneurship in the department that generates the world's most influential startups and entrepreneurs. We work toward this goal by collecting ideas, experience, and connections that transfer from generation to generation of entrepreneurial Berkeley CS graduate students and alumni.

Name: Observatorio Ecuatoriano de Integridad y Compliance
Description: Queremos promover el aprendizaje e intercambio de ideas sobre el Compliance para la promoción de la integridad, innovación para la lucha contra la corrupción y el cambio de perspectiva en el desarrollo de actividades profesionales.

Name: UNION DES FONDEURS DU SUD-EST (UFSE)

Name: M.S.H Collective
Description: MSH aims to elevate women's lives by forming intergenerational relationships and creating a vibrant community of women-owned businesses that future-proof their legacies; through interactive conversations, innovative mentorship models, and immersive retreats.

Name: Programa Iberoamericano de Propiedad Industrial - IBEPI
Description: Promover el desarrollo de las sociedades iberoamericanas mediante el uso estratégico de la propiedad industrial en apoyo a las políticas públicas y aprovecharlo como instrumento de competitividad de los sectores industrial, comercial y de investigación de la región.

Name: BNI California CORE
Description:
BNI is where business professionals come together to build strong relationships and grow their businesses. We are part of the global network, dedicated to fostering a community of trusted connections and mutual support.  We are changing the way the world does business.

Professional Excellence. Reliable Networking. Business Growth. Supportive Community. Continuous Education

Name: ASEET - RUSL
Description: The Association of Electrical & Electronic Technology (ASEET) is a student-led organization under the Faculty of Technology at Rajarata University of Sri Lanka. ASEET aims to foster academic excellence, innovation, and collaboration among students and professionals in the fields of electrical and electronic technology. We provide a platform for knowledge sharing, skill development, and industry engagement, empowering students to become future leaders in their respective fields. Through workshops, technical sessions, and industry partnerships, ASEET contributes to building a strong foundation in cutting-edge technologies while promoting teamwork and professional growth.

Name: Southern Alameda County Dental Society
Description: SACDS has been serving it's members and the public since 1955.

Name: Hoffmann
Description: Page officielle de l’Organisation Francophone des Médecins Assistants en Neurologie

Name: Navigating Neurodivergence
Description: Promotes disability awareness through sharing lived experience, education and valuable resources, and connects like-minded individuals & organizations who share a common goal to embrace neurodiversity and enable neurodivergent individuals to lead more authentic lives.

Name: Career Support Network
Description:
We are a community network group working to support immigrants, refugees, and international students to start or resume their careers in the IT/technology domain.
We work with the below-listed communities to upskill, mentor them about industry trends and provide them with opportunities to succeed in their careers.
1) Refugees
2) Immigrants
3) International Students

Name: PNVC - Professional Nursing Validation Company
Description:
The Essential Certification for Modern Nursing 

PNVC empowers college educated nurses with a professional certification and career advancement that validates their education, differentiates them from ADN nurses, and elevates the nursing profession. PNVC provides nursing leaders a tool to validate knowledge beyond standard licensing exams, bridging licensure and specialty certifications to ensure nurses meet advanced qualifications and standards.

Name: Phi Gamma Nu - Epsilon Mu Chapter
Description: The Epsilon Mu Chapter of Phi Gamma Nu is a professional development organization made up of diverse individuals who share a passion for community engagement, personal growth, and building a strong network.

Name: Silicon Valley Sustainable Action Network
Description:
The Silicon Valley Sustainable Action Network is a community for professionals passionate about driving positive environmental and social change through business and technology. We're more than just a networking group; we're a catalyst for collaboration and knowledge-sharing in the sustainability and social impact space.

We offer regular events featuring industry and academic experts on thought-provoking talks, panel discussions, workshops, and networking events for industry professionals, innovators, and change-makers. Take a look at our website and subscribe to our Luma calendar to stay tuned for future events!

Name: WaardePlus
Description: Wij realiseren ‘een plus’ door concrete resultaten op te leveren én de verbeterkracht te vergroten. Altijd in het verlengde van de klantwaarde en passend bij het verbeterniveau waarin jouw organisatie zich bevindt.

Name: Colours Global Group
Description:
Colours Global exists to "Be and Bring Change" within the region by being a channel of good through our organisations - a creative agency, a foundation and a chapel.

The Colours Studios (est. 2020): 
We BUILD - communities online for businesses, government bodies, personalities, churches and NGOs through social media.

The Colours Foundation (est. 2011): 
We UPLIFT - vulnerable communities in Indonesia, Philippines, Malaysia and Singapore by designing solutions and running programmes with local NGOs and mobilizing the next gen to do more for those who have less.

The Colours Chapel (est. 2024):
We CELEBRATE - the beauty of Jesus Christ and God's undying love for humanity by creating spaces for people to have personal moments with God and learn more about the Bible.

Name: Phi Delta Theta Georgia Alpha- University of Georgia
Description: Fostering the principles of friendship, sound learning and moral rectitude in young men from all walks of life for success in all manner of careers.

Name: Sports and Entertainment Law Society
Description: The Sports and Entertainment Law Society (SELS) at Texas Southern University Thurgood Marshall School of Law is a student-led organization dedicated to educating, empowering, and connecting aspiring legal professionals interested in the dynamic fields of sports, music, film, television, and media. SELS provides its members with access to industry panels, networking events, and practical legal programming that bridges classroom theory with real-world application. Through collaboration with attorneys, executives, and creatives, SELS aims to increase representation and opportunity in sports and entertainment law.

Name: The Divorce Transition Professionals
Description:
DTP was originally formed in 2008 as a study group. Twelve professionals gathered once a month around a conference table to discuss how they could work together and collaborate to support those dealing with this life-changing event. In 2017, the next step was taken to make DTP more available to more people. We did this by creating professional networking chapters currently all over California and Illinois and Texas. These chapters provide a forum for our professionals to collaborate on a regular basis and provide educational speakers and presentations so as to make our members the best that the industry can provide.

In this way, we are 'Making Divorce Just a Little Bit Easier'.

Currently, we have over two hundred members in eighteen chapters. Whether you need legal, financial, accounting, real estate or mortgage support, private investigation, professional organizing, mental health or physical health, coaching, consulting, credit repair or debt consolidation, we have a professional that can help.

Name: Solutions From The Multiverse
Description: Every week we open a portal into the multiverse and find a new, unheard-of solution to problems in our universe. Expect the unexpected as Adam Braus (@ajbraus) and Scot Maupin (@scotmaupin) explore a new solution. Also there are jokes. www.solutionsfromthemultiverse.com

Name: Gateway St. Louis ASPPA Benefits Council
Description: The Gateway St. Louis ASPPA Benefits Council (ABC) functions as an unincorporated but chartered affiliate to the American Society of Pension Professionals and Actuaries (ASPPA). The ABC exists to assist ASPPA in achieving its mission of being the premier educator of retirement plan professionals and the preeminent voice and advocate for the employer-based retirement system. The ABC will further these objectives by providing local education and a forum for, the expression of views related to the provision of retirement plans and benefits. The ABC will also serve as a liaison between ASPPA and the retirement benefits community in its local geographic area.

Name: WiFAI - Magazine
Description:
Welcome to our community platform for women in food and ag! Our platform is designed to empower women and provide them with the tools and resources they need to succeed in the industry. Our three main offerings are to connect, collaborate, and capitalize.

Connecting: Our community platform allows you to connect with like-minded women in the industry. You can network, share ideas, and even create partnerships.

Collaborating: Collaboration is key in any industry, and we make it easy for you to find partners to work with. Whether it's launching a business or launching a new product, we can help you connect with the right people to make your vision a reality.

Capitalizing: We understand that funding is crucial for starting and growing a business. That's why we offer resources and opportunities for funding to help you achieve your goals.

Our community platform is committed to supporting women in food and ag by providing them with a space to network, collaborate, and raise capital. Join us today and take your career to the next level!

Looking forward to investing,  co-founding , researching, training,  speaking, sharing knowledge and experience, mentoring, coaching, sponsoring women agribusiness founders in Africa or joining Food and Agribusiness related programmes and events in Africa? Then join this group.

Name: Langley Leadership Group
Description: Langley Leadership Group (LLG) leverages years of advanced education and organizational leadership experience to make a life-changing impact on individuals and organizations. Whether it be on a business or personal level, our goal is to develop clients to reach their full potential.

Name: Souss Massa Entrepreneurship Association
Description:
Souss Massa Association for Entrepreneurship

The Souss Massa Association for Entrepreneurship is a youth-led civil organization founded to promote entrepreneurial culture in the Souss Massa region. It works to support and empower youth, women, and project holders through training, mentoring, and launching innovative initiatives.

Vision:
To contribute to building a dynamic and innovative society that places entrepreneurship at the heart of local development.

Missions:

- Organize training programs in entrepreneurship and innovation
- Support emerging projects and youth-led entrepreneurial initiatives
- Stimulate local economic life by supporting self-initiated projects
- Connect idea carriers with investors and incubators
- Promote entrepreneurial spirit within schools and universities

Fields of Intervention:

- Promoting entrepreneurial awareness
- School and university entrepreneurship
- Social entrepreneurship
- Economic empowerment of women and youth
- Innovation and technology
- Support for local and solidarity-based economy

Name: SGH SSH SSI
Description:
Die Schweizerische Gesellschaft für Hydrogeologie SGH ist die Fachvereinigung von WissenschaftlerInnen, PraktikerInnen und Behördenmitgliedern, die im Bereich der Hydrogeologie tätig sind. Zur Zeit zählt sie etwa 300 Mitglieder.
Die SGH ist Mitglied der Schweizerischen Akademie der Naturwissenschaften (scnat) und des Forums Hydrologie der Schweiz. Sie vertritt die Schweiz bei der Internationalen Vereinigung der HydrogeologInnen (International Association of Hydrogeologists IAH) und bildet das nationale Komitee.

Die SGH veranstaltet Tagungen zur Weiterbildung der Mitglieder und zur Förderung der persönlichen Kontakte. Sie bildet und leitet Arbeitsgruppen, die sich mit aktuellen hydrogeologischen Fragen auseinandersetzen. Sie äussert sich im Rahmen von Anhörungen und Vernehmlassungen zu Richtlinien und Gesetzen, welche das Grundwasser oder die Arbeit als Hydrogeologin oder Hydrogeologe betreffen.

2024 organisiert die SGH den internationalen Hydrogeologie-Kongress in Davos.

Name: SAAVA (Scottish Agricultural Arbiters and Valuers Association)
Description: Rural Trusted Advisors

Name: The LinkedIn Bar Association [LBA]
Description:
We’re law students, but this is not about moot courts or casebooks.
The LinkedIn Bar Association (LBA) is where law students learn to pass another kind of bar the one that gets you noticed, connected, and prepared for life after the faculty gates.

We’re building a space where:
1. Your LinkedIn stops looking like a ghost town.
2. Opportunities stop passing you by.
3. Networking doesn’t feel awkward,  it feels natural.

LBA is not another “serious” association. It’s our experiment: law students helping law students turn LinkedIn from just an app into a career weapon.
Because the truth is, the earlier we learn to use LinkedIn right, the better arguments we’ll have when life calls us to the real bar.

Name: DIME
Description:
DIME Indonesia merupakan sosial bisnis berbasis masyarakat yang dirancang untuk mendukung pengelolaan Pesisir dan Pulau Pulau Kecil. 
Tujuan dari DIME Indonesia sesuai dengan filosofi kami: 
1.	Bahwa organisasi berbasis bisnis masyarakat yang mampu meningkatkan Pengetahuan dan kesadaran masyarakat akan potensi laut berbasis Ekosistem.
2.	Selain itu juga bertujuan sebagai wadah untuk para penyelam untuk Berkembang dalam industry wisata yang competent. 

Untuk memperkuat tujuan DIME Indonesia dalam orientasi bisnis Masyarakat dengan sasaran : 
1.	Pemahaman masyarakat tentang penyelaman berbasis menjaga terumbu karang dalam Bisnis meningkat sebanyak 7 % pada Tahun 2025; 
2.	Pendukung pemerintah dalam pengambangan Jasa Informasi Wisata dapat terakomodasi hingga 5 % pada 2030 ; 
3.	Mendapatkan membangun Story Telling Jasa informasi Wisata masyarakat yang menarik sebagai penunjang misi wisata pada 2025

Name: Business and Film Association
Description:
As an organization, BAFA strives to give students a supportive, experiential environment to explore their passions in business and film.

The goals of the club will be to reimagine the industry standards for producing an actual film, while also providing a pathway for students to work in consulting for prospecting companies.

Name: International Human Rights Committee, ABA International Law Section
Description: The International Human Rights Committee drives creation, implementation and strengthening of legal, business, and cultural systems that monitor and respond to violations of human rights. This includes the intersection of business and human rights (also called Corporate Social Responsibility). The committee mobilizes members to engage with international issues, systems, and institutions, globally and domestically.

Name: Foreningen af Yngre Onkologer (FYO)
Description: FYO har til formål at fungere som talerør for yngre læger i specialet, at styrke den onkologiske uddannelse og at tilbyde kurser med relevans for yngre læger under videreuddannelse i klinisk onkologi.

Name: Berufsverband der Deutschen Urologie (BvDU) e.V.
Description:
Wir machen uns stark für Sie!

Der Berufsverband mit Sitz in Berlin vertritt Urologinnen und Urologen in allen wesentlichen Entscheidungsgremien der ärztlichen Selbstverwaltung, der innerärztlichen Verbünde und gegenüber Politik und Krankenkassen.

Wir sprechen für annähernd 2.500 Urologinnen und Urologen aus Klinik und Praxis: Wir sind Ihre Stimme in der Versorgung, in der Öffentlichkeit und in der Politik. 

Gleichzeitig bieten wir ein umfangreiches Dienstleistungsangebot und unterstützen und beraten sie in fachlichen, wirtschaftlichen und berufsrechtlichen Fragen. Für diese Aufgaben ist der BvDU auf Bundes- und
Landesebene sehr gut aufgestellt sowie breit mit zahlreichen
Partnerorganisationen vernetzt.

Als Interessenvertretung der Urologinnen und Urologen in Klinik und Praxis fördert der BvDU diese Ziele:
• Wirtschaftlicher Erfolg für die Urologie mit leistungsgerechten Honoraren
• Sicherstellung ärztlicher und beruflicher Entscheidungsfreiheit in Klinik und Praxis
• Intersektorale Zusammenarbeit: stationär – ambulant
• Förderung der Wertschätzung des urologischen Berufsstandes
• Attraktivität des Berufsfeldes Urologie erhalten und erhöhen

Name: Rotary Club of Midlothian
Description:
The Midlothian Rotary is comprised of business, government and community leaders, dedicated to the community and the world. We strive to improve the places where we live, work and play. And, as members of the Midlothian Rotary, we exercise our civic duties through professional fellowship and personal friendship.

The club meetings are held every Tuesday, with the exception of the fourth Tuesday (our social day), at Stonehenge Country Club at 7:30am.

Name: Penn State Branch of the American Meteorological Society (PSUBAMS/PSUCNWA)
Description: Welcome! PSUBAMS is the official student chapter of two meteorological professional organizations, the American Meteorological Society and the National Weather Association. Our mission is to provide professional development opportunities in the meteorological field to our members. We also facilitate social activities, outreach events, and take lead in the logistics for the trip to the Annual Conferences (AMS and NWA).

Name: Brandenburger Notarbund e.V.
Description:
Der Brandenburger Notarbund ist eine Vereinigung von Notarinnen und Notaren, Notarassessorinnen und Notarassessoren sowie Notarinnen und Notaren a.D im Land Brandenburg. Unsere Mission ist es, die Interessen unserer Mitglieder zu vertreten, ihnen eine starke Stimme zu geben, sie generationenübergeifend zu verbinden, ihre berufliche Entwicklung und des Standes insgesamt zu fördern und den Rahmen für notarielle Dienstleistungen in der Region mitzugestalten.

Mit einem tiefen Verständnis der regionalen Besonderheiten und einem starken Netzwerk von Kollegen stehen wir für Integrität, Professionalität und Vertrauen in der notariellen Praxis. Der Brandenburger Notarbund setzt sich aktiv für die Fortbildung und den fachlichen sowie persönlichen Austausch seiner Mitglieder ein, um höchste Standards in der rechtlichen Beratung und Betreuung zu gewährleisten.

Unsere zentralen Werte – Verbinden, Vertreten, Vertrauen – spiegeln unser Engagement wider, Verbindungen innerhalb der Branche zu stärken, die Interessen unserer Mitglieder kraftvoll zu vertreten und das Vertrauen in notarielle Dienstleistungen nachhaltig zu fördern.

Werden Sie Teil einer starken Gemeinschaft, die den rechtlichen Erfolg in Brandenburg mitgestaltet.

Name: Nevalliance
Description:
Nevalliance — Empowering Leaders, Shaping Futures

About Us
Nevalliance, established in 2013 by Dr. Neva Helena Alexander, is a certified MWBE leadership development firm headquartered in Melville, New York, with a global vision. We partner with purpose-driven organizations and ambitious professionals, equipping them with strategic clarity, global perspective, and transformative leadership skills.

Our Mission & Commitment
At Nevalliance, we are dedicated to Educate – Empower – Engage. Through innovative consulting, purposeful training, and curated leadership experiences, we help leaders navigate complexity, inspire meaningful change, and create lasting impact.

Signature Programs & Services

Leadership Development & Strategy: Tailored training, assessments, and one-on-one coaching to cultivate visionary leadership and strategic decision-making .
Management Consulting: Strategic alignment, leadership capacity building, and change management solutions for both public and private sectors .
Signature Events: Flagship gatherings like the *International Women’s Conference*, *Global Leadership Retreats*, and the *Strategic Leadership in Action* program provide immersive, globally informed leadership experiences.

Name: APPPEXPO
Description: From March4-7, 2026, APPPEXPO Shanghai (founded in 1993) will hold its 33th session. As the world's leading fair in the advertising, printing, packaging industries, and related industrial chains, APPPEXPO strives to bring the latest products and the technology of the field, to achieve the needs of its exhibitors and visitors, and to make your business more successful.

Name: Royal Statistical Society - Finance and Economics
Description: Fostering relationships between statisticians, economists and other professionals working in finance and economics

Name: CCCBI Women Influencing Business Community
Description:
The Women Influencing Business Community is dedicated to empowering women in the professional sphere by fostering connections, providing resources, and creating opportunities for growth and leadership.

Through educational programming, networking events, and community initiatives, the network strives to inspire meaningful conversations, support professional development, and celebrate the achievements of women across industries. By promoting collaboration and mentorship, the Women Influencing Business Committee aims to make a lasting impact on its members and the broader business community.

Name: Associação Brasileira de Sommeliers - RJ
Description:
ABS-Rio, a primeira associação do Brasil voltada para o ensino do vinho. 
Oferecemos: 
• Cursos para profissionais da área de Alimentos&Bebidas, hotelaria, lojas de vinho e importadoras
• Cursos para iniciantes e enófilos
• Degustações dirigidas
• Grupos de degustação
• Viagens educativas para regiões vitivinícolas

Associação sem fins lucrativos com sede na Praia do Flamengo e unidade na Barra da Tijuca.

Name: Mississippi Association for Spatial Technologies (MAST)
Description: The Mississippi Association for Spatial Technologies (MAST) is the largest organization of geospatial professionals in our region. Our organization supports professional growth, best practice geospatial standards, and geospatial education within our region. We currently have 100’s of active members in the region with diverse backgrounds including GIS professionals, data scientists, educators, and software developers. Our organization is responsible for the largest regional geospatial conference and for an annual scholarship to promote geospatial education. We meet bimonthly for regular meetings and our geospatial conference is held annually.

Name: Syndicat Val d'Oisien des Entreprises de Travaux Publics (SVOETP)
Description: Le Syndicat Val d’Oisien des Entreprises de Travaux Publics réunit les entreprises de Travaux Publics du département. Ces entreprises représentent les domaines de spécialité dans les secteurs de la route, de l'assainissement, de l'adduction d'eau, du génie civil, de l'électricité et de l'aménagement qualitatif.

Name: Young Founders in Orange County
Description: For young professional founders and the people who support them

Name: JobAtlas
Description:
JobAtlas helps people to identify their talents and navigate through a vast landscape of professions to find out what job matches them and connect to employers.

We're a very young company, and we're proud of the progress we've had so far. Some of our key achievements include:
- Winners of the Techstars Startup Weekend Kyiv
- Recipients of the EU program Seeds of Bravery seal of excellence for Innovative Entrepreneurship
- Prize winners of the AI HOUSE Bootcamp for using AI technology
- Members of the Techosystem union
- Participants in the Finnish-Ukrainian EdTech Launchpad
- Participants of the Win-win Deep Tech Accelerator

Name: Honest Grace Legal
Description: At Honest Grace Legal, our vision is to redefine the legal landscape with a commitment to truth, compassion, and justice. Our goal is to be a source of reliability, treating everyone with respect and care. We aim to empower individuals and businesses to navigate the complexities of the legal system with confidence and trust.

Name: SACRAMENTO ESTATE PLANNING COUNCIL
Description: The Sacramento Estate Planning Council is an interdisciplinary group of professionals who help clients with wealth management and transfer issues.  For over 60 years, the Council has provided a forum for members in several professional categories to learn about estate planning and administration in a collegial environment.

Name: Pre-Physician Assistant Society at Binghamton University
Description: A pre-professional organization of future Physician Assistants from Binghamton University hoping to connect with current and past Pre-Physician Assistant Society (PPAS) members.

Name: Alpha Tau Pi
Description: Alpha Tau Pi is the premier professional biology fraternity at the University of Michigan founded in 2020. We are dedicated to promoting and advancing the field of biology through academic excellence, leadership development, networking, and community outreach. As a growing fraternity, Alpha Tau Pi continues to uphold its core values of inclusion, collaboration, excellence, and integrity.

Name: Conseil Régional de l'Ordre des Géomètres Experts de Nancy
Description:
Véritable instance de régulation et de management stratégique de la profession, l’Ordre représente les géomètres-experts auprès des pouvoirs publics et impulse une véritable stratégie de développement de la profession.

Personne morale de droit privé instituée par la loi fondatrice n° 46-942 du 7 mai 1946, l’Ordre des géomètres-experts a pour vocation de veiller à la discipline et s’assure de la qualité du service fourni aux consommateurs.

Il est également garant du respect de la déontologie et des règles de l’art.

Afin de répondre aux enjeux transformatifs, il accompagne la profession et se réinvente, en développant un large panel de services techniques et managériaux.

Name: Réseau des Entrepreneurs de l'Oisans - REO
Description:
Le Réseau des Entrepreneurs de l’Oisans est ouvert à tous les entrepreneurs et chefs d’entreprises de l'Oisans, quel que soit leur domaine d’activité. 

Tous les 3e mardis du mois, nous nous donnons rendez-vous en fin de journée à l'« Espace Entreprises » du Bourg d’Oisans, au 39 rue Aristide Briand. 

L’occasion de se rencontrer, d’échanger, de s’entraider, de réseauter. 

Vous souhaitez découvrir le réseau ? Rejoignez-nous à notre prochaine rencontre ! Nous serons heureux et heureuses de vous rencontrer. 

À bientôt !

Name: AgroWorld
Description:
AGROWORLD is a trusted brand in Maharashtra managed by experienced journalists and agro professionals with 5.5 lakh verified, loyalist farmers subscribers. 

AGROWORLD is a leading Marathi agriculture, dairy, and farming magazine that started in 2014 with the motto - "Thirst for Agriculture and Rural Development". In last 9 years we are diversified our company profile as an Agri Media House with Agri events, farm to home procurement and supply chain management, dedicated call center and extension program for farmer empowerment. 

AGROWORLD’s Agriculture & Dairy Expo is the only exhibition having free entry to farmers, visitors with average 1,50,000 footfall. This will be our 19th and 20th Agri Dairy Expo. 

Since 2015, we have successfully conducted 18 B2C exhibitions with an average footfall of more than 1.5L farmer visitors. Starting this year, we are introducing a separate B2B section. 

AGROWORLD Expo will be organized in 4.5 acres within 4 domes at each venue. There is separate section for automobile, Agri equipment and machinery. Besides, separate half an acre field for demo plots. 

Schedule of our Expos is as follows:
Jalgaon - 03 to 06 November 2023, Venue - G.S. Ground, Jalgaon
(nearest airport - Jalgaon, nearest railway station - Jalgaon) 
Nashik - 12 to 15 January 2024, Venue - xxx Lawns, Pimpalgaon Baswant (NH3)
(nearest airport - Ozar, Nashik; nearest railway station - Nashik Road) 

We are the only Agri Expo in Maharashtra offering free entry with free parking and all basic amenities, facilities like free water, hygiene utilities. Unfortunately, many prominent politicians and organizers charge entry free, parking fee and even for drinking water.  250 plus agriculture, farming equipment and seed companies regularly participate in our exhibitions, such as Jain Irrigation, Israel Chemical Ltd, Nirmal Seeds, Ajit Seeds, KF Bioplant, etc.

Name: Die Karlsbader Selbstständigen e.V.
Description:
Die Karlsbader Selbstständigen e.V. ist das Netzwerk für Unternehmen in Karlsbad. Seit 1981 und mit über 100 Mitgliedern. 

Unser Ziel ist es, lokale Unternehmen zu unterstützen, Netzwerke zu fördern, Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten zu bieten und den Austausch zwischen den Mitgliedern zu stärken, um so das wirtschaftliche Wachstum und die Wettbewerbsfähigkeit in unserer Gemeinde zu sichern.

Deine Vorteile als Mitglied:

• Exklusive Rabatte  - z.B. für die Schaltung von Werbung im Gemeindeblatt. 
• Vernetzung - Erweiterte dein Netzwerk mit einzigartigen Kontakten.
• Sichtbarkeit - Profitiere von gemeinsamer Werbung offline und online.
• Know-How - Erhalte Zugang zu Experten-Workshops zu relevanten wirtschaftlichen Themen.

Und das Beste zum Schluss: 
Das erste Jahr ist kostenlos. Werde Mitglied, bringe dich ein und profitiere von einem starken Netzwerk.

Name: AIAA UGA
Description:

Name: Asia Oceania Geosciences Society
Description:
Asia Oceania Geosciences Society (AOGS) was established in 2003 to promote geosciences and its application for the benefit of humanity, specifically in Asia and Oceania and with an overarching approach to global issues.

Asia-Oceania region is particularly vulnerable to natural hazards, accounting for almost 80% human lives lost globally. AOGS is deeply involved in addressing hazard related issues through improving our understanding of the genesis of hazards through scientific, social and technical approaches.

AOGS holds annual conventions providing a unique opportunity of exchanging scientific knowledge and discussion to address important geo-scientific issues among academia, research institution and public.

Recognizing the need of global collaboration, AOGS has developed good co-operation with other international geo-science societies and unions such as the European Geosciences Union (EGU), American Geophysical Union (AGU), International Union of Geodesy and Geophysics (IUGG), Japan Geo-science Union (JpGU), and Science Council of Asia (SCA).

Elle regroupe des entreprises et des institutions académiques souhaitant unir leurs forces pour promouvoir, structurer et faire progresser les connaissances en matière de conception, modélisation, fabrication, métrologie et intégration de composants optiques freeform.

>> Qui sommes nous?
Académiques :
   COMMISSARIAT A L'ÉNERGIE ATOMIQUE ET AUX ÉNERGIES ALTERNATIVES
   INSTITUT D’OPTIQUE GRADUATE SCHOOL
   LABORATOIRE D'ASTROPHYSIQUE DE MARSEILLE (CNRS)
   ONERA
Industriels :
   BERTIN TECHNOLOGIES 
   ESSILORLUXOTTICA
   GAGGIONE
   GEYL OPTICAL CONSULTING
   IMAGINE OPTIC
   OPA OPTICAD
   PASCALE PARREIN
   SAFRAN
   SAVIMEX
   TEMATYS
   V-OPTICS
   WYSE LIGHT

>> Qu'est ce que le freeform?
Les optiques "freeform" sont des optiques qui n’ont plus d’axe ou de centre de symétrie. Elles font déjà partie du quotidien avec les verres de lunette progressifs, on les retrouve de plus en plus dans les systèmes optiques de précision et l'éclairage, l'astronomie ou l'automobile et elles représentent une technologie clé pour les équipements de réalité virtuelle et augmentée. L’utilisation d’optiques freeform permet de réduire l’encombrement des systèmes, d'ajouter des fonctionnalités et/ou d'augmenter leurs performances. Elles constituent aujourd’hui une rupture technologique que l’Association FO-RS se propose d’adresser collectivement.

Além disso, auxiliamos na elaboração de políticas e procedimentos de gestão documental, garantindo uma maior eficiência operacional.
Quando se trata de inventários, nossa equipe adaptada e dedicada realiza uma avaliação minuciosa de seus ativos, fornecendo relatórios detalhados e precisos. Isso ajuda a otimizar a gestão de estoque e bens, evitando perdas e facilitando o planejamento de recursos.
No que se refere a mudanças de estrutura (local), oferecemos um serviço completo, cuidando de cada etapa do projeto. Desde a análise das necessidades, passando pelo planejamento detalhado, até a execução da mudança, garantindo que sua transição (door to door) ocorra de modo eficaz.
Na mudança internacional, cuidamos de todos os aspectos logísticos, desde a embalagem, transporte seguro de seus bens, emissão de documentos, até o cumprimento de todas as exigências regulatórias e aduaneiras.
Como parceiros, somos um agente facilitador, empenhados em fornecer um atendimento personalizado e soluções adaptadas às suas necessidades específicas. 
Valorizamos o sigilo, confiança e discrição, entregando aos nossos clientes a melhor experiência.

Name: Willeke Advies Dierenwelzijn
Description:
Dierenwelzijn (volgens de UU Faculteit Diergeneeskunde): "Een dier verkeert in een staat van welzijn wanneer het in staat is zich actief aan zijn levensomstandigheden aan te passen en daarmee een toestand kan bereiken die het als positief ervaart." 

Maar wanneer kan een dier zich nog aanpassen aan zijn levensomstandigheden als we steden vol bouwen met nieuwe huizen? Als door het rustgebied van watervogels ineens een snelweg komt? 
Voor gemeentes en organisaties een groot spanningsveld: aan de ene kant is er een behoefte om meer te doen aan dierenwelzijn maar aan de andere kant staan er nogal wat andere uitdagingen op de agenda. 

Als Adviseur Dierenwelzijn (of dieren in de openbare ruimte) ondersteun ik gemeentes en organisaties met praktisch advies. Ik schakel makkelijk van strategisch naar tactisch en operationeel niveau. Van een dierenvisie naar een operationeel ganzenbeleid. Inzetbaar voor B&W van een gemeente, directie van een bedrijf die meer aan MVO wil doen op dierengebied, ambtenaren met dierenwelzijn in hun portefeuille, etc. 

Ik ben thuis in dierenwelzijn, dieren in het wild, wet- en regelgeving in Nederland op het gebied van dieren en de omgevingswet. Daarnaast ben in praktisch in mijn adviezen en werk ik graag projectmatig. 

Mijn achtergrond: organisatieadviseur/projectmanager/crisismanager, ondernemer sinds 2004, eigenaar van een online marketing & communicatie bureau en coach voor ondernemers. 

Voor particulieren blog ik over dieren op mijn website: www.wildediereninnederland.nl
Voor gemeentes hou ik actualiteiten bij op de website van Didor (dieren in de openbare ruimte): www.didor.nl (binnenkort online). 

Meer informatie? Bel mij (015-2010466) of stuur een mail naar mail@willeke.nl

Name: Verband des Kfz-Gewerbes NRW e.V.
Description:
Das Deutsche Kraftfahrzeuggewerbe wird in Nordrhein-Westfalen durch den KFZ-Verband NRW repräsentiert.

KFZ-NRW vertritt 46 Kfz-Innungen mit rund 8.800 Betrieben und ca. 81.000 Mitarbeitern, davon rund 17.000 Auszubildende. KFZ-NRW unterstützt all seine Mitglieder in der täglichen Auseinandersetzung mit dem ständig wachsenden Konkurrenzdruck, der Globalisierung und der rasanten technischen Entwicklung, die eine enorme Beweglichkeit und die kontinuierliche Bereitschaft für Veränderung bzw. zur Anpassung erforderlich machen.

Sie können auf unsere Hilfestellung zählen. Als Hauptansprechpartner für unsere Mitglieder beraten und unterstützen wir Sie bei der Gründung eines Betriebes oder aktuellen Problemen, bei Rechts- und Steuerfragen, bei Fragen zur Aus- und Weiterbildung oder in der regionalen Öffentlichkeitsarbeit. Wir schneiden unsere Leistungen auf Ihre Bedürfnisse zu.

Um Ihnen eine optimale Hilfestellung zu bieten und Sie aus erster Hand zu informieren, arbeiten wir eng mit dem Gesetzgeber, Behörden, Ministerien und anderen Organisationen zusammen. Darüber hinaus pflegt KFZ-NRW eine Reihe von Kooperationspartnerschaften mit dem Ziel, unser Angebot für Sie noch besser zu machen.

Name: IEEE COMSOC CHICAGO CHAPTER
Description:
The IEEE Communications Society (ComSoc) is a leading global community comprised of a diverse set of professionals with a common interest in advancing all communications and networking technologies. The Society has over 26,000 members in more than 149 countries.

ComSoc is paving the way for strategic and technical advancements in the emerging areas of 5G, SDN, IoT, Fog Computing, Big Data, Green ICT, fiber optics, and more. In addition to impactful one-day events and workshops, the Society holds numerous conferences and offers educational opportunities, including the IEEE WCET certification program and IEEE ComSoc Training. For more information, visit www.comsoc.org

Chicago Chapter of the Comsoc Society facilitates local technical meetings, community outreach programs, and day-long workshops. It provides local members with valuable opportunities to network  – enabling both personal and professional growth as well as sharing technical, professional, and personal interests with others in the IEEE Comsoc worldwide member community.

Join us for discussions and to share your thoughts via Oregon ComSoc social media portals using the links above.

Whether you’re a student, researcher, or industry partner, TAMU AMPP offers a dynamic community to foster education, innovation, and professional growth in corrosion science and engineering.

With 85% of jobs filled through connections rather than traditional postings (LinkedIn) and 78% of startup founders citing networking as vital to success (Forbes), WeAre leverages the power of networking, support and inspiration to transform sustainability and technology into industries where our people prosper and excel.

By participating, sharing, and interacting within this community, you directly and positively impact the growth, expansion and connection of Black, Latino, Pacific Islander, and Indigenous professionals in sustainability and technology. Together, we are driving change and growth for our people across generations.

Why WeAre Matters:

Representation and Innovation: WeAre is committed to expanding the presence of Black and Latino professionals in sustainability and technology, demonstrating that these fields are not just accessible but places where diverse talents thrive.

Inspiring Events: Our signature gatherings, like the WeAre Summit, feature keynotes, workshops, and hands-on learning experiences designed to educate, connect, and empower.

Collaboration and Growth: By exchanging ideas, testing innovative solutions, and building referral networks, WeAre fosters professional excellence and community-driven progress.

Name: Association for the Sociology of Religion
Description: The Association for the Sociology of Religion (ASR) is an international scholarly association that seeks to advance theory and research in the sociology of religion. Formed in 1938 as the American Catholic Sociological Society, ASR traces its roots to scholars in search of a hospitable place for both empirical study and social criticism animated by the social teachings of the church. Our 700+ members come from all continents of the world, and their interests and perspectives are just as diverse and global. The Association encourages and communicates research that ranges widely across the multiple themes and approaches in the study of religion, and is a focal point for comparative, historical and theoretical contributions to the field. In addition, the Association facilitates the sharing of members’ interests with sociologists in other associations and scholars of religion in other disciplines.

Name: North Dakota Society of Professional Engineers (NDSPE)
Description:
In 1941, the North Dakota Society of Professional Engineers was established in Jamestown, North Dakota. It became registered in North Dakota as a non-profit corporation in 1949, and it currently operates as a 501 c (6) organization. Many dedicated professionals have served the Society since its inception. The list of past officers continues to grow. To honor engineers who have made a significant contribution to the Society or to the profession, NDSPE presents its most distinguished award: the Elwyn F. Chandler award. Recipients of this award include very prominent and honorable professionals.

Regional Affiliation
NDSPE is part of the North Central Region of the National Society of Professional Engineers (NSPE). Other states in our region include South Dakota, Nebraska, Kansas, Missouri, Iowa, and Minnesota.

Organization
NDSPE consists of a Board of Directors, five Chapters, five Practice Divisions, and several Committees. Membership in NDSPE includes membership in the national society (NSPE), membership in one of the Practice Divisions, and membership in one of the local Chapters.

Name: IFPA - International Federation of Professional Aromatherapists
Description:
Why become an IFPA member?
Whether you are a practising aromatherapist or simply want to keep updated with industry happenings, as a global industry leader, the IFPA offers a selection of membership levels to suit every stage of your aromatherapy journey. All IFPA members are required to abide by our code of ethics and conduct.

A professional aromatherapist, with the letters mIFPA after their name, receives instant credibility in the healthcare world. The IFPA is constantly expanding into new countries, providing an incredible worldwide earning opportunity, regardless of where a member lives and works.

IFPA has been approved by the Complementary and Natural Healthcare Council to verify applications for registration in aromatherapy.  All members who trained through one of IFPA’s accredited training providers are automatically eligible to register with the CNHC, who are the UK regulator for Complementary Healthcare Practitioners. General Medical Council (GMC) guidance confirms that doctors may refer patients to practitioners on such accredited registers. Please click here to download a CNHC registration form.

As a non-practicing aromatherapist, membership of the IFPA allows you to stay in touch with other aromatherapists and to stay up to speed with the latest industry news and advances.

The International Federation of Professional Aromatherapists (IFPA) was formed in 2002, an amalgamation of the Register of Qualified Aromatherapists and the International Society of Professional Aromatherapists. The chief purpose of the IFPA is to support aromatherapists and improve standards of aromatherapy education and practice.

IFPA is now the largest, aromatherapy specific, professional practitioner organisation in the UK and is currently active in 52 countries. We are based in Hinckley, Leicestershire in the United Kingdom.

Description:
SATS is the voice of professionals working in the field of Transplantation.

Following the COVID pandemic and the very successful SATS/SATiBA Congress in November 2022, discussions showed that SATS Congresses would benefit from being in the alternate years, to some of our fellow organisations, to allow optimal attendance. As a result, we are busy planning the 30 th SATS congress for this year 17 – 19 November 2023. With this date now on the horizon, we have as a SATS EXCO, together with Alexia Michaelides, Fiona McCurdie and Event Options planning an exciting meeting.

Our theme is: Transplant Teamwork Together and we hope to showcase to each other, what all members of our transplant teams are doing.

The scientific committee is currently planning an inclusive interactive programme, including workshops, debates, lectures and abstract presentations, which should appeal to everyone. We are hoping that senior colleagues will also help grow our ‘Transplant Teams’ for the future and bring along junior colleagues, as well as nursing and allied health professionals.

Topics include ABOi transplants, kidney-paired donations, Lessons learned from Transplant co-ordinators, and Ethics in Transplantation.

The venue is the Graduate School of Business in the V&A Waterfront district in Cape Town which offers state-of-the-art conference facilities, accompanied by beautiful views of Table Mountain. There is onsite Protea Hotel accommodation at the venue, but also other reasonably priced options in the vicinity. We are planning a rooftop networking evening but have also left time for people to catch up with friends at the many surrounding restaurants in the area.

Save the Date and we look forward to seeing you and your colleagues there. To register visit www.satransplantcongress.co.za

Name: Association of Conflict, Peace and Security Experts in Africa (ACPSEA)
Description:
The Association of Conflict, Peace and Security Experts in Africa (ACPSEA) is an organization that brings together experts and practitioners in the field of conflict, peace, and security to promote peace and stability across Africa.

Vision:
A peaceful and stable Africa, where conflicts are resolved through dialogue and collaboration, and where all individuals can live in dignity and prosperity.

Mission:

To promote peace and security in Africa by:

- Building a community of experts and practitioners
- Fostering collaboration and knowledge sharing
- Providing training and capacity-building programs
- Conducting research and policy analysis
- Advocating for peace and security policies

Objectives:
1. Establish a network of conflict, peace, and security experts in Africa
2. Provide a platform for knowledge sharing and collaboration
3. Develop and implement training programs for capacity building
4. Conduct research and policy analysis on conflict, peace, and security issues
5. Advocate for peace and security policies in Africa
6. Foster partnerships with governments, international organizations, and civil society
7. Promote African-led solutions to conflict, peace, and security challenges

Core Values:

- Expertise: Valuing knowledge and expertise in conflict, peace, and security
- Collaboration: Fostering partnerships and collaboration
- Integrity: Upholding ethical standards and integrity
- Inclusivity: Promoting diversity and inclusivity
- African-led: Prioritizing African-led solutions and perspectives

The structure:
- General Assembly for all members
- Executive Council for leaders (Founder, President, Secretary-General, Leaders of the Councils, Secretaries of the Councils, Finance Officer, Head of Party and Country Coordinators)
- Council for Conflict Experts (Lead, Secretary and Three other members)
- Council for Peace Experts (Lead, Secretary and Three other members)
- Council for Security Experts (Lead, Secretary and Three other members)

Name: Colegio de Profesionales de la Seguridad Privada de Chile
Description:
NUESTRAS MISION Y VISION

Misión

Promovemos el progreso de la Seguridad Privada, participando activamente en la emisión de criterios en las materias que nos competen para el realce de la profesión y bienestar laboral de nuestros colegiados.

Visión

Posicionarnos como el ente unificador en los temas de Seguridad Privada en el país, incentivando el desempeño ético de las funciones profesionales de los colegiados, acatando las leyes de la República y salvaguardando el profesionalismo de sus integrantes.


Los invitamos a visitar nuestra pagina web.

www.cpsegchile.cl/


Porque colegiarse?

CPSEG CHILE es una asociación sin fines de lucro, que tiene por objetivo la profesionalización y el actuar ético de sus integrantes frente a la sociedad. Un socio colegiado tiene la posibilidad de enriquecerse con el prestigio que brinda ser un verdadero profesional reconocido por sus pares, lo cual conlleva una enorme responsabilidad, cual es, mantener y acrecentar el prestigio de la profesión y de nuestra asociación en cada una de sus actuaciones.
Ser colegiado es símbolo del reconocimiento de las capacidades, de la competencias y conocimientos del profesional, que le brindan sus iguales y que lo posicionan a un nivel superior. Ser un Profesional acreditado por CPSEG CHILE, es sinónimo de calidad y confianza, de respeto y admiración por todos aquellos que también cuentan con grandes capacidades y reconocido prestigio. Es por ello, que un experto en seguridad privada que pertenezca a CPSEG CHILE es un gran Profesional.


A disposicion de Empresas nacionales e internacionales, Head Hunter.  El Colegio de Profesionales de la Seguridad Privada de Chile, cuenta con bases de datos de Profesionales en seguridad física, Electrónica, informática, tecnológicas, en logística, producción, protección de activos, prevención de riesgos, gestion de riesgos de desastres, clínicas de salud, instalaciones aeroportuarias, seguridad de campus, para brindar asesorias y consultorias.

Name: Berufsverband kommunaler Unternehmensleiter e.V. (BKU)
Description:
Der Berufsverband kommunaler Unternehmensleiter e.V. (BKU) mit Sitz in Frankfurt am Main unterstützt Geschäftsleiterinnen und Geschäftsleiter von kommunal beherrschten Unternehmen bei juristischen, strategischen und taktischen Fragestellungen, die in unmittelbarem Zusammenhang mit ihrer beruflichen Tätigkeit und dem eigenen Dienstverhältnis stehen. 

Beispiele:  
-	Abschluss, Verlängerung, Änderung, Aufhebung von Dienstverträgen
-	Vergütungs- und Versorgungsfragen
-	Haftungs- und Regressansprüche aus dienstlicher Tätigkeit

Die rechtliche Beratung und Vertretung der Mitglieder in allen dienstvertraglichen Angelegenheiten erfolgt durch ein Team erfahrener und spezialisierter Vertrags- und Kooperationsanwälte. Die Mitgliedschaft beinhaltet darüber hinaus ein umfassendes Rechtsschutzversicherungsprogramm (Top-Manager-Rechtsschutz), um die Risiken rechtlicher Auseinandersetzungen umfänglich abzudecken. 

Vereinsmitglied kann werden, wer Geschäftsleiter (z.B. Vorstand / Geschäftsführer / Werkleiter o.ä.) eines kommunalen Unternehmens oder besonderer Verantwortungsträger aus dem kommunalen Unternehmensbereich ist oder war. 

Der BKU kooperiert mit dem Berufsverband der Geschäftsleiter der Sparkassen-Finanzgruppe (ISV) und der ÖRAG als führendem Rechtsschutz-Versicherer im kommunalen Bereich.

Kommen Sie bei Fragen bezüglich der Mitgliedschaft gerne auf uns zu!

Name: Landesverband Nordrhein-Westfalen im Deutschen AnwaltVerein e.V.
Description:
Der Landesverband Nordrhein-Westfalen im Deutschen Anwaltverein ist ein Verein der Vereine. Er ist der Zusammenschluss der 57 örtlichen Anwaltsvereine in den Oberlandesgerichtsbezirken Düsseldorf, Hamm und Köln und repräsentiert auf Landesebene  rund  Rechtsanwältinnen und Rechtsanwälte in diesem Bundesland.

Der Zweck des Vereins ist die Wahrung, Pflege und Förderung aller beruflichen und wirtschaftlichen Interessen der Rechtsanwaltschaft und des Anwaltsnotariats in Nordrhein-Westfalen, insbesondere durch Förderung von Rechtspflege und Gesetzgebung, Aus- und Fortbildung sowie Pflege des Gemeinsinns und des wissenschaftlichen Geistes der Rechtsanwaltschaft.Der Landesverband Nordrhein-Westfalen führt regelmäßig Arbeitsgespräche mit dem Deutschen Richterbund, den Präsidenten und Geschäftsführern der Rechtsanwaltskammern Düsseldorf, Köln und Hamm sowie den Mitgliedern im Rechtsausschuss des Landtags. Seit 1977 gehören die  Einladungsabende für die Angehörigen des Justizministeriums sowie für Parlamentarier zur regelmäßigen Einrichtung. Erfolgreich wirkt der Landesverband in rechtspolitischen Fragen mit. Er nimmt bei den Beratungen zu Gesetzentwürfen direkten Einfluss durch Stellungnahmen, vor allem gegenüber dem Justiz- und dem Innenministerium, aber auch gegenüber der Landesregierung und dem Landtag.Innerhalb der Verbandspolitik des Deutschen Anwaltvereins (DAV) sieht der Landesverband Nordrhein-Westfalen sich als  Bindeglied zwischen den örtlichen Anwaltsvereinen auf lokaler Ebene und dem DAV auf Bundesebene. Er unterhält intensive Kontakte zu Präsidium, Vorstand und Geschäftsführung des DAV sowie den Landesverbänden in den anderen Bundesländern. Der Landesverband sieht sich aber auch als Mittler zwischen den 57 örtlichen Anwaltsvereinen. Regelmäßige Zusammenkünfte zum Informations-, Erfahrungs- und Meinungsaustausch gehören zum festen Programm.

Name: Alpha Epsilon Zeta
Description:
Alpha Epsilon Zeta (AEZ) is an undergraduate professional fraternity at the University of California, Berkeley. AEZ distinguishes itself from traditional professional fraternities by embracing a multidisciplinary focus. The brothers of AEZ come from a wide variety of majors, ranging from biology to business to engineering, and each brother strives to be well-versed in all aspects of every academic discipline. We are dedicated to promoting and fostering professionalism, brotherhood, unity, and tradition.

Since its establishment in 2003, AEZ has grown substantially and currently has more than 200 active and alumni brothers. 

AEZ has 3 primary divisions: Paradigm (Consulting Arm), Zenith (Investment Fund), Innovate@Berkeley (Startup Conference).

Name: Boss Babes & Brunch
Description:
Boss Babes & Brunch is female identifying networking experience organization founded in 2022, made to empower small business entrepreneurs in creating a community around their big dreams.

Boss Babes & Brunch is more than just brunch; it's a female-identifying networking experience like no other, designed to foster meaningful connections and catalyze personal and professional growth.

In a society that celebrates the achievements of women from all walks of life, Boss Babes & Brunch creates a haven where ambition is the star of the show. 
Here, CEOs, artists, engineers, activists, and leaders of every kind come together to celebrate their journeys, share their stories, and inspire one another.

At Boss Babes & Brunch, we believe that networking is about more than just business cards; it's about building authentic relationships. We provide a welcoming atmosphere where women can exchange ideas, offer mentorship, and form a community of lasting support. It's a place where you can find your tribe, collaborate on projects, and uncover opportunities that empower your dreams.

So, whether you're a seasoned professional looking to expand your network or a rising star seeking guidance and camaraderie, Boss Babes & Brunch is the place for you. Join us in celebrating the strength, resilience, and achievements of female-identifying individuals. Together, we're rewriting the narrative, one brunch at a time. Boss Babes & Brunch: Where women connect, collaborate, and conquer together."

Name: Zimbabwe Doctors in Australia (ZIMDA)
Description:
Connecting Australian medical doctors of Zimbabwean heritage. ZIMDA was created in order to use our collective efforts to thrive in Australia, continuously improve professionally and more importantly to provide assistance to the Zimbabwean public health services in various ways. Official arrangements for creating the organisation were coined by Dr Sharon Miller and Dr Langton Nyoni in 2016. This culminated in an inaugural meeting in the Gold Coast (Qld) on November 5 2016 were ZIMDA (Zimbabwe Doctors in Australia) was born.

Our objectives are:
1. Creating a database of Zimbabwean Doctors of Zimbabwean heritage in Australia identified by location, speciality, special skill sets, and interests.
2. To promote social activities amongst ZIMDA doctors and families and the community at large
Promote heath related social functions in Zimbabwe and Australia
3. To assist and give guidance regarding working and living in Australia through mentoring.
4. To promote continuous development through provision of CPD courses
5. To generate Observerships opportunities for Zimbabwean International Medical Graduates and foster networking and job opportunities.
6. To help Zimbabwean based doctors and trainees
7. To help Zimbabwean public health services: equipment supply, academia, training
8. To promote/mediate communication between the organisation and other Australian medical organisations
9. To maintain the association as a non-political and non-profit organisation

Name: WISE Women Community
Description:
The WISE Women Community is where women return to themselves — and rise together.

This is a space where wisdom leads, intuition guides, support strengthens, and empowerment grows. Where women come to reconnect with themselves, their voice, their courage, and their clarity about what comes next.

We believe you don't need a title to lead your life with intention.

Between shifting expectations, the noise of daily responsibilities, and the "what is even happening right now?" energy of the world — so many of us are craving connection, clarity, and a place to land. A place to grow without pressure. A place to be real. A no-judgment zone. A place to not do it alone.

We are not a networking group. We are a community that grows women from the inside out.

Through gatherings, programs, and shared experiences rooted in research and real-world wisdom, WISE Women offers a space to build courage, strengthen boundaries, deepen self-trust, and feel truly supported by other women who get it.

As companies reduce support for women and ask us to do more with less, we're not waiting for permission. We're building our own ecosystem of wisdom, growth, and meaningful connection.

Led by Michelle Poole, PCC, executive coach and Certified Dare to Lead Facilitator, WISE Women is the natural evolution of the Amazing Women Alliance — now more intentional, more grounded, more connected.

Come grow with us. Come find your people.

Name: REAC Auxilio en Carretera
Description:
La Red de Empresas de Auxilio en Carretera (REAC) es una red empresarial que aglutina a las principales empresas de Auxilio en Carretera de nuestro país. Nacida en 2017, su objetivo principal es la generación de alianzas estratégicas entre los miembros de la red, así como una colaboración permanente y productiva dentro del sector.

En un mercado cambiante, la idea es que las compañías del sector puedan competir eficazmente y asegurar así su continuidad. Se trata de obtener beneficios individuales mediante la acción conjunta.
